1Kings22:3 Aavu nĩwakũlilye anini make atĩĩ
1Kings22:4 O ta ũu Aavu nĩwaneenie na Yeosavati amũkũlya atĩĩ
1Kings22:5 Ĩndĩ mbee wa tũtanathi
1Kings22:6 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Aavu mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli woombanisye athani onthe; maĩ athani ta maana ana. Nĩwamakũlilye atĩĩ
1Kings22:7 Ĩndĩ nake Yeosavati nĩwakũlilye atĩĩ
1Kings22:8 Aavu nĩwamũsũngĩie amwĩa atĩĩ
1Kings22:9 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Aavu weetie ũmwe wa anini make na amwĩa atĩĩ
1Kings22:10 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu Aavu mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli
1Kings22:11 Ũmwe wa athani asu
1Kings22:12 Athani ala angĩ onthe o namo nĩmathanie o ũndũ ũmwe mayasya atĩĩ
1Kings22:13 Mũndũ ũla watũmĩtwe akete Mwathani Mikaia nĩwamwĩie atĩĩ
1Kings22:14 Ĩndĩ Mikaia amwĩa atĩĩ
1Kings22:15 Yĩla Mikaia wavikie vala ve Mũsumbĩ Aavu
1Kings22:16 Ĩndĩ nake Aavu amwĩa atĩĩ
1Kings22:17 Mikaia amwĩa
1Kings22:18 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Aavu weeie Yeosavati atĩĩ
1Kings22:19 Mikaia nĩwaendeeie kũneena asya atĩĩ
1Kings22:20 Mwĩai Ngai nũkũlilye atĩĩ
1Kings22:21 Nĩvo ĩndĩ vaumĩlile veva ũmwe waũngama mbee wa Mwĩai Ngai na wasya
1Kings22:22 Mwĩai Ngai nĩwũkũlilye
1Kings22:23 “Ũu nĩw'o wĩkĩkĩte. Mwĩai Ngai nũtumĩte athani aa maku malikwa nĩ veva wa ũvũngũ
1Kings22:24 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Nzetekia mwana wa Kenaana wathengeeie vala ve Mikaia na amũkũna ĩkovi ĩtau
1Kings22:25 Mikaia nĩwamũsũngĩie amwĩa
1Kings22:26 Mũsumbĩ Aavu nĩweeaie asya
1Kings22:27 Matavyei mũmee nĩmamwove yela
1Kings22:28 Mikaia nĩweeie mũsumbĩ atĩĩ
1Kings22:29 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Aavu mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli na Yeosavati mũsumbĩ wa Yuta maendie kũvithũkĩa ndũa ya Lamothi ĩla yĩ Ngileati.
1Kings22:30 Aavu nĩwaneenie na Yeosavati amwĩa atĩĩ
1Kings22:31 Mũsumbĩ wa Silia nĩweeaĩĩte anene make mĩongo ĩtatũ na elĩ ma makasya make ma kaũ
1Kings22:32 Kwoou yĩla anene asu ma makasya ma kaũ moonie Yeosavati
1Kings22:33 anene asu ma makasya ma kaũ nĩmamanyie kana ti we mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli
1Kings22:34 Ĩndĩ mũsikalĩ ũmwe wa Silia nĩwakootie ũta wake atavangĩte eatha ũũ
1Kings22:35 Mũthenyanĩ ũsu kaũ nĩwaendeeie kwingĩva. Mũsumbĩ Aavu aaĩw'e ĩkasyanĩ yake ya kaũ elekele Asilia
1Kings22:36 Syũa yĩithũa asikalĩ ma kaũ onthe nĩmeewie mwĩao ũkwasya
1Kings22:37 Kwoou Mũsumbĩ Aavu nĩwakwie
1Kings22:38 Ĩkasya yake ya kaũ nĩyathambĩiw'e ndianĩ ya Samalia. Ngitĩ nĩsyalambalambisye nthakame yake
1Kings22:39 Maũndũ ala angĩ onthe Aavu weekie yĩla wasumbĩkĩte
1Kings22:40 Aavu amina kũkw'a
1Kings22:41 Mwakanĩ wa kana wa kũsumbĩka kwa Aavu mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli
1Kings22:42 Yeosavati atw'ĩkie mũsumbĩ e na ũkũũ wa myaka mĩongo ĩtatũ na ĩtano. Asumbĩkie Yuta myaka mĩongo ĩlĩ na ĩtano e Yelũsalemu. Inyia wake eetawa Asuva mwĩĩtu wa Silii.
1Kings22:43 Yeosavati eekaa maũndũ ala mamwendeeasya Mwĩai Ngai
1Kings22:44 Yeosavati na mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli nĩmekalile me na mũuo katĩ woo.
1Kings22:45 Maũndũ ala angĩ onthe Yeosavati weekie yĩla wasumbĩkĩte
1Kings22:46 Nĩwavetangie kuma nthĩ ya Yuta
1Kings22:47 Nthĩ ya Etomu ndyaĩ na mũsumbĩ; yatongoew'e nĩ mũnini wa mũsumbĩ.
1Kings22:48 Yeosavati nĩwaseũvisye meli iilyĩ ta ila syaĩ sya Talisisi
1Kings22:49 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Aasia mwana wa Aavu weeie Yeosavati atĩĩ
1Kings22:50 Yeosavati nĩwakwie na athikwa mbũanĩ sya kĩ-ũsumbĩ Ndũanĩ ya Ndeviti. Yeolamu mwana wake nĩwatw'ĩkie mũsumbĩ ĩtina wake.
1Kings22:51 Mwakanĩ wa ĩkũmi na mũonza wa kũsumbĩka kwa Yeosavati mũsumbĩ wa Yuta
1Kings22:52 Aasia nĩwavĩtĩisye Mwĩai Ngai. Aatĩĩie mwĩkalĩle mũthũku wa Aavu ĩthe wake
1Kings22:53 Nĩwathaithaa ngai ĩla yĩtawa Mbaali na kũmĩthũkũma. Nĩwathatisye Mwĩai Ngai
2Kings1:1 Aavu mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli amina kũkw'a
2Kings1:2 Ĩvinda yĩmwe
2Kings1:3 Ĩndĩ mũlaĩka wa Mwĩai Ngai nĩwaneenie na Eliya
2Kings1:4 Tavyai mũsumbĩ mũmwĩe Mwĩai Ngai easya ũũ
2Kings1:5 Andũ asu matũmĩtwe nĩmasyokie kũla kwĩ mũsumbĩ. Mũsumbĩ nĩwamakũlilye
2Kings1:6 Nĩmamũsũngĩie mamwĩa atĩĩ
2Kings1:7 Mũsumbĩ nĩwamakũlilye atĩĩ
2Kings1:8 Nĩmamũsũngĩie mamwĩa atĩĩ
2Kings1:9 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũsumbĩ watũmie mũtongoi ũmwe wa asikalĩ mĩongo ĩtano
2Kings1:10 Eliya nĩwamũsũngĩie amwĩa atĩĩ
2Kings1:11 Mũsumbĩ nĩwatũmie mũtongoi ũngĩ wa asikalĩ
2Kings1:12 Eliya nĩwamũsũngĩie amwĩa atĩĩ
2Kings1:13 O ĩngĩ mũsumbĩ nĩwatũmie mũtongoi ũngĩ wa asikalĩ mĩongo ĩtano
2Kings1:14 Ala atongoi angĩ elĩ ma asikalĩ
2Kings1:15 Mũlaĩka wa Mwĩai Ngai nĩwaneenie na Eliya amwĩa atĩĩ
2Kings1:16 Mavika vo
2Kings1:17 Kwoou Aasia nĩwakwie o tondũ Mwĩai Ngai watavĩtye Eliya. Aasia ndaĩ na ana ma aũme
2Kings1:18 Maũndũ ala angĩ Aasia weekie yĩla wasumbĩkĩte
2Kings2:1 Ĩvinda ya Mwĩai Ngai ya kwambatya Eliya ĩtunĩ e kĩlinginĩ nĩyavikie. Ĩvindanĩ yĩu Eliya na Elisa maĩ nzĩanĩ maumĩte Ngilikali.
2Kings2:2 Me nzĩanĩ Eliya nĩwaneenie na Elisa amwĩa atĩĩ
2Kings2:3 Nguthu ya athani ala mekalaa Mbethi-eli nĩyaendie vala ve Elisa na yamũkũlya atĩĩ
2Kings2:4 Eliya nĩwaneenie na Elisa o ĩngĩ amwĩa atĩĩ
2Kings2:5 Nguthu ya athani ala mekalaa Yeliko nĩyaendie vala ve Elisa na yamũkũlya atĩĩ
2Kings2:6 Eliya nĩwaneenie na Elisa ĩvinda ya katatũ amwĩa atĩĩ
2Kings2:7 Athani mĩongo ĩtano kuma ĩla nguthunĩ ya athani
2Kings2:8 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Eliya waumisye ngũa yake ya ĩũlũ
2Kings2:9 Me vau mũingo
2Kings2:10 Eliya nĩwamwĩie atĩĩ
2Kings2:11 Eliya na Elisa maendee kũneena maendanĩtye me elĩ
2Kings2:12 Elisa oona ũndũ kweekĩka nĩwaneenie na wasya mũnene asya atĩĩ
2Kings2:13 Nĩvo ĩndĩ woosie ngũa ya Eliya ĩla yavalũkile na asyoka aũngama ũtee wa Ũsĩ wa Yolotani.
2Kings2:14 Nĩwakũnie kĩw'ũ na ngũa ĩsu ya Eliya aikũlya
2Kings2:15 Ala athani mĩongo ĩtano kuma Yeliko mamũsyaĩĩsye nĩmaneenie masya atĩĩ
2Kings2:16 Nĩmaneenie na Elisa mamwĩa atĩĩ
2Kings2:17 Nĩmathetheeisye nginya Elisa eew'a nthoni sya kũmavata na amea
2Kings2:18 Nĩvo ĩndĩ masyokie Yeliko vala Elisa wameteelete. Elisa nĩwamakũlilye atĩĩ
2Kings2:19 Andũ amwe kuma ndũanĩ ya Yeliko nĩmaendie vala ve Elisa na mamwĩa atĩĩ
2Kings2:20 Elisa nĩwameie atĩĩ
2Kings2:21 Elisa nĩwaendie kĩthimanĩ na ekya ũla mũnyũ nthĩnĩ wakyo na asya atĩĩ
2Kings2:22 Kwoou kĩw'ũ kĩu nĩkyaseũvie kuma mũthenya ũsu nginya ũmũnthĩ
2Kings2:23 Elisa nĩwaumie Yeliko aende Mbethi-eli. E nzĩanĩ aendete
2Kings2:24 Yĩla wasyaisye ĩtina na oona imwana isu
2Kings2:25 Elisa nĩwaendie nginya Kĩĩmanĩ kya Kalimeli
2Kings3:1 Yolamu mwana wa Aavu atw'ĩkie mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli mwakanĩ wa nyanya
2Kings3:2 Nĩwavĩtĩisye Mwĩai Ngai
2Kings3:3 Ĩndĩ o vamwe na ũu
2Kings3:4 Mũsumbĩ Mesa wa Moavi nĩwaĩthasya malondu. Kĩla mwaka aaĩlĩte kũnenga mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli tũtena twa malondu ngili ĩana yĩmwe
2Kings3:5 Ĩndĩ yĩla Aavu mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli wakwie
2Kings3:6 Kwoou Mũsumbĩ Yolamu nĩwaumie Samalia na athi oombany'a asikalĩ ma Ĩsilaeli onthe.
2Kings3:7 Nĩwatũmie andũ mathi kũla kwĩ Yeosavati mũsumbĩ wa Yuta makamwĩe atĩĩ
2Kings3:8 Tũkesĩla ngalĩko yĩva tũendete kũmavithũkĩa?” Yolamu nĩwamũsũngĩie amwĩa
2Kings3:9 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Mũsumbĩ Yolamu e na mũsumbĩ wa Yuta na wa Etomu mambĩlĩĩlye kyalo. Ĩtina wa kũthi vandũ va mĩthenya mũonza
2Kings3:10 Yolamu mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli nĩwaneenie aseng'ete akũlya atĩĩ
2Kings3:11 Mũsumbĩ Yeosavati nĩwakũlilye atĩĩ
2Kings3:12 Mũsumbĩ Yeosavati nĩwaneenie asya atĩĩ
2Kings3:13 Elisa nĩwakũlilye mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli atĩĩ
2Kings3:14 Elisa nĩwamũsũngĩie amwĩa atĩĩ
2Kings3:15 Ndetee mũndũ wĩsĩ kũkũna ngitaa.” Mũndũ ũsu aendee kũkũna ngitaa
2Kings3:16 na asya atĩĩ
2Kings3:17 O na vala mũiona kĩseve kana mbua
2Kings3:18 Elisa nĩwaendeeie kũneena asya atĩĩ
2Kings3:19 Mũkasinda ndũa syoo syonthe ila mbiĩĩe ikalũlũmĩĩlw'a na ila nene. Mũkatemangĩĩa nthĩ mĩtĩ yoo yonthe ĩla mĩseo
2Kings3:20 Ũnĩ ũsu kwakya
2Kings3:21 Yĩla Amoavi meewie kana ala asumbĩ atatũ nĩmokĩte kũmavithũkĩa
2Kings3:22 Yĩla maamũkie ũnĩ ũsu kwakya tene
2Kings3:23 Nĩmaneenie maseng'ete masya
2Kings3:24 Ĩndĩ yĩla Amoavi mavikie vala andũ ma Ĩsilaeli mambĩte maeema
2Kings3:25 Nĩmaanangie ndũa syoo
2Kings3:26 Mũsumbĩ wa Moavi nĩwamanyie kana nũendee kũsindwa kaũnĩ
2Kings3:27 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũsumbĩ ũsu wa Moavi woosie mwana wake ũla mũkũũ
2Kings4:1 Kĩveti kya mũndũ ũmwe waĩ wa nguthu ya athani
2Kings4:2 Elisa nĩwakũlilye kĩveti kĩu atĩĩ
2Kings4:3 Elisa nĩweeie kĩveti kĩu atĩĩ
2Kings4:4 Ĩtina wa ũu
2Kings4:5 Kĩveti kĩu nĩkyaumie vala ve Elisa na kyathi kyeevingĩa nyũmba kĩ na ana makyo. Ana makyo nĩmaendeeie kũkĩnengeleelya sũva isu nakyo kyaendeea kũsyonoesya mauta.
2Kings4:6 Yĩla sũva isu syonthe syausũie
2Kings4:7 Kĩveti kĩu nĩkyaendie na kyatavya Elisa
2Kings4:8 Mũthenya ũmwe
2Kings4:9 Mũndũ mũka ũsu nĩwaneenie na mũũme amwĩa atĩĩ
2Kings4:10 Eka twake kasũmba kanini nyũmbanĩ yaitũ ĩũlũ
2Kings4:11 Mũthenya ũmwe Elisa nĩwaendie Sunemu
2Kings4:12 Nĩwatũmie Ngeasi mũthũkũmi wake athi akete mũndũ mũka ũsu. Yĩla mũndũ mũka ũsu wookie
2Kings4:13 Elisa nĩweeie Ngeasi atĩĩ
2Kings4:14 Elisa nĩwakũlilye Ngeasi
2Kings4:15 Elisa nĩweeie Ngeasi
2Kings4:16 Elisa nĩwaneenie amwĩa
2Kings4:17 Ĩndĩ o tondũ Elisa waĩtye
2Kings4:18 Kana kau nĩkeanie
2Kings4:19 Kana kau nĩkambĩĩie kũĩa; kaĩaa kayĩa ĩthe wako
2Kings4:20 Yĩla mũthũkũmi ũsu wakuie kavĩsĩ kau akatwaa vala ve inyia wako
2Kings4:21 Nyinyia nĩwakakuie akambatya kasũmbanĩ ka Elisa
2Kings4:22 Nĩweetie mũũme na amwĩa atĩĩ
2Kings4:23 Mũũme nĩwamũkũlilye
2Kings4:24 Mũndũ mũka ũsu nĩwailĩĩile matandĩko ĩng'oinĩ na eea mũthũkũmi
2Kings4:25 Kwoou mũndũ mũka ũsu nĩwambĩlĩĩlye kyalo aenda Kĩĩmanĩ kya Kalimeli vala Elisa waĩ. Elisa nĩwoonie mũndũ mũka ũsu e vaasa na eea Ngeasi mũthũkũmi wake atĩĩ
2Kings4:26 Semba ũmũthaũe na ũimũkũlya
2Kings4:27 Ĩndĩ yĩla mũndũ mũka ũsu wavikie kĩĩmanĩ vala Elisa waĩ
2Kings4:28 Mũndũ mũka ũsu nĩwaneenie eea Elisa atĩĩ
2Kings4:29 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Elisa weeie Ngeasi atĩĩ
2Kings4:30 Mũndũ mũka ũsu nĩweeie Elisa atĩĩ
2Kings4:31 Ngeasi nĩwaendie avika mbee
2Kings4:32 Yĩla Elisa wavikie
2Kings4:33 Nĩweevingĩie e na kavĩsĩ kau vau nthĩnĩ na avoya Mwĩai Ngai.
2Kings4:34 Nĩvo ĩndĩ walĩsile ũkomonĩ na akomeea kavĩsĩ kau atinanĩtye kanyw'a wake
2Kings4:35 Elisa nĩwookĩlile
2Kings4:36 Elisa nĩweetie Ngeasi na amũtũma akete inyia wako. Ngeasi nĩweekie ũu. Yĩla inyia wako wookie
2Kings4:37 Mũndũ mũka ũsu nĩwatulilye ndu maũũnĩ ma Elisa
2Kings4:38 Elisa nĩwasyokie Ngilikali
2Kings4:39 Ũmwe wa athani asu nĩwaendie kĩsesinĩ akove nyũnyi. E vau nĩwoonie wũngũ wa kĩthekanĩ
2Kings4:40 Aũme asu nĩmevũĩiwe mboka ĩsu maye. Yĩla mambĩĩie kũya
2Kings4:41 Elisa nĩwaneenie asya
2Kings4:42 Ĩvinda yĩmwe
2Kings4:43 Mũthũkũmi ũsu nĩwakũlilye atĩĩ
2Kings4:44 Kwoou mũthũkũmi ũsu nĩwanengie andũ asu lĩu ũsu
2Kings5:1 Naamani aĩ mũnene wa asikalĩ ma kaũ ma mũsumbĩ wa Silia. Nĩwanengetwe ndaĩa mũno nĩ mũsumbĩ wa Silia nũndũ Mwĩai Ngai nĩwatumĩte asikalĩ ma Silia masinda kaũnĩ matongoew'e nĩwe. Aĩ mũsikalĩ ngũmbaũ
2Kings5:2 Ĩvinda yĩmwe
2Kings5:3 Mũthenya ũmwe kelĩtu kau nĩkaneenie na mũka wa Naamani kamwĩa atĩĩ
2Kings5:4 Yĩla Naamani weewie ũu
2Kings5:5 Mũsumbĩ nĩweeie Naamani atĩĩ
2Kings5:6 Valũa ũla Naamani watwaĩie mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli waandĩkĩtwe ũũ: “Nĩkũandĩkĩa valũa ũũ ngũmanyĩthye kana nĩnatũma mũthũkũmi wakwa Naamani
2Kings5:7 Yĩla mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli wasomie valũa ũsu
2Kings5:8 Yĩla mwathani Elisa weewie kana mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli nũtembũangie ngũa syake
2Kings5:9 Kwoou Naamani e na mbalasi syake na makasya make ma kaũ
2Kings5:10 Elisa nĩwatũmie mũndũ athi vala ve Naamani amwĩe atĩĩ
2Kings5:11 Ĩndĩ Naamani nĩwaumie vau athi athatĩte na asya atĩĩ
2Kings5:12 Nĩkũlya
2Kings5:13 Athũkũmi ma Naamani nĩmaendie vala ũĩ mamwĩa atĩĩ
2Kings5:14 Kwoou Naamani nĩwatheeie Ũsĩnĩ wa Yolotani
2Kings5:15 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Naamani
2Kings5:16 Elisa nĩwamũsũngĩie amwĩa atĩĩ
2Kings5:17 Kwoou Naamani nĩwaisye atĩĩ
2Kings5:18 Ĩndĩ Mwĩai Ngai nĩandekeae ũndũnĩ ũũ ũmwe: Yĩla mũnene wakwa mũsumbĩ walika ĩkalũnĩ ya ngai ya mũvw'anano yĩtawa Limoni
2Kings5:19 Elisa nĩweeie Naamani atĩĩ
2Kings5:20 Ngeasi
2Kings5:21 Kwoou Ngeasi nĩweekalaatile aatĩĩa Naamani. Yĩla Naamani woonie mũndũ amũatĩĩe asembete
2Kings5:22 Ngeasi nĩwamũsũngĩie amwĩa atĩĩ
2Kings5:23 Naamani nĩwamũsũngĩie amwĩa atĩĩ
2Kings5:24 Yĩla mavikie kĩĩmanĩ vala Elisa wekalaa
2Kings5:25 Nĩwasyokie nyũmba nthĩnĩ na Elisa amũkũlya atĩĩ
2Kings5:26 Ĩndĩ Elisa nĩwamũkũlilye atĩĩ
2Kings5:27 Ũwau wa mangũ ũla Naamani ũnawaĩte
2Kings6:1 Mũthenya ũmwe nguthu ya athani nĩyeeie Elisa atĩĩ
2Kings6:2 Tũnenge mwanya tũthi Ũsĩnĩ wa Yolotani tũkateme mĩtĩ
2Kings6:3 Ũmwe woo nĩweeie Elisa atĩĩ
2Kings6:4 Nĩwaendanisye namo. Yĩla mavikie Ũsĩnĩ wa Yolotani
2Kings6:5 Ũmwe woo aendee kũtema mũtĩ
2Kings6:6 Elisa nĩwamũkũlilye atĩĩ
2Kings6:7 Elisa nĩweeie mũndũ ũsu
2Kings6:8 Ĩvinda yĩmwe
2Kings6:9 Elisa nĩwatũmanie vala ve mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli amwĩa
2Kings6:10 Kwoou mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli nĩwatũmanie vala ve andũ ma vandũ vau nĩ kana mesũvĩe
2Kings6:11 Mũsumbĩ wa Silia nĩwathatiw'e mũno nĩ ũndũ ũsu. Nĩweetie anini make na amakũlya atĩĩ
2Kings6:12 Ũmwe nĩwasũngĩie asya atĩĩ
2Kings6:13 Mũsumbĩ nĩweeaie asya
2Kings6:14 nĩwatũmie nguthu nene ya asikalĩ me na mbalasi na makasya ma kaũ mathi vo. Nĩmavikie ndũanĩ ĩsu ũtukũ na mamĩlingĩla.
2Kings6:15 Ũnĩ ũsu kwakya tene
2Kings6:16 Elisa nĩwamũsũngĩie amwĩa atĩĩ
2Kings6:17 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Elisa wavoyie ayasya
2Kings6:18 Yĩla Asilia matheeie makwate Elisa
2Kings6:19 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Elisa waendie vala maĩ na amea atĩĩ
2Kings6:20 Mamina kũlika ndũanĩ ya Samalia
2Kings6:21 Yĩla mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli woonie Asilia asu
2Kings6:22 Elisa nĩwamũsũngĩie amwĩa atĩĩ
2Kings6:23 Kwoou mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli nĩwaseũvĩisye andũ asu mboka nene
2Kings6:24 Ĩtina wa maũndũ asu
2Kings6:25 Nũndũ wa kwĩlingĩlwa kũu
2Kings6:26 Mũthenya ũmwe
2Kings6:27 Mũsumbĩ nĩwamũsũngĩie amwĩa atĩĩ
2Kings6:28 Mũsumbĩ nĩwakũlilye mũndũ mũka ũsu atĩĩ
2Kings6:29 Kwoou nĩtũnauie mwana wakwa twamũya. Mũthenya ũla ũnaatĩĩe nĩnĩnamwĩie
2Kings6:30 Yĩla mũsumbĩ weewie ũndũ mũndũ mũka ũsu wamwĩie
2Kings6:31 Mũsumbĩ nĩwaneenie na wasya mũnene asya
2Kings6:32 Kwoou mũsumbĩ nĩwatũmie mũndũ akaete Elisa. Ũu ũendee
2Kings6:33 O aendee kũneena na atumĩa asu
2Kings7:1 Elisa nĩwamũsũngĩie amwĩa atĩĩ
2Kings7:2 Mũsikalĩ ũla waĩkĩĩawa mũno nĩ mũsumbĩ nĩwaneenie akũlya Elisa atĩĩ
2Kings7:3 Vaĩ andũ ana maĩ na ũwau wa mangũ ala mekalaa mũvĩanĩ wa ndũa ya Samalia. Nĩmaneenie ene kwa ene masya atĩĩ
2Kings7:4 Vai vata tũlike ndũanĩ
2Kings7:5 Kwoou
2Kings7:6 Mwĩai Ngai aĩ anatuma Asilia mew'a wasya ũilyĩ ta wa nguthu nene ya asikalĩ ma kaũ me na mbalasi na makasya ma kaũ. Kwoou Asilia nĩmasũanĩie kana mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli aĩ anaĩva mũsumbĩ wa Aititi na mũsumbĩ wa Misili nĩ kana moke kũmavithũkĩa.
2Kings7:7 Kwoou wĩoo ũsu Asilia nĩmasembie makĩa maikoawe
2Kings7:8 Yĩla ala andũ ana mawaĩte mangũ mavikie maeemanĩ ala maĩ ndee
2Kings7:9 Nĩvo ĩndĩ maneenie ene kwa ene masya atĩĩ
2Kings7:10 Kwoou nĩmaendie na meeta asikalĩ ala masungaa mũvĩa wa ndũa ya Samalia na mamea atĩĩ
2Kings7:11 Asikalĩ asu ma kũsunga mũvĩa nĩmatavanisye ũvoo ũsu
2Kings7:12 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu kwaĩ o ũtukũ
2Kings7:13 Ũmwe katĩ wa anini ma mũsumbĩ nĩwaneenie asya atĩĩ
2Kings7:14 Nĩmanyuvie andũ amwe
2Kings7:15 Andũ asu nĩmaatĩĩie Asilia nginya Ũsĩnĩ wa Yolotani. Nzĩanĩ ĩsu yonthe nĩmeethĩie ngũa ivalũkangĩte nthĩ
2Kings7:16 Nĩvo ĩndĩ andũ ma Samalia maendie vala Asilia mambĩte maeema na moosa mũtavo. Kwoou o tondũ Mwĩai Ngai waĩtye
2Kings7:17 Mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli aĩ ananenga ũla mũsikalĩ wamũĩkĩĩe mũno wĩa wa kũsunga mũvĩa wa ndũa. Mũsikalĩ ũsu nĩwakinyangĩiwe nĩ andũ vau mũvĩanĩ na akw'a
2Kings7:18 Elisa aĩ aneea mũsumbĩ kana ĩvindanĩ ta yĩu mũthenyanĩ ũla waatĩĩe
2Kings7:19 Mũsikalĩ ũsu aĩ anasũngĩa Elisa akamwĩa atĩĩ
2Kings7:20 Ũu nĩw'o weekĩkie; akinyangĩiwe nĩ andũ vau mũvĩanĩ wa ndũa akw'a.
2Kings8:1 Elisa aĩ ananeena na ũla mũndũ mũka Mũsunemu
2Kings8:2 Mũndũ mũka ũsu nĩweekie ũndũ Elisa wamwĩie nĩeke. Nĩwaendie e na andũ ma nyũmba yake
2Kings8:3 Myaka ĩsu mũonza yathela
2Kings8:4 Eethĩie mũsumbĩ aineena na Ngeasi
2Kings8:5 Kavindanĩ o kau
2Kings8:6 Mũsumbĩ nĩwakũlilye mũndũ mũka ũsu ũndũ ũsu
2Kings8:7 Elisa nĩwaendie Ndamasikũ ĩvindanĩ yĩla Mbeni-aatati mũsumbĩ wa Silia waĩ mũwau. Yĩla mũsumbĩ wataviw'e kana Elisa aĩ kũu
2Kings8:8 nĩweeie Aasaeli atĩĩ
2Kings8:9 Kwoou Aasaeli nĩwaendie vala ve Elisa akuĩthĩtye ngamĩle mĩongo ĩna syĩndũ ila nzeo vyũ sya mĩthemba yonthe sya Ndamasikũ. Yĩla Aasaeli wavikie vala ve Elisa nĩwamwĩie atĩĩ
2Kings8:10 Elisa nĩwamũsũngĩie amwĩa atĩĩ
2Kings8:11 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Elisa waketeeie Aasaeli mũno nginya Aasaeli eew'a nthoni
2Kings8:12 Aasaeli nĩwamũkũlilye atĩĩ
2Kings8:13 Aasaeli nĩwamũkũlilye atĩĩ
2Kings8:14 Aasaeli nĩwaumie vala ve Elisa asyoka kũla kwĩ Mbeni-aatati. Yĩla Mbeni-aatati wamũkũlilye
2Kings8:15 Ĩndĩ mũthenya ũla waatĩĩe
2Kings8:16 Mwakanĩ wa katano wa kũsumbĩka kwa Yolamu mwana wa Aavu mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli
2Kings8:17 Atw'ĩkie mũsumbĩ e na ũkũũ wa myaka mĩongo ĩtatũ na ĩlĩ
2Kings8:18 Aatĩĩie ngelekany'o nthũku ya asumbĩ ma Ĩsilaeli o tondũ andũ ma mũsyĩ wa Aavu meekĩte
2Kings8:19 Ĩndĩ ũu wĩ o vo
2Kings8:20 Ĩvindanĩ yĩla Yeolamu wasumbĩkĩte
2Kings8:21 Kwoou Yeolamu nĩwaendie Nzaili e na makasya make onthe ma kaũ. Aetomu nĩmeelingĩlile vala Yeolamu waĩ
2Kings8:22 Kuma ĩvinda yĩu nginya ũmũnthĩ
2Kings8:23 Maũndũ ala angĩ Yeolamu weekie yĩla wasumbĩkĩte maandĩkĩtwe Ĩvukunĩ ya Maũndũ ma Mavinda ma Asumbĩ ma Yuta.
2Kings8:24 Yeolamu nĩwakwie na athikwa vala asumbĩ mathikawa Ndũanĩ ya Ndeviti. Aasia mwana wake nĩwatw'ĩkie mũsumbĩ ĩtina wake.
2Kings8:25 Mwakanĩ wa ĩkũmi na ilĩ wa kũsumbĩka kwa Yolamu mwana wa Aavu mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli
2Kings8:26 Aasia atw'ĩkie mũsumbĩ e na ũkũũ wa myaka mĩongo ĩlĩ na ĩlĩ. Nĩwasumbĩkie vandũ va mwaka ũmwe e Yelũsalemu. Inyia wake eetawa Athalia ũla waĩ mwĩsũkũũe wa Omili mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli.
2Kings8:27 Aatĩĩie ngelekany'o nthũku ya andũ ma mũsyĩ wa Aavu na avĩtĩsya Mwĩai Ngai
2Kings8:28 Aasia nĩwaendanisye na Yolamu mwana wa Mũsumbĩ Aavu makokite na Aasaeli mũsumbĩ wa Silia me Lamothi-ngileati. Me kaũnĩ ũsu
2Kings8:29 Nĩwasyokie Yesileeli nĩ kana akaiitwe kũla waũmĩiw'e e ndũanĩ ya Lamothi
2Kings9:1 Mwathani Elisa nĩweetie mũndũ ũmwe kuma nguthunĩ ya athani na amwĩa atĩĩ
2Kings9:2 Wavika vo
2Kings9:3 mwĩtĩkĩsye mauta asu mũtwe na ũimwĩa atĩĩ
2Kings9:4 Kwoou mwathani ũsu wa mũika nĩwaendie ndũanĩ ya Lamothi ĩla yĩ nthĩ ya Ngileati.
2Kings9:5 Yĩla wavikie
2Kings9:6 Nĩvo ĩndĩ me elĩ maendie malika nyũmba
2Kings9:7 Ũkooaa andũ ma mũsyĩ wa Aavu mũnene waku
2Kings9:8 Andũ onthe ma mũsyĩ wa Aavu makakw'a mathele. Ngooaa aũme onthe ma mũsyĩ wa Aavu; ngombo
2Kings9:9 Ngeekana na mũsyĩ wa Aavu o ũndũ neekanie na mũsyĩ wa Yelovoamu mwana wa Nevati
2Kings9:10 Yeseveli ndakathikwa; mwĩĩ wake ũkaĩĩwa nĩ ngitĩ kĩsionĩ kya nthĩ kya Yesileeli.’ ” Mwathani ũsu amina kũneena ũu
2Kings9:11 Yĩla Yeũ wasyokie vala ve anene ala angĩ ma asikalĩ
2Kings9:12 Nĩmamũsũngĩie mamwĩa atĩĩ
2Kings9:13 Vau kwa vau
2Kings9:14 Yeũ mwana wa Yeosavati
2Kings9:15 Mũsumbĩ Yolamu aĩ anasyoka Yesileeli akavoe kũla waũmĩĩte ĩvindanĩ yĩla wokitaa na Aasaeli mũsumbĩ wa Silia.) Yeũ nĩwaneenie asya
2Kings9:16 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yeũ walĩsile ĩkasyanĩ yake ya kaũ athi Yesileeli
2Kings9:17 Yĩla mũsikalĩ wa kũsunga
2Kings9:18 Mũndũ ũsu watũmĩtwe nĩwaendie akomana na Yeũ na amwĩa atĩĩ
2Kings9:19 Kwoou mũsumbĩ nĩwatũmie mũndũ ũngĩ athi na mbalasi. Yĩla wavikie vala ve Yeũ na ĩla nguthu ya asikalĩ nĩwamwĩie atĩĩ
2Kings9:20 O ĩngĩ ũla mũsikalĩ wa kũsunga e kĩtaanĩ kya kũsyaĩĩsya nĩwatavanisye asya atĩĩ
2Kings9:21 Mũsumbĩ Yolamu nĩweeaie asya atĩĩ
2Kings9:22 Yĩla Yolamu wakomanie na Yeũ nĩwamũkũlilye atĩĩ
2Kings9:23 Yolamu nĩwavĩndũie ĩkasya yake na asemba akĩĩte aneenete na wasya mũnene ayasya
2Kings9:24 Yeũ nĩwakootie ũta wake na aathĩla Yolamu katĩ wa ituo. Ĩangi yĩu nĩyalikile yatonya ngoo yake. Yolamu nĩwavalũkile nthĩnĩ wa ĩkasya yake ya kaũ.
2Kings9:25 Yeũ nĩwaneenie na Mbitikali
2Kings9:26 ‘Ĩyoo nĩnĩnoonie nthakame ya Navothi na nthakame ya ana make. Kwa w'o ngatuma ũĩva kwondũ wa nthakame ĩsu o vaa mũũndanĩ ũũ.’ Kwoou yu ĩndĩ osa mwĩĩ wa Yolamu
2Kings9:27 Yĩla Aasia mũsumbĩ wa Yuta woonie ũndũ kweekĩka
2Kings9:28 Anini make nĩmakuie mwĩĩ wake wĩ ĩkasyanĩ ya kaũ maũtwaa Yelũsalemu
2Kings9:29 (Aasia aĩ atw'ĩkie mũsumbĩ wa Yuta mwakanĩ wa ĩkũmi na ũmwe wa kũsumbĩka kwa Yolamu
2Kings9:30 Yĩla Yeũ wavikie Yesileeli
2Kings9:31 Yĩla Yeũ walikile mũvĩanĩ
2Kings9:32 Yeũ nĩwang'eleile ĩũlũ ndĩlĩsyanĩ na aneena na wasya mũnene asya atĩĩ
2Kings9:33 Yeũ nĩwameie atĩĩ
2Kings9:34 Yeũ nĩwalikile nyũmbanĩ ya kĩ-ũsumbĩ
2Kings9:35 Ĩndĩ aũme ala maendie kũmũthika mayaaĩthĩa kĩndũ ate o mavĩndĩ ma mũtwe wake
2Kings9:36 Yĩla matavisye Yeũ ũndũ meethĩa
2Kings9:37 Mwĩĩ wa Yeseveli ũkanyaĩĩkĩa nthĩ ta vũũ kĩsionĩ kya nthĩ kya Yesileeli
2Kings10:1 Aavu aĩ na ana mĩongo mũonza ndũanĩ ya Samalia. Kwoou Yeũ nĩwaandĩkie valũa itwaĩwe anene ma ndũa ya Samalia. Aandĩkĩie anene ma ndũa
2Kings10:2 “Ninyw'ĩ mũsũvĩaa ana ma mũsumbĩ
2Kings10:3 nyuvai ũla mũseo vyũ na waĩlĩte katĩ wa ana ma mũsumbĩ mũmũtw'ĩkĩthye mũsumbĩ. Ĩtina wa ũu ũkitai mũsũvĩe mũsyĩ wa mũnene wenyu.”
2Kings10:4 Anene ma ndũa ya Samalia nĩmakĩie mũno. Nĩmakũlilye atĩĩ
2Kings10:5 Kwoou mũnene ũla waũngamĩe nyũmba ya kĩ-ũsumbĩ
2Kings10:6 Yeũ nĩwamaandĩkĩie valũa wa kelĩ amea atĩĩ
2Kings10:7 Yĩla valũa ũsu wamavikĩie
2Kings10:8 Yĩla Yeũ wataviw'e kana mĩtwe ya ana ma mũsumbĩ nĩyaetwe
2Kings10:9 Kwakya
2Kings10:10 Manyai ĩndĩ kana maũndũ onthe ala Mwĩai Ngai waneenie ũndũ wa mũsyĩ wa Aavu mailea kwĩanĩa. Mwĩai Ngai nĩwĩkĩte ũndũ wathanie
2Kings10:11 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yeũ wooaie andũ ala angĩ onthe mekalaa Yesileeli
2Kings10:12 Yeũ nĩwaumie Yesileeli athi Samalia. E nzĩanĩ vandũ vetawa Maeema ma Aĩthi
2Kings10:13 nĩwakomanie na andũ amwe maĩ ma mũsyĩ ũmwe na Aasia mũsumbĩ wa Yuta na amakũlya atĩĩ
2Kings10:14 Yeũ nĩweeaĩie andũ ala waĩ namo amea atĩĩ
2Kings10:15 Yeũ auma vau
2Kings10:16 Yeũ nĩweeie Yonatavu atĩĩ
2Kings10:17 Yĩla mavikie vo
2Kings10:18 Yeũ nĩweetie andũ ma Samalia moombana vamwe na amea atĩĩ
2Kings10:19 Ĩtai athani ma Mbaali onthe
2Kings10:20 Yeũ nĩwaneenie asya atĩĩ
2Kings10:21 Yeũ nĩwatũmanie kĩla vandũ nthĩ ya Ĩsilaeli yonthe
2Kings10:22 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yeũ weeaĩie mũthembi ũla wanengetwe wĩa wa kũũngamĩa ngũa ntheu sya kĩ-ũthaithi amwĩa atĩĩ
2Kings10:23 Ĩtina wa ũu
2Kings10:24 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yeũ e na Yonatavu malikile mathembee Mbaali nthembo na nthembo ya kũvĩvw'a. Yeũ aĩ anaũngamya aũme mĩongo nyanya nza wa ĩkalũ na akameaĩa akamea atĩĩ
2Kings10:25 Yeũ amina kũthemba nthembo ĩsu oou
2Kings10:26 maumaalya kĩtuĩ kĩtheu kĩla kyaĩ vo
2Kings10:27 Kwoou nĩmaanangie kĩtuĩ kĩu kĩtheu vamwe na ĩkalũ
2Kings10:28 Ũu nĩw'o Yeũ waminie ũthaithi wa Mbaali nthĩ ya Ĩsilaeli.
2Kings10:29 Ĩndĩ ndaaeka kwĩka naĩ ya Yelovoamu mwana wa Nevati
2Kings10:30 Mwĩai Ngai nĩwaneenie na Yeũ amwĩa atĩĩ
2Kings10:31 Ĩndĩ Yeũ ndaatĩĩa na ngoo yake yonthe mĩao ya Mwĩai Ngai
2Kings10:32 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu Mwĩai Ngai nĩwambĩlĩĩlye kũola kĩsio kya nthĩ ya Ĩsilaeli. Aasaeli mũsumbĩ wa Silia nĩwasindie andũ ma Ĩsilaeli
2Kings10:33 ngalĩko ya wumĩlonĩ wa syũa ya Ũsĩ wa Yolotani. Nĩwasindie andũ ma Ĩsilaeli ala maĩ kĩsionĩ kĩu kũthi ngalĩko ya ĩtheo
2Kings10:34 Maũndũ ala angĩ Yeũ weekie yĩla wasumbĩkĩte
2Kings10:35 Nĩwakwie na athikwa Samalia
2Kings10:36 Yeũ asumbĩkie Ĩsilaeli vandũ va myaka mĩongo ĩlĩ na nyanya e Samalia.
2Kings11:1 Yĩla Athalia inyia wa Mũsumbĩ Aasia wamanyie kana mwanae nũminĩte kũawa
2Kings11:2 Ĩndĩ Yeoseva
2Kings11:3 Yoasi ekalile avithĩtwe e na mũei wake Ĩkalũnĩ ya Mwĩai Ngai
2Kings11:4 Mwakanĩ wa mũonza wa kũsumbĩka kwa Athalia
2Kings11:5 na ameaĩa amea atĩĩ
2Kings11:6 nguthu ĩngĩ katĩ wa nguthu syenyu itatũ
2Kings11:7 Nguthu ilĩ ila ikethĩawa ithũmũĩte mũthenyanĩ wa Savato
2Kings11:8 No nginya mũthyũlũlũke Mũsumbĩ Yoasi mũmũsũvĩe
2Kings11:9 Anene asu nĩmeekie ũndũ Yeoiata wameaĩie
2Kings11:10 Yeoiata nĩwanengie anene asu matumo na ngao ila syaĩ sya Mũsumbĩ Ndeviti
2Kings11:11 Asikalĩ asu nĩmaũngamie melingĩlĩte mũsumbĩ
2Kings11:12 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yeoiata watongoeisye Yoasi mwana wa mũsumbĩ maumaala
2Kings11:13 Mũsumbĩ mũndũ mũka Athalia nĩweewie wasya ũsu mũnene
2Kings11:14 Nĩwoonie mũsumbĩ aũngamĩte ũtee wa kĩtuĩ kĩla kĩ ũlikĩlonĩ wa Ĩkalũ o tondũ kweekawa. Anene na andũ ala mavuvaa masoo maĩ vakuvĩ na mũsumbĩ
2Kings11:15 Yeoiata ndendaa Athalia oaĩwe Ĩkalũnĩ. Kwoou nĩweeaĩie anene ma asikalĩ ma kaũ amea atĩĩ
2Kings11:16 Nĩmakwatie Athalia mamũtwaa nyũmbanĩ ya kĩ-ũsumbĩ
2Kings11:17 Mũthembi Yeoiata nĩwatumie Mũsumbĩ Yoasi vamwe na andũ maseũvya ũtianĩo na Mwĩai Ngai
2Kings11:18 Nĩvo ĩndĩ andũ onthe maendie ĩkalũnĩ ya Mbaali na mayĩomboanga. Nĩmaanangie ithembeo na mĩvw'anano ya ngai ĩsu
2Kings11:19 na ĩndĩ we
2Kings11:20 Andũ onthe ma nthĩ ĩsu nĩmatanie. Ndũa yonthe nĩyakilĩtye
2Kings11:21 Yoasi atw'ĩkie mũsumbĩ wa Yuta e na ũkũũ wa myaka mũonza.
2Kings12:1 Mwakanĩ wa mũonza wa kũsumbĩka kwa Yeũ mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli
2Kings12:2 Yoasi nĩweekaa maũndũ ala mamwendeeasya Mwĩai Ngai ĩvindanĩ yonthe yĩla waĩ thayũ
2Kings12:3 Ĩndĩ ũu wĩ o vo
2Kings12:4 Yoasi nĩwaneenie na athembi amea atĩĩ
2Kings12:5 Kĩla mũthembi nĩosae mbesa kuma andũnĩ onthe
2Kings12:6 Ĩndĩ o na kũvika mwaka wa mĩongo ĩlĩ na itatũ wa kũsumbĩka kwa Yoasi
2Kings12:7 Kwoou Yoasi nĩweetie mũthembi Yeoiata
2Kings12:8 Athembi nĩmeetĩkĩlanile kana maisyoka kwosa mbesa ĩngĩ kuma andũnĩ
2Kings12:9 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yeoiata woosie ĩsandũkũ na atonya ĩima ngunĩkonĩ ya yo. Nĩwaiie ĩsandũkũ yĩu ũtee wa kĩthembeo
2Kings12:10 Yĩla moona kana ĩsandũkũnĩ ve mbesa mbingĩ
2Kings12:11 Ĩtina wa kũmanya ũndũ mbesa isu syĩana
2Kings12:12 ala makaa nyũmba na mavia
2Kings12:13 Mbesa ila syaetawe Ĩkalũnĩ iyaatũmĩwa kũseũvya mbakũli sya silĩva
2Kings12:14 Mbesa isu syonthe syatũmĩiwe kũĩva athũkũmi
2Kings12:15 Mayaaĩthĩwa na vata wa kũmanya kuma kwa ala manengetwe wĩa wa kũĩva athũkũmi ũndũ mbesa syatũmĩkaa
2Kings12:16 Mbesa ila syaumaw'a syĩthĩwe nthembo kwondũ wa mavĩtyo
2Kings12:17 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu
2Kings12:18 Yoasi mũsumbĩ wa Yuta nĩwoosie syĩndũ syonthe ila syavathĩtwe syĩthĩwe syĩ ntheu nĩ asumbĩ ma Yuta ala maĩ mbee wake: Yeosavati
2Kings12:19 Maũndũ ala angĩ Yoasi weekie yĩla wasumbĩkĩte maandĩkĩtwe Ĩvukunĩ ya Maũndũ ma Mavinda ma Asumbĩ ma Yuta.
2Kings12:20 Anini ma Mũsumbĩ Yoasi nĩmamũseũvĩisye mũvango mũthũku na mamũaĩa vandũ vetawa Nyũmba ya Milo nzĩanĩ ĩla ĩtheete Silila.
2Kings12:21 Anini make ala mamũaie maĩ Yosakali mwana wa Simeathi
2Kings13:1 Mwakanĩ wa mĩongo ĩlĩ na itatũ wa kũsumbĩka kwa Yoasi mwana wa Aasia
2Kings13:2 Nĩwavĩtĩisye Mwĩai Ngai kwa kũatĩĩa naĩ ila Yelovoamu mwana wa Nevati weekie na atuma andũ ma Ĩsilaeli meka; ndaaeka kwĩka maũndũ asu mathũku.
2Kings13:3 Kwoou andũ ma Ĩsilaeli nĩmathatisye Mwĩai Ngai mũno
2Kings13:4 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yeoaasi wavoyie Mwĩai Ngai
2Kings13:5 Mwĩai Ngai nĩwanengie andũ ma Ĩsilaeli mũtongoi ũla wamavonokisye kuma vinyanĩ wa Asilia. Kwoou andũ ma Ĩsilaeli nĩmatũie mĩsyĩnĩ yoo
2Kings13:6 Ĩndĩ mayaaekana na naĩ ila Yelovoamu watumĩte meka; nĩmaendeeie kũsyĩka. O ta ũu mũvw'anano wa ngai nga ĩla yĩtawa Asela nĩwaendeeie kwĩkala Samalia.
2Kings13:7 Asikalĩ ma kaũ ma Yeoaasi nĩmathelile vatiala o asikalĩ ma mbalasi mĩongo ĩtano
2Kings13:8 Maũndũ ala angĩ onthe Yeoaasi weekie yĩla wasumbĩkĩte
2Kings13:9 Nĩwakwie na athikwa Samalia. Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yeoasi mwana wake wasumbĩkie ĩtina wake.
2Kings13:10 Mwakanĩ wa mĩongo ĩtatũ na mũonza wa kũsumbĩka kwa Yoasi mũsumbĩ wa Yuta
2Kings13:11 Yeoasi o nake nĩwavĩtĩisye Mwĩai Ngai; ndaaekana na naĩ syonthe ila Yelovoamu mwana wa Nevati weekie na atuma andũ ma Ĩsilaeli masyĩka; Yeoasi nĩwaendeeie kũsyĩka.
2Kings13:12 Maũndũ ala angĩ onthe Yeoasi weekie yĩla wasumbĩkĩte
2Kings13:13 Yeoasi nĩwakwie na athikwa Samalia vala asumbĩ ma Ĩsilaeli mathikawa. Yelovoamu mwana wake nĩwatw'ĩkie mũsumbĩ ĩtina wake.
2Kings13:14 Elisa e mũwau ũwau ũla wesie kũmũaa
2Kings13:15 Elisa nĩweeie Yeoasi atĩĩ
2Kings13:16 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Elisa weeie mũsumbĩ ũsu wa Ĩsilaeli
2Kings13:17 Ĩtina wa ũu Elisa nĩweeie Yeoasi atĩĩ
2Kings13:18 Elisa nĩwaendeeie kũneena na Yeoasi amwĩa atĩĩ
2Kings13:19 Ũndũ ũsu nĩwatumie Elisa athata na eea Yeoasi atĩĩ
2Kings13:20 Elisa nĩwakwie na athikwa. Kĩla mwaka
2Kings13:21 Ĩvinda yĩmwe andũ amwe ma Ĩsilaeli makuĩte mũndũ makamũthike
2Kings13:22 Ĩvindanĩ yonthe ya kũsumbĩka kwa Yeoaasi
2Kings13:23 Ĩndĩ Mwĩai Ngai nĩweew'ĩie andũ ma Ĩsilaeli tei na ĩnee. Ndaaĩtĩkĩla kũmaeka maminwe
2Kings13:24 Aasaeli mũsumbĩ wa Silia akw'a
2Kings13:25 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yeoasi mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli wasindie Mbeni-aatati mwana wa Aasaeli mavinda atatũ
2Kings14:1 Mwakanĩ wa kelĩ wa kũsumbĩka kwa Yeoasi mwana wa Yeoaasi mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli
2Kings14:2 Atw'ĩkie mũsumbĩ e na ũkũũ wa myaka mĩongo ĩlĩ na ĩtano. Asumbĩkie vandũ va myaka mĩongo ĩlĩ na kenda e Yelũsalemu. Inyia wake eetawa Yeoatini kuma Yelũsalemu.
2Kings14:3 Mũsumbĩ Amasia nĩweekaa maũndũ ala mamwendeeasya Mwĩai Ngai
2Kings14:4 Ndaa ananga kũndũ kũla andũ mathaithĩaa iĩmanĩ ĩũlũ; andũ nĩmaendeeie kũthembea nthembo kw'o na kũvĩvĩsya ũvani kw'o.
2Kings14:5 Amasia amina kwĩthĩwa e na ũtonyi wa kĩ-ũsumbĩ oou
2Kings14:6 Ĩndĩ ndaaũaa syana sya andũ asu mooaie ĩthe wake
2Kings14:7 Amasia nĩwooaie asikalĩ ma Etomu ngili ĩkũmi; amoaĩie vandũ vetawa Mwanda wa Mũnyũ. Nĩwokitie namo amasinda na akwata ndũa ya Sela
2Kings14:8 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Amasia watũmie andũ kũla kwĩ Yeoasi mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli
2Kings14:9 Yeoasi nĩwatũmanie kũla kwĩ Amasia akewe atĩĩ
2Kings14:10 We Amasia kwa w'o nũnasindie andũ ma Etomu na wĩ na ngathĩĩo. Ĩanĩwa nĩ ũkumyo ũsu
2Kings14:11 Amasia nĩwaleile kwĩthukĩĩsya. Kwoou Yeoasi mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli nĩwambatie amũvithũkĩa
2Kings14:12 Andũ ma Yuta nĩmasindiwe nĩ andũ ma Ĩsilaeli
2Kings14:13 Yeoasi mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli nĩwakwatĩie Amasia mũsumbĩ wa Yuta
2Kings14:14 Nĩwoosie thaavu na silĩva w'onthe ũla weethĩie
2Kings14:15 Maũndũ ala angĩ onthe Yeoasi weekie yĩla wasumbĩkĩte
2Kings14:16 Yeoasi nĩwakwie na athikwa Samalia vala asumbĩ mathikawa. Mwana wake Yelovoamu nĩwatw'ĩkie mũsumbĩ ĩtina wake.
2Kings14:17 Yeoasi mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli
2Kings14:18 Maũndũ ala angĩ onthe Amasia weekie yĩla wasumbĩkĩte
2Kings14:19 Andũ nĩmaseũvĩisye mũvango mũthũku Yelũsalemu wa kũaa Amasia
2Kings14:20 Mwĩĩ wake nĩwakuiwe na Mbalasi watũngwa Yelũsalemu. Nĩwathikiwe Ndũanĩ ya Ndeviti vala asumbĩ mathikawa.
2Kings14:21 Nĩvo ĩndĩ andũ onthe ma Yuta manyuvie Asalia
2Kings14:22 Ĩtina wa kĩkw'ũ kya Amasia
2Kings14:23 Mwakanĩ wa ĩkũmi na itano wa kũsumbĩka kwa Amasia mwana wa Yeoasi mũsumbĩ wa Yuta
2Kings14:24 Nĩwavĩtĩisye Mwĩai Ngai kwa kũatĩĩa mwĩkalĩle mũthũku wa Yelovoamu mwana wa Nevati
2Kings14:25 Nĩwatũngĩĩie mĩvaka ya Ĩsilaeli kuma ũlikĩlonĩ wa Amathi nginya Ũkanga Mũkw'ũ. Ũu weekĩkie kwĩanana na ũndũ Mwĩai Ngai
2Kings14:26 Mwĩai Ngai nĩwoonie ũndũ andũ onthe ma Ĩsilaeli
2Kings14:27 Ĩndĩ nũndũ Mwĩai Ngai ndaneenete akasya kana akamina andũ ma Ĩsilaeli vyũ
2Kings14:28 Maũndũ ala angĩ onthe Yelovoamu weekie yĩla wasumbĩkĩte
2Kings14:29 Yelovoamu nĩwakwie na athikwa vala asumbĩ mathikawa. Nzekalia mwana wake nĩwatw'ĩkie mũsumbĩ ĩtina wake.
2Kings15:1 Mwakanĩ wa mĩongo ĩlĩ na mũonza wa kũsumbĩka kwa Yelovoamu mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli
2Kings15:2 Atw'ĩkie mũsumbĩ e na ũkũũ wa myaka ĩkũmi na thanthatũ
2Kings15:3 Usia nĩweekaa maũndũ ala mamwendeeasya Mwĩai Ngai
2Kings15:4 Ĩndĩ kũndũ kwoo kũla mathaithĩaa iĩmanĩ ĩũlũ kũyaanangwa; andũ nĩmaendeeie kũthemba na kũvĩvĩsya ũvani kw'o.
2Kings15:5 Mwĩai Ngai nĩwaeteie Usia ũwau wa mangũ ekala e mũwau nginya kũkw'a. Nĩwekalaa nyũmbanĩ yake yĩ ũtee e weka. Yothamu mwana wake nĩwe waũngamĩe maũndũ nyũmbanĩ ya kĩ-ũsumbĩ
2Kings15:6 Maũndũ ala angĩ Usia weekie yĩla wasumbĩkĩte
2Kings15:7 Usia nĩwakwie na athikwa vala asumbĩ mathikawa Ndũanĩ ya Ndeviti. Yothamu mwana wake nĩwatw'ĩkie mũsumbĩ ĩtina wake.
2Kings15:8 Mwakanĩ wa mĩongo ĩtatũ na nyanya wa kũsumbĩka kwa Usia mũsumbĩ wa Yuta
2Kings15:9 Nzekalia nĩwavĩtĩisye Mwĩai Ngai o tondũ aaĩthe make meekie. Nĩweekie naĩ ila Yelovoamu mwana wa Nevati weekie atuma andũ ma Ĩsilaeli meka naĩ.
2Kings15:10 Salumu mwana wa Yavesi nĩwavangĩie Nzekalia mũvango mũthũku. Nĩwamũvithũkĩie e mbee wa andũ amũaa na asumbĩka ĩtina wake.
2Kings15:11 Maũndũ ala angĩ Nzekalia weekie yĩla wasumbĩkĩte
2Kings15:12 Kwoou watho wa Mwĩai Ngai nĩweanĩie ũla waneenete na Yeũ akamwĩa
2Kings15:13 Mwakanĩ wa mĩongo ĩtatũ na kenda wa kũsumbĩka kwa Usia mũsumbĩ wa Yuta
2Kings15:14 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Menaemu mwana wa Ngandi waumie Tilisa athi Samalia na amũvithũkĩa amũaa
2Kings15:15 Maũndũ ala angĩ Salumu weekie yĩla wasumbĩkĩte
2Kings15:16 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu Menaemu nĩwaumie ndũanĩ ya Tilisa
2Kings15:17 Mwakanĩ wa mĩongo ĩtatũ na kenda wa kũsumbĩka kwa Usia mũsumbĩ wa Yuta
2Kings15:18 Nĩwavĩtĩisye Mwĩai Ngai. Ĩvindanĩ yonthe yĩla wasumbĩkĩte
2Kings15:19 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Vulu mũsumbĩ wa Asuli wavithũkĩie nthĩ ya Ĩsilaeli
2Kings15:20 Menaemu aumĩthisye andũ ma Ĩsilaeli mbesa isu na vinya; andũ onthe ala athwii maumasya silĩva wa ta nyusu kĩlo. Nĩvo ĩndĩ Vulu wasyokie nthĩ yake.
2Kings15:21 Maũndũ ala angĩ onthe Menaemu weekie yĩla wasumbĩkĩte
2Kings15:22 Menaemu nĩwakwie na athikwa
2Kings15:23 Mwakanĩ wa mĩongo ĩtano wa kũsumbĩka kwa Usia mũsumbĩ wa Yuta
2Kings15:24 Vekaia nĩwavĩtĩisye Mwĩai Ngai
2Kings15:25 Ũmwe wa atongoi ma asikalĩ make
2Kings15:26 Maũndũ ala angĩ Vekaia weekie yĩla wasumbĩkĩte
2Kings15:27 Mwakanĩ wa mĩongo ĩtano na ilĩ wa kũsumbĩka kwa Usia mũsumbĩ wa Yuta
2Kings15:28 Nĩwavĩtĩisye Mwĩai Ngai o tondũ Yelovoamu mwana wa Nevati weekie
2Kings15:29 Ĩvindanĩ ya kũsumbĩka kwa Veka mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli
2Kings15:30 Mwakanĩ wa mĩongo ĩlĩ wa kũsumbĩka kwa Yothamu mwana wa Usia mũsumbĩ wa Yuta
2Kings15:31 Maũndũ ala angĩ Veka weekie yĩla wasumbĩkĩte
2Kings15:32 Mwakanĩ wa kelĩ wa kũsumbĩka kwa Veka mwana wa Lemalia mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli
2Kings15:33 Atw'ĩkie mũsumbĩ e na ũkũũ wa myaka mĩongo ĩlĩ na ĩtano. Asumbĩkie vandũ va myaka ĩkũmi na thanthatũ e Yelũsalemu. Inyia wake eetawa Yelusa mwĩĩtu wa Nzatoki.
2Kings15:34 Yothamu nĩweekaa maũndũ ala mamwendeeasya Mwĩai Ngai
2Kings15:35 Ĩndĩ kũndũ kũla andũ mathaithĩaa iĩmanĩ ĩũlũ kũyaanangwa. Andũ nĩmaendeeie kũthemba na kũvĩvĩsya ũvani kw'o. Yothamu nĩwaakie ĩngĩ Mũvĩa wa Ĩũlũ wa Ĩkalũ.
2Kings15:36 Maũndũ ala angĩ Yothamu weekie yĩla wasumbĩkĩte
2Kings15:37 Ĩvindanĩ ya kũsumbĩka kwa Yothamu
2Kings15:38 Yothamu nĩwakwie na athikwa mbũanĩ ila syathikawa asumbĩ Ndũanĩ ya Ndeviti. Aasu mwana wake nĩwatw'ĩkie mũsumbĩ ĩtina wake.
2Kings16:1 Mwakanĩ wa ĩkũmi na mũonza wa kũsumbĩka kwa Veka mwana wa Lemalia mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli
2Kings16:2 Aasu atw'ĩkie mũsumbĩ e na ũkũũ wa myaka mĩongo ĩlĩ. Asumbĩkie vandũ va myaka ĩkũmi na thanthatũ e Yelũsalemu. Nĩwavĩtĩisye Mwĩai Ngai
2Kings16:3 Nĩwaatĩĩie ngelekany'o nthũku ya asumbĩ ma Ĩsilaeli. O na nĩwathembie mwana wake mwene ethĩwe nthembo ya kĩvĩvw'a
2Kings16:4 Nĩwaumĩasya nthembo na kũvĩvĩsya ũvani kũndũnĩ kũla andũ mathaithĩaa iĩmanĩ ĩũlũ
2Kings16:5 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Lesini mũsumbĩ wa Silia
2Kings16:6 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu
2Kings16:7 Aasu nĩwatũmie andũ kũla kwĩ Tikilathi-vileseli
2Kings16:8 Aasu nĩwoosie silĩva na thaavu kuma Ĩkalũnĩ
2Kings16:9 Tikilathi-vileseli mũsumbĩ wa Asuli nĩweetĩkĩlile ũndũ Aasu wamwĩie
2Kings16:10 Yĩla Aasu waendie Ndamasikũ akakomane na Tikilathi-vileseli
2Kings16:11 Kwoou mũthembi Ulia nĩwaakie kĩthembeo kĩilyĩ ta kĩu vyũ akĩmina Aasu atanasyoka.
2Kings16:12 Yĩla Aasu wasyokie kuma Ndamasikũ
2Kings16:13 Nĩwathembie nthembo yake ya kũvĩvw'a
2Kings16:14 Nĩwathamisye kĩthembeo kya kyũma kya mbulonzi kĩla kyavathĩtwe kwondũ wa Mwĩai Ngai
2Kings16:15 Nĩvo ĩndĩ weeaĩie Ulia amwĩa atĩĩ
2Kings16:16 Mũthembi Ulia nĩweekie maũndũ onthe ala mũsumbĩ Aasu wamwĩaĩie.
2Kings16:17 Mũsumbĩ Aasu nĩwavetangie tũkasya twa mbulonzi tũla twatũmĩawa Ĩkalũnĩ
2Kings16:18 Nĩwavetangie ĩeema ya mwanya yĩla yatũmĩawa ũthaithinĩ wa Savato
2Kings16:19 Maũndũ ala angĩ Aasu weekie yĩla wasumbĩkĩte
2Kings16:20 Aasu nĩwakwie na athikwa mbũanĩ ila syathikawa asumbĩ Ndũanĩ ya Ndeviti. Esekia mwana wake nĩwatw'ĩkie mũsumbĩ ĩtina wake.
2Kings17:1 Mwakanĩ wa ĩkũmi na ĩlĩ wa kũsumbĩka kwa Aasu mũsumbĩ wa Yuta
2Kings17:2 Nĩwavĩtĩisye Mwĩai Ngai
2Kings17:3 Salimaneseli mũsumbĩ wa nthĩ ya Asuli nĩwookie kũvithũkĩa Osea. Osea nĩweethĩiwe e ungu wa Salimaneseli na nĩwamumĩasya koti.
2Kings17:4 Ĩndĩ ĩvinda yĩmwe
2Kings17:5 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Salimaneseli mũsumbĩ wa Asuli wavithũkĩie nthĩ yonthe ya Ĩsilaeli
2Kings17:6 Mwakanĩ wa kenda wa kũsumbĩka kwa Osea
2Kings17:7 Maũndũ asu onthe meekĩkie nũndũ andũ ma Ĩsilaeli nĩmavĩtĩisye Mwĩai Ngai
2Kings17:8 nĩmeekaa maũndũ ala mbaĩ ila Mwĩai Ngai walũngilye maendee kũlika nthĩ ya Kanaani syeekaa
2Kings17:9 Andũ ma Ĩsilaeli nĩmavĩtĩisye Mwĩai Ngai kwa kwĩka mevithĩte maũndũ ala matamwendeeasya. Nĩmeeyakĩie kũndũ kwa kũthaithĩa ndũanĩ syoo syonthe; ndũanĩ ila nini na ila nene mbiĩĩe.
2Kings17:10 Nĩmenzĩlile itũĩ sya ũthaithi
2Kings17:11 Nĩmavĩvĩisye ũvani kũndũnĩ kũu kwa kũthaithĩa
2Kings17:12 Nĩmathaithaa ngai sya mĩvw'anano
2Kings17:13 Mwĩai Ngai nĩwatũmĩte athani na andũ ala methĩawa na mawoni ma ma maũndũ makakany'e andũ ma Ĩsilaeli na ma Yuta na kũmea atĩĩ
2Kings17:14 Ĩndĩ andũ ma Ĩsilaeli mayaaĩthĩwa me ewi; nĩmoomisye ngoo ta aaũmae moo
2Kings17:15 Nĩmaleile kũatĩĩa motw'ĩo ma Mwĩai Ngai; mayaaĩanĩsya ũtianĩo ũla waseũvisye na aaũmae moo
2Kings17:16 Nĩmaleile kũatĩĩa mĩao yonthe ya Mwĩai Ngai
2Kings17:17 Nĩmathembeie ngai ingĩ ana moo na eĩtu moo methĩwe nthembo ya kũvĩvw'a. O ta ũu nĩmaendaa kũaũsya na kwĩka maũndũ ma mowe
2Kings17:18 Kwoou Mwĩai Ngai nĩwathatiw'e mũno nĩ andũ ma Ĩsilaeli na amavetanga mbee wake. No mbaĩ ya Yuta yatialile.
2Kings17:19 Andũ ma mbaĩ ya Yuta o na mo mayaatĩĩa mĩao ya Mwĩai Ngai
2Kings17:20 Mwĩai Ngai nĩwaleile andũ ma Ĩsilaeli onthe
2Kings17:21 Mwĩai Ngai amina kũaany'a Ĩsilaeli na Yuta
2Kings17:22 Andũ ma Ĩsilaeli nĩmaendeeie kwĩka naĩ syonthe ila Yelovoamu weekaa; mayaaeka kwĩka naĩ isu
2Kings17:23 nginya Mwĩai Ngai amavetanga kuma mbee wake
2Kings17:24 Mũsumbĩ wa Asuli nĩwaumisye andũ Mbavilonĩ
2Kings17:25 Mamina kũtũa kũu ya mbee mayathaithaa Mwĩai Ngai
2Kings17:26 Mũsumbĩ wa Asuli nĩwataviw'e kana andũ asu matũie ndũanĩ sya Samalia mayeesĩ mĩao ya ngai ya nthĩ ĩsu
2Kings17:27 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũsumbĩ wa Asuli weeaie asya atĩĩ
2Kings17:28 Kwoou ũmwe wa athembi ala matavĩtwe kuma Samalia nĩwookie na atũa Mbethi-eli
2Kings17:29 Ũu wĩ o vo
2Kings17:30 Andũ ma Mbavilonĩ maseũvisye ngai yĩtawa Sukothi-mbenothi
2Kings17:31 Aavi maseũvya ngai syĩtawa Niviasi na Talitaki; Asevalivaimu nĩmathembaa syana syoo syĩthĩwe nthembo sya kũvĩvw'a
2Kings17:32 O ta ũu andũ asu nĩmathaithaa Mwĩai Ngai
2Kings17:33 Andũ asu nĩmathaithaa Mwĩai Ngai
2Kings17:34 Kũvika o na ũmũnthĩ andũ asu mekaa o maũndũ ala meekaa. Maithaithaa Mwĩai Ngai
2Kings17:35 Yĩla Mwĩai Ngai waseũvisye ũtianĩo na andũ ma Ĩsilaeli
2Kings17:36 Ĩndĩ nyie Mwĩai Ngai
2Kings17:37 O ta ũu kĩla ĩvinda mwaĩlĩte kwĩanĩasya motw'ĩo na myamũlo na mĩao ĩla namũandĩkĩie; mũikaathaithe ngai ingĩ
2Kings17:38 na mũikaaũlwe nĩ ũtianĩo ũla natianĩie nenyu.
2Kings17:39 Thaithaai Mwĩai Ngai
2Kings17:40 Ĩndĩ andũ asu mayaaĩthukĩĩsya; nĩmaendeeie kwĩka maũndũ moo ala meekaa tene.
2Kings17:41 Kwoou andũ asu mathaithaa Mwĩai Ngai
2Kings18:1 Mwakanĩ wa katatũ wa kũsumbĩka kwa Osea mwana wa Ela mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli
2Kings18:2 Atw'ĩkie mũsumbĩ e na ũkũũ wa myaka mĩongo ĩlĩ na ĩtano. Asumbĩkie vandũ va myaka mĩongo ĩlĩ na kenda e Yelũsalemu. Inyia wake eetawa Aviya mwĩĩtu wa Nzekalia.
2Kings18:3 Esekia eekie maũndũ ala mamwendeeasya Mwĩai Ngai
2Kings18:4 Nĩwaanangie kũndũ kwa kũthaithĩa ngai sya mĩvw'anano
2Kings18:5 Esekia nĩwaĩkĩĩaa Mwĩai Ngai
2Kings18:6 Aĩ mũĩkĩĩku kũla kwĩ Mwĩai Ngai na ndaalea kũmwĩw'a; nĩwaatĩĩaa na kĩthito mĩao yonthe ĩla Mwĩai Ngai weeaĩĩte Mwose.
2Kings18:7 Mwĩai Ngai aĩ vamwe nake; nĩwaendeeaa nesa maũndũnĩ make onthe. Nĩwaleanile na mũsumbĩ wa Asuli na ndaamũthũkũma.
2Kings18:8 Nĩwokitie Avilisiti amasinda na amalũngya kuma kũla matwĩe ndũanĩ nini na nene
2Kings18:9 Mwakanĩ wa kana wa kũsumbĩka kwa Esekia
2Kings18:10 Mũminũkĩlyonĩ wa myaka ĩsu ĩtatũ Asuli nĩmakwatie Samalia. Kwoou Samalia yakwatiwe mwakanĩ wa thanthatũ wa kũsumbĩka kwa Esekia
2Kings18:11 Mũsumbĩ wa Asuli nĩwatwaie andũ ma Ĩsilaeli nthĩ ya Asuli me ove. Nĩwaiie amwe moo ndũanĩ ya Aalaa
2Kings18:12 Samalia yasindiwe nũndũ Andũ ma Ĩsilaeli mayaaĩw'a Mwĩai Ngai
2Kings18:13 Mwakanĩ wa ĩkũmi na inya wa kũsumbĩka kwa Esekia
2Kings18:14 Kwoou Esekia mũsumbĩ wa Yuta nĩwatũmanie Lakisi kũla kwĩ mũsumbĩ wa Asuli ayasya atĩĩ
2Kings18:15 Kwoou Esekia nĩwamũnengie silĩva w'onthe ũla waĩ Ĩkalũnĩ
2Kings18:16 O ta ũu nĩwoombũie thaavu ũla waĩ mĩomonĩ ya Ĩkalũ
2Kings18:17 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Senakelivu mũsumbĩ wa Asuli watũmie mũnene wa atongoi make ma asikalĩ
2Kings18:18 Nĩvo ĩndĩ matũmanie Mũsumbĩ Esekia
2Kings18:19 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũtongoi wa asikalĩ wameie atĩĩ
2Kings18:20 Wĩasya wĩ na mũvango mũseo na vinya wa kaũ
2Kings18:21 Yu weteelete andũ ma Misili makũtetheesye. Misili nĩ ta ndata ya mũangi mbatũkangu
2Kings18:22 Mũtongoi ũsu wa asikalĩ nĩwaendeeie kwasya atĩĩ
2Kings18:23 Yu seũvyai wĩw'ano na mũnene wakwa mũsumbĩ wa Asuli
2Kings18:24 Mũtonya ata kũsinda mũsikalĩ ũmwe
2Kings18:25 Wĩsũanĩa nooka kũvithũkĩa nthĩ yaku na kũmyananga
2Kings18:26 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Eliakimu mwana wa Ilikia
2Kings18:27 Ĩndĩ mũtongoi ũsu wa asikalĩ nĩwamakũlilye atĩĩ
2Kings18:28 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũtongoi ũsu wa asikalĩ waũngamie
2Kings18:29 Mũsumbĩ easya atĩĩ
2Kings18:30 Mũikaeke amũsesenge mũĩkĩĩe Mwĩai Ngai aimwĩa: Vate nzika Mwĩai Ngai nũkũtũtangĩĩa; ndũa ĩno ndĩnenganwe ũtonyinĩ wa mũsumbĩ wa Asuli.’
2Kings18:31 “Mũikethukĩĩsye Esekia. Mũsumbĩ wa Asuli easya atĩĩ
2Kings18:32 nginya yĩla nĩũka na ngĩmũtwaa nthĩ ĩilyĩ ta ĩno yenyu; nthĩ ĩvandawa lĩu wa ngetha ya mbaa mbeke na yĩ mĩsavivũ
2Kings18:33 Ve ngai ya nthĩ o na yĩva
2Kings18:34 Ngai sya Amathi na Alivati iĩva? Ngai sya Sevalivaimu
2Kings18:35 Ve ĩmwe ya ngai sya nthĩ isu
2Kings18:36 Ĩndĩ andũ nĩmavindisye na mayaamũsũngĩa ũndũ
2Kings18:37 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Eliakimu
2Kings19:1 Yĩla Mũsumbĩ Esekia wataviw'e ndeto ila mũsumbĩ wa Asuli waneenie
2Kings19:2 Nĩwatũmie Eliakimu ũla waũngamĩe nyũmba ya kĩ-ũsumbĩ
2Kings19:3 Nĩmaneenie na Ĩsaia mamwĩa
2Kings19:4 Mũsumbĩ wa Asuli nũtũmie mũtongoi wake wa asikalĩ
2Kings19:5 Yĩla Athũkũmi asu ma Mũsumbĩ Esekia mavikie kũla kwĩ Ĩsaia
2Kings19:6 Ĩsaia nĩwameie atĩĩ
2Kings19:7 Nĩngũtuma ethũkĩĩsya ndeto ite sya w'o
2Kings19:8 Yĩla mũtongoi wa asikalĩ wamanyie kana mũsumbĩ wa Asuli nũminĩte kuma Lakisi
2Kings19:9 Asuli nĩmamanyie kana asikalĩ ma Misili
2Kings19:10 “Endai mũkee Esekia mũsumbĩ wa Yuta atĩĩ
2Kings19:11 Kwa w'o nĩwĩw'ĩte ũndũ asumbĩ ma Asuli mekanĩte na nthĩ syonthe; nĩmasyanangaa makaimina vyũ. Mwĩsũanĩa nĩmũũvonoka?
2Kings19:12 Aaũmae makwa nĩmaanangie ndũa sya Ngosani
2Kings19:13 Maĩva asumbĩ ma ndũa sya Amathi
2Kings19:14 Mũsumbĩ Esekia nĩwoosie valũa kuma kwa andũ ala matũmĩtwe nĩ mũsumbĩ wa Asuli na aũsoma. Nĩvo ĩndĩ waendie Ĩkalũnĩ
2Kings19:15 na avoya ayasya atĩĩ
2Kings19:16 Ame Mwĩai Ngai
2Kings19:17 Ame Mwĩai Ngai
2Kings19:18 Nĩmavĩvisye ngai syoo na masyananga
2Kings19:19 Kwoou yu Mwĩai Ngai
2Kings19:20 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Ĩsaia mwana wa Amosu watũmanie kũla kwĩ Esekia aimwĩa atĩĩ
2Kings19:21 Mwĩai Ngai eneena ĩũlũ wa Senakelivu ayasya: Ndũa ya Yelũsalemu nĩkũthekeeaa na kũũvũthya; ndũa ya Yelũsalemu nĩkũthingithĩasya mũtwe yĩ ĩtina waku.
2Kings19:22 Ũla ũnaumangaa na kũvũthya nũũ? Ũla ũnookĩlĩlye wasya na wamũsisya wĩ na ngathĩĩo nũũ? Nĩ Ũla Mũtheu wa Ĩsilaeli!
2Kings19:23 Nũumangĩte Mwĩai Ngai
2Kings19:24 Nĩnenzie ithima
2Kings19:25 “Ndwaaĩw'a kana nĩnavangie tene kana ũu ũkeekĩka? Navangie kuma tene ũndũ yu nĩendee kwĩanĩsya. Nĩnakũnengie ũtonyi wa kwananga ndũa mbiĩĩe
2Kings19:26 Andũ ma ndũa isu mai na vinya
2Kings19:27 Ĩndĩ nĩnĩsĩ maũndũ onthe ĩũlũ waku
2Kings19:28 Nayu nũndũ nũnthatĩe na ũthatu mũnene
2Kings19:29 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Ĩsaia weeie Mũsumbĩ Esekia atĩĩ
2Kings19:30 Andũ ma Yuta ala makatiala makaendeea nesa
2Kings19:31 Kũkeethĩwa andũ kuma Yelũsalemu
2Kings19:32 “Kwoou ĩndĩ ũũ nĩw'o Mwĩai Ngai ũkũneena ĩũlũ wa mũsumbĩ wa Asuli: ‘Ndakalika ndũanĩ ĩno kana kwĩkya ĩangi o na yĩmwe vo. Vai asikalĩ makwete ngao makamĩthengeea
2Kings19:33 Nzĩa ĩla ũnookie nayo
2Kings19:34 Kwondũ wa ndaĩa yakwa mwene
2Kings19:35 Ũtukũ ũsu mũlaĩka wa Mwĩai Ngai nĩwaendie vala Asuli mambĩte maeema
2Kings19:36 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Senakelivu mũsumbĩ wa Asuli waumie vau
2Kings19:37 Mũthenya ũmwe
2Kings20:1 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu Mũsumbĩ Esekia nĩwawaie mũno weethĩa akilĩlye kũkw'a. Mwathani Ĩsaia mwana wa Amosu nĩwaendie kũmwona na amwĩa atĩĩ
2Kings20:2 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Esekia weethyũũie asisya ũkũtanĩ
2Kings20:3 “Ame Mwĩai Ngai
2Kings20:4 Ĩsaia nĩwaumie vala ve mũsumbĩ
2Kings20:5 “Syoka ũkaneene na Esekia mũtongoi wa andũ makwa ũmwĩe
2Kings20:6 Nĩngũkwongela myaka ĩkũmi na ĩtano
2Kings20:7 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Ĩsaia weeie athũkũmi ma mũsumbĩ mekĩe matunda ma makũyũ mathie mũimũnĩ wake
2Kings20:8 Esekia nĩwakũlilye Ĩsaia atĩĩ
2Kings20:9 Ĩsaia nĩwamũsũngĩie amwĩa
2Kings20:10 Esekia nĩwasũngĩie asya
2Kings20:11 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mwathani Ĩsaia wavoyie Mwĩai Ngai
2Kings20:12 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu
2Kings20:13 Esekia nĩwathokisye atũmwa asu
2Kings20:14 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mwathani Ĩsaia waendie kũla kwĩ Mũsumbĩ Esekia na amũkũlya atĩĩ
2Kings20:15 Ĩsaia amũkũlya atĩĩ
2Kings20:16 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Ĩsaia weeie mũsumbĩ
2Kings20:17 ‘Ĩvinda nĩyũkĩte yĩla syĩndũ syonthe ila syĩ nyũmbanĩ yaku ya kĩ-ũsumbĩ
2Kings20:18 Imwe sya nzyawa syaku mwene ikatavwa itwawe
2Kings20:19 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Mũsumbĩ Esekia weeie Ĩsaia atĩĩ
2Kings20:20 Maũndũ ala angĩ Esekia weekie yĩla wasumbĩkĩte
2Kings20:21 Esekia nĩwakwie na mwana wake Manase atw'ĩka mũsumbĩ ĩtina wake.
2Kings21:1 Manase atw'ĩkie mũsumbĩ e na ũkũũ wa myaka ĩkũmi na ĩlĩ. Asumbĩkie vandũ va myaka mĩongo ĩtano na ĩtano e Yelũsalemu. Inyia wake eetawa Evisiva.
2Kings21:2 Nĩweekie maũndũ ala matamwendeeasya Mwĩai Ngai; eekie maũndũ mathũku ala meekawa nĩ andũ ma mbaĩ ila Mwĩai Ngai walũngilye syauma nthĩ ya Kanaani
2Kings21:3 Nĩwaakie ĩngĩ kũndũ kwa kũthaithĩa iĩmanĩ ĩũlũ
2Kings21:4 Nĩwaakie ithembeo sya ngai sya mĩvw'anano Ĩkalũnĩ
2Kings21:5 Nĩwaakie ithembeo sya kũthaithĩa ndata iwanzanĩ syelĩ sya Ĩkalũ.
2Kings21:6 Nĩwathembie mwana wake mwene ethĩwe nthembo ya kũvĩvw'a. O ta ũu nĩwaũasya
2Kings21:7 Nĩwoosie mũvw'anano wa ngai nga ĩla yĩtawa Asela
2Kings21:8 Ethĩwa andũ ma Ĩsilaeli makaatĩĩaa mĩao yakwa yonthe
2Kings21:9 Ĩndĩ andũ ma Yuta mayaamwĩw'a Mwĩai Ngai. Manase nĩwamatongoeisye kwĩka naĩ nthũku
2Kings21:10 Mwĩai Ngai nĩwaneenie aitũmĩa athũkũmi make athani asya atĩĩ
2Kings21:11 “Manase mũsumbĩ wa Yuta nĩwĩkĩte naĩ nthũku mũno. Nĩwĩkĩte naĩ nthũku mbee wa ũndũ Aamoli ala maĩ mbee wake meekie
2Kings21:12 Kwoou nyie Mwĩai Ngai
2Kings21:13 Ngakany'a Yelũsalemu o tondũ neekie Samalia
2Kings21:14 Ngatia andũ makwa ala makatiala
2Kings21:15 nũndũ nĩmekĩte maũndũ ala matambendeeasya
2Kings21:16 Vamwe na maũndũ asu
2Kings21:17 Maũndũ ala angĩ onthe Manase weekie yĩla wasumbĩkĩte
2Kings21:18 Manase nĩwakwie na athikwa mbũanĩ yaĩ mũũndanĩ wake wa kĩ-ũsumbĩ
2Kings21:19 Amoni atw'ĩkie mũsumbĩ wa Yuta e na ũkũũ wa myaka mĩongo ĩlĩ na ĩlĩ. Asumbĩkie vandũ va myaka ĩlĩ e Yelũsalemu. Inyia wake eetawa Mesulemethi
2Kings21:20 Amoni nĩwavĩtĩisye Mwĩai Ngai o tondũ Manase ĩthe wake weekie.
2Kings21:21 Eekie maũndũ onthe ala ĩthe wake weekaa; nĩwathaithaa na kũthũkũma ngai sya mĩvw'anano ila ĩthe wake wathaithaa.
2Kings21:22 Nĩwaleile Mwĩai Ngai
2Kings21:23 Anini ma Amoni nĩmamũseũvĩisye mũvango mũthũku
2Kings21:24 Nĩvo ĩndĩ andũ ma Yuta mooaie andũ ala mamũaie
2Kings21:25 Maũndũ ala angĩ onthe Amoni weekie yĩla wasumbĩkĩte
2Kings21:26 Amoni athikiwe mbũanĩ yake yaĩ Mũũndanĩ wa Usa
2Kings22:1 Yosia atw'ĩkie mũsumbĩ wa Yuta e na ũkũũ wa myaka nyanya. Asumbĩkie vandũ va myaka mĩongo ĩtatũ na ũmwe e Yelũsalemu. Inyia wake eetawa Yetita mwĩĩtu wa Ataia
2Kings22:2 Yosia nĩweekaa maũndũ ala mamwendeeasya Mwĩai Ngai. Nĩweekaa maũndũ ala ũmae wake Ndeviti weekaa
2Kings22:3 Mwakanĩ wa ĩkũmi na nyanya wa kũsumbĩka kwake
2Kings22:4 “Enda kũla kwĩ Mũthembi Mũnene Ilikia
2Kings22:5 Mwĩe nĩanenge mbesa isu andũ ala maũngamĩe wĩa Ĩkalũnĩ
2Kings22:6 Andũ asu nĩ ala maseũvasya syĩndũ sya mbwaũ
2Kings22:7 Andũ asu maũngamĩe wĩa wa Ĩkalũ nĩ aĩkĩĩku vyũ
2Kings22:8 Ilikia Mũthembi Mũnene nĩweeie mũandĩki Savani atĩĩ
2Kings22:9 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Savani wasyokie kũla kwĩ mũsumbĩ na amwĩa atĩĩ
2Kings22:10 Savani nĩwaendeeie kũneena na mũsumbĩ amwĩa atĩĩ
2Kings22:11 Yĩla mũsumbĩ weewie ndeto sya ĩvuku yĩu ya mĩao
2Kings22:12 Mũsumbĩ nĩweeaĩie mũthembi Ilikia
2Kings22:13 “Endai mũkakũlye Mwĩai Ngai ũtao
2Kings22:14 Kwoou mũthembi Ilikia
2Kings22:15 na amea masyoke kwa mũsumbĩ makamwĩe
2Kings22:16 Mwĩai Ngai easya atĩĩ
2Kings22:17 Nĩmandekete na makavĩvĩsya ngai sya mĩvw'anano ũvani
2Kings22:18 Ĩndĩ kwondũ wa mũsumbĩ wa Yuta ũla ũmũtũmie mũkakũlye ũtao kwa Ngai
2Kings22:19 ‘Nũndũ nũnaumbũlile na weenyivya mbee wakwa
2Kings22:20 Kwoou ũkakw'a na ũithikwa na mũuo. Ndũkona thĩna ũla ngaete vandũnĩ vaa.’ ” Andũ asu nĩmasyokie kũla kwĩ mũsumbĩ na mamũtavya ũtũmani ũsu.
2Kings23:1 Mũsumbĩ Yosia nĩweetie atongoi onthe ma Yuta na ma Yelũsalemu mombane vamwe.
2Kings23:2 Nĩwambatie Ĩkalũnĩ e vamwe na andũ ma Yuta na ma Yelũsalemu
2Kings23:3 Mũsumbĩ nĩwaũngamie vakuvĩ na kĩtuĩ na aseũvya ũtianĩo na Mwĩai Ngai kana akamwĩw'aa na kwĩanĩasya mĩao
2Kings23:4 Ĩtina wa ũu mũsumbĩ nĩweeaĩie Ilikia Mũthembi Mũnene
2Kings23:5 O ta ũu nĩwavetangie athembi onthe ma ngai sya mĩvw'anano
2Kings23:6 Nĩwaumisye mũvw'anano wa ngai nga ĩla yĩtawa Asela Ĩkalũnĩ
2Kings23:7 O ta ũu nĩwaanangie kũndũ kũla kwekalaa malwaya ma kĩ-ũthaithi Ĩkalũnĩ. (Vaa nĩvo aka matumĩaa ngũa ndaasa
2Kings23:8 Yosia nĩwoombanisye athembi onthe kuma ndũanĩ sya Yuta amaete Yelũsalemu
2Kings23:9 Athembi ala mathũkũmaa kũndũnĩ kũu kwa kũthaithĩa
2Kings23:10 O ta ũu Mũsumbĩ Yosia nĩwavukisye vandũ va kũthaithĩa vala veetawa Tovethi
2Kings23:11 Nĩwavetangie mbalasi ila asumbĩ ma Yuta mavathĩte makanengane kwondũ wa kũthaitha syũa
2Kings23:12 O ta ũu nĩwaanangie ithembeo ila asumbĩ ma Yuta maakĩte kĩalanĩ kya nyũmba ya ĩũlũ ya mũsumbĩ Aasu
2Kings23:13 Yosia nĩwavukisye kũndũ kwa kũthaithĩa kũla Mũsumbĩ Solomoni waseũvĩtye wumĩlonĩ wa syũa wa ndũa ya Yelũsalemu
2Kings23:14 Nĩwatũlangile ituĩ sya ũthaithi syatw'ĩka ilungu
2Kings23:15 O ta ũu Yosia nĩwaanangie kĩthembeo kĩla kyaĩ Mbethi-eli
2Kings23:16 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yosia weethyũũie na oona mbũa kĩĩmanĩ. Nĩwatũmanie mavĩndĩ ma andũ ala mathikĩtwe mbũanĩ isu makaumw'e
2Kings23:17 Yosia nĩwakũlilye atĩĩ
2Kings23:18 Yosia nĩwameie atĩĩ
2Kings23:19 Yosia nĩwaanangie na avukya ithembeo syonthe
2Kings23:20 Nĩwooaĩie athembi ala maĩ kũndũnĩ kũu kwa kũthaithĩa ngai sya mĩvw'anano ithembeonĩ isu
2Kings23:21 Mũsumbĩ Yosia nĩweeaĩie andũ onthe amea atĩĩ
2Kings23:22 Vai Mboka ya Vasaka ĩilyĩ ũu yaatanĩwa
2Kings23:23 Mwakanĩ wa ĩkũmi na nyanya wa kũsumbĩka kwa Yosia
2Kings23:24 Yosia nĩwavetangie kuma Yuta na Yelũsalemu andũ ala mamanyaa maũndũ kwĩsĩla mavevanĩ ma andũ ala makwie
2Kings23:25 Vai mũsumbĩ ũngĩ ũilyĩ Yosia waaĩthĩwa mbee wake kana ĩtina wake
2Kings23:26 Ĩndĩ ũu wĩ o vo
2Kings23:27 Kwoou Mwĩai Ngai nĩwaisye atĩĩ
2Kings23:28 Maũndũ ala angĩ Yosia weekie yĩla wasumbĩkĩte
2Kings23:29 Ĩvindanĩ yĩla Yosia waĩ mũsumbĩ
2Kings23:30 Athũkũmi ma Yosia nĩmakuie mwĩĩ wake na ĩkasya ya kaũ maũtũnga Yelũsalemu
2Kings23:31 Yeoaasi atw'ĩkie mũsumbĩ wa Yuta e na ũkũũ wa myaka mĩongo ĩlĩ na ĩtatũ. Asumbĩkie vandũ va ĩvinda ya myei ĩtatũ e Yelũsalemu. Inyia wake eetawa Amutali mwĩĩtu wa Yelemia ũla watwĩe ndũanĩ ya Livina.
2Kings23:32 Nĩwavĩtĩisye Mwĩai Ngai o tondũ aaũmae make meekie.
2Kings23:33 Neko mũsumbĩ wa Misili nĩwamũkwatie na amũtwaa e mwove ndũanĩ ya Livila nthĩ ya Amathi
2Kings23:34 Neko mũsumbĩ wa Misili nĩwatw'ĩkĩthisye Eliakimu mwana wa Yosia mũsumbĩ ĩtina wa Yosia
2Kings23:35 Yeoiakimu nĩwoombanisye koti kuma kũla kwĩ andũ kwĩanana na ũthwii woo
2Kings23:36 Yeoiakimu atw'ĩkie mũsumbĩ wa Yuta e na ũkũũ wa myaka mĩongo ĩlĩ na ĩtano. Asumbĩkie vandũ va ĩvinda ya myaka ĩkũmi na ũmwe e Yelũsalemu. Inyia wake eetawa Nzevita mwĩĩtu wa Vetaia kuma ndũanĩ ya Luma.
2Kings23:37 Yeoiakimu nĩwavĩtĩisye Mwĩai Ngai
2Kings24:1 Ĩvindanĩ ya kũsumbĩka kwa Yeoiakimu
2Kings24:2 Mwĩai Ngai nĩwatũmie ikundi sya asikalĩ kuma Mbavilonĩ
2Kings24:3 Maũndũ asu meekĩkie kwĩanana na mwĩao wa Mwĩai Ngai
2Kings24:4 na mũno mũno nũndũ wa andũ mate ĩvĩtyo ala wooaie. Mwĩai Ngai ndaaĩtĩkĩla kũekea Manase nũndũ wa maũndũ asu.
2Kings24:5 Maũndũ ala angĩ Yeoiakimu weekie yĩla wasumbĩkĩte
2Kings24:6 Yeoiakimu nĩwakwie
2Kings24:7 Mũsumbĩ wa Misili ndaaumaala ĩngĩ akokite
2Kings24:8 Yeoiakini atw'ĩkie mũsumbĩ wa Yuta e na ũkũũ wa myaka ĩkũmi na nyanya. Asumbĩkie myei ĩtatũ e Yelũsalemu. Inyia wake eetawa Neusita mwĩĩtu wa Elinathani wa ndũa ya Yelũsalemu.
2Kings24:9 Yeoiakini nĩwavĩtĩisye Mwĩai Ngai o tondũ ĩthe wake weekie.
2Kings24:10 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu asikalĩ ma Nevukatinesa mũsumbĩ wa Mbavilonĩ
2Kings24:11 Nevukatinesa mwene nĩwookie Yelũsalemu
2Kings24:12 Yeoiakini mũsumbĩ wa Yuta
2Kings24:13 Nĩwakuie ũthwii w'onthe wa Ĩkalũ na wa nyũmba ya kĩ-ũsumbĩ aũtwaa Mbavilonĩ
2Kings24:14 Nevukatinesa nĩwatwaie andũ onthe ma Yelũsalemu me ove: Anene onthe ma ũsumbĩ wa Yuta
2Kings24:15 Nevukatinesa nĩwatwaie Yeoiakini Mbavilonĩ e mwove
2Kings24:16 Nevukatinesa nĩwatwaie Mbavilonĩ aũme ngili mũonza ala maĩ ngũmbaũ
2Kings24:17 Nevukatinesa nĩwatw'ĩkĩthisye Matania
2Kings24:18 Nzetekia atw'ĩkie mũsumbĩ wa Yuta e na ũkũũ wa myaka mĩongo ĩlĩ na ũmwe. Asumbĩkie myaka ĩkũmi na ũmwe e Yelũsalemu. Inyia wake eetawa Amutali mwĩĩtu wa Yelemia ũla watwĩe ndũanĩ ya Livina.
2Kings24:19 Nzetekia nĩwavĩtĩisye Mwĩai Ngai
2Kings24:20 Mwĩai Ngai nĩwathatiw'e mũno nĩ andũ ma Yelũsalemu na ma Yuta
2Kings25:1 Nzetekia nĩwang'endeie Nevukatinesa mũsumbĩ wa Mbavilonĩ
2Kings25:2 Kwoou ndũa ya Yelũsalemu nĩyekalile yĩlingĩlĩtwe nĩ amaitha
2Kings25:3 Mũthenyanĩ wa kenda wa mwei wa kana mwakanĩ o ũsu
2Kings25:4 O na kau asikalĩ ma Mbavilonĩ nĩmeelingĩlĩte Yelũsalemu
2Kings25:5 Ĩndĩ asikalĩ ma Mbavilonĩ nĩmaatĩĩie mũsumbĩ Nzetekia
2Kings25:6 Nĩvo ĩndĩ asikalĩ ma Mbavilonĩ makwatie Nzetekia mamũtwaa ndũanĩ ya Livila
2Kings25:7 Nĩmooaie syana syake asyaĩĩsye na ĩndĩ mamũvũthũanga metho. Nĩmamwĩkĩie mbĩngũ na mamũtwaa Mbavilonĩ.
2Kings25:8 Mũthenya wa mũonza wa mwei wa katano
2Kings25:9 Nĩwavĩvisye Ĩkalũ
2Kings25:10 Asikalĩ onthe ma Mbavilonĩ ala maĩ vamwe nake nĩmaomboangie ngũta syonthe ila syeelingĩlĩte Yelũsalemu.
2Kings25:11 Nevusalatani nĩwakuie andũ onthe ala matialĩte Yelũsalemu amatwaa Mbavilonĩ
2Kings25:12 Ĩndĩ Nevusalatani nĩwatialilye andũ amwe ala maĩ ngya mũno ma Yuta
2Kings25:13 Andũ ma Mbavilonĩ nĩmatilangile ituĩ sya mbulonzi
2Kings25:14 O ta ũu nĩmakuie mĩko
2Kings25:15 O ta ũu Nevusalatani nĩwakuie syĩndũ ila syatoeeasya ũvani na mbakũli ila syaseũvĩtw'e na thaavu kana silĩva.
2Kings25:16 Mbulonzi ĩla Solomoni watũmĩie kũseũvya ituĩ ilĩ
2Kings25:17 Ituĩ syelĩ syailyĩ ũndũ ũmwe
2Kings25:18 Nevusalatani mũtongoi wa asikalĩ ala masungaa mũsumbĩ nĩwakwatie Selaia Mũthembi Mũnene
2Kings25:19 Katĩ wa andũ ala maĩ ndũanĩ ya Yelũsalemu
2Kings25:20 Nevusalatani akwatie andũ asu amatwaa me ove kũla kwĩ mũsumbĩ wa Mbavilonĩ
2Kings25:21 kĩsionĩ kya nthĩ ya Amathi. Me vau mũsumbĩ nĩweeaie moawe. Kwoou andũ ma Yuta nĩmatwaiwe Mbavilonĩ me ove; maumw'a nthĩ yoo.
2Kings25:22 Nevukatinesa mũsumbĩ wa Mbavilonĩ nĩwatw'ĩkĩthisye Ngetalia mwana wa Aikamu
2Kings25:23 Yĩla atongoi ma asikalĩ na asikalĩ ala maĩ namo
2Kings25:24 Ngetalia nĩweevĩtie aĩkĩĩthye asikalĩ asu aimea
2Kings25:25 Ĩndĩ mweinĩ wa mũonza
2Kings25:26 Nĩvo ĩndĩ andũ onthe
2Kings25:27 Mwakanĩ ũla Evili-melotaki watw'ĩkie mũsumbĩ wa Mbavilonĩ
2Kings25:28 Nĩweekie Yeoiakini nesa
2Kings25:29 Yeoiakini nĩwaumisye ngũa sya yela
2Kings25:30 Kĩla mũthenya
1Chronicles1:1 Atamu aĩ ĩthe wa Sethi
1Chronicles1:2 Kenani aĩ ĩthe wa Maalaleli nake Maalaleli aĩ ĩthe wa Yaleti.
1Chronicles1:3 Yaleti aĩ ĩthe wa Enoko
1Chronicles1:4 nake Lameki aĩ ĩthe wa Noa. Ana ma Noa maĩ atatũ namo nĩ Semu
1Chronicles1:5 Ana ma Yevethi maĩ Ngomeli
1Chronicles1:6 Ana ma Ngomeli maĩ Asikenasi
1Chronicles1:7 Ana ma Yavani maĩ Elisaa
1Chronicles1:8 Ana ma Amu maĩ Kusi
1Chronicles1:9 Ana ma Kusi maĩ Seva
1Chronicles1:10 Kusi nĩwe waĩ ĩthe wa Nimiloti ũla wesie kũtw'ĩka ngũmbaũ yĩ vinya mũno ĩũlũ wa nthĩ.
1Chronicles1:11 Nzyawa sya Misili nĩsyo syaĩ andũ ma Lutimu
1Chronicles1:12 Vatilusi
1Chronicles1:13 Mwana ũla mũkũũ wa Kanaani aĩ Sitoni
1Chronicles1:14 O ta ũu nzyawa sya Kanaani syaĩ Ayevusi
1Chronicles1:15 Aivi
1Chronicles1:16 Alivati
1Chronicles1:17 Ana ma Semu maĩ
1Chronicles1:18 Alivakasandi aĩ ĩthe wa Siela
1Chronicles1:19 Eveli aĩ na ana elĩ
1Chronicles1:20 Yokitani aĩ ĩthe wa Alimotati
1Chronicles1:21 Atolamu
1Chronicles1:22 Evali
1Chronicles1:23 Ovili
1Chronicles1:24 Mosyaanĩo ma Semu kũvika Avalaamu maatĩanĩe mailyĩ ta ũũ: Semu
1Chronicles1:25 Eveli
1Chronicles1:26 Selũki
1Chronicles1:27 na Avalamu (ũla nĩwe Avalaamu).
1Chronicles1:28 Avalaamu aĩ na ana elĩ: Isaka na Ĩsumaeli.
1Chronicles1:29 Ii nĩsyo nzyawa syoo: Mwana wa mbee wa Ĩsumaeli aĩ Nevaiothi
1Chronicles1:30 Misima
1Chronicles1:31 Yetuli
1Chronicles1:32 Avalaamu aĩ na kĩveti kyake kya ndũsyo kyeetawa Ketula. Ketula nĩwe waĩ inyia wa Ngimilani
1Chronicles1:33 Ana ma Mitiani maĩ Evaa
1Chronicles1:34 Isaka mwana wa Avalaamu aĩ na ana Eli: Esaũ na Yakovo.
1Chronicles1:35 Ana ma Esaũ maĩ Elivasi
1Chronicles1:36 Ana ma Elivasi maĩ Temani
1Chronicles1:37 Ana ma Leueli maĩ Naathi
1Chronicles1:38 Ana ma Seili maĩ
1Chronicles1:39 Ana ma Lotani maĩ Oli
1Chronicles1:40 Ana ma Sovali maĩ
1Chronicles1:41 Mwana wa Anaa eetawa Ndisoni. Ana ma Ndisoni maĩ Amilani
1Chronicles1:42 Ana ma Eseli maĩ Mbiliani
1Chronicles1:43 Aa nĩmo asumbĩ ala masumbĩkie nthĩ ya Etomu mbee wa andũ ma Ĩsilaeli matanethĩwa na mũsumbĩ o na ũmwe: Mbela mwana wa Mbeoli; ndũa ĩla waumĩte yeetawa Ndiniava.
1Chronicles1:44 Mbela akw'a
1Chronicles1:45 Yovavu akw'a

1Chronicles1:47 Aatati akw'a

1Chronicles1:54 Makitieli na Ilami. Asu nĩmo maĩ anene ma Etomu.
1Chronicles2:1 Ana ma Yakovo maĩ Lũveni
1Chronicles2:2 Ndani
1Chronicles2:3 Ana ma Yuta maĩ Eeli
1Chronicles2:4 Tamalĩ mũka-a-mwana wa Yuta nĩwamũsyaĩie ana elĩ
1Chronicles2:5 Ana ma Velesi maĩ Esiloni na Amuli.
1Chronicles2:6 Ana ma Nzela maĩ Nzimili
1Chronicles2:7 Akali aĩ mwana wa Kalimi. Akali nĩwatumie andũ ma Ĩsilaeli makwatwa nĩ ũndũ ũthũku
1Chronicles2:8 Mwana wa Ethani aĩ Asalia.
1Chronicles2:9 Ana ma Esiloni maĩ Yelameeli
1Chronicles2:10 Lamu aĩ ĩthe wa Aminatavu
1Chronicles2:11 Nasoni aĩ Ĩthe wa Salima
1Chronicles2:12 Mboasi aĩ ĩthe wa Oveti
1Chronicles2:13 Mwana wa Yese ũla mũkũũ aĩ Eliavu
1Chronicles2:14 wa kana aĩ Nethaneli
1Chronicles2:15 wa thanthatũ aĩ Osemu na wa mũonza aĩ Ndeviti.
1Chronicles2:16 Eĩtu-a-inyia ma ana asu ma Yese maĩ Nzeluia na Avikaili. Ana ma Nzeluia atatũ maĩ Avisai
1Chronicles2:17 Avikaili aĩ inyia wa Amasa; ĩthe wa Amasa aĩ Yetheli ũla waĩ Mũĩsumaeli.
1Chronicles2:18 Kalevu mwana wa Esiloni nĩwatwaie Asuva
1Chronicles2:19 Asuva akw'a Kalevu nĩwatwaie Evilathi; Evilathi nĩwamũsyaĩie Uulu.
1Chronicles2:20 Uulu aĩ ĩthe wa Ũli
1Chronicles2:21 Esiloni e na ũkũũ wa myaka mĩongo thanthatũ
1Chronicles2:22 Sekuvu aĩ ĩthe wa Yaili. Yaili asumbĩkĩte ndũa mĩongo ĩlĩ na itatũ kĩsionĩ kya nthĩ ya Ngileati.
1Chronicles2:23 Ĩndĩ andũ ma Ngesuli na ma Alamu nĩmavithũkĩie na moosa ndũa mĩongo thanthatũ sya kĩsio kĩu
1Chronicles2:24 Ĩtina wa kĩkw'ũ sya Esiloni
1Chronicles2:25 Ana ma Yelameeli mwana ũla mũkũũ wa Esiloni
1Chronicles2:26 Yelameeli aĩ na kĩveti kĩngĩ kyeetawa Atala. Atala nĩwe waĩ inyia wa Onamu.
1Chronicles2:27 Ana ma Lamu mwana ũla mũkũũ wa Yelameeli maĩ Maasi
1Chronicles2:28 Ana ma Onamu maĩ Samai na Yata. Ana ma Samai maĩ Natavu na Avisuli.
1Chronicles2:29 Mũka wa Avisuli eetawa Aviaili. Aviaili asyaĩie Avisuli ana elĩ; Avani na Moliti.
1Chronicles2:30 Ana ma Natavu maĩ Seleti na Avaimu. Seleti akwie ate mwana.
1Chronicles2:31 Isi mwana wa Avaimu aĩ ĩthe wa Sesani. Sesani aĩ ĩthe wa Alai.
1Chronicles2:32 Ana ma Yata mwana-a-inyia wa Samai maĩ Yetheli na Yonathani. Yetheli akwie ate mwana.
1Chronicles2:33 Ana ma Yonathani maĩ Velethi na Nzasa. Asu onthe maĩ nzyawa sya Yelameeli.
1Chronicles2:34 Sesani ndaĩ na ana aũme ĩndĩ aĩ o na eĩtu. Aĩ na mũthũkũmi kuma Misili weetawa Yalia.
1Chronicles2:35 Sesani nĩwanenganie mwĩĩtu wake atwawe nĩ mũthũkũmi wake Yalia. Mwĩĩtu ũsu nĩwasyaĩie Yalia mwana weetawa Atai.
1Chronicles2:36 Atai aĩ ĩthe wa Nathani
1Chronicles2:37 Nzavati aĩ ĩthe wa Evilali
1Chronicles2:38 Oveti aĩ ĩthe wa Yeũ
1Chronicles2:39 Asalia aĩ ĩthe wa Elesu
1Chronicles2:40 Eleasa aĩ ĩthe wa Sisamai
1Chronicles2:41 Salumu aĩ ĩthe wa Yekamia
1Chronicles2:42 Mwana ũla mũkũũ wa Kalevu mwana-a-inyia wa Yelameeli eetawa Mesa. Mesa aĩ ĩthe wa Nzivu. Nzivu aĩ ĩthe wa Malesa
1Chronicles2:43 Ana ma Eviloni maĩ Kola
1Chronicles2:44 Sema aĩ ĩthe wa Laamu
1Chronicles2:45 Samai aĩ ĩthe wa Maoni
1Chronicles2:46 Kalevu aĩ na kĩveti kyake kya ndũsyo kyeetawa Evaa. Evaa nĩwasyaĩie Kalevu ana angĩ atatũ. Ana asu maĩ Aalani
1Chronicles2:47 Ana ma Yatai maĩ
1Chronicles2:48 Kalevu aĩ na kĩveti kĩngĩ kyake kya ndũsyo kyeetawa Maaka. Maaka nĩwasyaĩie Kalevu ana elĩ; Sevelu na Tiliana.
1Chronicles2:49 Maaka o ta ũu nĩwasyaie ana angĩ elĩ; Saavu ũla wambĩlĩĩlye ndũa ya Matimana
1Chronicles2:50 Kalevu o ta ũu aĩ na nzyawa ingĩ ila wasyaĩwe nĩ Evilatha mũka wake. Uli mwana wake wa mbee aĩ na ana atatũ: Sovali mwambĩlĩĩlya wa ndũa ya Kiliathi-yealimu
1Chronicles2:51 Salima mwana wake wa kelĩ nĩwe waĩ mwambĩlĩĩlya wa ndũa ya Mbetheleemu
1Chronicles2:52 Nzyawa sya Sovali mwambĩlĩĩlya wa ndũa ya Kiliathi-yealimu syaĩ andũ ma Aloe
1Chronicles2:53 O ta ũu nzyawa isu syaĩ vamwe na mĩsyĩ ya andũ ma Kiliathi-yealimu
1Chronicles2:54 Salima mwambĩlĩĩlya wa ndũa ya Mbetheleemu nĩwe waĩ ũmae wa andũ ma Netovathi
1Chronicles2:55 Ĩĩ nĩyo mĩsyĩ ya aandĩki ala matwĩe Yavesu: Atilathi
1Chronicles3:1 Aa nĩmo ana ma Ndeviti ala masyaiwe yĩla waĩ Eviloni: Mwana wa mbee aĩ Aminoni ũla inyia wake weetawa Ainoamu na waĩ Mũyesileeli. Mwana wa kelĩ aĩ Ndanieli ũla inyia wake weetawa Avikaili na waĩ Mũkalimeli.
1Chronicles3:2 Mwana wa katatũ aĩ Avisalomu mwana wa Maaka
1Chronicles3:3 wa katano aĩ Sevatia mwana wa Avitali; wa thanthatũ aĩ Ithileamu mwana wa Ekila.
1Chronicles3:4 Ndeviti asyaĩiwe syana isu e Eviloni
1Chronicles3:5 Ndeviti nĩwasyaĩiwe ana aa e Yelũsalemu; Simea
1Chronicles3:6 Ndeviti aĩ na ana angĩ kenda namo nĩ: Iviali
1Chronicles3:7 Noka
1Chronicles3:8 Elisama
1Chronicles3:9 O vamwe na ana asu ma Ndeviti onthe
1Chronicles3:10 Ii nĩsyo nzyawa sya Solomoni: Solomoni aĩ ĩthe wa Leovoamu
1Chronicles3:11 Yeosavati aĩ ĩthe wa Yolamu
1Chronicles3:12 Yoasi aĩ ĩthe wa Amasia
1Chronicles3:13 Yothamu aĩ ĩthe wa Aasu
1Chronicles3:14 Manase aĩ ĩthe wa Amoni
1Chronicles3:15 Ana ma Yosia maĩ ana. Mwana wake wa mbee aĩ Yoanani
1Chronicles3:16 Ana ma Yeoiakimu maĩ Yekonia na Nzetekia.
1Chronicles3:17 Ii nĩsyo nzyawa sya Mũsumbĩ Yekonia
1Chronicles3:18 Malikilamu

1Chronicles3:20 O ta ũu Nzelũvaveli aĩ na ana angĩ atano: Asuva
1Chronicles3:21 Ana ma Aanania maĩ Velatia na Yesaia. Yesaia aĩ ĩthe wa Levaia

1Chronicles4:3 Aa nĩmo ana ma Etamu: Yesileeli
1Chronicles4:4 Venueli aĩ ĩthe wa Ngetoli; Eseli aĩ ĩthe wa Uusa. Isu syaĩ nzyawa sya Uulu mwana ũla mũkũũ wa Evilathi
1Chronicles4:5 Asuli ĩthe wa Tekoa aĩ na iveti ilĩ: Eela na Naala.
1Chronicles4:6 Naala asyaĩie Asuli ana aa: Ausamu
1Chronicles4:7 Ana ala Eela wasyaĩie Asuli maĩ Nzelethi
1Chronicles4:8 Akosi aĩ ĩthe wa Anuvu na Nzoveva
1Chronicles4:9 Ve mũndũ weetawa Yavesu wanengetwe ndaĩa mbee wa ana-a-ĩthe make. Inyia wake amwĩtie Yavesu nũndũ amũsyaie na thĩna.
1Chronicles4:10 Yavesu nĩwavoyie Ngai wa Ĩsilaeli ayasya atĩĩ
1Chronicles4:11 Keluvu mwana-a-inyia wa Suua nĩwe waĩ ĩthe wa Meili
1Chronicles4:12 Esitoni aĩ ĩthe wa Mbethi-lava
1Chronicles4:13 Ana ma Kenasi maĩ Othinieli na Selaia. Ana ma Othinieli maĩ Athathi na Meonothai.
1Chronicles4:14 Meonothai aĩ ĩthe wa Ovala. Selaia aĩ ĩthe wa Yoavu mwambĩlĩĩlya wa Mwanda wa Aseũvya ma Syĩndũ. Mwanda ũsu weetawa ũu nũndũ andũ onthe ala matwĩe vau maĩ na ũmanyi wa kũseũvya syĩndũ nesa.

1Chronicles4:16 Ana ma Yealeleli maĩ Nzivu
1Chronicles4:17 Ana ma Esala maĩ

1Chronicles4:19 Otia nĩwatwaie mwĩĩtu-a-inyia wa Naamu. Ana make nĩmo matw'ĩkie aaũmae ma andũ ma mũsyĩ wa Ngalimi
1Chronicles4:20 Ana ma Simonu maĩ Aminoni
1Chronicles4:21 Siela aĩ ũmwe wa ana ma Yuta. Ana make maĩ Eeli mwambĩlĩĩlya wa ndũa ya Leka
1Chronicles4:22 Yokimu na andũ ala matwĩe ndũanĩ ya Koseva; Yoasi na Salavu ala masumbĩkĩte nthĩ ya Moavi na Yasuvi-leemu (Ũvoo ũũ nĩ wa tene mũno.)

1Chronicles4:25 Sauli aĩ ĩthe wa Salumu

1Chronicles4:30 Mbethueli
1Chronicles4:31 Mbethi-malikavothi

1Chronicles5:1 Ii nĩsyo nzyawa sya Lũveni mwana ũla mũkũũ wa Yakovo. (O na vala Lũveni nĩwe waĩ mwana ũla mũkũũ
1Chronicles5:2 O na vala mbaĩ ya Yuta nĩyo yaĩ nguma mbee wa ila ingĩ
1Chronicles5:3 Ana ma Lũveni mwana ũla mũkũũ wa Yakovo maĩ Anoki
1Chronicles5:4 Yoeli aĩ na mwana weetawa Semaia. Semaia aĩ ĩthe wa Ngoki
1Chronicles5:5 Simei aĩ ĩthe wa Mika
1Chronicles5:6 nake Mbaali aĩ ĩthe wa Mbeela. Mbeela ũla wakwatiwe nĩ Tikilathi-vileseli mũsumbĩ wa Asuli amũtwaa nthĩ ya ũeninĩ
1Chronicles5:7 Aa nĩmo ana-a-ĩthe moo kũatĩĩa mĩsyĩ yoo yĩla mosyaanĩo ma nzyawa syoo matalilwe: Yeieli ũla waĩ mũnene woo
1Chronicles5:8 Mbela mwana wa Asasi
1Chronicles5:9 Maĩ na ndĩthya nene sya indo me nthĩ ya Ngileati
1Chronicles5:10 Ĩvindanĩ yĩla Saũlo wasumbĩkĩte
1Chronicles5:11 Mbaĩ ya Ngandi yatwĩe ngalĩko ya ĩũlũ ya mbaĩ ya Lũveni
1Chronicles5:12 Yoeli nĩwe waĩ mũtongoi woo
1Chronicles5:13 Andũ ala angĩ ma mbaĩ ya Ngandi maumĩte mĩsyĩnĩ ĩno mũonza; Mikaeli
1Chronicles5:14 Asu maĩ nzyawa sya Aviaili mwana wa Uuli
1Chronicles5:15 Mũtongoi wa mĩsyĩ ĩsu aĩ Aai mwana wa Avitieli na ũmae wake eetawa Nguni.
1Chronicles5:16 Andũ asu matwĩe kĩsionĩ kya nthĩ kya Mbasani na kya Ngileati. Matwĩe ndũanĩ ila syaĩ kũu
1Chronicles5:17 Andũ asu onthe matalilwe kwĩanana na mosyaanĩo moo
1Chronicles5:18 Mbaĩ ya Lũveni
1Chronicles5:19 Nĩmaendie kũkita na andũ ma mbaĩ sya Aakali
1Chronicles5:20 Aũme asu nĩmamwĩkwatisye Ngai na mamũvoya amatetheesye; Ngai nĩwasũngĩie mboya yoo na atuma masinda Aakali
1Chronicles5:21 Nĩmatavie indo syoo: Ngamĩle ngili mĩongo ĩtano
1Chronicles5:22 Nĩmooaie amaitha moo aingĩ kaũnĩ ũsu
1Chronicles5:23 Andũ ma nyusu ya mbaĩ ya Manase ma wumĩlonĩ wa syũa maĩ aingĩ. Nĩmatũie kĩsionĩ kya nthĩ ĩla yĩ kuma Mbasani kũthi kũvika Mbaali-elimoni
1Chronicles5:24 Aa nĩmo maĩ atongoi ma mĩsyĩ yoo: Eveli
1Chronicles5:25 Andũ ma nyusu ya mbaĩ ya Manase ala matwĩe wumĩlonĩ wa syũa nĩmeethĩiwe mate aĩkĩĩku kũla kwĩ Ngai wa aaũmae moo. Nĩmamũtiie na mambĩĩa kũthaitha ngai sya andũ ala Ngai walũngĩtye kuma nthĩ ĩla matwĩe.
1Chronicles5:26 Nũndũ wa ũu
