1Chronicles6:2 Ana ma Koathi maĩ Amilamu
1Chronicles6:3 Amilamu aĩ na ana elĩ: Alũni na Mwose
1Chronicles6:4 Eleasali aĩ ĩthe wa Vineasi
1Chronicles6:5 Avisua aĩ ĩthe wa Mbuki
1Chronicles6:6 Ũsisi aĩ ĩthe wa Nzelaia
1Chronicles6:7 Melaiothi aĩ ĩthe wa Amalia
1Chronicles6:8 Aituvu aĩ ĩthe wa Nzatoki
1Chronicles6:9 Aimaasi aĩ ĩthe wa Asalia
1Chronicles6:10 Yoanani aĩ ĩthe wa Asalia (Asalia nĩwe wathũkũmaa wĩa wa kĩ-ũthembi Ĩkalũnĩ yĩla Solomoni waakie Yelũsalemu.)
1Chronicles6:11 Asalia aĩ ĩthe wa Amalia
1Chronicles6:12 Aituvu aĩ ĩthe wa Nzatoki
1Chronicles6:13 Salumu aĩ ĩthe wa Ilikia
1Chronicles6:14 Asalia aĩ ĩthe wa Selaia
1Chronicles6:15 Yeosataki nĩwakwatiwe atwawa nthĩ ya ũeninĩ ĩvindanĩ yĩla Mwĩai Ngai watumie Nevukatinesa akwata andũ ma Yuta na Yelũsalemu amatwaa me ove.
1Chronicles6:16 Ana ma Livai maĩ Ngelisoni
1Chronicles6:17 Aa nĩmo masyĩtwa ma ana ma Ngelisoni: Livini na Simei.
1Chronicles6:18 Ana ma Koathi maĩ Amilamu
1Chronicles6:19 Ana ma Melali maĩ Mali na Musi. Ĩno nĩyo mĩsyĩ ya Alivai ĩandĩkĩtwe kwĩanana na aaĩthe moo:
1Chronicles6:20 Nzyawa sya Ngelisoni syailyĩ ta ũũ: Livini aĩ mwana wake
1Chronicles6:21 Yoa aĩ mwana wa Nzima nake Indo aĩ mwana wa Yoa. Nzela aĩ mwana wa Indo nake Yeathelai aĩ mwana wa Nzela.
1Chronicles6:22 Nzyawa Sya Koathi syailyĩ ta ũũ: Aminatavu aĩ mwana wake
1Chronicles6:23 nake Elikana aĩ mwana wa Asili. Eviasavu aĩ mwana wa Elikana
1Chronicles6:24 Taathi aĩ mwana wa Asili
1Chronicles6:25 Nzyawa sya Elikana syailyĩ ta ũũ: Ana make maĩ Amasai na Aimothi.
1Chronicles6:26 Mwana wa Aimothi eetawa Elikana
1Chronicles6:27 Eliavu aĩ mwana wa Naathi
1Chronicles6:28 Ana ma Samũeli maĩ Yoeli
1Chronicles6:29 Nzyawa sya Melali syailyĩ ta ũũ: Maali aĩ mwana wake
1Chronicles6:30 Simea aĩ mwana wa Usa
1Chronicles6:31 Aa nĩ andũ ala Mũsumbĩ Ndeviti wanyuvie maũngamĩe maũndũ ma wini
1Chronicles6:32 Mathũkũmaa kwa nzĩa ya kwina mbathi
1Chronicles6:33 Masyĩtwa ma andũ asu vamwe na ana moo nĩmo aa: Kuma mũsyĩnĩ wa Koathi; Emani ũla waĩ mwini mwana wa Yoeli
1Chronicles6:34 Elikana mwana wa Yeloamu
1Chronicles6:35 Toa mwana wa Nzuve
1Chronicles6:36 Amasai mwana wa Elikana
1Chronicles6:37 Nzevania mwana wa Taathi
1Chronicles6:38 Kola mwana wa Isali
1Chronicles6:39 Mũtetheesya wa Emani wa vakuvĩ eetawa Asavu. Asavu aĩ mwana wa Mbelekia
1Chronicles6:40 Simea aĩ mwana wa Mikaeli
1Chronicles6:41 Malikiya aĩ mwana wa Ethini
1Chronicles6:42 Ataia aĩ mwana wa Ethani
1Chronicles6:43 Simei aĩ mwana wa Yaathi
1Chronicles6:44 Mũtetheesya wa Emani wa katatũ eetawa Ethani kuma mũsyĩnĩ wa Melali. Ethani aĩ mwana wa Kisi
1Chronicles6:45 Maluku aĩ mwana wa Asavia
1Chronicles6:46 Ilikia aĩ mwana wa Amisi
1Chronicles6:47 Semeli aĩ mwana wa Mali
1Chronicles6:48 Alivai ala angĩ nĩmanengiwe mawĩa ala angĩ onthe matethaw'a Ĩeemanĩ Ĩtheu
1Chronicles6:49 Alũni na nzyawa syake nĩmo maumasya nthembo kĩthembeonĩ kya nthembo sya kũvĩvw'a
1Chronicles6:50 Nzyawa sya Alũni syailyĩ ta ũũ: Alũni aĩ ĩthe wa Eleasali
1Chronicles6:51 Avisua aĩ ĩthe wa Mbuki
1Chronicles6:52 Nzelaia aĩ ĩthe wa Melaiothi
1Chronicles6:53 Aituvu aĩ ĩthe wa Nzatoki
1Chronicles6:54 Ii nĩsyo isio sya nthĩ ila syanengiwe nzyawa sya Alũni. Mĩsyĩ ya Koathi
1Chronicles6:55 manengiwe ndũa ya Eviloni
1Chronicles6:56 Ĩndĩ Kalevu mwana wa Yevune nĩwanengiwe mĩũnda na motũi ma ndũa ĩsu.
1Chronicles6:57 Kwoou nzyawa sya Alũni nĩsyanengiwe ndũa ii sya wĩvitho: Eviloni na Livina na isesi syasyo sya kũĩthya
1Chronicles6:58 Ileni na Ndevili na isesi syasyo sya kũĩthya
1Chronicles6:59 Asani na Mbethi-semesi na isesi syasyo sya kũĩthya.
1Chronicles6:60 Kuma kĩsionĩ kya nthĩ ya mbaĩ ya Mbengyameni
1Chronicles6:61 Nzyawa ila ingĩ sya Koathi nĩsyanengiwe ndũa ĩkũmi
1Chronicles6:62 Nzyawa sya Ngelisoni kwĩanana na mĩsyĩ yoo
1Chronicles6:63 Nzyawa sya Melali kwĩanana na mĩsyĩ yoo
1Chronicles6:64 Kwoou andũ ma Ĩsilaeli nĩmanengie Alivai ndũa isu matũae vo na o ta ũu mamanenga isesi sya kũĩthya ila syaithyũlũlũkĩte.
1Chronicles6:65 O ta ũu andũ ma Ĩsilaeli nĩmanengie Alivai ndũa isu iwetetwe kwa masyĩtwa
1Chronicles6:66 Amwe ma mĩsyĩ ya Koathi nĩmanengiwe ndũa syoo
1Chronicles6:67 Nĩmanengiwe ndũa ya Sekemu
1Chronicles6:68 Yokimeamu
1Chronicles6:69 Aiyaloni na Ngathi-limoni. Ndũa isu syonthe syaĩ vamwe na isesi sya kũĩthya.
1Chronicles6:70 Andũ ma Ĩsilaeli nĩmanengie amwe ma mĩsyĩ ya Koathi ĩla yatialĩte
1Chronicles6:71 Andũ ma mũsyĩ wa Ngelisomu nĩmanengiwe ndũa ya Ngolani ĩla yĩ Mbasani
1Chronicles6:72 Kuma kĩsionĩ kya nthĩ ya mbaĩ ya Isakali
1Chronicles6:73 Lamothi na Anemu.
1Chronicles6:74 Kuma kĩsionĩ kya nthĩ ya mbaĩ ya Aseli
1Chronicles6:75 Ukoki na Leovu.
1Chronicles6:76 Kuma kĩsionĩ kya nthĩ ya mbaĩ ya Navutalĩ
1Chronicles6:77 Andũ ala angĩ ma mũsyĩ wa Melali nĩmanengiwe ndũa ya Limoni na Tavoli
1Chronicles6:78 Kuma kĩsionĩ kya nthĩ kya mbaĩ ya Lũveni
1Chronicles6:79 Ketemothi na Mevaathi.
1Chronicles6:80 Kuma kĩsionĩ kya nthĩ kya mbaĩ ya Ngati
1Chronicles6:81 Esivoni na Yaseli.
1Chronicles7:1 Ana ma Isakali maĩ ana: Tola
1Chronicles7:2 Ana ma Tola maĩ Ũsisi
1Chronicles7:3 Ũsisi aĩ na mwana ũmwe weetawa Ĩsilaia. Ana ma Ĩsilaia maĩ Mikaeli
1Chronicles7:4 Kwĩanana na ũtalo wa mosyaanĩo ma nyũmba syoo
1Chronicles7:5 Andũ onthe ma mĩsyĩ ya mbaĩ ya Isakali
1Chronicles7:6 Ana ma Mbengyameni maĩ atatũ: Mbela
1Chronicles7:7 Ana ma Mbela maĩ atano: Esivoni
1Chronicles7:8 Ana ma Mbekeli maĩ Nzemila
1Chronicles7:9 Ũtalo woo ũla waandĩkĩtwe kwĩanana na mosyaanĩo moo
1Chronicles7:10 Yetiaeli aĩ na mwana ũmwe
1Chronicles7:11 Ana asu onthe ma Yetiaeli maĩ atongoi ma mĩsyĩ yoo. Vaĩ asikalĩ ngũmbaũ ngili ĩkũmi na mũonza na maana elĩ
1Chronicles7:12 Ana ma Ili maĩ Suvimu na Uvimu. Usimu aĩ mwana wa Aeli.
1Chronicles7:13 Ana ma Navutalĩ maĩ Yanzieli
1Chronicles7:14 Manase nĩwasyaĩiwe ana elĩ nĩ kĩveti kyake kya ndũsyo kĩla kyaĩ Mũalamia. Ana asu maĩ Asilieli na Makili. Makili nĩwe waĩ ĩthe wa Ngileati.
1Chronicles7:15 Makili nĩwatwaĩie Uvimu na Suvimu iveti. Mwĩĩtu-a-inyia wa Makili eetawa Maaka. Mwana wa kelĩ wa Makili eetawa Nzeloveati. Syana sya Nzeloveati syaĩ eĩtu athei.
1Chronicles7:16 Maaka mũka wa Makili nĩwasyaie kavĩsĩ na aketa Velesi. Mwana-a-inyia wa Velesi eetawa Selesi. Ana ma Selesi maĩ Ulamu na Lakemu.
1Chronicles7:17 Ulamu aĩ na mwana weetawa Mbetani. Asu onthe nĩ nzyawa sya Ngileati mwana wa Makili
1Chronicles7:18 Amolekethi mwĩĩtu-a-inyia wa Ngileati aĩ na ana atatũ: Isiotu
1Chronicles7:19 Ana ma Semita maĩ Aiani
1Chronicles7:20 Ii nĩsyo nzyawa sya Evalaimu; Evalaimu aĩ ĩthe wa Suthela
1Chronicles7:21 Taathi aĩ ĩthe wa Nzavati
1Chronicles7:22 Ĩthe woo Evalaimu nĩweethĩiwe na ĩvinda ya kyeva nũndũ woo vandũ va mĩthenya mingĩ; andũ ma mũsyĩ wake nĩmookie kũmũkiakisya.
1Chronicles7:23 Evalaimu nĩwamanyanie kĩ-mwĩĩ na mũka wake na aitava na asyaa kavĩsĩ. Nĩwaketie Mbelia nũndũ mũsyĩ wake nĩwakwatĩtwe nĩ ũndũ ũsu ũthũku mũno.
1Chronicles7:24 Evalaimu aĩ na mwĩĩtu weetawa Seela. Seela nĩwe waakie ndũa ya Mbethi-oloni ya ĩũlũ
1Chronicles7:25 Evalaimu o ta ũu aĩ na mwana weetawa Levia. Levia aĩ ĩthe wa Lesevu
1Chronicles7:26 Taani aĩ ĩthe wa Latani
1Chronicles7:27 Elisama aĩ ĩthe wa Nuni
1Chronicles7:28 Kĩsio kya nthĩ kĩla moosie na matũa kyaĩ ndũa ya Mbethi-eli na motũi ala mamĩthyũlũlũkĩte
1Chronicles7:29 Mĩvakanĩ ya kĩsio kya nthĩ ya Manase kwaĩ ndũa ya Mbethi-sani
1Chronicles7:30 Ii nĩsyo nzyawa sya Aseli: Ana ma Aseli maĩ Imina
1Chronicles7:31 Ana ma Mbelia maĩ Eveli na Malikieli. Malikieli nĩwe wambĩlĩĩlye ndũa ya Mbilisaithi.
1Chronicles7:32 Ana ma Eveli maĩ Yavileti
1Chronicles7:33 Ana ma Yavileti maĩ Vasaki
1Chronicles7:34 Ana ma Someli maĩ Aai
1Chronicles7:35 Ana ma Elemu mwana-a-inyia wake maĩ Nzova
1Chronicles7:36 Ana ma Nzova maĩ Sua
1Chronicles7:37 Mbeseli
1Chronicles7:38 Ana ma Yetheli maĩ Yevune
1Chronicles7:39 Ana ma Ula maĩ Alaa
1Chronicles7:40 Asu onthe nĩmo nzyawa sya Aseli. Maĩ atongoi ma nyũmba sya aaĩthe
1Chronicles8:1 Ana ma Mbengyameni maĩ atano; ũla mũkũũ eetawa Mbela
1Chronicles8:2 wa kana Noia
1Chronicles8:3 Ana ma Mbela maĩ Atali
1Chronicles8:4 Avisua
1Chronicles8:5 Ngela
1Chronicles8:6 Andũ aa nĩmo nzyawa sya Euti
1Chronicles8:7 Naamani
1Chronicles8:8 Saalaimi amina kũlũngya iveti syake Usimu na Mbaala
1Chronicles8:9 Nĩwasyaĩiwe ana nĩ mũka wake Otesi. Ana asu maĩ Yovavu
1Chronicles8:10 Yeusi
1Chronicles8:11 Nake Usimu nĩwamũsyaĩie ana elĩ: Avituvu na Elivaali.
1Chronicles8:12 Ana ma Elivaali maĩ Eveli
1Chronicles8:13 Mbelia na Sema nĩmo maĩ atongoi ma mĩsyĩ ĩla yatwĩe ndũanĩ ya Aiyaloni
1Chronicles8:14 Ana ma Mbelia maĩ Aio
1Chronicles8:15 Nzevatia
1Chronicles8:16 Mikaeli
1Chronicles8:17 Nzevatia
1Chronicles8:18 Isimelai
1Chronicles8:19 Yakimu
1Chronicles8:20 Elienai
1Chronicles8:21 Ataia
1Chronicles8:22 Isivani
1Chronicles8:23 Avitoni
1Chronicles8:24 Aanania
1Chronicles8:25 Iveteia na Venueli
1Chronicles8:26 Samuselai
1Chronicles8:27 Yaalesia
1Chronicles8:28 Asu onthe nĩmo maĩ atongoi ma andũ ma mĩsyĩ yoo na anene moo
1Chronicles8:29 Yeieli nĩwe wambĩlĩĩlye ndũa ya Ngiveoni na atwĩe vo. Mũka wake eetawa Maaka.
1Chronicles8:30 Mwana wake ũla mũkũũ eetawa Avitoni. Ana ala angĩ make maĩ Nzuli
1Chronicles8:31 Ngetoli
1Chronicles8:32 na Mikilothi ĩthe wa Simea. O namo asu matwĩe Yelũsalemu vakuvĩ na andũ ala angĩ ma mũsyĩ woo.
1Chronicles8:33 Neli aĩ ĩthe wa Kisi
1Chronicles8:34 Yonathani aĩ ĩthe wa Meli-mbaali
1Chronicles8:35 Ana ma Mika maĩ Vithoni
1Chronicles8:36 Aasu aĩ ĩthe wa Yeoata. Ana ma Yeoata maĩ Alemethi
1Chronicles8:37 Mosa aĩ ĩthe wa Mbinea
1Chronicles8:38 Aseli aĩ na ana thanthatũ: Asilikamu
1Chronicles8:39 Ana ma Eseki mwana-a-inyia wa Aseli maĩ Ulamu
1Chronicles8:40 Ana ma Ulamu maĩ asikalĩ ngũmbaũ na matũmĩaa ũta. Ũtalo wa ana na esũkũũe ma Ulamu ma aũme
1Chronicles9:1 Andũ ma Ĩsilaeli onthe nĩmatalilwe kwĩanana na mosyaanĩo moo
1Chronicles9:2 Andũ ma mbee kũsyoka makatũe ĩngĩ nthĩ yoo na ndũanĩ syoo
1Chronicles9:3 Andũ ma mbaĩ ya Yuta
1Chronicles9:4 Uthai ũla waĩ mwana wa Amiuti
1Chronicles9:5 Kuma nzyawanĩ sya Silo vaĩ Asaia mwana ũla mũkũũ na ana make.
1Chronicles9:6 Kuma Nzyawanĩ sya Nzela vaĩ Yeueli na andũ ma mũsyĩ woo. Ũtalo wa andũ ala maĩ ma mbaĩ ya Yuta waĩ andũ maana thanthatũ na mĩongo kenda.
1Chronicles9:7 Kuma mbaĩnĩ ya Mbengyameni vaĩ Salu mwana wa Mesulamu. Mesulamu aĩ mwana wa Ondavia
1Chronicles9:8 O ta ũu vaĩ Ĩvineya mwana wa Yeloamu
1Chronicles9:9 Asu maĩ vamwe na andũ moo kwĩanana na mosyaanĩo moo
1Chronicles9:10 Athembi aa nĩmo matwĩe Yelũsalemu: Yetaia
1Chronicles9:11 na Asalia mwana wa Ilikia. Ilikia aĩ mwana wa Mesulamu
1Chronicles9:12 O ta ũu vaĩ Ataia mwana wa Yeloamu
1Chronicles9:13 Ũtalo wa athembi ala maĩ atongoi ma andũ ma mĩsyĩ yoo waĩ ngili ĩmwe
1Chronicles9:14 Alivai aa nĩmo matwĩe Yelũsalemu: Semaia mwana wa Asuvu
1Chronicles9:15 Mbakivakali
1Chronicles9:16 O ta ũu vaĩ Ovatia mwana wa Semaia
1Chronicles9:17 Asikalĩ ala masungaa mĩomo ya Ĩkalũ maĩ Salumu
1Chronicles9:18 Kũvika ĩvindanĩ yĩu
1Chronicles9:19 Salumu mwana wa Kole
1Chronicles9:20 Vau mbeenĩ Vineasi mwana wa Eleasali nĩwe wamaũngamĩĩte; Mwĩai Ngai aĩ vamwe nake.
1Chronicles9:21 Nzekalia mwana wa Meselemia nĩwe wasungaa mũvĩa wa Ĩeema ĩtheu ya kũkomanĩa na Mwĩai Ngai.
1Chronicles9:22 Andũ asu onthe manyuvĩtwe methĩwe asikalĩ ma kũsunga mĩomo na mĩvĩa
1Chronicles9:23 Andũ asu vamwe na nzyawa syoo nĩmo maendeeie kũsunga mĩvĩa ya Ĩkalũ.
1Chronicles9:24 Asikalĩ ma kũsunga mĩvĩa mekalaa ngalĩkonĩ inya: Wumĩlonĩ wa syũa
1Chronicles9:25 Andũ ma mĩsyĩ yoo ala mekalaa motũinĩ meethĩawa maĩlĩte kũka vala maĩ kũmatetheesya vandũ va mĩthenya mũonza. Nĩmaumanĩasya kwĩka ũu.
1Chronicles9:26 Atongoi ana ma asikalĩ ala masungaa mĩvĩa maĩ Alivai
1Chronicles9:27 Ũtukũ w'onthe meethĩawa vakuvĩ na Ĩkalũ
1Chronicles9:28 Alivai amwe matethasya wĩa wa kũũngamĩa syĩndũ ila syatũmĩawa ĩvindanĩ ya ũthaithi. Nĩmatalaa syĩndũ isu yĩla ikumaalw'a na yĩla iũtũngwa.
1Chronicles9:29 Alivai angĩ nĩmaũngamĩaa syĩndũ sya Ĩkalũ
1Chronicles9:30 Ana amwe ma athembi nĩmo mavulanasya mĩtĩ yĩ mũuke mũseo.
1Chronicles9:31 Ũmwe wa Alivai ũla weetawa Matithia
1Chronicles9:32 O ta ũu amwe ma nzyawa sya Kola nĩmo mauaa mĩkate ĩla yailĩĩlawa mesanĩ kĩla mũthenya wa Savato.
1Chronicles9:33 Amwe ma andũ ma mĩsyĩ ya Alivai nĩmo mainaa Ĩkalũnĩ. Atongoi ma mĩsyĩ yoo mekalaa nyũmbanĩ imwe ila syaĩ Ĩkalũnĩ
1Chronicles9:34 Andũ asu nĩmo maĩ atongoi ma mbaĩ ya Alivai kwĩanana na mosyaanĩo moo. Atongoi asu nĩmo matwĩe Yelũsalemu.
1Chronicles9:35 Yeieli nĩwe waĩ mwambĩlĩĩlya wa ndũa ya Ngiveoni. Mũka wake eetawa Maaka.
1Chronicles9:36 Mwana wake ũla mũkũũ eetawa Avitoni. Ana ala angĩ make maĩ: Nzuli
1Chronicles9:37 Ngetoli
1Chronicles9:38 Mikilothi aĩ ĩthe wa Simeamu. O namo asu matwĩe Yelũsalemu vakuvĩ na andũ ala angĩ ma mũsyĩ woo.
1Chronicles9:39 Neli aĩ ĩthe wa Kisi
1Chronicles9:40 Yonathani aĩ ĩthe wa Meli-mbaali nake Meli-mbaali aĩ ĩthe wa Mika.
1Chronicles9:41 Ana ma Mika maĩ Vithoni
1Chronicles9:42 Aasu aĩ ĩthe wa Yala. Yala aĩ ĩthe wa Alemethi
1Chronicles9:43 nake Mosa aĩ ĩthe wa Mbinea. Mbinea aĩ ĩthe wa Levaia
1Chronicles9:44 Ana ma Aseli maĩ thanthatũ: Asilikamu
1Chronicles10:1 Avilisiti nĩmokitĩie na andũ ma Ĩsilaeli Kĩĩmanĩ kya Ngilivoa. Andũ aingĩ ma Ĩsilaeli nĩmooaĩiwe vau
1Chronicles10:2 Ĩndĩ Avilisiti nĩmaatĩĩie Saũlo na ana make
1Chronicles10:3 Kaũ nĩwavyũvie mũno vakuvĩ na vala Saũlo waĩ. Yĩla amaitha make mamwonie nĩmamũathie na maangi mamũũmĩsya mũno.
1Chronicles10:4 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Saũlo weeie mwanake ũla wamũkuĩaa mĩio yake ya kaũ atĩĩ
1Chronicles10:5 Yĩla mwanake ũsu wakuĩaa Saũlo mĩio ya kaũ woonie kana Saũlo nĩwakw'a
1Chronicles10:6 Kwoou Saũlo na ana make atatũ na andũ onthe ma mũsyĩ wake nĩmakwie mũthenyanĩ ũmwe.
1Chronicles10:7 Yĩla andũ ma Ĩsilaeli ala matwĩe mwandanĩ wa Yesileeli meewie kana asikalĩ ma kaũ nĩmasembie makĩa
1Chronicles10:8 Mũthenyanĩ ũla waatĩĩe
1Chronicles10:9 Nĩmatilile mũtwe wa Saũlo
1Chronicles10:10 Nĩmaiie mĩio ya Saũlo ĩkalũnĩ yĩmwe yoo na manĩka mũtwe wake ĩkalũnĩ ya ngai yoo ĩla yĩtawa Ndakoni.
1Chronicles10:11 Yĩla andũ ma ndũa ya Yavesi ĩla yĩ Ngileati mamanyie ũndũ Avilisiti maneekanie na Saũlo
1Chronicles10:12 asikalĩ moo ala ngũmbaũ nĩmaendie na moosa mwĩĩ wa Saũlo
1Chronicles10:13 Saũlo nĩwakwie nũndũ wa kwĩthĩwa ate mũĩkĩĩku; ndaĩ mũĩkĩĩku kwa Mwĩai Ngai nũndũ nĩwaleile kũatĩĩa ũndũ Mwĩai Ngai weeaĩte.
1Chronicles10:14 Nĩwaendie kũkũlya ũtao kuma kwa andũ ala mamanyaa maũndũ kwĩsĩla mavevanĩ ma ala akw'ũ. Nĩwaleile kũkũlya ũtao kuma kwa Mwĩai Ngai. Kwoou Mwĩai Ngai nĩwamũaie na anenga Ndeviti mwana wa Yese ũsumbĩ wa Saũlo.
1Chronicles11:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ andũ ma Ĩsilaeli moombanĩie Eviloni vala Ndeviti waĩ na mamwĩa atĩĩ
1Chronicles11:2 Ĩvindanĩ ya tene
1Chronicles11:3 Kwoou atongoi onthe ma andũ ma Ĩsilaeli nĩmaendie Eviloni vala ve mũsumbĩ. Mũsumbĩ Ndeviti nĩwaseũvisye ũtianĩo namo vau Eviloni mbee wa Mwĩai Ngai. Nĩmetĩkĩisye Ndeviti mauta atw'ĩke mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli o tondũ Mwĩai Ngai wathanĩte kwĩsĩla kwa Samũeli.
1Chronicles11:4 Ndeviti na andũ onthe ma Ĩsilaeli nĩmaendie Yelũsalemu
1Chronicles11:5 Ayevusi nĩmeeie Ndeviti atĩĩ
1Chronicles11:6 Ndeviti nĩwaneenete akasya atĩĩ
1Chronicles11:7 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Ndeviti watũie ndũanĩ ĩsu yaĩ mbiĩĩe ĩkalũma
1Chronicles11:8 Ndeviti nĩwaakie ndũa ĩsu ĩngĩ
1Chronicles11:9 Ndeviti nĩwaendeeie kwĩthĩwa e na ũtonyi mbee na mbee
1Chronicles11:10 Aa nĩmo atongoi ma asikalĩ ngũmbaũ ma Ndeviti
1Chronicles11:11 Ũũ nĩw'o ũvoo wa atongoi asu ngũmbaũ ma asikalĩ ma Ndeviti: Wa mbee aĩ Yasoveamu kuma andũnĩ ma mũsyĩ wa Akimoni. Yasoveamu nĩwe waĩ mũtongoi wa “Asikalĩ Atatũ.” Nĩwokitie andũ maana atatũ aitũmĩa ĩtumo yake
1Chronicles11:12 Ũla wamũatĩĩe katĩ wa ngũmbaũ isu Itatũ aĩ Eleasali mwana wa Ndoto
1Chronicles11:13 Eleasali aĩ na Ndeviti vandũ vetawa Vasi-tamimu
1Chronicles11:14 ĩndĩ Eleasali e na Ndeviti nĩmaũngamie mũũndanĩ ũsu katĩ nĩ kana maũsiĩĩe
1Chronicles11:15 Mũthenya ũmwe atatũ katĩ wa atongoi mĩongo ĩtatũ ma asikalĩ
1Chronicles11:16 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu
1Chronicles11:17 Ndeviti nĩwakwatiwe nĩ mũng'aatũko na asya atĩĩ
1Chronicles11:18 Ala asikalĩ ngũmbaũ nĩmavithũkĩie Avilisiti
1Chronicles11:19 Ndeviti nĩwaisye atĩĩ
1Chronicles11:20 Avisai mwana-a-inyia wa Yoavu nĩwe waĩ mũtongoi wa “Asikalĩ Mĩongo Ĩtatũ.” Nĩwokitie na andũ maana atatũ aitũmĩa ĩtumo yake na amoaa onthe. Kĩu nĩkyo kyatumie ethĩwa e nguma katĩ wa ala “Asikalĩ Mĩongo Ĩtatũ.”
1Chronicles11:21 Nĩwe weesĩkĩe mũno katĩ wa ila “Ngũmbaũ Mĩongo Ĩtatũ
1Chronicles11:22 Mbenaia mwana wa Yeoiata kuma Kaviseeli aĩ mũsikalĩ ngũmbaũ
1Chronicles11:23 O ta ũu nĩwooaie mũndũ kuma nthĩ ya Misili. Mũndũ ũsu aĩ na ũasa wĩ mbee wa mita ilĩ
1Chronicles11:24 Asu nĩmo maũndũ ma ũkũmbaũ ala Mbenaia weekie. Aĩ ũmwe katĩ wa ila “Ngũmbaũ Mĩongo Ĩtatũ.”
1Chronicles11:25 Katĩ wa ngũmbaũ isu “Mĩongo Ĩtatũ” nĩweesĩkĩe
1Chronicles11:26 Asikalĩ ala angĩ ma Ndeviti maĩ nguma nĩmo aa: Asaeli mwana-a-inyia wa Yoavu
1Chronicles11:27 Samothi kuma Aloti
1Chronicles11:28 Ila mwana wa Ikesi kuma Tekoa
1Chronicles11:29 Sivekai kuma Usathi
1Chronicles11:30 Maalai kuma Netova
1Chronicles11:31 Ithai mwana wa Livai kuma Ngivea ĩla yĩ kĩsionĩ kya nthĩ ya Mbengyameni
1Chronicles11:32 Uulai kuma tũlũsĩnĩ twa Ngaasi
1Chronicles11:33 Asimavethi kuma Mbaalumu
1Chronicles11:34 Ana ma Asemu kuma Ngisoni
1Chronicles11:35 Aiamu mwana wa Sakali kuma Alali
1Chronicles11:36 Eevieli kuma Mekela
1Chronicles11:37 Esolo kuma Kalimeli
1Chronicles11:38 Yoeli mwana-a-inyia wa Nathani
1Chronicles11:39 Nzeleki Mũamimoni
1Chronicles11:40 Ila kuma Ithili
1Chronicles11:41 Ulia ũla waĩ Mũititi
1Chronicles11:42 Atina mwana wa Sinza wa mbaĩ ya Lũveni
1Chronicles11:43 Aananu mwana wa Maaka
1Chronicles11:44 Usia kuma Asitelathi
1Chronicles11:45 Yetiaeli mwana wa Simili
1Chronicles11:46 Elieli kuma Maava
1Chronicles11:47 Elieli
1Chronicles12:1 Aa nĩmo aũme ala maendie kwĩkalany'a na Ndeviti e Nzikilaki
1Chronicles12:2 Andũ asu maĩ ma mbaĩ ya Mbengyameni
1Chronicles12:3 Mũnene woo aĩ Aieseli na atetheeaw'a nĩ Yoasi. Asu elĩ maĩ ana ma Semaa kuma Ngivea. Yesieli na Veleti ana ma Asimavethi; Mbelaka na Yeũ kuma Anathothi
1Chronicles12:4 Isimaia kuma Ngiveoni ũla waĩ ũmwe katĩ wa ala “Asikalĩ Ngũmbaũ Mĩongo Ĩtatũ
1Chronicles12:5 Elusai
1Chronicles12:6 Elikana
1Chronicles12:7 na Yoela na Nzevatia ana ma Yeloamu kuma Ngetoli.
1Chronicles12:8 Andũ amwe ma mbaĩ ya Ngandi nĩmaendie vandũnĩ valũmu vala Ndeviti waĩ weũnĩ. Maĩ asikalĩ ngũmbaũ na meesĩ wĩa woo nesa. Nĩmeesĩ kũtũmĩa ngao na matumo nesa. Maĩ na mothyũ ma kũkĩwa ta ma mũnyambũ
1Chronicles12:9 Andũ asu maatĩanĩe ta ũũ kuma ũla mũnene kũvika ũla mũnini: Mũnene woo aĩ Eseli
1Chronicles12:10 wa kana Misimana
1Chronicles12:11 wa thanthatũ Atai
1Chronicles12:12 wa nyanya Yoanani
1Chronicles12:13 wa ĩkũmi Yelemia
1Chronicles12:14 Andũ asu ma mbaĩ ya Ngandi maĩ anene ma asikalĩ
1Chronicles12:15 Asu nĩmo andũ ala maingie Ũsĩ wa Yolotani mweinĩ wa mbee
1Chronicles12:16 Andũ amwe kuma mbaĩnĩ ya Mbengyameni na ya Yuta
1Chronicles12:17 Ndeviti nĩwaumaalile amathaũe na amea atĩĩ
1Chronicles12:18 Veva wa Mwĩai Ngai nĩwalikile nthĩnĩ wa Amasai
1Chronicles12:19 Amwe ma andũ ma mbaĩ ya Manase nĩmeetilile mathi ngalĩko ya Ndeviti
1Chronicles12:20 Ĩvindanĩ yĩla Ndeviti waendete Nzikilaki
1Chronicles12:21 Nĩmatetheeisye Ndeviti kũkita amaitha make
1Chronicles12:22 Kĩla ĩvinda andũ nĩmaendaa kũtetheesya Ndeviti
1Chronicles12:23 Ũũ nĩw'o ũtalo wa ikundi sya asikalĩ me na mĩio ya kaũ
1Chronicles12:24 Andũ ma mbaĩ ya Yuta ala makuĩte ngao na matumo
1Chronicles12:25 Andũ ma mbaĩ ya Simioni maĩ ngili mũonza na ĩana; maĩ asikalĩ ngũmbaũ.
1Chronicles12:26 Andũ ma mbaĩ ya Livai maĩ ngili inya na maana thanthatũ.
1Chronicles12:27 Asu maĩ vamwe na Yeoiata mũtongoi wa andũ ma mũsyĩ wa Alũni
1Chronicles12:28 O ta ũu vaĩ Nzatoki mwanake ũmwe mũsikalĩ ngũmbaũ
1Chronicles12:29 Andũ ma mbaĩ ya Mbengyameni
1Chronicles12:30 Andũ ma mbaĩ ya Evalaimu maĩ ngili mĩongo ĩlĩ na maana nyanya; maĩ asikalĩ ngũmbaũ na me nguma andũnĩ ma mĩsyĩ yoo.
1Chronicles12:31 Andũ kuma nyusu ya mbaĩ ya Manase
1Chronicles12:32 Andũ ma mbaĩ ya Isakali
1Chronicles12:33 Andũ ma mbaĩ ya Nzevuluni maĩ ngili mĩongo ĩtano. Maĩ asikalĩ mesĩ kaũ nesa na meyũmbanĩtye kũthi kaũnĩ
1Chronicles12:34 Andũ ma mbaĩ ya Navutalĩ maĩ atongoi ngili ĩmwe. Atongoi asu maĩ vamwe na andũ ngili mĩongo ĩtatũ na mũonza
1Chronicles12:35 Andũ ma mbaĩ ya Ndani maĩ ngili mĩongo ĩlĩ na nyanya na maana thanthatũ meyũmbanĩtye kũthi kaũnĩ.
1Chronicles12:36 Andũ ma mbaĩ ya Aseli maĩ ngili mĩongo ĩna mesĩ kaũ nesa na meyũmbanĩtye kũkita.
1Chronicles12:37 Kuma ngalĩko ya wumĩlonĩ wa syũa ya Ũsĩ wa Yolotani
1Chronicles12:38 Andũ asu onthe
1Chronicles12:39 Mekalile vau me na Ndeviti vandũ va mĩthenya ĩtatũ
1Chronicles12:40 O ta ũu andũ nĩmookie maumĩte kũndũ kũasa ta isionĩ sya nthĩ ya Isakali
1Chronicles13:1 Mũsumbĩ Ndeviti nĩwasũanĩie e vamwe na anene onthe ma asikalĩ
1Chronicles13:2 Nĩvo ĩndĩ waneenie na andũ onthe ma Ĩsilaeli amea atĩĩ
1Chronicles13:3 Nĩvo ĩndĩ tũũthi tũkose Ĩsandũkũ ya Ũtianĩo ya Ngai waitũ tũyĩete vala tũĩ
1Chronicles13:4 Andũ onthe ala moombanĩte vau nĩmeetĩkĩlile kwĩka ũu
1Chronicles13:5 Kwoou Ndeviti nĩwoombanisye andũ onthe ma Ĩsilaeli
1Chronicles13:6 Ndeviti e na andũ onthe ma Ĩsilaeli nĩmambatie ndũanĩ ya Mbaala
1Chronicles13:7 Nĩmaumisye Ĩsandũkũ ya Ũtianĩo nyũmba kwa Avinatavu
1Chronicles13:8 Ndeviti e na andũ onthe ma Ĩsilaeli nĩmasũngie na vinya woo w'onthe me mbee wa Mwĩai Ngai. Nĩmainaa makũnĩte mĩio ya mbathi: Ngitaa nini
1Chronicles13:9 Yĩla mavikie kĩvũĩonĩ kya Kitoni
1Chronicles13:10 Mwĩai Ngai nĩwathatiw'e mũno nĩ Usa na amũaa
1Chronicles13:11 Ndeviti nĩwathatie nũndũ Mwĩai Ngai nĩwathatiw'e mũno nĩ Usa; kwoou vandũ vau nĩveetiwe Velesi-usa. Kũvika o na ũmũnthĩ vetawa ũu.
1Chronicles13:12 Mũthenyanĩ ũsu
1Chronicles13:13 Kwoou Ndeviti ndaatwaa Ĩsandũkũ ya Ũtianĩo yĩthĩwe ũsũvĩonĩ Ndũanĩ ya Ndeviti. Vandũ va ũu
1Chronicles13:14 Ĩsandũkũ yĩu nĩyekalile vau vandũ va myei ĩtatũ. Mwĩai Ngai nĩwaathimie andũ ma mũsyĩ wa Oveti-etomu vamwe na syĩndũ syake syonthe.
1Chronicles14:1 Ilamu mũsumbĩ wa Tile nĩwatũmie andũ mathi kũla kwĩ Ndeviti makuĩte iting'ĩ sya mĩtĩ ya mĩkũũ. Nĩmaendanĩtye vamwe na aki ma nyũmba na andũ ala maseũvasya syĩndũ na mbwaũ
1Chronicles14:2 Kwoou Ndeviti nĩwamanyie kana Mwĩai Ngai nĩwatumĩte ethĩwa na ũlũmu ta mũsumbĩ wa andũ ma Ĩsilaeli
1Chronicles14:3 E Yelũsalemu
1Chronicles14:4 Ii nĩsyo syana ila wasyaĩwe e Yelũsalemu: Samua
1Chronicles14:5 Iviali
1Chronicles14:6 Noka
1Chronicles14:7 Elisama
1Chronicles14:8 Yĩla Avilisiti meewie kana Ndeviti nũnatw'ĩkĩthiw'e mũsumbĩ wa nthĩ ya Ĩsilaeli yonthe
1Chronicles14:9 Avilisiti nĩmookie malika Mwandanĩ wa Alevai na mambĩĩa kũtava mũtavo vo.
1Chronicles14:10 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Ndeviti wakũlilye Ngai atĩĩ
1Chronicles14:11 Kwoou Ndeviti nĩwaendie Mbaali-velasimu okita na Avilisiti na amasinda. Nĩwaneenie asya atĩĩ
1Chronicles14:12 Avilisiti nĩmatiie ngai syoo sya mĩvw'anano vau
1Chronicles14:13 Avilisiti nĩmavithũkĩie ĩngĩ mwanda ũsu
1Chronicles14:14 Ndeviti nĩwakũlilye Ngai ũtao ĩngĩ
1Chronicles14:15 Wamina kwĩw'a matuu ta ma andũ mesĩlĩte mĩtĩnĩ ĩsu ĩũlũ oou
1Chronicles14:16 Ndeviti nĩweekie ũndũ Ngai wamwĩaĩĩte
1Chronicles14:17 Nguma ya Ndeviti nĩyanyaĩĩkie kĩla vandũ. Mwĩai Ngai nĩwatumie andũ ma mbaĩ ila ingĩ syonthe makĩa Ndeviti.
1Chronicles15:1 Ndeviti nĩweeyakĩie nyũmba syake Ndũanĩ ya Ndeviti
1Chronicles15:2 Nĩvo ĩndĩ weeaie asya atĩĩ
1Chronicles15:3 Kwoou Ndeviti nĩweetie andũ onthe ma Ĩsilaeli mombanĩe Yelũsalemu
1Chronicles15:4 O ta ũu Ndeviti nĩwoombanisye nzyawa sya Alũni na sya Alivai vamwe.
1Chronicles15:5 Kuma Nzyawanĩ sya Koathi
1Chronicles15:6 Kuma nzyawanĩ sya Melali
1Chronicles15:7 Kuma nzyawanĩ sya Ngelisoni
1Chronicles15:8 Kuma nzyawanĩ sya Elisavani
1Chronicles15:9 Kuma nzyawanĩ sya Eviloni
1Chronicles15:10 Kuma nzyawanĩ sya Usieli
1Chronicles15:11 Ndeviti nĩweetie mũthembi Nzatoki
1Chronicles15:12 Nĩwaneenie na Alivai asu amea atĩĩ
1Chronicles15:13 Nũndũ nĩmwaleile kũyĩkua ĩvindanĩ ya mbee
1Chronicles15:14 Kwoou athembi na Alivai nĩmeetheisye
1Chronicles15:15 Alivai nĩmayĩkuie mayilĩĩle ituonĩ makwete ĩla mĩtĩ ya kũyĩkua
1Chronicles15:16 O ta ũu Ndeviti nĩweeaĩie atongoi ma Alivai manyuve amwe ma nzyawa syoo mathi mainĩte na ũtanu
1Chronicles15:17 Kwoou nĩmanyuvie andũ aa kuma andũnĩ ma mĩsyĩ ya aini: Emani mwana wa Yoeli
1Chronicles15:18 O ta ũu nĩmanyuvie Alivai aa nĩ kana methĩwe atetheesya moo ala me vakuvĩ: Nzekalia
1Chronicles15:19 Emani
1Chronicles15:20 Nzekalia
1Chronicles15:21 Matithia
1Chronicles15:22 Kenaia mũtongoi wa Alivai ala maĩ aini nĩwe waĩ mwinĩthya
1Chronicles15:23 Mbelekia na Elikana nĩmo masungaa Ĩsandũkũ ya Ũtianĩo.
1Chronicles15:24 Sevania
1Chronicles15:25 Ndeviti na atumĩa ma Ĩsilaeli vamwe na anene ma asikalĩ ngili
1Chronicles15:26 Ngai nĩwanengie Alivai vinya wa kũkua Ĩsandũkũ ya Ũtianĩo
1Chronicles15:27 Ndeviti eekĩĩte ngũa ndaasa ĩtumĩtwe na ndii nzeo ndũmu. O ta ũu Alivai ala makuĩte Ĩsandũkũ ya Ũtianĩo
1Chronicles15:28 Kwoou andũ onthe ma Ĩsilaeli nĩmaetie Ĩsandũkũ ya Ũtianĩo ya Mwĩai Ngai malonzanĩtye me na ũtanu. Nĩmavuvĩte masoo
1Chronicles15:29 Yĩla Ĩsandũkũ yĩu yaendee kũlikw'a Ndũanĩ ya Ndeviti
1Chronicles16:1 Nĩmatwaie Ĩsandũkũ ya Ũtianĩo ya Ngai mayia Ĩeemanĩ yĩla Ndeviti waseũvĩtye kwondũ wa kũyia. Nĩvo ĩndĩ maumĩisye Mwĩai Ngai nthembo sya kũvĩvw'a na nthembo sya ngwatanĩo.
1Chronicles16:2 Ndeviti amina kumya nthembo sya kũvĩvw'a na sya ngwatanĩo
1Chronicles16:3 Nĩwanengie kĩla ũmwe wa andũ ma Ĩsilaeli
1Chronicles16:4 Ndeviti nĩwanyuvie Alivai amwe matongoeasye ũthaithi mbee wa Ĩsandũkũ ya Ũtianĩo ya Mwĩai Ngai
1Chronicles16:5 Asavu nĩwanyuviwe ethĩwe mũtongoi
1Chronicles16:6 Mũthembi Mbenaia
1Chronicles16:7 Mũthenya ũsu nĩw'o waĩ wa mbee wa Ndeviti kũnenga Asavu na ana-a-ĩthe make Alivai wĩa wa kwinĩa Mwĩai Ngai wathi ũũ wa kũmũtũngĩa mũvea:
1Chronicles16:8 Tũngĩai Mwĩai Ngai mũvea
1Chronicles16:9 Inĩai Mwĩai Ngai
1Chronicles16:10 Ĩkathĩĩei ĩsyĩtwanĩ yake ĩtheu
1Chronicles16:11 Manthai Mwĩai Ngai na kũmantha ũtethyo wake
1Chronicles16:12 Lilikanai maũndũ ma kũseng'ya ala wĩkĩte
1Chronicles16:13 Inyw'ĩ nzyawa sya Ĩsilaeli
1Chronicles16:14 Nĩwe Mwĩai Ngai
1Chronicles16:15 Lilikanai ũtianĩo wake tene na tene
1Chronicles16:16 ũtianĩo ũla waseũvisye na Avalaamu
1Chronicles16:17 Nĩwaĩkĩĩthisye Yakovo wĩvĩto ũsu ta mwĩao
1Chronicles16:18 Ayasya
1Chronicles16:19 Yĩla ũtalo woo waĩ mũnini
1Chronicles16:20 Nĩmangangaa kuma nthĩ ĩmwe kũthi ĩla ĩngĩ
1Chronicles16:21 Ngai ndaaĩtĩkĩla mũndũ o na wĩva amathĩny'e; nĩwamasũvĩie kwa kũkany'a asumbĩ
1Chronicles16:22 ayasya
1Chronicles16:23 Andũ onthe ĩũlũ wa nthĩ inĩai Mwĩai Ngai; tavany'ai ĩũlũ wa ũtangĩĩo wake kĩla mũthenya.
1Chronicles16:24 Tavany'ai ũkumyo wake kwa andũ ma mbaĩ syonthe
1Chronicles16:25 Mwĩai Ngai nĩ mũnene na nĩwaĩlĩte kũtaĩwa; nĩwaĩlĩte kũnengwa ndaĩa kwĩ ngai ila ingĩ syonthe.
1Chronicles16:26 Nĩkwĩthĩwa ngai syonthe sya mbaĩ ila ingĩ no mĩvw'anano; ĩndĩ Mwĩai Ngai nĩwe woombie ĩtu.
1Chronicles16:27 Ndaĩa na ũnene nimũthyũlũlũkĩte
1Chronicles16:28 Andũ onthe ĩũlũ wa nthĩ mũtaĩei Mwĩai Ngai
1Chronicles16:29 Mũnengei ũkumyo ũla waĩlĩte ĩsyĩtwa yake; ũkai mbee wake mũkuĩte nthembo. Thaithĩai Mwĩai Ngai ũtheunĩ wake mũtisu;
1Chronicles16:30 andũ onthe ĩũlũ wa nthĩ
1Chronicles16:31 Ĩtu nĩyĩtane na nthĩ nĩyĩw'e mũyo. Tavyai andũ ĩũlũ wa nthĩ atĩĩ
1Chronicles16:32 Ũkanga nũuume na syũmbe syonthe ila syĩ nthĩnĩ waw'o; mĩũnda nĩtane na syĩndũ syonthe ila syĩ nthĩnĩ wayo!
1Chronicles16:33 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mĩtĩ ĩla yĩ kĩthekanĩ yĩina
1Chronicles16:34 Tũngĩai Mwĩai Ngai mũvea nũndũ nĩ mũseo
1Chronicles16:35 Neenai mwasye atĩĩ
1Chronicles16:36 Nĩataĩwe Mwĩai Ngai
1Chronicles16:37 Ndeviti nĩwatiie Asavu e na ana-a-ĩthe Alivai vala Ĩsandũkũ ya Ũtianĩo ya Mwĩai Ngai yaiĩtwe
1Chronicles16:38 O ta ũu nĩwatiie Oveti-etomu vo e na ana-a-ĩthe make mĩongo thanthatũ na nyanya mathũkũmae ĩmwe namo. Oveti-etomu mwana wa Yetuthuni na Osa nĩmo masungaa mĩvĩa.
1Chronicles16:39 Mũsumbĩ Ndeviti nĩwanengie mũthembi Nzatoki na athembi ala angĩ wĩa wa kũtongoesya ũthaithi wa Mwĩai Ngai vandũnĩ va kũthaithĩa Ngiveoni.
1Chronicles16:40 Kĩla mũthenya kwakya na wĩoo
1Chronicles16:41 Meethĩawa vo me na Emani na Yetuthuni
1Chronicles16:42 O ta ũu Emani e na Yetuthuni nĩmo manengetwe wĩa wa kũvuva masoo na kũkũna masaya
1Chronicles16:43 Nĩvo ĩndĩ andũ onthe menũkie kĩla mũndũ mũsyĩ kwake. Ndeviti nĩwenũkie athi kũathima andũ ma mũsyĩ wake.
1Chronicles17:1 Ĩvindanĩ yĩla Mũsumbĩ Ndeviti wekalaa nyũmbanĩ yake ya kĩ-ũsumbĩ
1Chronicles17:2 Nathani amũsũngĩa amwĩa atĩĩ
1Chronicles17:3 Ĩndĩ ũtukũ ũsu Mwĩai Ngai nĩwaneenie na Nathani amwĩa atĩĩ
1Chronicles17:4 “Enda ũkee mũthũkũmi wakwa Ndeviti nĩasya atĩĩ
1Chronicles17:5 Kuma mũthenya ũla naumisye andũ ma Ĩsilaeli nthĩ ya Misili kũvika ũmũnthĩ
1Chronicles17:6 Kũndũ kw'onthe kũla naendaa nĩ vamwe na andũ ma Ĩsilaeli
1Chronicles17:7 “Kwoou tavya mũthũkũmi wakwa Ndeviti ũmwĩe nyie Mwĩai Ngai Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe nĩmwĩa atĩĩ
1Chronicles17:8 Nĩnĩthĩĩtwe vamwe naku kũndũ kw'onthe kũla ũendaa
1Chronicles17:9 Nĩngũnyuvĩa andũ makwa ma Ĩsilaeli vandũ matũe vo
1Chronicles17:10 na ũndũ meekaa kuma ĩvindanĩ yĩla nanyuvie asili matongoesye andũ makwa ma Ĩsilaeli. O ta ũu nĩngũsinda amaitha maku onthe. Nyie Mwĩai Ngai nĩngũkwatha kana nĩngũtuma mũsyĩ waku wĩthĩwa wĩ mũlũmu.
1Chronicles17:11 Yĩla wĩkw'a na ũithikwa vala aaũmae maku mathikĩtwe
1Chronicles17:12 Ũsu nĩwe wĩmbakĩa Ĩkalũ
1Chronicles17:13 Ngeethĩwa ĩthe wake
1Chronicles17:14 Ngamũtw'ĩkĩthya mũtongoi wa andũ makwa
1Chronicles17:15 Nathani nĩwatavisye Ndeviti maũndũ onthe ala Ngai wamũvuanĩisye.
1Chronicles17:16 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Mũsumbĩ Ndeviti waendie Ĩeemanĩ ĩtheu ya kũkomanĩa na Mwĩai Ngai
1Chronicles17:17 Ũu wĩ o vo we Ngai nũvangĩte kwĩka maũndũ angĩ maingĩ; nĩwathĩte kwĩka nzyawa syakwa maũndũ maingĩ ĩvindanĩ yĩla yũkĩte. Naku we Mwĩai Ngai Mũsumbĩ nũndekete none maũndũ asu.
1Chronicles17:18 Nyie mũthũkũmi waku ndonya ũkũtavya ũndũ ũngĩ mwaũ nũndũ wa kũmbĩka maũndũ me ndaĩa? We nũmbĩsĩ nesa.
1Chronicles17:19 Ame Mwĩai Ngai
1Chronicles17:20 We Mwĩai Ngai
1Chronicles17:21 Vai andũ ma mbaĩ ĩngĩ ĩũlũ wa nthĩ mailyĩ ta andũ ma Ĩsilaeli
1Chronicles17:22 Nũtw'ĩkĩthĩtye andũ ma Ĩsilaeli methĩwe maku tene na tene
1Chronicles17:23 “Yu Mwĩai Ngai; lũlũmĩĩlya watho waku ĩũlũ wakwa nyie mũthũkũmi waku
1Chronicles17:24 nĩ kana watho ũsu wĩthĩwe wĩ mũlũmu
1Chronicles17:25 Ngai wakwa nĩ na ũkũmbaũ wa kũvoya mboya ĩno kũla ũĩ
1Chronicles17:26 Ame Mwĩai Ngai
1Chronicles17:27 Nĩũkũlya ũathime nzyawa syakwa
1Chronicles18:1 Ĩtina wa maũndũ asu
1Chronicles18:2 O ta ũu nĩwasindie Amoavi na matw'ĩka athũkũmi make
1Chronicles18:3 O ta ũu Ndeviti nĩwasindie Atateseli mũsumbĩ wa Sova ĩla yĩ Silia
1Chronicles18:4 Ndeviti nĩwakwatie makasya make ma kaũ ngili ĩmwe
1Chronicles18:5 Yĩla Asilia kuma Ndamasikũ mookie kũtetheesya Atateseli mũsumbĩ wa Sova
1Chronicles18:6 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Ndeviti waakie maeema ma kwĩkala asikalĩ kĩsionĩ kyoo Ndamasikũ
1Chronicles18:7 Ndeviti nĩwoosie ngao sya thaavu
1Chronicles18:8 O ta ũu nĩwoosie mbulonzi mbingĩ kuma ndũanĩ ya Tivathi na ya Kuni
1Chronicles18:9 Yĩla Toi mũsumbĩ wa Amathi weewie kana Ndeviti nũnasindie asikalĩ onthe ma Atateseli mũsumbĩ wa Nzova
1Chronicles18:10 nĩwatũmie Aatolamu mwana wake athi akakethye Mũsumbĩ Ndeviti
1Chronicles18:11 Mũsumbĩ Ndeviti nĩwavathie syĩndũ isu kwondũ wa Mwĩai Ngai o tondũ weekanĩte na thaavu na silĩva ũla woosete kuma nthĩ sya Aetomu
1Chronicles18:12 Avisai
1Chronicles18:13 Nĩwaakie maeema ma kwĩkala asikalĩ Etomu
1Chronicles18:14 Ndeviti nĩwasumbĩkie Ĩsilaeli yonthe
1Chronicles18:15 Yoavu ũla inyia wake weetawa Nzeluia nĩwe waũngamĩe asikalĩ ma kaũ
1Chronicles18:16 Nzatoki mwana wa Aituvu na Aimeleki mwana wa Aviathali maĩ athembi
1Chronicles18:17 Mbenaia mwana wa Yeoiata nĩwe waũngamĩe andũ meetawa Akelethi na Avelethi ala nĩmo maĩ asikalĩ ma kũsunga mũsumbĩ Ndeviti
1Chronicles19:1 Ĩtina wa maũndũ asu Naasu mũsumbĩ wa Amimoni nĩwakwie
1Chronicles19:2 Ndeviti nĩwaisye atĩĩ
1Chronicles19:3 atongoi ma Aamimoni nĩmakũlilye Anuni atĩĩ
1Chronicles19:4 Kwoou Anuni nĩwakwatie andũ asu matũmĩtwe nĩ Ndeviti amenza
1Chronicles19:5 Yĩla Ndeviti wataviw'e ĩũlũ wa ũndũ ũsu
1Chronicles19:6 Yĩla Mũsumbĩ Anuni na Amimoni mamanyie kana nĩmatw'ĩkĩte amaitha ma Ndeviti
1Chronicles19:7 Nĩmakomboie makasya ngili mĩongo ĩtatũ na ilĩ. O ta ũu nĩmakomboie mũsumbĩ wa Maaka e na asikalĩ make
1Chronicles19:8 Yĩla Ndeviti weewie ũu
1Chronicles19:9 Aamimoni nĩmaumaalile na meevanga mũvĩanĩ wa ndũa ya Laava meyũmbanĩtye kũkita
1Chronicles19:10 Yĩla Yoavu woonie kana asikalĩ nĩmevangĩte mbee na ĩtina wake
1Chronicles19:11 Nĩwanenganie asikalĩ ala angĩ make matongoew'e nĩ mwana-a-inyia Avisai nĩ kana mokite Aamimoni.
1Chronicles19:12 Yoavu nĩweeie Avisai atĩĩ
1Chronicles19:13 Ĩthĩwa na vinya
1Chronicles19:14 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yoavu na asikalĩ make mathengeeie mokite na Asilia
1Chronicles19:15 Yĩla Aamimoni moonie kana Asilia nĩmasemba makĩa
1Chronicles19:16 Yĩla Asilia moonie kana nĩmasindwa nĩ andũ ma Ĩsilaeli
1Chronicles19:17 Yĩla Ndeviti wataviw'e ũvoo ũsu
1Chronicles19:18 Ĩndĩ Asilia nĩmasembie makĩa andũ ma Ĩsilaeli
1Chronicles19:19 Yĩla asumbĩ ala mookĩte kũtetheesya Atateseli moonie kana nĩmasindwa nĩ Ĩsilaeli
1Chronicles20:1 Mwaka ũyambĩĩa
1Chronicles20:2 Ngai ya mũvw'anano ya Aamimoni ĩla yeetawa Moleki yaĩ na ngovia ya kĩ-ũsumbĩ ya thaavu yaĩ na ũito wa ta kĩlo mĩongo ĩtatũ na inya. Ngovianĩ ĩsu vaĩ ĩvia ya thooa mũnene
1Chronicles20:3 Nĩwakwatie andũ ala maĩ ndũanĩ ĩsu na amanenga wĩa wa kũthũkũma na mĩsumeno
1Chronicles20:4 Ĩtina wa maũndũ asu
1Chronicles20:5 Andũ ma Ĩsilaeli nĩmokitie ĩngĩ na Avilisiti
1Chronicles20:6 O ta ũu andũ ma Ĩsilaeli nĩmokitĩie na Avilisiti ndũanĩ ya Ngathi
1Chronicles20:7 Nĩwavũthisye andũ ma Ĩsilaeli
1Chronicles20:8 Andũ asu atatũ ala mooaiwe nĩ Ndeviti na asikalĩ make maĩ nzyawa sya andũ anene na aasa ma Ngathi.
1Chronicles21:1 Satani nĩwendaa kũtuma andũ ma Ĩsilaeli methĩwa na thĩna
1Chronicles21:2 Ndeviti nĩweeaĩie Yoavu na anene ala angĩ ma asikalĩ amea atĩĩ
1Chronicles21:3 Yoavu nĩwamũsũngĩĩie amwĩa atĩĩ
1Chronicles21:4 Ĩndĩ ndeto sya mũsumbĩ nĩsyeethĩiwe syĩ na vinya mbee wa sya Yoavu. Kwoou Yoavu nĩwaumaalile na esĩla nthĩ yonthe ya Ĩsilaeli
1Chronicles21:5 Nĩwanengie Ndeviti ũtalo wa andũ onthe ala maĩ matonya kũthi kaũnĩ: Ma Ĩsilaeli maĩ andũ milioni ũmwe na ngili ĩana yĩmwe
1Chronicles21:6 Ĩndĩ Yoavu ndaatala andũ ma mbaĩ ya Livai na ya Mbengyameni
1Chronicles21:7 Ngai ndaaendeew'a nĩ ũndũ ũsu Ndeviti weekie
1Chronicles21:8 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Ndeviti weeie Ngai atĩĩ
1Chronicles21:9 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Mwĩai Ngai waneenie na Ngati
1Chronicles21:10 “Enda ũkaneena na Ndeviti ũmwĩe
1Chronicles21:11 Kwoou Ngati nĩwaendie kũla kwĩ Ndeviti na amwĩa atĩĩ
1Chronicles21:12 myaka ĩtatũ ya yũa
1Chronicles21:13 Ndeviti nĩwasũngĩie Ngati amwĩa atĩĩ
1Chronicles21:14 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Mwĩai Ngai waeteie andũ ma Ĩsilaeli ũwau mũthũku mũno
1Chronicles21:15 Mwĩai Ngai nĩwatũmie mũlaĩka wake akanange Yelũsalemu
1Chronicles21:16 Ndeviti nĩwoonie mũlaĩka wa Mwĩai Ngai aũngamĩte katĩ wa ĩtu na nthĩ akwete ũvyũ waĩ mumye ndoonĩ
1Chronicles21:17 Ndeviti nĩweeie Ngai atĩĩ
1Chronicles21:18 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũlaĩka wa Mwĩai Ngai weeaĩie Ngati athi akee Ndeviti ambate akakĩe Mwĩai Ngai kĩthembeo kĩvũĩonĩ kya Alaũna ũla Mũyevusi.
1Chronicles21:19 Ndeviti nĩweewie ũndũ Mwĩai Ngai wamwĩaĩe
1Chronicles21:20 Alaũna aendee kũvũa nganũ e na ana make ana
1Chronicles21:21 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Ndeviti wathengeeie
1Chronicles21:22 Ndeviti nĩwaneenie nake amwĩa atĩĩ
1Chronicles21:23 Alaũna nĩweeie Ndeviti atĩĩ
1Chronicles21:24 Ĩndĩ mũsumbĩ nĩweeie Alaũna atĩĩ
1Chronicles21:25 Kwoou Ndeviti nĩwaĩvie Alaũna thaavu wa kĩlo mũonza ta w'o thooa wa kĩvũĩo kĩu.
1Chronicles21:26 Ndeviti nĩwaakĩie Mwĩai Ngai kĩthembeo vau
1Chronicles21:27 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Mwĩai Ngai weeie mũlaĩka ũsu nĩatũngĩe ũvyũ wake ndoonĩ na mũlaĩka ũsu eeka ũu.
1Chronicles21:28 Nũndũ wa maũndũ asu Ndeviti nĩwamanyie kana Mwĩai Ngai nĩwasũngĩa mboya yake
1Chronicles21:29 Ĩeema ĩtheu ya kũkomanĩa na Mwĩai Ngai yĩla Mwose waseũvĩsye weũnĩ
1Chronicles21:30 Ndeviti ndaĩ atonya kũthi vo kũthaitha Ngai
1Chronicles22:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Ndeviti waneenie asya atĩĩ
1Chronicles22:2 Ndeviti nĩweeaie aeni ala matwĩe Ĩsilaeli mombane vamwe
1Chronicles22:3 Nĩwanenganie syũma mbingĩ sya kũseũvya mĩsumaa kwondũ wa mĩomo ya mĩvĩa
1Chronicles22:4 Nĩwanenganie iting'ĩ mbingĩ sya mĩkũũ itatonya kũtalĩka
1Chronicles22:5 Ndeviti nĩwaisye atĩĩ
1Chronicles22:6 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Ndeviti watũmanie Solomoni mwana wake
1Chronicles22:7 Ndeviti nĩwamwĩie atĩĩ
1Chronicles22:8 Ĩndĩ Mwĩai Ngai anambĩie nĩnũaĩte andũ aingĩ
1Chronicles22:9 Ĩndĩ ũu wĩ o vo
1Chronicles22:10 Ũsu nĩwe ũkambakĩa Ĩkalũ. Akeethĩwa mwana wakwa
1Chronicles22:11 Ndeviti nĩwaendeeie kũneena na Solomoni amwĩa atĩĩ
1Chronicles22:12 O ta ũu nĩakũnenge ũĩ na ũmanyi
1Chronicles22:13 Weanĩsya motw'ĩo na myamũlo ĩla Mwĩai Ngai wanengie Mwose kwondũ wa Ĩsilaeli
1Chronicles22:14 Nĩnũmbanĩtye na thĩna mwingĩ syĩndũ sya kwaka Ĩkalũ ya Mwĩai Ngai: Mbee wa kĩlo milioni itatũ na ngili maana ana sya thaavu
1Chronicles22:15 Wĩna athũkũmi aingĩ: Andũ ma kwasa mavia
1Chronicles22:16 Nĩmatonya kũthũkũma na thaavu
1Chronicles22:17 Ndeviti nĩweeaĩie atongoi onthe ma Ĩsilaeli amea matetheesye Solomoni.
1Chronicles22:18 Nĩwameie atĩĩ
1Chronicles22:19 Thũkũmai Mwĩai Ngai
1Chronicles23:1 Yĩla Ndeviti waĩ na ũkũũ wa myaka mingĩ
1Chronicles23:2 Mũsumbĩ Ndeviti nĩwoombanisye vamwe atongoi onthe ma Ĩsilaeli
1Chronicles23:3 Nĩwatalile aũme onthe Alivai ala maĩ na ũkũũ wa myaka mĩongo ĩtatũ na mbee. Ũtalo woo waĩ ngili mĩongo ĩtatũ na nyanya.
1Chronicles23:4 Ndeviti nĩwamaaĩie wĩa ta ũũ: Aũme ngili mĩongo ĩlĩ na inya nĩwamanengie wĩa wa kũthũkũma Ĩkalũnĩ
1Chronicles23:5 angĩ ngili inya wĩa wa kũsunga
1Chronicles23:6 Ndeviti nĩwaanisye Alivai ikundi itatũ kwĩanana na ana ma Livai ala nĩ Ngelisoni
1Chronicles23:7 Ngelisoni aĩ na ana elĩ ala nĩ Latani na Simei.
1Chronicles23:8 Latani aĩ na ana atatũ ala nĩ Yeieli ũla mũkũũ
1Chronicles23:9 Ana atatũ ma Simei ala nĩ Selomothi
1Chronicles23:10 Ana ma Simei maĩ ana: Yaathi
1Chronicles23:11 Yaathi nĩwe waĩ wa mbee
1Chronicles23:12 Ana ma Koathi maĩ ana: Amilamu
1Chronicles23:13 Amilamu mwana wake ũla mũkũũ nĩwe waĩ ĩthe wa Alũni na Mwose. (Alũni na nzyawa syake nĩmavathĩtwe tene na tene kwondũ wa wĩa wa syĩndũ ila ntheu
1Chronicles23:14 Ana ma Mwose
1Chronicles23:15 Ana ma Mwose maĩ elĩ: Ngelisoni na Elieseli.
1Chronicles23:16 Mũtongoi wa ana ma Ngelisoni eetawa Sevueli.
1Chronicles23:17 Elieseli aĩ na mwana o ũmwe weetawa Leavia
1Chronicles23:18 Mwana wa Koathi wa kelĩ ũla weetawa Isali aĩ na mwana weetawa Selomithi. Selomothi nĩwe waĩ mũtongoi wa mũsyĩ wa Koathi.
1Chronicles23:19 Ana ma Eviloni mwana wa katatũ wa Koathi maĩ ana: Yelia ũla nĩwe waĩ mũkũũ
1Chronicles23:20 Usieli mwana wa kana wa Koathi aĩ na ana elĩ: Mika ũla waĩ mũkũũ
1Chronicles23:21 Melali aĩ na ana elĩ: Mali na Musi. Ana ma Mali maĩ Eleasali na Kisi.
1Chronicles23:22 Ĩndĩ Eleasali akwie ate ana; aĩ na eĩtu oka. Eĩtu make matwaiwe nĩ ana ma Kisi
1Chronicles23:23 Musi mwana wa kelĩ wa Melali aĩ na ana atatũ: Mali
1Chronicles23:24 Isu nĩsyo nzyawa sya Livai kwĩanana na mĩsyĩ ya aaũmae moo
1Chronicles23:25 Ndeviti nĩwaneenie asya atĩĩ
1Chronicles23:26 Kwoou vai vata ĩngĩ wa Alivai kũkua Ĩeema ĩtheu ya kũkomanĩa na Mwĩai Ngai
1Chronicles23:27 Kumana na ndeto sya mũthya sya Ndeviti
1Chronicles23:28 Wĩa wa Alivai waĩ kũtetheesya nzyawa sya Alũni wĩanĩ wa Ĩkalũ ya Mwĩai Ngai: Kũsũvĩa iwanza
1Chronicles23:29 O ta ũu nĩmaũngamĩe wĩa wa mũkate ũthembeetwe Mwĩai Ngai ũla waiawa mesanĩ
1Chronicles23:30 Nĩmaũngamaa kĩla kwakya makataĩa Mwĩai Ngai
1Chronicles23:31 mũthenyanĩ wa Savato
1Chronicles23:32 Kwoou Alivai nĩmatethasya wĩa woo kwondũ wa Ĩeema ĩtheu ya kũkomanĩa na Mwĩai Ngai
1Chronicles24:1 Ii nĩsyo ikundi sya ana ma Alũni. Ana ma Alũni maĩ ana: Natavu
1Chronicles24:2 Natavu na Aviu makwie ĩthe woo atanamba kũkw'a
1Chronicles24:3 Mũsumbĩ Ndeviti nĩwaanisye nzyawa sya Alũni ikundi kwĩanana na wĩa wasyo. Atetheeiw'e kũiaany'a nĩ Nzatoki nzyawa ya Eleasali na Aimeleki nzyawa ya Ĩthamali.
1Chronicles24:4 Nzyawa sya Eleasali syaaniw'e ikundi ĩkũmi na thanthatũ
1Chronicles24:5 Mamaanisye kwa nzĩa ya kũkũna kula vate kwendeesya
1Chronicles24:6 Mũandĩki Semaia mwana wa Nethaneli ũla waĩ Mũlivai
1Chronicles24:7 Kula ya mbee yavalũkĩle Yeoialivu

1Chronicles24:11 Kula ya kenda yavalũkĩle Yesua
1Chronicles24:12 Kula ya ĩkũmi na ĩmwe yavalũkĩle Eliasivu
1Chronicles24:13 Kula ya ĩkũmi na itatũ yavalũkĩle Uva
1Chronicles24:14 Kula ya ĩkũmi na itano yavalũkĩle Mbilika
1Chronicles24:15 Kula ya ĩkũmi na mũonza yavalũkĩle Esili
1Chronicles24:16 Kula ya ĩkũmi na kenda yavalũkĩle Vethaia
1Chronicles24:17 Kula ya mĩongo ĩlĩ na ĩmwe yavalũkĩle Yakini
1Chronicles24:18 Kula ya mĩongo ĩlĩ na itatũ yavalũkĩle Ndelaia
1Chronicles24:19 Asu nĩmo andũ ala manyuviwe kwĩanana na mawĩa ala maaĩwe kũtethya yĩla mathi Ĩkalũnĩ
1Chronicles24:20 Aa nĩmo atongoi ala angĩ ma nzyawa sya Livai: Yeteia kuma andũnĩ ma mũsyĩ wa Suvaeli nzyawa ya Amilamu;
1Chronicles24:21 Isia
1Chronicles24:22 Yaathi kuma andũnĩ ma mũsyĩ wa Selomothi
1Chronicles24:23 Yelia
1Chronicles24:24 Samili kuma andũnĩ ma mũsyĩ wa Mika
1Chronicles24:25 Nzekalia kuma andũnĩ ma mũsyĩ wa Isia mwana-a-inyia wa Mika
1Chronicles24:26 Mali na Musi kuma andũnĩ ma mũsyĩ wa Melali. Mbeno kuma andũnĩ ma mũsyĩ wa Yaasia.

1Chronicles24:29 Yelameeli mwana wa Kisi

1Chronicles25:1 Mũsumbĩ Ndeviti vamwe na atongoi ma Alivai nĩmanyuvie mĩsyĩ ĩmwe ya Alivai matongoeasye ũthaithi. Manyuvie mĩsyĩ ya Asavu
1Chronicles25:2 Ana ma Asavu me ana: Nzakuli
1Chronicles25:3 Ana thanthatũ ma Yetuthuni: Ngetalia
1Chronicles25:4 Ana ĩkũmi na ana ma Emani: Mbukia
1Chronicles25:5 Asu onthe maĩ ana ma Emani ũla waĩ mwathani wa mũsumbĩ. Ngai anengie Emani ana asu ĩkũmi na ana
1Chronicles25:6 Ana asu onthe nĩmakũnaa tũmasaya
1Chronicles25:7 Aũme asu onthe mĩongo ĩlĩ na ana nĩmeesĩ kwina mũno; Alivai ala angĩ o namo maĩ amanyĩsye kwina. Onthe maĩ aũme maana elĩ na mĩongo nyanya na nyanya.
1Chronicles25:8 Nĩmakũnaa kula nĩ kana mamanye mawĩa ala maĩlĩte kũtethya; ala akũũ na ala ma mũika
1Chronicles25:9 Kula ya mbee
1Chronicles25:10 Kula ya katatũ yavalũkĩle Nzakuli
1Chronicles25:11 Kula ya kana yavalũkĩle Isili
1Chronicles25:12 Kula ya katano yavalũkĩle Nethania
1Chronicles25:13 Kula ya thanthatũ yavalũkĩle Mbukia
1Chronicles25:14 Kula ya mũonza yavalũkĩle Yesalela
1Chronicles25:15 Kula ya nyanya yavalũkĩle Yesaia
1Chronicles25:16 Kula ya kenda yavalũkĩle Matania
1Chronicles25:17 Kula ya ĩkũmi yavalũkĩle Simei
1Chronicles25:18 Kula ya ĩkũmi na ĩmwe yavalũkĩle Asaleli
1Chronicles25:19 Kula ya ĩkũmi na ilĩ yavalũkĩle Asavia
1Chronicles25:20 Kula ya ĩkũmi na itatũ yavalũkĩle Suvaeli
1Chronicles25:21 Kula ya ĩkũmi na inya yavalũkĩle Matithia
1Chronicles25:22 Kula ya ĩkũmi na itano yavalũkĩle Yelemothi
1Chronicles25:23 Kula ya ĩkũmi na thanthatũ yavalũkĩle Aanania
1Chronicles25:24 Kula ya ĩkũmi na mũonza yavalũkĩle Yosivekasa
1Chronicles25:25 Kula ya ĩkũmi na nyanya yavalũkĩle Aanani
1Chronicles25:26 Kula ya ĩkũmi na kenda yavalũkĩle Malothi
1Chronicles25:27 Kula ya mĩongo ĩlĩ yavalũkĩle Eliatha
1Chronicles25:28 Kula ya mĩongo ĩlĩ na ĩmwe yavalũkĩle Othuli
1Chronicles25:29 Kula ya mĩongo ĩlĩ na yavalũkĩle Ngitaliti
1Chronicles25:30 Kula ya mĩongo ĩlĩ na itatũ yavalũkĩle Maasiothi
1Chronicles25:31 Kula ya mĩongo ĩlĩ na inya yavalũkĩle Lomamiti-eseli
1Chronicles26:1 Alivai ala matethasya wĩa ta asikalĩ ma kũsunga mĩvĩa ya Ĩkalũ maanĩw'e wĩa ta ũũ: Kuma mũsyĩnĩ wa Kola vaĩ Meselemia mwana wa Kole
1Chronicles26:2 Meselemia aĩ na ana mũonza
1Chronicles26:3 Elamu
1Chronicles26:4 O ta ũu vaĩ Oveti-etomu ũla waĩ na ana nyanya
1Chronicles26:5 Amieli
1Chronicles26:6 Semaia mwana ũla mũkũũ wa Oveti-etomu
1Chronicles26:7 Ana asu nĩ: Othini
1Chronicles26:8 Asu onthe maĩ nzyawa sya Oveti-etomu. Onthe vamwe na ana moo na ana-a-ĩthe moo maĩ andũ mĩongo thanthatũ na elĩ. Maĩ na ũkũmbaũ na vinya wa kũsunga mĩvĩa ya Ĩkalũ.
1Chronicles26:9 Mũsyĩnĩ wa Meselemia navo vaumĩte andũ ĩkũmi na nyanya ala maĩ na ũtonyi wa kwĩka maũndũ; asu maĩ ana make na ana-a-ĩthe make.
1Chronicles26:10 Kuma mũsyĩnĩ wa Melali vaĩ Osa
1Chronicles26:11 Ilikia
1Chronicles26:12 Asikalĩ ma kũsunga mĩvĩa ya Ĩkalũ nĩmaanĩtw'e ikundi kwĩanana na atongoi moo
1Chronicles26:13 Kĩla mũsyĩ
1Chronicles26:14 Kula ya kũsunga mũvĩa ũla wĩ wumĩlonĩ wa syũa yavalũkĩle Selemia
1Chronicles26:15 Kula ya kũsunga mũvĩa wa ngalĩko ya ĩtheo yavalũkĩle Oveti-etomu
1Chronicles26:16 Suvimu na Osa mavalũkĩlwe nĩ kula ya kũsunga mũvĩa ũla wĩ ngalĩko ya ũthũĩlonĩ wa syũa
1Chronicles26:17 Kĩla mũthenya
1Chronicles26:18 Vakuvĩ na valanda ũla waĩ ũthũĩlonĩ wa syũa
1Chronicles26:19 Isu nĩsyo ikundi sya asikalĩ ma kũsunga mĩvĩa ya Ĩkalũnĩ
1Chronicles26:20 Katĩ wa Alivai
1Chronicles26:21 Latani
1Chronicles26:22 Ana elĩ ma Yeieli
1Chronicles26:23 Nzyawa sya Amilamu
1Chronicles26:24 Sevueli
1Chronicles26:25 Kwĩsĩla vala ve Elieseli mwana-a-inyia wa Ngelisoni
1Chronicles26:26 Selomithi vamwe na andũ ma mũsyĩ wake
1Chronicles26:27 Nĩmoosie syĩndũ imwe ila matavĩte me kaũnĩ
1Chronicles26:28 Selomithi vamwe na andũ ma mũsyĩ wake nĩmo maũngamĩe syĩndũ ila syavathĩtwe nĩ mwathani Samũeli
1Chronicles26:29 Andũ kuma nzyawanĩ sya Isali
1Chronicles26:30 Andũ kuma nzyawanĩ sya Eviloni
1Chronicles26:31 Yelia nĩwe waĩ mũtongoi wa nzyawa sya Eviloni. Mwakanĩ wa mĩongo ĩna wa kũsumbĩka kwa Ndeviti
1Chronicles26:32 Mũsumbĩ Ndeviti nĩwanyuvie andũ ngili ilĩ na maana mũonza
1Chronicles27:1 Aa nĩmo masyĩtwa ma atongoi ma Ĩsilaeli; atongoi ma mĩsyĩ
1Chronicles27:2 Yasoveamu mwana wa Nzavutieli nĩwe waũngamĩe kĩkundi kya mbee kya asikalĩ ngili mĩongo ĩlĩ na inya
1Chronicles27:3 Yasoveamu aĩ nzyawa ya Velesi
1Chronicles27:4 Ndotai nzyawa ya Aoo nĩwe waũngamĩe kĩkundi kya kelĩ kya asikalĩ ngili mĩongo ĩlĩ na inya
1Chronicles27:5 Mbenaia mwana wa mũthembi Yeoiata nĩwe waũngamĩe kĩkundi kya katatũ kya asikalĩ ngili mĩongo ĩlĩ na inya
1Chronicles27:6 Ũsu nĩ Mbenaia ũla waĩ ngũmbaũ katĩ wa “Ala Mĩongo Ĩtatũ” na nĩwe wamaũngamĩe. Amisavati mwana wake nĩwe wamũatĩĩe ũtongoinĩ.
1Chronicles27:7 Asaeli mwana-a-inyia wa Yoavu nĩwe waũngamĩe kĩkundi kya kana kya asikalĩ ngili mĩongo ĩlĩ na inya
1Chronicles27:8 Samuthi ũla waĩ wa mũsyĩ wa Isali
1Chronicles27:9 Ila mwana wa Ikesi wa kuma Tekoa
1Chronicles27:10 Elesi kuma Veloni
1Chronicles27:11 Sivekai kuma Usathi
1Chronicles27:12 Avieseli kuma Anathothi
1Chronicles27:13 Maalai kuma Netova
1Chronicles27:14 Mbenaia kuma Vilathoni
1Chronicles27:15 Elitai kuma Netova
1Chronicles27:16 Aa nĩmo masyĩtwa ma atongoi ala maũngamĩe mbaĩ sya Ĩsilaeli: Mbaĩ ya Lũveni yaũngamĩwe nĩ Elieseli mwana wa Nzikili; mbaĩ ya Simioni yaũngamĩwe nĩ Sevatia mwana wa Maaka;
1Chronicles27:17 mbaĩ ya Livai yaũngamĩwe nĩ Asavia mwana wa Kemũeli; mbaĩ ya Alũni yaũngamĩwe nĩ Nzatoki;
1Chronicles27:18 mbaĩ ya Yuta yaũngamĩwe nĩ Eliu mwana-a-inyia wa Ndeviti; mbaĩ ya Isakali yaũngamĩwe nĩ Omili mwana wa Mikaeli;
1Chronicles27:19 mbaĩ ya Nzevuluni yaũngamĩwe nĩ Isimaia mwana wa Ovatia; mbaĩ ya Navutalĩ yaũngamĩwe nĩ Yelimothi mwana wa Asilieli;
1Chronicles27:20 Mbaĩ ya Evalaimu yaũngamĩwe nĩ Osea mwana wa Asaia; nyusu ĩmwe ya mbaĩ ya Manase yaũngamĩwe nĩ Yoeli mwana wa Vetaia;
1Chronicles27:21 nyusu ĩla ĩngĩ ya mbaĩ ya Manase ĩla yatwĩe Ngileati yaũngamĩwe nĩ Ito mwana wa Nzekalia; mbaĩ ya Mbengyameni yaũngamĩwe nĩ Yaasieli mwana wa Avineli;
1Chronicles27:22 mbaĩ ya Ndani yaũngamĩwe nĩ Asaleli mwana wa Yeloamu. Asu nĩmo atongoi ala maũngamĩe mbaĩ sya Ĩsilaeli.
1Chronicles27:23 Mũsumbĩ Ndeviti ndaatala andũ ala me na ũkũũ wĩ ĩtheo wa myaka mĩongo ĩlĩ
1Chronicles27:24 Yoavu
1Chronicles27:25 Aa nĩmo masyĩtwa ma andũ ala maũngamĩe syĩndũ sya kĩ-ũsumbĩ: Asimavethi mwana wa Atieli
1Chronicles27:26 Esili mwana wa Keluvu
1Chronicles27:27 Simei kuma Lama
1Chronicles27:28 Mbaali-aanani kuma Ngeteli
1Chronicles27:29 Sitilai kuma Saloni
1Chronicles27:30 Ovili wa mbaĩ ya Ĩsumaeli nĩwe waũngamĩe ndĩthya sya ngamĩle. Yeteia kuma Melonothi nĩwe waũngamĩe ndĩthya sya mang'oi.
1Chronicles27:31 Yasisi mũakali nĩwe waũngamĩe ndĩthya sya mbũi na malondu. Andũ asu onthe nĩmo maũngamĩe syĩndũ sya Mũsumbĩ Ndeviti.
1Chronicles27:32 Yonathani
1Chronicles27:33 Aithoveli aĩ mũtai wa mũsumbĩ
1Chronicles27:34 Ĩtina wa kĩkw'ũ kya Aithoveli
1Chronicles28:1 Mũsumbĩ Ndeviti nĩweetie atongoi onthe ma nthĩ ya Ĩsilaeli mombanĩe Yelũsalemu. Atongoi asu maĩ: Atongoi ma mbaĩ
1Chronicles28:2 Ndeviti nĩwaũngamie mbee woo na amea atĩĩ
1Chronicles28:3 ĩndĩ Ngai ambĩa atĩĩ
1Chronicles28:4 Mwĩai Ngai
1Chronicles28:5 Mwĩai Ngai nũnengete ana aingĩ
1Chronicles28:6 “Mwĩai Ngai nĩwambĩie
1Chronicles28:7 Ngalũlũmĩĩlya ũsumbĩ wake ĩvinda yonthe yĩla yũkĩte
1Chronicles28:8 “Kwoou yu inyw'ĩ andũ makwa
1Chronicles28:9 Ndeviti nĩwaneenie eea Solomoni
1Chronicles28:10 No nginya ũmanye kana Mwĩai Ngai nũkũnyuvĩte wake Ĩkalũ yake ĩtheu. Ĩthĩwa na vinya na ũitethya wĩa ũsu.”
1Chronicles28:11 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Ndeviti wanengie Solomoni mwana wake mĩvango yonthe ya myako ya Ĩkalũ
1Chronicles28:12 O ta ũu nĩwamũnengie mĩvango ya maũndũ onthe ala Veva weekĩĩte kĩlĩkonĩ kyake
1Chronicles28:13 O ta ũu Ndeviti nĩwanengie Solomoni mĩvango ya ũndũ athembi na Alivai maĩlĩte kũaanw'a
1Chronicles28:14 Nĩwanenganie mũvango ĩũlũ wa ũito wa thaavu na silĩva
1Chronicles28:15 Ũito wa thaavu wa kũseũvya syĩndũ sya thaavu sya kwilĩĩla taa na wa kũseũvya taa isu
1Chronicles28:16 ũito wa thaavu kwondũ wa kĩla mesa ya kwilĩĩla mĩkate ĩthembeetwe Ngai; ũito wa silĩva kwondũ wa mesa sya silĩva
1Chronicles28:17 ũito wa thaavu mũthei wa kũseũvya syĩndũ sya kũtonya nyama
1Chronicles28:18 na ũito wa thaavu mũthesye kwondũ wa kũseũvya kĩthembeo kya kũvĩvĩsya ũvani. O ta ũu nĩwamũnengie mũvango wa kũseũvya ĩkasya ya kaũ ya thaavu
1Chronicles28:19 Mũsumbĩ Ndeviti nĩwaneenie asya atĩĩ
1Chronicles28:20 O ta ũu Mũsumbĩ Ndeviti nĩwaneenie na Solomoni mwana wake amwĩa atĩĩ
1Chronicles28:21 Ikundi sya Athembi na Alivai nĩsyĩyũmbanĩtye kwondũ wa ũthũkũmi wa Ĩkalũnĩ
1Chronicles29:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Mũsumbĩ Ndeviti waneenie na wũmbano w'onthe asya atĩĩ
1Chronicles29:2 Kuma syĩndũnĩ syakwa
1Chronicles29:3 O vamwe na ũu
1Chronicles29:4 Nĩnumĩtye mbee wa kĩlo ngili ĩana sya thaavu ũla mũseo vyũ kuma Ovili
1Chronicles29:5 na kwondũ wa wĩa w'onthe ũla wĩtethw'a nĩ andũ ala me na ũmanyi wa kũseũvya syĩndũ; thaavu kwondũ wa syĩndũ sya thaavu
1Chronicles29:6 Nĩvo ĩndĩ atongoi ma mĩsyĩ
1Chronicles29:7 Nĩmaumisye mbee wa kĩlo ngili ĩana na mĩongo mũonza sya thaavu
1Chronicles29:8 Ala maĩ na mavia ma thooa mũnene
1Chronicles29:9 Andũ nĩmatanie nũndũ wa kwona ũndũ atongoi maumĩisye Mwĩai Ngai na ũlau na ngoo ya kwenda. Mũsumbĩ Ndeviti o nake nĩwatanie mũno.
1Chronicles29:10 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Mũsumbĩ Ndeviti wataĩie Mwĩai Ngai e vau mbee wa wũmbano w'onthe ayasya atĩĩ
1Chronicles29:11 Wĩ mũnene na wĩ mwene ũtonyi
1Chronicles29:12 Ũthwii na ndaĩa syumaa kwaku
1Chronicles29:13 Yu
1Chronicles29:14 “Ĩndĩ nyie nĩ ũũ
1Chronicles29:15 Ame Mwĩai Ngai
1Chronicles29:16 We Mwĩai Ngai
1Chronicles29:17 Ngai wakwa
1Chronicles29:18 Mwĩai Ngai
1Chronicles29:19 Nenga Solomoni mwana wakwa ngoo yĩ na wendo mwingĩ nĩ kana akwatae mĩao yaku
1Chronicles29:20 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Ndeviti waneenie eea wũmbano w'onthe atĩĩ
1Chronicles29:21 Mũthenyanĩ ũla waatĩĩe nĩmaumĩisye Mwĩai Ngai nthembo sya kũvĩvw'a: Nzaũ ngili ĩmwe
1Chronicles29:22 Mũthenyanĩ ũsu nĩmaĩe na manyw'a me na ũtanu mwingĩ me mbee wa Mwĩai Ngai. Kwa ĩvinda ya kelĩ nĩmaĩkĩĩthisye kana Solomoni nĩwe mũsumbĩ. Nĩmamwĩtĩkĩisye mauta ĩsyĩtwanĩ ya Mwĩai Ngai atw'ĩka mũsumbĩ woo
1Chronicles29:23 Kwoou Solomoni nĩwekalĩle kĩvĩla kya kĩ-ũsumbĩ kya Mwĩai Ngai eethĩwa mũsumbĩ ĩtina wa Ndeviti ĩthe wake. Nĩwaendeeie nesa kũsumbĩkanĩ kwake na andũ onthe ma Ĩsilaeli nĩmamwĩw'aa.
1Chronicles29:24 Atongoi onthe na ngũmbaũ syĩ vinya
1Chronicles29:25 Mwĩai Ngai nĩwatumie Solomoni ethĩwa na ndaĩa nene andũnĩ ma Ĩsilaeli onthe; nĩwatumie ethĩwa na ndaĩa nene ya kĩ-ũsumbĩ ĩtaaĩthĩwa na mũsumbĩ ũngĩ o na wĩva
1Chronicles29:26 Ndeviti mwana wa Yese nĩwasumbĩkie nthĩ ya Ĩsilaeli yonthe
1Chronicles29:27 ĩvinda ya myaka mĩongo ĩna; myaka mũonza e Eviloni na ĩvinda ya myaka mĩongo ĩtatũ na ĩtatũ e Yelũsalemu.
1Chronicles29:28 Akwie e mũkũũ mũno
1Chronicles29:29 Maũndũ ala Mũsumbĩ Ndeviti weekie ĩvindanĩ yĩla wasumbĩkĩte
1Chronicles29:30 Maũndũ asu maandĩke mawetete ũndũ Ndeviti wasumbĩkie
2Chronicles1:1 Solomoni mwana wa Ndeviti nĩwasumbĩkie nthĩ ya Ĩsilaeli elũmĩtye mũno
2Chronicles1:2 Solomoni nĩweetie andũ ma Ĩsilaeli onthe: Anene ma asikalĩ ngili na anene ma asikalĩ ĩana
2Chronicles1:3 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Solomoni waendie vandũnĩ va kũthaithĩa Mwĩai Ngai vala vaĩ Ngiveoni
2Chronicles1:4 (Ĩndĩ Ĩsandũkũ ya Ũtianĩo yaĩ Yelũsalemu
2Chronicles1:5 Kĩthembeo kya mbulonzi kĩla kyaseũvĩtw'e nĩ Mbesaleli o nakyo kyaĩ ngalĩkonĩ ya mbee ya Ĩeema ĩtheu ya kũkomanĩa na Mwĩai Ngai kũu Ngiveoni. Mbesaleli aĩ mwana wa Uli na mwĩsũkũũe wa Uulu. Mũsumbĩ Solomoni vamwe na andũ onthe ma Ĩsilaeli nĩmathaithĩie Mwĩai Ngai vo.
2Chronicles1:6 Solomoni nĩwathaithie Mwĩai Ngai e vau mbee wa Ĩeema kwa kũmũthembea nthembo ĩũlũ wa kĩthembeo kĩu kya mbulonzi; nĩwathembie ĩũlũ wakyo nthembo ngili ĩmwe sya kũvĩvw'a.
2Chronicles1:7 Ũtukũ ũsu
2Chronicles1:8 Solomoni nĩwasũngĩie Ngai amwĩa atĩĩ
2Chronicles1:9 Yu
2Chronicles1:10 Nenge ũĩ na ũmanyi
2Chronicles1:11 Ngai nĩwasũngĩie Solomoni amwĩa atĩĩ
2Chronicles1:12 kwondũ wa ũu nĩngũũnenga ũĩ na ũmanyi. O ta ũu nĩngũũnenga syĩndũ
2Chronicles1:13 Solomoni nĩwaumie Ngiveoni
2Chronicles1:14 Solomoni nĩwoombanisye makasya ma kaũ ngili ĩmwe na maana ana
2Chronicles1:15 Ĩvindanĩ ya kũsumbĩka kwake
2Chronicles1:16 Solomoni aumasya mbalasi syake nthĩ ya Misili na ya Silisia; atandĩthya make maithooaa kũu.
2Chronicles1:17 Ĩkasya yĩmwe ya kaũ yathooawa kuma Misili kwa thooa wa kĩlo mũonza sya silĩva
2Chronicles2:1 Mũsumbĩ Solomoni nĩwavangie kwaka Ĩkalũ vala Mwĩai Ngai ũkathaithĩawa
2Chronicles2:2 Solomoni nĩwoombanisye aũme ngili mĩongo mũonza ma kũkua mĩio
2Chronicles2:3 Solomoni nĩwatũmanie kũla kwĩ Ilamu mũsumbĩ wa Tile ayasya atĩĩ
2Chronicles2:4 Yu ngilĩlye kwaka Ĩkalũ vala Mwĩai Ngai
2Chronicles2:5 Nĩvangĩte kwaka Ĩkalũ ĩnene
2Chronicles2:6 Ĩndĩ o vamwe na ũu
2Chronicles2:7 Kwoou ndũmĩe mũndũ wĩ na ũmanyi wa kũseũvya mĩio ya thaavu
2Chronicles2:8 Nĩnĩsĩ kana athũkũmĩ maku nĩmesĩ mũno kũtema mĩtĩ Levanoni
2Chronicles2:9 nĩ kana mambatũĩe mbwaũ mbingĩ
2Chronicles2:10 Nganengane kĩlo milioni ilĩ sya nganũ
2Chronicles2:11 Mũsumbĩ Ilamu wa Tile nĩwaandĩkĩie Solomoni valũa amũsũngĩĩte akamwĩa atĩĩ
2Chronicles2:12 Mwĩai Ngai
2Chronicles2:13 Yu nĩngũtũma mũndũ mũĩ na wĩ na ũmanyi mwingĩ wa kũseũvya syĩndũ
2Chronicles2:14 Nyinyia wake aĩ wa mbaĩ ya Ndani
2Chronicles2:15 Kwoou yu nengane nganũ
2Chronicles2:16 Nĩtũũtema iting'ĩ syonthe Levanoni ila wĩ na vata nasyo; nĩtũũsyovany'a vamwe na tũyĩete ithambalele ũkanganĩ nginya Yova. Kuma vau ũkaitwaa Yelũsalemu.”
2Chronicles2:17 Mũsumbĩ Solomoni nĩwatalile aeni onthe ala mekalaa Ĩsilaeli
2Chronicles2:18 Katĩ wa asu
2Chronicles3:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Solomoni wambĩlĩĩlye kwaka Ĩkalũ ya Mwĩai Ngai Yelũsalemu
2Chronicles3:2 Mũsumbĩ Solomoni ambĩlĩĩlye kwaka Ĩkalũ yĩu mũthenyanĩ wa kelĩ
2Chronicles3:3 Ĩkalũ yĩla Mũsumbĩ Solomoni waakie yaĩ na ũasa wa mita mĩongo ĩlĩ na mũonza
2Chronicles3:4 Valanda ũla waĩ mbee wa vala valikĩlawa Ĩkalũnĩ waĩ na ũasa wa mita kenda ta ũthanthau wa Ĩkalũ
2Chronicles3:5 Aseũvisye vala valikĩlawa Ĩkalũnĩ na mbwaũ sya mĩtalakwe
2Chronicles3:6 Mũsumbĩ nĩwaanakavisye Ĩkalũ na mavia manake ma thooa mũnene
2Chronicles3:7 Nĩwoombĩĩie thaavu ũsu mokũtanĩ ma Ĩkalũ
2Chronicles3:8 Nĩwaakie Vandũ vala Vatheu Mũno; ũasa wa vo waĩ mita kenda na ũthanthau wa mita kenda ũndũ ũmwe na ũthanthau wa Ĩkalũ. Ngũta sya Vandũ vala Vatheu Mũno syoombĩĩiwe thaavu mũseo mũno wa kĩlo ngili mĩongo ĩlĩ.
2Chronicles3:9 Mĩsumaa ĩla Solomoni watũmĩie kwaka Vandũ vau Vatheu Mũno
2Chronicles3:10 Mũsumbĩ Solomoni nĩwaseũvisye mavisa elĩ ma mũtĩ ma syũmbe syĩ nthwau syĩtawa akelũvi
2Chronicles3:11 Kĩla kĩmwe kya syũmbe isu kyaĩ na nthwau ilĩ syĩ na ũasa wa mita inya na nyusu
2Chronicles3:12 O ta ũu ũthwau ũmwe wa kyũmbe kĩla kya kelĩ
2Chronicles3:13 Ũasa w'onthe wa nthwau sya syũmbe isu waĩ mita kenda. Syũmbe isu syaũngyĩ isyaĩtye vala valikĩlawa Ĩkalũnĩ.
2Chronicles3:14 Solomoni nĩwaseũvisye suka wa kĩtambaa kya ndii nzeo ndũmu sya langi wa mbuluu
2Chronicles3:15 Mũsumbĩ Solomoni nĩwaseũvisye ituĩ ilĩ ngalĩkonĩ ya mbee ya Ĩkalũ. Kĩla kĩmwe kyaĩ na ũtũlu wa mita ĩkũmi na itano na nyusu
2Chronicles3:16 Mĩthya ya ituĩ isu yaanakavĩtw'e na nyololo ivĩlanganĩtw'e. O ta ũu nĩwaseũvisye mavisa ĩana ma matunda ma makũngũmanga na amakwatĩlĩĩlya nyololonĩ isu.
2Chronicles3:17 Aakie ituĩ isu syelĩ ngalĩkonĩ ya mbee ya Ĩkalũ
2Chronicles4:1 Mũsumbĩ Solomoni nĩwaseũvisye kĩthembeo kya mbulonzi kyaĩ na ũasa wa mita kenda
2Chronicles4:2 Ĩtina wa ũu nĩwaseũvisye ĩtangi ya kĩthyũlũlũ ya mbulonzi
2Chronicles4:3 Ĩtheo wa ũtiivo w'onthe wa ĩtangi yĩu kũyĩthyũlũlũka
2Chronicles4:4 Ĩtangi yĩu yailĩĩlĩtwe mĩongonĩ ya nzaũ ĩkũmi na ilĩ sya mbulonzi; nzaũ itatũ isyaĩtye ngalĩkonĩ ya ĩũlũ
2Chronicles4:5 Kĩemo kya ĩtangi yĩu kyaĩ sendimita mũonza na nyusu. Ũtiivo wayo wailyĩ ta ũtiivo wa kĩkombe
2Chronicles4:6 Ĩtina wa ũu nĩwaseũvisye tũlaĩ ĩkũmi
2Chronicles4:7 Solomoni nĩwaseũvisye syĩndũ ĩkũmi sya thaavu sya kwilĩĩla taa
2Chronicles4:8 O ta ũu nĩwaseũvisye mesa ĩkũmi
2Chronicles4:9 Solomoni nĩwaseũvisye kĩwanza kya nthĩnĩ kwondũ wa athembi
2Chronicles4:10 Nĩwaiie yĩla ĩtangi konanĩ ya Ĩkalũ ĩla yĩ ngalĩko ya wumĩlonĩ wa syũa kwelekela ngalĩko ya ĩtheo.
2Chronicles4:11 O ta ũu Ulamu nĩwaseũvisye mbisũ
2Chronicles4:12 Ituĩ ilĩ; ngovia ilĩ iilyĩ ta mbakũli
2Chronicles4:13 makũngũmanga maana ana ma mbulonzi
2Chronicles4:14 makasya ĩkũmi vamwe na tũlaĩ twamo ĩkũmi
2Chronicles4:15 ĩtangi na nzaũ ĩkũmi na ilĩ sya kũyĩtw'ĩĩka
2Chronicles4:16 mbisũ
2Chronicles4:17 Mũsumbĩ Solomoni nĩweeaĩte syĩndũ isu ikaseũvĩw'e vandũ vaĩ yũmba ya kũseũvya syĩndũ katĩkatĩ wa Sukothi na Nzalethani
2Chronicles4:18 Solomoni nĩwaseũvisye syĩndũ mbingĩ mũno
2Chronicles4:19 O ta ũu Mũsumbĩ Solomoni nĩwaseũvisye syĩndũ sya thaavu sya kwĩkĩa Ĩkalũnĩ ya Mwĩai Ngai. Syĩndũ isu syaĩ: Kĩthembeo na mesa sya kwilĩĩla mĩkate ĩthembewe Ngai
2Chronicles4:20 syĩndũ sya kwilĩĩla taa
2Chronicles4:21 mawanake ma malaa
2Chronicles4:22 syĩndũ sya kũvosya taa
2Chronicles5:1 Mũsumbĩ Solomoni amina wĩa w'onthe wa kwaka Ĩkalũ na kũseũvya syĩndũ syayo
2Chronicles5:2 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Mũsumbĩ Solomoni weetie atongoi onthe ma mbaĩ na mĩsyĩ ya Ĩsilaeli mombanĩe Yelũsalemu
2Chronicles5:3 Andũ asu onthe nĩmoombanĩie kwa Mũsumbĩ Solomoni ĩvindanĩ ya Mboka ya Tũsũmba twa Matũ
2Chronicles5:4 Atongoi asu onthe mamina kũmbana
2Chronicles5:5 na mayĩtwaa Ĩkalũnĩ. O ta ũu athembi na Alivai nĩmakuie Ĩeema ĩtheu ya kũkomanĩa na Mwĩai Ngai
2Chronicles5:6 Mũsumbĩ Solomoni
2Chronicles5:7 Nĩvo ĩndĩ athembi maetie Ĩsandũkũ ya Ũtianĩo ya Mwĩai Ngai na mayia vala yaaĩlĩte kwiwa
2Chronicles5:8 Syũmbe isu ilĩ syatambũũkĩtye nthwau ĩũlũ wa vala vandũ va kwia Ĩsandũkũ ya Ũtianĩo
2Chronicles5:9 Mĩtĩ ĩsu ya kũkua Ĩsandũkũ ya Ũtianĩo yaĩ mĩasa mũno
2Chronicles5:10 Vayaĩ kĩndũ nthĩnĩ wa Ĩsandũkũ yĩu
2Chronicles5:11 Nĩvo ĩndĩ athembi maumaalile kuma Vandũnĩ vala Vatheu. Athembi onthe ala maĩ vau
2Chronicles5:12 Alivai onthe ala maĩ aini
2Chronicles5:13 Avuvi ma masoo na aini mainie na mawasya maendanĩtye ĩmwe ta mekwina na wasya ũmwe. Mainaa maitaĩa na kũtũngĩa Mwĩai Ngai mũvea
2Chronicles5:14 weethĩa athembi maitonya kũtethya wĩa woo nũndũ wa mũumbĩ ũsu
2Chronicles6:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Solomoni wavoyie asya atĩĩ
2Chronicles6:2 Nĩngwakĩĩte Ĩkalũ yĩ ndaĩa
2Chronicles6:3 Andũ ma Ĩsilaeli onthe maũngamĩte vau
2Chronicles6:4 Nĩwaneenie asya atĩĩ
2Chronicles6:5 ‘Kuma yĩla naumisye andũ makwa nthĩ ya Misili
2Chronicles6:6 Ĩndĩ yu nĩnĩnyuvĩte Yelũsalemu vethĩwe vandũ vala ngathaithĩawa
2Chronicles6:7 Solomoni nĩwaendeeie kũneena asya atĩĩ
2Chronicles6:8 Ĩndĩ Mwĩai Ngai nĩwaneenie na Ndeviti ĩthe wakwa amwĩa
2Chronicles6:9 Ĩndĩ we ndwĩmbakĩa Ĩkalũ yĩu; mwana waku ũla we wĩsyaa
2Chronicles6:10 “Yu Mwĩai Ngai nũminĩte kwĩanĩsya ũndũ wathanie; nĩnĩtw'ĩkĩte mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli ĩtina wa ĩthe wakwa
2Chronicles6:11 Nthĩnĩ wa Ĩkalũ yĩĩ nĩniĩte yĩla Ĩsandũkũ ya Ũtianĩo
2Chronicles6:12 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Solomoni e mbee wa andũ onthe ma Ĩsilaeli
2Chronicles6:13 (Solomoni aĩ anaseũvya kĩtaa kya kyũma kĩtawa mbulonzi na akakia kĩla kĩwanzanĩ kya nza katĩ. Kĩtaa kĩu kyaĩ na ũasa wĩanene na ũthanthau wakyo; mita ilĩ na sendimita mĩongo ĩlĩ
2Chronicles6:14 Nĩwavoyie asya atĩĩ
2Chronicles6:15 Nĩwĩanĩĩtye kĩla wathie mũthũkũmi waku Ndeviti ĩthe wakwa; nĩwaneenie wathana
2Chronicles6:16 Yu ĩndĩ
2Chronicles6:17 Kwoou yu
2Chronicles6:18 “Ĩndĩ nĩkũlya
2Chronicles6:19 O vamwe na ũu
2Chronicles6:20 Sũvĩaa Ĩkalũ yĩĩ ũtukũ na mũthenya. Vandũ vaa vala waisye kana ũkathaithĩawa vo. Mbĩw'ae yĩla nyie mũthũkũmi waku ngũvoya nelekelye ũthyũ wakwa Ĩkalũnĩ yĩĩ.
2Chronicles6:21 Ĩw'aa mboya syakwa na sya andũ maku ma Ĩsilaeli
2Chronicles6:22 “Mũndũ avĩtĩsya mũtũi wake
2Chronicles6:23 ame Mwĩai Ngai
2Chronicles6:24 “Ethĩwa andũ maku ma Ĩsilaeli nĩmasindwa nĩ amaitha moo nũndũ nĩmakũvĩtĩsye
2Chronicles6:25 ĩthukĩĩasye wĩ ĩtunĩ
2Chronicles6:26 “Yĩla walea kusya mbua nũndũ andũ maku nĩmakũvĩtĩsye
2Chronicles6:27 ĩthukĩĩasye wĩ ĩtunĩ na ũiekea naĩ ya athũkũmi maku
2Chronicles6:28 “Yĩla kwooka yũa
2Chronicles6:29 na yĩla mũndũ o na wĩva wa andũ maku Ĩsilaeli wavoya kana eesũvana
2Chronicles6:30 ĩthukĩĩasye wĩ mũsyĩnĩ kwaku ĩtunĩ. Ekea na ũyĩkana na kĩla mũndũ kwĩanana na meko make onthe
2Chronicles6:31 Ĩkana na andũ maku ũu
2Chronicles6:32 “O ta ũu ethĩwa mũndũ wa nthĩ ĩngĩ
2Chronicles6:33 ĩthukĩĩasye mboya yake wĩ mũsyĩnĩ kwaku ĩtunĩ. Ĩanĩsya maũndũ onthe ala mũndũ ũsu wa nthĩ ĩngĩ wakũvoya
2Chronicles6:34 “Yĩla weeaĩa andũ maku mathi kaũnĩ makokite na amaitha moo
2Chronicles6:35 ĩthukĩĩasye mboya na kwĩsũvana kwoo wĩ mũsyĩnĩ kwaku ĩtunĩ
2Chronicles6:36 “Yĩla andũ maku maũvĩtĩsya (Nũndũ vai mũndũ ũtavĩtasya)
2Chronicles6:37 me nthĩ ĩsu matwaĩtwe me ove
2Chronicles6:38 ethĩwa makeelila na ngoo na thayũ woo w'onthe
2Chronicles6:39 ĩthukĩĩasye mboya na kwĩsũvana kwoo wĩ mũsyĩnĩ kwaku ĩtunĩ
2Chronicles6:40 “Yu
2Chronicles6:41 Yu ũkĩla
2Chronicles6:42 Ame Mwĩai Ngai
2Chronicles7:1 Mũsumbĩ Solomoni amina kũvoya
2Chronicles7:2 Athembi mayaatonya kũlika vau Ĩkalũnĩ
2Chronicles7:3 Yĩla andũ ma Ĩsilaeli moonie mwaki ũsu watheea kuma ĩtunĩ
2Chronicles7:4 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Mũsumbĩ Solomoni vamwe na andũ ala angĩ onthe mathembeie Mwĩai Ngai nthembo.
2Chronicles7:5 Solomoni nĩwathembie ng'ombe ngili mĩongo ĩlĩ na ilĩ
2Chronicles7:6 Athembi nĩmaũngamie kũndũnĩ kũla mavangĩĩwe kũũngama
2Chronicles7:7 Mũthenya o ũsu
2Chronicles7:8 Kwoou Solomoni na andũ onthe ma Ĩsilaeli
2Chronicles7:9 Mũthenyanĩ wa nyanya
2Chronicles7:10 Mũthenyanĩ wa mĩongo ĩlĩ na itatũ wa mwei wa mũonza
2Chronicles7:11 Mũsumbĩ Solomoni amina kwaka Ĩkalũ ya Mwĩai Ngai na nyũmba ya kĩ-ũsumbĩ
2Chronicles7:12 Mwĩai Ngai nĩwamumĩlĩĩle ũtukũ na amwĩa atĩĩ
2Chronicles7:13 Yĩla nalea kusya mbua
2Chronicles7:14 ethĩwa andũ makwa
2Chronicles7:15 Ngasyaĩĩasya Ĩkalũ yĩĩ na ngĩthukĩĩasya mboya syonthe ila syĩvoyeawa vo.
2Chronicles7:16 Nĩnĩnyuvĩte na nĩnĩvathĩte Ĩkalũ yĩĩ
2Chronicles7:17 Ethĩwa ũkambĩw'aa o ũndũ Ndeviti ĩthe waku weekaa
2Chronicles7:18 ngalũlũmĩĩlya kĩvĩla kyaku kya kĩ-ũsumbĩ
2Chronicles7:19 Ĩndĩ ethĩwa we na andũ maku mũkaeka kũngatĩĩa
2Chronicles7:20 nĩvo ĩndĩ nĩmũvetanga inyw'ĩ kuma nthĩ yakwa
2Chronicles7:21 “O na vala yu Ĩkalũ yĩĩ nĩ ĩnene na yanake
2Chronicles7:22 Nĩvo ĩndĩ andũ mesũngĩaa na kwasya atĩĩ
2Chronicles8:1 Ĩtina wa myaka mĩongo ĩlĩ
2Chronicles8:2 nĩwaakie ĩngĩ ndũa ila Ilamu wamũnengete
2Chronicles8:3 Solomoni nĩwavithũkĩie na akwata kĩsio kya nthĩ ya Amathi na ya Sova.
2Chronicles8:4 Nĩwaakie ndũa ya Tandimoli weũnĩ
2Chronicles8:5 O ta ũu nĩwaakie ndũa ya Mbethi-oloni ĩla yĩ ĩũlũ
2Chronicles8:6 Nĩwaakie ndũa ya Mbaalathi na ndũa syake syonthe sya kwia syĩndũ
2Chronicles8:7 Andũ ala angĩ onthe matialĩte nthĩ ya Ĩsilaeli
2Chronicles8:8 ala nzyawa syoo andũ ma Ĩsilaeli mataaĩthĩwa matonya kũimina vyũ
2Chronicles8:9 Solomoni ndaatw'ĩkĩthya mũndũ o na wĩva wa Ĩsilaeli ngombo; nĩmo watw'ĩkĩthisye asikalĩ make ma kaũ
2Chronicles8:10 Anene onthe ala maĩ ũsumbĩnĩ wa Solomoni
2Chronicles8:11 Mũsumbĩ Solomoni nĩwathamisye mũka wake
2Chronicles8:12 Mũsumbĩ Solomoni nĩwathembeie Mwĩai Ngai nthembo sya kũvĩvw'a ĩũlũ wa kĩthembeo kĩla waakĩte mbee wa valanda wa Ĩkalũ.
2Chronicles8:13 Eekie ũu kwĩanana na motw'ĩo onthe ala Mwose weeaĩte maatĩĩawe mavindanĩ ma kũthemba nthembo ila syathembawa mĩthenyanĩ ya Savato
2Chronicles8:14 Solomoni aatĩĩe motw'ĩo ma Ndeviti ĩthe wake
2Chronicles8:15 Nĩmaatĩĩie motw'ĩo onthe ala Mũsumbĩ Ndeviti weeaĩie athembi na Alivai ĩũlũ wa ũndũ o na wĩva
2Chronicles8:16 Kwoou wĩa w'onthe wa Solomoni nĩwaminie kũtethw'a
2Chronicles8:17 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Solomoni waendie Esioni-ngeveli na Elathi
2Chronicles8:18 Mũsumbĩ Ilamu nĩwatũmanie meli itwaĩwe Solomoni iũngamĩwe nĩ athũkũmi make mwene
2Chronicles9:1 Yĩla mũsumbĩ mũndũ mũka wa Sieva weewie nguma ya Solomoni
2Chronicles9:2 Solomoni nĩwasũngĩie makũlyo ma mũsumbĩ ũsu onthe; ndaaemwa nĩ kũelesya mũndũ mũka ũsu ũndũ o na wĩva.
2Chronicles9:3 Yĩla mũsumbĩ ũsu mũndũ mũka wa Sieva weewie ũndũ Solomoni ũĩvĩte
2Chronicles9:4 na yĩla woonie lĩu ũla waĩsawa mesanĩ yake
2Chronicles9:5 Mũsumbĩ ũsu mũndũ mũka nĩwaneenie na Solomoni amwĩa atĩĩ
2Chronicles9:6 Ĩndĩ ndyaaĩkĩĩa maũndũ ũsu nataviw'e
2Chronicles9:7 Andũ maku me vaati mũno! Athũkũmi maku ala mekalaa naku kĩla ĩvinda na me na mwanya wa kwĩw'a ndeto syaku sya ũĩ
2Chronicles9:8 Ataĩwe Mwĩai Ngai
2Chronicles9:9 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũsumbĩ ũsu mũndũ mũka wanengie Solomoni mũthĩnzĩo wa thaavu wa kĩlo mbee wa ngili inya
2Chronicles9:10 (Athũkũmi ma Ilamu na athũkũmi ma Solomoni ala maetae thaavu kuma Ovili o ta ũu nĩmaetae mĩtĩ ya mĩsandali na mavia ma thooa mũnene.
2Chronicles9:11 Solomoni atũmĩie mĩtĩ ĩsu kũseũvya ngasi kwondũ wa Ĩkalũ ya Mwĩai Ngai
2Chronicles9:12 Mũsumbĩ Solomoni nĩwanengie mũsumbĩ ũsu mũndũ mũka wa Sieva syĩndũ syonthe ila wendeeiw'e nĩsyo na amwĩtya. Solomoni anengie mũsumbĩ ũsu mũndũ mũka syĩndũ mbingĩ mbee wa ila mũsumbĩ ũsu mũndũ mũka wamũeteete. Ĩtina wa ũu mũsumbĩ ũsu mũndũ mũka vamwe na anini make nĩmasyokie nthĩ yoo.
2Chronicles9:13 Kĩla mwaka Solomoni nĩwaeteawe kĩlo ta ngili mĩongo ĩlĩ na itatũ sya thaavu.
2Chronicles9:14 Thaavu ũsu ndweethĩawa ũtalanĩlw'e na koti wa thaavu na silĩva
2Chronicles9:15 Solomoni nĩwaseũvisye ngao nene maana elĩ sya thaavu mũtumbatumbe; kĩla ĩmwe yaseũvĩtw'e na thaavu wa kĩlo ta mũonza.
2Chronicles9:16 O ta ũu nĩwaseũvisye ngao ingĩ nini maana atatũ sya thaavu mũtumbatumbe; kĩla ĩmwe yaseũvĩtw'e na thaavu wa kĩlo ta itatũ. Nĩwaiie ngao isu syonthe Nyũmbanĩ ya Mũtitũ wa Levanoni.
2Chronicles9:17 O ta ũu Mũsumbĩ Solomoni nĩwaseũvisye kĩvĩla kĩnene kya kĩ-ũsumbĩ aitũmĩa maeo ma nzou
2Chronicles9:18 Kĩvĩla kĩu kyaĩ na ngasi ya kwambata vala kĩĩ yaĩ na matambya thanthatũ
2Chronicles9:19 Ngasinĩ ĩsu vaĩ mavisa ĩkũmi na elĩ ma mĩnyambũ ĩũngamĩte. Mũnyambũ ũmwe ũũngamĩte mũthyanĩ wa ĩtambya yĩmwe ya ngasi ĩsu
2Chronicles9:20 Mĩio yonthe ya Solomoni ya kũnyw'ĩĩa syĩndũ yaseũvĩtw'e na thaavu
2Chronicles9:21 Solomoni aĩ na meli mbingĩ ila syaendaa nginya Talisisi
2Chronicles9:22 Mũsumbĩ Solomoni aĩ na ũthwii na ũĩ mwingĩ mbee wa asumbĩ onthe ĩũlũ wa nthĩ.
2Chronicles9:23 Asumbĩ onthe ĩũlũ wa nthĩ nĩmamanthaa ũndũ matonya kũvika vala ve Solomoni
2Chronicles9:24 Kĩla ũmwe wa asumbĩ asu nĩwaeteae Solomoni mĩthĩnzĩo ya syĩndũ iseũvĩtw'e na silĩva na thaavu
2Chronicles9:25 Mũsumbĩ Solomoni aĩ na itũũ ngili inya sya kũvingĩa mbalasi sya kũkusya makasya ma kaũ
2Chronicles9:26 Solomoni asumbĩkĩte asumbĩ onthe kuma Ũsĩnĩ wa Euvalati nginya nthĩ ya Avilisiti
2Chronicles9:27 Ĩvindanĩ ya kũsumbĩka kwake
2Chronicles9:28 Solomoni aumasya mbalasi syake nthĩ ya Misili na kuma nthĩ ila ingĩ syonthe.
2Chronicles9:29 Maũndũ ala angĩ Solomoni weekie yĩla wasumbĩkĩte
2Chronicles9:30 Solomoni asumbĩkie nthĩ ya Ĩsilaeli yonthe vandũ va myaka mĩongo ĩna e Yelũsalemu.
2Chronicles9:31 Ĩtina wa ũu nĩwakwie na athikwa Ndũanĩ ya Ndeviti ĩthe wake. Leovoamu mwana wake nĩwatw'ĩkie mũsumbĩ ĩtina wake.
2Chronicles10:1 Leovoamu nĩwaendie Sekemu vala andũ ma Ĩsilaeli onthe moombanĩte mamũtw'ĩkĩthye mũsumbĩ.
2Chronicles10:2 Yĩla Yelovoamu mwana wa Nevati weewie ũu
2Chronicles10:3 Kwoou andũ ma Ĩsilaeli nĩmatũmanie Yelovoamu aketwe. Yelovoamu e vamwe na andũ ma Ĩsilaeli onthe nĩmaendie vala ve Leovoamu na mamwĩa atĩĩ
2Chronicles10:4 “Ĩthe waku Solomoni nũnatũthũkũmĩthasya wĩa wĩ vinya. Ĩndĩ ethĩwa nũũtũolangĩla wĩa ũsu na kũtũthũmũsya
2Chronicles10:5 Leovoamu nĩwamasũngĩie amea atĩĩ
2Chronicles10:6 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Mũsumbĩ Leovoamu wakũlilye ũtao kuma kwa atumĩa ala mathũkũmaa Solomoni ĩthe wake ĩvindanĩ yonthe yĩla wasumbĩkĩte. Nĩwamakũlilye atĩĩ
2Chronicles10:7 Atumĩa asu nĩmamũsũngĩĩie mamwĩa atĩĩ
2Chronicles10:8 Ĩndĩ Leovoamu nĩwaleile kũatĩĩa ũtao ũla wanengiwe nĩ atumĩa asu
2Chronicles10:9 Nĩwakũlilye anake asu atĩĩ
2Chronicles10:10 Anake asu nĩmasũngĩie Leovoamu mamwĩa atĩĩ
2Chronicles10:11 Ĩthe wakwa nũnamũthũkũmĩthasya wĩa wĩ vinya mũno
2Chronicles10:12 Ĩtina wa mĩthenya ĩtatũ
2Chronicles10:13 Mũsumbĩ nĩwaleile kũatĩĩa ũtao ũla wanengiwe nĩ atumĩa
2Chronicles10:14 Nĩwaatĩĩie ũtao ũla wanengiwe nĩ ala anake ma ĩika yake na amea atĩĩ
2Chronicles10:15 Kwoou Mũsumbĩ Leovoamu nĩwaleile kwĩthukĩĩsya andũ
2Chronicles10:16 Yĩla andũ onthe ma Ĩsilaeli moonie kana mũsumbĩ nĩwalea kũmethukĩĩsya
2Chronicles10:17 Leovoamu nĩwatiiwe asumbĩkĩte andũ ma Ĩsilaeli ala matwĩe ndũanĩ ila syaĩ kĩsionĩ kya nthĩ ya mbaĩ ya Yuta.
2Chronicles10:18 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Mũsumbĩ Leovoamu watũmie Atonilamu
2Chronicles10:19 Kuma ĩvindanĩ yĩu kũvika ũmũnthĩ
2Chronicles11:1 Yĩla Mũsumbĩ Leovoamu wavikie Yelũsalemu
2Chronicles11:2 Ĩndĩ Mwĩai Ngai nĩwaneenie na Mwathani Semaia amwĩa atĩĩ
2Chronicles11:3 “Neena na Leovoamu mwana wa Solomoni
2Chronicles11:4 Mwĩai Ngai easya atĩĩ
2Chronicles11:5 Leovoamu nĩwekalile Yelũsalemu na aaka alũlũmĩĩlya ndũa ila syaĩ isionĩ sya mbaĩ ya Yuta na ya Mbengyameni.
2Chronicles11:6 Nĩwaiĩĩie alũlũmĩĩlya ndũa ii: Mbetheleemu
2Chronicles11:7 Mbethi-suli
2Chronicles11:8 Ngathi
2Chronicles11:9 Atolaimu
2Chronicles11:10 Nzola
2Chronicles11:11 Nĩwalũlũmĩĩilye ndũa isu mũno na aia anene ma asikalĩ ma kaũ nthĩnĩ wasyo. O ta ũu nĩwaiie lĩu
2Chronicles11:12 Nĩwaiie ngao na matumo ndũanĩ isu syonthe
2Chronicles11:13 Athembi na Alivai onthe ala matwĩe isionĩ ila ingĩ syonthe sya nthĩ ya Ĩsilaeli
2Chronicles11:14 Alivai nĩmatiie isesi syoo sya kũĩthya na isio ingĩ syoo sya nthĩ
2Chronicles11:15 Yelovoamu nĩweenyuvĩie athembi make mwene
2Chronicles11:16 Andũ onthe ma mbaĩ syonthe sya Ĩsilaeli ala mendeeaw'a nĩ kũthaitha Mwĩai Ngai
2Chronicles11:17 Ũndũ ũsu nĩwatumie ũsumbĩ wa Yuta wĩthĩwa na vinya
2Chronicles11:18 Leovoamu nĩwatwaie Maalathi mwĩĩtu wa Yelimothi
2Chronicles11:19 Maalathi nĩwasyaĩie Leovoamu ana atatũ: Yeusi
2Chronicles11:20 Ĩtina wa ũu
2Chronicles11:21 Iveti sya Leovoamu syonthe syaĩ ĩkũmi na nyanya
2Chronicles11:22 Leovoamu nĩwanyuvie Aviya mwana wa Maaka nĩ kana ethĩwe e mũnene katĩ wa ana-a-ĩthe. Leovoamu eekie ũu nũndũ nĩwendaa Aviya etw'ĩka mũsumbĩ ĩtina wake.
2Chronicles11:23 Leovoamu nĩwatũmĩie ũĩ na atwaa ana make ndũanĩ ila mbiĩĩe isionĩ sya Yuta na Mbengyameni
2Chronicles12:1 Ĩtina wa ũsumbĩ wa Leovoamu kwĩthĩwa wĩ mũlũmu na wĩ na vinya
2Chronicles12:2 Nũndũ wa kũlea kwĩw'a Mwĩai Ngai
2Chronicles12:3 Ookie e na makasya ma kaũ ngili ĩmwe na maana elĩ
2Chronicles12:4 Nĩwakwatie ndũa mbiĩĩe sya Yuta na ooka nginya Yelũsalemu.
2Chronicles12:5 Mwathani Semaia nĩwaendie vala ve Mũsumbĩ Leovoamu na atongoi ma Yuta
2Chronicles12:6 Nĩvo ĩndĩ atongoi asu ma Ĩsilaeli vamwe na mũsumbĩ meenyivisye na masya atĩĩ
2Chronicles12:7 Yĩla Mwĩai Ngai woonie kana nĩmenyivĩtye
2Chronicles12:8 Ĩndĩ nĩmeũtw'ĩka athũkũmi ma Sisaki
2Chronicles12:9 Kwoou Sisaki mũsumbĩ wa Misili nĩwavithũkĩie Yelũsalemu. Nĩwakuie ũthwii w'onthe ũla waĩ Ĩkalũnĩ na ũla waĩ nyũmbanĩ ya kĩ-ũsumbĩ. Akuie kĩla kĩndũ
2Chronicles12:10 Kwoou Mũsumbĩ Leovoamu nĩwaseũvisye ngao sya mbulonzi vandũ va isu sya thaavu
2Chronicles12:11 Kĩla ĩvinda mũsumbĩ aithi Ĩkalũnĩ
2Chronicles12:12 Nũndũ Mũsumbĩ Leovoamu nĩweenyivisye
2Chronicles12:13 Mũsumbĩ Leovoamu nĩwaendeeie kwĩthĩwa e mũlũmu e Yelũsalemu
2Chronicles12:14 Leovoamu nĩwavĩtĩisye Mwĩai Ngai
2Chronicles12:15 Maũndũ ala Leovoamu weekie yĩla wasumbĩkĩte
2Chronicles12:16 Leovoamu nĩwakwie na athikwa Ndũanĩ ya Ndeviti
2Chronicles13:1 Mwakanĩ wa ĩkũmi na nyanya wa kũsumbĩka kwa Yelovoamu mũsumbĩ wa Ĩsilaeli
2Chronicles13:2 Asumbĩkie myaka ĩtatũ e Yelũsalemu. Nyinyia wake eetawa Mikaia mwĩĩtu wa Ũlieli wa ndũa ya Ngivea. Aviya na Yelovoamu mekalaa mayũkita.
2Chronicles13:3 Aviya aendie kũkita e vamwe na nguthu ya Asikalĩ ngili maana ana
2Chronicles13:4 Mũsumbĩ Aviya nĩwaũngamie Kĩĩmanĩ kya Nzemalaimu ĩũlũ; kĩĩma kĩu kĩ nthĩ yĩ iĩma ya Evalaimu. Nĩwaneenie asya atĩĩ
2Chronicles13:5 Nũndũ mũtesĩ kana Mwĩai Ngai
2Chronicles13:6 Ĩndĩ Yelovoamu mwana wa Nevati
2Chronicles13:7 Andũ amwe athe na mate kĩlĩko
2Chronicles13:8 Inyw'ĩ nĩmũvangĩte kũsiĩĩa ũsumbĩ wa Mwĩai Ngai
2Chronicles13:9 Inyw'ĩ nĩmwalũngilye athembi ma Mwĩai Ngai
2Chronicles13:10 “Ĩndĩ ithyĩ
2Chronicles13:11 Kĩla kwakya na kĩla wĩoo nĩmathembeaa Mwĩai Ngai nthembo sya kũvĩvw'a na ũvani wĩ mũuke mũseo
2Chronicles13:12 Ngai mwene nĩwe mũtongoi waitũ
2Chronicles13:13 Ĩndĩ ĩvindanĩ o yĩu
2Chronicles13:14 Yĩla asikalĩ ma Yuta masyaisye ĩtina moona kana nĩmathyũlũlũkĩtwe
2Chronicles13:15 Nĩvo ĩndĩ andũ ma Yuta malonzanilye na wasya mũnene wa kaũ. Yĩla andũ ma Yuta malonzanilye
2Chronicles13:16 Andũ ma Ĩsilaeli nĩmasembie makĩĩte andũ ma Yuta
2Chronicles13:17 Aviya e na andũ make nĩmooaie andũ aingĩ ma Ĩsilaeli. Mooaie asikalĩ ngũmbaũ ma Ĩsilaeli ngili maana atano.
2Chronicles13:18 Kwoou andũ ma Ĩsilaeli nĩmasindiwe nĩ na andũ ma Yuta
2Chronicles13:19 Aviya nĩwasembanisye Yelovoamu na amũvena ndũa ya Mbethi-eli
2Chronicles13:20 Yelovoamu ndaasyoka kwĩthĩwa na vinya ĩngĩ ĩvindanĩ ya Aviya. Mũminũkĩlyonĩ Mwĩai Ngai nĩwamũkũnie na akw'a.
2Chronicles13:21 Ĩndĩ Aviya nĩwaendeeie kwĩthĩwa e na ũtonyi mwingĩ. Nĩwatwaie iveti ĩkũmi na inya
2Chronicles13:22 Maũndũ ala angĩ onthe Aviya weekie yĩla wasumbĩkĩte; ala weekie na ala waneenie
2Chronicles14:1 Mũsumbĩ Aviya nĩwakwie na athikwa Ndũanĩ ya Ndeviti. Mwana wake ũla weetawa Asa nĩwatw'ĩkie mũsumbĩ ĩtina wake. Ĩvindanĩ ya Asa nthĩ ya Yuta nĩyeethĩiwe na mũuo vandũ va myaka ĩkũmi.
2Chronicles14:2 Asa nĩweekaa maũndũ ala malũngalu na mendeeasya Mwĩai Ngai
2Chronicles14:3 Nĩwavetie ithembeo ngeni na kũndũ kwa kũthaithĩa ngai sya mĩvw'anano
2Chronicles14:4 Nĩweeaĩie andũ ma Yuta meke kwenda kwa Mwĩai Ngai
2Chronicles14:5 O ta ũu nĩwavetangie kuma kĩla ndũanĩ ya Yuta kũndũ kw'onthe kwa kũthaithĩa ngai sya mĩvw'anano
2Chronicles14:6 Nĩwaakie alũlũmĩĩlya ndũa sya Yuta
2Chronicles14:7 Asa nĩweeie andũ ma Yuta atĩĩ
2Chronicles14:8 Asa aĩ na nguthu ya asikalĩ ma kaũ ngili maana atatũ ma mbaĩ ya Yuta
2Chronicles14:9 Mũethiovia weetawa Nzela nĩwavithũkĩie Yuta; ookie e na nguthu ya asikalĩ milioni ĩmwe
2Chronicles14:10 Asa nĩwaendie kũkita nake. Nguthu isu syelĩ nĩsyaũngamie syĩyũmbanĩtye kũkita Mwandanĩ wa Nzevatha vakuvĩ na Malesa.
2Chronicles14:11 Asa nĩwamwĩkaĩlile Mwĩai Ngai
2Chronicles14:12 Kwoou Mwĩai Ngai nĩwasindie asikalĩ ma kaũ ma Ethiovia
2Chronicles14:13 Asa e na asikalĩ make ma kaũ nĩmasembanisye Aethiovia asu nginya Ngelali. Vooaiwe Aethiovia aingĩ nginya weethĩa nguthu ĩsu yoo ya kaũ ndyaĩ ĩtonya kũmbana ingĩ yũkite. Nĩmasindiwe vyũ nĩ Mwĩai Ngai na nguthu yake ya asikalĩ ma kaũ. Andũ ma Yuta nĩmatavie syĩndũ mbingĩ makua.
2Chronicles14:14 Nĩvo ĩndĩ maanangie motũi onthe ala mathyũlũlũkĩte Ngelali
2Chronicles14:15 O ta ũu nĩmavithũkĩie kũndũ kũla kwambĩtwe maeema nĩ aĩthi
2Chronicles15:1 Veva wa Ngai nĩwookie kũla kwĩ Asalia mwana wa Oteti.
2Chronicles15:2 Asalia nĩwaendie kũkomana na Mũsumbĩ Asa na amwĩa atĩĩ
2Chronicles15:3 Andũ ma Ĩsilaeli nĩmekalile vandũ va ĩvinda ĩasa mate na Ngai ũla wa w'o
2Chronicles15:4 Ĩndĩ yĩla makwatiwe nĩ thĩna
2Chronicles15:5 Mĩthenyanĩ ĩsu vai mũndũ waĩ atonya kũthi vandũ e ũsũvĩonĩ
2Chronicles15:6 Nthĩ ĩmwe nĩyathĩnasya nthĩ ĩla ĩngĩ
2Chronicles15:7 Ĩndĩ inyw'ĩ ĩthĩwai na vinya
2Chronicles15:8 Yĩla Asa weewie ndeto ila Asalia mwana wa Oteti waneenie wathaninĩ wake
2Chronicles15:9 Andũ aingĩ kuma mbaĩnĩ sya Evalaimu
2Chronicles15:10 Nĩmoombanĩie Yelũsalemu mweinĩ wa katatũ
2Chronicles15:11 Mũthenyanĩ ũsu nĩmathembeie Mwĩai Ngai nthembo kuma mũtavonĩ ũla matavĩte; mathembie ng'ombe maana mũonza na malondu ngili mũonza.
2Chronicles15:12 Nĩmaseũvisye ũtianĩo kana makeekaa kwĩanana na kwenda kwa Mwĩai Ngai
2Chronicles15:13 Mũndũ o na wĩva ũla ũtakekaa kwĩanana na kwenda kwa Mwĩai Ngai akooawa
2Chronicles15:14 Nĩmeevĩtie vala ve Mwĩai Ngai kana makeanĩasya ũtianĩo ũsu. Meekie ũu maneenete na wasya mũnene na malonzete
2Chronicles15:15 Andũ onthe ma Yuta nĩmatanie nũndũ maseũvisye ũtianĩo ũsu na ngoo yoo yonthe. Nĩmamanthie Mwĩai Ngai na kwenda kwoo kw'onthe na mamwona
2Chronicles15:16 O ta ũu
2Chronicles15:17 O na vala Asa ndaa ananga kũndũ kw'onthe kũla andũ mathaithĩaa iĩmanĩ ĩũlũ
2Chronicles15:18 Nĩwaetie Ĩkalũnĩ mĩio yonthe ya thaavu na ya silĩva
2Chronicles15:19 Vayaaĩthĩwa kaũ ĩngĩ nginya mwaka wa mĩongo ĩtatũ na itano wa kũsumbĩka kwa Asa.
2Chronicles16:1 Mwakanĩ wa mĩongo ĩtatũ na thanthatũ wa kũsumbĩka kwa Asa mũsumbĩ wa Yuta
2Chronicles16:2 Kwoou Asa nĩwoosie silĩva na thaavu ũla watialĩte Ĩkalũnĩ na nyũmbanĩ ya kĩ-ũsumbĩ. Nĩwanengie anini make syĩndũ isu maitwae Ndamasikũ kũla kwĩ Mbeni-aatati mũsumbĩ wa Silia. Asa eeĩte anini asu make nĩmathi makee Mbeni-aatati atĩĩ
2Chronicles16:3 “Eka nyie naku twĩthĩwe twĩ na ngwatanĩo
2Chronicles16:4 Mũsumbĩ Mbeni-aatati nĩweetĩkĩlile ũndũ Mũsumbĩ Asa wamũkũlĩtye eke na atũma anene ma asikalĩ ma kaũ vamwe na asikalĩ mokite ndũa sya Ĩsilaeli. Asikalĩ asu nĩmokitie masinda ndũa sya Iyoni
2Chronicles16:5 Yĩla Mũsumbĩ Mbaasa weewie ũndũ kweekĩkĩte
2Chronicles16:6 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũsumbĩ Asa watũmie andũ onthe ma Yuta
2Chronicles16:7 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu Mwathani Aanani nĩwookie vala ve Asa mũsumbĩ wa Yuta na amwĩa atĩĩ
2Chronicles16:8 Aethiovia na Alimbya maĩ nguthu nene mũno syĩ na makasya maingĩ ma kaũ na asikalĩ malĩsĩte mbalasinĩ
2Chronicles16:9 Mwĩai Ngai nĩwĩkalaa asyaĩĩsye nthĩ yonthe nĩ kana anenge vinya andũ onthe ala menenganĩte kwake na ngoo syoo syonthe. Wĩkĩte ũndũ wa ũtumanu
2Chronicles16:10 Ndeto isu nĩsyatumie Asa athatĩa mwathani Aanani
2Chronicles16:11 Maũndũ onthe ala Asa weekie yĩla wasumbĩkĩte maandĩkĩtwe Ĩvukunĩ ya Maũndũ ma Mavinda ma Asumbĩ ma Yuta na Ĩsilaeli.
2Chronicles16:12 Mwakanĩ wa mĩongo ĩtatũ na kenda wa kũsumbĩka kwake
2Chronicles16:13 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Asa wakwie mwakanĩ wa mĩongo ĩna na ũmwe wa kũsumbĩka kwake.
2Chronicles16:14 Athikiwe Ndũanĩ ya Ndeviti mbũanĩ ĩla weeyasĩie mwene ĩvianĩ. Mamwĩkĩie ĩsandũkũnĩ yausũĩtw'e syĩndũ syĩ mũuke mũseo sya mĩthemba mingĩ
2Chronicles17:1 Yeosavati nĩwatw'ĩkie mũsumbĩ ĩtina wa Asa ĩthe wake
2Chronicles17:2 Nĩwaiie nguthu sya asikalĩ ndũanĩ syonthe mbiĩĩe sya Yuta
2Chronicles17:3 Mwĩai Ngai nĩwaathimie Yeosavati nũndũ nĩwaatĩĩie mwĩkalo ũla ĩthe wake waĩ naw'o mbeenĩ. Ndaathaitha ngai sya mũvw'anano ila syĩtawa Mbaali
2Chronicles17:4 ĩndĩ nĩweekaa kwenda kwa Ngai wa ĩthe wake na kũatĩĩa mĩao yake
2Chronicles17:5 Mwĩai Ngai nĩwanengie Yeosavati kwĩthĩwa na ũtonyi mwingĩ asumbĩkĩte Yuta. Andũ onthe nĩmamũeteae mĩthĩnzĩo
2Chronicles17:6 Nĩwendaa mũno ngoonĩ kũthũkũma Mwĩai Ngai
2Chronicles17:7 Mwakanĩ wa katatũ wa kũsumbĩka kwake
2Chronicles17:8 Maendanĩtye na Alivai aa: Semaia
2Chronicles17:9 Nĩmoosie Ĩvuku ya Mĩao ya Mwĩai Ngai
2Chronicles17:10 Mwĩai Ngai nĩwatumie mosumbĩ onthe ala mathyũlũlũkĩte Yuta makwatwa nĩ w'ĩa
2Chronicles17:11 Avilisiti amwe nĩmaeteie Yeosavati mĩthĩnzĩo
2Chronicles17:12 Kwoou ũtonyi wa Yeosavati nĩwaendeeie kwongeleka. Nĩwaakie myako mĩlũmu na ndũa sya kwia syĩndũ Yuta
2Chronicles17:13 na aia syĩndũ mbingĩ mũno kw'o. Nĩwaiie asikalĩ maĩ ngũmbaũ Yelũsalemu.
2Chronicles17:14 Ũtalo woo kwĩanana na mĩsyĩ yoo wailyĩ ta ũũ: Atena nĩwe waĩ mũnene wa nguthu sya asikalĩ ma kuma mĩsyĩ ya mbaĩ ya Yuta
2Chronicles17:15 Ũla wamũatĩĩe kwa ũnene nĩ Yeoanani
2Chronicles17:16 Wa katatũ ũnenenĩ aĩ Amasia mwana wa Nzikili
2Chronicles17:17 Eliata nĩwe waĩ mũnene wa nguthu sya asikalĩ kuma mĩsyĩnĩ ya mbaĩ ya Mbengyameni. Eliata aĩ mũsikalĩ ngũmbaũ na aũngamĩe asikalĩ ngili maana elĩ ala maĩ na ngao na meesĩ kũtũmĩa ũta.
2Chronicles17:18 Ũla wamũatĩĩe kwa ũnene nĩ Yeosavatu
2Chronicles17:19 Asikalĩ asu mathũkũmaa mũsumbĩ me Yelũsalemu. Kwongela asu
