Nehemiah13:2 nũndũ mayaanenga andũ ma Ĩsilaeli lĩu kana kĩw'ũ; vandũ va ũu
Nehemiah13:3 Yĩla andũ ma Ĩsilaeli meewie mwĩao ũsu wasomwa
Nehemiah13:4 Mũthembi Eliasavu ũla waũngamĩe nyũmba sya Ĩkalũ sya kwiwa syĩndũ nĩweethĩĩtwe vandũ va ĩvinda ĩasa ayĩw'ana na Tovia.
Nehemiah13:5 Eliasavu nĩwanengie Tovia mwanya wa kũtũmĩa nyũmba ĩmwe nene
Nehemiah13:6 Maũndũ asu onthe maendee kwĩkwa
Nehemiah13:7 na nasyoka Yelũsalemu. Nĩ Yelũsalemu nĩw'o namanyie ũthũku ũla Eliasavu weekie kwa kũnenga Tovia nyũmba ĩla yaĩ Ĩkalũnĩ.
Nehemiah13:8 Ũndũ ũsu nĩwambĩw'ĩthisye woo mũno na nekangya syĩndũ sya Tovia syonthe nza.
Nehemiah13:9 Nĩnaumisye mwĩao nyũmba isu ithew'e
Nehemiah13:10 Nĩnasyokie namanya kana aini ma Ĩkalũnĩ na Alivai
Nehemiah13:11 Nĩnaneenie na atongoi ma Yuta nĩ na woo namakũlya atĩĩ
Nehemiah13:12 Nĩvo ĩndĩ andũ onthe ma Ĩsilaeli mambĩĩie kũete kĩlungu kyoo kya ĩkũmi kya ngetha ya mbaa mbeke
Nehemiah13:13 Nĩnanyuvie andũ aa wĩanĩ wa kũũngamĩa kĩnandũ kya nyũmba isu sya kwiwa syĩndũ: Mũthembi Selemia
Nehemiah13:14 Ame Ngai wakwa
Nehemiah13:15 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu
Nehemiah13:16 Andũ amwe kuma ndũanĩ ya Tile ala matwĩe Yelũsalemu nĩmaetie makũyũ
Nehemiah13:17 Nĩnaneenie na atongoi ma Yuta nĩ na woo namea atĩĩ
Nehemiah13:18 Aaũmae maitũ nĩmeekie ũthũku ũilyĩ ta ũũ
Nehemiah13:19 Kwoou nĩnaumisye mwĩao mĩvĩa ya ndũa ĩvingawe ĩa mawĩoo Savato ĩyambĩĩa kĩla ĩvinda
Nehemiah13:20 Ĩvinda yĩmwe kana mavinda elĩ
Nehemiah13:21 Nĩnamakanisye namea atĩĩ
Nehemiah13:22 Nĩneeaĩie Alivai methesye
Nehemiah13:23 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu
Nehemiah13:24 Nyusu ya Syana syoo yaneenaa kĩthyomo kya Asitoti kana ithyomo ingĩ
Nehemiah13:25 Nĩnatetanisye namo
Nehemiah13:26 Nĩkũlya
Nehemiah13:27 Yu ĩndĩ mwĩenda tũatĩĩe ngelekany'o yenyu
Nehemiah13:28 Ũmwe wa ana ma Yeoiata mwana wa Eliasavu Mũthembi Mũnene nĩwatwaie mwĩĩtu wa Sanavalati kuma ndũanĩ ya Mbethi-oloni. Nũndũ wa ũu nĩnalũngilye Yeoiata auma vala nĩĩ.
Nehemiah13:29 Ame Ngai wakwa lilikana andũ asu
Nehemiah13:30 Nĩnatheisye andũ nũndũ wa syĩndũ syonthe ila syaumĩte nthĩ ingĩ; nĩnaseũvisye motw'ĩo ma kũatĩĩwa nĩ athembi na Alivai
Nehemiah13:31 Nĩnaseũvisye mũvango wa ngũ ila itũmĩawa ĩvinda ya kũthemba nthembo sya kũvĩvw'a
Esther1:1 Maũndũ aa nĩmo meekĩkie ĩvindanĩ ya Aasuelo. Mũsumbĩ Aasuelo asumbĩkĩte isio mbee wa ĩana na mĩongo ĩlĩ na mũonza
Esther1:2 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu
Esther1:3 Mwakanĩ wa katatũ wa kũsumbĩka kwake
Esther1:4 Vandũ va ĩvinda ya myei thanthatũ
Esther1:5 Ĩtina wa maũndũ asu mũsumbĩ nĩwaseũvĩisye andũ onthe me nguma na mate nguma
Esther1:6 Vandũ vau vaanakavĩtw'e na itambaa nzaũ na sya mbuluu
Esther1:7 Syĩndũ sya kũnyw'a syeekĩĩtwe ikombenĩ sya thaavu
Esther1:8 Kĩla mũndũ nĩwanyusaa ũndũ ũkwenda ate kũthimĩwa; mũsumbĩ nĩwaumĩisye athũkũmi make onthe mwĩao manenge kĩla mũndũ anyw'e kwĩanana na ũndũ ũkwenda.
Esther1:9 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu o nake Vasiti
Esther1:10 Mũthenyanĩ wa mũonza wa mboka ĩsu
Esther1:11 Nĩwameie makamwĩte Vasiti mũka wake oke ekĩĩte ngovia ya kĩ-ũsumbĩ
Esther1:12 Ĩndĩ Vasiti mũka wa mũsumbĩ nĩwaleile kũka eetwa nĩ mũsumbĩ kwĩsĩla athũkũminĩ asu. Ũndũ ũsu nĩwatumie mũsumbĩ athata na kwĩw'a woo mũno.
Esther1:13 Kwoou mũsumbĩ nĩwakũlilye atai make ũtao ĩũlũ wa mĩao na kumya ũsilĩlo ũla waĩlĩte
Esther1:14 Atai make maĩ: Kalĩsena
Esther1:15 Mũsumbĩ nĩwamakũlilye atĩĩ: “Kwĩanana na mĩao
Esther1:16 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Memũkani wamũsũngĩie mũsumbĩ vamwe na andũ make ma ndaĩa amea atĩĩ
Esther1:17 Nĩkwĩthĩwa ũndũ ũsu mũka wa mũsumbĩ weeka
Esther1:18 Ũmũnthĩ iveti sya andũ me ndaĩa ma Velisia na Metia
Esther1:19 Kwoou ethĩwa mũsumbĩ nũkwona wĩ waĩlu umya ũtw'ĩo wa kĩ-ũsumbĩ na ũiandĩkwa ta ũmwe wa mĩao ya Velisia na Metia nĩ kana wĩthĩwe ũtatonya kũalyũlwa. Ũtw'ĩo ũsu nĩwasye kana Vasiti ti mũka wa Mũsumbĩ Aasuelo ĩngĩ; mũsumbĩ nĩanengane mwanya ũsu wa Vasiti kwa mũndũ mũka ũngĩ wĩ ndaĩa kwĩ we.
Esther1:20 Mwĩao ũsu watavanw'a kĩla vandũ ũsumbĩnĩ wake
Esther1:21 Woni ũsu nĩwendeeisye mũsumbĩ vamwe na andũ make ma ndaĩa
Esther1:22 Mũsumbĩ nĩwatũmie valũa isionĩ syonthe sya ũsumbĩ wake; kĩla kĩsio akĩandĩkĩie na kĩthyomo kĩla andũ makyo maneenaa
Esther2:1 Ĩtina wa maũndũ asu
Esther2:2 Nĩvo ĩndĩ atai amwe ala mekalaa vakuvĩ na mũsumbĩ mamwĩie atĩĩ
Esther2:3 Naku mũsumbĩ ũinyuva andũ kuma kĩla kĩmwe kya kĩsio kĩ ũsumbĩnĩ waku
Esther2:4 Mwĩĩtu ũla wĩkwendeesya we mũsumbĩ nĩetw'ĩka kĩveti kyaku vandũ va Vasiti.” Ũndũ ũsu nĩwamwendeeisye mũsumbĩ na eeka ũu.
Esther2:5 Ndũanĩ ĩsu nene ya Susa vaĩ Mũyuti ũmwe weetawa Molitekai mwana wa Yaili. Aĩ wa mbaĩ ya Mbengyameni
Esther2:6 Yĩla Nevukatinesa mũsumbĩ wa Mbavilonĩ watavie Yekonia
Esther2:7 Molitekai nĩwe waeete Esita
Esther2:8 Kwoou yĩla ũtw'ĩo wa mũsumbĩ watavaniw'e kĩla vandũ
Esther2:9 Ekai nĩwendeeiw'e mũno nĩ Esita na atw'a kũmwĩka nesa. O kwa mĩtũkĩ nĩwamũnengie syĩndũ sya kwĩyanakavya vamwe na lĩu mũna. Nĩwamũnyuvĩie athũkũmi mũonza ma eĩtu kuma akanĩ ala mathũkũmaa nyũmbanĩ ya mũsumbĩ
Esther2:10 Esita ndaĩ aaweta andũ ma mbaĩ yake nĩ aaũ
Esther2:11 Kĩla mũthenya Molitekai nĩwookaa vau nza wa nyũmba ĩsu
Esther2:12 Kĩla mwĩĩtu atanamba kũthi mbee wa Mũsumbĩ Aasuelo
Esther2:13 Na ũũ nĩw'o mwĩĩtu waendaa mbee wa mũsumbĩ: Kĩla ũkwenda kyonthe athi kwa mũsumbĩ ekĩĩte
Esther2:14 Ĩa mawĩoo mwĩĩtu nĩwaendaa mbee wa mũsumbĩ na ũnĩ ũsu aisyoka na kũlika nyũmbanĩ ĩngĩ na kwiwa ũsũvĩonĩ wa Sasikasi
Esther2:15 Ĩvinda nĩyavikie ya Esita kũthi mbee wa mũsumbĩ. Esita aĩ mwĩĩtu wa Aviaili
Esther2:16 Esita nĩwatwaiwe mbee wa mũsumbĩ Aasuelo nyũmbanĩ yake ya kĩ-ũsumbĩ mweinĩ wa ĩkũmi ũla wĩtawa Tevethi
Esther2:17 Mũsumbĩ nĩwamwendie Esita mũno mbee wa aka ala angĩ onthe. Nĩwendeeiw'e mũno nĩwe kũvĩtũka eĩtu ala angĩ onthe
Esther2:18 Kwoou mũsumbĩ nĩwaseũvĩisye andũ make ma ndaĩa na athũkũmi make mboka nene kwondũ wa ndaĩa ya Esita. O ta ũu mũsumbĩ nĩwanengie andũ ala me ungu wa ũsumbĩ wake ĩvinda ya kũthũmũa
Esther2:19 Yĩla eĩtu asu meetiwe ĩvinda ya kelĩ
Esther2:20 Kũvika o na ĩvinda yĩu Esita ndaĩ aaweta andũ ma mbaĩ yake nĩ aaũ
Esther2:21 Ĩvindanĩ yĩla Molitekai wathũkũmaa nyũmbanĩ ya mũsumbĩ
Esther2:22 Ũndũ ũsu nĩwamanyĩkie nĩ Molitekai na atavya Esita mũka wa mũsumbĩ. Esita nĩwaendie amũtavya mũsumbĩ ũvoo ũsu watavĩtw'e nĩ Molitekai.
Esther2:23 Yĩla ũvoo ũsu waatĩĩiwe na weethĩwa nĩ wa w'o
Esther3:1 Ĩtina wa maũndũ asu
Esther3:2 Athũkũmi onthe ma kwa mũsumbĩ nĩmatulasya ndu na kũkumany'a mũtwe mbee wa Amani
Esther3:3 Athũkũmi ala angĩ ma mũsumbĩ nĩmakũlilye Molitekai atĩĩ
Esther3:4 Nĩmamũkũlilye ũu matukũ maingĩ na alea vyũ kwĩanĩsya mwĩao ũsu. Kwoou athũkũmi asu nĩmaendie matavya Amani nĩ kana masisye kana nũkwĩtĩkĩlana na mwĩkalo ũsu wa Molitekai
Esther3:5 Amani nĩwathatie mũno yĩla wamanyie kana Molitekai ndatonya kũtulya ndu na kũkumana mbee wake.
Esther3:6 Yĩla Amani wamanyie kana Molitekai nĩ Mũyuti
Esther3:7 Mwakanĩ wa ĩkũmi na ilĩ wa kũsumbĩka kwa Aasuelo
Esther3:8 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Amani weeie Mũsumbĩ Aasuelo atĩĩ
Esther3:9 Kwoou ethĩwa we mũsumbĩ waitũ nũkwona wĩ waĩlu
Esther3:10 Mũsumbĩ nĩwaumisye mbete yake ya kwĩkĩa mũulĩ na amĩnenga Amani
Esther3:11 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũsumbĩ wamwĩie Amani atĩĩ
Esther3:12 Matukũ ĩkũmi na atatũ mwei wa mbee
Esther3:13 Andũ amwe nĩmatũmiwe matwae ũtw'ĩo ũsu isionĩ syonthe sya ũsumbĩ wa Aasuelo. Valũa isu syoonanĩtye kana Ayuti onthe; ma mũika na ala akũũ
Esther3:14 Ũtw'ĩo ũsu waĩ ũtavanw'e kwa andũ onthe ma kĩla kĩsio
Esther3:15 Kumana na mwĩao wa mũsumbĩ
Esther4:1 Yĩla Molitekai wamanyie ĩũlũ wa maũndũ onthe ala meekĩkĩte
Esther4:2 Nĩwaendie nginya mũomonĩ wa mũvĩa wa nyũmba ya mũsumbĩ
Esther4:3 Nthĩnĩ wa kĩla kĩsio vala ũtw'ĩo ũsu wa mũsumbĩ wavikaa
Esther4:4 Yĩla athũkũmi ala ma aka na ala angĩ maĩ aũme avakũe mamũtavisye Esita maũndũ ala Molitekai waendee kwĩka
Esther4:5 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Esita watũmanie Athaki
Esther4:6 Athaki nĩwaendie vala ve Molitekai mũomonĩ wa mũvĩa wa kũlika nyũmbanĩ ya mũsumbĩ ĩla yaĩ ndũanĩ katĩ.
Esther4:7 Molitekai nĩwamũtavisye maũndũ onthe ala meekĩkĩte
Esther4:8 O ta ũu Molitekai nĩwanengie Athaki valũa ũla waandĩkĩtwe ũtw'ĩo ũla wanenganĩiwe vau Susa
Esther4:9 Athaki nĩwaendie atavya Esita maũndũ onthe ala wataviw'e nĩ Molitekai.
Esther4:10 Esita nĩwatũmie Athaki kũla kwĩ Molitekai akamwĩe atĩĩ
Esther4:11 “Athũkũmi onthe ma mũsumbĩ na andũ ala angĩ onthe mekalaa isionĩ ila syĩ ungu wa ũsumbĩ wake
Esther4:12 Yĩla Molitekai wakwatie ũtũmani wa Esita
Esther4:13 nĩwanenganie ũsũngĩo ũũ
Esther4:14 Nũndũ ethĩwa ũkavindya ĩvinda ta yĩĩ
Esther4:15 Nĩvo ĩndĩ nake Esita wanenganie ũsũngĩo ũũ ũtwaĩwe Molitekai
Esther4:16 “Enda wũmbany'e Ayuti onthe ala me ndũanĩ ya Susa
Esther4:17 Molitekai nĩwaendie na eeka maũndũ onthe ala Esita wamũtavisye.
Esther5:1 Mũthenyanĩ wa katatũ wa kũtĩĩa kũya
Esther5:2 Yĩla mũsumbĩ woonie Esita mũka wake aũngyĩ nza
Esther5:3 Mũsumbĩ nĩwamũkũlilye atĩĩ
Esther5:4 Esita nĩwamũsũngĩie amwĩa atĩĩ
Esther5:5 Mũsumbĩ nĩweeaie asya atĩĩ
Esther5:6 Maendee kũnyw'a ndivai
Esther5:7 Esita nĩwasũngĩie asya
Esther5:8 Ethĩwa mũsumbĩ nĩwendeeaw'a ninyie na nũkwona wĩ waĩlu kwĩanĩsya vata na wendi wakwa
Esther5:9 Amani aumĩte mbokanĩ ĩsu aĩ mũtanu na nĩweew'aa e mwĩanĩe. Ĩndĩ yĩla woonie Molitekai mũvĩanĩ wa kũlika kwa mũsumbĩ
Esther5:10 Ĩndĩ Amani nĩwoomĩĩisye woo ũsu na enũka. Avika mũsyĩ nĩweetie anyanyae make na akũlya kĩveti kyake Nzelesi kĩthĩwe vamwe namo.
Esther5:11 Amani nĩwambĩĩie kwĩkathĩĩa na kũmatavya ũndũ ũthwii wake wĩana
Esther5:12 Nĩwaendeeie kũneena ayasya atĩĩ
Esther5:13 Ĩndĩ o na maũndũ asu onthe me o vo
Esther5:14 Nĩvo ĩndĩ kĩveti kyake Nzelesi vamwe na anyanyae make onthe mamwĩie atĩĩ
Esther6:1 Ũtukũ ũsu mũsumbĩ ndaakwata too. Kwoou nĩweeaie aetewe ĩvuku ya ũlilikany'o
Esther6:2 Ĩvukunĩ yĩu nĩveethĩiwe vaandĩkĩtwe kana Molitekai nĩwe waumbũie mũvango wa kũaa mũsumbĩ Aasuelo
Esther6:3 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũsumbĩ wakũlilye atĩĩ
Esther6:4 Mũsumbĩ nĩwakũlilye atĩĩ
Esther6:5 Kwoou athũkũmi asu nĩmamũsũngĩie mamwĩa atĩĩ
Esther6:6 Amani nĩwalikile na mũsumbĩ amũkũlya atĩĩ
Esther6:7 Amani nĩwasũngĩie mũsumbĩ amwĩa atĩĩ
Esther6:8 aĩlĩte kũetewe ngũa ndaasa ya kĩ-ũsumbĩ katĩ wa ila mũsumbĩ wĩkĩaa. O ta ũu anengwe ĩmwe katĩ wa mbalasi ila ikuaa mũsumbĩ
Esther6:9 Osa ũmwe wa athũkũmi maku ala ma ndaĩa anengwe ngũa ĩsu ekĩe mũndũ ũsu mũsumbĩ ũkwendeew'a nĩwe
Esther6:10 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũsumbĩ weeie Amani atĩĩ
Esther6:11 Kwoou Amani nĩwaendie aete ngũa ĩsu na mbalasi. Nĩwamwĩkĩie Molitekai ngũa ĩsu na amũtongoesya atũlĩte mbalasinĩ
Esther6:12 Ĩtina wa maũndũ asu
Esther6:13 Nĩwatavisye kĩveti kyake na anyanyae make maũndũ onthe ala meekĩka kwake. Nĩvo ĩndĩ atai ma Amani na kĩveti kyake mamwĩie atĩĩ
Esther6:14 Maendee kũneena nake
Esther7:1 Kwoou mũsumbĩ na Amani nĩmaendie kũĩsanĩa mboka na Esita mũka wa mũsumbĩ.
Esther7:2 Maendee kũnyw'a ndivai ĩvindanĩ yĩu ya mboka ya kelĩ
Esther7:3 Esita nĩwamũsũngĩie amwĩa atĩĩ
Esther7:4 Nũndũ nyie na andũ ma mbaĩ yakwa nĩtũthooetw'e tũawe tũthele vyũ. Kethĩwa tũthooetw'e o ta ngombo sya aũme na aka
Esther7:5 Mũsumbĩ Aasuelo nĩwamũkũlilye Esita
Esther7:6 Esita amũsũngĩa
Esther7:7 Mũsumbĩ nĩwookĩlile ew'ĩte woo auma vau mboka yaseũvĩw'e athi nza wa nyũmba yake kũla kũvandĩtwe malaa. Ĩndĩ Amani nĩwatiiwe vau na athi kwĩkalanĩla na Esita amwĩsũve ew'ĩwe tei ndakoawe
Esther7:8 Yĩla mũsumbĩ wasyokie vala manyw'ĩĩaa ndivai kuma vala waĩ anathi
Esther7:9 Ũmwe wa aũme asu weetawa Alivona nĩwaisye atĩĩ
Esther7:10 Kwoou nĩmasũisye Amani mũtĩnĩ ũla waseũvĩtye nĩ kana asũsye Molitekai vo. Naw'o ũthatu wa mũsumbĩ wausya.
Esther8:1 Mũthenyanĩ o ũsu
Esther8:2 Mũsumbĩ nĩwaumisye mbete yake ya kwĩkĩa mũulĩ
Esther8:3 Esita nĩwasyokie kũmwĩsũva mũsumbĩ atulĩtye ndu maũũnĩ make
Esther8:4 Mũsumbĩ nĩwookĩlilye ĩla ndata yake ya thaavu amwelekelye Esita.
Esther8:5 Esita nĩwookĩlile aũngama mbee wake. Nĩwaisye atĩĩ
Esther8:6 Ndonya ata nyie kũmĩĩsya kwona andũ ma mbaĩ yakwa maiminwa
Esther8:7 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Mũsumbĩ Aasuelo weeie Esita na Molitekai ũla Mũyuti
Esther8:8 Ũtw'ĩo wumĩtw'e nĩ mũsumbĩ na kũĩkĩĩthw'a na mũulĩ wa kĩ-ũsumbĩ ndũtonya kũvetwa. Ĩndĩ ũu wĩ o vo
Esther8:9 Matukũ mĩongo ĩlĩ na atatũ mwei wa katatũ
Esther8:10 Valũa isu syaandĩkĩtwe nĩ Molitekai ĩsyĩtwanĩ ya Mũsumbĩ Aasuelo
Esther8:11 Ũtw'ĩo ũsu wa mũsumbĩ nĩweetĩkĩlĩtye Ayuti onthe nthĩnĩ wa kĩla ndũa nene kũmbana vamwe na kwĩtetea kwa kũkita na amaitha moo. Nĩmeetĩkĩlĩtw'e kũaa na kũmina vyũ asikalĩ onthe ma kaũ ma mbaĩ sya kĩsio o na kĩva
Esther8:12 Mũthenya ũla wanyuvĩtwe kwondũ wa Ayuti kwĩka maũndũ asu nthĩnĩ wa isio syonthe ila Aasuelo wasumbĩkĩte
Esther8:13 Ũtw'ĩo ũsu waĩ ũtavanw'e ta mwĩao isionĩ syonthe sya Velisia
Esther8:14 Kwoou andũ asu matũmĩtwe nĩmatũlile mbalasinĩ isu syatũmĩkaa mavatanĩ ma mũsumbĩ
Esther8:15 Molitekai nĩwaumie nyũmba kwa mũsumbĩ ekĩĩte ngũa ndaasa ya kĩ-ũsumbĩ yaĩ ya langi wa mbuluu na ũngĩ mweũ; ngũa nzeo ndũmu yailyĩ ta ndune na ngovia ya thaavu mbanake ya kĩ-ũsumbĩ. Andũ ala maĩ ndũanĩ ya Susa nĩmalonzanilye mũno nũndũ wa kũtana na kwĩw'a mũyo.
Esther8:16 Ayuti nĩmeethĩiwe na ũtanu
Esther8:17 Ayuti ma kĩla kĩsio na ndũa syonthe kũla mwĩao na ũtw'ĩo wa mũsumbĩ wavikaa
Esther9:1 Matukũ ĩkũmi na atatũ mwei wa ĩkũmi na ilĩ
Esther9:2 Ayuti nĩmoombanĩie ndũanĩ syonthe sya isio ila Mũsumbĩ Aasuelo wasumbĩkĩte
Esther9:3 Atongoi ma isio isu
Esther9:4 Molitekai aĩ anambĩĩa kwĩthĩwa mũndũ wĩ ũtonyi nyũmbanĩ ya mũsumbĩ
Esther9:5 Kwoou Ayuti nĩmooaie amaitha moo kwa kũmatemanga na ũvyũ
Esther9:6 Ndũanĩ nene ya Susa yĩ yoka
Esther9:7 O ta ũu
Esther9:8 Volatha
Esther9:9 Valimasita
Esther9:10 ala maĩ ana ĩkũmi ma Amani mwana wa Ametatha ũla waĩ mũmaitha wa Ayuti. Ĩndĩ Ayuti mayaaosa kĩndũ o na kĩmwe kya andũ asu mooaie.
Esther9:11 Mũthenyanĩ o ũsu mũsumbĩ nĩwataviw'e ũtalo wa andũ ala mooaiwe ndũanĩ ya Susa.
Esther9:12 Mũsumbĩ nĩweeie Esita mũka wake atĩĩ
Esther9:13 Esita nĩwasũngĩie mũsumbĩ amwĩa atĩĩ
Esther9:14 Kwoou mũsumbĩ nĩwaumisye mwĩao ũndũ ũsu wĩkwe; mwĩao ũsu nĩwatavaniw'e vau Susa na mĩĩ ĩsu yasũw'a.
Esther9:15 Matukũ ĩkũmi na ana ma mwei wa ĩkũmi na ilĩ
Esther9:16 Ayuti ala angĩ maĩ isionĩ ila ingĩ Aasuelo wasumbĩkĩte
Esther9:17 Maũndũ asu meekĩkie matukũ ĩkũmi na atatũ mwei ũsu wa Atali
Esther9:18 Ĩndĩ Ayuti ala maĩ Susa moombanie vamwe mokite na amaitha moo matukũ ĩkũmi na atatũ na matukũ ĩkũmi na ana. Nĩmathũmũie matukũ ĩkũmi na atano
Esther9:19 Kĩu nĩkyo kĩtumaa Ayuti ala mekalaa motũinĩ
Esther9:20 Molitekai nĩwaandĩkie maũndũ asu na anengane mavalũa kwa Ayuti onthe ala mekalaa isionĩ syonthe ila Aasuelo wasumbĩkĩte.
Esther9:21 Nĩwamatavĩtye kana kĩla mwaka matukũ ĩkũmi na ana na ĩkũmi na atano ma mwei wa ĩkũmi na ilĩ
Esther9:22 Ĩsu nĩ mĩthenya ĩla Ayuti masindie amaitha moo
Esther9:23 Kwoou Ayuti nĩmeekie ũndũ Molitekai wameaĩie na mboka ĩsu yatw'ĩka ya kĩla mwaka.
Esther9:24 Amani mwana wa Ametatha
Esther9:25 Ĩndĩ yĩla Esita waendie kũmũtavya mũsumbĩ
Esther9:26 Kĩu nĩkyo kĩtumaa mĩthenya ĩsu yĩtwa Vulimu kumana na ndeto ĩsu Vuli. Kumana na valũa ũla waandĩkĩtwe nĩ Molitekai na maũndũ onthe ala meekĩkie kwoo.
Esther9:27 Ayuti onthe nĩmaseũvisye mwĩao kwondũ woo
Esther9:28 Nĩkwavĩtũkĩthiw'e kana mĩthenya ĩsu ĩlĩ ĩkeethĩawa yĩ ya mwanya kĩla mwaka kwa andũ ma mĩsyĩ yonthe na nzyawa syoo
Esther9:29 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Esita mũka wa mũsumbĩ
Esther9:30 Valũa ũsu nĩwatwaiwe kwa Ayuti onthe
Esther9:31 na kũmataa vamwe na nzyawa syoo mekalasye mĩthenya ĩsu ya mboka ya Vulimu yĩ ya mwanya ĩvindanĩ yĩla yĩtw'ĩtwe
Esther9:32 Esita nĩwaumisye mwĩao wa kũlũlũmĩĩlya walany'o ũsu wa mboka ya Vulimu
Esther10:1 Mũsumbĩ Aasuelo nĩwaumĩthasya andũ onthe koti ala maĩ ũsumbĩnĩ wake
Esther10:2 Maũndũ onthe manene na ma kũseng'ya ala mũsumbĩ ũsu weekie
Esther10:3 Molitekai ũla Mũyuti nĩwe waĩ wa kelĩ kwa ũnene ũsumbĩnĩ wa Aasuelo. Nĩwendetwe mũno na kũnengwa ndaĩa nĩ Ayuti ala angĩ
Job1:1 Kwaĩ mũndũ ũmwe weetawa Yovu ũla watwĩe nthĩ ya Usi. Yovu aĩ mũndũ ũtatũlwa mũtĩ na aĩ mũlũngalu. Aĩ na kĩkĩo kya Ngai na nĩweesũvĩaa ndakeke ũndũ ũthũku.
Job1:2 Aĩ na ana mũonza na eĩtu atatũ.
Job1:3 Aĩ na malondu ngili mũonza
Job1:4 Ana ma Yovu nĩmaumanĩasya kũseũvya mboka kĩla ũmwe mũsyĩnĩ wake. Kĩla ĩvinda ana asu nĩmathokasya eĩtu-a-inyia moo me atatũ
Job1:5 Kwakya kũla kweethĩawa kũatĩĩe mũthenya wa kĩla mboka
Job1:6 Mũthenya ũmwe syũmbe sya ĩtunĩ nĩsyookie mbee wa Mwĩai Ngai; Satani o nake aĩ vo.
Job1:7 Mwĩai Ngai nĩwaneenie na Satani amũkũlya atĩĩ
Job1:8 Mwĩai Ngai nĩwamũkũlilye atĩĩ
Job1:9 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Satani wakũlilye Ngai atĩĩ
Job1:10 Wĩthĩĩtwe ũimũsũvĩa mũno kĩla ĩvinda. O ta ũu nũsũvĩaa andũ ma mũsyĩ wake na syĩndũ syake syonthe ila wĩ nasyo. Nũathimaa wĩa wake w'onthe na ũthwii wake nũendee kwongeleka nthĩ yonthe.
Job1:11 Ĩndĩ yu ũkosa syĩndũ syonthe ila Yovu wĩ nasyo akũuma methonĩ!”
Job1:12 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Mwĩai Ngai weeie Satani atĩĩ
Job1:13 Mũthenya ũmwe
Job1:14 mũtũmwa ũmwe nĩwookie vala ve Yovu
Job1:15 Aseva nĩmaivithũkĩa na masyũya syonthe
Job1:16 Mũtũmwa ũsu aendee kũneena
Job1:17 Ũsu nake aendee kũneena
Job1:18 Mũthũkũmi ũsu aendee kũneena
Job1:19 na kĩseve kĩna vinya
Job1:20 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yovu wookĩlile na atembũanga ngũa yake nĩ kyeva. Nĩweenzie mũtwe wake
Job1:21 Nĩwaneenie asya atĩĩ
Job1:22 O na maũndũ asu onthe meekĩka
Job2:1 Yĩla mũthenya ũngĩ wavikie wa syũmbe sya ĩtunĩ kũka mbee wa Mwĩai Ngai
Job2:2 Mwĩai Ngai nĩwakũlilye Satani atĩĩ
Job2:3 Mwĩai Ngai amũkũlya atĩĩ
Job2:4 Satani nĩwamũsũngĩie amwĩa atĩĩ
Job2:5 Ĩndĩ yu watata kũkiita mwĩĩ wake ekũuma methonĩ.”
Job2:6 Kwoou Mwĩai Ngai nĩweeie Satani atĩĩ
Job2:7 Kwoou Satani nĩwaumie vala ve Mwĩai Ngai na athi. Satani nĩwatumie Yovu akwatwa nĩ mĩimũ mwĩĩnĩ wake w'onthe.
Job2:8 Yovu nĩwaendie ekala vala mũu wekaw'a na oosa kĩlĩo ethũe nakyo.
Job2:9 Mũka wa Yovu nĩwamũkũlilye atĩĩ
Job2:10 Yovu nĩwasũngĩie mũka amwĩa atĩĩ
Job2:11 Yovu aĩ na anyanyae atatũ. Anyanyae asu maĩ Elivasi kuma ndũanĩ ya Temani
Job2:12 Yĩla mookĩlilye metho me vaasa
Job2:13 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mekalile nthĩ me na Yovu vandũ va mĩthenya mũonza
Job3:1 Ĩtina wa ũu
Job3:2 Yovu aneenie ayasya ũũ:
Job3:3 “Mũthenya ũla nasyaiwe nĩ wae vyũ
Job3:4 Mũthenya ũsu nĩwaĩe kĩvindunĩ
Job3:5 Nũkwatwe ĩngĩ nĩ wiki na kĩvindu kĩkamu; nũvw'ĩkwe nĩ matu
Job3:6 Ũtukũ ũsu
Job3:7 Ũtukũ ũsu ũtw'ĩke ngũngũ
Job3:8 Ala maumanĩaa mĩthenya maũumanĩe. Ala meyũmbanĩtye kũthokoa Leviathani.
Job3:9 Ndata ya kwakya ya ũtukũ ũsu ndĩkaumye kyeni kyayo
Job3:10 Nĩkwĩthĩwa ndwaavinga ĩvu ya mwaitũ ngalea kũsyawa
Job3:11 Nĩ kavaa kethĩwa nakw'ĩĩe ĩvunĩ ya mwaitũ
Job3:12 Nĩkĩ vaĩ mau ma kũnthokya? Kana nĩkĩ vaĩ nondo ndonya kwonga?
Job3:13 Nũndũ kethĩwa nĩnakwie ĩvinda yĩu
Job3:14 Nĩthĩwa vamwe na asumbĩ na atongoi ma nthĩ
Job3:15 kana nĩ na asumbĩ ala mausũasya nyũmba syoo na thaavu
Job3:16 Naemie kũsyawa nĩ kĩvuno nĩkĩ
Job3:17 Mbũanĩ nĩvo andũ athũku maekeaa kwĩka naĩ
Job3:18 O na ala ove yela nĩmakwataa mũuo vo
Job3:19 Andũ onthe me vo
Job3:20 Ala mekũthĩna maendeeaa kwĩkala thayũ nĩkĩ? Ala me na kyeva maendeeaa kwĩkala thayũ nĩkĩ?
Job3:21 Meteelaa kĩkw'ũ
Job3:22 Mayĩthĩawa na ũtanu
Job3:23 Ngai nũmavithaa ĩvinda yoo yĩla yũkĩte
Job3:24 Kĩĩo kyakwa nĩkĩtw'ĩkĩte lĩu wakwa
Job3:25 Nũndũ ũndũ ũla ngĩaa nĩwĩkĩkĩte vala nĩĩ
Job3:26 Ndi na mũuo
Job4:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Elivasi kuma ndũanĩ ya Temani wasũngĩie Yovu amwĩa atĩĩ
Job4:2 “Mũndũ ũkũtavya ũndũ nĩwĩw'a woo? Nditonya kũendeea kũkilya.
Job4:3 Sũanĩa ũndũ ũmanyĩĩtye andũ maingĩvĩte
Job4:4 Ndeto syaku nitw'ĩĩkaa ũla ũkilĩlye kũvalũka
Job4:5 Yu nĩ ĩvinda yaku ya thĩna
Job4:6 Kĩkĩo kya Ngai
Job4:7 Kwasũanĩa yu
Job4:8 Nĩnonete andũ maiĩmĩa ũthũku na kũvanda thĩna; yu meketha ũthũku na thĩna.
Job4:9 Ta kĩuutani kĩnene
Job4:10 Andũ athũku nĩmalulumaa na kũkooma ta mĩnyambũ
Job4:11 Ta mĩnyambũ ĩte na kĩndũ ĩtonya kũaa na kũya
Job4:12 “Ĩvinda yĩmwe nĩnakwatie ũtũmani wa kĩmbithĩ
Job4:13 Ũtukũ ũmwe ngomete ngĩota
Job4:14 nĩnakwatiwe nĩ w'ĩa na kĩtetemo
Job4:15 Nĩneewie kaũseve kavĩtĩla ũthyũ
Job4:16 Nĩnoonaa kĩndũ kĩũngamĩte vau
Job4:17 ‘Ve mũndũ wĩthĩwa e mũlũngalu mbee wa Ngai? Mũndũ nĩwĩthĩwa e mũtheu mbee wa Mũmbi wake?
Job4:18 Ethĩwa Ngai ndaĩkĩĩaa athũkũmi make
Job4:19 wĩsũanĩa akaĩkĩĩa syũmbe sya yũmba
Job4:20 Mũndũ nũtonya kwĩthĩwa e thayũ kwakya
Job4:21 Kyonthe kĩla wĩ nakyo nĩkyosawa; akusaa o na atanamba kwĩthĩwa na ũĩ.’”
Job5:1 “Yovu
Job5:2 Kwa w'o
Job5:3 Nĩnonete ndia ĩilyĩ ta mbĩanĩe
Job5:4 Syana syayo iyĩthĩawa ũsũvĩonĩ
Job5:5 Kĩla ndia yaketha
Job5:6 Nũndũ ũthũku ndwĩanaa kuma mũthanganĩ
Job5:7 Aiee
Job5:8 “Ĩndĩ kethĩwa ninyie
Job5:9 Tũitonya kũelewa nĩ maũndũ manene ala Ngai wĩkaa
Job5:10 Nĩwuasya mbua ĩũlũ wa nthĩ
Job5:11 Nũnenevasya ala menyivasya
Job5:12 Nĩwanangaa mĩvango ya nzeleke
Job5:13 Nũkwatĩasya ala oĩ ũselekenĩ woo
Job5:14 Nĩmonaa kĩvindu mũthenya
Job5:15 Ĩndĩ Ngai nũtangĩĩaa ngya kuma kĩkw'ũnĩ
Job5:16 Kwoou nũnengae ngya wĩkwatyo
Job5:17 “Mũndũ ũla ũkanaw'a nĩ Ngai e vaseo
Job5:18 Nũndũ nũũmĩasya na ayova kũla waũmĩsya
Job5:19 Walika mũisyonĩ akakũtetheeasya ĩvinda yonthe; o na wĩ thĩnanĩ mũnene akakũsũvĩa ndũkaũmĩw'e.
Job5:20 Kwooka yũa
Job5:21 Ngai akakũsũvĩana na nzukũ nthũku
Job5:22 Ĩvindanĩ ya wanangĩko na ya yũa ũkathekaa
Job5:23 Mũũndanĩ waku ndũkathĩnw'a nĩ mavia
Job5:24 Ũkekalaa na mũuo ĩeemanĩ yaku; yĩla wasisya malondu maku ũkeethĩaa me ũsũvĩonĩ.
Job5:25 Ũkeethĩwa na nzyawa mbingĩ
Job5:26 Ta nganũ ĩla ĩendeeaa na kũvika nginya ĩvinda ya ngetha
Job5:27 Yovu
Job6:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yovu wasũngĩie asya atĩĩ
Job6:2 “Kethĩwa mathĩna makwa nĩmathimwa
Job6:3 ũito wasyo wĩthĩwa wĩ mwingĩ mbee wa ũito wa kĩthangathĩ kya ũkanga
Job6:4 Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe nũmbathĩte na maangi
Job6:5 Nĩkũlya
Job6:6 Kĩndũ kĩte mũsamo nĩkĩĩka kĩte mũnyũ
Job6:7 Ngoo yakwa ndyendaa lĩu ũilyĩ ũu
Job6:8 “Kethĩwa Ngai nũnenga kĩla neetya
Job6:9 Kethĩwa Ngai nũkĩta kũmbũaa! Kethĩwa nũtambũũkya kw'oko kwake akandilany'a!
Job6:10 Ũsu wĩthĩwa ũkiakisyo kwakwa
Job6:11 Ndi na vinya wa kũendeea kwĩkala thayũ. Ndonya kwĩkala thayũ nde na wĩkwatyo ata?
Job6:12 Vinya wakwa ti ũndũ ũmwe na wa ĩvia
Job6:13 Ndi na vinya ndonya kwĩtethya naw'o
Job6:14 “Mũndũ ũkw'ĩte ngoo aĩlĩte kwĩthĩwa na anyanyae meyumĩtye
Job6:15 Ĩndĩ inyw'ĩ anyanyawa
Job6:16 Twĩthĩawa na kĩw'ũ kĩtw'ĩkĩte mbalavu ĩũlũ
Job6:17 ĩndĩ kwavyũva nithelaa
Job6:18 Aendi ma kyalo mesĩlĩte weũnĩ na nyamũ syoo sya kũkua mĩio nĩmaasya nzĩa
Job6:19 Aendi ma kyalo kuma Tema nĩmamanthaa kĩw'ũ
Job6:20 Nĩmakusaa ngoo nũndũ meĩ na wĩkwatyo
Job6:21 Mũtw'ĩkĩte ta tũlũsĩ tũu kũla nĩĩ
Job6:22 Naamũkũlya mũnenge mũthĩnzĩo
Job6:23 kana mũndangĩĩe kuma kwa mũmaitha wakwa
Job6:24 “Manyĩsyei
Job6:25 Ndeto syaw'o syĩ vinya mwingĩ
Job6:26 Nĩmũkũlya
Job6:27 Inyw'ĩ o na nĩmũtonya kũkũna kula kwondũ wa syana ndiwa
Job6:28 Ĩndĩ yu kwa nzisyei
Job6:29 Ekai
Job6:30 Ve ũndũ naneena ũtaĩlĩte? Mwĩsũanĩa kana nditonya kũvathũkany'a ũseo na ũthũku?”
Job7:1 “Nĩkũlya
Job7:2 Ailyĩ ngombo ĩkũmantha muunyĩ
Job7:3 Kwoou nĩmbangĩwe myei ya mana
Job7:4 Yĩla nakoma nĩkũlasya
Job7:5 Mwĩĩ wakwa wusũĩte iinyũ na kĩko; kĩkonde kyakwa nĩkĩnyiau
Job7:6 Mĩthenya yakwa ĩsembete mbee wa katĩla ka mũndũ ũla ũtumaa
Job7:7 Ame Mwĩai Ngai
Job7:8 Metho ma mũndũ ũla ũmbonaa maikambona ĩngĩ
Job7:9 O tondũ ĩtu yĩthelekelasya yĩkaa
Job7:10 Ndasyokaa nyũmba kwake ĩngĩ
Job7:11 “Kwoou ndivindya; nĩngũneena nĩ thĩnanĩ wa thayũ wakwa; nĩngũnyungunyĩsya nũndũ wa thĩna wa thayũ wakwa.
Job7:12 Nĩkũlya
Job7:13 Yĩla naneena nasya
Job7:14 nĩvo ĩndĩ ũndeteae ndoto syĩ w'ĩa
Job7:15 ũkethĩa nĩona nĩ kavaa nĩnyuve kwitwa nĩkw'e
Job7:16 Nĩngũmena thayũ wakwa; ndikekala thayũ tene na tene
Job7:17 Mũndũ nĩ kyaũ nĩ kana ũmwĩke maũndũ manenevete ũu
Job7:18 Kĩla kwakya nũmanyaa ũvoo wake
Job7:19 Wĩendeea kũnzisya nginya ĩndĩĩ
Job7:20 Ethĩwa nĩneeka naĩ
Job7:21 Wĩlea kũndekea mavĩtyo makwa nĩkĩ
Job8:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Mbilitati kuma nthĩ ya Sui wasũngĩie asya atĩĩ
Job8:2 “Wĩendeea kũneena ndeto sya mũthemba ũsu nginya ĩndĩĩ? Ndeto syaku nĩ ta kĩseve kĩ na vinya.
Job8:3 Nĩkũlya
Job8:4 Yĩla syana syaku syamũvĩtĩisye Ngai
Job8:5 Ĩndĩ ethĩwa nũũmũmantha Ngai
Job8:6 ethĩwa wĩ mũtheu na wĩ mũlũngalu
Job8:7 Kĩla waĩ nakyo mbeenĩ kyaĩ kĩnini kĩisianĩw'a na ũthwii ũla wĩĩthĩwa naw'o
Job8:8 “Kũlya nzyawa sya ĩvinda ya tene; na ũimanya kĩla aaũmae moo meesĩ
Job8:9 nĩkwĩthĩwa ithyĩ tũnasyaiwe mĩtũkĩ
Job8:10 Ĩndĩ eka aaũmau ala oĩ makũmanyĩsye; ĩthukĩĩsye ũndũ meũkwĩa.
Job8:11 “Makangaa nĩmatonya kũmea vandũ vate kĩsoo? Makaangaa nĩmatonya kwĩanĩa nesa vandũ vate kĩw'ũ?
Job8:12 Maendee kwĩana matanamba kũtemwa
Job8:13 Mũminũkĩlyo wa ala molawa nĩ Ngai ũilyĩ ũu; wĩkwatyo wa ala matamwĩsĩ Ngai waa ũu.
Job8:14 Kĩla maĩkĩĩaa nĩ kĩndũ kĩtonya kũkw'a; kĩla mekwatasya nĩ ũlũalũĩ.
Job8:15 Nĩmeyaĩĩasya ũlũalũĩnĩ ũsu
Job8:16 “Ala athũku mailyĩ ta mũtĩ wĩ syũanĩ mũnyithye nesa
Job8:17 wovanasya mbumbu ya mavia na mĩi yaw'o
Job8:18 Ĩndĩ yĩla nthongoo isu syakũwa
Job8:19 Kwa w'o ũsu nĩw'o mũminũkĩlyo wa ũtanu wa mũndũ mũthũku
Job8:20 “Kwa w'o Ngai ndaleaa mũndũ mũlũngalu
Job8:21 Ũu wĩ o vo akatuma ũtheka mũno
Job8:22 Amaitha maku makakwatwa nĩ nthoni
Job9:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yovu wasũngĩie asya atĩĩ
Job9:2 “Nĩnĩsĩ nesa kana ũu nĩ wa w'o
Job9:3 Ethĩwa mũndũ nũkwenda kũkananĩa nake
Job9:4 Ngai nĩ mũĩ mũno na e ũtonyi mwingĩ; ve mũndũ ũtonya kũkita nake akamũsinda?
Job9:5 Nũthamasya iĩma itesĩ kana nũkwĩka ũu
Job9:6 Ngai nũthingithasya nthĩ kuma wambĩlĩĩlyonĩ wayo
Job9:7 Nĩwĩyĩaĩaa syũa yĩkalea kuma
Job9:8 We e weka nĩwe watambũũkisye matu
Job9:9 Nĩwe waseũvisye ndata ila syĩtawa: Ayisi
Job9:10 Nĩwĩkaa syama na maũndũ matamanyĩka
Job9:11 Yĩla Ngai wambĩtũka
Job9:12 Nĩwosaa kĩla ũkwenda na vai mũndũ ũtonya kũmũsiĩĩa; vai mũndũ ũmũkũlasya
Job9:13 Ngai ndakasiĩĩa ũthatu wake; o na atetheesya ma Laavi nĩmakumanaa mbee wake.
Job9:14 Yu ĩndĩ ndonya ata kũkananĩa nake? Ndonya ata kũmantha ndeto sya kũkananĩa nake?
Job9:15 O na kau ndi na ĩvĩtyo
Job9:16 O na ethĩwa nĩnamwĩtie na eetĩka
Job9:17 Nũkũmbananga na kĩuutani
Job9:18 Ndakandeka nĩveve
Job9:19 Ethĩwa nĩ kũweta vinya
Job9:20 O na kau nĩ mũlũngalu
Job9:21 O na kau nditũlwa mũtĩ
Job9:22 Maũndũ onthe no ũndũ ũmwe; kĩu nĩkyo kĩtumi ngwasya
Job9:23 Yĩla mathĩna matuma kĩkw'ũ kyũka kwa kĩthũlũmũko
Job9:24 Yĩla nthĩ yeethĩwa yĩ ũtonyinĩ wa andũ athũku
Job9:25 Mĩthenya yakwa ĩendete mĩtũkĩ mbee wa mũndũ asembete; nĩvĩtaa mĩtũkĩ na ndĩthĩawa na ũtanu.
Job9:26 Ĩvĩtĩte mĩtũkĩ ta ĩsiwa yĩla yĩsembaa vyũ; yĩkalaatĩte ta ndiũ ĩtheete ĩkakwate kĩndũ.
Job9:27 Ethĩwa nĩnaneena na kwasya
Job9:28 nĩendeeaa kũkĩa mathĩna makwa onthe
Job9:29 Nũndũ nĩnĩminĩte kwĩthĩwa nĩ na ĩvĩtyo
Job9:30 O na ngathamba na savunĩ
Job9:31 ũu wĩ o vo
Job9:32 Nũndũ Ngai ti mũndũ takwa ũkethĩa nĩndonya kũmũsũngĩa
Job9:33 Ĩndĩ vai mũndũ wa kũlikĩlĩĩla katĩ waitũ
Job9:34 Ngai nĩaeke kũngany'a
Job9:35 Nĩvo ĩndĩ nĩneena ndeũmũkĩa
Job10:1 “Nĩnĩmenete thayũ wakwa; nĩngũnyungunyĩsya vate kĩsiĩĩi. Nĩneena nũndũ wa woo wa thayũ wakwa.
Job10:2 We Ngai ndũkandalĩle ĩvĩtyo
Job10:3 Nĩkũlya
Job10:4 Nĩkũlya
Job10:5 Nĩkũlya
Job10:6 nĩ kana ũmanthe mavĩtyo makwa
Job10:7 Nowĩsĩ kana ndi na ĩvĩtyo
Job10:8 Moko maku nĩmangwatanisye na mambũmba
Job10:9 Lilikana kana wambũmbie na yũmba; nĩkũlya
Job10:10 Ndwambonoisye ta kĩw'ũ ĩvunĩ ya inyia wakwa
Job10:11 Nĩwoombie mwĩĩ wakwa kwa kũkwatany'a mavĩndĩ na malangũ
Job10:12 Nũnengete thayũ na ũkambenda
Job10:13 Ĩndĩ yu nĩnamanya kana ĩvinda yonthe
Job10:14 Ũnasyaĩĩsye wone kana nĩngwĩka naĩ
Job10:15 Yĩla neeka naĩ
Job10:16 Ethĩwa nĩnĩendee nesa
Job10:17 Kĩla ĩvinda nũndeteae ngũsĩ imbũkite
Job10:18 “Wambumisye ĩvunĩ ya inyia wakwa nĩkĩ? Kava kethĩwa nakwie mũndũ o na wĩva atanambona.
Job10:19 Kava kethĩwa nasyawa nĩnakwie na ngĩthikwa mĩtũkĩ
Job10:20 Nĩkũlya
Job10:21 Ndanamba kũthi kũndũ ndakasyoka
Job10:22 nthĩ yĩ kĩvindu kĩkamu na yĩ kĩthokoo
Job11:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Nzovali kuma nthĩ ya Naamathi wasũngĩie akũlya atĩĩ
Job11:2 “Ndeto isu syonthe niũlea kũsũngĩwa? Mũndũ ũyũ ũneenete ndeto singĩvĩte ũu atonya ata kũtalĩlwa ũlũngalu?
Job11:3 Wĩsũanĩa ũneeni waku wa mana nũũtuma andũ makilya? Mũndũ ũla ũvũthasya akalea kũkanw'a?
Job11:4 Ũneenaa ũkasya
Job11:5 Nenda kethĩwa Ngai nũneena naku
Job11:6 Ngai no akũtavye syĩmbithĩ sya ũĩ
Job11:7 “Kwa w'o we nũtonya kũmanya syĩmbithĩ sya Ngai? We nũtonya kũmanya ũndũ ũnene wa Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe wĩana?
Job11:8 Wĩ ĩũlũ mbee wa matu. We ũtonya kwĩka ata! Nĩ mũliku mbee wa ũliku wa vala maveva ma ala akw'ũ mekalaa. We ũtonya kũmanya kyaũ?
Job11:9 Kĩthimo kyaw'o nĩ kĩasa mbee wa nthĩ
Job11:10 “Ethĩwa Ngai akakwata mũndũ amwove yela na kũmũtwaa kĩsilĩlonĩ
Job11:11 Kwa w'o Ngai nũmanyaa andũ ala me ũvũngũ
Job11:12 Mũndũ mũtumanu ndatonya kũĩva
Job11:13 “Ĩndĩ wamũnenga Ngai ngoo yaku
Job11:14 ethĩwa ũkaeka kwĩka naĩ
Job11:15 ũkeethĩwa ũte na nthoni; ũkaũngama na ũlũmu ũte na w'ĩa.
Job11:16 Ũkoolwa nĩ mathĩna maku; ũkamalilikanaa o ta kĩw'ũ kyavĩtie.
Job11:17 Thayũ waku ũkatisatisaa mbee wa syũa saa sita
Job11:18 Ũkeethĩawa na ũkũmbaũ nũndũ ve wĩkwatyo; Ngai akakũsũvĩa na ũkũnenga ũthũmũo.
Job11:19 Ũkakomaa na vai mũndũ ũkakũtelemya; andũ aingĩ makavoyaa ũtethyo kwaku.
Job11:20 Ĩndĩ andũ athũku makaeka kwona; makaaĩwa nĩ nzĩa ya kũkĩa nayo. Wĩkwatyo woo wa mũthya nĩ kũkw'a.”
Job12:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yovu wasũngĩie asya atĩĩ
Job12:2 “Vate nzika ninyw'ĩ wasya wa andũ
Job12:3 Ĩndĩ o nakwa nĩ na ũĩ wĩanene na ũla mwĩ naw'o; nyie ndi mũnini kĩlĩkonĩ kwĩ inyw'ĩ ũndũnĩ o na wĩva. Ũla ũtesĩ maũndũ asu onthe mwaneena nũũ?
Job12:4 Ndw'ĩkĩte kĩndũ kya kũthekeewa nĩ anyanyawa; nyie ũla navoyaa Ngai akanzũngĩa
Job12:5 Andũ ala mate na mathĩna
Job12:6 Ĩndĩ ing'ei na ala matamwĩsĩ Ngai mekalaa na mũuo
Job12:7 “Ĩndĩ we kũlya nyamũ
Job12:8 kũlya nthĩ
Job12:9 Nĩ kĩva katĩ wa syĩndũ isu kĩla kĩtesĩ
Job12:10 Thayũ wa syũmbe syonthe
Job12:11 Nĩkũlya
Job12:12 Ũĩ wĩ andũnĩ ala akũũ
Job12:13 Ũĩ na ũtonyi nĩ sya Ngai; ũtao na ũmanyi nĩ syake.
Job12:14 Ngai aomboa vai ũtonya kwaka; oova mũndũ vai ũtonya kũmũthasya.
Job12:15 Asiĩĩa mbua
Job12:16 “Vinya na ũsindi nĩ syake; ũla ũkengawa na ũla ũkenganaa nĩ make.
Job12:17 Nũekaa ala manenganae ũtao makathi mate ngũa; na kũtuma atongoi meka ta andũ atumanu.
Job12:18 Nũvenaa asumbĩ ũsumbĩ woo
Job12:19 Nũekaa athembi makathi mate ngũa
Job12:20 Nũvindĩthasya atai ala aĩkĩĩe
Job12:21 Nĩwĩkĩĩthasya nthoni ala me ũtonyi
Job12:22 Nũvuanasya maũndũ maliku makoka kyeninĩ
Job12:23 Nũtumaa mbaĩ ineneva na nũsyanangaa; nũtumaa mbaĩ syĩthĩwa na vinya na nĩwivalaanasya.
Job12:24 Nũvetaa ũmanyi atongoinĩ ma andũ ma nthĩ; na nũtumaa maenda mangangĩte weũnĩ ũte nzĩa.
Job12:25 Nũtumaa maenda mavavatĩte kĩvindunĩ ta ilalinda; na nũtumaa maenda malũĩte ta athengi.”
Job13:1 “Metho makwa nĩmonete maũndũ asu onthe; matũ makwa nĩmew'ĩte na nĩnĩmanyĩte maũndũ asu.
Job13:2 Maũndũ ala mwĩsĩ o nakwa nĩnĩmesĩ; nyie ndi mũnini kĩlĩkonĩ kwĩ inyw'ĩ.
Job13:3 Ĩndĩ nyie nĩenda kũneena na Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe; nĩenda kwĩtetea vala ve Ngai.
Job13:4 Ĩndĩ inyw'ĩ mwĩvw'ĩka ũw'o mũitũmĩa ũvũngũ; inyw'onthe mwĩ ndakĩtalĩ sya mana.
Job13:5 Mwa kethĩwa no mũvindya
Job13:6 “Yu ĩthukĩĩsyei mosũanĩo makwa; ĩthukĩĩsyei kwĩsũvana kwakwa.
Job13:7 Mwĩsũanĩa mwĩthũkũma Ngai yĩla mũũneena ũvũngũ? Mwĩsũanĩa kana yĩla mũũkengana mwĩkengana kwondũ wa Ngai?
Job13:8 Mwĩenda kwonany'a wendeesyo vala ve Ngai? Mũkatetea Ngai kĩsilĩlonĩ?
Job13:9 Nĩkũlya
Job13:10 Vate nzika Ngai akamũkany'a inyw'ĩ
Job13:11 Ũnene wake ndũtonya kũmũtelemya? Inyw'ĩ mũikwatawa nĩ w'ĩa nũndũ wake?
Job13:12 Nthimo syenyu nĩ sya mana o ta mũu; kwĩtetea kyenyu kũmonyokaa ta ndaka.
Job13:13 Vindyai na mũieka nĩneene
Job13:14 “Nyie nĩnĩyũmbanĩtye kũlikya thayũ wakwa mũisyonĩ.
Job13:15 Ngai nĩambũae
Job13:16 No vatonyeka ũkethĩa ũkũmbaũ wakwa ũkandangĩĩa
Job13:17 Ĩthukĩĩsyei ndeto syakwa nesa; matũ menyu nĩmew'e ũndũ ngwasya.
Job13:18 Nĩkwĩthĩwa nĩnĩyũmbanĩsye ĩkoani yakwa nesa
Job13:19 “Ve mũndũ ũtonya kũneenany'a nakwa ũndũnĩ o na wĩva? Kethĩwa nĩmwonany'a kana nĩ na mavĩtyo
Job13:20 Ame Ngai
Job13:21 Eka kũngany'a
Job13:22 We Ngai amba kũneena
Job13:23 Nyie nĩkĩte mavĩtyo na naĩ syĩana ata? Mbony'e ĩvĩtyo na naĩ yakwa.
Job13:24 “Ũmbĩvithaa nĩkĩ? Wonaa ta nĩ mũmaitha waku nĩkĩ?
Job13:25 We nũũndelemya o na kau nĩilyĩ ta ĩtũ yĩũlũkĩtw'e nĩ kĩseve
Job13:26 We Ngai ũnzikatĩte na mavĩtyo me woo; nũtumĩte nĩkua naĩ ila neekie nĩ wa mũika.
Job13:27 Nũmbovete maũũ na mĩtĩ ya kwova andũ; nũsyaĩĩasya vyũ nzĩa syonthe ila nĩendelaa
Job13:28 Kwondũ wa ũu nyie nĩthelaa ta mũtĩ mwou
Job14:1 “Mũndũ ũla ũsyaĩtwe nĩ mũndũ mũka
Job14:2 Nĩwĩanaa ta ĩlaa na ayũma; o ta kyuu kĩla kĩvĩtaa
Job14:3 Ame Ngai
Job14:4 Nũũ ũla ũtonya kumya kĩndũ kĩtheu kuma kĩndũnĩ kĩte kĩtheu? Vai mũndũ ũtonya!
Job14:5 Mĩthenya ya mũndũ nĩ mĩtale; we Ngai nũminĩte kũvanga ũtalo wa myei yake
Job14:6 Kwondũ wa ũu sisya ũtee na ũiekana nake
Job14:7 Ve wĩkwatyo kwa mũtĩ ũla ũminĩte kũtemwa; mũtĩ ũsu nũtonya kwĩthĩwa thayũ ĩngĩ na kũthongooa.
Job14:8 O na vala mĩi ya mũtĩ ũsu nĩtonya kũkũa
Job14:9 mũtĩ ũsu weew'a mũuke wa kĩw'ũ nũthongooaa
Job14:10 Ĩndĩ Mũndũ nũkusaa
Job14:11 “O ũndũ kĩw'ũ kĩng'alaa ũkanganĩ
Job14:12 now'o andũ makomaa nthĩ na mailea kũkĩla ĩngĩ; andũ maikokĩla nginya yĩla matu makathela
Job14:13 “Mwa kavaa kethĩwa nũmbitha mbũanĩ
Job14:14 Nĩkũlya
Job14:15 Nĩvo ĩndĩ wĩthĩwa ũtonya kwĩtana
Job14:16 Wĩthĩwa ũisyaĩĩsya kĩla ĩtambya ndambasya
Job14:17 Mavĩtyo makwa methĩwa mavingĩwa mũvukonĩ; naku wĩthĩwa ũvw'ĩka ũthũku wakwa.
Job14:18 “Ĩndĩ o tondũ iĩma iombokaa na kũvalũka
Job14:19 na o tondũ kĩw'ũ kĩĩsaa mavia
Job14:20 Ngai nũvalũkasya mũndũ
Job14:21 Syana syake syatw'ĩka andũ me ndaĩa
Job14:22 Mũndũ ew'aa kyalya kya mwĩĩ wake mwene
Job15:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Elivasi
Job15:2 “Mũndũ mũĩ nũsũngĩaa na ndeto sya mana
Job15:3 Mũndũ mũĩ nĩwĩteteaa na ndeto itaĩlĩte
Job15:4 Ĩndĩ we Yovu nũũtuma andũ methĩwa mate na kĩkĩo kya Ngai; na nũũtuma andũ maeka kwĩyumya kũla kwĩ Ngai.
Job15:5 Ũneeni waku nĩw'o ũkwonany'a ũthũku waku
Job15:6 Ndeto syaku mwene nĩsyo iũkũsilĩla ti inyie
Job15:7 “Wĩsũanĩa nue mũndũ wa mbee kũsyawa? Wasyaiwe iĩma itanamba kwĩthĩwa vo?
Job15:8 We waĩ nzamanĩ ya Ngai? Kana nue mũĩ wĩ weka?
Job15:9 Wĩsĩ ũndũ mwaũ ũla ithyĩ tũtesĩ? Ũeleawa nĩ ũndũ mwaũ ũla ithyĩ tũtaeleawa?
Job15:10 Katĩ waitũ ve atumĩa akũũ oĩ
Job15:11 Mokiakisyo ala Ngai ũkũnengae ko manini mũno? Kana ndeto yake ya ũuu kwaku ti kĩndũ?
Job15:12 Ngoo yaku yĩkũtongoesya kũthata nĩkĩ
Job15:13 nginya ũkathatĩa Ngai
Job15:14 Ve mũndũ ũtonya kwĩthĩwa e mũtheu? Ũla ũsyaĩtwe nĩ mũndũ mũka nũtonya kwĩthĩwa e mũlũngalu?
Job15:15 Ethĩwa Ngai ndaĩkĩĩaa o na alaĩka make
Job15:16 nĩ vinya mũno kũĩkĩĩa mũndũ
Job15:17 “Mbĩthukĩĩsye yu
Job15:18 maũndũ ala mamanyĩĩtw'e nĩ andũ oĩ
Job15:19 aaũmae ala no mo me oka
Job15:20 Mũndũ mũthũku athĩnaa mĩthenya yonthe ya thayũ wake
Job15:21 Mawasya ma kũtelemya mausũaa matũnĩ make
Job15:22 Mũndũ mũthũku ndethĩawa na wĩkwatyo wa kuma kĩvindunĩ; athĩĩwe kũawa na ũvyũ.
Job15:23 Nĩwangangaa aimantha lĩu aikũlya
Job15:24 Thĩna na woo
Job15:25 Maũndũ asu mekĩkaa nũndũ mũndũ ũsu nũkũnzĩe Ngai ngundi; nĩwĩkathĩĩe vala ve Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe.
Job15:26 Nũminĩte kũsemba na mĩng'athĩlĩĩlyo avithũkĩe Ngai
Job15:27 O na vala ũthyũ wake nĩ mũnou mũno
Job15:28 akatũa ndũanĩ ila syatiiwe syĩ nthei
Job15:29 Mũndũ ũsu ndakethĩwa e mũthwii o na ĩndĩĩ
Job15:30 Vate ndĩi ndakalea kũkw'a. Akeethĩwa ailyĩ mũtĩ ũla nthongoo syaw'o ivĩvĩtw'e nĩ mwaki
Job15:31 Nĩ aeke kwĩkenga kwa kwĩkwatya syĩndũ ite vata
Job15:32 Ailyĩ ta ũvonge ũla ũvovaa ĩvinda yaw'o yĩtanavika
Job15:33 Akeethĩwa ailyĩ ta mũsavivũ
Job15:34 Onthe ala matakĩaa Ngai maikethĩwa na syana
Job15:35 Nĩmaitavaa ũseleke na maisyaa ũthũku
Job16:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yovu wasũngĩie asya atĩĩ
Job16:2 “Nĩnĩw'ĩte maũndũ maingĩ ta asu; inyw'onthe mwĩ akiakisya ma kũthĩny'a!
Job16:3 Ũneeni wenyu wa mana ũkathela ĩndĩĩ? Kana nĩ kyaũ kĩla kĩũtuma mwenda kũendeea kũneena?
Job16:4 Kethĩwa inyw'ĩ nĩmũtw'ĩka nyie
Job16:5 Nĩthĩwa nĩmwĩkĩa vinya na ũtao wakwa
Job16:6 Ĩndĩ o na naneena kyalya kyakwa kĩiũthela
Job16:7 Kwa w'o Ngai nũminĩte vinya wakwa
Job16:8 Nũmbovete ngalũma
Job16:9 Ngai nũndembũangĩte e na woo na akamena; ambevetanĩsye maeo make nĩ kĩmena; mũmaitha wakwa nũngũnũĩaa metho make e na woo.
Job16:10 Andũ nĩmanthaũkĩaa na kũnthekeea
Job16:11 Ngai nũnenganĩte mokonĩ ma andũ me ngũlũ
Job16:12 Nĩnekalaa na mũuo
Job16:13 nũngathĩte na maangi kuma ngalĩko syonthe
Job16:14 Nũnũmĩĩtye mavinda maingĩ
Job16:15 Nĩnĩkĩĩte ngũa ngaamu sya makunia
Job16:16 Ũthyũ wakwa nũtukĩte nũndũ wa kũĩa
Job16:17 Ĩndĩ ũu wĩ o vo
Job16:18 Nĩilyĩ ta mũndũ mũae; vaikethĩwe mũndũ o na ũmwe ũvitha ĩvĩtyo yĩĩ.
Job16:19 O na yu ngũsĩ yakwa yĩ ĩtunĩ
Job16:20 Anyanyawa nĩmambũthasya; nĩtĩkasya methoi ngĩvoya Ngai.
Job16:21 Mwa kethĩwa ve o mũndũ ũmbĩsũvanĩa vala ve Ngai
Job16:22 Nyie ndialĩtye myaka mĩnini
Job18:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Mbilitati kuma nthĩ ya Sui
Job18:2 “Wĩneena nginya ĩndĩĩ? Neena maũndũ ũsũanĩĩte nesa
Job18:3 We wĩtũtw'ĩkĩthya ng'ombe nĩkĩ? Wĩona twĩ atumanu nĩkĩ?
Job18:4 We wĩĩka kwĩyĩũmĩsya na ũthatu waku. Wĩona nthĩ ta ĩtonya kũtiwa yĩ nthei nũndũ waku? Wĩona iĩma ta ithamw'a nĩ kana wĩanĩwe?
Job18:5 Kyeni kya mũndũ mũthũku kĩkavow'a; ũmũĩ wa mwaki wake ndũkakena ĩngĩ.
Job18:6 Kyeni kĩla kĩ nyũmbanĩ yake kĩkatw'ĩka kĩvindu; taa ũla wĩ vakuvĩ nake ũkavoa.
Job18:7 Vinya wa matambya make ũkaolwa; mĩvango yake mwene nĩmũvalũkasya.
Job18:8 Maũũ make nĩmamũlikasya kĩteinĩ
Job18:9 Kĩtei nĩkĩmũkwatĩlasya kĩtiinyonĩ
Job18:10 Mũndũ ũsu nũvithĩwe kĩtei kya ĩkanda nthĩ
Job18:11 Motĩsyo maingĩ nĩmamũtelemasya kuma kĩla ngalĩko
Job18:12 Vinya wake nũminĩtwe nĩ nzaa; thĩna mũnene nũmweteele avalũka.
Job18:13 Ũwau mũthũku nũĩsaa kĩkonde kyake
Job18:14 Nĩwumaw'a ũsũvĩonĩ wa nyũmba yake
Job18:15 Vai kĩndũ kĩtialĩte nyũmbanĩ yake
Job18:16 Ethĩawa ta mũtĩ ũla wũmaa kuma mĩinĩ
Job18:17 Ĩũlũ wa nthĩ vai mũndũ ũkamũlilikana
Job18:18 Mũndũ ũsu nũsembethaw'a kuma nthĩ ya ala me thayũ
Job18:19 Ndethĩawa na syana kana nzũkũlũ katĩ wa andũ make
Job18:20 Andũ ma ũthũĩlonĩ wa syũa nĩmasaanĩaw'a nĩ kĩla kĩmũkwatĩte
Job18:21 Kwa w'o asu nĩmo maũndũ ala makwataa mũndũ ũla ũtakĩaa Ngai
Job19:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yovu wasũngĩie asya atĩĩ
Job19:2 “Mwĩendeea kũnthĩny'a
Job19:3 Nĩmũnumangĩte mavinda maingĩ; inyw'ĩ mũikwĩw'a nthoni mũimbĩka naĩ?
Job19:4 O na ethĩwa nĩ w'o nĩmbĩtĩtye
Job19:5 Mwĩsũanĩa kana ninyw'ĩ aseo kũte nyie
Job19:6 Ĩndĩ manyai kana nĩ Ngai ũmbĩkĩte naĩ
Job19:7 O na vala nĩnĩkayĩte ngasya
Job19:8 Ngai nũvingĩte nzĩa syakwa syonthe ũkethĩa nditonya kũvĩta; nũvw'ĩkĩte nzĩa syakwa na kĩvindu.
Job19:9 Ngai nũmbenete ndaĩa yakwa yonthe
Job19:10 Nũndembũangĩte ngalĩko syonthe nginya ngathela; nũkũĩte wĩkwatyo wakwa ta mũtĩ.
Job19:11 Ũthatu wake wĩ ĩũlũ wakwa
Job19:12 Nguthu syake sya asikalĩ ma kaũ syũkaa syĩ vamwe
Job19:13 Ngai nũtumĩte ana-a-asa makwa mandia
Job19:14 Andũ makwa ma mũsyĩ nĩmaendete kũasa
Job19:15 Aeni ala mookaa mũsyĩ kwakwa nĩmolĩtwe ninyie; athũkũmi makwa ma aka mambosaa ta nĩ mũndũ matesĩ. Mambonaa ta nĩ mũeni
Job19:16 Nĩtaa mũthũkũmi wakwa ĩndĩ ailea kwĩtĩka
Job19:17 Kĩveti kyakwa kĩitonya kũmĩĩsya mũuke wa mĩthũmũ yakwa; nĩtw'ĩkĩte kĩndũ kĩte kya kwendeesya kwa ana ma mwaitũ.
Job19:18 O na twana tũla tũnini nĩtũmbũthasya
Job19:19 “Anyanyawa ala twĩsene mũno nĩmandeaa
Job19:20 Mwĩĩ wakwa ũtialĩte mavĩndĩ na kĩkonde
Job19:21 Mbĩw'ĩei tei inyw'ĩ anyanyawa
Job19:22 Inyw'ĩ mũnthĩnĩtye o ũndũ Ngai ũnthĩnĩtye nĩkĩ? Mũinesa kwĩanĩwa nĩ thĩna ũla mũnengete?
Job19:23 “Mwa kethĩwa ndeto syakwa niandĩkwa! Mwa kethĩwa niandĩkwa ĩvukunĩ!
Job19:24 Mwa kethĩwa niandĩkwa ĩvianĩ kwa kũtemeleelwa na kĩandĩki kya kyũma
Job19:25 Nũndũ nyie nĩnĩsĩ kana Mwovosya wakwa e thayũ
Job19:26 O na ĩtina wa kĩkonde kyakwa kwanangĩka
Job19:27 Nyie mwene ngamwona
Job19:28 Ethĩwa inyw'ĩ mwĩkũlya
Job19:29 inyw'ĩ ene nĩmwaĩlĩte kũkĩa ũkany'o
Job20:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Nzovali kuma Naamathi wasũngĩie asya atĩĩ
Job20:2 “Mosũanĩo makwa nĩmeũtuma nenda ũkũsũngĩa
Job20:3 Ndeto ila waneena nĩ sya kũumana
Job20:4 “Kwa w'o we nĩwĩsĩ kana kuma tene
Job20:5 ũtanu wa mũndũ mũthũku ndwĩkalaa ĩvinda ĩasa
Job20:6 O na ethĩwa nguma yake yambataa nginya matunĩ
Job20:7 mũndũ ũsu akaa tene na tene ta kĩtoo kĩla kĩũlũkaw'a nĩ kĩseve; andũ ala mamwĩsĩ makakũlasya
Job20:8 Akaa ta ndoto
Job20:9 Andũ ala mamwonie maikamwona ĩngĩ; mũsyĩ wake ndũkamwona ĩngĩ.
Job20:10 Syana syake ikamantha ũseo kuma kwa ngya
Job20:11 Mwĩĩ wake
Job20:12 Kanyw'anĩ wake ũthũku wĩ mũyo
Job20:13 Ndendaa kũekana naw'o o na vanini
Job20:14 Ĩndĩ ĩvunĩ yake lĩu wake nũmeasya wũũ
Job20:15 Mũndũ mũthũku akatavĩka ũthwii ũla wooyie
Job20:16 Kĩla mũndũ mũthũku ũmelasya nĩ ta sumu
Job20:17 Ndakatanĩa mbũsĩ
Job20:18 No nginya atũnge syĩndũ ila ũthũkũmĩte akakwata atanamba kũitũmĩa; ndakatanĩa ũsyao ũla ũkwatĩte kumana na kũtandĩthya kwake.
Job20:19 Nũndũ nũthĩnĩtye ngya na akaitia ite na kĩndũ; mũndũ ũsu nĩwosete nyũmba ila ũtaaka.
Job20:20 Nũndũ ĩtomo yake yĩithelaa
Job20:21 Vai kĩndũ kĩtialaa amina kũya lĩu
Job20:22 Yĩla wĩĩthĩwa e na kĩla kĩndũ
Job20:23 Aendee kũvũnĩthya ĩvu yake
Job20:24 O na vala nũsembaa akĩĩte mũio wa kaũ wa kyũma
Job20:25 Nũyĩkũaa kuma mũongonĩ wake
Job20:26 Ũthwii wake ũkaanangĩka vyũ; mwaki ũla ũtaakwatw'a nĩ mũndũ ũkamũmina; ũkamina kĩla kĩtialĩte nyũmba kwake.
Job20:27 Ĩtu yĩkaumĩlya mavĩtyo make ũtheinĩ
Job20:28 Ũthwii wake w'onthe ũkaanangwa
Job20:29 Kĩu nĩkyo Ngai ũnengae mũndũ mũthũku
Job21:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yovu wasũngĩie asya atĩĩ
Job21:2 “Ĩthukĩĩsyei ndeto syakwa nesa
Job21:3 Ũmĩĩsyai nambe kũneena
Job21:4 “Nyie ndiũnyungunyĩsya kũla kwĩ mũndũ
Job21:5 Nzisyei na mũisaanĩw'a
Job21:6 Nasũanĩa maũndũ ala mangwatĩte
Job21:7 Nĩkũlya
Job21:8 Nĩmonaa syana syoo iyĩendeea nesa
Job21:9 Mekalaa na mũuo nyũmbanĩ syoo mateũkĩa; Ngai ndamakanasya.
Job21:10 Kĩla ĩvinda moi yavingĩanĩw'a na nzaũ nĩsyaa
Job21:11 Twana twoo tũithaũka nĩtũthaanyũkangaa ta tũtena twa malondu. Nĩtũsũngaa
Job21:12 na kwina wathi ũkũnĩtwe ndambulĩnĩ na ngitaa nini
Job21:13 Mĩthenya ya thayũ woo yĩthĩawa na moseo
Job21:14 Andũ athũku meaa Ngai atĩĩ
Job21:15 Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe nĩwe ũũ
Job21:16 Maasya maendeeaa nesa kumana na vinya woo
Job21:17 Nĩkũlya
Job21:18 na kũmaũlũkya ũndũ mavuti maũlũkaw'a nĩ kĩseve
Job21:19 Inyw'ĩ mwĩasya
Job21:20 Eki ma naĩ nĩmakwate ũkany'o woo ene
Job21:21 Thayũ woo wa kũũ ĩũlũ wa nthĩ wathela
Job21:22 Ve mũndũ ũtonya kũmanyĩsya Ngai
Job21:23 Andũ amwe nĩmakusaa mena vinya w'onthe
Job21:24 mĩĩ yoo yĩ na mauta
Job21:25 Angĩ nĩmakusaa me na woo ngoonĩ
Job21:26 Ĩndĩ onthe makw'a mathikawa mũthanganĩ
Job21:27 Nĩnĩsĩ mosũanĩo menyu
Job21:28 Inyw'ĩ mũkũlasya
Job21:29 No mwaakũlya aendi ma kyalo? No mwaaĩthukĩĩsya ũndũ maisye
Job21:30 kana mũndũ mũthũku nũsũvĩawa ĩvindanĩ ya wanangĩko
Job21:31 Vai mũndũ ũsikataa ũla mũthũku
Job21:32 Mũndũ mũthũku nũtwaawa mbũanĩ
Job21:33 Andũ aingĩ nĩmaendaa mathikonĩ make
Job21:34 Kwoou mũtonya ata kũngiakisya na ndeto sya mana? Vai ũndũ ũngĩ ũtiele kuma mosũngĩonĩ menyu ate o ũvũngũ.”
Job22:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Elivasi
Job22:2 “Mũndũ nũtonya kũtethya Ngai na ũndũ o na wĩva? O na mũndũ ũla mũĩ vyũ no amũtethye?
Job22:3 Nĩkũlya
Job22:4 Kwĩthĩwa wĩ na kĩkĩo nĩkw'o kũtumaa akũkany'a
Job22:5 Aiee
Job22:6 Wosaa syĩndũ sya andũ ma mũsyĩ waku nĩ kana makũĩve kĩla wamakovethya. Nĩwosaa ngũa syoo makatiwa me athei.
Job22:7 Ala me na mĩnoo ndwaamanenga kĩw'ũ manyw'e
Job22:8 Nĩwatumie ũla wĩ ũtonyi osa nthĩ yonthe
Job22:9 Nĩwaleile kũtetheesya aka ndiwa
Job22:10 Kwoou yu ũthyũlũlũkĩtwe nĩ mĩteo
Job22:11 Kwĩna kĩvindu kingĩ ũkethĩa ndwene kĩndũ
Job22:12 Nũndũ Ngai ũtekalaa ĩtunĩ ĩũlũ? Nũsiasya ndata syĩ ungu wake
Job22:13 Naku wĩkũlya
Job22:14 Wĩsũanĩa kana Ngai nũthw'ĩkawa nĩ matu ala makamu ndakatwone
Job22:15 Nĩũkũlya
Job22:16 Nĩmavulilw'e ĩvinda yoo yĩte ĩviku
Job22:17 Maneenie na Ngai mamwĩa atĩĩ
Job22:18 Ĩndĩ nowe watumie methĩwa me athwii. Nyie nditonya kũelewa nĩ mosũanĩo ma ala athũku.
Job22:19 Andũ ala alũngalu nĩmatanaa moona Ngai aikany'a ala athũku. Ala mate ĩvĩtyo nĩmathekaa na kũvũthĩĩsya ala athũku
Job22:20 mayasya atĩĩ
Job22:21 Yu ĩndĩ Yovu
Job22:22 Ĩtĩkĩla motao ala ũkũũnenga; ĩkalya ndeto syake ngoonĩ yaku.
Job22:23 Ethĩwa ũkeenyivya na ũisyokea Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe
Job22:24 na ethĩwa ũkekya thaavu waku ĩtheka
Job22:25 na ĩngĩ ethĩwa Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe akatw'ĩka thaavu waku
Job22:26 nĩvo ĩndĩ wĩtana nthĩnĩ wa Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe
Job22:27 Ũkamũvoyaa
Job22:28 Maũndũ onthe ala wavanga makeanĩaw'a
Job22:29 Nũndũ Ngai nũvalũkasya ala mekathĩĩaa
Job22:30 Nũvonokasya ũla wĩ na ĩvĩtyo
Job23:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yovu wasũngĩie asya atĩĩ
Job23:2 “O na yu nĩngũendeea kũnyungunyĩsya kũla kwĩ Ngai
Job23:3 Kethĩwa tyo nĩsĩ vala ndonya kũmwona! Kethĩwa tyo nĩvika wĩkalonĩ wake!
Job23:4 No nĩmũtavye thĩna wakwa
Job23:5 No nĩmanye ũsũngĩo ũla ũnenga
Job23:6 Ngai nũtonya kũtũmĩa vinya wake w'onthe nĩ kana anzinde? Aiee
Job23:7 Vau nĩthĩwa ndonya kũsũanĩa nĩ na ũla mũlũngalu
Job23:8 Nĩnĩmanthĩte Ngai ngalĩko ya wumĩlonĩ wa syũa
Job23:9 Nĩnĩmũmanthĩte ngalĩko ya ĩũlũ
Job23:10 Ĩndĩ ũu wĩ o vo
Job23:11 Nĩatĩĩaa nzĩa yake kwa ũĩkĩĩku
Job23:12 Ndyaaĩsa kũtia mĩao yake
Job23:13 Ndaalyũkaa. Nũũ ũtonya kũmũkananĩsya? Ekaa ũndũ ũkwenda.
Job23:14 Akeanĩsya mũvango wake ĩũlũ wakwa
Job23:15 Kĩu nĩkyo kĩtumi nĩ na w'ĩa nĩ mbee wake
Job23:16 Ngai nũtumĩte ndethĩwa na ũkũmbaũ
Job23:17 Ĩndĩ o na kĩvindu kĩituma ngilya
Job24:1 “Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe aleaa kũvanga mavinda ma ũsilĩlo nĩkĩ? Ala mamwĩsĩ maleaa kũmanya mĩthenya ĩsu nĩkĩ?
Job24:2 Andũ nĩmathamasya makonge ma mũvaka; nĩmoyaa ndĩthya sya mbũi na malondu na kũiĩthya.
Job24:3 Nĩmosaa ĩng'oi ya syana ndiwa
Job24:4 Nĩmasiĩĩaa ngya ndĩkakwate kĩla kĩmyaĩlĩte
Job24:5 Kwoou ala ngya nĩmamanthaa lĩu weũnĩ ta mang'oi ma kĩthekanĩ. Vai vandũ vangĩ matonya kũkwata lĩu wa syana syoo.
Job24:6 Ngya nikethaa mĩũndanĩ ĩte yoo
Job24:7 Ũtukũ makomaa me athei matena ngũa sya kwĩvw'ĩka
Job24:8 Nĩmauĩĩawa nĩ mbua ĩla yuaa iĩmanĩ
Job24:9 Andũ athũku nĩmosaa kana kakw'ĩĩwe nĩ ĩthe wako
Job24:10 Andũ ala ngya maendaa mate na ngũa sya kwĩvw'ĩka
Job24:11 Nĩmavivaa mĩthata maumye mauta na nzavivũ maumye ndivai
Job24:12 Ala maendee kũkw'a nĩmew'ĩkaa ndũanĩ mailuma
Job24:13 “Ve andũ maleaa kyeni; maieleawa nĩkyo
Job24:14 Kwakya tene mũaani nũamũkaa
Job24:15 Mũndũ kĩlaalai eteelaa kũtuke
Job24:16 Ing'ei nitũlaa nyũmba ũtukũ
Job24:17 Kwa ing'ei syonthe kĩvindu kĩkamu nĩ ũndũ ũmwe na kwakya
Job24:18 “Andũ asu nĩ ĩvũyũ yĩ kĩw'ũnĩ ĩũlũ
Job24:19 O tondũ ĩa yĩthelaa nũndũ wa muutĩa na mũnyao
Job24:20 Aa inyia moo maimalilikanaa o na vanini
Job24:21 Andũ athũku nĩmathĩnasya mũndũ mũka ngũngũ
Job24:22 Ĩndĩ Ngai vinyanĩ wake nũvetangaa ala me ũtonyi
Job24:23 Ngai nũtonya kũmaeka mathũmũe vala mekwĩw'a me ũsũvĩonĩ
Job24:24 Andũ athũku nĩmaendeeaa nesa vandũ va kavinda kanini
Job24:25 Ethĩwa ũu ti w'o
Job25:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Mbilitati kuma Sui wasũngĩie asya atĩĩ
Job25:2 “Ngai nĩ mũsumbĩ na nĩwaĩlĩte kũkĩwa; nũtumaa ĩtunĩ ĩũlũ kwĩthĩwa na mũuo.
Job25:3 Nĩkũlya
Job25:4 Mũndũ atonya ata kwĩthĩwa e mũlũngalu mbee wa Ngai? Mũndũ ũla ũsyaĩtwe nĩ mũndũ mũka atonya ata kwĩthĩwa e mũtheu?
Job25:5 Ethĩwa mbee wa Ngai o na mwei ndwĩthĩawa na kyeni
Job25:6 mũndũ nake nĩ ata? Nĩ mwenya
Job26:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yovu wasũngĩie asya atĩĩ
Job26:2 “Mwa nũtethetye ala mate na vinya! Nũtangĩĩte andũ ala matetonya!
Job26:3 Nũnengete ũtao nyie mũndũ ũte na ũmanyi
Job26:4 Ũla ũkũtetheesye ũneene ndeto ii nũũ? Ũla ũkũnengie ndeto ii ũneene nũũ?”
Job26:5 “Maveva ma ala akw'ũ
Job26:6 Ngai nĩwene vala maveva ma ala akw'ũ mekalaa
Job26:7 Ngai nĩwiĩte yayaya ya ngalĩko ya ĩũlũ vala yaĩlĩte
Job26:8 Ngai nĩwe wusũasya matu na kĩw'ũ
Job26:9 Ngai nĩwe ũvw'ĩkaa mwei wĩ mũima
Job26:10 Nĩwaanisye kyeni na kĩvindu
Job26:11 Ituĩ ila itw'ĩĩkĩte matu nithingithaw'a nĩ w'ĩa
Job26:12 Nĩwavindĩthisye ũkanga na vinya wake; nĩwatilangile Laavi ilungu aitũmĩa ũĩ wake.
Job26:13 Veva wake nũvetangaa matu kũkathea; kw'oko kwake nĩkwooaie nzoka ĩnyolokete mĩtũkĩ.
Job26:14 Ĩndĩ aa no maũndũ mavũthũ ma vinya wa Ngai
Job27:1 Yovu nĩwaendeeie na ũneeni wake asya atĩĩ
Job27:2 “O tondũ Ngai wĩ thayũ
Job27:3 ĩvindanĩ yonthe ya thayũ wakwa
Job27:4 nyie ndikaneena ũndũ ũthũku
Job27:5 Ndikamũtalĩla inyw'ĩ ũlũngalu nongi
Job27:6 Ndikaeka kwasya kana nĩ mũlũngalu
Job27:7 Mũmaitha wakwa nĩethĩwe ta mũndũ mũthũku
Job27:8 Nũndũ wĩkwatyo wa ũla ũtamwĩsĩ Ngai nĩ mwaũ
Job27:9 Nĩkũlya
Job27:10 Mũndũ ũsu akatana mbee wa Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe? Akeekaĩlaa Ngai mavinda onthe?
Job27:11 Eka ngũmanyĩsye ũndũ ũtonyi wa Ngai ũnenevete
Job27:12 Inyw'onthe nĩmwĩyoneete; yu ĩndĩ mwĩneena maũndũ aa ma mana nĩkĩ?
Job27:13 Ũũ nĩw'o Ngai wĩkanaa na ala athũku
Job27:14 Nĩmatonya kwĩthĩwa na ana aingĩ
Job27:15 Ala mevonoka makooawa nĩ ũwau mũthũku
Job27:16 O na vala nĩmatonya kwĩthĩwa na silĩva mwingĩ ta kĩtoo
Job27:17 mũndũ mũĩkĩĩku akasyĩkĩa
Job27:18 Mũndũ mũthũku nĩwakaa nyũmba iilyĩ ta ũlũalũĩ wa mbũambũĩ
Job27:19 Esaa ũkoma e mũthwii
Job27:20 Okĩawa nĩ w'ĩa ta kĩw'ũ kya mbua mbingĩ; kĩseve kya ũtukũ nĩkĩuutanaa kĩkamũveta.
Job27:21 Kĩseve kya kwananga kuma ngalĩko ya wumĩlonĩ wa syũa
Job27:22 kĩkauutanĩa vala ũĩ vate tei
Job27:23 Kĩseve kĩkaendeea kũuutana asembete
Job28:1 “Kwa w'o ve ĩima yĩnzawa silĩva
Job28:2 Andũ menzaa kyũma kuma mũthanganĩ
Job28:3 Andũ ala menzaa syũma nĩmathũkũmaa maimanĩ makuĩte taa
Job28:4 Vaasa kuma vala andũ matũaa kana andũ mataaĩsa ũkinya
Job28:5 Lĩu nĩwumaa ĩũlũ wa nthĩ
Job28:6 Mavia ma nthĩ ĩsu methĩawa na tũvila twa thooa mũnene twĩtawa savaya
Job28:7 Vai kĩlũĩ kĩsĩ nzĩa ya kũthi maimanĩ asu
Job28:8 Nyamũ sya kĩthekanĩ iyaaĩsa kwĩsĩla nzĩanĩ isu
Job28:9 Andũ nĩmenzaa mavia momũ mũno
Job28:10 Maendee kũlika mavianĩ nthĩnĩ
Job28:11 Nĩmamanthaa kũla mbũsĩ syambĩlĩĩlye
Job28:12 Ĩndĩ ũĩ ũtonya kwoneka va? Ũmanyi ũtũaa va?
Job28:13 Mũndũ ndatonya kũmanya thooa waw'o; ũĩ ndũtonya kwoneka andũnĩ.
Job28:14 Kũla kũliku ũkanganĩ mũnene kwaasya
Job28:15 Ndũtonya kũthoowa na thaavu ũla mũseo vyũ
Job28:16 Ndũtonya kũthoowa na thaavu kuma Ovili
Job28:17 Wĩ thooa mũnene mbee wa thaavu kana kĩoo
Job28:18 Thooa wa ũĩ nĩ mũnene mbee wa mavia momũ ma ũkanganĩ
Job28:19 Tũvila twa tovasi kuma Ethiovia tũitonya kwĩananw'a naw'o
Job28:20 Ũĩ yu ĩndĩ wumaa va? Na ũmanyi ũtũaa va?
Job28:21 Vai kyũmbe kĩ thayũ kĩtonya kũwona
Job28:22 Wanangĩko na kĩkw'ũ ineenaa ikasya
Job28:23 Ngai nowe wĩsĩ nzĩa ya kũthi vala ve ũĩ
Job28:24 Nũndũ Ngai nĩwonaa o na kũvika kũla nthĩ ĩthelele
Job28:25 Yĩla Ngai wanengie kĩseve vinya wakyo
Job28:26 na yĩla wavangie vala mbua yaĩlĩte kua
Job28:27 ĩvindanĩ yĩu nĩw'o woonie ũĩ na aweta ĩũlũ wa w'o. Nĩwawonanisye na awumĩlya.
Job28:28 Ngai nĩwaneenie na andũ amea atĩĩ
Job29:1 Yovu nĩwaendeeie na ũneeni wake asya atĩĩ
Job29:2 “Mwa kethĩwa nĩilyĩ o tondũ nailyĩ myeinĩ ya navu tene
Job29:3 Yĩla taa wake wamulĩkĩlaa wĩ ĩũlũ wakwa
Job29:4 Yĩu nĩ ĩvinda yĩla naendee nesa
Job29:5 Yĩla Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe waĩ vamwe nakwa
Job29:6 ng'ombe na mbũi syakwa syaumasya ĩia yingĩ
Job29:7 Yĩla atumĩa moombanĩa mũvĩanĩ wa ndũa
Job29:8 anake ma mũika mambona oou maũngamaa ũtee
Job29:9 Atongoi ala maĩ ma ndaĩa nĩmaekaa kũneena
Job29:10 Mawasya ma anene me ndaĩa nĩmavindĩthaw'a
Job29:11 Mũndũ o na wĩva ambĩw'a nĩwaneeneaa nesa
Job29:12 nũndũ nĩnatangĩĩaa ngya ila syambĩkaĩlaa
Job29:13 Ala meethĩawa ũkyanĩ mũnene nĩmangumasya
Job29:14 Neekĩaa ũlũngalu ta w'o ngũa yakwa
Job29:15 Nyie naĩ metho kwa ilalinda
Job29:16 Naĩ ĩthe wa ala athĩni
Job29:17 Nĩnaanangaa ũtonyi wa andũ athũku
Job29:18 Nasũanĩaa kana ngakw'ĩĩa mũsyĩ kwakwa
Job29:19 Nyie nailyĩ ta mũtĩ ũnyaĩĩkĩtye mĩi yaw'o kĩw'ũnĩ
Job29:20 Andũ onthe mangumasya kĩla ĩvinda
Job29:21 Andũ nĩmambĩthukĩĩasya na kweteela
Job29:22 Namina kũneena vai ũmwe waneenaa ĩngĩ
Job29:23 Andũ mambeteelaa ũndũ meteelaa mbua
Job29:24 Yĩla makw'a ngoo nĩnamonasya ũthyũ wa ũtanu
Job29:25 Nĩnamanyuvĩaa nzĩa na kwĩkala ta mũtongoi woo
Job30:1 “Ĩndĩ yu andũ nĩmeũmbũthya
Job30:2 Vinya wa moko moo waĩ na ũtethyo mwaũ kwakwa
Job30:3 Maĩ ngya mũno na maĩ na nzaa
Job30:4 Nĩmakũaa mĩtĩ ya weũnĩ na kũmĩya
Job30:5 Nĩmalũngaw'a kuma vala ve andũ moo
Job30:6 Vate ũndũ ũngĩ nĩmaendie kũtũa matw'ĩkunĩ
Job30:7 Kuma ikuthunĩ nĩmanasya ta nyamũ
Job30:8 Nĩ syana sya ndia
Job30:9 Yu mokaa na kũnthekeea
Job30:10 Nĩmaleanaa nakwa na kwĩkala vaasa nakwa
Job30:11 Nũndũ Ngai nũndw'ĩte kyonze na mũndũ ũtetethya
Job30:12 Nguthu sya andũ moo nimbithũkĩaa
Job30:13 Nĩmanangaa nzĩa yakwa ya kũkĩĩla na maitata kũmbĩka naĩ
Job30:14 Mokaa mailyĩ ta mekumĩlĩĩla kĩtonyinĩ kĩnene
Job30:15 Nayu nĩngwatĩtwe nĩ w'ĩa mwingĩ mũno
Job30:16 Yu ngilĩlye kũkw'a
Job30:17 Mavĩndĩ makwa onthe nĩmekwalya ũtukũ
Job30:18 Ngai nũngwatĩte ngũanĩ syakwa na vinya mũnene
Job30:19 Nũmbĩkĩtye ndakanĩ
Job30:20 Ame Ngai nĩngwĩtĩte ĩndĩ ndũũnzũngĩa
Job30:21 Wĩmbĩka maũndũ mathũku mũno
Job30:22 Ũmbũkĩlĩtye kĩsevenĩ na ũkatuma kĩngua
Job30:23 Nĩnĩsĩ we ũndwaĩte kĩkw'ũnĩ
Job30:24 Kwa w'o
Job30:25 Nĩkũlya
Job30:26 Ĩndĩ ũu wĩ o vo
Job30:27 Nĩna kĩũũyũ na woo ngoonĩ; nĩthĩĩtwe na thĩna kĩla mũthenya.
Job30:28 Nangangaa kĩvindunĩ vate kyeni kya syũa; nĩũngamaa andũnĩ ngĩsũvana ndetheew'e.
Job30:29 Kĩĩo kyakwa kĩtumĩte ndw'ĩka ta mbĩwa; nyie na nyaa tũi kĩvathũkany'o.
Job30:30 Kĩkonde kyakwa nĩ kiũ na nĩkĩũsyũlĩka
Job30:31 Kwondũ wa ũu ngitaa yakwa nini nĩalyũkĩte ĩkaina wathi wa kyeva
Job31:1 “Nĩnĩvĩtĩte ngathana kana
Job31:2 Nĩkũlya
Job31:3 Nũndũ andũ ala athũku matakwataa mathĩna
Job31:4 Nũndũ Ngai ũtamanyaa maũndũ onthe ala nĩkaa
Job31:5 Nyie ndyaaĩsa kwĩka ũndũ ũthũku
Job31:6 Ngai nĩanthime na kĩthimi kya w'o
Job31:7 Ethĩwa naaĩsa kuma nzĩanĩ ĩla ya w'o
Job31:8 nĩvo ĩndĩ nĩvanda
Job31:9 “Ethĩwa naaendeew'a nĩ kĩveti kya mũtũi wakwa
Job31:10 kĩveti kyakwa nĩkĩuĩe mũndũ-ũme ũngĩ
Job31:11 Nũndũ yĩu yĩthĩwa yĩ ĩvĩtyo ĩnene
Job31:12 Ũsu wĩthĩwa ũilyĩ mwaki ũla wanangaa
Job31:13 Yĩla ũmwe wa athũkũmi makwa wanyungunyĩsya nũndũ wakwa
Job31:14 Kethĩwa ndyaaĩka ũu
Job31:15 Ngai ũla woombie mũthũkũmi ũsu nowe wambũmbie
Job31:16 “Ndyaalea kũtethya ngya
Job31:17 Ndyaaya lĩu wakwa nĩ nyioka
Job31:18 Nĩthĩĩtwe nĩilyĩ ta ĩthe woo
Job31:19 Noona mũndũ ũkwenda kwaa nũndũ nde na ngũa
Job31:20 nĩnamũnengae ngũa iseũvĩtw'e na w'ĩa wumĩte malondunĩ makwa. Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũndũ ũsu wangathimaa na ngoo yake yonthe.
Job31:21 Ethĩwa nyie naaũkĩlya kw'oko kwakwa nĩtelemye kana ndiwa
Job31:22 kw'oko kwakwa kũtũlĩke
Job31:23 Nũndũ nĩnakĩaa Ngai ndakandetee ũndũ mũthũku
Job31:24 “Ethĩwa naatw'ĩkĩthya thaavu wĩkwatyo wakwa
Job31:25 ethĩwa naaĩkathĩĩa nũndũ wa ũthwii wakwa mwingĩ
Job31:26 kana ethĩwa naathaitha syũa nũndũ wa kyeni kyayo
Job31:27 na naluluutĩka nĩithaithe
Job31:28 maũndũ asu o namo methĩwa me mavĩtyo ma kũsilĩlwa
Job31:29 Ndyaatana mũmaitha wakwa aanangwa
Job31:30 Ndyaaĩtĩkĩla nĩke naĩ
Job31:31 Andũ ala mekalaa mũsyĩ kwakwa nĩmesĩ
Job31:32 Vai mũendi wa kyalo waakoma nza nzĩanĩ
Job31:33 Ndyaavitha naĩ syakwa ũndũ andũ amwe mekaa
Job31:34 nũndũ nĩnakĩaa wingĩ wa andũ
Job31:35 “Kethĩwa ve o mũndũ ũmbĩthukĩĩsya
Job31:36 kwa w'o nyie nĩũmosa na kũmakua kĩtuonĩ kyakwa
Job31:37 Nĩũtavya Ngai maũndũ onthe ala nĩkĩte
Job31:38 “Ethĩwa naaũya mĩũnda ĩla nĩĩmaa
Job31:39 ethĩwa naaya lĩu ũla wavandĩtwe vo
Job31:40 ĩia yĩ mĩw'a yĩmee vandũ va nganũ
Job32:1 Aũme asu atatũ: Elivasi
Job32:2 Eliu mwana wa Mbalakeli
Job32:3 O ta ũu Eliu nĩwathatiw'e nĩ anyanyae asu atatũ ma Yovu. Mamũthatĩtye nũndũ nĩmaemiwe nĩ kwony'a Yovu ĩvĩtyo
Job32:4 Eliu eeteelile aneene na Yovu ala angĩ mamina kũneena nũndũ maĩ akũũ mbee wake.
Job32:5 Yĩla Eliu woonie kana katĩ wa aũme asu atatũ vai ũmwe waĩ atonya kũsũngĩa Yovu
Job32:6 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Eliu mwana wa Mbalakeli nzyawa ya Mbusi waneenie asya atĩĩ
Job32:7 Nĩvo nĩsũanĩie nasya
Job32:8 Ĩndĩ nĩ veva wa Ngai Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe
Job32:9 Ũkũũ ti w'o ũtumaa mũndũ ethĩwa e mũĩ
Job32:10 Kwoou nĩasya atĩĩ
Job32:11 “Nĩthukĩĩsye ũneeni wenyu
Job32:12 Nĩnĩmwĩthukĩĩisye nesa
Job32:13 Ĩsũvĩei mũikese kwasya
Job32:14 Yovu eneenaa nenyu
Job32:15 Yovu
Job32:16 Nĩkũlya
Job32:17 O nakwa nĩngũũnenga ũsũngĩo wakwa
Job32:18 Nũndũ nĩ na maũndũ maingĩ ma kũneena
Job32:19 Nalea kũkwata mwanya wa kũneena
Job32:20 No nginya nĩneene nĩ kana nthũmũe
Job32:21 Ndiendeesya mũndũ o na wĩva
Job32:22 Nũndũ nyie ndyĩsĩ kwĩyendeesya
Job33:1 “We Yovu
Job33:2 Nĩnĩyũmbanĩtye kũneena
Job33:3 Ndeto syakwa syonthe nĩ sya w'o
Job33:4 Veva wa Ngai nĩwe wambũmbie
Job33:5 “Ethĩwa nũtonya nzũngĩe
Job33:6 We
Job33:7 Kwoou ndwĩ na kĩtumi kya kũngĩa
Job33:8 “Nũneenete ndyĩw'a
Job33:9 Nũneenete ũkasya
Job33:10 Ngai nũmanthaa itumi sya kũnthĩny'a
Job33:11 Nĩwovaa maũũ makwa na mĩtĩ ya kwova andũ
Job33:12 Ĩndĩ eka ngũtavye
Job33:13 Wĩsikatĩa Ngai kyaũ ũyasya
Job33:14 O na vala Ngai aneenaa kwa nzĩa syĩ kĩvathũkany'o
Job33:15 Ũtukũ
Job33:16 Nĩvo ĩndĩ ũtumaa mew'a ũndũ ũkwasya
Job33:17 Aneenaa nĩ kana atume andũ maekana na naĩ
Job33:18 Ngai ndetĩkĩla andũ manangwe; nũmovoasya kuma kĩkw'ũnĩ.
Job33:19 Ngai nũkanasya mũndũ kwa kũtuma awaa
Job33:20 Ũwau nũtumaa mũndũ aemwa nĩ lĩu
Job33:21 Mwĩĩ wake nũthelaa vyũ
Job33:22 Ethĩawa e vakuvĩ mũno na mbũa
Job33:23 Nĩvatonyeka mũlaĩka ũmwe katĩ wa alaĩka aingĩ ma Ngai akoka kũmũtetheesya
Job33:24 Mũlaĩka ũsu aneenaa na tei akasya
Job33:25 Eka mwĩĩ wake ũseũve ta wa mũndũ wa mũika
Job33:26 Mũndũ ũsu avoya
Job33:27 Akaina e mbee wa andũ akyasya; ‘Nĩnĩvĩtĩtye; nĩnĩkĩte ũla ũte ũseo
Job33:28 Nĩwambonokisye ndikathi nthĩ ya ala akw'ũ
Job33:29 “Ngai nĩwĩkaa mũndũ maũndũ asu onthe
Job33:30 Nũtangĩĩaa thayũ wa mũndũ
Job33:31 We Yovu ĩthukĩĩsye nesa
Job33:32 Ĩndĩ ethĩwa wĩ na ũndũ ũkwenda kwasya weta
Job33:33 Ethĩwa ti ũu
Job34:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Eliu waendeeie kũneena ayasya atĩĩ
Job34:2 “Inyw'ĩ andũ oĩ
Job34:3 Kũtũ nĩkw'o kũsamaa ndeto
Job34:4 Tũnyuvei ũndũ ũla waĩlĩte; nĩtwĩmanyĩsyei ũndũ ũla mũseo.
Job34:5 Yovu aĩtye
Job34:6 O na kau nĩ mũlũngalu
Job34:7 “Ũla ũilyĩ Yovu nũũ
Job34:8 wĩkalanasya na andũ ala mekaa naĩ
Job34:9 Nĩkwĩthĩwa aneenete akasya
Job34:10 “Kwoou mbĩthukĩĩsyei
Job34:11 Nũĩvaa mũndũ kwĩanana na wĩa wake; nũmũtuvaa kwĩanana na mwĩkalo wake.
Job34:12 Nĩw'o ki kana Ngai ndekaa naĩ
Job34:13 Nũũ ũla wanyuvie Ngai ethĩwe na ũtonyi nthĩ yonthe? Nũũ ũla wamũnengie ũtonyi wa kũũngamĩa nthĩ yonthe nũũ?
Job34:14 Ta kethĩwa nĩ mũvango wa Ngai
Job34:15 syũmbe syonthe no ithele vyũ ĩmwe
Job34:16 “Ethĩwa wĩ na ũmanyi
Job34:17 Nĩkũlya
Job34:18 Ngai nũtavasya asumbĩ akamea atĩĩ
Job34:19 Ngai ndendeeasya anene
Job34:20 Ũtukũ katĩ nĩmakusaa matataĩĩe; Ngai nũkũnaa andũ makathela
Job34:21 “Nĩkwĩthĩwa metho make masyaĩĩasya nzĩa sya andũ
Job34:22 Vai vandũ ve wiki kana kĩvindu kĩkamu
Job34:23 Ngai nde na vata wa kũvanga ĩvinda
Job34:24 Nũminaa andũ me ũtonyi atakũlĩtye ĩũlũ woo
Job34:25 Kwoou nũndũ Ngai nĩwĩsĩ maũndũ ala mekaa
Job34:26 Nũmakanasya nũndũ wa mothũku moo
Job34:27 nũndũ nĩmaekie kũmũatĩĩa
Job34:28 Nĩmatumie kĩĩo kya ngya kĩmũvikĩa
Job34:29 “Ethĩwa Ngai nĩwavindya
Job34:30 nĩ kana asiĩĩe mũndũ ũla ũtamũkĩaa Ngai ndakasumbĩke
Job34:31 “Mũndũ akaneena na Ngai akamwĩa atĩĩ
Job34:32 manyĩsye kĩla ndatonya kwona; ethĩwa nĩnĩvĩtĩtye
Job34:33 Nĩkũlya
Job34:34 “Andũ me na ũmanyi na andũ me na ũĩ
Job34:35 ‘Yovu aneenaa ate na ũĩ
Job34:36 Nenda kethĩwa Yovu nũsilĩlwa nginya mũminũkĩlyo
Job34:37 Yovu ongelaa ũng'endu naĩnĩ yake
Job35:1 Eliu nĩwaendeeie kũneena ayasya:
Job35:2 “Atĩĩ Yovu
Job35:3 Kwoou wĩkũlya
Job35:4 Nĩngũũsũngĩa
Job35:5 Sisya matunĩ wone
Job35:6 Ethĩwa nĩweeka naĩ
Job35:7 Ethĩwa wĩ mũlũngalu
Job35:8 Ũthũku waku nũtumaa andũ angĩ taku mathĩna
Job35:9 “Andũ nĩmaĩaa nũndũ wa kũthĩnw'a mũno; nĩmekaĩlaa mũndũ amatethye kuma ũtonyinĩ wa ũla wĩ vinya.
Job35:10 Ĩndĩ vai mũndũ ũkũlasya
Job35:11 ũla ũtũnengae ũĩ mwingĩ kwĩ wa nyamũ sya kĩthekanĩ
Job35:12 Andũ mamwĩkaĩla
Job35:13 Kwa w'o Ngai ndew'aa kĩĩo kya mana
Job35:14 Ngai akakũsũngĩa ata ĩvindanĩ yĩla we ũkwasya kana ndũmwene
Job35:15 Wĩsũanĩa kana Ngai ndakanasya
Job35:16 Kwoou Yovu wĩneenaa ndeto sya mana
Job36:1 Eliu nĩwaendeeie kũneena ayasya atĩĩ
Job36:2 “Ũmĩanĩsya nakwa o kavinda kanini na nĩngũkwony'a kana ve maũndũ maingĩ naĩlĩte kũneena kwondũ wa Ngai.
Job36:3 Nĩngũtũmĩa ũĩ wakwa mwingĩ
Job36:4 Manya kana ndeto syakwa nĩ syaw'o
Job36:5 “Ĩthukĩĩsye
Job36:6 Ndaekaa andũ athũku maendee kwĩkala thayũ
Job36:7 Nũsũvĩaa ala alũngalu
Job36:8 Ĩndĩ ethĩwa nĩove na mbĩngũ
Job36:9 Ngai nũmonasya meko moo mathũku
Job36:10 Nũtumaa methukĩĩsya ũkany'o wake
Job36:11 Meew'a Ngai na kũmũthũkũma
Job36:12 Ĩndĩ malea kũmwĩthukĩĩsya makooawa
Job36:13 “Andũ ala matamũkĩaa Ngai matindaa me athatu
Job36:14 Makusaa meo ma mũika
Job36:15 Ĩndĩ Ngai nũmanyĩasya andũ kwĩsĩla mathĩnanĩ
Job36:16 Ngai nĩwakumisye thĩnanĩ
Job36:17 Ĩndĩ yu ũendee kũkanw'a nũndũ wa ũthũku waku
Job36:18 Ĩsũvĩe syĩndũ sya kwendeesya iikaũkenge
Job36:19 Ũthwii waku yu ndũtonya ũkũtethya
Job36:20 Ndũkeliĩle ũtukũ wũke
Job36:21 Ĩsũvĩe ndũkese kũlika ũthũkunĩ
Job36:22 “Lilikana ũndũ vinya wa Ngai wĩana
Job36:23 Vai mũndũ ũtonya kũtavya Ngai ũndũ waĩlĩte kwĩka. Nũũ ũla ũtonya kũmũtalĩla kwĩthĩwa avĩtĩtye?
Job36:24 Nũkumaw'a ĩvinda yonthe nũndũ wa maũndũ ala wĩkaa
Job36:25 Andũ onthe nĩmonete maũndũ ala wĩkĩte
Job36:26 Tũitonya kũmanya ũnene wa Ngai vyũ
Job36:27 “Ngai nĩwe wĩkusĩasya kĩw'ũ kuma nthĩ
Job36:28 Nũekaa mbua ĩkaua kuma matunĩ
Job36:29 Nũũ ũla ũtonya kũmanya ũndũ ũnyaĩĩkasya matu
Job36:30 Nũnyaĩĩkasya ũtisi wake ũkamũthyũlũlũka
Job36:31 Ĩsu nĩyo nzĩa ĩla ũĩthasya andũ
Job36:32 Nũkwataa ũtisi na kw'oko kwake
Job36:33 Kĩtundumo nĩkĩmanyĩthanasya ũvoo wake
Job37:1 “Kĩtundumo kĩu kĩtumaa ngoo yakwa ĩkũna mũno
Job37:2 Andũ onthe ĩthukĩĩsyei wasya wa Ngai
Job37:3 Nũtũmaa ũtisi kwĩsĩla yayayanĩ
Job37:4 Ĩtina wa ũu kĩlulumo kya wasya wake nĩkĩw'ĩkaa; nũtundumaa na wasya wake wĩ ũtonyi
Job37:5 Wasya wa Ngai nũtundumaa kwa nzĩa sya kũseng'ya
Job37:6 Nũneenaa na ĩa akayĩa atĩĩ
Job37:7 Nũũngamasya wĩa wa kĩla mũndũ
Job37:8 Nyamũ niendaa kwĩvitha
Job37:9 Iuutani nĩsyũkaa kuma ngalĩko ya ĩtheo
Job37:10 Mĩthũmũ ya Ngai nĩtumaa kĩw'ũ kĩtw'ĩka mbalavu
Job37:11 Ngai nĩwusũasya matu na mbua
Job37:12 Nũtumaa matu methyũũa
Job37:13 Ngai nũetae mbua ĩnyithye nthĩ
Job37:14 Ame Yovu ĩthukĩĩsye
Job37:15 Nĩũkũlya
Job37:16 Nĩwĩsĩ ũndũ matu masũnzũũlaa yayayanĩ
Job37:17 We wĩĩw'a muutĩa mũno wĩkĩĩte ngũa syaku
Job37:18 Nĩũkũlya
Job37:19 Tũtavye ũndũ twaĩlĩte kwĩa Ngai
Job37:20 Nditonya kũkũlya nĩneene na Ngai
Job37:21 Yu vai mũndũ ũtonya kũsisya syũa
Job37:22 Ũtisu wa thaavu nĩwũkaa kuma ngalĩko ya ĩũlũ
Job37:23 Tũitonya kũmwona Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe
Job37:24 Kwoou andũ nĩmakĩaa Ngai; ndanengae ndaĩa mũndũ o na wĩva ũla wonaa ta wĩna ũĩ wake mwene.”
Job38:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Mwĩai Ngai e kĩuutaninĩ wasũngĩie Yovu amwĩa atĩĩ
Job38:2 “Nũũ ũyũ ũkwĩkĩa ũtao wakwa kĩvindu
Job38:3 Yu ĩlũmye
Job38:4 “Waĩ vo yĩla neekĩaa myambĩlĩĩlyo ya nthĩ? Ethĩwa nĩwĩsĩ mũno
Job38:5 Nũũ ũla wanenganie ithimo syayo? Kwa w'o nĩwĩsĩ! Nũũ ũla watambũũkisye ũlii wa kũmĩthima?
Job38:6 Ituĩ ila itw'ĩĩkĩte nthĩ ĩkwatĩĩwe nĩ kyaũ? Nũũ ũla waiie ĩvia yĩla yĩ vata mũno mwakonĩ wa nthĩ
Job38:7 yĩla ndata sya kwakya syainie syĩ vamwe
Job38:8 “Ũla wasiĩĩie kĩw'ũ kya ũkanga kĩikakĩle nũũ
Job38:9 Ninyie navw'ĩkie ũkanga na matu
Job38:10 Nĩneekĩie mũvaka wa ũkanga
Job38:11 Nĩnaisye
Job38:12 “Atĩĩ Yovu
Job38:13 Waatuma kyeni kya kwakya kĩkena kĩla vandũ ĩũlũ wa nthĩ
Job38:14 Kyeni kya mũthenya nĩkĩtumaa iĩma na myanda syumĩla nesa ta mĩtũlo ya ngũa
Job38:15 Kyeni nĩkĩvetaa kĩvindu kuma kwa ala athũku
Job38:16 “Waathi kũla nthongo ila syĩ ũkanganĩ syumĩte? Waaĩsĩla nakũu ũkanganĩ nthĩ?
Job38:17 Ve mũndũ waakwony'a mĩvĩa ya kũlika vala akw'ũ mekalaa? Waaona mĩvĩa ya kũndũ kũu kwĩ kĩvindu kingĩ?
Job38:18 Nĩwĩsĩ ũndũ nthĩ ĩnenevete? Ethĩwa nĩwĩsĩ ndavye.
Job38:19 “Nĩwĩsĩ vala kyeni kyumaa
Job38:20 nĩ kana ũkĩtwae wĩkalonĩ wakyo
Job38:21 Vate nzika we nowĩsĩ
Job38:22 Waalika vala niaa ĩa
Job38:23 Nĩnĩsiaa syeteelete ĩvinda ya ithokoo
Job38:24 Nĩũkũlya
Job38:25 Nũũ ũla waseũvisye nzĩa nĩ kana mbua nene ĩtheelelae vo yuĩte
Job38:26 Nũũ ũla wuasya mbua vala vatatwĩe mũndũ
Job38:27 Nũũ ũla ũnyithasya na kũkolya nthĩ nyũmũ na ng'alu
Job38:28 Ĩthe wa mbua nũũ
Job38:29 Ĩa yaumie ĩvunĩ yaũ
Job38:30 Nĩvo kĩw'ũ kyũmaa kĩkekala ĩvia
Job38:31 “Nũtonya kwovany'a vamwe ndata ila syĩtawa Masoleti
Job38:32 Nũtonya kũtongoesya ndata ikaumĩlaa ĩvinda yĩla yaĩlĩte? Nũtonya kũtongoesya ndata ila syĩ ngalĩko ya ĩũlũ syĩtawa Nduva nene na Nduva nini?
Job38:33 Nĩwĩsĩ myamũlo ya matunĩ
Job38:34 “Nĩũkũlya
Job38:35 Nũtonya kũtũma ũtisi ũkathi
Job38:36 Nũũ ũla ũnengete matu ũĩ wa kua
Job38:37 Nũũ ũla wĩ na ũĩ wa kũtala matu
Job38:38 nĩ kana kĩtoo ĩũlũ wa nthĩ kĩkwatane
Job38:39 “Nũtonya kũsyĩmĩa mũnyambũ nyamũ ũye
Job38:40 yoveesye yĩ isumonĩ syayo
Job38:41 Nũũ ũla ũnengae ngũngũũ lĩu
Job39:1 “Nĩũkũlya
Job39:2 Nĩwĩsĩ ikuaa myei yĩana ata iyĩsa kũsyaa? Nĩwĩsĩ ĩvinda yĩla isyaa?
Job39:3 Nĩwĩsĩ yĩla nthia ikomaa nthĩ nĩ kana isyae
Job39:4 Tũtena twasyo nĩtũmeasya vinya na tũkeanĩa kĩthekanĩ
Job39:5 “Nũũ ũla walekilye ĩng'oi ya kĩthekanĩ yathi? Nũũ ũla wathaisye ĩng'oi yĩla yĩendaa mĩtũkĩ?
Job39:6 Nĩnayĩnengie vandũ weũnĩ yĩkalae
Job39:7 Yĩiendaa ndũanĩ nũndũ kwĩthĩawa kĩlonzo kingĩ
Job39:8 Ĩng'oi yĩu yĩĩsaa iĩmanĩ
Job39:9 “Nĩkũlya
Job39:10 Nũtonya kũmyova na ĩkanda ũkatuma ĩĩma
Job39:11 Nũtonya kũmĩkwatya nũndũ yĩ vinya mwingĩ
Job39:12 Nũtonya kũĩkĩĩa kana nĩkũsyoka
Job39:13 “Nyaa nĩkũnanganasya nthwau syayo na ngathĩĩo
Job39:14 Ĩtiaa matumbĩ mayo mũthanganĩ
Job39:15 Ndĩkũlasya kana nĩmatonya kũkinywa makakw'a
Job39:16 Yĩkalanasya na tũswii twayo ta tũte twayo
Job39:17 Ninyie natumie yĩthĩwa ĩte na ũĩ
Job39:18 Ĩndĩ ũu wĩ o vo
Job39:19 “Nĩũkũlya
Job39:20 Nue ũtumaa mbalasi ithaanyũka ta kĩtoli
Job39:21 Nĩvulasya nthĩ na maũũ yĩ mwandanĩ
Job39:22 Mbalasi ndĩsaa kwĩthĩwa na w'ĩa
Job39:23 Mĩio ya kaũ ĩla ala mailĩsĩte makuĩte
Job39:24 Nĩtetemaa ĩyenda kũthi na kũkĩlya kĩtoo ĩendete. Yĩla soo wavuvwa mbalasi ndĩtonya kũũngama vamwe.
Job39:25 Ĩvinda yonthe yĩla soo wavuvwa
Job39:26 “Nĩũkũlya
Job39:27 Ndiũ nĩyeteelaa ũmyumĩsye mwĩao
Job39:28 Nĩseũvasya nyũmba ya yo mavianĩ ĩũlũ
Job39:29 Kuma vau nĩmanthaa lĩu wayo
Job39:30 Ndiũ nĩsyũmbanĩaa vala ve syĩndũ ngw'ũ
Job40:1 Mwĩai Ngai nĩwaendeeie kũneena na Yovu amũkũlya atĩĩ
Job40:2 “Mũndũ wĩ ngananĩo akakananĩa na Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe? Ethĩwa mũndũ akakananĩa na Ngai
Job40:3 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yovu wasũngĩie Mwĩai Ngai asya atĩĩ
Job40:4 “Nyie ndyaĩlĩte o na vanini; ndonya ata ũkũsũngĩa? Nĩnakunĩka kanyw'a na kw'oko kwakwa ndikaneene.
Job40:5 Nĩnĩnaneenie
Job40:6 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Mwĩai Ngai e nthĩnĩ wa kĩuutani wasũngĩie Yovu amwĩa atĩĩ
Job40:7 “Yu ĩlũmye
Job40:8 Nĩũkũlya
Job40:9 Wĩ vinya takwa
Job40:10 “Ethĩwa nũu
Job40:11 Tulũĩla andũ ũthatu waku mwingĩ
Job40:12 Sisya ala mekathĩĩaa na ũimatheesya
Job40:13 Mathike nthĩ onthe vamwe
Job40:14 Nĩvo ĩndĩ nĩĩthĩwa mũndũ wa mbee kũkũtaĩa
Job40:15 “Yu sisya nguũ
Job40:16 Ĩndĩ vinya wayo wĩ inyunyunĩ syayo
Job40:17 Kĩsithe kyayo kĩũngamaa ta mũtĩ wa mũkũũ
Job40:18 Mavĩndĩ mayo nĩ ta mĩveleki ya kyũma kya mbulonzi
Job40:19 “Nĩyo ya mbee mawĩanĩ ma Ngai
Job40:20 Nĩkwĩthĩwa lĩu wayo wumaa iĩmanĩ
Job40:21 Nĩtindiaa ungu wa mĩtĩ yĩ mĩw'a
Job40:22 Ikuthu syĩ mĩw'a nimĩkĩĩaa muunyĩ
Job40:23 Ndĩtelemaw'a nĩ ũsĩ yĩla ũvingĩte
Job40:24 Ũla ũtonya kũmĩlinda metho na kũmĩkwata nũũ? Ũla ũtonya kũmĩkwatya na kũmĩtonya ĩnyiũũ nũũ?”
Job41:1 “Yovu nĩũkũlya
Job41:2 Nũtonya ũmyoveea ĩkanda ĩnyiũũ
Job41:3 Nĩtonya kũkwĩsũva nĩ kana ũmĩw'ĩe tei? Nĩtonya kũneena naku na ndeto nduu?
Job41:4 No ĩseũvye wĩw'ano naku
Job41:5 Nũtonya kũthaũka nayo ta kasũni
Job41:6 Atei ma makũyũ makeew'ana thooa wayo? Atandĩthya makatilanga Leviathani mamĩthoosye?
Job41:7 Nũtonya kusũsya kĩkonde kyayo na mĩw'a ya kyũma
Job41:8 Yĩla wĩmĩkiita ĩvinda o yĩmwe tũ
Job41:9 “Vai wĩkwatyo o na ũmwe wa kũmĩsinda
Job41:10 Vai mũndũ mwai ũtonya kũmĩamũkya
Job41:11 Nũũ ũla wĩ na ĩkoani nakwa nĩ kana nĩmũĩve? Syĩndũ syonthe ila syĩ ĩũlũ wa nthĩ nĩ syakwa.
Job41:12 “Ndilea ũkũtavya ĩũlũ wa maũũ ma Leviathani
Job41:13 Nũũ ũla ũtonya kũmyumya kĩthuma? Nũũ ũla ũtonya kũmĩtonya akavũthũa ngao ya yo ndũmu?
Job41:14 Nũũ ũla ũtonya kũtuma yathamya? Maeo mayo ngalĩko syonthe nĩ ma kũtelemya.
Job41:15 Mũongo wayo wĩ mĩthĩa ya ngao
Job41:16 Kĩla ngao ĩkwatanĩtw'e na ĩla ĩngĩ ikalũma
Job41:17 Syovanĩtw'e vamwe syĩ ndũmu
Job41:18 Leviathani yaathimũa kyeni nĩkĩkenaa
Job41:19 Mũĩ sya mwaki nĩsyumaa kanyw'anĩ wayo
Job41:20 Syũki nĩyumaa manyiũũnĩ mayo
Job41:21 Mĩthũmũ ya yo nĩtumaa makaa makana
Job41:22 Ngingo ya yo yĩ vinya mwingĩ
Job41:23 Makwaũ ma mwĩĩ wayo nĩmakwatanĩte
Job41:24 Ngoo ya yo nĩ mbũmũ ta ĩvia; nĩ mbũmũ ta ĩvia ya ũthia.
Job41:25 Yĩla yookĩla
Job41:26 Vai ũvyũ ũtonya kũmĩũmĩsya
Job41:27 Kwa Leviathani kyũma nĩ ũndũ ũmwe na nyeki
Job41:28 Maangi maituma ĩsemba
Job41:29 Kwayo nzũma nĩ ũndũ ũmwe na mavuti
Job41:30 Makwaũ ma ĩvu ya yo mailyĩ ilĩo mbũĩ
Job41:31 Nĩtheũkasya kĩw'ũ kya ũkanga
Job41:32 Ĩendaa ĩtiĩte nzĩa ĩkũkenga
Job41:33 Vai kĩndũ ĩũlũ wa nthĩ kĩtonya kũelekanw'a na Leviathani; nĩ kyũmbe kĩte w'ĩa.
Job41:34 Nĩvũthasya nyamũ o na ila syĩ ngathĩĩo; nĩyo mũsumbĩ wa nyamũ syonthe.”
Job42:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yovu wasũngĩie Mwĩai Ngai amwĩa atĩĩ
Job42:2 “Nĩnĩsĩ kana we Mwĩai Ngai nũtonya kwĩka maũndũ onthe
Job42:3 Wĩkũlya
Job42:4 Wambĩie nĩthukĩĩsye ũineena
Job42:5 Mbeenĩ nĩneesĩ o ũndũ andũ mandavĩtye ĩũlũ waku
Job42:6 Kwoou nĩngwĩw'a nthoni nũndũ wa maũndũ onthe ala nĩneenete
Job42:7 Mwĩai Ngai amina kũneena na Yovu
Job42:8 Kwoou yu osa nzaũ mũonza
Job42:9 Kwoou Elivasi kuma Temani
Job42:10 Yovu amina kũvoyea anyanyae make atatũ
Job42:11 Ana-a-ĩthe
Job42:12 Mwĩai Ngai nĩwaathimie Yovu mĩthenyanĩ yake ya mũminũkĩlyo mbee wa ũndũ wamũathimĩte mbeenĩ. Yovu aĩ na malondu ngili ĩkũmi na inya
Job42:13 O ta ũu Yovu aĩ na ana mũonza na eĩtu atatũ.
Job42:14 Eetie mwĩĩtu ũla wake wa mbee Yemima
Job42:15 Vayaĩ aka angĩ nthĩ yonthe maanakavĩte ta eĩtu ma Yovu. Ĩthe woo nĩwamanengie ũtiĩwa vamwe na ana-a-ĩthe moo.
Job42:16 Ĩtina wa maũndũ asu
Job42:17 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yovu wakwie e mũkũũ mũno.
Psalms1:1 Nĩ mũathime mũndũ ũla ũtaatĩĩaa ũtao wa andũ ala athũku
Psalms1:2 ĩndĩ ũtanu wake nĩ kwĩanĩsya mĩao ya Mwĩai Ngai
Psalms1:3 Ailyĩ ta mũtĩ ũvandĩtwe ũtee wa tũlũsĩ twĩ kĩw'ũ
Psalms1:4 Ĩndĩ andũ athũku mayĩilyĩ ũu
Psalms1:5 Kwoou ala mekaa naĩ maikalea kũsilĩlwa
Psalms1:6 Nũndũ Mwĩai Ngai nũtongoeasya na kũsũvĩa ala alũngalu
Psalms2:1 Nĩkĩ andũ ma mbaĩ ingĩ mavangaa mĩvango mĩthũku? Nĩkĩ andũ mavangaa maũndũ
Psalms2:2 Asumbĩ ma nthĩ nĩmeyũmbanasya
Psalms2:3 Maneenaa makasya atĩĩ
Psalms2:4 Ũla ũsumbĩkaa e ĩtunĩ nũmathekeeaa
Psalms2:5 Nĩvo ĩndĩ ũmakanasya ũthatunĩ wake
Psalms2:6 “Nĩniĩte mũsumbĩ wakwa
Psalms2:7 Mũsumbĩ eneena ayasya
Psalms2:8 Ngũlye
Psalms2:9 Ũkamasumbĩka wĩ na ũkũmũ
Psalms2:10 Yu ĩndĩ
Psalms2:11 Thũkũmai Mwĩai Ngai mwĩ na kĩkĩo kyake
Psalms2:12 Nengai mwana wake ndaĩa ndakese kũthata
Psalms3:1 Ame Mwĩai Ngai
Psalms3:2 Aingĩ maneenaa ĩũlũ wakwa makasya atĩĩ
Psalms3:3 Ĩndĩ we Mwĩai Ngai
Psalms3:4 Nĩnĩkaĩlaa Mwĩai Ngai na wasya mũnene
Psalms3:5 Nĩnĩkomaa na ngĩlĩkwa; nĩnĩamũkaa ĩngĩ
Psalms3:6 Ndiũkĩa andũ ngili mbingĩ
Psalms3:7 Ame Mwĩai Ngai
Psalms3:8 We Mwĩai Ngai nue ũtangĩĩaa; athima andũ maku! Sela
Psalms4:1 Ame Ngai wakwa mũlũngalu
Psalms4:2 Inyw'ĩ andũ mwĩmbanangĩa ĩsyĩtwa kũvika ĩndĩĩ? Mwĩendeea kwendeew'a nĩ maũndũ ma mana
Psalms4:3 Manyai kana Mwĩai Ngai nũvathĩte ala alũngalu methĩwe make
Psalms4:4 Thataai
Psalms4:5 Umyai nthembo ila syaĩlĩte
Psalms4:6 Nĩ aingĩ ala makũlasya
Psalms4:7 Nũtumĩte nĩthĩwa na ũtanu mwingĩ ngoonĩ yakwa
Psalms4:8 Ngakomaa na kũlĩkwa nĩ na mũuo
Psalms5:1 Ame Mwĩai Ngai
Psalms5:2 Ngai wakwa
Psalms5:3 Ame Mwĩai Ngai
Psalms5:4 Nũndũ we ndwĩ Ngai ũla ũtanaw'a nĩ ũthũku; ndwĩtĩkĩlaa ũthũku vala ũĩ.
Psalms5:5 Ala mekathĩĩaa maitonya ũkũthengeea; nũmenaa eki ma naĩ onthe.
Psalms5:6 Nũminaa onthe ala maneenaa ũvũngũ; nũleanaa na oaani na akengani.
Psalms5:7 Ĩndĩ nũndũ wa wendo waku mũnene
Psalms5:8 Ame Mwĩai Ngai ndongoesye ũlũngalunĩ waku
Psalms5:9 Ndeto sya amaitha makwa iitonya kũĩkĩĩwa; ngoo syoo syusũĩte wanangĩko. Ndeto ila maneenaa iilyĩ ta syaw'o na ta nzeo
Psalms5:10 Ame Ngai
Psalms5:11 Ĩndĩ eka onthe ala mevithaa kwaku matane; eka mainae kĩla ĩvinda nũndũ wa ũtanu. Sũvĩa ala makwendete
Psalms5:12 Nũndũ we Mwĩai Ngai nũathimaa ũla mũlũngalu; wendo waku nũmũsũvĩaa ta ngao.
Psalms6:1 Ame Mwĩai Ngai ndũkangany'e ũthatunĩ waku
Psalms6:2 Ame Mwĩai Ngai mbĩw'ĩe tei
Psalms6:3 O ta ũu nĩ na thĩna mwingĩ thayũnĩ. Ame Mwĩai Ngai wĩndeka ũu nginya ĩndĩĩ?
Psalms6:4 Ame Mwĩai Ngai ũka ũndangĩĩe; ndangĩĩe nũndũ wa wendo waku ũtaolekaa.
Psalms6:5 Nũndũ vai mũndũ ũkũlilikanaa e mũkw'ũ. Ũla ũtonya ũkũtaĩa e mbũanĩ nũũ?
Psalms6:6 Nĩnĩnoetw'e nĩ kũluma kwakwa; kĩla ũtukũ nĩnĩnyithasya kĩtanda kyakwa na methoi; nĩnĩkolasya mũto wakwa na methoi.
Psalms6:7 Kyeva nĩkĩtumĩte metho makwa matona nesa
Psalms6:8 Umai vala nĩĩ inyw'ĩ andũ athũku
Psalms6:9 Mwĩai Ngai nĩwĩw'ĩte kĩĩo kyakwa ngĩmũkũlya ambĩw'ĩe tei
Psalms6:10 Amaitha makwa onthe makakwatwa nĩ nthoni na kũsaanĩw'a; makasyoka na mĩtũkĩ me na nthoni mbingĩ.
Psalms7:1 Ame Mwĩai Ngai
Psalms7:2 maikese kũndembũanga ũndũ mũnyambũ ũtembũangaa nyamũ
Psalms7:3 Ame Mwĩai Ngai
Psalms7:4 ethĩwa nĩnĩkĩte mũnyanyawa naĩ
Psalms7:5 eka mũmaitha makwa angatĩĩe na kũngwata
Psalms7:6 Ame Mwĩai Ngai ũkĩla ũthatunĩ waku; ũkĩla ũsiĩĩe ũthatu wa amaitha makwa; ũkĩla Ngai wakwa; umya sila wa katĩ.
Psalms7:7 Ũmbany'a andũ onthe vakuvĩ naku
Psalms7:8 Mwĩai Ngai nĩwe ũsilĩlaa andũ. Ame Mwĩai Ngai
Psalms7:9 Wĩ Ngai mũlũngalu
Psalms7:10 Ngai nĩwe ngao yakwa
Psalms7:11 Ngai nĩ mũsili mũlũngalu
Psalms7:12 Mũndũ alea kwĩlila
Psalms7:13 Nĩwũmbanasya mĩio yake ya kaũ ĩla yũaa; nũtumaa maangi make methĩwa na mwaki.
Psalms7:14 Mũndũ mũthũku asũanĩaa kwĩka naĩ
Psalms7:15 Nĩwĩnzaa ĩima na kũyĩvukũa
Psalms7:16 Ũthũku wake nũmũsyokeaa we mwene
Psalms7:17 Nĩngũtũngĩa Mwĩai Ngai mũvea
Psalms8:1 Ame Mwĩai Ngai
Psalms8:2 Ũkumyo waku nĩwinawa nĩ syana na tũũkenge. Wĩ ũsũvĩonĩ kumana na amaitha maku
Psalms8:3 Yĩla nasisya matu
Psalms8:4 mũndũ nĩ kyaũ
Psalms8:5 Nĩwamũmbie akilĩlye kwĩkala ta Ngai; nũmũnengete kwĩthĩwa na ũkumyo na ndaĩa.
Psalms8:6 Nĩwatw'ĩkĩthisye mũndũ mũnene wa syĩndũ syonthe ila woombie; nĩwaiie syĩndũ syonthe syĩthĩwe ungu wa ũtonyi wake:
Psalms8:7 Mbũi na malondu na indo
Psalms8:8 nyũnyi sya yayaya
Psalms8:9 Ame Mwĩai Ngai
Psalms9:1 We Mwĩai Ngai ngakũtaĩaa na ngoo yakwa yonthe; ngatavanasya mawĩa maku ma kũseng'ya ala wĩkaa.
Psalms9:2 Ngatana na kwĩw'a mũyo mũno nthĩnĩ waku; ngaina ngĩkumya ĩsyĩtwa yaku we Ũla wĩ Ĩũlũ Mũno.
Psalms9:3 Yĩla amaitha makwa makwona
Psalms9:4 Nũmbĩkĩte ũndũ ũla waĩlĩte; nĩwĩkalĩte kĩvĩlanĩ kyaku kya kĩ-ũsumbĩ
Psalms9:5 Nũkanĩtye andũ ma nthĩ ingĩ
Psalms9:6 Amaitha maitũ nĩmathelete kũvika tene na tene; nĩwanangĩte ndũa syoo na makola vyũ.
Psalms9:7 Ĩndĩ Mwĩai Ngai nũsumbĩkaa tene na tene
Psalms9:8 Nũsumbĩkaa nthĩ na ũlũngalu; nũsilĩlaa nthĩ ingĩ na sila wa katĩ.
Psalms9:9 Mwĩai Ngai nĩwe wĩvitho mũlũmu wa ala mathĩnaw'a
Psalms9:10 Ala makwĩsĩ nĩmakũĩkĩĩaa
Psalms9:11 Inĩai Mwĩai Ngai ũla ũsumbĩkaa e Saioni mbathi sya kũmũtaĩa
Psalms9:12 Ngai nũlilikanaa ala mathĩnaa; ndolawa nĩ kĩĩo kyoo
Psalms9:13 Ame Mwĩai Ngai mbĩw'ĩe tei
Psalms9:14 nĩ kana nĩmatavye andũ ma Yelũsalemu
Psalms9:15 Andũ ma nthĩ ingĩ nĩmalikile ĩimanĩ yĩla menzĩte; maũũ moo nĩmakwatiw'e nĩ mũteo ũla mateie.
Psalms9:16 Mwĩai Ngai nĩwĩvuanĩtye kwa nzĩa ya ũsili wake wa katĩ; ala athũku nĩmakwataw'a nĩ maũndũ ala mekaa. Sela
Psalms9:17 Kĩkw'ũ nĩkyo mũminũkĩlyo wa andũ onthe ala athũku; andũ onthe ala maleaa Ngai.
Psalms9:18 Ĩndĩ athĩni maikola o na ĩndĩĩ
Psalms9:19 Ame Mwĩai Ngai ũkĩla
Psalms9:20 Ame Mwĩai Ngai mekĩe w'ĩa; eka andũ ma nthĩ mamanye kana mo no andũ. Sela
Psalms10:1 Ame Mwĩai Ngai nĩkĩ wĩ vaasa mũno? Wĩvithaa ĩvindanĩ yĩla twĩ na mathĩna nĩkĩ?
Psalms10:2 Andũ athũku me na ngathĩĩo nĩmathĩnasya ngya mũno; eka nemo ene makwatwe nĩ mĩvango ĩla maseũvĩtye.
Psalms10:3 Mũndũ mũthũku ekathĩĩaa nũndũ wa mawendi mathũku ala wĩ namo; mũndũ wĩ na ĩtomo ya syĩndũ nũmũumaa na kũmũvũthya Mwĩai Ngai.
Psalms10:4 Nũndũ wa ngathĩĩo mũndũ mũthũku ndamanthaa Ngai
Psalms10:5 Kĩla ĩvinda mũndũ mũthũku nũendeeaa nesa maũndũnĩ make; ndatonya kũmanya ũndũ ũsilĩlo wa Ngai ũilyĩ; nũvũthasya amaitha make onthe.
Psalms10:6 Asũanĩaa akasya
Psalms10:7 Aneenaa ndeto sya kũumana
Psalms10:8 Ekalaa kũndũ motũinĩ oveesye; nĩwumaa kĩthekanĩ akoaa andũ matena ĩvĩtyo. Nũsyaĩĩasya evithĩte one ala matetonya.
Psalms10:9 Oveeasya evithĩte ta mũnyambũ wĩ kĩsumonĩ kyaw'o
Psalms10:10 Ũla ũtetonya nũvithũkĩawa na kũvalũkw'a nthĩ; nũvalũkaw'a nĩ ũtonyi wa mũndũ mũthũku.
Psalms10:11 Mũndũ mũthũku asũanĩaa akasya
Psalms10:12 Ame Mwĩai Ngai ũkĩla; ame Ngai kany'a mũndũ ũsu mũthũku
Psalms10:13 Mũndũ mũthũku atonya kũvũthya Ngai ata? Nĩkĩ ũsũanĩaa akasya
Psalms10:14 Ĩndĩ we Mwĩai Ngai nĩwene ala me na thĩna na kyeva; nĩwĩyũmbanĩtye kĩla ĩvinda kũmatetheesya. Mũndũ ũla ũtetonya nũkwĩkwatasya we Mwĩai Ngai; kĩla ĩvinda nue wĩthĩawa wĩ ũtethyo wa syana ndiwa.
Psalms10:15 Mina vinya wa mũndũ ũla mũthũku na wĩkaa naĩ; mũkany'e nũndũ wa maũndũ mathũku ala wĩkĩte
Psalms10:16 Mwĩai Ngai nĩ mũsumbĩ tene na tene; andũ ma nthĩ ingĩ makathela kuma nthĩ yake.
Psalms10:17 Ame Mwĩai Ngai nĩwĩthukĩĩasya kwenda kwa ala mathĩnaw'a; nũmathangaasya na ũyĩthukĩĩsya kĩĩo kyoo.
Psalms10:18 Ete sila wa katĩ kwa syana ndiwa na kwa ala mathĩnaw'a
Psalms11:1 Nĩvithaa nthĩnĩ wa Mwĩai Ngai; mũtonya ata yu kũmbĩa
Psalms11:2 Nĩkwĩthĩwa ala athũku nĩmakootaa ũta; nĩmekĩaa maangi moo ndiinĩ sya ũta
Psalms11:3 Andũ ala alũngalu makeeka ata
Psalms11:4 Mwĩai Ngai e Ĩkalũnĩ yake ĩtheu; Mwĩai Ngai e kĩvĩlanĩ kyake kya kĩ-ũsumbĩ ĩtunĩ; nũsyaĩĩasya ana ma andũ
Psalms11:5 Mwĩai Ngai nũsiasya maũndũ ala andũ aseo na athũku mekaa
Psalms11:6 Mwĩai Ngai akatuma ala athũku
Psalms11:7 Nĩkwĩthĩwa Mwĩai Ngai nĩ mũlũngalu
Psalms12:1 Mwĩai Ngai tũtetheesye
Psalms12:2 Kĩla mũndũ nũkengaa mũtũi wake; maneenaa ndeto sya ũvũngũ
Psalms12:3 Mwĩai Ngai tuma andũ asu maneenaa ũvũngũ mavindya
Psalms12:4 Maneenaa makasya
Psalms12:5 Ĩndĩ Mwĩai Ngai easya
Psalms12:6 Ndeto sya Mwĩai Ngai nĩ ntheu
Psalms12:7 Ame Mwĩai Ngai tũsũvĩe; tũsũvĩe kuma andũnĩ ma mũthemba ũsu
Psalms12:8 Andũ ala athũku me kĩla vandũ
Psalms13:1 Ame Mwĩai Ngai
Psalms13:2 Nĩthĩnany'a na mosũanĩo makwa nginya ĩndĩĩ
Psalms13:3 Ame Mwĩai Ngai
Psalms13:4 kana amaitha makwa masye
Psalms13:5 Ĩndĩ nĩkwatĩtye wendo waku ũtaolekaa
Psalms13:6 Ngainĩa Mwĩai Ngai
Psalms14:1 Ndia yaasya ngoonĩ ya yo
Psalms14:2 Mwĩai Ngai nũsiasya andũ e ĩtunĩ
Psalms14:3 Ĩndĩ onthe nĩmaumĩte nzĩanĩ; onthe nĩmekaa maũndũ mathũku; vai ũmwe woo wĩkaa ũla waĩlu; vaiĩ o na ũmwe.
Psalms14:4 “Nĩkũlya
Psalms14:5 Makakwatwa nĩ w'ĩa mwingĩ
Psalms14:6 Inyw'ĩ andũ athũku nĩmwanangaa mĩvango ya ngya
Psalms14:7 Ame kethĩwa ũtangĩĩo wa Ĩsilaeli nĩwuma Saioni! Yĩla Mwĩai Ngai wĩtuma andũ make maendeea nesa ĩngĩ
Psalms15:1 Mwĩai Ngai nũũ ũla ũtonya kũlika Ĩkalũnĩ yaku? Nũũ ũtonya kwĩkala kĩĩmanĩ kyaku kĩtheu?
Psalms15:2 Nĩ ũla wĩkaa kwenda kwa Ngai
Psalms15:3 nĩ ũla ũtaneenaa ndeto sya kũsuka andũ ala angĩ
Psalms15:4 Nĩ mũndũ ũla ũvũthasya ala mekaa naĩ
Psalms15:5 Nĩ ũla ũkovethanasya mbesa ate kwĩtya ũtandĩthyo
Psalms16:1 Ame Mwĩai Ngai nzũvĩe
Psalms16:2 Nĩnĩneenete na Mwĩai Ngai ngamwĩa
Psalms16:3 Kwondũ wa ala atheu me ĩũlũ wa nthĩ
Psalms16:4 Kĩmako kya ala mamanthanaa na ngai ingĩ kĩkaingĩva
Psalms16:5 We Mwĩai Ngai nue ũtiĩwa wakwa na kyonthe kĩla ngwenda
Psalms16:6 Nũnengae mĩthĩnzĩo mĩseo mũno; kwa w'o ũtiĩwa wakwa nĩwakwendeesya.
Psalms16:7 Nĩngũtaĩa Mwĩai Ngai ũla ũnengae ũtao; o na ũtukũ ngoo yakwa nĩmanyĩasya.
Psalms16:8 Kĩla ĩvinda nĩnĩthĩawa nĩsĩ kana Mwĩai Ngai e vakuvĩ nakwa
Psalms16:9 Kwoou nĩngũtana na kwĩw'a mũyo
Psalms16:10 nũndũ nũnzũvĩaa kuma ũtonyinĩ wa kĩkw'ũ
Psalms16:11 Nũmbonasya nzĩa ĩla ĩetae thayũ; vala ũĩ ve ũtanu mwingĩ
Psalms17:1 Ame Mwĩai Ngai ĩthukĩĩsye kĩĩo kyakwa kya ũw'o! Ĩw'a kĩĩo kyakwa; tea kũtũ wĩw'e mboya yumĩte kanyw'anĩ ũtaneenaa ũvũngũ.
Psalms17:2 Eka ũtw'ĩo ĩũlũ wakwa wume kũla ũĩ
Psalms17:3 We nĩwĩsĩ ngoo yakwa vyũ
Psalms17:4 Ndineenaa ndeto nthũku ta andũ ala angĩ
Psalms17:5 Nĩnĩkaa maũndũ ala maĩlĩte mbee waku; ndyaaĩka ũndũ ũte mwaĩlu.
Psalms17:6 Ame Mwĩai Ngai nĩngwĩkaĩlaa
Psalms17:7 Onany'a wendo waku wa kũseng'ya ũtaolekaa; we ũla ũtangĩĩaa andũ ala mokaa kũla ũĩ
Psalms17:8 Nzũvĩe ta kyũma kya itho; mbithe muunyĩnĩ wa nthwau syaku.
Psalms17:9 Mbithe kuma kwa andũ athũku ala manthĩnasya
Psalms17:10 Andũ asu mai tei
Psalms17:11 Nĩmangatĩĩe
Psalms17:12 Mailyĩ mũnyambũ weteelete ũkwate
Psalms17:13 Ame Mwĩai Ngai ũkĩla
Psalms17:14 Ame Mwĩai Ngai ndangĩĩe na ũtonyi waku kuma kwa andũ asu; andũ ala ĩtuvi yoo yĩ vaa ĩũlũ wa nthĩ. Mathĩny'e na mathĩna ala ũmaiĩe; nĩvethĩawe mathĩna meanĩe kwondũ wa syana syoo
Psalms17:15 Ĩndĩ ngakwona nũndũ nĩ mũlũngalu; na yĩla nĩamũka ngeanĩwa nĩ kwona ũndũ ũilyĩ.
Psalms18:1 Ame Mwĩai Ngai vinya wakwa nĩngwendete.
Psalms18:2 Mwĩai Ngai nĩwe ũnzũvĩaa
Psalms18:3 Nĩnĩkaĩlaa Mwĩai Ngai ũla waĩlĩte kũtaĩwa
Psalms18:4 Mĩisyo ya kĩkw'ũ nĩyanthyũlũlũkĩte; itulumo sya wanangĩko syaĩ ĩũlũ wakwa.
Psalms18:5 Mĩisyo ya kũla maveva ma ala akw'ũ mekalaa nĩyanthyũlũlũkĩte; mĩteo ya kĩkw'ũ nĩyangwatie.
Psalms18:6 Thĩnanĩ wakwa nĩnamwĩkaĩlile Mwĩai Ngai; nĩneekaĩlile Ngai wakwa andetheesye. Nĩweewie wasya wakwa e Ĩkalũnĩ yake; nĩweethukĩĩisye kĩĩo kyakwa na matũ make.
Psalms18:7 Nĩvo ĩndĩ nthĩ yatetemie na yathingitha; myambĩlĩĩlyo ya iĩma nĩyathingithie
Psalms18:8 Syũki nĩyaumie manyiũũnĩ make
Psalms18:9 Nĩwaatũie matu
