Matthew16:23 Yesũ nĩweethyũũie amũsisya na amwĩa atĩĩ
Matthew16:24 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ weeie amanyĩw'a make atĩĩ
Matthew16:25 Nũndũ ũla wendaa kũsũvĩa thayũ wake akawasya
Matthew16:26 Ve ũtethyo mwaũ
Matthew16:27 “Mwana wa Mũndũ akooka ĩngĩ kũũ nthĩ e na alaĩka na ũtonyi mũnene wa Ĩthe wake. Nĩvo ĩndĩ ũkatuva kĩla mũndũ kwĩanana na meko make.
Matthew16:28 Nĩmũtavya w'o
Matthew17:1 Ĩtina wa matukũ thanthatũ
Matthew17:2 Me vau
Matthew17:3 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Eliya na Mwose maumĩlile vau
Matthew17:4 Vetelo nĩweeie Yesũ atĩĩ
Matthew17:5 Vetelo aendee kũneena
Matthew17:6 Yĩla amanyĩw'a meewie wasya ũsu
Matthew17:7 Yesũ nĩwaendie vala maĩ na amakiita aimea atĩĩ
Matthew17:8 Yĩla mookĩlilye metho
Matthew17:9 Yesũ na amanyĩw'a asu matheete kuma kĩĩmanĩ
Matthew17:10 Nĩvo ĩndĩ amanyĩw'a asu mamũkũlilye atĩĩ
Matthew17:11 Yesũ amasũngĩa amea atĩĩ
Matthew17:12 Ĩndĩ ekai nĩmũtavye
Matthew17:13 Nĩvo ĩndĩ amanyĩw'a asu maeleiwe kana ematavasya ĩũlũ wa Yoana Mũvatisi na ti Eliya.
Matthew17:14 Yĩla Yesũ na amanyĩw'a asu make masyokie vala ve ĩkomano
Matthew17:15 “Mwĩai
Matthew17:16 Nĩkaetie vala ve amanyĩw'a maku
Matthew17:17 Yesũ nĩwameie atĩĩ
Matthew17:18 Yesũ nĩweeaĩie ĩimũ yĩu yalikĩte kamwananĩ yume
Matthew17:19 Nĩvo ĩndĩ amanyĩw'a maendie vala ve Yesũ me oka
Matthew17:20 Nake amasũngĩa amea atĩĩ
Matthew17:21 No kwa kũvoya na kũtĩĩa kũya mũtonya kũlũngya ĩimũ ya mũthemba ũsu.”]
Matthew17:22 Yĩla amanyĩw'a onthe moombanie vamwe Kalilii
Matthew17:23 na maimũaa
Matthew17:24 Yesũ na amanyĩw'a make nĩmaendie Kavelinaũmu. Me kũu
Matthew17:25 Nake amasũngĩa atĩĩ
Matthew17:26 Vetelo amũsũngĩa atĩĩ
Matthew17:27 Ĩndĩ nĩ kana tũikew'ĩthye andũ aa woo
Matthew18:1 Ĩvindanĩ o yĩu amanyĩw'a nĩmaendie vala ve Yesũ mamũkũlya atĩĩ
Matthew18:2 Yesũ nĩweetie kana kanini akaũngamya mbee woo
Matthew18:3 na amea atĩĩ
Matthew18:4 Ũla wĩnyivasya akekala ta kana kaa
Matthew18:5 Ũndũ ũngĩ
Matthew18:6 “Ethĩwa ve mũndũ ũkatuma ũmwe wa aa anini mambĩtĩkĩlaa aluluutĩka
Matthew18:7 Nĩ kyeva kũũ nthĩ kwĩthĩwa kwĩ syĩndũ ituma andũ maluluutĩka! Nasyo syĩndũ isu no nginya ikethĩwa vo
Matthew18:8 “Ethĩwa kw'oko kwaku kana kũũ kwaku kũkatuma ũluluutĩka
Matthew18:9 Ethĩwa itho yaku yĩkatuma ũluluutĩka
Matthew18:10 “Sisyai mũikavũthye ũmwe wa aa anini
Matthew18:11 Mwana wa Mũndũ ookie kũtangĩĩa andũ ala au.]
Matthew18:12 “Kwa sũanĩai
Matthew18:13 Ayona
Matthew18:14 O ta ũu
Matthew18:15 “Ethĩwa mwana-a-asa nũkũvĩtĩsye
Matthew18:16 Ĩndĩ aema ũkwĩthukĩĩsya
Matthew18:17 Aema kwĩthukĩĩsya asu
Matthew18:18 “Nĩmũtavya w'o
Matthew18:19 “Nĩngũmũtavya ũndũ ũngĩ: Ĩvinda o na yĩva yĩla elĩ menyu kũũ ĩũlũ wa nthĩ makew'ana mavoye ĩũlũ wa ũndũ o na wĩva
Matthew18:20 Nĩkwĩthĩwa
Matthew18:21 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Vetelo wookĩlile amũkũlya Yesũ atĩĩ
Matthew18:22 Yesũ amũsũngĩa amwĩa atĩĩ
Matthew18:23 Namũtavya ũu nĩkwĩthĩwa ũsumbĩ wa ĩtu no ũvw'ananw'e na mũsumbĩ ũmwe ũla waendie kũsisya thiĩ ũla wataĩte kĩla ũmwe wa athũkũmi make.
Matthew18:24 Yĩla wambĩlĩĩlye ũndũ ũsu
Matthew18:25 Mũthũkũmi ũsu ndaĩ na mbesa isu ũndũ ũĩva mũsumbĩ. Kwoou mũsumbĩ aumya mwĩao mũthũkũmi ũsu
Matthew18:26 Mũthũkũmi ũsu nĩwatulilye ndu mbee wa mũsumbĩ na amwĩsũva ayasya atĩĩ
Matthew18:27 Mũsumbĩ nĩwamwĩw'ĩie tei
Matthew18:28 “Mũthũkũmi ũsu aendete
Matthew18:29 Mũthũkũmi ũsu waĩ na thiĩ wa ndinalĩ ĩana
Matthew18:30 Mũthũkũmi ũsu ndaamwĩthukĩĩsya
Matthew18:31 “Yĩla athũkũmi ala angĩ moonie ũndũ kweekĩka
Matthew18:32 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũsumbĩ weetie mũthũkũmi ũsu wamũekeie thiĩ wake amwĩa atĩĩ
Matthew18:33 We ndwĩĩaĩlĩte kũmwĩw'ĩa tei mũthũkũmi ũla ũngĩ o ũndũ nyie ngwĩw'ĩie tei?’
Matthew18:34 Mũsumbĩ nĩweewie woo mũno na anengane mũthũkũmi ũsu ekw'e yela
Matthew18:35 Ũu now'o Ĩthe wakwa ũla wĩ ĩtunĩ ũkekana na kĩla ũmwe wenyu
Matthew19:1 Yesũ amina kũneena maũndũ asu onthe
Matthew19:2 Andũ aingĩ nĩmamũatĩĩie
Matthew19:3 Avalisi amwe nĩmookie vala ũĩ mayenda kũmũtata na kwoou mamũkũlya atĩĩ
Matthew19:4 Yesũ amasũngĩa amea atĩĩ
Matthew19:5 Ngai nĩwaisye atĩĩ
Matthew19:6 Kwa kĩtumi kĩu
Matthew19:7 Avalisi asu mamũkũlya Yesũ atĩĩ
Matthew19:8 Yesũ amasũngĩa atĩĩ
Matthew19:9 Nakwa ĩndĩ ekai nĩmũtavye
Matthew19:10 Amanyĩw'a make mamwĩa atĩĩ
Matthew19:11 Yesũ amasũngĩa atĩĩ
Matthew19:12 Ve itumi syĩ kĩvathũkany'o ila ituma aũme amwe matatwaana. Amwe nũndũ masyaiwe me avakũĩku; angĩ nĩmavakũiwe nĩ andũ na kwoou maitonya kũtwaana. Aũme angĩ nĩmeyumĩtye maikatwaane nĩ kana matonye kũmũthũkũma Ngai nesa. Mũndũ ũla ũtonya kũatĩĩa ũmanyĩsyo ũũ
Matthew19:13 Andũ amwe nĩmaeteie Yesũ syana nini asilĩĩle moko na kũivoyea
Matthew19:14 Yesũ nĩweeie amanyĩw'a make atĩĩ
Matthew19:15 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wasilĩĩile moko na auma vau athi.
Matthew19:16 Ĩvinda yĩmwe mwanake ũmwe nĩwaendie vala ve Yesũ amũkũlya atĩĩ
Matthew19:17 Yesũ amũkũlya
Matthew19:18 Mwanake ũsu amũkũlya atĩĩ
Matthew19:19 nenga ĩthe waku na inyia waku ndaĩa
Matthew19:20 Mwanake ũsu amwĩa atĩĩ
Matthew19:21 Yesũ amũsũngĩa amwĩa atĩĩ
Matthew19:22 Yĩla mwanake ũsu weewie ndeto isu
Matthew19:23 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ weeie amanyĩw'a make atĩĩ
Matthew19:24 O ĩngĩ ekai nĩmũtavye
Matthew19:25 Yĩla amanyĩw'a meewie ũu
Matthew19:26 Yesũ nĩwamasyaisye na amea atĩĩ
Matthew19:27 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Vetelo weeie Yesũ atĩĩ
Matthew19:28 Yesũ amea atĩĩ
Matthew19:29 O ta ũu mũndũ o na wĩva ũla ũtiĩte mũsyĩ
Matthew19:30 Ĩndĩ aingĩ ala yu matongoetye makatongoew'a na aingĩ ala yu matongoew'e makatongosya.”
Matthew20:1 Yesũ nĩwaendeeie kũneena asya atĩĩ
Matthew20:2 Nĩweetĩkĩlanile namo amaĩve ndinalĩ ĩmwe kwa mũthenya
Matthew20:3 Ta saa itatũ sya kwakya
Matthew20:4 nake amea atĩĩ
Matthew20:5 Na kwoou mathi. Nĩweekie oou ĩngĩ syũa yaũngama na saa kenda.
Matthew20:6 Ta saa kũmi na ũmwe
Matthew20:7 Namo mamũsũngĩa mamwĩa atĩĩ
Matthew20:8 “Syũa yĩ vakuvĩ kũthũa
Matthew20:9 Andũ ala mambĩĩe kũthũkũma saa kũmi na ũmwe nĩmookie maĩvwe
Matthew20:10 Yĩla ala maandĩkiwe mbee mookie maĩvwe
Matthew20:11 Yĩla maminie kwosa mbesa syoo
Matthew20:12 mayasya atĩĩ
Matthew20:13 “Nĩvo ĩndĩ mwene mũũnda wasũngĩie ũmwe woo amwĩa atĩĩ
Matthew20:14 Osa kĩla kyaku na ũithi. Nĩ ngenda yakwa kũĩva aa maandĩkwa ĩtina o ũndũ ũmwe nenyu.
Matthew20:15 Teene no nĩ na mwanya wa kwĩka ũndũ ngwenda na mbesa syakwa? Kana ko ũũnzisya na itho ĩthũku nũndũ wa ũlau wakwa?’ ”
Matthew20:16 Yesũ nĩwaminĩie na kwasya atĩĩ
Matthew20:17 Yesũ aendete Yelũsalemu nĩweetie amanyĩw'a make ĩkũmi na elĩ nzama
Matthew20:18 “Ĩthukĩĩsyei
Matthew20:19 na maimũnengane kwa Andũ-ma-mbaĩ-ingĩ ala namo makamũthekeea na kũmũvũa na kũmwamba ngelany'onĩ. Ĩndĩ akathayũũka kuma kwa akw'ũ ĩtina wa mĩthenya ĩtatũ.”
Matthew20:20 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũka wa Nzevetii wookie e na ana make elĩ vala ve Yesũ
Matthew20:21 Yesũ nĩwamũkũlilye atĩĩ
Matthew20:22 Yesũ atavya ana asu amea atĩĩ
Matthew20:23 Yesũ amea atĩĩ
Matthew20:24 Yĩla amanyĩw'a ala angĩ ĩkũmi meewie kĩla Yesũ ũkũkũlaw'a
Matthew20:25 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wametie onthe vamwe na amea atĩĩ
Matthew20:26 Ũu ti w'o kwaĩlĩte kwĩthĩwa kũilyĩ katĩ wenyu. Ethĩwa ũmwe wenyu nũkwenda kwĩthĩwa e mũnene
Matthew20:27 Na ethĩwa ũmwe wenyu eenda kwĩthĩwa e mũtongoi wa ala angĩ
Matthew20:28 Aĩle kwĩka o ũndũ Mwana wa Mũndũ weekie. Ndaaũka kũthũkũmwa nĩ andũ
Matthew20:29 Yesũ na amanyĩw'a make mayuma Yeliko nĩmaatĩĩiwe nĩ ĩkomano ĩnene.
Matthew20:30 Aũme elĩ ilalinda nĩmailyĩ nthĩ ũtee wa nzĩa
Matthew20:31 Ĩkomano nĩyamakanisye yamea atĩĩ
Matthew20:32 Yesũ nĩwaũngamie na ameta amakũlya atĩĩ
Matthew20:33 Namo mamũsũngĩa mamwĩa atĩĩ
Matthew20:34 Yesũ nĩwamew'ĩie tei
Matthew21:1 Yesũ na amanyĩw'a make makilĩlyĩ kũvika Yelũsalemu
Matthew21:2 amea atĩĩ
Matthew21:3 Mweew'a mũndũ ũkũmũkũlya ũndũ
Matthew21:4 Ũndũ ũũ weekĩkie wĩanĩsye ndeto ila syaneeniwe nĩ mwathani akyasya:
Matthew21:5 “Tavyai andũ ma Yelũsalemu atĩĩ
Matthew21:6 Amanyĩw'a asu nĩmaendie na meeka o ũndũ Yesũ wamatavĩtye.
Matthew21:7 Nĩmamũeteie ĩng'oi yĩu na ndena ya yo
Matthew21:8 Andũ aingĩ nĩmalanilye ngũa syoo nzĩanĩ
Matthew21:9 Andũ ala maĩ mbee na ala maumĩte Yesũ ĩtina nĩmookĩlilye wasya mũnene mayasya atĩĩ
Matthew21:10 Yĩla Yesũ walikile Yelũsalemu
Matthew21:11 Ĩkomano yĩla yookanĩtye na Yesũ nĩyamasũngĩie yamea atĩĩ
Matthew21:12 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ walikile Ĩkalũnĩ na alũngya andũ onthe ala mathooeasya na ala mathooaa syĩndũ vau. Nĩwang'uthũlangile mesa sya ala mavunzasya mbesa
Matthew21:13 Nĩwatavisye andũ asu onthe atĩĩ
Matthew21:14 Ilalinda mbingĩ na andũ ala maĩ na maũũ mathũku nĩmaendie vala ve Yesũ kũu Ĩkalũnĩ nake amavosya.
Matthew21:15 Yĩla athembi anene na amanyĩsya ma Mĩao moonie maũndũ asu ma ũseng'yo Yesũ weeka
Matthew21:16 na mamũkũlya Yesũ atĩĩ
Matthew21:17 Yesũ nĩwamatiie na auma mũsyĩnĩ ũsu athi Mbethani akakome kw'o.
Matthew21:18 Kwakya kĩoko tene Yesũ asyokete Yelũsalemu
Matthew21:19 Nĩwoonie mũkũyũ waĩ ũtee wa nzĩa na athi vo
Matthew21:20 Yĩla amanyĩw'a moonie ũu
Matthew21:21 Yesũ amasũngĩa amea atĩĩ
Matthew21:22 Ethĩwa mũkavoya Ngai ũndũ na kũĩkĩĩa kana nũkũwĩanĩĩsya
Matthew21:23 Yesũ nĩwalikile Ĩkalũnĩ
Matthew21:24 Yesũ amasũngĩa amea atĩĩ
Matthew21:25 Ndavyei
Matthew21:26 Na twasya
Matthew21:27 Kwoou mamũsũngĩa mamwĩa atĩĩ
Matthew21:28 “Kwasũanĩai mũndavye ĩũlũ wa ngewa ĩno. Ve mũndũ ũmwe waĩ na ana elĩ. Nĩwaendie vala ve mwana ũla mũkũũ amwĩa atĩĩ
Matthew21:29 Mwana ũsu nĩwamũsũngĩie ĩthe amwĩa
Matthew21:30 Mũndũ ũsu atia mwana ũla mũkũũ alea
Matthew21:31 Yu kwa ndavyei
Matthew21:32 Yoana Mũvatisi nĩwookie kwenyu inyw'onthe amwony'e ũndũ mwaĩlĩte kwĩkaa ũla waĩlu
Matthew21:33 Yesũ nĩwaendeeie kũtavya athembi anene na atumĩa asu amea atĩĩ
Matthew21:34 “Yĩla ĩvinda ya kũketha nzavivũ yavikie
Matthew21:35 Aĩmi asu nĩmakwatie athũkũmi make
Matthew21:36 Mũndũ ũsu nĩwatũmie athũkũmi angĩ aingĩ kũte ala ma mbee. Ĩndĩ aĩmi asu mameka o ũndũ meekanie na ala ma mbee.
Matthew21:37 Mũthya vyũ
Matthew21:38 Ĩndĩ yĩla aĩmi asu moonie mwana ũsu meeana atĩĩ
Matthew21:39 Kwoou mamũkwata mamũtwaa nza wa mũũnda ũsu na mamũaa.”
Matthew21:40 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wamakũlilye atĩĩ
Matthew21:41 Namo mamũsũngĩa mamwĩa atĩĩ
Matthew21:42 Yesũ nake amakũlya atĩĩ
Matthew21:43 “Kwoou ekai nĩmũtavye
Matthew21:44 Mũndũ ũla wĩvalũka ĩũlũ wa ĩvia yĩu
Matthew21:45 Athembi anene na amanyĩsya ma Mĩao meew'a ngelekany'o isu sya Yesũ
Matthew21:46 na kwoou menda kũmũkwata
Matthew22:1 O ĩngĩ Yesũ nĩwatũmĩie ngelekany'o kũmamanyĩsya andũ.
Matthew22:2 Nĩwameie atĩĩ
Matthew22:3 Nĩwatũmie athũkũmi make mathi makete andũ ala mathoketw'e mbokanĩ ĩsu
Matthew22:4 Nĩwasyokie atũma athũkũmi angĩ amea atĩĩ
Matthew22:5 Ĩndĩ andũ asu malea kwosa ũu ta ũndũ
Matthew22:6 na ala angĩ makwata athũkũmi asu mamathĩny'a mũno na mamoaa.
Matthew22:7 “Ũndũ ũsu nĩwathatisye mũsumbĩ mũno na atũma asikalĩ make mathi mooaa andũ asu oaani na mavĩvya ndũa yoo.
Matthew22:8 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũsumbĩ weetie athũkũmi ala angĩ make amea atĩĩ
Matthew22:9 Kwoou endai kũu mataanĩsyonĩ ma malelũ
Matthew22:10 Athũkũmi asu nĩmaumaalile mathi kũu malelũnĩ na mathokya andũ onthe ala makomanaa namo: Andũ ala aseo na ala athũku. Mamathokisye onthe nginya nyũmba ĩla yaseũvĩw'e mboka ĩsu ya mũtwaano yausũa andũ ki.
Matthew22:11 “Yĩla mũsumbĩ walikile nyũmbanĩ ĩsu asisye andũ ala mavikie
Matthew22:12 Nĩwamũkũlilye atĩĩ
Matthew22:13 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũsumbĩ weeie athũkũmi make atĩĩ
Matthew22:14 Yesũ nĩwaminũkĩlĩĩlye na kwasya atĩĩ
Matthew22:15 Avalisi nĩmaendie na masama ũndũ matonya kũmũkwatya Yesũ kwa kũmũkũlya makũlyo.
Matthew22:16 Nĩmatũmie amwe ma amanyĩw'a moo na ma nguthu ya Mũsumbĩ Elote vala ve Yesũ. Nĩmaendie mamwĩa atĩĩ
Matthew22:17 Yu we kwa tũtavye wĩona ata. Nĩ waĩlu kũĩva mũsumbĩ wa Loma koti? Tũmũĩvae kana tũlee?”
Matthew22:18 Yesũ nĩwamanyie mosũanĩo mũthũku ala maĩ namo na kwoou amea atĩĩ
Matthew22:19 Mbony'ei mbesa ila mũtũmĩaa kũĩva koti.” Nĩmamũeteie ndinalĩ
Matthew22:20 nake amakũlya atĩĩ
Matthew22:21 Namo mamũsũngĩa mamwĩa atĩĩ
Matthew22:22 Yĩla meewie ũu nĩmaseng'ie mũno
Matthew22:23 Mũthenya o ũsu Asatũkai ala maasya kana andũ maikathayũũka kuma kwa akw'ũ
Matthew22:24 “Mũmanyĩsya
Matthew22:25 Yuĩ
Matthew22:26 O nake ũsu wa kelĩ eeka o ta mũkũũe
Matthew22:27 Ĩtina mũndũ mũka ũsu nĩwakwie o nake.
Matthew22:28 Yu ĩndĩ
Matthew22:29 Yesũ nĩwamasũngĩie amea atĩĩ
Matthew22:30 Yĩla andũ makathayũũka kuma kwa akw'ũ
Matthew22:31 Naw'o ũndũ wa kũthayũũka kuma kwa akw'ũ
Matthew22:32 ‘Nyie ninyie Ngai wa Avalaamu
Matthew22:33 Ĩkomano nĩyaseng'ie mũno yeew'a ũndũ Yesũ wamanyĩsya.
Matthew22:34 Yĩla Avalisi meewie kana Yesũ nũvindĩthisye Asatũkai
Matthew22:35 Ũmwe woo wasomeete mĩao ya Kĩyuti
Matthew22:36 “Mũmanyĩsya
Matthew22:37 Yesũ amũsũngĩa amwĩa atĩĩ
Matthew22:38 Ũũ nĩw'o mwĩao ũla mũnene na wa vata mũno.
Matthew22:39 Ũla wa kelĩ naw'o ũilyĩ o ta ũsu: ‘Mwende mũtũi waku o tondũ wĩyendete we mwene.’
Matthew22:40 Mĩao ĩsu yĩ ĩlĩ ĩtũngĩanĩĩte mĩao ĩla ĩngĩ yonthe ya Mwose
Matthew22:41 Avalisi mombanĩte o vau
Matthew22:42 “Inyw'ĩ mũsũanĩaa ata ĩũlũ wa Klĩsto? We nĩ nzyawa yaũ?” Namo mamũsũngĩa mamwĩa atĩĩ
Matthew22:43 Yesũ amakũlya atĩĩ
Matthew22:44 ‘Ngai nĩwamwĩie Mwĩai wakwa: Ĩkala nthĩ ngalĩko ya kw'oko kwakwa kwa aũme
Matthew22:45 Ethĩwa ĩndĩ Ndeviti eetie Klĩsto
Matthew22:46 Vai ũmwe waatonya kũsũngĩa Yesũ
Matthew23:1 Yesũ nĩwatavisye ĩkomano vamwe na amanyĩw'a make amea atĩĩ
Matthew23:2 “Amanyĩsya ma Mĩao na Avalisi nĩmo me na ũkũmũ wa kũelesya kwa ũliku Mĩao ya Mwose.
Matthew23:3 Kwoou no nginya mũmew'e na mũyĩka ũndũ meũmũtavya
Matthew23:4 Nĩmovaa mĩio mĩito mũno ĩtakuĩka makaĩkya andũ
Matthew23:5 “Maũndũ onthe ala mekaa
Matthew23:6 Mendete kwĩkala kũndũ kwa ndaĩa me mbokanĩ
Matthew23:7 O ta ũu
Matthew23:8 Inyw'ĩ mũikaaĩtĩkĩle mwĩtwe
Matthew23:9 Na mũikaaĩte mũndũ o na wĩva
Matthew23:10 O na mũikaaĩtĩkĩle mwĩtwe
Matthew23:11 Mũndũ ũla mũnene vyũ katĩ wenyu
Matthew23:12 Nũndũ mũndũ ũla wĩnenevasya akanyivw'a na ũla wĩnyivasya akanenevw'a.
Matthew23:13 “Kyeva nĩ kwenyu inyw'ĩ amanyĩsya ma Mĩao na Avalisi
Matthew23:14 Kyeva nĩ kwenyu inyw'ĩ amanyĩsya ma Mĩao na Avalisi
Matthew23:15 “Kyeva nĩ kwenyu inyw'ĩ amanyĩsya ma Mĩao na Avalisi
Matthew23:16 “Kyeva nĩ kwenyu
Matthew23:17 Inyw'ĩ ilalinda ndumanu! Katĩ wa thaavu na Ĩkalũ
Matthew23:18 O na ĩngĩ mũmanyĩasya kana ethĩwa mũndũ akeevĩta na kĩthembeo
Matthew23:19 Inyw'ĩ ko mũte ilalinda! Katĩ wa nthembo na kĩthembeo kĩla nĩkyo kĩtumaa nthembo ĩsu yĩthĩwa yĩ ntheu
Matthew23:20 Kwoou manyai kana yĩla mũndũ weevĩta na kĩthembeo
Matthew23:21 Na yĩla mũndũ weevĩta na Ĩkalũ
Matthew23:22 O ta ũu
Matthew23:23 “Kyeva nĩ kwenyu inyw'ĩ amanyĩsya ma Mĩao na Avalisi
Matthew23:24 Inyw'ĩ atongoi mũte metho! Mũkelaa kĩndũ kĩla mũũnyw'a mũikamelye kaindo ta kaki na mũimelya yĩndũ ta ngamĩle.
Matthew23:25 “Kyeva nĩ kwenyu inyw'ĩ amanyĩsya ma Mĩao na Avalisi
Matthew23:26 We Mũvalisi Kĩlalinda! Amba kũthesya kĩla kĩ nthĩnĩ wa kĩkombe na nthĩnĩ wa ĩsaani
Matthew23:27 “Kyeva nĩ kwenyu inyw'ĩ amanyĩsya ma Mĩao na Avalisi
Matthew23:28 Kwoou o nenyu mwonekaa nĩ andũ kũũ nza mwĩ aseo
Matthew23:29 “Kyeva nĩ kwenyu
Matthew23:30 Mwaasya kana
Matthew23:31 Kwa nzĩa ĩsu
Matthew23:32 Endai ĩndĩ mũminũkĩlĩĩlye kĩla kyambĩlĩĩlw'e nĩ aaũmae menyu.
Matthew23:33 Inyw'ĩ nzoka ii
Matthew23:34 Kwoou
Matthew23:35 Kwa kĩtumi kĩu
Matthew23:36 Nĩmũtavya w'o
Matthew23:37 “We Yelũsalemu
Matthew23:38 Kwoou yu
Matthew23:39 Ekai nĩmũtavye
Matthew24:1 Yesũ nĩwaumie Ĩkalũnĩ
Matthew24:2 Yesũ nake amea atĩĩ
Matthew24:3 Yesũ ailyĩ nthĩ Kĩĩmanĩ kya Mĩthata
Matthew24:4 Yesũ amasũngĩa amea atĩĩ
Matthew24:5 Andũ aingĩ makooka na ĩsyĩtwa yakwa mayasya
Matthew24:6 Mũkeew'a ituu sya makaũ na ngewa sya makaũ mokĩte
Matthew24:7 Nthĩ ĩkakwatya kaũ na ĩngĩ
Matthew24:8 Maũndũ asu onthe nĩmo makethĩwa wambĩlĩĩlyo wa thĩna
Matthew24:9 “Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũkakwatwa na mũinenganwe mũthĩnw'e na kũawa. Mbaĩ syonthe ikamũmena nũndũ wakwa.
Matthew24:10 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu andũ aingĩ makekya ngoo matie mũĩkĩĩo woo
Matthew24:11 O ta ũu
Matthew24:12 Nũndũ wa kwongeleka kwa mothũku
Matthew24:13 Ĩndĩ mũndũ ũla wĩũmĩĩsya kũvika mũminũkĩlyo akatangĩĩwa.
Matthew24:14 Ũvoo Mũseo ĩũlũ wa ũsumbĩ wa Ngai ũkamba kũtavanw'a kĩla vandũ ĩũlũ wa nthĩ wĩthĩwe ũkũsĩ kwa mbaĩ syonthe
Matthew24:15 “Ĩvinda yĩla mũkona
Matthew24:16 andũ ala me Yutia mekĩa mathi ĩimanĩ.
Matthew24:17 Mũndũ ũla ũkethĩwa e kĩalanĩ kya nyũmba yake ĩũlũ
Matthew24:18 O ta ũu
Matthew24:19 Ĩvinda yĩu yĩkeethĩwa yĩ ya thĩna mũnene kwa aka ala aito
Matthew24:20 Voyai Ngai nĩ kana maũndũ asu maikaaĩthĩwe ĩvindanĩ ya mbevo na mbua
Matthew24:21 Nũndũ mathĩna ma ĩvinda yĩu makeethĩwa me mathũku mũno kũvĩtũka thĩna o na wĩva ũla waaĩthĩwa kuma nthĩ yoombwa kũvika yu; o na kũikethĩwa thĩna ũngĩ wĩana ta ũsu.
Matthew24:22 Ta kethĩwa matukũ asu ti maole
Matthew24:23 “Kwoou ĩvindanĩ yĩu
Matthew24:24 Nũndũ kũkaumĩla andũ aingĩ mekwĩyĩta Klĩsto
Matthew24:25 Ĩthukĩĩsyei
Matthew24:26 “Kwoou ethĩwa mũndũ o na wĩva akamwĩa
Matthew24:27 Nũndũ Mwana wa Mũndũ akaumĩla ta ũtisi ũla ũtisaa ũkathesya ĩtu kuma wumĩlonĩ wa syũa kũvika ũthũĩlonĩ wayo.
Matthew24:28 Vandũ vala ve kimba nĩvo ndei syũmbanĩlĩĩlaa.
Matthew24:29 “Mathĩna ma ĩvinda yĩu mathela oou
Matthew24:30 Nĩvo ĩndĩ wonany'o ũkaumĩla matunĩ wa kwonany'a kana Mwana wa Mũndũ nĩwũkĩte. Mbaĩ syonthe sya nthĩ ikaĩa syamwona Mwana wa Mũndũ okĩte e mathweonĩ ma ĩtunĩ
Matthew24:31 Nake akatũma alaĩka make na wasya mũnene wa soo
Matthew24:32 “Ĩmanyĩsyei ũndũ kuma mũkũyũnĩ. Yĩla mbonge syaw'o syoololoa na syamesya matũ
Matthew24:33 No ta ũu
Matthew24:34 Nĩmũtavya w'o
Matthew24:35 Ĩtu na nthĩ ikathela
Matthew24:36 “Vai mũndũ o na ũmwe wĩsĩ mũthenya kana saa wa mũminũkĩlyo. O na alaĩka ma ĩtunĩ vamwe na Mwana mayĩsĩ; no Asa e weka wĩsĩ mũthenya ũsu.
Matthew24:37 O ũndũ kwailyĩ ĩvindanĩ ya Noa
Matthew24:38 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu
Matthew24:39 Mayamanyaa kĩla kyaendee kũvika kĩla kĩw'ũ kingĩ kyooka
Matthew24:40 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu aũme elĩ makeethĩwa mũũndanĩ; ũmwe nũkoswa na ũla ũngĩ aitiwa.
Matthew24:41 Aka elĩ nĩmakethĩwa maithiĩa ĩvianĩ yĩmwe; ũmwe nũkoswa na ũla ũngĩ aitiwa.
Matthew24:42 “Kwoou ĩkalai mwĩyũmbanĩtye
Matthew24:43 Ĩndĩ manyai ũũ: Kethĩwa mwene wa nyũmba nĩwĩthĩawa esĩ saa ũla kĩng'ei kĩkũka
Matthew24:44 Kwoou o nenyu ĩkalai mwĩyũmbanĩtye
Matthew24:45 Yesũ nĩwaendeeie na kwasya atĩĩ
Matthew24:46 Nĩ mũathime mũthũkũmi ũsu ũkethĩwa nĩ mũnene wake aendee na kũtethya wĩa ũla watiĩwe.
Matthew24:47 Nĩmũtavya w'o
Matthew24:48 Ĩndĩ ethĩwa nĩ mũthũkũmi ũte wa kwĩkwatw'a
Matthew24:49 na ĩndĩ ayambĩlĩĩlya kũvũa athũkũmi ala angĩ
Matthew24:50 Mũnene wa mũthũkũmi ũsu akooka mũthenya ũla we ũteũtalĩthasya na saa ũla ũtesĩ.
Matthew24:51 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũnene ũsu wĩmũthĩny'a mũno
Matthew25:1 “Ũsumbĩ wa ĩtu ũkeethĩwa ũtonya kũvw'ananw'a na eĩtu ĩkũmi
Matthew25:2 Atano moo maĩ atumamu na ala angĩ atano maĩ oĩ.
Matthew25:3 Ala atumanu makuie taa syoo
Matthew25:4 ĩndĩ ala oĩ nĩmakuie mauta ma taa me sũvanĩ
Matthew25:5 Mũtwaani nĩwatindie mũno atoka
Matthew25:6 “Ũtukũ katĩ mũndũ ũmwe nĩwaneenie na wasya mũnene asya atĩĩ
Matthew25:7 Ala eĩtu me ĩkũmi nĩmaamũkie na mambĩĩa kũseũvya taa syoo.
Matthew25:8 Nĩvo ĩndĩ ala atumanu meeie ala oĩ atĩĩ
Matthew25:9 Ĩndĩ eĩtu ala oĩ mamasũngĩa mamea atĩĩ
Matthew25:10 “Yĩla maumaalile mathi kũthooa mauta
Matthew25:11 Ĩtina
Matthew25:12 Ĩndĩ mũtwaani amasũngĩa amea atĩĩ
Matthew25:13 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ waminũkĩlĩĩlye na kwasya atĩĩ
Matthew25:14 “Ũsumbĩ wa ĩtu ũkeethĩwa ũtonya kũvw'ananw'a na mũndũ ũmwe ũla wavangie kũthi kyalo nthĩ ĩngĩ. Nĩweetie athũkũmi make na amanenga kũũngamĩa syĩndũ syake.
Matthew25:15 Nĩwamaaĩie mbesa kwĩanana na ũndũ kĩla ũmwe waĩ atonya kũithũkũmĩthya. Nĩwanengie ũmwe mbesa sya talendi itano
Matthew25:16 O kwa mĩtũkĩ
Matthew25:17 O ta ũu
Matthew25:18 Ĩndĩ mũthũkũmi ũla wanengiwe talendi ĩmwe aendie enza ĩima nthĩ
Matthew25:19 “Ĩtina wa ĩvinda ĩasa
Matthew25:20 Mũthũkũmi ũla wanengetwe mbesa sya talendi itano nĩwaietanĩisye na talendi ingĩ itano. Nĩwamwĩie mũnene wake atĩĩ
Matthew25:21 Mũnene wake amwĩa atĩĩ
Matthew25:22 O ta ũu
Matthew25:23 Mũnene wake amwĩa atĩĩ
Matthew25:24 “Mũthũkũmi ũla wanengetwe mbesa sya talendi ĩmwe nake nĩwookie na asya atĩĩ
Matthew25:25 Nyie nĩnakĩie
Matthew25:26 Nĩvo ĩndĩ nake mũnene wake wamwĩie atĩĩ
Matthew25:27 Waaĩlĩte kwĩthĩwa watwaie mbesa syakwa vengi
Matthew25:28 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũnene ũsu waisye atĩĩ
Matthew25:29 Mũndũ ũla wĩ na kĩndũ akongeleelwa ingĩ mbingĩ na akaingĩvĩw'a mũno
Matthew25:30 Na nũndũ mũthũkũmi ũũ nĩ wa mana vyũ
Matthew25:31 “Yĩla Mwana wa Mũndũ ũkoka e mũsumbĩ na e na alaĩka onthe
Matthew25:32 na andũ ma mbaĩ syonthe makaetwe mbee wake. Vau akamavathany'a ikundi ilĩ o tondũ mũĩthi ũvathanasya mbũi na malondu.
Matthew25:33 Akaia andũ ala aseo ngalĩko ya kw'oko kwake kwa aũme
Matthew25:34 “Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũsumbĩ ũkamea andũ ala me ngalĩko ya kw'oko kwake kwa aume atĩĩ
Matthew25:35 Nũndũ naĩ na nzaa
Matthew25:36 naĩ mũthei
Matthew25:37 “Nĩvo ĩndĩ namo andũ asu aseo makamũsũngĩa mamwĩe atĩĩ
Matthew25:38 Na nĩ ĩndĩĩ twakwonie wĩ mũeni
Matthew25:39 O ta ũu
Matthew25:40 Nake Mũsumbĩ akamasũngĩa amee atĩĩ
Matthew25:41 “Nĩvo ĩndĩ ũkamea namo andũ ala me ngalĩko ya kw'oko kwake kwa aka atĩĩ
Matthew25:42 Naĩ na nzaa
Matthew25:43 naĩ mũeni
Matthew25:44 “Nĩvo ĩndĩ namo makamũkũlya atĩĩ
Matthew25:45 Nake Mũsumbĩ akamasũngĩa amee atĩĩ
Matthew25:46 Asu makathi kũthĩnw'a tene na tene
Matthew26:1 Yesũ amina kũmanyĩsya maũndũ asu onthe
Matthew26:2 “O tondũ mwĩsĩ
Matthew26:3 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu
Matthew26:4 Nĩmasamie vamwe ũndũ matonya kũmũkwata Yesũ kwa ũseleke na kũmũtw'ĩĩa kũawa.
Matthew26:5 Ĩndĩ nĩmaneenanisye masya atĩĩ
Matthew26:6 Ĩvinda yĩmwe Yesũ nĩwaendie Mbethani mũsyĩ kwa Simioni
Matthew26:7 Aendee na kũathĩw'a
Matthew26:8 Yĩla amanyĩw'a make moonie ũu
Matthew26:9 Mauta aa meĩ matewa mbesa mbingĩ mũno na mbesa isu iinengwa ngya!”
Matthew26:10 Yesũ nĩwamanyie ũndũ mekwasya na kwoou amea atĩĩ
Matthew26:11 Mũkekalaa na ngya mavinda onthe
Matthew26:12 Mũndũ mũka ũũ etĩkĩsya mwĩĩ wakwa mauta aa awũmbany'e kwondũ wa mathiko makwa.
Matthew26:13 Nĩmũtavya w'o
Matthew26:14 Ĩtina wa ũu
Matthew26:15 amea atĩĩ
Matthew26:16 Nĩvo ĩndĩ kuma vau Yutasi wambĩĩie kũmantha mwanya mũseo wa kũmũthoosya Yesũ kũla maĩ.
Matthew26:17 Mũthenyanĩ wa mbee wa Mboka ya Mũkate ũte Mbota
Matthew26:18 Nake amea atĩĩ
Matthew26:19 Amanyĩw'a nĩmeekie o ũndũ Yesũ wameĩte na maseũvya Mboka ya Vasaka.
Matthew26:20 Kwavika wĩoo
Matthew26:21 Maendee na kũathĩw'a
Matthew26:22 Amanyĩw'a nĩmeewie woo mũno na mambĩĩa kũmũkũlya ũmwe kwa ũmwe atĩĩ
Matthew26:23 Yesũ amasũngĩa amea atĩĩ
Matthew26:24 Kwa w'o Mwana wa Mũndũ ekw'a o kwĩanana na ũndũ Maandĩko Matheu maĩtye
Matthew26:25 Yutasi ũla weetĩkĩlile kũmũthoosya Yesũ kwa amaitha amũkũlya atĩĩ
Matthew26:26 O maendee na kũathĩw'a
Matthew26:27 O ta ũu nĩwoosie kĩkombe kĩ ndivai na atũnga mũvea kwa Ngai; nĩwanengie amanyĩw'a make ayasya atĩĩ
Matthew26:28 Ĩĩ nĩ nthakame yakwa ya ũtianĩo mweũ
Matthew26:29 Na ekai nĩmũtavye
Matthew26:30 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mainie wathi na maumaala mathi Kĩĩmanĩ kya Mĩthata.
Matthew26:31 Yesũ nĩweeie amanyĩw'a make atĩĩ
Matthew26:32 Ĩndĩ ĩtina wa kũthayũũka kwakwa
Matthew26:33 Vetelo amwĩa Yesũ atĩĩ
Matthew26:34 Nake Yesũ amwĩa atĩĩ
Matthew26:35 Ĩndĩ Vetelo amwĩa atĩĩ
Matthew26:36 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ waendie e na amanyĩw'a make vandũ vetawa Ngethisemani na amea atĩĩ
Matthew26:37 Nĩwaendanisye na Vetelo na ala ana elĩ ma Nzevetii. Nĩwakwatiwe nĩ kyeva kingĩ na kĩũũyũ
Matthew26:38 na kwoou amea atĩĩ
Matthew26:39 Yesũ nĩwaendangie mbee vanini
Matthew26:40 Nĩwasyokie vala ve ala amanyĩw'a atatũ na amethĩa makomete. Nĩwakũlilye Vetelo atĩĩ
Matthew26:41 Ĩkalai mũsalukĩtye na mũivoya mũikalike matatwanĩ. Nĩmũkwenda kwĩka ũla waĩlu ĩndĩ mwĩ onzu.”
Matthew26:42 Yesũ nĩwaendie ĩngĩ na avoya ayasya atĩĩ
Matthew26:43 Nĩwasyokie ĩngĩ vala ve ala amanyĩw'a
Matthew26:44 Nĩwamatiie ĩngĩ athi na avoya ĩvinda ya katatũ kwa kũtũngĩlĩĩla o ĩla mboya.
Matthew26:45 Nĩvo ĩndĩ wasyokie vala ve ala amanyĩw'a na amakũlya atĩĩ
Matthew26:46 Ũkĩlai tũthi; mũndũ ũla ũkũnthoosya kwa amaitha makwa nĩwavika.”
Matthew26:47 Yesũ o aendee na kũneena
Matthew26:48 Yutasi ũla wamũthooisye Yesũ
Matthew26:49 Yutasi nĩwaendie ĩmwe kwa ĩmwe vala ve Yesũ na amwĩa atĩĩ
Matthew26:50 Yesũ amũsũngĩa amwĩa atĩĩ
Matthew26:51 Ũmwe wa ala maĩ na Yesũ nĩwakũie ũvyũ wake
Matthew26:52 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wamwĩie atĩĩ
Matthew26:53 Nowĩsĩ kana nĩ ndonya kũkũlya Asa wakwa ũtethyo
Matthew26:54 Ĩndĩ namo Maandĩko Matheu meĩsaa kwĩanĩa ata
Matthew26:55 Nĩvo ĩndĩ weeie yĩla ĩkomano ya andũ atĩĩ
Matthew26:56 Ĩndĩ maũndũ aa onthe meekĩka nĩ kana meanĩsye kĩla kĩandĩkĩtwe nĩ athani nthĩnĩ wa Maandĩko Matheu.” Nĩvo ĩndĩ amanyĩw'a onthe masembie mamũtia.
Matthew26:57 Andũ ala mamũkwatie Yesũ nĩmamũtwaie nyũmba kwa Kaiava Mũthembi Mũnene
Matthew26:58 Vetelo nĩwamumĩte Yesũ ĩtina ĩndĩ e kũasa
Matthew26:59 Athembi anene na andũ ala angĩ ma nzama nĩmamanthaa andũ matonya kũneena ũkũsĩ wa ũvũngũ ĩũlũ wa Yesũ nĩ kana mamũtw'ĩĩe kũawa
Matthew26:60 ĩndĩ mayaaona ũmwe o na kau andũ aingĩ nĩmeeyumĩlilye maumya ũkũsĩ wa ũvũngũ ĩũlũ wa Yesũ. Mũthya andũ elĩ nĩmaumĩlile
Matthew26:61 na masya atĩĩ
Matthew26:62 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Mũthembi Mũnene waũngamie na amũkũlya Yesũ atĩĩ
Matthew26:63 Ĩndĩ Yesũ avindya
Matthew26:64 Yesũ amũsũngĩa amwĩa atĩĩ
Matthew26:65 Yĩla Mũthembi Mũnene weewie ũu
Matthew26:66 Kwoou mwĩtw'a ata?” Namo mamũsũngĩa mamwĩa atĩĩ
Matthew26:67 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mamũtw'ĩlangile mata ũthyũ na mamũkũna
Matthew26:68 na kũmwĩa atĩĩ
Matthew26:69 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu Vetelo ailyĩ nthĩ kĩwanzanĩ nza. Mwĩĩtu mũthũkũmi nĩwookie vala ũĩ amwĩa atĩĩ
Matthew26:70 Ĩndĩ Vetelo akaĩa mbee wa andũ onthe asya atĩĩ
Matthew26:71 na akwata nzĩa athi mũvĩanĩ wa kũlika vau kĩwanzanĩ. Mwĩĩtu ũngĩ mũthũkũmi nĩwamwonie na eea andũ ala maĩ vau atĩĩ
Matthew26:72 Vetelo nĩwakaĩie ĩngĩ kwa kwĩvĩta asya atĩĩ
Matthew26:73 Ĩtina wa kavinda kanini
Matthew26:74 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Vetelo wambĩĩie kwĩyĩumanĩa na kwĩvĩta ayasya atĩĩ
Matthew26:75 Vetelo nĩwalilikanile ũndũ Yesũ wamũtavĩtye akamwĩa atĩĩ
Matthew27:1 Kwakya kĩoko tene
Matthew27:2 Nĩmamwovie moko na mamũtwaa
Matthew27:3 Yĩla Yutasi ũla wamũthooisye Yesũ wamanyie kana Yesũ atw'ĩka nũvĩtĩtye
Matthew27:4 Nĩwameie atĩĩ
Matthew27:5 Yutasi nĩwekisye mbesa isu Ĩkalũnĩ nthĩnĩ na aumaala athi eesũsya.
Matthew27:6 Athembi anene nĩmoosanisye mbesa isu na masya atĩĩ
Matthew27:7 Kwoou meetĩkĩlana onthe
Matthew27:8 Nĩkyo kĩtumi kĩsesi kĩu o na kũvika ũmũnthĩ kĩtawa Kĩsesi kya Nthakame.
Matthew27:9 Kwa nzĩa ĩsu
Matthew27:10 na maitũmĩa kũthooa kĩsesi kya mũmbi wa mbisũ
Matthew27:11 Yesũ nĩwaũngamie mbee wa ngavana
Matthew27:12 Yĩla athembi anene na atumĩa mambĩĩie kũmũsikata
Matthew27:13 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Vilato wamwĩie atĩĩ
Matthew27:14 Ĩndĩ Yesũ ndaasũngĩa ũndũ o na ũmwe
Matthew27:15 Kĩla ĩvinda ya Mboka ya Vasaka
Matthew27:16 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu vaĩ mwovwa ũmwe weesĩkĩwe kwa kũthũka weetawa Valava.
Matthew27:17 Kwoou yĩla andũ moombanie
Matthew27:18 Amakũlilye ũu nũndũ nĩweesĩ kana atongoi ma Ayuti mamũnenganie Yesũ kwake nũndũ wa kĩwĩu.
Matthew27:19 Kĩtumi kĩngĩ nũndũ yĩla Vilato wailyĩ nthĩ ethukĩĩsye ĩkoani yĩu
Matthew27:20 Athembi anene na atumĩa nĩmathing'ĩĩisye andũ metye Valava
Matthew27:21 O ĩngĩ ngavana nĩwakũlilye andũ atĩĩ
Matthew27:22 Vilato amakũlya atĩĩ
Matthew27:23 Vilato amakũlya atĩĩ
Matthew27:24 Yĩla Vilato woonie kana aendee na kũneena o mana
Matthew27:25 Namo andũ onthe mamũsũngĩa mamwĩa atĩĩ
Matthew27:26 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Vilato wamathaĩisye Valava
Matthew27:27 Asikalĩ ma ngavana nĩmamũtwaie Yesũ mamũlikya nyũmbanĩ nene ya ngavana
Matthew27:28 Nĩmamumisye ngũa syake na mamwĩkĩa ngũa ndune.
Matthew27:29 Nĩvo ĩndĩ maseũvisye ngovia maitũmĩa tũũvonge twĩ mĩw'a mamwĩkĩa
Matthew27:30 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mamũtw'ĩlangile mata na moosa ĩla ndata mamũkũna nayo mũtwe.
Matthew27:31 Mamina kũmũthekeea
Matthew27:32 Me nzĩanĩ nĩmakomanie na mũndũ ũmwe kuma Kũlene wĩtawa Simioni. Asikalĩ nĩmamũkuĩthisye Yesũ ngelany'o.
Matthew27:33 Nĩmavikie vandũ vetawa Ngolongotha
Matthew27:34 Vau nĩmamũnengie Yesũ ndivai ĩvulanĩtw'e na nyongo
Matthew27:35 Asikalĩ nĩmamwambie ngelany'onĩ na maana ngũa syake kwa kũkũna kula
Matthew27:36 Ĩtina wa ũu nĩmekalile nthĩ vau mamũsunge.
Matthew27:37 Vau ngelany'onĩ
Matthew27:38 O ta ũu
Matthew27:39 Andũ ala mavĩtĩlaa vau nĩmathingithangasya mĩtwe yoo na kũtavya Yesũ syuo nthũku maimwĩa atĩĩ
Matthew27:40 “Ũnaasya nũtonya kwananga Ĩkalũ na ũiyaka ĩngĩ na mĩthenya ĩtatũ
Matthew27:41 O namo athembi anene me na amanyĩsya ma Mĩao na atumĩa nĩmamũthekeeie Yesũ mayasya atĩĩ
Matthew27:42 “Anatangĩĩaa andũ angĩ
Matthew27:43 Nũmũĩkĩĩaa Ngai na kwasya we nĩ Mwana wa Ngai; ekai yu twone kana Ngai nũkũmũvonokya!”
Matthew27:44 O ta ũu
Matthew27:45 Kuma saa sita kũvika saa kenda sya mũthenya
Matthew27:46 Saa kenda syavika
Matthew27:47 Andũ amwe maũngyĩ vau vakuvĩ meew'a ũu nĩmaisye atĩĩ
Matthew27:48 Ũmwe woo nĩwasembie o kwa mĩtũkĩ
Matthew27:49 Andũ ala angĩ namo masya atĩĩ
Matthew27:50 Yesũ nĩwakayie ĩngĩ na wasya mũnene na akw'a.
Matthew27:51 Kavindanĩ o kau kĩtambaa kĩla kyatilanĩtye Ĩkalũ nĩkyatembũkanĩle katĩ kuma ĩũlũ kũvika nthĩ. O ta ũu nĩkweethĩiwe na kĩtetemo kya nthĩ
Matthew27:52 Mbũa o nasyo nĩsyavingũkangie
Matthew27:53 Andũ asu nĩmaumie mbũanĩ
Matthew27:54 Yĩla mũnene wa asikalĩ ĩana vamwe na asikalĩ ala maĩ nake maisunga Yesũ meewie kĩtetemo kĩu kya nthĩ
Matthew27:55 O ta ũu
Matthew27:56 Katĩ wamo vaĩ Meli Makitalene
Matthew27:57 Syũa yĩ vakuvĩ kũthũa
Matthew27:58 nĩwaendie vala ve Vilato na amũkũlya amwĩtĩkĩlye athi akavete mwĩĩ wa Yesũ. Vilato nĩwaumisye mwĩao Yosevu anengwe mwĩĩ ũsu.
Matthew27:59 Kwoou Yosevu athi atheesya mwĩĩ wa Yesũ kuma ngelany'onĩ
Matthew27:60 na aũthika mbũanĩ yake waĩ o anamyasie ĩvianĩ mĩtũkĩ. Nĩwavingilitilye ĩvia ĩnene akunĩka mũomo wa mbũa ĩsu nayo na athi.
Matthew27:61 Meli Makitalene na Meli ũla ũngĩ mailyĩ nthĩ vau masyaĩtye mbũanĩ ĩsu.
Matthew27:62 Ũnĩ ũsu
Matthew27:63 na mamwĩa atĩĩ
Matthew27:64 Kwoou ĩyĩae mbũa ĩkasungwe kũvika mũthenya wa katatũ
Matthew27:65 Vilato amea atĩĩ
Matthew27:66 Kwoou mathi na mamĩlũlũmĩĩlya kwa kũthingĩĩa yĩla ĩvia na matia asikalĩ mamĩsunge.
Matthew28:1 Ĩtina wa mũthenya wa Savato
Matthew28:2 Kwa kĩthũlũmũko nĩkweethĩiwe na kĩtetemo kĩnene kya nthĩ
Matthew28:3 Mũvw'ano wake wailyĩ ta ũtisi
Matthew28:4 Asikalĩ ala masungaa nĩmatetemie mũno nĩ w'ĩa
Matthew28:5 Ũla mũlaĩka nĩweeie ala aka atĩĩ
Matthew28:6 Nde vaa
Matthew28:7 Endai ĩndĩ yu mwĩkalaatĩte mũkamatavye amanyĩw'a make mũmee atĩĩ
Matthew28:8 Aka asu nĩmaumie vau mbũanĩ na mĩtũkĩ me na w'ĩa ĩndĩ me na ũtanu
Matthew28:9 Kwa kĩthũlũmũko
Matthew28:10 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wameie atĩĩ
Matthew28:11 Aka asu me nzĩanĩ maendete
Matthew28:12 Athembi anene nĩmoombanie na atumĩa na masama ũndũ mekwĩka. Nĩmanengie asikalĩ asu mbesa mbingĩ mũno
Matthew28:13 na mamea atĩĩ
Matthew28:14 Ethĩwa ũvoo ũsu nũũvikĩa ngavana
Matthew28:15 Kwoou asikalĩ asu nĩmoosie mbesa isu na meeka ũu mataviw'e
Matthew28:16 Ala amanyĩw'a ĩkũmi na ũmwe nĩmaendie kĩĩmanĩ kĩ Kalilii kĩla Yesũ wameĩte mathi.
Matthew28:17 Me vau nĩmamwonie Yesũ na matulya ndu mamũthaitha
Matthew28:18 Yesũ nĩwamathengeeie na amea atĩĩ
Matthew28:19 Endai ĩndĩ kwa andũ ma mbaĩ syonthe
Matthew28:20 Mamanyĩsyei kũkwata maũndũ onthe ala namwĩaĩie
Mark1:1 Ũũ nĩ wambĩlĩĩlyo wa Ũvoo Mũseo ĩũlũ wa Yesũ Klĩsto
Mark1:2 Wambĩlĩĩlye o tondũ Ngai ũneenete ĩvukunĩ ya mwathani Ĩsaia akasya atĩĩ
Mark1:3 Ve mũndũ ũkũneena weũnĩ na wasya mũnene ayasya atĩĩ
Mark1:4 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yoana Mũvatisi waumĩlile weũnĩ aivatisa na kũtavany'a ayasya atĩĩ
Mark1:5 Andũ aingĩ kuma nthĩ ya Yutia na mũsyĩ wa Yelũsalemu nĩmaendie kwĩthukĩĩsya Yoana. Nĩmaumbũlile naĩ syoo
Mark1:6 Yoana eekĩĩte ngũa yaseũvĩtw'e na w'ĩa wa ngamĩle
Mark1:7 Nthĩnĩ wa ũtavany'a wake nĩwameie andũ atĩĩ
Mark1:8 Nyie nĩmũvatisa na kĩw'ũ
Mark1:9 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu Yesũ nĩwaumie ndũanĩ yĩtawa Nasaleti yĩ Kalilii
Mark1:10 Yesũ amina kuma kĩw'ũnĩ oou
Mark1:11 na wasya weew'ĩka kuma ĩtunĩ ũkwasya atĩĩ
Mark1:12 Vau kwa vau Veva nĩwamũtongoeisye amũtwaa weũnĩ
Mark1:13 vala wekalile mĩthenya mĩongo ĩna
Mark1:14 Ĩtina wa Yoana kũvingĩwa yela
Mark1:15 Nĩweeie andũ atĩĩ
Mark1:16 Yesũ aitembeangĩla ũtee wa Ĩia ya Kalilii
Mark1:17 Nĩwameie atĩĩ
Mark1:18 Vau kwa vau nĩmatiie itei syoo na mamũatĩĩa.
Mark1:19 Maendanga vanini
Mark1:20 Vau kwa vau nĩwametie mamũatĩĩe
Mark1:21 Yesũ na amanyĩw'a asu make nĩmaendie Kavelinaũmu
Mark1:22 Andũ ala mamwĩthukĩĩisye akĩmanyĩsya nĩmaseng'ie mũno nĩ momanyĩsyo make
Mark1:23 Kwa kĩthũlũmũko
Mark1:24 akaya na wasya mũnene ayasya atĩĩ
Mark1:25 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ weeaĩie ĩimũ yĩu ayĩa atĩĩ
Mark1:26 Ĩimũ yĩu nĩyathingithisye mũndũ ũsu mũno yuĩte mbu nene
Mark1:27 Andũ onthe nĩmaseng'ie mũno kũvikĩa makũlany'a atĩĩ
Mark1:28 Kwa mĩtũkĩ nguma ya Yesũ nĩyanyaĩĩkie kĩla vandũ kĩsionĩ kya Kalilii
Mark1:29 Yesũ e na ala amanyĩw'a make
Mark1:30 Mavika oou
Mark1:31 Nĩwaendie vala wakomete na amũkwata kw'oko amũtetheesya kũkĩla. O vau kwa vau nĩwavoie ndetema na ambĩĩa kũmathũkũma.
Mark1:32 Vaa wĩoo syũa yathũa
Mark1:33 Andũ aingĩ kuma Kavelinaũmu nĩmoombĩĩie mũomonĩ wa nyũmba ĩsu.
Mark1:34 Yesũ nĩwavoisye aingĩ ala maĩ na mowau me kĩvathũkany'o
Mark1:35 Ũnĩ ũsu kũtanamba kũtheatheana
Mark1:36 Simioni na ala angĩ maĩ nake nĩmaumaalũkile mathi kũmũmantha.
Mark1:37 Yĩla mamwonie nĩmamwĩie atĩĩ
Mark1:38 Nake Yesũ amasũngĩa amea atĩĩ
Mark1:39 Kwoou Yesũ nĩwathyũlũlũkile kĩla vandũ kũu Kalilii
Mark1:40 Mũndũ ũmwe waĩ mũwau mangũ nĩwookie atulya ndu mbee wa Yesũ na amwĩsũva aimwĩa atĩĩ
Mark1:41 Yesũ nĩwamwĩw'ĩie ĩnee yingĩ
Mark1:42 Vau kwa vau nĩwavoie ũwau ũsu eethĩwa e mũtheu.
Mark1:43 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wamwĩie nĩ athi
Mark1:44 amina kũmũkany'a kwa kũmwĩa atĩĩ
Mark1:45 Ĩndĩ mũndũ ũsu nĩwaendie na ambĩĩa kũtavany'a ũvoo ũsu kĩla vandũ. Aũnyaĩĩkisye nginya weethĩa Yesũ ndathi kũu ndũanĩ enekee nĩ andũ. Ekalaa kũndũ kũtatwĩe andũ
Mark2:1 Yesũ nĩwasyokie Kavelinaũmu
Mark2:2 Nĩvo ĩndĩ andũ aingĩ moombanĩie nyũmbanĩ ĩla waĩ
Mark2:3 aũme ana nĩmookie makuĩte mũndũ waĩ na mamutha monzu mamũetee Yesũ.
Mark2:4 Nũndũ wa mũvivinyano wa andũ
Mark2:5 Yesũ oona ũndũ me na mũĩkĩĩo ũnenevete
Mark2:6 Amanyĩsya amwe ma Mĩao mailyĩ vau nĩmeekũlasya na ngoo
Mark2:7 “Yesũ aneena ũu nĩkĩ? Kũu nĩ kũmũuma Ngai! Ngai e weka nowe ũtonya kũekea andũ naĩ syoo.”
Mark2:8 O kwa mĩtũkĩ Yesũ nĩwamanyie ũndũ meũsũanĩa
Mark2:9 Nĩ ũndũ wĩva ũla wĩ laisi: Nĩ kwĩa mũndũ ũũ
Mark2:10 Yu nĩngũmwony'a kana Mwana wa Mũndũ e na ũtonyi wa kũekea andũ naĩ syoo kũũ ĩũlũ wa nthĩ!” Kwoou amwĩa mũndũ ũsu waĩ na mamutha monzu atĩĩ
Mark2:11 “Ũkĩla! Osa ũkomo waku na ũyĩnũka.”
Mark2:12 Mũndũ ũsu nĩwookĩlile
Mark2:13 Yesũ nĩwaendie ĩngĩ ũtee wa ĩia ya Kalilii. Andũ aingĩ nĩmoombanĩie vala ũĩ
Mark2:14 Avĩtĩte nĩwoonie mumĩthya wa koti weetawa Livai
Mark2:15 Masaa angĩ
Mark2:16 Yĩla amanyĩsya ma Mĩao ala maĩ Avalisi moonie Yesũ akĩya na eki ma naĩ na aumĩthya ma koti
Mark2:17 Yesũ nĩwamewie maikũlya na kwoou amasũngĩa amea atĩĩ
Mark2:18 Amanyĩw'a ma Yoana Mũvatisi na ma Avalisi nĩmatĩĩaa kũya. Kwoou andũ amwe nĩmookie vala ve Yesũ mamũkũlya atĩĩ
Mark2:19 Yesũ nake amakũlya atĩĩ
Mark2:20 Ĩndĩ ĩvinda nĩyũkĩte yĩla mũtwaani wĩvetangwa vala maĩ; ĩvindanĩ yĩu makatĩĩa kũya.
Mark2:21 “Vai mũndũ ũtumĩĩaa kĩlaka kyeũ ngũanĩ ngũũ; akakĩtumĩĩa nokĩtembũe ngũa ĩsu
Mark2:22 O ta ũu
Mark2:23 Mũthenya ũmwe wa Savato
Mark2:24 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Avalisi mamũkũlilye Yesũ atĩĩ
Mark2:25 Yesũ nĩwamakũlilye atĩĩ
Mark2:26 Nĩwalikile nyũmbanĩ ya Ngai na aya mĩkate ĩla yathembeetwe Ngai. Ũu eekie yĩla Aviathali waĩ Mũthembi Mũnene. Kwĩanana na Mĩao yaitũ
Mark2:27 Yesũ akĩminũkĩlya amea atĩĩ
Mark2:28 Kwoou Mwana wa Mũndũ e na ũkũmũ o na ĩũlũ Savato.”
Mark3:1 Ĩvinda yĩngĩ Yesũ nĩwaendie alika nyũmbanĩ ya Ayuti ya kũthaithĩa na kũmbanĩa
Mark3:2 Andũ amwe maĩ vau nĩmasyaĩĩsye Yesũ mũno mone kana nũkũvosya mũndũ ũsu mũthenyanĩ wa Savato nĩ kana mamũsikate.
Mark3:3 Yesũ nĩweeie mũndũ ũsu waĩ na kw'oko kwonzu atĩĩ
Mark3:4 Nĩwakũlilye andũ atĩĩ
Mark3:5 Yesũ nĩwamasiangisye onthe e mũthatu
Mark3:6 Avalisi nĩmaumaalile na kwa mĩtũkĩ moombana na andũ ma nguthu ya Mũsumbĩ Elote
Mark3:7 Yesũ nĩwaumie vau e na amanyĩw'a make mathi ũtee wa Ĩia ya Kalilii
Mark3:8 na Yelũsalemu
Mark3:9 Yesũ nĩweeie amanyĩw'a make nĩmamũthengeesye ĩsiwa alike
Mark3:10 Aĩ anavosya andũ aingĩ
Mark3:11 Andũ ala malikĩtwe nĩ maimũ namo mamwona Yesũ
Mark3:12 Ĩndĩ Yesũ nĩwakanisye maimũ asu mũno maikatavye andũ we nĩwe ũũ.
Mark3:13 Yesũ nĩwambatie kĩĩmanĩ na eeta andũ ala wendaa. Nĩmaendie vala ũĩ
Mark3:14 nake anyuva ĩkũmi na elĩ mamo mekalanasye nake na ĩtina e matũma makatavany'e
Mark3:15 na mayĩthĩwa na ũkũmũ wa kũlũngya maimũ.
Mark3:16 Ala wanyuvie nĩmo aa: Simioni ũla Yesũ watw'ĩĩie ĩsyĩtwa yĩngĩ amwĩta Vetelo;
Mark3:17 Yakovo na Yoana mwana-a-inyia
Mark3:18 Endelea na Vilivũ; Mbatholomiũ na Mathayo; Tomasi na Yakovo mwana wa Aveasi; Thateũsi na Simioni Mũkanaani
Mark3:19 na Yutasi Ĩsikalioti ũla wesie kũmũthoosya Yesũ.
Mark3:20 Yesũ nĩwenũkie
Mark3:21 Yĩla andũ ma mũsyĩ wa Yesũ meewie ũvoo ũsu
Mark3:22 Amanyĩsya amwe ma Mĩao mookĩte kuma Yelũsalemu nĩmaisye atĩĩ
Mark3:23 Yesũ nĩwametie moke vala ũĩ
Mark3:24 Ethĩwa ũsumbĩ nĩwĩyĩaanĩtye ikundi ikũkitana
Mark3:25 Na ethĩwa mũsyĩ nĩwĩyĩaanĩtye ikundi ikũkitana
Mark3:26 O ta ũu
Mark3:27 “Vai mũndũ ũtonya kũtũla nyũmba ya mũndũ wĩ vinya akakua mĩio yake. No nginya ambe kũmwova amũlumye ki
Mark3:28 “Nĩmũtavya w'o
Mark3:29 ĩndĩ mũndũ ũla ũmũumaa Veva Mũtheu
Mark3:30 Yesũ aneenie ũu nũndũ ve andũ maasya
Mark3:31 Inyia wa Yesũ na ana-a-inyia make nĩmookie
Mark3:32 Andũ ala mailyĩ nthĩ mamũthyũlũlũkĩte Yesũ mamwĩa atĩĩ
Mark3:33 Nake Yesũ amakũlya atĩĩ
Mark3:34 Nĩvo ĩndĩ asyaĩtye andũ ala mailyĩ nthĩ mamũthyũlũlũkĩte wameie atĩĩ
Mark3:35 Mũndũ o na wĩva ũla wĩkaa kwenda kwa Ngai
Mark4:1 Yesũ nĩwambĩĩie kũmanyĩsya ĩngĩ e ũtee wa Ĩia ya Kalilii. Ĩkomano yĩla yamũthyũlũlũkĩte yaĩ ĩnene mũno na kwoou athi alika ĩsiwanĩ yaĩ vau ĩianĩ na ekala nthĩ vo
Mark4:2 Nĩwamamanyĩisye maũndũ maingĩ aitũmĩa ngelekany'o. Momanyĩsyonĩ make nĩwameie atĩĩ
Mark4:3 “Ĩthukĩĩsyei! Mũĩmi ũmwe nĩwaendie kũvuĩa mbeũ.
Mark4:4 Akĩvuĩa
Mark4:5 Ingĩ nĩsyavalũkile mavianĩ
Mark4:6 Yĩla syũa yaaie
Mark4:7 Mbeke ingĩ nĩsyavalũkile mĩw'anĩ na syamea
Mark4:8 Ĩndĩ mbeke ingĩ nĩsyavalũkile mũthanganĩ mũseo na syamea
Mark4:9 Yesũ aiminũkĩlya nĩwameie atĩĩ
Mark4:10 Yĩla Yesũ watiiwe e weka
Mark4:11 Yesũ nĩwamasũngĩie amea atĩĩ
Mark4:12 nĩ kana o na matindĩa kũsisya
Mark4:13 Yesũ nĩwakũlilye amanyĩw'a make atĩĩ
Mark4:14 Mũndũ ũla wavuĩaa
Mark4:15 Andũ amwe mailyĩ mbeke ila syavalũkile nzĩanĩ. Mamina kwĩw'a ndeto
Mark4:16 Namo andũ angĩ mailyĩ mbeke ila syavalũkile mavianĩ. Meew'a ndeto
Mark4:17 Ĩndĩ ti ndiku mathayũnĩ moo na ndĩkala ĩvinda ĩasa. Kwoou yĩla thĩna kana ũnyamao wooka nũndũ wa ndeto ĩsu
Mark4:18 Andũ angĩ namo mailyĩ ta mbeke ila syameie mĩw'anĩ. Asu nĩ ala mew'aa ndeto
Mark4:19 ĩndĩ kwĩmakĩa kwoo na kwenda ũthwii na ĩtomo ya syĩndũ kũinyita ndeto ĩsu
Mark4:20 Ĩndĩ andũ angĩ mailyĩ mbeke ila syavalũkile mũthanganĩ mũseo. Meew'a ndeto nĩmamyosaa na kwĩthĩwa na ũsyao: Amwe kũndũ mĩongo ĩtatũ
Mark4:21 Yesũ nĩwasyokie amakũlya atĩĩ
Mark4:22 Maũndũ onthe ala mavithe makaumĩlw'a ũtheinĩ
Mark4:23 Ũla wĩ kũtũ
Mark4:24 O ĩngĩ Yesũ nĩwameie atĩĩ
Mark4:25 Mũndũ ũla wĩ na kĩndũ
Mark4:26 Yesũ nĩwaendeeie kũneena namo amea atĩĩ
Mark4:27 Nũkomaa ũtukũ na mũthenya aiamũka na kũendeea na maũndũ make. Ĩvindanĩ yĩu mbeũ isu nimeaa na kwĩana ũndũ we ũtesĩ.
Mark4:28 Mũthanga nĩw'o ũtumaa mbeũ isu imea na kwĩana: Mbee syambaa kumĩlya matũ
Mark4:29 Ũsyao ũsu weew'a na kũma
Mark4:30 Yesũ nĩwamakũlilye atĩĩ
Mark4:31 Ũsumbĩ wa Ngai no ũvw'ananw'e na mbeũ ĩla niini vyũ kwĩ ila ingĩ
Mark4:32 Nĩvo ĩndĩ ĩtina wa ĩvinda ĩnini
Mark4:33 Yesũ nĩwatavisye andũ ndeto ya Ngai aitũmĩa ngelekany'o mbingĩ sya mũthemba ũsu. Amatavisye o kwĩanana na ũndũ maĩ matonya kũelewa.
Mark4:34 Vai ũndũ waamatavya ateũtũmĩa ngelekany'o
Mark4:35 Mũthenyanĩ o ũsu kũkilĩlye kũtuka
Mark4:36 Kwoou amanyĩw'a make matia ĩkomano
Mark4:37 Maendete kĩuutani kĩnene nĩkyookĩlanilye
Mark4:38 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu Yesũ akomete mũtonĩ naku ĩsiwanĩ ĩtina
Mark4:39 Yesũ nĩwookĩlile na eeyĩaĩa kĩuutani kĩu ayasya atĩĩ
Mark4:40 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wamakũlilye atĩĩ
Mark4:41 Ĩndĩ amanyĩw'a maseng'a mũno na makũlany'a atĩĩ
Mark5:1 Yesũ na amanyĩw'a make nĩmainganĩisye ĩia
Mark5:2 Yesũ auma ĩsiwanĩ oou
Mark5:3 na ekalaa kũu kwathikawa andũ. Vai mũndũ waĩ atonya kũmwova akalũma
Mark5:4 Mavinda maingĩ andũ nĩmamwovaa na mbĩngũ na nyololo
Mark5:5 Ekalaa ũtukũ na mũthenya kũu mbũanĩ na iĩmanĩ
Mark5:6 Mũndũ ũsu nĩwamwonie Yesũ e vaasa
Mark5:7 Nĩwakayie na wasya mũnene asya atĩĩ
Mark5:8 Mũndũ ũsu aneenie ũu nũndũ Yesũ aĩ anasya atĩĩ
Mark5:9 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wamũkũlilye atĩĩ
Mark5:10 Mũndũ ũsu nĩwathetheeisye kũmwĩsũva Yesũ ndakalũngye maimũ asu maume nthĩ ĩsu.
Mark5:11 Vau ũkuvĩnĩ vaĩ ndĩthya nene ya ngũlũe yaĩsaa vau nguumo wa kĩĩma.
Mark5:12 Kwoou maimũ asu mamwĩsũva Yesũ maimwĩa atĩĩ
Mark5:13 Yesũ nĩwamanengie mwanya wa kwĩka ũu
Mark5:14 Andũ ala maĩthasya ngũlũe isu nĩmasembie matavany'a ũvoo ũsu kũu ndũanĩ na motũinĩ. Andũ nĩmookie mone ũndũ kweekĩka.
Mark5:15 Yĩla mavikie vala ve Yesũ
Mark5:16 Andũ ala moonete ũndũ ũsu nĩmatavisye andũ kĩla kyeekĩka kwa mũndũ ũsu walikĩtwe nĩ maimũ
Mark5:17 Andũ onthe nĩmamwĩsũvie Yesũ aume nthĩ yoo.
Mark5:18 Yesũ akĩlika ĩsiwanĩ athi
Mark5:19 Ĩndĩ Yesũ alea na amwĩa atĩĩ
Mark5:20 Kwoou mũndũ ũsu nĩwaendie
Mark5:21 Yesũ nĩwasyokie mũingo ũla ũngĩ wa ĩia. E ũtee wa ĩia
Mark5:22 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũtongoi ũmwe wa nyũmba ya Ayuti ya kũthaithĩa na kũmbanĩa weetawa Yailasi wookie
Mark5:23 na amwĩsũva mũno aimwĩa atĩĩ
Mark5:24 Kwoou Yesũ aendany'a nake. Andũ aingĩ nĩmamũatĩĩie Yesũ na nĩmamũvivinyaa kuma kĩla ngalĩko.
Mark5:25 Vaĩ mũndũ mũka ũmwe wekalĩte ayumwa nĩ nthakame vandũ va myaka ĩkũmi na ĩlĩ.
Mark5:26 Nĩwathĩnĩte mũno akĩiitwa nĩ ndakĩtalĩ mbingĩ na nĩwatũmĩĩte syĩndũ syake ikathela akĩyĩiitĩthya
Mark5:27 Mũndũ mũka ũsu nĩweew'ĩte ũvoo ĩũlũ wa Yesũ
Mark5:28 We nĩwaneenete na ngoo akasya
Mark5:29 O vau kwa vau nĩwaekie kumwa nĩ nthakame
Mark5:30 Kavindanĩ o kau Yesũ nĩwamanyie kana ve vinya wauma nthĩnĩ wake
Mark5:31 Amanyĩw'a make nĩmamũkũlilye atĩĩ
Mark5:32 Ĩndĩ Yesũ asiangya ngalĩko syonthe one ũla weeka ũu.
Mark5:33 Mũndũ mũka ũsu nĩwamanyie kĩla kyeekĩka kwake
Mark5:34 Yesũ nĩwamwĩie atĩĩ
Mark5:35 Yesũ aendee na kũneena ũu
Mark5:36 Yesũ nĩweewie kĩla maneena ĩndĩ eea mũtongoi ũsu atĩĩ
Mark5:37 Yesũ ndaaĩtĩkĩla mũndũ o na ũmwe aendany'e nake
Mark5:38 Yĩla mavikie mũsyĩ kwa mũtongoi ũsu
Mark5:39 Yesũ nĩwalikile nyũmba na amea atĩĩ
Mark5:40 Nĩmamũthekeeie mũno
Mark5:41 Yesũ nĩwakakwatie kw'oko na akea atĩĩ
Mark5:42 O vau kwa vau kelĩtu kau nĩkookĩlile na kambĩĩa kũtũũanga vau. Kaĩ ka myaka ĩkũmi na ĩlĩ. Andũ nĩmaseng'ie mũno moona ũu
Mark5:43 ĩndĩ Yesũ amakany'a maikatavye mũndũ o na ũmwe ũndũ kweekĩka. Nĩvo ĩndĩ wameie nĩmanenge kelĩtu kau kĩndũ kaye.
Mark6:1 Yesũ nĩwaumie vau athi ndũanĩ yake ya mũsyĩ e na amanyĩw'a make.
Mark6:2 Mũthenya wa Savato wavika nĩwaendie nyũmbanĩ ya Ayuti ya kũthaithĩa na kũmbanĩa
Mark6:3 Ũũ we tyo ũla vundi wa mbwaũ
Mark6:4 Yesũ nĩwameie atĩĩ
Mark6:5 Ndaaĩka kyama vau
Mark6:6 Yesũ nĩwaseng'ie mũno nũndũ wa andũ asu kwĩthĩwa mate na mũĩkĩĩo. Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ waendie kũu motũinĩ aimanyĩsya andũ.
Mark6:7 Nĩwametie ala amanyĩw'a ĩkũmi na elĩ na amatũma elĩ kwa elĩ
Mark6:8 Nĩwameaĩie amea atĩĩ
Mark6:9 Ĩkĩai iatũ na mũikakue ngũa sya ũkũany'a.”
Mark6:10 O ĩngĩ nĩwameie atĩĩ
Mark6:11 Vandũ vonthe vala mwĩthi na andũ mailea kũmũthokya kana kũmwĩthukĩĩsya
Mark6:12 Kwoou amanyĩw'a nĩmaendie maitavya andũ nĩmelile kwondũ wa naĩ syoo.
Mark6:13 Nĩmalũngilye maimũ maingĩ na mavaka andũ aingĩ awau mauta na kũmavosya.
Mark6:14 Mũsumbĩ Elote nĩweewie maũndũ ala Yesũ weekaa
Mark6:15 Andũ angĩ namo maasya atĩĩ
Mark6:16 Yĩla Elote weewie ũndũ andũ mekwasya ĩũlũ wa Yesũ nĩwaisye atĩĩ
Mark6:17 Elote nĩwe waĩtye Yoana akwatwe na ayovwa yela. Eekie ũu nũndũ wa Elotiasi ũla waĩ anamũtwaa
Mark6:18 Yoana nĩwatindĩaa kũkany'a Elote aimwĩa atĩĩ
Mark6:19 Elotiasi aĩ na ũthũ na Yoana
Mark6:20 Elote nĩwakĩaa Yoana na nĩwamũsũvĩaa
Mark6:21 Elotiasi nĩwesie kũkwata mwanya mũseo mũthenyanĩ wa kũlilikana ĩsyawa ya Elote. Mũsumbĩ Elote nĩwaseũvisye mboka nene na athokya atongoi ma silikalĩ na anene ma asikalĩ
Mark6:22 Mwĩĩtu wa Elotiasi nĩwookie na asũnga. Nĩwatanĩthisye mũsumbĩ mũno vamwe na aeni make
Mark6:23 Mũsumbĩ nĩweevĩtie amwĩa
Mark6:24 Mwĩĩtu ũsu nĩwaumaalile na athi akũlya nyinyia atĩĩ
Mark6:25 O mĩtũkĩ mwĩĩtu ũsu nĩwasyokie ekalaatĩte vala ve mũsumbĩ na amwĩa atĩĩ
Mark6:26 Ũndũ ũsu nĩweew'ĩthisye mũsumbĩ woo mũno
Mark6:27 O vau kwa vau mũsumbĩ nĩwatũmie mũsikalĩ ũmwe na amwĩaĩa athi akaete mũtwe wa Yoana. Mũsikalĩ ũsu nĩwaendie yela na amũtila Yoana mũtwe.
Mark6:28 Nĩwaũetie wĩ ĩsaaninĩ na anenga ũla mwĩĩtu
Mark6:29 Yĩla amanyĩw'a ma Yoana meewie ũvoo ũsu
Mark6:30 Atũmwa nĩmasyokie vala ve Yesũ na mamũtavya maũndũ onthe ala mekie na ala mamanyĩisye.
Mark6:31 Andũ aingĩ nĩmatindĩie kũka na kũthi
Mark6:32 Nĩmalikile ĩsiwanĩ na mathi vandũ voo me oka.
Mark6:33 Andũ aingĩ nĩmamonie maikũsya na mamamanya
Mark6:34 Yesũ ayuma ĩsiwanĩ nĩwoonie ĩkomano ĩnene ya andũ
Mark6:35 Kũkilĩlye kũtuka
Mark6:36 ekana na andũ aa mathi mĩsyĩnĩ na motũinĩ ala me ũkuvĩnĩ makethooee lĩu maye.”
Mark6:37 Nake Yesũ amea atĩĩ
Mark6:38 Yesũ amakũlya atĩĩ
Mark6:39 Nake Yesũ amea atĩĩ
Mark6:40 Andũ nĩmekalile nthĩ ikundi sya andũ mĩongo ĩtano na ingĩ sya andũ ĩana.
Mark6:41 Yesũ nĩwoosie mĩkate ĩsu ĩtano na ala makũyũ elĩ na asyaĩtye ĩtunĩ
Mark6:42 Andũ onthe nĩmaĩe mavũna ki.
Mark6:43 Nĩvo ĩndĩ amanyĩw'a moombanisye ilungu ila syatialile sya mĩkate na makũyũ syausũa ikavũ ĩkũmi na ilĩ.
Mark6:44 Ũtalo wa aũme ala maĩe lĩu ũsu waĩ ngili itano.
Mark6:45 O mĩtũkĩ Yesũ nĩwathing'ĩĩisye amanyĩw'a make malike ĩsiwanĩ maendae ndũanĩ ya Mbethisaita
Mark6:46 Amina kũtaanĩsya na andũ
Mark6:47 Kwaĩ kũnatuka na Yesũ aĩ o ũtumonĩ e weka
Mark6:48 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ woonie amanyĩw'a make maithĩnany'a na ĩsiwa
Mark6:49 Ĩndĩ yĩla amanyĩw'a make mamwonie akinyĩlĩte ĩianĩ ĩũlũ
Mark6:50 nĩkwĩthĩwa onthe nĩmamwonie na matelema mũno. Ĩndĩ Yesũ nĩwaneenie o kwa mĩtũkĩ amea atĩĩ
Mark6:51 Nĩvo ĩndĩ walikile ĩsiwanĩ vala maĩ na kĩuutani kyausya. Amanyĩw'a nĩmaseng'ie mũno vyũ
Mark6:52 nũndũ mayaĩ manaelewa nĩ kĩla kyama kya kũvũnĩthw'a kwa andũ ngili itano
Mark6:53 Yesũ na amanyĩw'a make mamina kũinga ĩia nĩmavikie vandũ vetawa Ngenesaleti
Mark6:54 Mauma ĩsiwanĩ oou
Mark6:55 na kwoou masemba mathi kũu ndũanĩ kw'onthe
Mark6:56 Vandũ vonthe vala Yesũ waendaa: Motũinĩ
Mark7:1 Avalisi amwe na amanyĩsya ma Mĩao nĩmaumie Yelũsalemu na mooka kũmbanĩa vala ve Yesũ.
Mark7:2 Nĩmoonie amanyĩw'a amwe ma Yesũ maĩya lĩu na moko mate matheu
Mark7:3 (Avalisi na Ayuti onthe maiĩsaa lĩu matathambĩte moko kwĩanana na mokũũ ma aaũmae moo.
Mark7:4 Yĩla mauma ndũnyũ
Mark7:5 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Avalisi na amanyĩsya ma Mĩao makũlilye Yesũ atĩĩ
Mark7:6 Yesũ amasũngĩa amea atĩĩ
Mark7:7 Vai vata woo kũnthaitha
Mark7:8 “Mũtiĩte Mĩao ya Ngai nĩ kana mũatĩĩe mokũũ ma andũ.”
Mark7:9 Yesũ nĩwaendeeie kũneena namo amea atĩĩ
Mark7:10 Mĩaonĩ Mwose aĩtye
Mark7:11 Ĩndĩ inyw'ĩ mũmanyĩasya kana ethĩwa mũndũ akeea ĩthe kana nyinyia
Mark7:12 inyw'ĩ mwĩthĩawa mũtamwĩtĩkĩlya ĩngĩ atethye ĩthe kana nyinyia.
Mark7:13 Kwoou mũtusaa ndeto ya Ngai kwĩthĩwa ya mana kwĩsĩla mokũũnĩ ala mũmanyĩasya. Ve maũndũ maingĩ mathũkĩte o ta asu ala mwĩkaa.”
Mark7:14 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wametie andũ ĩngĩ mooka vala ũĩ na amea atĩĩ
Mark7:15 Vai kĩndũ mũndũ ũĩsaa kĩkamũvukya
Mark7:16 Ũla wĩ kũtũ
Mark7:17 Ĩtina wa Yesũ na amanyĩw'a make kuma vau andũnĩ na kũlika nyũmba
Mark7:18 Nake amakũlya atĩĩ
Mark7:19 nũndũ ndũendaa ngoonĩ yake
Mark7:20 Yesũ nĩwaendeeie na kũmea atĩĩ
Mark7:21 Nũndũ ngoonĩ ya mũndũ nĩvo vaumaa mosũanĩo mathũku ma kũmanyana kĩ-mwĩĩ kwa andũ matatwaanĩte
Mark7:22 kwĩw'ĩa syĩndũ syeene ĩtomo
Mark7:23 Maũndũ aa onthe mathũku maumaa ngoonĩ ya mũndũ
Mark7:24 Yesũ nĩwaumie vau athi kĩsionĩ kĩla kĩ vakuvĩ na ndũa sya Tile na Sitoni. Nĩwekalile kũu vandũ nyũmba na ndendaa andũ mamanye kana e vo
Mark7:25 Kĩveti kĩmwe kelĩtu kakyo kalikĩtwe nĩ ĩimũ nĩkyeewie kana Yesũ e kũu na kyathi mĩtũkĩ kyatulya ndu mbee wake.
Mark7:26 Kĩveti kĩu kyaĩ Kĩmũkiliki na kyasyaĩtwe kĩsionĩ kĩtawa Voenisia nthĩ ya Silia. Nĩkyamwĩsũvie Yesũ mũno nĩ kana alũngye ĩimũ yĩu yume kelĩtunĩ kakyo.
Mark7:27 Ĩndĩ Yesũ akĩsũngĩa
Mark7:28 Nakyo kyamwĩa atĩĩ
Mark7:29 Yesũ akĩtavya akĩa atĩĩ
Mark7:30 Mũndũ mũka ũsu nĩwenũkie
Mark7:31 Yesũ nĩwaumie kĩsionĩ kĩu kĩ vakuvĩ na ndũa ya Tile
Mark7:32 Andũ amwe nĩmamũeteie mũndũ ũtaneenaa na ũtew'aa nthĩ
Mark7:33 Yesũ nĩwaumisye mũndũ ũsu andũnĩ
Mark7:34 Yesũ asyaĩtye ĩũlũ ĩtunĩ
Mark7:35 Vau kwa vau
Mark7:36 Yesũ nĩweeaĩie andũ maikatavye mũndũ o na ũmwe
Mark7:37 Andũ asu nĩmaseng'ie mũno vyũ na masya atĩĩ
Mark8:1 Ĩvindanĩ o yĩu
Mark8:2 “Nĩngwĩw'ĩa andũ aa tei
Mark8:3 Ethĩwa nĩngũmalekya menũke na nzaa
Mark8:4 Amanyĩw'a make mamũkũlya atĩĩ
Mark8:5 Nake Yesũ amakũlya atĩĩ
Mark8:6 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ weeaĩie andũ onthe mekale nthĩ
Mark8:7 O ta ũu maĩ na tũmakũyũ tũvũthũ na ĩtina wa Yesũ kũtũathima
Mark8:8 Andũ asu nĩmaĩe mavũna na amanyĩw'a moombany'a ilungu ila syatialile syausũa ikavũ mũonza.
Mark8:9 Andũ ala maĩe maĩ ta ngili inya. Yesũ amina kwĩa andũ nĩmenũke
Mark8:10 nĩwalikile ĩsiwanĩ mĩtũkĩ vamwe na amanyĩw'a make na mathi ndũanĩ ya Ndalimanutha.
Mark8:11 Avalisi amwe nĩmaendie vala ve Yesũ na mambĩĩa kũkananĩa nake. Nĩmamanthaa nzĩa ya kũmũkwatya na kwoou mamwĩa atĩĩ
Mark8:12 Yesũ nĩwavevũũkie mũno na asya atĩĩ
Mark8:13 Nĩwamatiie alika ĩngĩ ĩsiwanĩ e na amanyĩw'a make
Mark8:14 Amanyĩw'a nĩmoolilwe nĩ kũkua mĩkate ĩmeanĩe; no mũkate o ũmwe maĩ naw'o ĩsiwanĩ.
Mark8:15 Yesũ nĩwamakanisye amea atĩĩ
Mark8:16 Namo meeana atĩĩ
Mark8:17 Yesũ nĩwamanyie ũndũ mekwasya
Mark8:18 Mũitonya kwona na mwĩ na metho? Mũitonya kwĩw'a na mwĩ na matũ? Inyw'ĩ mũililikene
Mark8:19 yĩla natilangile mĩkate ĩtano yaĩwa nĩ andũ ngili ĩtano
Mark8:20 “Na yĩla natilangile mĩkate mũonza yaĩwa nĩ andũ ngili inya
Mark8:21 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wamakũlilye atĩĩ
Mark8:22 Yĩla mookie Mbethisaita
Mark8:23 Yesũ nĩwakĩkwatie kw'oko na akĩtwaa nza wa ndũa ĩsu. Nĩwakĩtw'ĩlile mata metho na amina ũkilĩĩla moko make akĩkũlya atĩĩ
Mark8:24 Nakyo kyasalukya na kyasya atĩĩ
Mark8:25 Yesũ akilĩĩla moko ĩngĩ methonĩ makyo
Mark8:26 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wamwĩie mũndũ ũsu atĩĩ
Mark8:27 Yesũ nĩwaumie vau na athi e na amanyĩw'a make ndũanĩ ila ithyũlũlũkĩte Kaisalea Vilivi. Me nzĩanĩ maendete
Mark8:28 Namo mamwĩa atĩĩ
Mark8:29 Yesũ amakũlya atĩĩ
Mark8:30 Ĩndĩ Yesũ amakany'a amea atĩĩ
Mark8:31 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wambĩĩie kũmanyĩsya amanyĩw'a make aimea atĩĩ
Mark8:32 Amatavisye ũndũ ũsu ateũvithany'a. Nĩvo ĩndĩ Vetelo wamwĩtie Yesũ mathi nzama na amwĩa atĩĩ
Mark8:33 Ĩndĩ Yesũ eethyũũa na amasisya amanyĩw'a make na amũkany'a Vetelo aimwĩa atĩĩ
Mark8:34 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ weetie ĩkomano vamwe na amanyĩw'a make mathengee vala ũĩ na amea atĩĩ
Mark8:35 Nũndũ ũla wendaa kũsũvĩa thayũ wake akawasya
Mark8:36 Ve ũtethyo mwaũ
Mark8:37 Nĩ kyaũ mũndũ ũtonya kũnengane akakũany'a na thayũ wake?
Mark8:38 Kwoou ethĩwa mũndũ akeew'a nthoni kũwetanĩw'a nakwa
Mark9:1 Yesũ nĩwaendeeie kũneena amea atĩĩ
Mark9:2 Ĩtina wa matukũ thanthatũ
Mark9:3 na ngũa syake syeeũva kw'ũ
Mark9:4 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Eliya na Mwose maumĩlile vau
Mark9:5 Vetelo nĩweeie Yesũ atĩĩ
Mark9:6 Vetelo ndamanyaa ũndũ ũkwasya
Mark9:7 Ĩtu nĩyesĩlile ĩũlũ woo na yamavw'ĩka
Mark9:8 Nĩmasiangisye mĩtũkĩ kũũ na kũũ ĩndĩ mayaaona mũndũ ũngĩ e namo ate o Yesũ.
Mark9:9 Matheete kuma kĩĩmanĩ
Mark9:10 Nĩmakwatie ũu Yesũ wamatavisye
Mark9:11 Nĩmakũlilye Yesũ atĩĩ
Mark9:12 Nake amasũngĩa amea atĩĩ
Mark9:13 Nĩmũtavya w'o
Mark9:14 Yĩla Yesũ na amanyĩw'a asu atatũ masyokie vala ve amanyĩw'a ala angĩ
Mark9:15 Andũ mamwona Yesũ nĩmaseng'ie mũno
Mark9:16 Yesũ nĩwakũlilye amanyĩw'a make atĩĩ
Mark9:17 Mũndũ ũmwe waĩ vau ĩkomanonĩ nĩwamũsũngĩie amwĩa atĩĩ
Mark9:18 Yĩla ĩimũ yĩu yamũkwata
Mark9:19 Yesũ nĩwameie atĩĩ
Mark9:20 Na makaete vala ve Yesũ. Yĩla ĩimũ yĩu yamwonie Yesũ oou
Mark9:21 Yesũ nĩwakũlilye ĩthe wa kamwana kau atĩĩ
Mark9:22 Mavinda maingĩ ĩimũ yĩu nĩyendaa kũkoaa kwa kũkekya mwakinĩ kana kĩw'ũnĩ. Ethĩwa nũtonya
Mark9:23 Yesũ amũsũngĩa
Mark9:24 O kwa mĩtũkĩ ĩthe wa kamwana kau nĩwaneenie na wasya mũnene asya atĩĩ
Mark9:25 Yĩla Yesũ woonie andũ aingĩ masembete mamũmbĩĩe
Mark9:26 Ĩimũ yĩu nĩyakayie na wasya mũnene na yathingithangya kamwana kau na yauma. Kamwana kau kekalile ũu ta kakw'ũ
Mark9:27 Ĩndĩ Yesũ akakwata kw'oko akokĩlya na kaũngama.
Mark9:28 Ĩtina wa Yesũ na amanyĩw'a make kũsyoka nyũmba me oka
Mark9:29 Nake amasũngĩa
Mark9:30 Yesũ vamwe na amanyĩw'a make nĩmaumie vau mathi mavĩtĩla kĩsionĩ kya Kalilii. Ndendaa andũ maimanya vala ũĩ
Mark9:31 nũndũ akwete kũmanyĩsya amanyĩw'a make akĩmea atĩĩ
Mark9:32 Amanyĩw'a make mayaaelewa nĩ ũndũ ũsu
Mark9:33 Yesũ na amanyĩw'a make nĩmaendie Kavelinaũmu. Me nyũmba
Mark9:34 Mayaamũsũngĩa nũndũ me nzĩanĩ makũlanasya nũũ ũla mũnene katĩ woo.
Mark9:35 Yesũ nĩwekalile nthĩ na eeta amanyĩw'a asu ĩkũmi na elĩ mamũthengee na amea atĩĩ
Mark9:36 Nĩvo ĩndĩ waetie kana akaũngamya mbee woo
Mark9:37 “Ũla ũthokasya o na kana ta kaa kwondũ wakwa
Mark9:38 Yoana nĩwamwĩie Yesũ atĩĩ
Mark9:39 Nake Yesũ amwĩa atĩĩ
Mark9:40 Mũndũ o na wĩva ũla ũteũleana naitũ
Mark9:41 Kwa w'o nĩmũtavya kana mũndũ o na wĩva ũla ũkamũnenga kĩw'ũ mũnyw'e nĩkwĩthĩwa mwĩ ma Klĩsto
Mark9:42 “Ethĩwa ve mũndũ ũkatuma kamwe ka tũũ tũnini tũmbĩtĩkĩlaa kaluluutĩka
Mark9:43 Kwoou ethĩwa kw'oko kwaku kũkatuma ũluluutĩka
Mark9:44 Vau
Mark9:45 Ethĩwa kũũ kwaku kũkatuma ũluluutĩka
Mark9:46 Vau
Mark9:47 Ethĩwa itho yaku nayo nĩyĩũtuma ũluluutĩka
Mark9:48 Vau
Mark9:49 “Kĩla mũndũ akathew'a na mwaki o tondũ nthembo sya kũvĩvw'a itheaw'a syavakwa mũnyũ.
Mark9:50 “Mũnyũ nĩ mũseo
Mark10:1 Yesũ nĩwaumie vau athi nthĩ ya Yutia
Mark10:2 Avalisi amwe nĩmookie vala ũĩ mayenda kũmũtata na kwoou mamũkũlya atĩĩ
Mark10:3 Yesũ nĩwamakũlilye atĩĩ
Mark10:4 Namo mamwĩa
Mark10:5 Nake Yesũ amea atĩĩ
Mark10:6 Ĩndĩ kuma mwambĩlĩĩlyonĩ wa kũmbwa kwa nthĩ
Mark10:7 ‘Kĩu nĩkyo kĩtumaa mũndũ-ũme auma kwa ĩthe na nyinyia
Mark10:8 na elĩ makĩtw'ĩka kĩndũ kĩmwe.’ Kwa kĩtumi kĩu
Mark10:9 Kwoou mũndũ o na wĩva ndakaataany'e ala Ngai ũkwatanĩtye.”
Mark10:10 Yĩla masyokie nyũmba
Mark10:11 Yesũ nĩwameie atĩĩ
Mark10:12 Nake mũndũ mũka amũlea mũũme
Mark10:13 Andũ amwe nĩmaeteie Yesũ syana nini aiathime kwa kũsilĩĩla moko
Mark10:14 Yĩla Yesũ woonie ũu
Mark10:15 Nĩmũtavya w'o
Mark10:16 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ woosie syana isu na aiathima kwa kũsilĩĩla moko.
Mark10:17 Yesũ ayuma vau athi
Mark10:18 Yesũ amwĩa atĩĩ
Mark10:19 We nĩwĩsĩ ũndũ mĩao ĩkwasya: ‘Ndũkoae mũndũ; ndũkalaalae; ndũkoye; ndũkanengane ũkũsĩ wa ũvũngũ ĩũlũ wa mũndũ ũngĩ; ndũkavene mũndũ syĩndũ syake kwa nzĩa ya ũkengani
Mark10:20 Mũndũ ũsu amwĩa atĩĩ
Mark10:21 Yesũ nĩwasyaisye mũndũ ũsu na ngoo yake yamwenda
Mark10:22 Mũndũ ũsu eew'a ndeto isu
Mark10:23 Yesũ nĩwasiangisye ngalĩko syonthe na eea amanyĩw'a make atĩĩ
Mark10:24 Ndeto isu nĩsyaseng'isye amanyĩw'a mũno
Mark10:25 Nĩ ũndũ wĩ laisi kwa ngamĩle kũlikĩla kalimanĩ ka singano
Mark10:26 Amanyĩw'a make nĩmaseng'ie mũno nĩ ndeto syake na mamũkũlya atĩĩ
Mark10:27 Yesũ nĩwamasyaisye na amea atĩĩ
Mark10:28 Vetelo nake amwĩa atĩĩ
Mark10:29 Yesũ asya atĩĩ
Mark10:30 akakwata ĩtuvi nũndũ wa ũu. Ĩvindanĩ yĩĩ akakwata kũndũ ĩana: Mĩsyĩ
Mark10:31 Ĩndĩ aingĩ ala yu matongoetye makatongoew'a
Mark10:32 Yesũ na andũ angĩ ala waĩ namo maĩ nzĩanĩ mambatĩte Yelũsalemu
Mark10:33 Nĩwameie atĩĩ
Mark10:34 ala namo makamũthekeea na kũmũtw'ĩlanga mata
Mark10:35 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yakovo na Yoana
Mark10:36 Nake amakũlya atĩĩ
Mark10:37 Namo mamũsũngĩa
Mark10:38 Yesũ amea atĩĩ
Mark10:39 Namo mamwĩa atĩĩ
Mark10:40 ĩndĩ ndi na ũtonyi wa kũnyuva ũla wĩĩkala ngalĩko ya kw'oko kwakwa kwa aũme
Mark10:41 Yĩla amanyĩw'a ala angĩ ĩkũmi meewie kĩla Yakovo na Yoana makũlya nĩmathatiw'e nĩmo mũno.
Mark10:42 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wametie onthe vamwe na amea atĩĩ
Mark10:43 Ĩndĩ ũu ti w'o kwaĩlĩte kwĩthĩwa kũilyĩ katĩ wenyu. Ethĩwa ũmwe wenyu nũkwenda kwĩthĩwa e mũnene
Mark10:44 Na ethĩwa ũmwe wenyu eenda kwĩthĩwa e mũtongoi wa ala angĩ
Mark10:45 Nĩkwĩthĩwa o nake Mwana wa Mũndũ ndaaũka kũthũkũmwa nĩ andũ
Mark10:46 Yesũ nĩwavikie Yeliko e na amanyĩw'a make
Mark10:47 Yĩla weewie kana Yesũ kuma Nasaleti nĩwe ũvĩtĩte
Mark10:48 Andũ aingĩ nĩmamũkanisye avindye
Mark10:49 Yesũ nĩwaũngamie na asya atĩĩ
Mark10:50 Nĩwekisye ĩtheka ngũa ĩla weevw'ĩkĩte
Mark10:51 Yesũ nĩwamũkũlilye atĩĩ
Mark10:52 Nake Yesũ amwĩa atĩĩ
Mark11:1 Yesũ na amanyĩw'a make me vakuvĩ kũvika Yelũsalemu
Mark11:2 amea atĩĩ
Mark11:3 Mwakũlw'a nĩ mũndũ
Mark11:4 Nĩvo ĩndĩ maendie na meethĩa ndena ya ĩng'oi yovetwe nza
Mark11:5 andũ maũngyĩ vau nĩmamakũlilye atĩĩ
Mark11:6 Namo ala amanyĩw'a masũngĩa o tondũ Yesũ wamatavĩtye
Mark11:7 Nĩmaetie ndena ĩsu vala ve Yesũ
Mark11:8 Andũ nĩmalanilye ngũa syoo nzĩanĩ
Mark11:9 Andũ ala maĩ mbee wake na ala mamumĩte ĩtina nĩmookĩlilye wasya mũnene mayasya atĩĩ
Mark11:10 Nĩ mũathime ũsumbĩ ũla wĩũka wa ũmae waitũ Ndeviti! Hosana ĩũlũ ĩtunĩ!”
Mark11:11 Yesũ nĩwalikile Yelũsalemu na athi Ĩkalũnĩ; nĩwasyaisye kĩla kĩndũ kũu kw'onthe
Mark11:12 Ũnĩ ũsu maumĩte Mbethani
Mark11:13 E vaasa nĩwoonie mũkũyũ waĩ na matũ mathungu
Mark11:14 Yesũ nĩweeie mũkũyũ ũsu atĩĩ
Mark11:15 Yĩla mavikie Yelũsalemu
Mark11:16 Ndaaĩtĩkĩlya mũndũ o na ũmwe avĩtĩlye kĩndũ vau Ĩkalũnĩ.
Mark11:17 Nĩvo ĩndĩ wamanyĩisye andũ amea atĩĩ
Mark11:18 Athembi anene na amanyĩsya ma Mĩao nĩmeewie ũvoo ũsu
Mark11:19 Syũa yĩ vakuvĩ kũthũa
Mark11:20 Kwakya kĩoko tene Yesũ na amanyĩw'a make maendete na nzĩa
Mark11:21 Vetelo nĩwalilikanile ũndũ Yesũ waneenete ĩũlũ wa mũkũyũ ũsu na amwĩa atĩĩ
Mark11:22 Yesũ nĩwamasũngĩie amea atĩĩ
Mark11:23 Nĩmũtavya w'o
Mark11:24 Kwa kĩtumi kĩu
Mark11:25 Na yĩla mwaũngama mũvoye
Mark11:26 Ĩndĩ mwalea kũekea andũ ala angĩ mavĩtyo moo
Mark11:27 Yesũ na amanyĩw'a make nĩmavikie ĩngĩ Yelũsalemu
Mark11:28 na mamũkũlya atĩĩ
Mark11:29 Yesũ nĩwamasũngĩie amea atĩĩ
Mark11:30 Kwa ndavyei
Mark11:31 Namo mambĩĩa kũoany'a maikũlany'a atĩĩ
Mark11:32 Na tũitonya kwasya
Mark11:33 Kwoou mamwĩa atĩĩ
Mark12:1 Yesũ nĩwaneenie namo na ngelekany'o amea atĩĩ
Mark12:2 Ĩvinda ya kũketha nzavivũ yavika
Mark12:3 Ĩndĩ aĩmi asu nĩmakwatie mũthũkũmi ũsu mamũvũa
Mark12:4 Nĩwatũmie mũthũkũmi ũngĩ
Mark12:5 Mwene wa mũũnda nĩwatũmie mũthũkũmi o ũngĩ
Mark12:6 Mwene mũũnda atialile na mwana wake ũla wendete. Mũminũkĩlyonĩ nĩwamũtũmie kũla maĩ asũanĩĩte akasya
Mark12:7 Ĩndĩ aĩmi asu nĩmeeanie atĩĩ
Mark12:8 Kwoou nĩmamũkwatie mamũaa na mamwĩkya nza wa mũũnda ũsu.”
Mark12:9 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wakũlilye andũ atĩĩ
Mark12:10 Inyw'ĩ nĩmũsomete Maandĩko Matheu ala maĩtye; ‘Ĩvia yĩla yaleilwe nĩ andũ ala makaa myako
Mark12:11 Mwĩai nĩwe wĩkĩte ũndũ ũsu
Mark12:12 Atongoi asu nĩmendie kũmũkwata Yesũ nũndũ nĩmamanyie kana ematavasya ngelekany'o ĩsu aimatina. Ĩndĩ makĩa andũ
Mark12:13 Amwe ma Avalisi na ma nguthu ya Mũsumbĩ Elote nĩmatũmiwe makamũtee Yesũ aneene ũndũ ũtaĩlĩte kwa kũmũkũlya makũlyo.
Mark12:14 Nĩmaendie vala ũĩ na mamwĩa atĩĩ
Mark12:15 Yesũ nĩwamanyie ũseleke woo na kwoou amea atĩĩ
Mark12:16 Nĩmamũnengie
Mark12:17 Nake amea atĩĩ
Mark12:18 Asatũkai
Mark12:19 “Mũmanyĩsya
Mark12:20 Yuĩ
Mark12:21 Mũinae nake nĩwoosie mũndũ mũka ũsu ekala nake ta mũka
Mark12:22 Onthe me mũonza nĩmakwie na vai ũmwe woo waatia kana. Ĩtina mũndũ mũka ũsu o nake nĩwakwie.
Mark12:23 Yu kwatũtavye
Mark12:24 Yesũ nĩwamasũngĩie amea atĩĩ
Mark12:25 Yĩla andũ makathayũũka kuma kwa akw'ũ
Mark12:26 Naw'o ũndũ wa kũthayũũka kuma kwa akw'ũ
Mark12:27 We ti Ngai wa ala akw'ũ
Mark12:28 Mũmanyĩsya ũmwe wa Mĩao nĩwavikie ĩvinda yĩla Yesũ na Asatũkai makananĩaa. Nĩweewie ũsũngĩo wa Yesũ wĩ mũseo na amũkũlya atĩĩ
Mark12:29 Yesũ nĩwamũsũngĩie amwĩa atĩĩ
Mark12:30 Mwende Ngai waku na ngoo yaku yonthe
Mark12:31 Naw'o wa kelĩ nĩ ũũ
Mark12:32 Nake mũmanyĩsya ũsu wa Mĩao amwĩa atĩĩ
Mark12:33 O ta ũu
Mark12:34 Yesũ nĩwoonie asũngĩa na ũmanyi na amwĩa atĩĩ
Mark12:35 Yesũ akĩmanyĩsya Ĩkalũnĩ nĩwakũlilye atĩĩ
Mark12:36 Ndeviti mwene aveveewe nĩ Veva Mũtheu nĩwaisye atĩĩ
Mark12:37 Ethĩwa ĩndĩ Ndeviti eetie Klĩsto
Mark12:38 Nthĩnĩ wa ũmanyĩsyo wake
Mark12:39 O ta ũu mendete kwĩkala ivĩlanĩ sya mbee nyũmbanĩ sya Ayuti sya kũthaithĩa na kũmbanĩa
Mark12:40 Nĩmavenaa aka ndiwa syĩndũ syoo na kwĩseũvya kwa kũvoya mboya ndaasa. Ũsilĩlo woo ũkeethĩwa wĩ mũnene mũno.”
Mark12:41 Yesũ nĩwailyĩ nthĩ vakuvĩ na kĩndũ kĩla kyeekĩawa mĩvothi
Mark12:42 Ĩndĩ kĩveti kĩmwe ndiwa na kĩtaĩ syĩndũ
Mark12:43 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wametie amanyĩw'a make na amea atĩĩ
Mark12:44 Andũ ala angĩ meumasya nũndũ mena mbingĩ
Mark13:1 Yesũ aumaalũkĩte Ĩkalũnĩ
Mark13:2 Nake Yesũ amwĩa atĩĩ
Mark13:3 Yesũ ailyĩ nthĩ Kĩĩmanĩ kya Mĩthata asyaĩtye Ĩkalũnĩ
Mark13:4 “Tũtavye
Mark13:5 Yesũ amea atĩĩ
Mark13:6 Andũ aingĩ makooka na ĩsyĩtwa yakwa mayasya
Mark13:7 Yĩla mwĩĩw'a ituu sya makaũ na ngewa sya makaũ mokĩte mũikaamake. Maũndũ asu no nginya mekĩke
Mark13:8 Nthĩ ĩkakwatya kaũ na ĩngĩ
Mark13:9 “Inyw'ĩ nĩmwaĩlĩte kwĩsũvĩa nũndũ andũ makamũkwata na kũmũtwaa kotinĩ
Mark13:10 Ĩndĩ mũminũkĩlyo ũtanoka
Mark13:11 Yĩla mwĩkwatwa na kũtwawa kotinĩ mũikaatinde mũithĩnĩka mwĩthi kwasya ata. Mwĩneena kĩla mwĩnengwa kavindanĩ o kau
Mark13:12 Mũndũ akanengane mwana-a-inyia oawe
Mark13:13 Nenyu mũkamenwa nĩ andũ onthe nũndũ wakwa
Mark13:14 “Yĩla mũkona
Mark13:15 Mũndũ ũla ũkethĩwa e kĩalanĩ kya nyũmba yake ĩũlũ
Mark13:16 O ta ũu
Mark13:17 Ĩvinda yĩu yĩkeethĩwa yĩ ya thĩna mũnene kwa aka ala aito
Mark13:18 Voyai Ngai nĩ kana maũndũ asu maikaaĩthĩwe ĩvindanĩ ya mbevo na mbua!
Mark13:19 Nũndũ mathĩna ma ĩvinda yĩu makeethĩwa me mathũku mũno kũvĩtũka thĩna o na wĩva
Mark13:20 Ta kethĩwa Ngai ndaolete matukũ asu
Mark13:21 “Kwoou ĩvindanĩ yĩu ethĩwa mũndũ o na wĩva akamwĩa
Mark13:22 Kũkaumĩla andũ aingĩ mekwĩyĩta Klĩsto o vamwe na athani aingĩ ma ũvũngũ. Makeeka syama na maũndũ ma kũseng'ya nĩ kana masye andũ
Mark13:23 Ĩndĩ inyw'ĩ ĩsũvĩei! Nĩnamũtavya maũndũ onthe ĩvinda yĩu yĩtanavika.
Mark13:24 “Ĩvindanĩ yĩu ĩtina wa mathĩna asu
Mark13:25 Ndata ikavalũkanga kuma matunĩ
Mark13:26 Nĩvo ĩndĩ andũ makamwona Mwana wa Mũndũ okĩte e mathweonĩ na e na ũtonyi na ndaĩa nene.
Mark13:27 Akatũma alaĩka mathi makombany'e anyuve make kuma kĩla vandũ ĩũlũ wa nthĩ.
Mark13:28 “Ĩmanyĩsyei ũndũ kuma mũkũyũnĩ. Yĩla mbonge syaw'o syoololoa na syamesya matũ
Mark13:29 No ta ũu
Mark13:30 Nĩmũtavya w'o
Mark13:31 Ĩtu na nthĩ ikathela
Mark13:32 “Vai mũndũ o na ũmwe wĩsĩ mũthenya kana saa wa mũminũkĩlyo. O na alaĩka ma ĩtunĩ vamwe na Mwana mayĩsĩ; no Asa e weka wĩsĩ mũthenya ũsu.
Mark13:33 Ĩkalai mwĩsũvĩĩte
Mark13:34 Kũkeethĩwa o ta ũndũ mũndũ akĩthi kyalo kuma mũsyĩ kwake wĩkaa. Nũtiĩaa athũkũmi wĩa ũla metethasya ate kw'o
Mark13:35 Kwoou ĩkalai mwĩyũmbanĩtye
Mark13:36 Nũtonya kũka kwa kĩthũlũmũko na aimwĩthĩa mũkomete.
Mark13:37 Ũndũ ũsu ngũmũtavya inyw'ĩ
Mark14:1 Vatiele mĩthenya ĩlĩ mũthenya wa Mboka ya Vasaka na wa Mĩkate ĩte Mbota ũvike
Mark14:2 Nĩmaneenanisye masya atĩĩ
Mark14:3 Ĩvinda yĩmwe Yesũ nĩwaendie Mbethani mũsyĩ kwa Simioni ũla navu ĩtina wawaĩte mangũ. Aendee na kũathĩw'a
Mark14:4 Andũ amwe maĩ vau nĩmathatie mũno na makũlany'a atĩĩ
Mark14:5 Mauta aa meĩ matewa mbee wa ndinalĩ maana atatũ na iinengwa ngya.” Nĩmambĩĩie kũtavya mũndũ mũka ũsu ndeto nthũku.
Mark14:6 Ĩndĩ Yesũ nĩwameie atĩĩ
Mark14:7 Mũkekalaa na ngya mavinda onthe
Mark14:8 Mũndũ mũka ũũ eeka ũndũ ũtonya. Etĩkĩsya mwĩĩ wakwa mauta awũmbany'e kwondũ wa mathiko makwa.
Mark14:9 Nĩmũtavya w'o
Mark14:10 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yutasi Ĩsikalioti
Mark14:11 Namo meew'a ũu matana na mamwatha kũmũnenga mbesa. Kuma vau Yutasi nĩwambĩĩie kũmantha mwanya mũseo wa kũmũthoosya Yesũ kũla maĩ.
Mark14:12 Mũthenyanĩ wa mbee wa Mboka ya Mũkate ũte Mbota
Mark14:13 Nake atũma elĩ moo amea atĩĩ
Mark14:14 na nyũmba ĩla ũkũthi kũlika mũyĩa mwene wayo atĩĩ
Mark14:15 Nũkũmwony'a nyũmba nene yĩ ngolovanĩ na nzeũvye yĩna kĩla kĩndũ; seũvĩsyai vau.”
Mark14:16 Amanyĩw'a asu nĩmaumaalile mathi mũsyĩnĩ mũnene wa Yelũsalemu na meethĩa kĩla kĩndũ kĩilyĩ o ũndũ Yesũ wamatavĩtye
Mark14:17 Kwavika wĩoo
Mark14:18 Maendee na kũathĩw'a
Mark14:19 Amanyĩw'a nĩmeewie woo na mambĩĩa kũmũkũlya ũmwe kwa ũmwe
Mark14:20 Nake amea atĩĩ
Mark14:21 Kwa w'o Mwana wa Mũndũ ekw'a o kwĩanana na ũndũ Maandĩko Matheu maĩtye
Mark14:22 Maendee na kũathĩw'a
Mark14:23 O ta ũu nĩwoosie kĩkombe kĩ ndivai
Mark14:24 Nĩwameie atĩĩ
Mark14:25 Nĩmũtavya w'o
Mark14:26 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mainie wathi na maumaala mathi Kĩĩmanĩ kya Mĩthata.
Mark14:27 Yesũ nĩweeie amanyĩw'a make atĩĩ
Mark14:28 Ĩndĩ ĩtina wa kũthayũũka kwakwa
Mark14:29 Vetelo amwĩa atĩĩ
Mark14:30 Nake Yesũ amwĩa atĩĩ
Mark14:31 Vetelo amwĩa atĩĩ
Mark14:32 Yesũ na amanyĩw'a make nĩmaendie vandũ vetawa Ngethisemani
Mark14:33 Nĩwaendanisye na Vetelo
Mark14:34 na kwoou amea atĩĩ
Mark14:35 Yesũ nĩwaendangie mbee vanini
Mark14:36 Nĩwavoyie ayasya atĩĩ
Mark14:37 Yesũ nĩwasyokie vala ve ala amanyĩw'a atatũ na amethĩa makomete. Nĩwamũkũlilye Vetelo atĩĩ
Mark14:38 Ĩkalai mũsalukĩtye na mũivoya mũikalike matatwanĩ. Nĩmũkwenda kwĩka ũla waĩlu ĩndĩ mwĩ onzu.”
Mark14:39 Yesũ nĩwaendie ĩngĩ akavoye
Mark14:40 Nĩwasyokie ĩngĩ vala ve amanyĩw'a na amethĩa makomete
Mark14:41 Yĩla wasyokanĩisye ya katatũ nĩwamakũlilye atĩĩ
Mark14:42 Ũkĩlai tũthi; mũndũ ũla ũkũnthoosya kwa amaitha nĩwavika.”
Mark14:43 Yesũ o aendee na kũneena
Mark14:44 Yutasi ũla wamũthooisye Yesũ nĩwamatavĩtye akamea atĩĩ
Mark14:45 Mavika oou
Mark14:46 Nĩvo ĩndĩ ala andũ mamwĩkũmbĩlile Yesũ na mamũkwata.
Mark14:47 Ĩndĩ ũmwe wa ala maũngeme vakuvĩ na Yesũ nĩwakũie ũvyũ wake na atema mũthũkũmi wa Mũthembi Mũnene
Mark14:48 Nake Yesũ amakũlya atĩĩ
Mark14:49 Mbona kĩla mũthenya nĩnatindanasya nenyu ngĩmanyĩsya Ĩkalũnĩ na mũyaangwata? Ĩndĩ ekai yu Maandĩko Matheu meanĩw'e.”
Mark14:50 Nĩvo ĩndĩ amanyĩw'a make onthe masembie mamũtia.
Mark14:51 No mwanake ũmwe wamũatĩĩie Yesũ
Mark14:52 ĩndĩ eetithũkany'a
Mark14:53 Yesũ nĩwatwaiwe mũsyĩ kwa Mũthembi Mũnene
Mark14:54 Vetelo nĩwamumĩte Yesũ ĩtina ĩndĩ e kũasa. Yĩla wavikie kĩwanzanĩ kĩla kĩ nza kwa Mũthembi ũsu Mũnene nĩwekalile nthĩ ote mwaki na asikalĩ.
Mark14:55 Athembi anene na andũ ala angĩ ma nzama nĩmatatie kũmantha andũ matonya kũsikata Yesũ nĩ kana mamũtw'ĩĩe kũawa
Mark14:56 Andũ aingĩ nĩmaumisye ũkũsĩ wa ũvũngũ ĩũlũ wa Yesũ
Mark14:57 Nĩvo ĩndĩ andũ amwe maũngamie maumya ũkũsĩ wa ũvũngũ masya atĩĩ
Mark14:58 “Nĩtũneewie mũndũ ũũ ayasya
Mark14:59 Ĩndĩ o vamwe na ũu
Mark14:60 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Mũthembi Mũnene waũngamie e mbee woo na amũkũlya Yesũ atĩĩ
Mark14:61 Ĩndĩ Yesũ ndaatumũa. Mũthembi Mũnene nĩwamũkũlilye ĩngĩ
Mark14:62 Yesũ amwĩa atĩĩ
Mark14:63 Mũthembi Mũnene nĩwatembũie ngũa syake nĩ woo na asya atĩĩ
Mark14:64 Inyw'ĩ nĩmweew'a ayĩuma Ngai; mwĩtw'a ata?” Onthe nĩmamũtw'ĩĩie kana nũvĩtĩtye na aĩlĩtwe nĩ kũawa.
Mark14:65 Amwe nĩmambĩĩie kũmũtw'ĩlanga mata na kũmũmandũlanga mamwovete metho makĩmwĩa atĩĩ
Mark14:66 Vetelo e o naku thome
Mark14:67 na yĩla wamwonie Vetelo ayota mwaki
Mark14:68 Ĩndĩ Vetelo akaĩa asya atĩĩ
Mark14:69 Ũla mwĩĩtu nĩwamwonie Vetelo ĩngĩ na atavya andũ ala maũngamĩte nake amea atĩĩ
Mark14:70 Ĩndĩ Vetelo asya ĩngĩ ndamwĩsĩ. Ĩtina wa kavinda kanini ala andũ maũngeme vau nĩmeeie Vetelo atĩĩ
Mark14:71 Ĩndĩ Vetelo nĩwambĩĩie kwĩyĩumanĩa na kwĩvĩta ayasya atĩĩ
Mark14:72 O vau kwa vau nzamba nĩyaisye ĩvinda ya kelĩ. Vetelo nĩwalilikanile ũndũ Yesũ wamũtavĩtye kana
Mark15:1 Kwakya kĩoko tene
Mark15:2 Vilato nĩwamũkũlilye Yesũ atĩĩ
Mark15:3 Athembi anene nĩmamũsikatie Yesũ maũndũnĩ maingĩ
Mark15:4 na kwoou Vilato amũkũlya ĩngĩ
Mark15:5 Ĩndĩ Yesũ ndaasũngĩa ũndũ o na ũmwe
Mark15:6 Kĩla ĩvinda ya Mboka ya Vasaka
Mark15:7 Ĩvinda yĩu vaĩ mũndũ ũmwe weetawa Valava
Mark15:8 Ĩkomano nĩyookie na yamũkũlya Vilato eke o ũndũ wakothaa kwĩka
Mark15:9 nake ayĩkũlya atĩĩ
Mark15:10 Ameie ũu nũndũ nĩweesĩ nesa kana athembi anene mamũnenganĩte Yesũ kwake nũndũ wa kĩwĩu.
Mark15:11 Ĩndĩ athembi anene mathing'ĩĩsya ĩkomano yĩkũlye Vilato ayĩthaisye Valava vandũ va Yesũ.
Mark15:12 Vilato nĩwaneenie na ĩkomano ĩngĩ ayĩkũlya atĩĩ
Mark15:13 Ĩkomano nĩyalonzanilye yasya
Mark15:14 Vilato ayĩkũlya atĩĩ
Mark15:15 Vilato nĩwendie kwendeesya ĩkomano
Mark15:16 Asikalĩ nĩmamũtwaie Yesũ na mamũlikya nyũmbanĩ nene ya ngavana
Mark15:17 Nĩmamwĩkĩie ngũa ndune
Mark15:18 “Ũvoo waku Mũsumbĩ wa Ayuti!”
Mark15:19 Nĩmamũkũnie mũtwe na ndata na mamũtw'ĩlanga mata
Mark15:20 Mamina kũmũthekeea
Mark15:21 Me nzĩanĩ nĩmakomanie na mũndũ ũmwe kuma Kũlene weetawa Simioni
Mark15:22 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mamũtwaie Yesũ vandũ vetawa Ngolongotha
Mark15:23 Me vau nĩmamũnengie ndivai ĩvulanĩtw'e na ndawa yĩtawa manemane
Mark15:24 Asikalĩ nĩmamwambie ngelany'onĩ na maana ngũa syake kwa kũkũna kula
Mark15:25 Mamwambie Yesũ ta saa itatũ sya kwakya.
Mark15:26 Vau ngelany'onĩ ĩũlũ vaĩ maandĩko mawetete ũndũ ũla Yesũ wasikatĩĩtwe: “MŨSUMBĨ WA AYUTI.”
Mark15:27 O ta ũu asikalĩ nĩmambie ing'endilĩ ilĩ vamwe na Yesũ; kĩmwe ngalĩko ya kw'oko kwake kwa aũme
Mark15:28 Kwa nzĩa ĩsu Maandĩko Matheu nĩmeanĩie ala maĩtye
Mark15:29 Andũ ala mavĩtĩlaa vau nĩmathingithangasya mĩtwe yoo na kũtavya Yesũ syuo nthũku maimwĩa atĩĩ
Mark15:30 Ĩtangĩĩe yu na ũitheea wume vau ngelany'onĩ!”
Mark15:31 O ta ũu athembi anene na amanyĩsya ma Mĩao nĩmamũthekeeie Yesũ. Nĩmeeanaa atĩĩ
Mark15:32 Nengĩ newe Klĩsto
Mark15:33 Kuma saa sita sya mũthenya kũvika saa kenda
Mark15:34 Saa kenda syavika
Mark15:35 Andũ amwe maũngyĩ vau vakuvĩ meew'a ũu nĩmaisye atĩĩ
Mark15:36 Ũmwe woo nĩwasembie ainda kasivonzi ndivainĩ ngaatu na akatonyeesya mũtĩnĩ
Mark15:37 Yesũ nĩwakayie na wasya mũnene na akw'a.
Mark15:38 Kavindanĩ o kau kĩtambaa kĩla kyatilanĩtye Ĩkalũ nĩkyatembũkanĩle katĩ kuma ĩũlũ kũvika nthĩ.
Mark15:39 Mũnene wa asikalĩ ĩana ũla waũngeme vau aimũsunga Yesũ
Mark15:40 O ta ũu vaĩ aka amwe masyaĩĩsye me kũasa
Mark15:41 Aka asu maĩ aatĩĩi ma Yesũ
Mark15:42 Syũa yĩtanathũa nĩ kana mũthenya wa Savato wambĩĩe
Mark15:43 Yosevu kuma Alimathea nĩwaendie e na ũkũmbaũ vala ve Vilato
Mark15:44 Vilato nĩwaseng'ie eew'a kana Yesũ nĩwakw'a mĩtũkĩ o ĩsu
Mark15:45 Amina kũĩkĩĩthw'a nĩ mũnene ũsu wa asikalĩ
Mark15:46 Yosevu nĩwathooie suka ĩtumĩtwe na ndii nzeo ndũmu
Mark15:47 Meli Makitalene na Meli inyia wa Yose nĩmasyaĩĩsye na moona vala mwĩĩ wa Yesũ wathikwa.
Mark16:1 Ĩtina wa mũthenya wa Savato kũthela
Mark16:2 Nĩmaendie mbũanĩ Wakyumwa kĩoko tene syũa yĩyuma.
Mark16:3 Me nzĩanĩ nĩmakũlanasya atĩĩ
Mark16:4 Ĩndĩ yĩla masiisye nĩmoonie ĩvia yĩu yĩĩvete
Mark16:5 Malika mbũanĩ
Mark16:6 Mwanake ũsu nĩwameie atĩĩ
Mark16:7 Endai yu mũkamatavye amanyĩw'a make
Mark16:8 Nĩmaumie mbũanĩ mĩtũkĩ na masemba
Mark16:9 Yesũ amina kũthayũũka kuma kwa akw'ũ kwakya kĩoko tene
Mark16:10 Meli nĩwaendie na amatavya ala mekalanasya na Yesũ. Nĩwamethĩie makĩĩa me na kĩmako.
Mark16:11 Yĩla meewie kana Yesũ e thayũ na nĩwonekie nĩ Meli
Mark16:12 Ĩtina wa ũu
Mark16:13 Namo masyoka na mamatavya ala angĩ
Mark16:14 Mũthya vyũ
Mark16:15 Nĩvo ĩndĩ wameie atĩĩ
Mark16:16 O ũla ũketĩkĩla na aivatiswa
Mark16:17 Andũ ala maketĩkĩla makeethĩwa matonya kwĩka maũndũ aa: Makalũngasya maimũ maitũmĩa ĩsyĩtwa yakwa
Mark16:18 O ta ũu
Mark16:19 Yesũ amina kũneena na amanyĩw'a make
Mark16:20 Nĩvo ĩndĩ amanyĩw'a make maendie maitavany'a Ũvoo Mũseo kĩla vandũ
Luke1:1 Kwa Theovilo: Andũ aingĩ nĩmatatĩte mũno kũandĩka maũndũ onthe ala meekĩkie katĩ waitũ.
Luke1:2 Maandĩkĩte maũndũ ala twataviw'e nĩ andũ ala maĩ vo maũndũ asu mayambĩĩa
Luke1:3 Na kwoou mũkumye Theovilo
Luke1:4 Nĩĩka ũu nĩ kana ũtonye kũmanya ũw'o wa maũndũ ala ũmanyĩĩtw'e.
Luke1:5 Ĩvinda yĩla Elote waĩ mũsumbĩ wa Yutia
Luke1:6 Nzekalia na Elisavethi nĩmekalĩte mwĩkalo wa kũmwendeesya Ngai na kũkwataa mĩao yake.
Luke1:7 Ĩndĩ mayaĩ kana
Luke1:8 Mũthenya ũmwe Nzekalia nĩwatethasya wĩa wa kĩ-ũthembi Ĩkalũnĩ
Luke1:9 Kwĩanana na walany'o ũla athembi maatĩĩaa
Luke1:10 Andũ aingĩ nĩmavoyaa me nza ĩvinda yĩla ũvani wavĩvaw'a.
Luke1:11 Mũlaĩka wa Mwĩai nĩwamumĩlĩĩle Nzekalia ngalĩkonĩ ya kw'oko kwa aũme kwa kĩthembeo kĩla kyavĩvĩaw'a ũvani.
Luke1:12 Nzekalia oona mũlaĩka nĩwatelemile na akwatwa nĩ w'ĩa.
Luke1:13 Ĩndĩ mũlaĩka amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke1:14 Kũsyawa kwako kũkakũtanĩthya na ũkwĩw'ĩthya mũyo
Luke1:15 Yoana akeethĩwa e mũndũ mũnene methonĩ ma Ngai. Ndakanyw'a ndivai kana mũthemba o na wĩva wa ũkĩ
Luke1:16 Akaalyũla andũ aingĩ ma Ĩsilaeli mamũsyokee Mwĩai Ngai woo.
Luke1:17 Akathi mbee wa Mwĩai e na veva na ũtonyi ta ũla waĩ wa Eliya. Akeew'anĩthya syana na aaĩthe moo
Luke1:18 Nzekalia nĩwakũlilye mũlaĩka atĩĩ
Luke1:19 Mũlaĩka amũsũngĩa atĩĩ
Luke1:20 Nayu nũndũ ndũnetĩkĩla ndeto syakwa ila ikeanĩa ĩvinda yasyo yavika
Luke1:21 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu yonthe andũ nĩmamweteelete Nzekalia
Luke1:22 Yĩla Nzekalia wesie kumaala
Luke1:23 Ĩvinda yake ya kũthũkũma Ĩkalũnĩ yathela nĩwaendie mũsyĩ.
Luke1:24 Ĩtina wa matukũ mavũthũ
Luke1:25 “Ũndũ ũũ nĩ Mwĩai ũmbĩkĩte. Nũmbĩw'ĩĩte ĩnee na akambetangĩa ntheko ya andũ.”
Luke1:26 Mweinĩ wa thanthatũ wa kũitava kwa Elisavethi
Luke1:27 Amũtũmĩte kwa mwĩĩtu weetawa Meli
Luke1:28 Mũlaĩka ũsu nĩwaendie vala ve Meli na amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke1:29 Ndeto isu nĩsyamũthĩnisye mũno ngoonĩ yake
Luke1:30 Ĩndĩ mũlaĩka Nĩwamwĩie atĩĩ
Luke1:31 We ũkaitava na ũkasyaa kavĩsĩ
Luke1:32 Akeethĩwa e mũndũ mũnene
Luke1:33 Akasumbĩka nzyawa sya Yakovo tene na tene
Luke1:34 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Meli wakũlilye mũlaĩka ũsu atĩĩ
Luke1:35 Mũlaĩka nĩwamũsũngĩie amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke1:36 O ta ũu manya kana Elisavethi ũla wa mũkonyo waku nĩ mũito akũĩte ũu ũkũĩte; o na kau atwĩe etawa ngũngũ
Luke1:37 Nĩkwĩthĩwa kwa Ngai vai ũndũ ũtatonyeka.”
Luke1:38 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Meli waisye atĩĩ
Luke1:39 Ĩtina wa ĩvinda ĩkuvĩ
Luke1:40 Nĩwavikie mũsyĩ kwa Nzekalia
Luke1:41 Yĩla Elisavethi weewie wasya wa Meli aimũkethya
Luke1:42 Nĩwaneenie na wasya mũnene amwĩa Meli atĩĩ
Luke1:43 Asi! Ũndũ ũũ kote mũnene! Inyia wa Mwĩai wakwa oke kũnthokea!
Luke1:44 Nĩwĩsĩ
Luke1:45 We wĩ mũathime nũndũ nũneetĩkĩlile kana maũndũ ala ũnataviw'e kuma kwa Ngai makeanĩw'a!”
Luke1:46 Nake Meli asya atĩĩ
Luke1:47 na ngoo yakwa yĩna ũtanu
Luke1:48 Nĩkwĩthĩwa nũmũsyaisye na ĩnee
Luke1:49 Ũla wĩ Ũtonyi nũmbĩkĩte maũndũ manene
Luke1:50 Ĩnee yake nĩ kuma nzyawa kũthi nzyawa
Luke1:51 Nĩwĩkĩte maũndũ manene na kw'oko kwake
Luke1:52 Nĩwumĩtye asumbĩ ivĩlanĩ syoo
Luke1:53 Nũvũnĩthĩtye ala me na nzaa na syĩndũ nzeo
Luke1:54 Nũmũtethetye Ĩsilaeli mũthũkũmi wake
Luke1:55 ũla wamathie aaũmae maitũ
Luke1:56 Meli nĩwekalile na Elisavethi vandũ va myei ĩtatũ na ĩndĩ asyoka mũsyĩ kwoo.
Luke1:57 Ĩvinda ya Elisavethi ya kũsyaa nĩyavikie na asyaa kavĩsĩ.
Luke1:58 Yĩla atũi na andũ ma mũkonyo wake meewie kana Ngai nũmwĩw'ĩie ĩnee yĩnenevete ũu
Luke1:59 Mũthenyanĩ wa nyanya ĩtina wa kana kau kũsyawa
Luke1:60 ĩndĩ inyia wako asya atĩĩ
Luke1:61 Namo mamwĩa atĩĩ
Luke1:62 Nĩvo ĩndĩ kwa kũtũmĩa moko
Luke1:63 Nzekalia nĩweetisye kĩndũ kya kũandĩkĩa
Luke1:64 O vau kwa vau Nzekalia nĩweethĩiwe atonya kũneena ĩngĩ
Luke1:65 Atũi onthe nĩmakwatiwe nĩ w'ĩa
Luke1:66 Onthe ala meewie maũndũ asu nĩmekalile maisũanĩa na ngoo na kwasya
Luke1:67 Nzekalia ĩthe wa Yoana nĩwausũiwe nĩ Veva Mũtheu
Luke1:68 “Nĩataĩwe Mwĩai
Luke1:69 Nũtũnengete Mũtangĩĩi wĩ vinya
Luke1:70 o tondũ waneenie ĩvinda ya tene
Luke1:71 Mũtangĩĩi ũsu akatũtangĩĩa kuma amaithanĩ maitũ
Luke1:72 Ngai nĩwaisye akamew'ĩa tei aaũmae maitũ
Luke1:73 Nĩwamwathie Avalaamu ũmae waitũ kwa kwĩvĩta
Luke1:74 kana akatũvonokya kuma ũtonyinĩ wa amaitha maitũ
Luke1:75 na twĩthĩwe twĩ atheu na twĩ na mwĩkalo wa kũmwendeesya Ngai
Luke1:76 “Naku we mwana wakwa
Luke1:77 ũkamatavye andũ ma Mwĩai kana nĩmeũtangĩĩwa kwa kũekewa naĩ syoo.
Luke1:78 Nĩkwĩthĩwa Ngai waitũ e tei mwingĩ
Luke1:79 Nĩyĩkamulĩkĩla ala mekalaa kĩvindunĩ na mũisyonĩ wa kĩkw'ũ
Luke1:80 Yoana nĩweanie na aendeea kwĩthĩwa na vinya wa kĩ-veva. Nĩwekalaa weũnĩ kũvika mũthenya ũla weeyumĩlilye andũnĩ ma Ĩsilaeli.
Luke2:1 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu
Luke2:2 Kũtalwa kũu nĩkw'o kwaĩ kwa mbee
Luke2:3 Kĩla mũndũ nĩwaendie kwĩyĩandĩkĩthya ndũanĩ ĩla ya wumo wake.
Luke2:4 Kwoou Yosevu nĩwaumie ndũanĩ ya Nasaleti ĩla yĩ Kalilii
Luke2:5 Nĩwaendie kwĩyĩandĩkĩthya vamwe na Meli ũla weevaĩtye
Luke2:6 Me kũu Mbetheleemu
Luke2:7 kana ka mbee ka kavĩsĩ. Nĩwakavw'ĩkie ngũa sya kaũkenge
Luke2:8 Nthĩ ĩsu kwaĩ aĩthi amwe maĩ kĩthekanĩ ũtukũ maisunga indo syoo.
Luke2:9 Mũlaĩka wa Mwĩai nĩwamaumĩlĩĩle
Luke2:10 Ĩndĩ mũlaĩka amea atĩĩ
Luke2:11 Ũmũnthĩ ndũanĩ ĩla Ndeviti wasyaĩwe
Luke2:12 Ũũ nĩw'o mũũthi kũmũmanya: Nĩmũũthi kwĩthĩa kana kavw'ĩkĩtwe ngũa sya kaũkenge kakometw'e ĩsandũkũnĩ ya kũnengea indo lĩu.”
Luke2:13 O vau kwa vau
Luke2:14 “Ngai nĩakumw'e kũu ĩũlũ ĩtunĩ
Luke2:15 Yĩla alaĩka asu matiie aĩthi masyoka ĩtunĩ
Luke2:16 Kwoou nĩmaendie mĩtũkĩ na meethĩa Meli e na Yosevu
Luke2:17 Aĩthi asu moona kana kau nĩmatavanisye ũndũ meeiwe nĩ mũlaĩka ĩũlũ wako.
Luke2:18 Andũ onthe ala meewie maũndũ ala aĩthi maneenie nĩmaseng'ie mũno.
Luke2:19 Ĩndĩ Meli nĩwaiie maũndũ asu onthe ngoonĩ yake na kũmasũanĩaa.
Luke2:20 Nĩvo ĩndĩ aĩthi masyokie makĩmũkumya na kũmũkatha Ngai kwondũ wa maũndũ ala meewie na moonie. Meethĩie maũndũ onthe mailyĩ o tondũ matavĩtwe nĩ mũlaĩka.
Luke2:21 Mũthenyanĩ wa nyanya ĩtina wa kana kau kasyawa
Luke2:22 Ĩvinda nĩyavikie ya Yosevu na Meli kũthi kũthew'a o tondũ mathĩtwe Mĩaonĩ ya Mwose. Nĩmakuie kana mathi nako Yelũsalemu makakanengane kwa Mwĩai
Luke2:23 nũndũ Mĩaonĩ ya Mwĩai nĩkũandĩkĩtwe atĩĩ
Luke2:24 O ta ũu nĩmaendie kumya nthembo
Luke2:25 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu vaĩ mũndũ wekalaa Yelũsalemu weetawa Simioni. Aĩ mũndũ mũlũngalu na nĩwamũĩkĩĩaa Ngai. Nĩweeteelete e na mea ma kwona Ngai ayovosya andũ ma Ĩsilaeli
Luke2:26 Veva Mũtheu nĩwamwonetye nesa kana ndakakw'a atanamba kũmwona Klĩsto atũmĩtwe nĩ Ngai.
Luke2:27 Kwoou Simioni atongoew'e nĩ Veva Mũtheu
Luke2:28 Simioni nĩwakosie na amũkatha Ngai ayasya atĩĩ
Luke2:29 “Yu ĩndĩ Mwĩai Mũsumbĩ
Luke2:30 Nĩneeyonea Mũtangĩĩi na metho makwa
Luke2:31 ũla woombanisye oneke nĩ andũ onthe.
Luke2:32 We nĩ kyeni kya kũvuany'a kwenda kwaku Andũnĩ-ma-mbaĩ-ingĩ
Luke2:33 Ĩthe na inyia wa Yesũ nĩmaseng'iw'e nĩ maũndũ ala Simioni waneenie ĩũlũ wake.
Luke2:34 Simioni nĩwamaathimie na eea Meli inyia wa kana atĩĩ
Luke2:35 na kwoou kakaumbũany'a mosũanĩo ma ngoo syoo. Naku we
Luke2:36 O ta ũu vaĩ mũndũ mũka ũmwe mwathani waĩ mũkũũ mũno weetawa Ana
Luke2:37 na ekala e ndiwa kũvika ĩvindanĩ yu waĩ na ũkũũ wa myaka mĩongo nyanya na ĩna. Myakanĩ ĩsu yonthe atindĩaa kũthi Ĩkalũnĩ kũmũthaitha Ngai ũtukũ na mũthenya
Luke2:38 Ĩvindanĩ o yĩu Ana nĩwaendie Ĩkalũnĩ na amũkatha Ngai
Luke2:39 Yosevu na Meli mamina kwĩka maũndũ onthe kwĩanana na Mĩao ya Mwĩai
Luke2:40 Kana nĩkeanie na kaendeea kwĩthĩwa na vinya na ũĩ
Luke2:41 Asyai ma Yesũ nĩmaendaa Yelũsalemu kĩla mwaka kwondũ wa Mboka ya Vasaka.
Luke2:42 Yesũ avikya ũkũũ wa myaka ĩkũmi na ĩlĩ
Luke2:43 Ĩvinda ya mboka yathela
Luke2:44 Masũanĩaa e o kũu katĩ wa andũ
Luke2:45 Mayaamwona na kwoou masyoka Yelũsalemu mamũmanthĩte.
Luke2:46 Ĩtina wa mĩthenya ĩtatũ nĩmamwĩthĩie Ĩkalũnĩ ailyĩ nthĩ katĩ wa amanyĩsya ma Mĩao
Luke2:47 Andũ onthe ala mamwĩw'aa aineena nĩmaseng'iw'e mũno nĩ ũmanyi ũla waĩ naw'o
Luke2:48 Asyai make nĩmaseng'ie mũno mamwona
Luke2:49 Nake amasũngĩa amea atĩĩ
Luke2:50 Namo mayaaelewa nĩ ũu wamasũngĩie.
Luke2:51 Nĩvo ĩndĩ wasyokanisye namo nginya Nasaleti
Luke2:52 Yesũ nĩwaendeeie kũĩva na kwĩana
Luke3:1 Mwakanĩ wa ĩkũmi na itano wa kũsumbĩka kwa Timbeliasi mũsumbĩ wa Loma
Luke3:2 namo Anasi na Kaiava me athembi anene
Luke3:3 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yoana waendie isionĩ syonthe ila syĩ vakuvĩ na Ũsĩ wa Yolotani
Luke3:4 Ũu nĩ kwosana na ũndũ mwathani Ĩsaia waĩtye ĩvukunĩ yake
Luke3:5 Syanda syonthe nilindwe
Luke3:6 Nĩvo ĩndĩ kĩla mũndũ ĩũlũ wa nthĩ wĩona ũtangĩĩo wa Ngai.’ ”
Luke3:7 Andũ aingĩ mũno nĩmaendie vala ve Yoana amavatise nake amea atĩĩ
Luke3:8 Onany'ai ĩndĩ kwa meko maseo kana nĩmwĩlilĩte kwondũ wa naĩ syenyu. Mũikambĩĩe kwĩana atĩ
Luke3:9 Oyu tũĩ ĩthoka nĩyĩkwetwe yelekelw'e ĩtinanĩ ya mũtĩ
Luke3:10 Nĩvo ĩndĩ andũ asu makũlilye Yoana atĩĩ
Luke3:11 Yoana amasũngĩa amea atĩĩ
Luke3:12 Aumĩthya amwe ma koti o namo nĩmaendie makavatiswe na mamũkũlya atĩĩ
Luke3:13 Nake amea atĩĩ
Luke3:14 Asikalĩ amwe o namo nĩmamũkũlilye atĩĩ
Luke3:15 Andũ onthe vau nĩmekalile meteelete ũndũ ũnene wĩkĩke
Luke3:16 Kwoou Yoana amatavya onthe amea atĩĩ
Luke3:17 Kw'okonĩ kwake nũkwete kĩndũ kya kũũlũkya
Luke3:18 Yoana nĩwathuthisye andũ kwa nzĩa mbingĩ aimatavya Ũvoo Mũseo.
Luke3:19 Ĩndĩ Yoana nĩwamũkanĩtye ngavana Elote nũndũ wa kwosa Elotiasi mũka wa mwana-a-inyia
Luke3:20 Elote nĩwasyokie ongela ũndũ ũngĩ ĩũlũ wa asu
Luke3:21 Andũ onthe mamina kũvatiswa
Luke3:22 na Veva Mũtheu amũtheea e na mũvw'ano wa ĩvũĩ. Wasya nĩweew'ĩkie kuma ĩtunĩ ũkwasya atĩĩ
Luke3:23 Yesũ ambĩĩie ũthũkũmi wake e na ũkũũ wa myaka ta mĩongo ĩtatũ. Nĩwatalĩthaw'a kwĩthĩwa mwana wa Yosevu
Luke3:24 mwana wa Mathati
Luke3:25 ũla nĩ mwana wa Matathia
Luke3:26 mwana wa Maathi
Luke3:27 mwana wa Yoanani
Luke3:28 mwana wa Meliki
Luke3:29 mwana wa Yosua
Luke3:30 mwana wa Simioni
Luke3:31 mwana wa Melea
Luke3:32 mwana wa Yese
Luke3:33 mwana wa Aminatavu
Luke3:34 mwana wa Yakovo
Luke3:35 mwana wa Selũki
Luke3:36 mwana wa Kainani
Luke3:37 mwana wa Methũsela
Luke3:38 mwana wa Enosi
Luke4:1 Yesũ nĩwaumie Ũsĩnĩ wa Yolotani ausũĩtwe nĩ Veva Mũtheu
Luke4:2 Kũu nĩwatatiwe nĩ Satani vandũ va mĩthenya mĩongo ĩna. Mĩthenyanĩ ĩsu yonthe nde kĩndũ waaya na kwoou ĩithela nĩweew'ĩte nzaa.
Luke4:3 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Satani wamwĩie atĩĩ
