Luke4:4 Ĩndĩ Yesũ amũsũngĩa amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke4:5 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Satani watwaie Yesũ vandũ vatũlu
Luke4:6 na amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke4:7 Kwoou ethĩwa nũũnthaitha
Luke4:8 Yesũ amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke4:9 Satani nĩwasyokie amũtwaa Yelũsalemu
Luke4:10 nũndũ Maandĩko Matheu maĩtye
Luke4:11 na o ta ũu makaũkwatĩĩa na moko moo
Luke4:12 Yesũ amũsũngĩa amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke4:13 Satani amina kũmũtata Yesũ kwa nzĩa syonthe
Luke4:14 Yesũ ausũĩtwe nĩ vinya wa Veva Mũtheu
Luke4:15 Nĩwamanyĩisye andũ nyũmbanĩ sya Ayuti sya kũthaithĩa na kũmbanĩa
Luke4:16 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ waendie Nasaleti vala weanĩe
Luke4:17 na anengwa ĩvuku ya mwathani Ĩsaia. Nĩwayĩvingũie
Luke4:18 “Veva wa Ngai e vamwe nakwa
Luke4:19 na kũtavany'a kana ĩvinda ya Ngai nĩ ĩviku
Luke4:20 Yesũ nĩwakũnzie ĩvuku yĩu
Luke4:21 nake ambĩĩa kũmea atĩĩ
Luke4:22 Andũ onthe nĩmendeeiw'e mũno nĩwe
Luke4:23 Yesũ amea atĩĩ
Luke4:24 Nĩwaendeeie kũmea atĩĩ
Luke4:25 Ĩndĩ ĩthukĩĩsyei: Kwa w'o kwaĩ aka aingĩ ndiwa nthĩnĩ wa nthĩ ya Ĩsilaeli ĩvindanĩ ya mwathani Eliya
Luke4:26 ĩndĩ Eliya ndaatũmwa kwa ndiwa ĩmwe ya isu. Atũmiwe kwa ndiwa ĩmwe yatwĩe Nzalevathi nthĩ ya Sitoni.
Luke4:27 O ta ũu
Luke4:28 Andũ onthe ala maĩ nyũmbanĩ ĩsu ya Ayuti ya kũthaithĩa na kũmbanĩa
Luke4:29 Nĩmaũngamie mamumaalya Yesũ nza wa ndũa
Luke4:30 Ĩndĩ Yesũ avĩtĩla katĩ woo athi.
Luke4:31 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ watheeie athi Kavelinaũmu
Luke4:32 Onthe nĩmaseng'iw'e mũno nĩ momanyĩsyo make
Luke4:33 Nyũmbanĩ ĩsu ya Ayuti ya kũthaithĩa na kũmbanĩa
Luke4:34 “Ii! We Yesũ kuma Nasaleti
Luke4:35 Ĩndĩ Yesũ eeaĩa ĩimũ yĩu ayĩa atĩĩ
Luke4:36 Andũ onthe nĩmaseng'ie mũno na mambĩĩa ũkũlany'a atĩĩ
Luke4:37 Ũvoo wake nĩwambĩĩie kũnyaĩĩka kĩla vandũ kĩsionĩ kĩu.
Luke4:38 Yesũ nĩwaumie nyũmbanĩ ĩsu ya Ayuti ya kũthaithĩa na kũmbanĩa athi mũsyĩ kwa Simioni. Inyia wa mũka wa Simioni aĩ mũwau ndetema ĩla nene na andũ mamwĩsũva Yesũ amũvosye.
Luke4:39 Yesũ nĩwaendie aũngama vakuvĩ nake na eeaĩa ndetema ĩsu nayo yavoa
Luke4:40 Vaa wĩoo syũa yathũa
Luke4:41 Maimũ o namo nĩmaumie andũnĩ aingĩ maneenete na wasya mũnene mayasya atĩĩ
Luke4:42 Ũnĩ ũsu vaa kũitheatheana
Luke4:43 Ĩndĩ Yesũ amea atĩĩ
Luke4:44 Kwoou nĩwaendeeie na kũtavany'a ũvoo ũsu nyũmbanĩ sya Ayuti sya kũthaithĩa na kũmbanĩa ila syĩ Yutia.
Luke5:1 Mũthenya ũmwe Yesũ nĩwaũngeme ũtee wa Ĩia ya Ngenesaleti
Luke5:2 Nĩwoonie masiwa elĩ maiĩtwe ũtee wa ĩia
Luke5:3 Yesũ nĩwalikile ĩsiwanĩ yĩmwe yamo
Luke5:4 Amina kũneena nĩwamwĩie Simioni atĩĩ
Luke5:5 Simioni amũsũngĩa amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke5:6 Yĩla meekie ũu
Luke5:7 Kwoou mamokĩlĩlya moko atei ala angĩ maĩ ngwatanĩo namo me ĩsiwanĩ yĩngĩ moke kũmatetheesya. Nĩmookie na mausũsya masiwa asu elĩ na makũyũ
Luke5:8 Yĩla Vetelo woonie ũndũ ũsu
Luke5:9 Simioni na ala angĩ waĩ namo nĩmaseng'iw'e mũno nũndũ wa wingĩ wa makũyũ ala makwatisye.
Luke5:10 O namo Yakovo na Yoana ana ma Nzevetii
Luke5:11 Mamina kũtwaa masiwa moo ũtee wa ĩia
Luke5:12 Ĩvinda yĩmwe Yesũ e ndũanĩ ĩmwe ya kũu
Luke5:13 Yesũ nĩwatambũũkisye kw'oko amũkwata na amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke5:14 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wamwĩie atĩĩ
Luke5:15 Ĩndĩ ũvoo ĩũlũ wa Yesũ nĩwanyaĩĩkie mũno kũndũ kwingĩ
Luke5:16 Ĩndĩ Yesũ no wamatiaa akathi vandũ vate andũ akavoye.
Luke5:17 Mũthenya ũmwe Yesũ aendee kũmanyĩsya andũ
Luke5:18 Nĩvo ĩndĩ aũme amwe mookie makuĩte na ũkomo mũndũ waĩ na mamutha monzu. Nĩmatatie kũmũlikya nyũmba mamwie mbee wa Yesũ
Luke5:19 ĩndĩ mayaaona kamwanya mamũlikĩlya
Luke5:20 Yesũ oona ũndũ me na mũĩkĩĩo wingĩvĩte
Luke5:21 Nĩvo ĩndĩ ala amanyĩsya ma Mĩao na Avalisi mambĩlĩĩlye kwĩkũlya atĩĩ
Luke5:22 Yesũ nĩwamanyie ũndũ meũsũanĩa na amakũlya atĩĩ
Luke5:23 Nĩ ũndũ wĩva ũla wĩ laisi: Nĩ kwasya
Luke5:24 Nĩngũmwony'a yu kana Mwana wa Mũndũ e na ũkũmũ kũũ nthĩ wa kũekea andũ naĩ syoo!” Kwoou nĩweeie mũndũ ũsu waĩ na mamutha monzu atĩĩ
Luke5:25 Mũndũ ũsu nĩwookĩlile na mĩtũkĩ andũ onthe mene
Luke5:26 Andũ nĩmaseng'ie mũno
Luke5:27 Ĩtina wa ũu
Luke5:28 Nake ookĩla
Luke5:29 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Livai weethĩiwe na mboka nene mũsyĩ kwake aseũvĩsye Yesũ
Luke5:30 Avalisi amwe na amanyĩsya ma Mĩao ala maĩ ma nguthu yoo
Luke5:31 Yesũ amasũngĩa amea atĩĩ
Luke5:32 Nyie ndyaaũka kwĩta andũ ala alũngalu
Luke5:33 Nĩvo ĩndĩ andũ amwe mamwĩie Yesũ atĩĩ
Luke5:34 Yesũ nĩwamakũlilye atĩĩ
Luke5:35 Ĩndĩ ĩvinda nĩyũkĩte yĩla mũtwaani wĩvetangwa vala maĩ; ĩvindanĩ yĩu makatĩĩa kũya.”
Luke5:36 Yesũ nĩwasyokie amatavya ngelekany'o ĩno: “Vai mũndũ ũtilaa kĩlaka ngũanĩ nzaũ akakĩtumĩĩa ngũanĩ ngũũ; akeka ũu
Luke5:37 O ta ũu vai mũndũ wĩkĩaa ndivai nzaũ ikuunĩ ngũũ; akeka ũu ndivai ĩsu nzaũ no yatũe ikuu isu na ĩyĩtĩka
Luke5:38 Kwoou no nginya ndivai nzaũ yĩkĩwe ikuunĩ nzaũ!
Luke5:39 O na vai mũndũ ĩtina wa kũnyw'a ndivai ngũũ wendaa kũnyw'a ndivai nzaũ
Luke6:1 Mũthenya ũmwe wa Savato Yesũ aendete esĩlĩte mĩũndanĩ ya nganũ
Luke6:2 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Avalisi amwe makũlilye atĩĩ
Luke6:3 Yesũ nĩwamakũlilye atĩĩ
Luke6:4 Nĩwalikile nyũmbanĩ ya Ngai
Luke6:5 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wameie atĩĩ
Luke6:6 Mũthenyanĩ ũngĩ wa Savato
Luke6:7 Amanyĩsya ma Mĩao na Avalisi nĩmasyaĩĩsye Yesũ mone kana nũkũvosya mũthenyanĩ wa Savato
Luke6:8 Ĩndĩ Yesũ nĩwamanyie ũndũ mekũsũanĩa na amwĩa mũndũ ũsu waĩ na kw'oko kwonzu atĩĩ
Luke6:9 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wamakũlilye atĩĩ
Luke6:10 Ĩtina wa kũmasiangya onthe nĩweeie mũndũ ũsu atĩĩ
Luke6:11 Andũ asu nĩmathatie mũno na mambĩĩa kũoany'a ũndũ mekwĩkana na Yesũ.
Luke6:12 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu Yesũ nĩwaendie kĩĩmanĩ akavoye
Luke6:13 Ũnĩ ũsu nĩwoombanisye amanyĩw'a make vamwe
Luke6:14 Namo nĩ Simioni
Luke6:15 Mathayo na Tomasi; Yakovo mwana wa Aveasi
Luke6:16 Yutasi mwana wa Yakovo na Yutasi Ĩsikalioti
Luke6:17 Yesũ nĩwatheeie kuma kĩĩmanĩ vamwe na atũmwa asu
Luke6:18 Andũ asu mookĩte kũmwĩthukĩĩsya Yesũ na kũvow'a mowau moo. O namo andũ ala mathĩnaw'a nĩ maimũ nĩmavoiw'e.
Luke6:19 Kĩla mũndũ ĩkomanonĩ yĩu nĩwatataa kũmũkiita Yesũ
Luke6:20 Yesũ nĩwasyaisye amanyĩw'a make na asya atĩĩ
Luke6:21 Mwĩ aathime inyw'ĩ ala mwĩ na nzaa yu
Luke6:22 “Mwĩ aathime inyw'ĩ yĩla andũ meũmũmena na kũmũlea
Luke6:23 Ĩw'ai mũyo ĩvindanĩ yĩu na mũisũnga na ũtanu nũndũ nĩmwiĩwe ĩtuvi ĩnene ĩtunĩ. Aaũmae moo meekanie na athani oou.
Luke6:24 Ĩndĩ kyeva nĩ kwenyu inyw'ĩ ala athwii
Luke6:25 Kyeva nĩ kwenyu inyw'ĩ ala mũvũny'e yu
Luke6:26 “Kyeva nĩ kwenyu inyw'ĩ yĩla andũ onthe meũmũneenea nesa
Luke6:27 “Ĩndĩ ekai nĩmũtavye inyw'ĩ ala mũmbĩthukĩĩsye: Mendei amaitha menyu na mekaei nesa andũ ala mamũmenete;
Luke6:28 athimaai ala mamũumanĩaa na mũivoyea ala mamũumangaa.
Luke6:29 Mũndũ akũkũna ĩtau yĩmwe
Luke6:30 Mũndũ akũvoya kĩndũ mũnenge
Luke6:31 Kwoou ĩkaai andũ ala angĩ ũndũ mwenda mo mamwĩkae.
Luke6:32 “Ethĩwa mũkamenda o andũ ala mamwendete
Luke6:33 Na ethĩwa mwĩkaa nesa o andũ ala mamwĩkaa nesa
Luke6:34 Na ethĩwa mũkovethasya o andũ ala mũkwĩkwatya kana makamũĩva
Luke6:35 Kwoou inyw'ĩ mendei amaitha menyu
Luke6:36 Ĩthĩwai na tei
Luke6:37 “Mũikasilĩle andũ ala angĩ
Luke6:38 Nengai andũ kĩla mekwenda
Luke6:39 Yesũ nĩwasyokie amatavya ngelekany'o ĩno: “Kĩlalinda nĩkĩtonya kũtongoesya kĩngĩ? Aiee! Syelĩ ikavalũka ĩimanĩ.
Luke6:40 Mũmanyĩw'a ti mũnene kwĩ mũmanyĩsya wake
Luke6:41 “Nĩkĩ ũkwona kaũvavathĩ ke ithonĩ ya mũnyanyau
Luke6:42 Ũtonya ata kwĩa mũnyanyau
Luke6:43 “Mũtĩ mũseo ndũsyaa ũsyao mũthũku
Luke6:44 Kĩla mũtĩ ũmanyĩkaa ũndũ ũilyĩ kwĩsĩla ũsyaonĩ wa w'o. Ndũtonya kũtw'a makũyũ kĩkondunĩ kana ũkatw'a nzavivũ kĩthiianĩ.
Luke6:45 Mũndũ mũseo aumasya maũndũ maseo ala me ngoonĩ yake
Luke6:46 “Mũtindĩaa kũmbĩta
Luke6:47 Nĩngũmwony'a ũndũ mũndũ ũla wũkaa kwakwa
Luke6:48 Ailyĩ mũndũ ũmwe waakaa nyũmba
Luke6:49 Ĩndĩ nake mũndũ ũla wĩthukĩĩasya momanyĩsyo makwa na ailea kwĩka ũndũ mekwasya
Luke7:1 Yesũ amina kũmanyĩsya andũ maũndũ asu onthe
Luke7:2 Kũu kwaĩ mũnene ũmwe wa kĩkundi kya asikalĩ ĩana waĩ na mũthũkũmi ũmwe waĩ vata nake mũno. Mũthũkũmi ũsu aĩ mũwau mũno akew'a kũkw'a.
Luke7:3 Yĩla mũnene ũsu weewie ũvoo wa Yesũ
Luke7:4 Nĩmaendie vala ve Yesũ na mamwĩsũva mũno maimwĩa atĩĩ
Luke7:5 nũndũ nĩwendete nthĩ yaitũ
Luke7:6 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ waendanisye namo. E vakuvĩ kũvika mũsyĩ kwa ũla mũnene wa asikalĩ
Luke7:7 O na ndinona nĩ mwaĩlu kũka vala ũĩ nyie mwene. Ĩndĩ neena o ndeto tũ
Luke7:8 Nyie o nakwa nĩ ungu wa anene angĩ
Luke7:9 Yesũ eew'a ũu nĩwaseng'ie mũno
Luke7:10 Andũ asu matũmĩtwe nĩmasyokie mũsyĩ kwa mũnene ũsu
Luke7:11 Ĩtina wa ĩvinda ĩnini
Luke7:12 Yesũ e vakuvĩ kũvika mũvĩanĩ wa ndũa ĩsu
Luke7:13 Yĩla Mwĩai woonie kĩveti kĩu
Luke7:14 Nĩwaendie akwata ĩsandũkũ na ala mayĩkuĩte maũngama. Nĩvo ĩndĩ waisye atĩĩ
Luke7:15 Mũndũ ũsu waĩ mũkw'ũ nĩwekalile nthĩ na ambĩĩa kũneena
Luke7:16 Andũ onthe nĩmakwatiwe nĩ w'ĩa mwingĩ
Luke7:17 Ũvoo ũsu ĩũlũ wa Yesũ nĩwanyaĩĩkie kĩla vandũ nthĩ ya Yutia na isionĩ ila imĩthyũlũlũkĩte.
Luke7:18 Amanyĩw'a ma Yoana Mũvatisi nĩmamũtavisye ũvoo ũsu w'onthe
Luke7:19 na amatũma kũla kwĩ Mwĩai makamũkũlye atĩĩ
Luke7:20 Andũ asu mavika vala ve Yesũ nĩmamwĩie atĩĩ
Luke7:21 Kavindanĩ o kau Yesũ nĩwavoisye andũ aingĩ maĩ na mowau ma kĩla mũthemba
Luke7:22 Nĩvo ĩndĩ wasũngĩie ala atũmwa amea atĩĩ
Luke7:23 Nĩ mũathime mũndũ ũla ũtethĩawa na nzika ĩũlũ wakwa!”
Luke7:24 Atũmwa asu ma Yoana mamina kũthi
Luke7:25 Nĩ kyaũ ĩndĩ mwaendaa kwona? Nĩ mũndũ wĩkĩĩte ngũa sya thooa mũnene mũno? Aiee
Luke7:26 Kwoou mwaendaa kwona kyaũ? Kwona mwathani? Ĩĩ
Luke7:27 Ũsu nĩwe ũla Ngai ũneenete ĩũlũ wake Maandĩkonĩ Matheu akasya atĩĩ
Luke7:28 Yesũ nĩwaminũkĩlĩĩlye na kwasya atĩĩ
Luke7:29 Andũ onthe o vamwe na aumĩthya ma koti meew'a ũu
Luke7:30 Ĩndĩ Avalisi na amanyĩsya ma Mĩao mayaaĩka kĩla Ngai wendaa meke
Luke7:31 Yesũ nĩwaendeeie kwasya atĩĩ
Luke7:32 Mavw'ana syana iilyĩ nthĩ ndũnyũ
Luke7:33 Yĩla Yoana wookie ndaĩsaa lĩu na ndanyusaa ndivai
Luke7:34 Yĩla Mwana wa Mũndũ nake wũkie aiya lĩu na kũnyw'a ndivai
Luke7:35 Ĩndĩ ũĩ wa Ngai wonanaw'a kwĩthĩwa wa w'o
Luke7:36 Mũvalisi ũmwe nĩwamũthokisye Yesũ oke kũya lĩu mũsyĩ kwake. Yesũ nĩwaendie kwa Mũvalisi ũsu na ekala nthĩ aathĩw'e.
Luke7:37 Nthĩnĩ wa ndũa ĩsu vaĩ mũndũ mũka ũmwe waĩ mwĩkalĩle mũthũku. Yĩla mũndũ mũka ũsu weewie kana Yesũ eathĩw'a kwa Mũvalisi ũsu
Luke7:38 Nĩwaendie aũngama ĩtina wa Yesũ
Luke7:39 Yĩla Mũvalisi ũla wamũthoketye Yesũ woonie ũu
Luke7:40 Yesũ nĩweeie Simioni atĩĩ
Luke7:41 Yesũ amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke7:42 Yĩla maemiwe nĩ kũĩva thiĩ woo
Luke7:43 Simioni amũsũngĩa atĩĩ
Luke7:44 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wathyũũkĩie ũla mũndũ mũka na eea Simioni atĩĩ
Luke7:45 We ndũnanthokya na kũngethya na ngethi ya wendo
Luke7:46 We ndũnambaka mũtwe mauta
Luke7:47 Kwoou eka ngũtavye
Luke7:48 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ weeie mũndũ mũka ũsu atĩĩ
Luke7:49 Andũ ala angĩ maĩsaa vamwe na Yesũ nĩmambĩĩie kũkũlany'a atĩĩ
Luke7:50 Ĩndĩ Yesũ eea mũndũ mũka ũsu atĩĩ
Luke8:1 Ĩtina wa ũu
Luke8:2 o vamwe na aka amwe Yesũ wamaumĩtye maveva mavuku na wamavoetye mowau. Aka asu nĩ Meli ũla weetawa Makitalene
Luke8:3 na Yoana
Luke8:4 Andũ nĩmaendeeie na kũka vala ve Yesũ maumĩte ndũanĩ syĩ kĩvathũkany'o. Yĩla ĩkomano ĩnene yoombanie
Luke8:5 “Mũĩmi ũmwe nĩwaendie kũvuĩa mbeũ. Akĩvuĩa
Luke8:6 Ingĩ nĩsyavalũkile mavianĩ
Luke8:7 Mbeke ingĩ nĩsyavalũkile mĩw'anĩ
Luke8:8 Ĩndĩ ingĩ nĩsyavalũkile mũthanganĩ mũseo na syeana
Luke8:9 Nĩvo ĩndĩ amanyĩw'a ma Yesũ mamũkũlilye kĩla ngelekany'o ĩsu ĩkũneena ĩũlũ wakyo.
Luke8:10 Nake amea atĩĩ
Luke8:11 “Ũũ ĩndĩ nĩw'o ũelesyo wa ngelekany'o ĩsu: Mbeũ nĩ ndeto ya Ngai.
Luke8:12 Mbeke ila syavalũkile nzĩanĩ nĩ andũ ala mew'aa ndeto ya Ngai
Luke8:13 Nasyo mbeke ila syavalũkile mavianĩ nĩ andũ ala mew'aa ĩla ndeto na maimyosa na ũtanu. Ĩndĩ ti ndiku mathayũnĩ moo. Maĩkĩĩaa o kwa kavinda kanini
Luke8:14 Mbeke ila syavalũkile mĩw'anĩ nasyo nĩ andũ ala mew'aa ĩla ndeto
Luke8:15 Ĩndĩ nasyo mbeke ila syavalũkile mũthanganĩ mũseo
Luke8:16 “Vai mũndũ ũkwatasya taa na aiũkunĩkĩlya mbisũ
Luke8:17 “Maũndũ onthe ala mavithe makaumĩlw'a ũtheinĩ
Luke8:18 “Kwoou ĩthukĩĩasyei nesa maũndũ ala mũkwĩw'a. Mũndũ ũla wĩ na kĩndũ akongeleelwa
Luke8:19 Nĩvo ĩndĩ inyia na ana-a-inyia ma Yesũ mookie kũmwona
Luke8:20 Mũndũ ũmwe nĩweeie Yesũ atĩĩ
Luke8:21 Yesũ nĩwatavisye andũ onthe amea atĩĩ
Luke8:22 Mũthenya ũmwe Yesũ nĩwalikile ĩsiwanĩ e na amanyĩw'a make
Luke8:23 na maendete
Luke8:24 Amanyĩw'a nĩmaendie vala ve Yesũ na mamũamũkya mamwĩĩte atĩĩ
Luke8:25 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wakũlilye amanyĩw'a make atĩĩ
Luke8:26 Yesũ na amanyĩw'a make nĩmaendeeie na kyalo mavika nthĩ ya Akelasinĩ ĩla yĩ ngalĩko ya wumĩlonĩ wa syũa wa Ĩia ya Kalilii.
Luke8:27 Yesũ aikinya nthĩ oou
Luke8:28 Yĩla wamwonie Yesũ nĩwakayie na wasya mũnene na eevalũkya nthĩ maũũnĩ make
Luke8:29 Aneenie ũu nũndũ Yesũ aĩ aneea ĩimũ yĩla yalikĩte mũndũ ũsu nĩyume. Ĩimũ yĩu nĩyakwataa mũndũ ũsu mavinda maingĩ
Luke8:30 Yesũ nĩwamũkũlilye atĩĩ
Luke8:31 Maimũ asu nĩmatindĩie kũmwĩsũva Yesũ ndakameaĩe mathi ĩimanĩ yĩte kĩtulu.
Luke8:32 Vau ũkuvĩnĩ vaĩ ndĩthya nene ya ngũlũe yaĩsaa nguumo wa kĩĩma
Luke8:33 Maimũ asu nĩmaumie ũla mũndũnĩ na malika ĩla ndĩthyanĩ ya ngũlũe
Luke8:34 Andũ ala maĩthasya ngũlũe isu nĩmoonie kĩla kyeekĩka
Luke8:35 Andũ nĩmookie mone ũndũ kweekĩka. Yĩla mavikie vala ve Yesũ
Luke8:36 Andũ ala moonete ũndũ ũsu
Luke8:37 Andũ onthe ma kĩsio kĩu kya Akelasinĩ nĩmamũkũlilye Yesũ aume kũu kwoo athi
Luke8:38 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũndũ ũla waumiw'e maimũ wamwĩsũvie Yesũ maendany'e
Luke8:39 “Syoka mũsyĩ kwenyu ũkatavany'e maũndũ onthe ala Ngai wakwĩka.” Kwoou mũndũ ũsu nĩwaendie na atavany'a ndũanĩ yonthe maũndũ manene ala Yesũ wamwĩkĩte.
Luke8:40 Yĩla Yesũ wasyokie mũinganĩsyo ũla ũngĩ wa ĩia
Luke8:41 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũndũ ũmwe weetawa Yailasi
Luke8:42 nĩkwĩthĩwa kelĩtu kake ka ũkũũ wa myaka ĩkũmi na ĩlĩ
Luke8:43 Katĩ woo vaĩ mũndũ mũka ũmwe wekalĩte ayumwa nĩ nthakame vandũ va myaka ĩkũmi na ĩlĩ. Nĩwatũmĩĩte syĩndũ syake syonthe ikathela aithi kwona matakĩtalĩ
Luke8:44 Mũndũ mũka ũsu nĩwaumie Yesũ ĩtina athi akwata mũthya wa ngũa yake
Luke8:45 Yesũ nĩwakũlilye atĩĩ
Luke8:46 Ĩndĩ Yesũ asya atĩĩ
Luke8:47 Yĩla ũla mũndũ mũka wamanyie kana ndatonya kwĩvithĩkya
Luke8:48 Yesũ nĩwamwĩie atĩĩ
Luke8:49 Yesũ o aendee kũneena
Luke8:50 Yĩla Yesũ weewie ũu
Luke8:51 Yĩla Yesũ wavikie mũsyĩ ũsu
Luke8:52 Andũ onthe kũu nĩmaĩaa na kua mbu nũndũ wa kelĩtu kau. Yesũ nĩwameie atĩĩ
Luke8:53 Nĩmamũthekeeie mũno nũndũ nĩmeesĩ kana kelĩtu kau nĩ kakw'ũ.
Luke8:54 Ĩndĩ Yesũ akakwata kw'oko na eetana
Luke8:55 Nĩkasyũkie na kookĩla o vau kwa vau. Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wameie nĩmakanenge kĩndũ kaye.
Luke8:56 Asyai mako nĩmaseng'ie mũno
Luke9:1 Yesũ nĩwoombanisye ala atũmwa ĩkũmi na elĩ vamwe
Luke9:2 Nĩvo ĩndĩ wamatũmie mathi makatavany'e ĩũlũ wa ũsumbĩ wa Ngai
Luke9:3 Nĩwameaĩie amea atĩĩ
Luke9:4 Nyũmba ĩla mwĩthokw'a
Luke9:5 Vala andũ matakamũthokya
Luke9:6 Amanyĩw'a asu nĩmaumie vau na mathi kũu motũinĩ maitavany'a Ũvoo Mũseo na kũvosya andũ ala maĩ awau.
Luke9:7 Elote nĩweewie maũndũ ala maendee kwĩkĩka na asaanĩw'a mũno
Luke9:8 O na angĩ maasya kana Eliya nĩwũkie
Luke9:9 Elote nĩwaisye atĩĩ
Luke9:10 Atũmwa nĩmasyokie na mamũtavya Yesũ maũndũ onthe ala mekie. Yesũ nĩwamosie mathi me oka ndũanĩ yĩtawa Mbethisaita.
Luke9:11 Andũ aingĩ nĩmamanyie kũla wathi na mamũatĩĩa. Nĩwamathokisye na amatavya ĩũlũ wa ũsumbĩ wa Ngai
Luke9:12 Kũkilĩlye kũtuka ala amanyĩw'a ĩkũmi na elĩ nĩmaendie vala ve Yesũ na mamwĩa atĩĩ
Luke9:13 Yesũ amasũngĩa amea atĩĩ
Luke9:14 Ũtalo wa aũme waĩ ta ngili itano. Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ weeie amanyĩw'a atĩĩ
Luke9:15 Amanyĩw'a nĩmeekie ũu
Luke9:16 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ woosie ĩla mĩkate ĩtano na makũyũ elĩ
Luke9:17 Andũ onthe nĩmaĩe mavũna
Luke9:18 Mũthenya ũmwe Yesũ aivoyea vandũ e weka
Luke9:19 Namo mamwĩa
Luke9:20 Nake Yesũ amakũlya atĩĩ
Luke9:21 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wameaĩe maikatavye mũndũ o na ũmwe ũndũ ũsu.
Luke9:22 O ta ũu nĩwameie atĩĩ
Luke9:23 Nĩweeie andũ onthe atĩĩ
Luke9:24 Nũndũ ũla wendaa kũsũvĩa thayũ wake akawasya
Luke9:25 Ve ũtethyo mwaũ mũndũ akamesya nthĩ yonthe
Luke9:26 Ethĩwa mũndũ akeew'a nthoni kũwetanĩw'a nakwa kana momanyĩsyo makwa
Luke9:27 Nĩmũtavya w'o
Luke9:28 Ĩtina wa mĩthenya ta nyanya Yesũ amina kũneena maũndũ asu
Luke9:29 Yesũ aendee na kũvoya
Luke9:30 Andũ elĩ nĩmoonekie maineena nake
Luke9:31 Maĩ na mũvw'ano ũũtisatisa
Luke9:32 Vetelo na ala angĩ waĩ namo nĩmakwatĩtwe nĩ too mwingĩ na makakoma
Luke9:33 Andũ asu mayuma vau
Luke9:34 O aendee na kũneena
Luke9:35 Wasya nĩweew'ĩkie wumĩte ĩtunĩ yĩu ũkwasya atĩĩ
Luke9:36 Wasya ũsu wamina kwĩw'ĩka
Luke9:37 Ũnĩ ũsu
Luke9:38 Nthĩnĩ wa ĩkomano yĩu mũndũ ũmwe nĩwaneenie na wasya mũnene asya atĩĩ
Luke9:39 Kakwatawa nĩ ĩimũ o kwa mĩtũkĩ na kaikaya na wasya mũnene
Luke9:40 Nĩmesũvie amanyĩw'a maku mayĩlũngye
Luke9:41 Yesũ asũngĩa
Luke9:42 Kamwana kau kokĩte vala ve Yesũ
Luke9:43 Andũ onthe nĩmaseng'iw'e nĩkwona ũtonyi mũnene wa Ngai. Andũ maendee na kũseng'wa nĩ maũndũ asu Yesũ weeka
Luke9:44 “Ndeto ii nilike matũnĩ menyu! Mwana wa Mũndũ nũkũthi kũnenganwe ũtonyinĩ wa andũ.”
Luke9:45 Ĩndĩ amanyĩw'a make mayaaelewa nĩ kĩla waweta. Nĩkyavithanĩtw'e nĩ kana maikakĩmanye
Luke9:46 Ngananĩo nĩyookĩlile katĩ wa amanyĩw'a ma Yesũ maikũlany'a nũũ ũla mũnene katĩ woo.
Luke9:47 Yesũ nĩwamanyie kĩla meũsũanĩa na kwoou oosa kana akaũngamya vakuvĩ nake
Luke9:48 na amea atĩĩ
Luke9:49 Yoana nĩwaisye atĩĩ
Luke9:50 Ĩndĩ Yesũ amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke9:51 Yĩla ĩvinda yathengeeie ya Yesũ kwambata ĩtunĩ
Luke9:52 Nĩwatũmie andũ amwe maendae mbee wake
Luke9:53 Ĩndĩ Asamalia mayaaĩtĩkĩla kũmũthokya Yesũ nũndũ aendete Yelũsalemu.
Luke9:54 Yĩla amanyĩw'a make
Luke9:55 Ĩndĩ Yesũ amavĩndũkĩa amakany'a.
Luke9:56 Nĩvo ĩndĩ maumie vau mathi ndũanĩ ĩngĩ.
Luke9:57 Me nzĩanĩ maendete
Luke9:58 Yesũ amwĩa
Luke9:59 Nĩweeie mũndũ ũngĩ atĩĩ
Luke9:60 Nake Yesũ amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke9:61 Mũndũ ũngĩ nĩweeie Yesũ atĩĩ
Luke9:62 Yesũ nake amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke10:1 Ĩtina wa ũu Mwĩai nĩwanyuvie andũ angĩ mĩongo mũonza na elĩ
Luke10:2 Nĩwameie atĩĩ
Luke10:3 Kwatai nzĩa yu mũthi
Luke10:4 Mũikakue ĩvoosi ya mbesa
Luke10:5 Mũsyĩ o na wĩva ũla mwalika
Luke10:6 Ethĩwa nyũmba ĩsu nĩ ya mũndũ wa mũuo
Luke10:7 Ĩkalaai mũsyĩnĩ ũsu mũiya na kũnyw'a kĩla mamũnenga
Luke10:8 Ndũanĩ o na yĩva ĩla mwathi na mwathokw'a
Luke10:9 na mũivosya andũ ala awau ndũanĩ ĩsu
Luke10:10 Ĩndĩ ndũa o na yĩva ĩla mwĩthi na mũilea kũthokw'a
Luke10:11 ‘O na kĩtoo kya ndũa ĩno yenyu kĩla kĩlũmĩte maũũnĩ maitũ nĩtũũmũtuangĩa. Ĩndĩ manyai kana ũsumbĩ wa Ngai wĩ vakuvĩ!’
Luke10:12 Ekai nĩmũtavye
Luke10:13 “Kyeva nĩ kwenyu inyw'ĩ andũ ma ndũa ya Kolasinĩ
Luke10:14 Mũthenyanĩ wa Ũsilĩlo andũ ma Tile na ma Sitoni makakwata ũsilĩlo mũninangi kwĩ inyw'ĩ.
Luke10:15 Nenyu andũ ma Kavelinaũmu
Luke10:16 Nĩvo ĩndĩ wameie amanyĩw'a make atĩĩ
Luke10:17 Ala mĩongo mũonza na elĩ nĩmasyokie me na ũtanu na masya atĩĩ
Luke10:18 Nake Yesũ amea atĩĩ
Luke10:19 Ĩthukĩĩsyei
Luke10:20 Ũu wĩ o vo
Luke10:21 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu Yesũ nĩwausũiw'e ũtanu nĩ Veva Mũtheu na asya atĩĩ
Luke10:22 “Nĩnĩnengetwe maũndũ onthe nĩ Asa wakwa
Luke10:23 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wathyũũkĩie amanyĩw'a make na amea me oka atĩĩ
Luke10:24 Ekai nĩmũtavye
Luke10:25 Ĩvinda yĩmwe mũmanyĩsya ũmwe wa Mĩao nĩwookĩlile ayenda kũmũtata Yesũ amũkũlya atĩĩ
Luke10:26 Yesũ amũkũlya atĩĩ
Luke10:27 Nake amũsũngĩa
Luke10:28 Yesũ amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke10:29 Mũmanyĩsya ũsu wa Mĩao ayenda kũĩkĩĩthya kana we nĩ mũseo nĩwakũlilye Yesũ atĩĩ
Luke10:30 Yesũ amũsũngĩa amwĩa
Luke10:31 Nzĩanĩ ĩsu nĩvesĩlile mũthembi ũmwe
Luke10:32 O ta ũu Mũlivai ũmwe nĩwesĩlile vau
Luke10:33 Ĩndĩ Mũsamalia ũmwe wesĩle nzĩanĩ ĩsu nĩwavikie vala mũndũ ũsu waĩ
Luke10:34 Nĩwaendie vala ũĩ
Luke10:35 Mũthenya ũla waatĩĩe nĩwaumisye ndinalĩ ilĩ
Luke10:36 Yesũ aiminũkĩlya ndeto isu nĩwakũlilye mũmanyĩsya ũsu wa mĩao atĩĩ
Luke10:37 Nake amũsũngĩa
Luke10:38 Me o kyalonĩ
Luke10:39 Matha aĩ na mwĩĩtu-a-inyia weetawa Meli; mwĩĩtu ũsu nĩwekalile nthĩ vakuvĩ na Yesũ
Luke10:40 Matha nake athĩnaw'a nĩ mawĩa maingĩ ala maaĩlĩte kũtethw'a. Nĩvo ĩndĩ waendie vala ve Yesũ amũkũlya atĩĩ
Luke10:41 Mwĩai amũsũngĩa amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke10:42 ĩndĩ no ũndũ ũmwe ũla ũkwendeka. Meli we nũnyuvie kĩndũ kĩla kĩseo
Luke11:1 Mũthenya ũmwe Yesũ nĩwavoyaa vandũnĩ vana. Amina
Luke11:2 Yesũ nĩwameie atĩĩ
Luke11:3 Tũnenge kĩla mũthenya lĩu ũtwĩanĩe.
Luke11:4 Tũekee mavĩtyo maitũ
Luke11:5 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wameie atĩĩ
Luke11:6 mũndũ ũmwe twĩ ndũũ nĩwanthokea e kyalonĩ na ndi na kĩndũ nĩmũnenga.’
Luke11:7 Nake mũnyanyau aikũsũngĩa e nyũmba nthĩnĩ aikwĩa
Luke11:8 Ekai nĩmũtavye
Luke11:9 “Kwoou nĩmwĩa: Ĩtyai Ngai kĩla mũkwenda
Luke11:10 Nũndũ ũla wĩtasya Ngai kĩndũ o na kĩva nũnengawe
Luke11:11 Nũũ katĩ wenyu ala mwĩ na syana
Luke11:12 Kana akamũnenga kĩng'auĩ amwĩtya ĩtumbĩ?
Luke11:13 Ethĩwa inyw'ĩ ĩndĩ mũthũkĩte ũu mũthũkĩte
Luke11:14 Mũthenya ũmwe Yesũ nĩwalũngasya ĩimũ yavingĩte mũndũ ũkethĩa ndatonya kũneena
Luke11:15 Andũ nĩmaseng'ie mũno na amwe moo masya atĩĩ
Luke11:16 Angĩ namo nĩmendie kũmũtata Yesũ
Luke11:17 Yesũ nĩwamanyie ũndũ meũsũanĩa na kwoou amea atĩĩ
Luke11:18 Kwoou ethĩwa Satani nĩmũaanĩku na nũkwĩyũkita we mwene
Luke11:19 Nĩmũkũlya
Luke11:20 Ĩndĩ ethĩwa nĩlũngya maimũ na vinya wa Ngai
Luke11:21 “Yĩla mũndũ wĩ vinya ũkũsunga nyũmba yake e na mĩio ya kaũ
Luke11:22 Ĩndĩ yĩla mũndũ ũngĩ wĩ vinya kwĩ we wamũvithũkĩa na kũmũkĩlya vinya
Luke11:23 “Mũndũ ũla ũte vamwe nakwa ethĩawa aileana nakwa
Luke11:24 “Yĩla ĩimũ yalũngw'a kuma mũndũnĩ
Luke11:25 Nĩyĩsyokaa na kwĩthĩa nyũmba ĩsu yĩ ndute na ĩkaseũvw'a nesa.
Luke11:26 Nĩvo ĩndĩ yĩendaa yĩkaete maimũ angĩ mũonza mathũkangu kwĩ yo. Nĩmalikaa na kũtũa vau
Luke11:27 Yesũ aendee na kũneena ũu
Luke11:28 Ĩndĩ Yesũ asũngĩa asya atĩĩ
Luke11:29 Ĩkomano ya andũ o yĩendee na kwingĩva Yesũ nĩwameie atĩĩ
Luke11:30 O tondũ Yona waĩ wonany'o kwa andũ ma Nineva
Luke11:31 Mũthenyanĩ wa Ũsilĩlo
Luke11:32 O ta ũu ĩvindanĩ yĩu
Luke11:33 “Vai mũndũ ũkwatasya taa na aiũvitha kana aiũkunĩkĩlya mbisũ. Awiaa vandũ vatũlu nĩ kana ũmulĩkĩle andũ ala meũlika nyũmbanĩ ĩsu.
Luke11:34 Metho maku nĩmo taa wa mwĩĩ waku. Ethĩwa metho maku nĩ maseo
Luke11:35 Kwoou ĩsũvĩe kyeni kĩla kĩ nthĩnĩ waku kĩikatw'ĩke kĩvindu.
Luke11:36 Ethĩwa mwĩĩ waku w'onthe wĩ na kyeni vate vandũ ve kĩvindu
Luke11:37 Yesũ amina kũneena
Luke11:38 Mũvalisi ũsu nĩwaseng'ie mũno oona Yesũ aiya atathambĩte moko.
Luke11:39 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Mwĩai weeie Mũvalisi ũsu atĩĩ
Luke11:40 Inyw'ĩ andũ atumanu! Ũla waseũvisye nza tyo we waseũvisye nthĩnĩ?
Luke11:41 Ĩndĩ tethyai ngya na syĩndũ ila syĩ ikombenĩ syenyu na masaaninĩ
Luke11:42 “Ĩndĩ kyeva nĩ kwenyu inyw'ĩ Avalisi. Mumĩasya Ngai kĩlungu kya ĩkũmi kya syĩndũ ta ndania
Luke11:43 “Kyeva nĩ kwenyu inyw'ĩ Avalisi! Mwendete mũno kwĩkala ivĩlanĩ sya mbee nyũmbanĩ sya Ayuti sya kũthaithĩa na kũmbanĩa
Luke11:44 Kyeva nĩ kwenyu nũndũ mũilyĩ ta mbũa itekwoneka
Luke11:45 Ũmwe wa amanyĩsya ma Mĩao nĩweeie Yesũ atĩĩ
Luke11:46 Yesũ amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke11:47 Kyeva nĩ kwenyu nũndũ mwakĩĩaa mbũa sya athani ala aaũmae menyu mooaie.
Luke11:48 Kwoou inyw'ĩ mwĩ ngũsĩ na nĩmũkwĩtĩkĩlana na meko ma aaũmae menyu
Luke11:49 Kwondũ wa ũu
Luke11:50 Kwoou andũ ma ĩvinda yĩĩ makasilĩlwa kwondũ wa kũawa kwa athani onthe ala maaũawa kuma nthĩ yoombwa
Luke11:51 kwambĩĩa na kũawa kwa Aveli kũvika kũawa kwa Nzekalia
Luke11:52 “Kyeva nĩ kwenyu inyw'ĩ amanyĩsya ma Mĩao
Luke11:53 Yesũ ayuma vau athi
Luke11:54 nũndũ nĩmamũteete aneene ũndũ ũte mwaĩlu mamũsikate naw'o.
Luke12:1 Yĩla andũ ngili mbingĩ moombanie kũvika weethĩa nĩmeũkinyangana
Luke12:2 Vai ũndũ mũvithe ũtakaumbũwa
Luke12:3 Kĩla mũũneenea kĩvindunĩ
Luke12:4 “Ekai nĩmũtavye anyanyawa
Luke12:5 Nĩngũmũtavya ũla mwaĩlĩte kũkĩa: Kĩai ũla ĩtina wa kũaa
Luke12:6 “Tũsũni tũtano tũithooaw'a o mbesa nini? Ĩndĩ Ngai ndolwa nĩ kamwe katw'o.
Luke12:7 O na nzw'ĩĩ syonthe ila syĩ mĩtwenĩ yenyu nĩ ndale. Kwoou mũikakĩe; mwĩ vata mũno kwĩ tũsũni o na twingĩvĩte ata!
Luke12:8 “O ĩngĩ ekai nĩmũtavye
Luke12:9 ĩndĩ ũla wĩkaĩa mbee wa andũ asye ndambĩsĩ
Luke12:10 “Mũndũ ũla ũneeneaa Mwana wa Mũndũ naĩ akaekewa
Luke12:11 “Yĩla memũtwaa nyũmbanĩ sya Ayuti sya kũthaithĩa na kũmbanĩa mũkasilĩlwe
Luke12:12 Nũndũ saanĩ o ũsu Veva Mũtheu akamũmanyĩsya kĩla mwaĩlĩte kũneena.”
Luke12:13 Mũndũ ũmwe waĩ nthĩnĩ wa ĩkomano nĩwamwĩie Yesũ atĩĩ
Luke12:14 Yesũ amũsũngĩa amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke12:15 Nĩwaendeeie kũtavya andũ atĩĩ
Luke12:16 Yesũ nĩwamatavisye ngelekany'o ĩno: “Mũndũ ũmwe waĩ mũthwii aĩ na mũũnda waĩ na lĩu mwingĩ.
Luke12:17 Nĩwambĩĩie kũsũanĩa ayasya
Luke12:18 Nĩvo ĩndĩ waisye atĩĩ
Luke12:19 Nĩvo ĩndĩ nĩĩa ngoo yakwa
Luke12:20 Ĩndĩ Ngai amwĩa
Luke12:21 “Ũu nĩw'o kũkethĩwa kwa andũ ala meyũmbanĩasya mothwii na ti athwii ngalĩkonĩ ĩla ya Ngai.”
Luke12:22 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ weeie amanyĩw'a make atĩĩ
Luke12:23 Kwĩthĩwa thayũ nĩkũthonekete lĩu
Luke12:24 Kwa sisyai ngũngũũ: Iivandaa kana kũmbany'a ngetha
Luke12:25 Ve ũmwe wenyu ũtonya kwĩyongela matukũ ma thayũ wake kũũ ĩũlũ wa nthĩ kwa kũũya na kwĩmakĩa kwake?
Luke12:26 Kwoou ethĩwa mũitonya kwĩka kaũndũ kanyivĩte ũu
Luke12:27 Kwa sũanĩai ũndũ malaa ma kĩthekanĩ mameaa; maithũkũmaa kana kũtuma ngũa. Ĩndĩ ekai nĩmũtavye
Luke12:28 Ngai nĩwe ũnengae mĩmea ya kĩthekanĩ wanake ũsu
Luke12:29 “Kwoou ekai kwĩmakĩa mũimantha kĩla mũkaĩsaa kana kĩla mũkanyusaa.
Luke12:30 Andũ-ma-mbaĩ-ingĩ nĩmo mathĩnaw'a nĩ syĩndũ isu. Inyw'ĩ Ĩthe wenyu ũla wĩ ĩtunĩ nĩwĩsĩ mwĩ na vata wa syĩndũ isu.
Luke12:31 Thĩnĩkĩai ĩndĩ maũndũ ma ũsumbĩ wa Ngai
Luke12:32 “Mũikethĩwe na w'ĩa inyw'ĩ ĩĩthya ĩnini
Luke12:33 Thoosyai syĩndũ syonthe ila mwĩ nasyo
Luke12:34 Nũndũ vala ũthwii waku ũĩ
Luke12:35 “Ĩkalaai mwĩyũmbanĩtye kwondũ wa kyonthe kĩla kĩumĩla
Luke12:36 ta athũkũmi ala methĩawa meteelete mũnene woo asyoke kuma mbokanĩ ya mũtwaano. Mũnene ũsu avika na akũnanga mũomo
Luke12:37 Nĩ aathime athũkũmi asu
Luke12:38 Athũkũmi asu makeethĩwa me aathime meethĩwa nĩ mũnene woo masalukĩtye
Luke12:39 Ĩndĩ manyai ũndũ ũũ: Kethĩwa mwene wa nyũmba nĩwĩthĩawa esĩ saa ũla kĩng'ei kĩkũka
Luke12:40 Kwoou o nenyu ĩkalai mwĩyũmbanĩtye
Luke12:41 Vetelo nĩwamũkũlilye atĩĩ
Luke12:42 Mwĩai amũsũngĩa
Luke12:43 Nĩ mũathime mũthũkũmi ũla ũkethĩwa nĩ mũnene wake aendee na kũtethya wĩa ũla watiĩiwe.
Luke12:44 Nĩmũtavya w'o
Luke12:45 Ĩndĩ ethĩwa nĩ mũthũkũmi ũte wa kwĩkwatw'a
Luke12:46 Mũnene wa mũthũkũmi ũsu akooka mũthenya ũla we ũtataĩĩe na saa ũla ũtesĩ. Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũnene ũsu wĩmũthĩny'a mũno na aimwĩkya kũla kwĩkalaa mbaa matũ.
Luke12:47 “Mũthũkũmi ũla wĩthĩawa esĩ kĩla mũnene wake ũkwenda eke
Luke12:48 Nake mũthũkũmi ũla wĩthĩawa atesĩ kĩla mũnene wake ũkwenda eke
Luke12:49 “Nyie nookie kwakany'a mwaki ĩũlũ wa nthĩ
Luke12:50 Neteelete kũvatiswa na ũvatiso wa mathĩna
Luke12:51 Ko mũkwona ta nookie kũete mũuo kũũ ĩũlũ wa nthĩ? Aiee! Ndyaaete mũuo. Ĩndĩ naetie ũtilĩkangano katĩ wa andũ.
Luke12:52 Kuma yu
Luke12:53 Ĩthe wa mwana akaleanaa na mwana wake
Luke12:54 Yesũ nĩwasyokie atavya ĩkomano o nayo ayĩa atĩĩ
Luke12:55 Na yĩla mweew'a kĩseve kĩuutanĩte kuma ngalĩko ya ĩtheo
Luke12:56 Inyw'ĩ andũ ma mĩseũvyo! Nĩmwĩsĩ kũweta ũndũ kũkwĩthĩwa kũilyĩ kwa kũsisya mũvw'anĩle wa nthĩ na matu; nĩkĩ ĩndĩ mũtatonya kũmanya kĩla kĩendee ĩvinda yĩĩ tũĩ?
Luke12:57 “Nĩkĩ mũtetw'ĩĩaa kĩla kyaĩlu mũkeka?
Luke12:58 Ethĩwa ve mũndũ wĩ na ĩkoani nake
Luke12:59 Eka ngũtavye
Luke13:1 Ĩvindanĩ o yĩu
Luke13:2 Yesũ nĩwamasũngĩie amea atĩĩ
Luke13:3 Aiee
Luke13:4 Kana mwĩsũanĩa ala andũ ĩkũmi na nyanya matumbiwe nĩ nyũmba ndũlu ĩla yaĩ Siloamu makw'a
Luke13:5 Aiee
Luke13:6 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wamatavisye ngelekany'o ĩno: “Ve mũndũ ũmwe waĩ na mũkũyũ wavandĩte mũũndanĩ wake wa mĩsavivũ. Nĩwaendie akatw'e makũyũ
Luke13:7 Kwoou eea mũthũkũmi wake ũla wasũvĩaa mũũnda ũsu atĩĩ
Luke13:8 Ĩndĩ mũthũkũmi wake amwĩa
Luke13:9 Wasyaa mwaka ũsu ũngĩ
Luke13:10 Mũthenyanĩ ũmwe wa Savato
Luke13:11 Vau vaĩ mũndũ mũka ũmwe walikĩtwe nĩ ĩimũ yĩkamũtw'a kyonze vandũ va myaka ĩkũmi na nyanya. Aendaa akunguutĩtye
Luke13:12 Yĩla Yesũ wamwonie nĩwamwĩtie amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke13:13 Nĩwamwilĩĩile moko na o vau kwa vau aũngalala na amũkatha Ngai.
Luke13:14 Mũtongoi wa nyũmba ĩsu ya Ayuti ya kũthaithĩa na kũmbanĩa nĩweewie woo mũno
Luke13:15 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Mwĩai wamũsũngĩie amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke13:16 Mũndũ mũka ũũ
Luke13:17 Ndeto isu sya Yesũ nĩsyatumie amaitha make mew'a nthoni mũno
Luke13:18 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wamakũlilye atĩĩ
Luke13:19 No ũvw'ananw'e na mũndũ ũmwe ũla woosie mbeũ ĩla niini vyũ
Luke13:20 O ĩngĩ Yesũ nĩwamakũlilye atĩĩ
Luke13:21 No ũvw'ananw'e na mũndũ mũka ũmwe ũla woosie mbota na amĩkĩa mũtunĩ wa maleve elĩ na nyusu na w'onthe waimba.”
Luke13:22 Yesũ o aendee na kyalo kya kũthi Yelũsalemu nĩwesĩlile ndũanĩ syĩ kĩvathũkany'o aimanyĩsya andũ.
Luke13:23 Mũndũ ũmwe nĩwamũkũlilye atĩĩ
Luke13:24 Nake Yesũ amea atĩĩ
Luke13:25 Ĩvinda nĩyũkĩte yĩla mwene wa nyũmba wĩũkĩla avinge mũomo. Nĩvo ĩndĩ nenyu mũũngyĩ nza mwĩambĩĩa kũkũnanga mũomo mũyasya
Luke13:26 Nĩvo ĩndĩ nenyu mwĩmwĩa atĩĩ
Luke13:27 Ĩndĩ nake akamwĩa
Luke13:28 Vau nĩvo mũkaĩa na kũvevetany'a maeo
Luke13:29 Andũ nĩmakoka kuma wumĩlonĩ wa syũa na ũthũĩlonĩ wayo
Luke13:30 Kwoou ala yu matongoew'e nĩmakatongosya
Luke13:31 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu Avalisi amwe nĩmookie vala ve Yesũ na mamwĩa atĩĩ
Luke13:32 Ĩndĩ Yesũ amea atĩĩ
Luke13:33 Ĩndĩ ũu wĩ o vo
Luke13:34 “We Yelũsalemu
Luke13:35 Kwoou yu
Luke14:1 Mũthenyanĩ ũmwe wa Savato
Luke14:2 Mũndũ ũmwe waĩ na ũwau wa kwimba mwĩĩ nĩwaũngamie mbee wa Yesũ
Luke14:3 nake Yesũ amakũlya amanyĩsya ma Mĩao na Avalisi atĩĩ
Luke14:4 Ĩndĩ mayaasũngĩa ũndũ. Yesũ nĩwoosie mũndũ ũsu amũvosya
Luke14:5 Nĩvo ĩndĩ wamakũlilye atĩĩ
Luke14:6 Namo mayaaĩthĩwa na ndeto mamũsũngĩa.
Luke14:7 Yesũ nĩwoonie ũndũ andũ amwe katĩ wa ala mathoketw'e maendie kwĩkala ivĩlanĩ sya mbee
Luke14:8 “Wathokw'a nĩ mũndũ mbokanĩ ya mũtwaano
Luke14:9 Mũndũ ũsu akoka
Luke14:10 Kwoou wathokw'a
Luke14:11 Nũndũ ũla wĩnenevasya akanyivw'a
Luke14:12 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ weeie mũndũ ũla wamũthoketye atĩĩ
Luke14:13 Ĩndĩ thokasya ala ngya na ala au mamutha
Luke14:14 Kwa nzĩa ĩsu ũkakwata ũathimo nũndũ mo maikũĩvĩkya
Luke14:15 Ũmwe wa aeni ala maĩ vau eew'a ũu
Luke14:16 Ĩndĩ Yesũ amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke14:17 Yĩla ĩvinda ya mboka yavikie
Luke14:18 Ĩndĩ me onthe masya maitonya kũthi
Luke14:19 Mũndũ wa kelĩ nake amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke14:20 Mũndũ wa katatũ nĩwamwĩie atĩĩ
Luke14:21 “Mũthũkũmi ũsu nĩwasyokie na atavya mũnene wake maũndũ asu onthe. Mũnene wake nĩwathatie mũno na eea mũthũkũmi wake atĩĩ
Luke14:22 O mĩtũkĩ mũthũkũmi ũsu nĩwookie na asya
Luke14:23 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũnene ũsu wamwĩie atĩĩ
Luke14:24 Ekai nĩmũtavye
Luke14:25 Ĩkomano ĩnene ya andũ nĩyaendanĩtye na Yesũ nake amathyũũkĩa amea atĩĩ
Luke14:26 “Vai mũndũ ũtonya kũtw'ĩka mũmanyĩw'a wakwa atambendete mbee wa ĩthe wake
Luke14:27 O ta ũu
Luke14:28 “Nũũ katĩ wenyu ayenda kwaka nyũmba ndũlu
Luke14:29 Ethĩwa akambĩĩa mwako ũsu na ũyĩemela katĩ
Luke14:30 mayasya
Luke14:31 “O ta ũu
Luke14:32 Ethĩwa nde na vinya mwĩanu
Luke14:33 Kwoou vai ũmwe katĩ wenyu ũtonya kũtw'ĩka mũmanyĩw'a wakwa ethĩwa ndatia syĩndũ syake syonthe.
Luke14:34 “Mũnyũ nĩ mũseo
Luke14:35 Ndwĩ vata kwĩkĩwa mũũndanĩ kana vũũnĩ
Luke15:1 Ĩvinda yĩmwe aumĩthya aingĩ ma koti na andũ angĩ avĩtany'a nĩmookie kũmwĩthukĩĩsya Yesũ.
Luke15:2 Avalisi na amanyĩsya ma Mĩao nĩmambĩĩie kũnyungunyĩsya mayasya atĩĩ
Luke15:3 Kwoou Yesũ amatavya ngelekany'o ĩno:
Luke15:4 “Kwa sũanĩai
Luke15:5 Ayona
Luke15:6 Amina kũvika mũsyĩ
Luke15:7 O ta ũu ekai nĩmũtavye
Luke15:8 “O na sũanĩai
Luke15:9 Amina kũmyona
Luke15:10 O ta ũu ekai nĩmũtavye
Luke15:11 Yesũ nĩwaendeeie na kũtavya andũ amea atĩĩ
Luke15:12 Ĩlumaita nĩyeeie ĩthe atĩĩ
Luke15:13 Ĩtina wa matukũ mavũthũ
Luke15:14 Yamina kũtũmĩa mbesa syayo syonthe
Luke15:15 Nĩvo ĩndĩ yaendie kũthũkũma kwa mũndũ ũmwe wa nthĩ ĩsu
Luke15:16 Nĩyendaa mũno kũya lĩu ũla ngũlũe syaĩsaa
Luke15:17 Mũthya nĩyesie kũsũanĩa yasya
Luke15:18 Nĩngũkĩla nĩsyoke kwa ĩthe wakwa na ngĩmwĩa: Nau
Luke15:19 O na ndyaĩlĩtwe nĩ kwĩtwa mwana waku ĩngĩ; mbose o ta ũmwe wa athũkũmi maku.’
Luke15:20 Kwoou nĩyookĩlile na yambĩĩa kyalo kya kũsyoka kwa ĩthe. “Yĩtanamba kũvika mũsyĩ yĩ o kũasa
Luke15:21 Ĩlumaita yĩu nĩyamwĩie ĩthe atĩĩ
Luke15:22 Ĩndĩ ĩthe eeta athũkũmi make amea atĩĩ
Luke15:23 Mwamina ũu
Luke15:24 Nĩkwĩthĩwa mwana ũũ wakwa anaĩ mũkw'ũ na nĩwasyũka
Luke15:25 “Ĩvindanĩ yĩu mwana ũla mũkũũ aĩ naku mũũndanĩ. Asyokete e vakuvĩ na mũsyĩ
Luke15:26 Nĩvo ĩndĩ weetie mũthũkũmi ũmwe amũkũlya atĩĩ
Luke15:27 Nake amũsũngĩa
Luke15:28 “Mwana ũsu mũkũũ nĩwathatie mũno na alea kũlika mũsyĩ. Ĩthe wake nĩwookie amwĩsũva mathi mũsyĩ.
Luke15:29 Ĩndĩ amũsũngĩa amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke15:30 Ĩndĩ yĩla mwana ũũ waku wũkie
Luke15:31 Nĩvo ĩndĩ nake ĩthe wamũsũngĩie amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke15:32 Ĩndĩ tũyĩĩ tũlea kũtana nũndũ mũinau anaĩ mũkw'ũ na nĩwasyũka
Luke16:1 Yesũ nĩwatavisye amanyĩw'a make amea atĩĩ
Luke16:2 Nĩwamwĩtie mũũngamĩi ũsu amũkũlya atĩĩ
Luke16:3 Mũthũkũmi ũsu nĩwambĩĩie kwĩkũlya
Luke16:4 Aa
Luke16:5 “Nĩvo ĩndĩ woombanisye andũ onthe ala maĩ na thiĩ na mũnene wake. Nĩweetie wa mbee amũkũlya atĩĩ
Luke16:6 Nake amwĩa
Luke16:7 Nĩwasyokie akũlya ũngĩ
Luke16:8 “Mũnene wa mũthũkũmi ũsu ũtaĩkĩĩwa nĩwamũkathie mũno kwondũ wa kũtũmĩa mawũĩ
Luke16:9 Yesũ nĩwaendeeie na kũmea atĩĩ
Luke16:10 Mũndũ ũla ũĩkĩĩkaa maũndũnĩ manini nĩ ũĩkĩĩkaa maũndũnĩ manene o namo; ĩndĩ ũla ũtaĩkĩĩka maũndũnĩ manini
Luke16:11 Ethĩwa ĩndĩ mũtwĩe mũtaĩkĩĩka na ũthwii wa kũũ nthĩ
Luke16:12 Na ethĩwa mwĩthĩĩtwe mũtaĩkĩĩka syĩndũnĩ syeene
Luke16:13 “Vai mũndũ ũtonya kwĩthĩwa e mũthũkũmi wa anene elĩ
Luke16:14 Yĩla Avalisi meewie maũndũ asu
Luke16:15 Ĩndĩ Yesũ amea atĩĩ
Luke16:16 “Mĩao ya Mwose na mawathani nĩsyathelile na ĩvinda ya Yoana Mũvatisi. Kuma ĩvinda yĩu Ũvoo Mũseo ĩũlũ wa ũsumbĩ wa Ngai wĩthĩawa ũitavanw'a
Luke16:17 Ĩndĩ nĩ laisangi kwa ĩtu na nthĩ kũthela
Luke16:18 “Mũndũ o na wĩva amũlea mũka na kũtwaa mũndũ mũka ũngĩ
Luke16:19 “Kwaĩ mũndũ ũmwe mũthwii
Luke16:20 Mũvĩanĩ kwake nĩvakomaw'a mũndũ ngya
Luke16:21 na wendaa anengawe lĩu ũla wavalũkanga kuma mesanĩ ya mũthwii ũsu. O na ngitĩ nĩsyookaa na kũnyenyanga itau syake.
Luke16:22 “Mũndũ ũsu ngya nĩwesie kũkw'a na ooswa nĩ alaĩka atwawa ekalw'a vakuvĩ na Avalaamu ĩtunĩ. Ũla mũndũ mũthwii o nake nĩwakwie na athikwa.
Luke16:23 E vala maveva ma ala akw'ũ mekalaa
Luke16:24 Nĩweetanie mũno: ‘Nau Avalaamu! Mbĩw'ĩe tei
Luke16:25 “Ĩndĩ Avalaamu amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke16:26 Ũu wĩ o vo
Luke16:27 Mũndũ ũsu amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke16:28 akakany'e ana-a-ia makwa me atano
Luke16:29 “Ĩndĩ Avalaamu amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke16:30 Mũndũ ũsu amwĩa
Luke16:31 Ĩndĩ Avalaamu amwĩa
Luke17:1 Yesũ nĩwasyokie atavya amanyĩw'a make amea atĩĩ
Luke17:2 Nĩ kavaa mũndũ ũsu akoveewa ĩvia ĩnene ngingo na kwĩkw'a ũkanganĩ
Luke17:3 Kwoou ĩsũvĩei mũno maũndũnĩ ala mũkwĩka! “Ethĩwa mwana-a-au nĩwakũvĩtĩsya mũkany'e
Luke17:4 O na ethĩwa akũvĩtĩsya mavinda mũonza kwa mũthenya na kĩla ĩvinda ayũka aikw'ĩa
Luke17:5 Atũmwa nĩmeeie Mwĩai atĩĩ
Luke17:6 Nake Mwĩai amea atĩĩ
Luke17:7 “Nũũ katĩ wenyu mũthũkũmi wake ekũĩmaa kana ekũĩthasya malondu asyoka mũsyĩ aumĩte wĩanĩ ũmwĩa
Luke17:8 Vandũ va ũu amwĩaa atĩĩ
Luke17:9 Mũthũkũmi ũsu ndatũngĩawa mũvea nũndũ wa kwĩanĩsya ũndũ weewa eke.
Luke17:10 Kwoou o nenyu
Luke17:11 Yesũ o aendete Yelũsalemu
Luke17:12 Aendete akalike ndũanĩ ĩmwe
Luke17:13 na meetana na wasya mũnene mayasya atĩĩ
Luke17:14 Yĩla Yesũ wamonie nĩwameie atĩĩ
Luke17:15 Yĩla ũmwe woo woonie kana nĩwavow'a
Luke17:16 Nĩwakomie nthĩ na ĩvu vakuvĩ na Yesũ na amũtũngĩa mũvea; mũndũ ũsu aĩ Mũsamalia.
Luke17:17 Yesũ nĩwakũlilye atĩĩ
Luke17:18 Mbona mũeni ũũ e weka nowe wasyoka amũtũngĩe Ngai mũvea?”
Luke17:19 Yesũ amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke17:20 Avalisi amwe nĩmamũkũlilye Yesũ yĩla ũsumbĩ wa Ngai ũkoka. Nake amasũngĩa amea atĩĩ
Luke17:21 Vai mũndũ ũkethĩwa atonya kwasya
Luke17:22 Nĩvo ĩndĩ weeie amanyĩw'a make atĩĩ
Luke17:23 Ve andũ makokĩla mamwĩe
Luke17:24 Mwana wa Mũndũ akaumĩla ta ũtisi
Luke17:25 Ĩndĩ mbee wa ũu
Luke17:26 O ũndũ kwailyĩ ĩvindanĩ ya Noa
Luke17:27 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu
Luke17:28 Yĩkeethĩwa yĩilyĩ ũndũ kwailyĩ ĩvindanĩ ya Loto. Andũ nĩmaĩsaa na kũnyw'a
Luke17:29 Ĩndĩ mũthenya ũla Loto waumie Sondomu
Luke17:30 Ũu now'o kwĩĩthĩwa kũilyĩ mũthenya ũla Mwana wa Mũndũ wĩumĩla.
Luke17:31 “Mũthenyanĩ ũsu
Luke17:32 Lilikanai kĩla kyeekĩkie kwa mũka wa Loto!
Luke17:33 Mũndũ ũla wendaa kũsũvĩa thayũ wake akawasya; ĩndĩ ũla waasya thayũ wake akawona ĩngĩ.
Luke17:34 Ekai nĩmũtavye
Luke17:35 Aka elĩ nĩmakethĩwa maithiĩa ĩvianĩ yĩmwe; ũmwe nũkoswa na ũla ũngĩ aitiwa.” [
Luke17:36 O ta ũu
Luke17:37 Amanyĩw'a ma Yesũ nĩmamũkũlilye atĩĩ
Luke18:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ watavisye amanyĩw'a make ngelekany'o ayenda kũmamanyĩsya kana nĩmaĩlĩte kũvoyaa kĩla ĩvinda mate kũkw'a ngoo.
Luke18:2 Nĩwameie atĩĩ
Luke18:3 O ta ũu
Luke18:4 Mũsili ũsu nĩwatatie kũlea vandũ va ĩvinda ĩasa
Luke18:5 ĩndĩ nũndũ nĩtindĩa kũthĩnw'a nĩ kĩveti kĩĩ
Luke18:6 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Mwĩai wameie atĩĩ
Luke18:7 Nĩkũlya
Luke18:8 Ekai nĩmũtavye
Luke18:9 Yesũ nĩwasyokie atavya andũ ala monaa me alũngalu kwĩ andũ ala angĩ ngelekany'o ĩno:
Luke18:10 “Andũ elĩ nĩmaendie Ĩkalũnĩ kũvoya; ũmwe aĩ Mũvalisi na ũla ũngĩ aĩ mumĩthya wa koti.
Luke18:11 “Mũvalisi nĩwaũngamie vandũ vake e weka na avoya ayasya
Luke18:12 Nĩndĩĩaa kũya kelĩ kwa kyumwa
Luke18:13 “Mumĩthya wa koti nake nĩwaũngamie kũasa
Luke18:14 Ekai nĩmũtavye
Luke18:15 Andũ amwe nĩmaeteie Yesũ syana nini aiathime kwa kũsilĩĩla moko
Luke18:16 Ĩndĩ Yesũ asyĩta ithi vala ũĩ ayasya atĩĩ
Luke18:17 Nĩmũtavya w'o
Luke18:18 Mũtongoi ũmwe wa Ayuti nĩwamũkũlilye Yesũ atĩĩ
Luke18:19 Yesũ amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke18:20 We nĩwĩsĩ ũndũ mĩao ĩkwasya: ‘Ndũkalaalae; ndũkoae mũndũ; ndũkoye; ndũkanengane ũkũsĩ wa ũvũngũ ĩũlũ wa mũndũ ũngĩ; nenga ĩthe waku na inyia waku ndaĩa.’ ”
Luke18:21 Mũndũ ũsu amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke18:22 Yesũ eew'a ũu amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke18:23 Mũndũ ũsu eew'a ndeto isu
Luke18:24 Yesũ nĩwasyaisye mũndũ ũsu na asya atĩĩ
Luke18:25 Ĩĩ
Luke18:26 Andũ ala meewie ũu nĩmakũlilye atĩĩ
Luke18:27 Ĩndĩ Yesũ amea atĩĩ
Luke18:28 Vetelo amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke18:29 Yesũ amea atĩĩ
Luke18:30 akakwata syĩndũ mbingĩ mũno ĩvindanĩ yĩĩ
Luke18:31 Yesũ nĩweetie ala amanyĩw'a ĩkũmi na elĩ mathi nzama ũtee na amea atĩĩ
Luke18:32 Nũkũthi kũnenganwe kwa Andũ-ma-mbaĩ-ingĩ
Luke18:33 O ta ũu makamũvũa na kũmũaa
Luke18:34 Kĩla Yesũ wawetaa kyaĩ kĩvithany'e kwoo
Luke18:35 Yesũ e vakuvĩ kũvika Yeliko
Luke18:36 Yĩla weewie andũ aingĩ mavĩtĩte
Luke18:37 Andũ nĩmamũsũngĩie mamwĩa atĩĩ
Luke18:38 Mũndũ ũsu nĩweetanie mũno ayasya atĩĩ
Luke18:39 Andũ ala maĩ mbee nĩmamũkanisye avindye
Luke18:40 Yesũ nĩwaũngamie na asya mũndũ ũsu nĩaetwe vala ũĩ. Athengeea vakuvĩ
Luke18:41 “Wĩenda ngwĩke ata?” Nake amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke18:42 Yesũ amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke18:43 Vau kwa vau nĩwambĩĩie kwona nthĩ
Luke19:1 Yesũ nĩwalikile ndũanĩ ya Yeliko ĩndĩ o avĩtĩte.
Luke19:2 Vaĩ mũndũ ũmwe ndũanĩ ĩsu weetawa Sakayo waĩ mumĩthya mũnene wa koti na waĩ mũthwii mũno.
Luke19:3 Nĩwendaa kwona Yesũ amanye nĩwe ũũ
Luke19:4 Kwoou nĩwasembie aendaa mbee na alĩsa mũkũyũnĩ nĩ kana atonye kũmwona Yesũ
Luke19:5 Yĩla Yesũ wavikie vau
Luke19:6 Sakayo nĩwaumie mũtĩnĩ mĩtũkĩ
Luke19:7 Yĩla andũ onthe moonie ũu
Luke19:8 Ĩndĩ Sakayo nĩwaũngamie na eea Mwĩai atĩĩ
Luke19:9 Yesũ nĩwaisye atĩĩ
Luke19:10 Nĩkwĩthĩwa Mwana wa Mũndũ ookie kũmantha na kũtangĩĩa andũ ala au.”
Luke19:11 Andũ o maendee na kwĩthukĩĩsya maũndũ asu
Luke19:12 Nĩwameie atĩĩ
Luke19:13 Atanamba kũthi
Luke19:14 Mũndũ ũsu nĩwamenetwe nĩ andũ
Luke19:15 “Yĩla wasyokie mũsyĩ amina kũtw'ĩkĩthw'a mũsumbĩ
Luke19:16 “Ũla wa mbee nĩwookie na amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke19:17 Nake amwĩa
Luke19:18 Wa kelĩ nake nĩwookie na amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke19:19 Nĩwamwĩie ũsu nake
Luke19:20 “Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũthũkũmi ũngĩ wookie amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke19:21 Nyie nĩnĩnaũkĩaa nũndũ we wĩ mũndũ mũmũ mũno; wosaa syĩndũ ite syaku na ũkethaa kĩla ũtaavanda.’
Luke19:22 Mũnene ũsu amwĩa
Luke19:23 Waleaa ĩndĩ kũtwaa mbesa syakwa vengi nĩkĩ
Luke19:24 “Nĩvo ĩndĩ wameie ala maũngyĩ nake vau atĩĩ
Luke19:25 Ĩndĩ andũ asu mamwĩa
Luke19:26 Nake amasũngĩa amea
Luke19:27 Yu ĩndĩ ala amaitha makwa matendaa ngĩtw'ĩka mũsumbĩ woo
Luke19:28 Yesũ amina kũneena ndeto isu
Luke19:29 Yĩla wathengeeie ndũa yĩtawa Mbethivake na ĩngĩ yĩtawa Mbethani
Luke19:30 amea atĩĩ
Luke19:31 Mwakũlw'a nĩ mũndũ
Luke19:32 Kwoou nĩmaendie na mamyona o ũndũ wamatavĩtye.
Luke19:33 Maendee na kũthasya ndena ĩsu
Luke19:34 Namo masũngĩa masya
Luke19:35 Nĩmatwaĩie Yesũ ndena ĩsu. Nĩvo ĩndĩ mailĩĩile ngũa syoo mũongo kwayo
Luke19:36 Yesũ aendete akuĩtwe nĩ ndena ĩsu
Luke19:37 Athengee mũsyĩ wa Yelũsalemu e kĩtheeonĩ kya Kĩĩma kya Mĩthata
Luke19:38 Nĩmaasya atĩĩ
Luke19:39 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Avalisi amwe maĩ ĩkomanonĩ yĩu mamwĩie Yesũ atĩĩ
Luke19:40 Nake Yesũ amasũngĩa amea atĩĩ
Luke19:41 Yĩla Yesũ wathengeeie mũsyĩ wa Yelũsalemu na awona
Luke19:42 ayasya atĩĩ
Luke19:43 Ĩvinda nĩyũkĩte yĩla amaitha maku makomba ivumbu ikũthyũlũlũkĩte. Makakũthyũlũlũka na maikũvinganĩsya kuma ngalĩko syonthe.
Luke19:44 Makakwananga vyũ vamwe na andũ ala matũaa nthĩnĩ waku. Vai ĩvia makatia mataomboete. Makeeka ũu nũndũ ndwaaenda kũmanya ĩvinda yĩla Ngai wookie akwovosye.”
Luke19:45 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ waendie alika Ĩkalũnĩ
Luke19:46 akĩmea atĩĩ
Luke19:47 Yesũ nĩwamanyĩasya Ĩkalũnĩ kĩla mũthenya. Athembi anene na amanyĩsya ma Mĩao na atongoi ma andũ nĩmamanthaa ũndũ matonya kũmũaa
Luke19:48 ĩndĩ mayaaona nzĩa meka ũu
Luke20:1 Mũthenya ũmwe Yesũ e Ĩkalũnĩ akĩmanyĩsya andũ na kũtavany'a Ũvoo Mũseo
Luke20:2 na mamũkũlya atĩĩ
Luke20:3 Yesũ amasũngĩa amea atĩĩ
Luke20:4 Yoana anengetwe ũkũmũ wa kũvatisa nĩ andũ kana anengetwe nĩ Ngai?”
Luke20:5 Namo mambĩĩa kũoany'a maikũlany'a atĩĩ
Luke20:6 Na tũkasya
Luke20:7 Kwoou nĩmasũngĩie Yesũ mamwĩa atĩĩ
Luke20:8 Nake Yesũ amea
Luke20:9 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ watavisye andũ na ngelekany'o amea: “Ve mũndũ ũmwe wavandie mũũndanĩ wake wa mĩsavivũ na aũkomboethya aĩmi
Luke20:10 Yĩla ĩvinda ya kũketha nzavivũ yavikie
Luke20:11 Mwene mũũnda nĩwatũmie mũthũkũmi ũngĩ
Luke20:12 Nĩwatũmie mũthũkũmi wa katatũ
Luke20:13 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mwene mũũnda weekũlilye
Luke20:14 Ĩndĩ yĩla aĩmi moonie mwana ũsu meeana
Luke20:15 Kwoou mamũtwaa nza wa mũũnda ũsu na mamũaa.” Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wakũlilye andũ atĩĩ
Luke20:16 Akooka amoae
Luke20:17 Yesũ nĩwamasyaisye na amakũlya atĩĩ
Luke20:18 Mũndũ ũla wĩvalũka ĩũlũ wa ĩvia yĩu
Luke20:19 Amanyĩsya ma Mĩao na athembi anene nĩmendie kũmũkwata Yesũ saanĩ ũsu
Luke20:20 Kwoou nĩmambĩĩie kũmantha mwanya mũseo
Luke20:21 Andũ asu nĩmaendie vala ve Yesũ mamwĩa atĩĩ
Luke20:22 Kwa tũtavye
Luke20:23 Ĩndĩ Yesũ nĩwamanyie ũseleke woo na amea atĩĩ
Luke20:24 “Kwa mbony'ei ndinalĩ ĩmwe. Visa ũsu na ĩsyĩtwa yĩu nĩ syaũ?” Namo mamũsũngĩa
Luke20:25 Kwoou Yesũ amea atĩĩ
Luke20:26 Andũ asu mayaatonya kũmũkwatya Yesũ kwĩsĩla ndetonĩ ila waneeneie mbee wa andũ. Ĩndĩ nĩmaseng'ie mũno nĩ ũsũngĩo wake na mavindya.
Luke20:27 Nĩvo ĩndĩ amwe ma Asatũkai
Luke20:28 “Mũmanyĩsya
Luke20:29 Yuĩ
Luke20:30 Ũla ũmũatĩĩe nĩwatwaie mũndũ mũka ũsu
Luke20:31 o na wa katatũ eeka oou. Onthe me mũonza nĩmamũtwaie
Luke20:32 Ĩtina mũndũ mũka ũsu nĩwakwie o nake.
Luke20:33 Yu ĩndĩ
Luke20:34 Yesũ amasũngĩa amea atĩĩ
Luke20:35 ĩndĩ andũ ala makoneka maĩlĩte kũthayũũka kuma kwa akw'ũ ĩvindanĩ yĩu
Luke20:36 Maikethĩwa matonya kũkw'a nũndũ makeethĩwa mailyĩ ta alaĩka
Luke20:37 Naw'o ũndũ wa kũthayũũka kuma kwa akw'ũ
Luke20:38 We ti Ngai wa ala akw'ũ
Luke20:39 Nĩvo ĩndĩ amanyĩsya amwe ma Mĩao mamwĩie atĩĩ
Luke20:40 Ĩtina wa ũu
Luke20:41 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wamakũlilye atĩĩ
Luke20:42 Ndeviti mwene nũneenete ĩvukunĩ ya Savulĩ akasya
Luke20:43 Ĩkala nthĩ ngalĩko ya kw'oko kwakwa kwa aũme
Luke20:44 Ethĩwa ĩndĩ Ndeviti eetie Klĩsto
Luke20:45 Yesũ nĩwatavisye amanyĩw'a make andũ onthe methukĩĩsye amea atĩĩ
Luke20:46 “Ĩsũvĩanei na amanyĩsya ma Mĩao; mendete kũthi mekĩĩte ngũa ndaasa
Luke20:47 Nĩmavenaa aka ndiwa syĩndũ syoo
Luke21:1 Yesũ nĩwasyaĩĩisye andũ
Luke21:2 O ta ũu nĩwoonie kĩveti kĩmwe ndiwa na kĩtaĩ kĩndũ kyeekĩa tũsumunĩ twĩlĩ.
Luke21:3 Nĩvo ĩndĩ waisye atĩĩ
Luke21:4 Nũndũ andũ ala angĩ onthe meumasya nũndũ wa kwingĩvĩwa
Luke21:5 Amanyĩw'a amwe ma Yesũ nĩmaneenaa ĩũlũ wa Ĩkalũ
Luke21:6 “Syĩndũ ii mũkwona
Luke21:7 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mamũkũlilye atĩĩ
Luke21:8 Yesũ amea atĩĩ
Luke21:9 Yĩla mwĩĩw'a ituu sya makaũ na ithokoo mũikaamake
Luke21:10 Nĩwaendeeie na kũmatavya amea atĩĩ
Luke21:11 Kũkeethĩwa itetemo nthũku sya nthĩ
Luke21:12 Ĩndĩ maũndũ aa onthe matanamba kwĩthĩwa nĩmũkakwatwa na kũthĩnw'a. Mũkatwawa nyũmbanĩ sya Ayuti sya kũthaithĩa na kũmbanĩa mũkasilĩlwe na mũyovwa yela. O ta ũu nũndũ wa kwĩthĩwa mwĩ aatĩĩi makwa
Luke21:13 Yĩu yĩkeethĩwa ĩvinda yenyu ya kwĩthĩwa mwĩ ngũsĩ.
Luke21:14 Kwoou tw'ai ngoonĩ syenyu kana mũikambaa kũtinda mũisũanĩa ũndũ mũũthi kũneena
Luke21:15 nũndũ nyie ngamũnenga ũĩ wa kũmanya ndeto sya kũneena
Luke21:16 O na nĩmũkathoow'a nĩ ana-a-inyia menyu
Luke21:17 Mũkamenwa nĩ kĩla mũndũ nũndũ wakwa.
Luke21:18 Ĩndĩ vai ũsw'ĩĩ o na ũmwe wa mĩtwe yenyu ũkaa.
Luke21:19 Kwa kũmĩĩsya kwenyu mũkakwata thayũ ũtathela.
Luke21:20 “Yĩla mũkona Yelũsalemu yathyũlũlũkwa nĩ asikalĩ ma kaũ
Luke21:21 Andũ ala meĩthĩwa Yutia mekĩa mathi iĩmanĩ ĩũlũ. Ala makethĩwa Yelũsalemu nthĩnĩ meuma vo mathi. Namo andũ ala makethĩwa na ku motũinĩ
Luke21:22 Ĩsu ĩkeethĩwa yĩ mĩthenya ya ũĩvanĩsyo
Luke21:23 Tei nĩ kwa aka ala makethĩwa me aito na ala makethĩwa mena twana tũnini tũkwonga! Kũkeethĩwa thĩna mwingĩ mũno ĩũlũ wa nthĩ
Luke21:24 Amwe moo makooawa na mbyũ
Luke21:25 “Maũndũ ma kũseng'ya makeekĩka syũanĩ
Luke21:26 Andũ makatw'ĩka nda nĩ w'ĩa
Luke21:27 Nĩvo ĩndĩ makamwona Mwana wa Mũndũ okĩte e mathweonĩ
Luke21:28 Mwoona maũndũ asu mambĩĩa kwĩkĩka
Luke21:29 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wamatavisye ngelekany'o ĩno: “Kwa sũanĩai ĩũlũ wa mũkũyũ
Luke21:30 Yambĩlĩĩlya kũthongoosya matũ
Luke21:31 No ta ũu
Luke21:32 “Nĩmũtavya w'o
Luke21:33 Ĩtu na nthĩ ikathela
Luke21:34 “Ĩkalaai mwĩsũvĩĩte
Luke21:35 Mũthenya ũsu ũkooka ta mũteo kwa andũ onthe ala me ĩũlũ wa nthĩ.
Luke21:36 Kwoou ĩkalaai mwĩyũmbanĩtye na kũvoyaa kĩla ĩvinda
Luke21:37 Kĩla mũthenya ĩvindanĩ yĩu
Luke21:38 Kĩoko tene kĩla mũthenya
Luke22:1 Ĩvinda nĩyathengeeie ya Mboka ya Mũkate ũte Mbota
Luke22:2 Athembi anene na amanyĩsya ma Mĩao nĩmamanthaa nzĩa ya kũmũaa Yesũ mevithĩte
Luke22:3 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Satani walikile nthĩnĩ wa Yutasi ũla wĩtawa Ĩsikalioti
Luke22:4 Kwoou Yutasi nĩwaendie na aneena na athembi anene na andũ ala masungaa Ĩkalũ
Luke22:5 Nĩmatanie mũno na mamwatha kũmũnenge mbesa.
Luke22:6 Yutasi nĩweetĩkĩlile na ambĩĩa kũmantha mwanya mũseo wa kũmũthoosya Yesũ kũla maĩ andũ matesĩ.
Luke22:7 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũthenya wa Mboka ya Mũkate ũte Mbota wavikie
Luke22:8 Yesũ nĩwatũmie Vetelo na Yoana amea atĩĩ
Luke22:9 Namo mamũkũlya atĩĩ
Luke22:10 Nake amea
Luke22:11 mũyĩa mwene wayo atĩĩ
Luke22:12 Nũkũmwony'a nyũmba nene yĩ ngolovanĩ yĩna kĩla kĩndũ; seũvĩsyai vau.”
Luke22:13 Amanyĩw'a asu nĩmaendie na meethĩa kĩla kĩndũ kĩilyĩ o ũndũ Yesũ wamatavĩtye
Luke22:14 Yĩla saa wavikie
Luke22:15 Nĩwameie atĩĩ
Luke22:16 nũndũ nĩmũtavya w'o
Luke22:17 Yesũ nĩwoosie kĩkombe kĩ ndivai
Luke22:18 nũndũ nĩmũtavya w'o
Luke22:19 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ woosie mũkate
Luke22:20 Kwa nzĩa o ĩsu nĩwamanengie kĩkombe kĩ ndivai ĩtina wa lĩu wa wĩoo ayasya atĩĩ
Luke22:21 “Ĩndĩ manyai kana mũndũ ũla ũkũnthoosya kwa amaitha e o vaa aiya nakwa!
Luke22:22 Kwa w'o Mwana wa Mũndũ ekw'a o kwĩanana na ũtw'ĩo wa Ngai
Luke22:23 Namo mambĩĩa kũkũlany'a nũũ katĩ woo ũtonya kwĩka ũndũ ũsu.
Luke22:24 Ngananĩo nĩyambĩĩe katĩ wa amanyĩw'a ma Yesũ
Luke22:25 Yesũ nĩwameie atĩĩ
Luke22:26 Ĩndĩ ũu ti w'o kwaĩlĩte kwĩthĩwa kũilyĩ katĩ wenyu. Vandũ va ũu
Luke22:27 Nũndũ ũla mũnene nũũ: Nĩ ũla ũilyĩ nthĩ aetewe lĩu
Luke22:28 “Inyw'ĩ nĩmwaendeeie kwĩkala nakwa ĩvindanĩ yũmũ yĩla nĩnaĩ nayo.
Luke22:29 Kwoou o tondũ Ĩthe wakwa wanengie ũkũmũ wa kũsumbĩka
Luke22:30 Mũkaya na kũnyw'a vamwe nakwa ũsumbĩnĩ wakwa
Luke22:31 “Simioni
Luke22:32 Ĩndĩ nĩngũvoyeie nĩ kana ndũkasye mũĩkĩĩo
Luke22:33 Nake Vetelo amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke22:34 Yesũ amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke22:35 Nĩvo ĩndĩ wamakũlilye atĩĩ
Luke22:36 Yesũ amea atĩĩ
Luke22:37 Nĩmũtavya kana Maandĩko Matheu ala maĩtye ‘Nĩwatalanĩlw'e vamwe na avĩtany'a
Luke22:38 Namo mamwĩa atĩĩ
Luke22:39 Yesũ nĩwaumie Yelũsalemu na athi Kĩĩmanĩ kya Mĩthata
Luke22:40 Avika vo nĩweeie amanyĩw'a make atĩĩ
Luke22:41 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ waumie vala maĩ aendanga mbee vanini
Luke22:42 “Asa
Luke22:43 Mũlaĩka kuma ĩtunĩ nĩwamumĩlĩĩle na amũlũlũmĩĩlya.
Luke22:44 Nake aĩ na mathĩna manene ngoonĩ na kwoou ongeleela kũvoya na kĩthing'ĩĩsyo
Luke22:45 Yĩla wookĩlile kuma mboyanĩ
Luke22:46 Nĩwamakũlilye atĩĩ
Luke22:47 Yesũ o aendee na kũneena
Luke22:48 Yesũ nĩwamũkũlilye atĩĩ
Luke22:49 Yĩla amanyĩw'a ala maĩ na Yesũ moonie kĩla kyaĩ vakuvĩ kwĩkĩka nĩmamũkũlilye atĩĩ
Luke22:50 Na ũmwe woo atema mũthũkũmi wa Mũthembi Mũnene amũtila kũtũ kwa ngalĩko ya kw'oko kwa aũme.
Luke22:51 Ĩndĩ Yesũ amea atĩĩ
Luke22:52 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wakũlilye andũ ala mookĩte kũmũkwata
Luke22:53 Yĩla nĩneethĩawa nenyu Ĩkalũnĩ kĩla mũthenya mũyaaĩtĩkĩla kũngwata
Luke22:54 Andũ asu nĩmamũkwatie Yesũ mamũtwaa mũsyĩ kwa Mũthembi ũla Mũnene. Vetelo amaumĩte ĩtina ĩndĩ e vaasa.
Luke22:55 Vaĩ mwaki wavuvĩtwe katĩ kĩwanzanĩ kĩla kyaĩ nza kwa Mũthembi ũla Mũnene
Luke22:56 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mwĩĩtu ũmwe mũthũkũmi wamwonie ailyĩ nthĩ kyeninĩ
Luke22:57 Ĩndĩ Vetelo akaĩa asya
Luke22:58 Ĩtina wa kavinda o kanini
Luke22:59 Ĩtina wa vandũ va ĩsaa yĩmwe
Luke22:60 Ĩndĩ Vetelo asũngĩa asya atĩĩ
Luke22:61 Mwĩai nĩweethyũũie amũsisya Vetelo
Luke22:62 Vetelo nĩwaumaalile nza na aĩa mũno na woo mwingĩ.
Luke22:63 Andũ ala masungaa Yesũ nĩmamũthekeeie na mamũvũa.
Luke22:64 Nĩmamwovie metho na mamũkũlya atĩĩ
Luke22:65 Nĩmamũneeneie syĩndũ mbingĩ makĩmũumanga.
Luke22:66 Kwatheatheana
Luke22:67 “Ethĩwa nue Klĩsto
Luke22:68 na ngamũkũlya ĩkũlyo mũinzũngĩa.
Luke22:69 Ĩndĩ kuma yu Mwana wa Mũndũ akeethĩawa ailyĩ nthĩ ngalĩko ya kw'oko kwa aũme kwa Ngai Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe.”
Luke22:70 Onthe nĩmamũkũlilye atĩĩ
Luke22:71 Namo masya atĩĩ
Luke23:1 Nzama ĩsu yonthe nĩyoombũũkie na yamũtwaa Yesũ kwa Vilato.
Luke23:2 Vau nĩmamũsikatie masya atĩĩ
Luke23:3 Vilato nĩwamũkũlilye atĩĩ
Luke23:4 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Vilato weeie athembi anene na ĩkomano ya andũ yĩla yaĩ vau atĩĩ
Luke23:5 Ĩndĩ mathing'ĩĩsya mũno mayasya atĩĩ
Luke23:6 Yĩla Vilato weewie ũu nĩwakũlilye atĩĩ
Luke23:7 Amina kũmanya kana Yesũ aumĩte kĩsionĩ kĩla Elote wasumbĩkĩte
Luke23:8 Yĩla Elote wamwonie Yesũ
Luke23:9 Nĩwamũkũlilye makũlyo maingĩ
Luke23:10 Athembi anene na amanyĩsya ma Mĩao maũngamĩte vau maendee na kũmũsikatĩĩa Yesũ na kĩthing'ĩĩsyo.
Luke23:11 Elote vamwe na asikalĩ make nĩmamũthekeeie Yesũ na mamũvũthĩĩsya mũno. Nĩvo ĩndĩ mamwĩkĩie ngũa mbanake ya kĩ-ũsumbĩ na mamũtũnga kwa Vilato.
Luke23:12 Kuma mũthenya ũsu
Luke23:13 Vilato nĩweetie athembi anene
Luke23:14 amea atĩĩ
Luke23:15 Elote o nake ndanamwona e na mavĩtyo
Luke23:16 Kwoou nĩĩka kwasya akũnwe ivoko na ngĩmũlekya athi.”
Luke23:17 [Kĩla ĩvindanĩ ya Mboka ya Vasaka
Luke23:18 Andũ onthe nĩmaneenie na wasya mũnene mayasya atĩĩ
Luke23:19 (Valava oovetwe yela nũndũ wa ithokoo syookĩlĩte Yelũsalemu vakoawa andũ.)
Luke23:20 Vilato nĩwaneenie na ĩkomano ĩngĩ nũndũ nĩwendaa athasye Yesũ.
Luke23:21 Ĩndĩ malonzany'a na wasya mũnene mayasya atĩĩ
Luke23:22 Vilato nĩwamakũlilye ĩvinda ya katatũ
Luke23:23 Ĩndĩ maendeea na kũlonzanĩĩlya na wasya mũnene mũno
Luke23:24 Kwoou Vilato amũtw'ĩĩa Yesũ kwĩanana na wendi woo.
Luke23:25 Nĩwamathaĩisye mũndũ ũla meetĩtye
Luke23:26 Asikalĩ mamumaalĩtye Yesũ
Luke23:27 Andũ aingĩ nĩmamũatĩĩie Yesũ
Luke23:28 Yesũ nĩwamavĩndũkĩie amea atĩĩ
Luke23:29 Ĩvinda nĩyũkĩte yĩla andũ makasya
Luke23:30 Nĩvo ĩndĩ makambĩĩa kwĩa iĩma
Luke23:31 Nũndũ ethĩwa nĩmekwĩka maũndũ aa mũtĩnĩ mwĩũ
Luke23:32 O ta ũu vaĩ andũ elĩ ing'endilĩ matwaĩtwe makoawe vamwe na Yesũ.
Luke23:33 Yĩla mavikie vala vandũ vetawa Kĩng'ala nĩmamwambie Yesũ ngelany'onĩ
Luke23:34 Yesũ nĩwaneenie asya atĩĩ
Luke23:35 Andũ nĩmaũngamie vau masyaĩĩsye
Luke23:36 Asikalĩ o namo nĩmamũthekeeie Yesũ. Nĩmathengeeie vala ũĩ na mamũnenga ndivai ngaatu
Luke23:37 na mamwĩa atĩĩ
Luke23:38 Vau ngelany'onĩ ĩũlũ wa mũtwe vaĩ maandĩko maasya
Luke23:39 Kĩng'endilĩ kĩmwe kya isu syambĩtwe vamwe na Yesũ nĩkyamũumangie kĩimwĩa atĩĩ
Luke23:40 Ĩndĩ kĩng'endilĩ kĩla kĩngĩ kyakĩkany'a kĩyasya atĩĩ
Luke23:41 Nyie nĩ naku twatw'ĩĩwa kĩla kĩtwaĩlĩte
Luke23:42 Nĩvo ĩndĩ kĩng'endilĩ kĩu kyamwĩie Yesũ atĩĩ
Luke23:43 Nake Yesũ amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke23:44 Kuma ta saa sita sya mũthenya kũvika saa kenda
Luke23:45 nĩkwĩthĩwa syũa nĩyaekie kumya kyeni. Kĩtambaa kĩla kyatilanĩtye Ĩkalũ nĩkyatembũkanĩle katĩ.
Luke23:46 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wakayie na wasya mũnene asya atĩĩ
Luke23:47 Yĩla mũnene wa asikalĩ ĩana woonie ũndũ kweekĩka
Luke23:48 Andũ onthe ala mookĩte kũsyaĩĩsya
Luke23:49 Anyanyae ma Yesũ onthe na aka ala mookanĩtye nake kuma Kalilii
Luke23:50 Vaĩ mũndũ ũmwe weetawa Yosevu kuma Alimathea
Luke23:51 
Luke23:52 Nĩwaendie vala ve Vilato na amũkũlya amwĩtĩkĩlye kũthi kũveta mwĩĩ wa Yesũ.
Luke23:53 Nĩvo ĩndĩ watheeisye mwĩĩ ũsu kuma ngelany'onĩ
Luke23:54 Mũthenya ũsu kwaĩ Wakatano
Luke23:55 Ala aka mookanĩtye na Yesũ kuma Kalilii nĩmaumie Yosevu ĩtina
Luke23:56 Nĩmasyokie mũsyĩ na maseũvya mĩtĩ ĩnyungaa nesa
Luke24:1 Wakyumwa vaa kũitheatheana
Luke24:2 Nĩmeethĩie ĩvia yĩla yavingĩte mũomonĩ yĩvingilitĩtw'e yĩkauma vau mbũanĩ.
Luke24:3 Ĩndĩ yĩla malikile nthĩnĩ mayaaĩthĩa mwĩĩ wa Mwĩai Yesũ.
Luke24:4 Maendee na kũsaanĩw'a nĩ ũndũ ũsu
Luke24:5 Aka asu me na w'ĩa mwingĩ nĩmakumanĩie nthĩ
Luke24:6 Nde vaa nũthayũũkie. Kwa lilikanai ũndũ wamũtavisye yĩla waĩ Kalilii:
Luke24:7 ‘Mwana wa Mũndũ no nginya anenganwe kwa avĩtany'a ambwe
Luke24:8 Nĩmalilikanile ndeto isu sya Yesũ
Luke24:9 na mauma mbũanĩ mathi matavany'a maũndũ asu onthe kwa ala amanyĩw'a ĩkũmi na ũmwe na kwa andũ ala angĩ.
Luke24:10 Aka asu matavisye atũmwa ũvoo ũsu nĩ Meli Makitalene
Luke24:11 Ĩndĩ amanyĩw'a moosa ndeto isu ta sya mana na malea kũĩkĩĩa aka asu.
Luke24:12 Ĩndĩ Vetelo ookĩla asemba mbũanĩ. Nĩwakumanie akunĩkĩla nthĩnĩ
Luke24:13 Mũthenyanĩ o ũsu
Luke24:14 Maendete makĩea ngewa ĩũlũ wa maũndũ onthe ala maneekĩkie.
Luke24:15 Maendee na kũea ngewa na ũkũlany'a maũndũ
Luke24:16 Nĩmamwonie
Luke24:17 Yesũ nĩwamakũlilye atĩĩ
Luke24:18 Nĩvo ĩndĩ ũmwe woo ũla weetawa Kĩliovasi wamũkũlilye atĩĩ
Luke24:19 Nake Yesũ amakũlya
Luke24:20 Athembi anene na atongoi maitũ nĩmanamũnenganie atw'ĩĩwa kũawa na ambwa ngelany'onĩ.
Luke24:21 Ithyĩ tũneekwatasya kana nĩwe wĩetee andũ ma Ĩsilaeli ũthasyo! Na vamwe na ũu
Luke24:22 Ũndũ ũngĩ
Luke24:23 ĩndĩ mainethĩa mwĩĩ wake. Masyokie mayasya nĩmaumĩlĩĩlwa nĩ alaĩka woninĩ mamea kana nũthayũũkie.
Luke24:24 Amwe ma nguthu yaitũ nĩmaendie mbũanĩ
Luke24:25 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wameie atĩĩ
Luke24:26 Nĩkũlya
Luke24:27 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wamaeleisye maũndũ onthe ala mawetetwe ĩũlũ wake nthĩnĩ wa Maandĩko Matheu
Luke24:28 Yĩla mathengeeie ndũanĩ ĩla maendete
Luke24:29 ĩndĩ amanyĩw'a asu mamwĩsũva maimwĩa atĩĩ
Luke24:30 Yĩla wekalile nthĩ namo maathĩw'e
Luke24:31 Nĩvo ĩndĩ masalukilw'e metho mamũmanya
Luke24:32 Nĩmaneenanisye me elĩ makũlany'a atĩĩ
Luke24:33 Nĩmookĩlile saanĩ o ũsu na masyoka Yelũsalemu
Luke24:34 mayasya atĩĩ
Luke24:35 Nĩvo ĩndĩ amanyĩw'a asu elĩ namo mamaeleisye kĩla kĩkĩkie nzĩanĩ
Luke24:36 O maendee na kũea ngewa ĩsu
Luke24:37 Ĩndĩ nĩmatelemile na makwatwa nĩ w'ĩa maisũanĩa nĩ ĩimũ.
Luke24:38 Yesũ nĩwamakũlilye atĩĩ
Luke24:39 Kwa sisyai moko makwa na maũũ
Luke24:40 Amina kwasya ũu
Luke24:41 O maendee kũlea kũĩkĩĩa nĩ mũyo na kũseng'a nĩwamakũlilye atĩĩ
Luke24:42 Nĩmamũnengie ĩkũyũ ĩkaange
Luke24:43 nake oosa aya masyaĩĩsye.
Luke24:44 Nĩvo ĩndĩ wameie atĩĩ
Luke24:45 Nĩwaamũkisye ilĩko syoo maelewe nĩ Maandĩko Matheu
Luke24:46 na amea atĩĩ
Luke24:47 O ta ũu no nginya andũ matavw'e ũvoo ĩũlũ wa kwĩlila kwondũ wa naĩ syoo
Luke24:48 Inyw'ĩ mwĩ ngũsĩ sya maũndũ aa.
Luke24:49 Nyie ngamũtũmĩa ũla Ĩthe wakwa wathanie
Luke24:50 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ watongoeisye aatĩĩi asu make onthe mauma Yelũsalemu amatwaa Mbethani
Luke24:51 Aendee na kũmaathima nĩwoosiwe kuma vala maĩ ambatw'a ĩtunĩ.
Luke24:52 Nĩmamũthaithie na masyoka Yelũsalemu me na ũtanu mwingĩ.
Luke24:53 Ĩvinda yonthe mekalaa Ĩkalũnĩ maimũtũngĩa Ngai mũvea.
John1:1 Mwambĩlĩĩlyonĩ wa nthĩ Ndeto aĩ kw'o
John1:2 Ndeto ũsu aĩ kw'o kuma mwambĩlĩĩlyonĩ vamwe na Ngai.
John1:3 Kwĩsĩla kwake syĩndũ syonthe nĩsyoombiwe
John1:4 Ndeto ũsu nĩwe kĩtina kya thayũ
John1:5 Kyeni kĩu nĩkĩkenaa kĩvindunĩ na kĩvindu kĩyaakĩkĩlya vinya.
John1:6 Ngai nĩwatũmie mũndũ ũmwe weetawa Yoana
John1:7 ũla wookie ta ngũsĩ akũsĩĩe kyeni kĩu
John1:8 We ti we waĩ kyeni kĩu; ookie kũneena ĩũlũ wakyo.
John1:9 Kĩĩ nĩkyo kyaĩ kyeni kya w'o
John1:10 Ndeto aĩ kũũ nthĩ
John1:11 Ookie nthĩ ĩla yake mwene
John1:12 Ĩndĩ onthe ala mamũthokisye
John1:13 Mayaatw'ĩka syana sya Ngai kwa nzĩa ya kũsyawa
John1:14 Nake Ndeto nĩwatw'ĩkie mũndũ na atũa naitũ
John1:15 Yoana nĩwakũsĩĩie ĩũlũ wake na wasya mũnene asya atĩĩ
John1:16 Kuma wusũunĩ wa mumo wake
John1:17 Nũndũ Mĩao yanenganiwe kwĩsĩla kwa Mwose
John1:18 Vai mũndũ waamwona Ngai
John1:19 Ũũ nĩw'o ũkũsĩ ũla Yoana Mũvatisi waumisye
John1:20 Yoana Nĩwamatavisye ateũmavitha amea atĩĩ
John1:21 Namo mamũkũlya atĩĩ
John1:22 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mamũkũlilye atĩĩ
John1:23 Yoana nĩwamasũngĩie na ndeto sya mwathani Ĩsaia amea: “Nyie nĩ o mũndũ ũkũneena na wasya mũnene e weũnĩ ayasya
John1:24 Namo andũ asu matũmĩtwe nĩ Avalisi
John1:25 mamũkũlya Yoana atĩĩ
John1:26 Yoana amasũngĩa amea atĩĩ
John1:27 Ũsu nĩwe wũkĩte ĩtina wakwa
John1:28 Maũndũ asu onthe meekĩkie Mbethani
John1:29 Ũnĩ ũsu Yoana nĩwamwonie Yesũ okĩte vala ũĩ na asya atĩĩ
John1:30 Ũũ nĩwe ũla naneenaa ĩũlũ wake yĩla naasya
John1:31 Nyie mwene ndyamwĩsĩ
John1:32 Yoana nĩwakũsĩĩie asya atĩĩ
John1:33 Nyie ndyeesĩ nĩwe ũũ
John1:34 Nyie nĩnoonie ũndũ ũsu ũyĩkĩka
John1:35 Mũthenya ũla waatĩĩe
John1:36 Nĩwoonie Yesũ avĩtĩte na amea atĩĩ
John1:37 Amanyĩw'a asu elĩ nĩmeewie kĩla Yoana waweta na mamũatĩĩa Yesũ.
John1:38 Yesũ nĩwavĩndũkie amona mamumĩte ĩtina na amakũlya atĩĩ
John1:39 Yesũ amea atĩĩ
John1:40 Endelea mwana-a-inyia wa Simioni Vetelo
John1:41 Ũndũ wa mbee ũla Endelea weekie waĩ kũmantha mwana-a-inyia Simioni na kũmwĩa atĩĩ
John1:42 Nĩvo ĩndĩ watwaie Simioni vala ve Yesũ. Yesũ nĩwamũsyaisye na amwĩa atĩĩ
John1:43 Mũthenya ũsu ũngĩ waatĩĩe Yesũ nĩwavangie kũthi Kalilii. Kũu nĩweethĩie Vilivũ na amwĩa atĩĩ
John1:44 Vilivũ aĩ wa kuma Mbethisaita
John1:45 Vilivũ nĩwoonie Nathanieli na amwĩa atĩĩ
John1:46 Nake Nathanieli amũkũlya atĩĩ
John1:47 Yesũ nĩwoonie Nathanieli okĩte vala ũĩ na aneena ĩũlũ wake asya atĩĩ
John1:48 Nathanieli amũkũlya atĩĩ
John1:49 Nathanieli amwĩa
John1:50 Yesũ amũkũlya atĩĩ
John1:51 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ waisye atĩĩ
John2:1 Ĩtina wa mĩthenya ĩlĩ
John2:2 Yesũ vamwe na amanyĩw'a make o namo nĩmathoketw'e mũtwaanonĩ ũsu.
John2:3 Yĩla ndivai yathelile
John2:4 Yesũ amũkũlya atĩĩ
John2:5 Nĩvo ĩndĩ inyia wa Yesũ wameie andũ ala mathũkũmaa atĩĩ
John2:6 Vau vaĩ mbisũ thanthatũ sya mavia syatw'ĩĩkanĩtw'e vo
John2:7 Yesũ nĩweeie ala athũkũmi atĩĩ
John2:8 Nĩvo ĩndĩ wameie atĩĩ
John2:9 nake mũũngamĩi wa kyathĩ asama kĩla kĩw'ũ kĩalyũlĩtwe kĩkatw'ĩka ndivai. Ndaamanya vala yauma (no ala athũkũmi mautĩte kĩw'ũ meesĩ)
John2:10 amwĩa atĩĩ
John2:11 Kĩĩ nĩkyo kyama kya mbee kĩla Yesũ weekie
John2:12 Ĩtina wa ũu
John2:13 Ĩvinda ya mboka ya Ayuti ya Vasaka nĩyathengeeie
John2:14 Kũu Ĩkalũnĩ nĩweethĩie andũ maithoosya ng'ombe
John2:15 Nĩwaseũvisye mũsalisa wa ndii na amalũngya onthe kuma Ĩkalũnĩ
John2:16 Nĩvo ĩndĩ weeie andũ ala mathooasya ndumbũ atĩĩ
John2:17 Amanyĩw'a make nĩmalilikanile kana nĩkũandĩkĩtwe Maandĩkonĩ Matheu: “Wendo wakwa kwa nyũmba yaku nũũndya.”
John2:18 Nĩvo ĩndĩ atongoi ma Ayuti mamũkũlilye Yesũ atĩĩ
John2:19 Yesũ nĩwameie atĩĩ
John2:20 Namo mamũkũlya atĩĩ
John2:21 Ĩndĩ ĩkalũ yĩla Yesũ waneenaa ĩũlũ wayo nĩ mwĩĩ wake.
John2:22 Kwoou yĩla wathayũũkie kuma kwa akw'ũ
John2:23 Yesũ e Yelũsalemu ĩvindanĩ ya Mboka ya Vasaka
John2:24 Ĩndĩ Yesũ ndaameyĩelela
John2:25 Ndaĩ na vata wa kũtavw'a nĩ mũndũ ĩũlũ wa andũ
John3:1 Vaĩ mũtongoi ũmwe wa Ayuti na waĩ wa nguthu ya Avalisi weetawa Nikotemo.
John3:2 Mũthenya ũmwe nĩwaendie kwa Yesũ ũtukũ amwĩa atĩĩ
John3:3 Yesũ amũsũngĩa
John3:4 Nikotemo amũkũlya atĩĩ
John3:5 Yesũ amũsũngĩa atĩĩ
John3:6 Mũndũ asyaawa kĩ-mwĩĩ nĩ asyai
John3:7 Ndũkaseng'e nũndũ nakwĩa
John3:8 Kĩseve nĩkĩuutanaa kĩendete ngalĩko ĩla kĩkwenda. Nĩwĩw'aa wasya wakyo
John3:9 Nikotemo amũkũlya atĩĩ
John3:10 Yesũ amũsũngĩa amwĩa
John3:11 Nĩkũtavya w'o
John3:12 Ethĩwa namũtavya maũndũ ma kũũ nthĩ na mwalea kũĩkĩĩa
John3:13 Vai mũndũ waathi ĩtunĩ ate o ũla watheeie kuma ĩtunĩ
John3:14 O tondũ Mwose wookĩlilye nzoka ya kyũma weũnĩ
John3:15 nĩ kana o ũla ũmũĩkĩĩaa atonye kwĩthĩwa na thayũ ũtathela.
John3:16 “Nũndũ Ngai nĩwendete nthĩ mũno
John3:17 Ngai ndaatũma Mwana wake kũũ nthĩ oke kũmĩsilĩla
John3:18 “Mũndũ o na wĩva ũla ũmũĩkĩĩaa Mwana wa Ngai ti mũsilĩle
John3:19 Ũsilĩlo wũkaa nũndũ wa ũndũ ũũ: Kyeni nĩkyookie kũũ nthĩ
John3:20 Andũ onthe ala mekaa ũla ũthũku nĩmamenete kyeni
John3:21 Ĩndĩ mũndũ ũla ũatĩĩaa ũw'o nĩwumĩlaa kyeninĩ
John3:22 Ĩtina wa ũu Yesũ na amanyĩw'a make nĩmaendie nthĩ ya Yutia
John3:23 Yoana o nake nĩwavatisĩaa andũ vandũ vetawa Aenoni vakuvĩ na Salimũ
John3:24 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu Yoana ndaĩ anamba kũvingĩwa yela.
John3:25 Ngananĩo nĩyookĩlile katĩ wa amanyĩw'a ma Yoana na Mũyuti mũna
John3:26 Kwoou nĩmaendie vala ve Yoana mamũkũlya atĩĩ
John3:27 Yoana nĩwamasũngĩie amea atĩĩ
John3:28 Inyw'ĩ mwĩ ngũsĩ kana nĩnaisye: ‘Nyie ti inyie Klĩsto
John3:29 Mũtwawa ethĩawa e wa mũtwaani
John3:30 No nginya nguma ya Yesũ ĩendee kwongeleka na yakwa ĩiendeea kũnyiva.”
John3:31 Ũla wũkĩte kuma ĩũlũ nĩ mũnene kwĩ andũ onthe
John3:32 Atavasya andũ kĩla we mwene wonete na wĩw'ĩte
John3:33 Ĩndĩ mũndũ ũla ũsyĩtĩkĩlĩte nĩwũĩkĩĩthĩtye kwa nzĩa ĩsu kana kĩla Ngai ũneenete nĩ kya w'o.
John3:34 Mũndũ ũla ũtũmĩtwe nĩ Ngai aneenaa ndeto sya Ngai
John3:35 Asa nĩwendete Mwana wake na amũnengete maũndũ onthe.
John3:36 Mũndũ ũla ũmũĩkĩĩaa Mwana e na thayũ ũtathela
John4:1 Mwĩai nĩwamanyie kana Avalisi nĩmew'ĩte kana aendee kũkwata amanyĩw'a aingĩ kũte Yoana na kũmavatisa
John4:2 o na kau ti we wavatisaa ĩndĩ nĩ amanyĩw'a make.
John4:3 Kwoou Yesũ nĩwaumie kũu Yutia asyoka o ĩngĩ Kalilii.
John4:4 Akĩthi kw'o aĩ esĩle Samalia.
John4:5 Kũu Samalia nĩwavikie ndũanĩ yĩtawa Saikale
John4:6 Kĩthima kya Yakovo kyaĩ vau
John4:7 Nĩvo ĩndĩ kĩveti kĩmwe kya kũu Samalia kyookie kũtava kĩw'ũ. Yesũ nĩwakĩie atĩĩ
John4:8 Amanyĩw'a ma Yesũ maĩ manathi ndũanĩ kũthooa lĩu.
John4:9 Kĩveti kĩu Kĩmũsamalia nĩkyamũkũlilye atĩĩ
John4:10 Yesũ akĩsũngĩa
John4:11 Kĩveti kĩu kyamũkũlya atĩĩ
John4:12 Nue mũnene kwĩ ĩthe waitũ Yakovo
John4:13 Yesũ akĩsũngĩa
John4:14 ĩndĩ mũndũ ũla wĩnyw'a kĩw'ũ kĩla nĩmũnenga
John4:15 Kĩveti kĩu kyamwĩa atĩĩ
John4:16 Yesũ akĩsũngĩa
John4:17 Nakyo kĩveti kĩu kyamwĩa atĩĩ
John4:18 Kwa w'o ũtwaĩtwe nĩ aũme makavika atano
John4:19 Kĩveti kĩu kyamwĩa atĩĩ
John4:20 Aaũmae maitũ mathaithĩaa kĩĩmanĩ kĩĩ
John4:21 Yesũ akĩsũngĩa akĩa atĩĩ
John4:22 Inyw'ĩ Asamalia mũthaithaa kĩla mũtesĩ; ithyĩ nĩtwĩsĩ kĩla tũthaithaa nũndũ ũtangĩĩo wumaa kwa Ayuti.
John4:23 Ĩndĩ ĩvinda nĩyũkĩte
John4:24 Ngai nĩ Veva na kwoou ala mamũthaithaa no nginya mamũthaithae nthĩnĩ wa Veva na nthĩnĩ wa w'o.”
John4:25 Kĩveti kĩu kyeea Yesũ atĩĩ
John4:26 Yesũ akĩsũngĩa
John4:27 Saanĩ ũsu amanyĩw'a ma Yesũ nĩmasyokie kuma ndũanĩ
John4:28 Kĩveti kĩu nĩkyatiie mũtũngi wakyo kyasyoka ndũanĩ na kyatavya andũ kyamea atĩĩ
John4:29 “Ũkai mũkone mũndũ wandavya maũndũ onthe ala naaĩka. Nokwĩthĩwa mũndũ ũsu nowe Klĩsto?”
John4:30 Andũ nĩmaumie ndũanĩ mathi vala ve Yesũ.
John4:31 Maũndũ asu maendee
John4:32 Ĩndĩ Yesũ amea
John4:33 Nĩvo ĩndĩ amanyĩw'a make mambĩĩie kũkũlany'a atĩĩ
John4:34 Yesũ amea
John4:35 Inyw'ĩ mũineenaa mũkasya
John4:36 “Mũkethi nũendeeaa na kũĩvwa na ayũmbany'a ngetha kwondũ wa thayũ ũtathela. Kwoou mũvandi na mũkethi makatana ĩmwe.
John4:37 Kwondũ wa ũu ũneeni ũũ nĩ wa w'o: ‘Ũmwe nũvandaa na ũngĩ aiketha.’
John4:38 Nĩmũtũma mũkakethe ngetha mũtaathũkũmĩa; andũ angĩ nĩmo matethisye wĩa
John4:39 Asamalia aingĩ ma ndũa ĩsu nĩmookie vala ve Yesũ nũndũ wa kĩla mataviw'e nĩ kĩla kĩveti kana
John4:40 Kwoou yĩla Asamalia asu mookie vala ve Yesũ
John4:41 Asamalia angĩ aingĩ nĩmamũĩkĩĩie Yesũ kwondũ wa ndeto syake
John4:42 na meea kĩla kĩveti atĩĩ
John4:43 Ĩtina wa kwĩkala mĩthenya ĩlĩ Samalia
John4:44 Yesũ mwene nĩwaĩtye: “Mwathani ndanengetwe ndaĩa nthĩ ĩla wumĩte.”
John4:45 Yĩla wavikie Kalilii andũ ma kũu nĩmamũthokisye nesa
John4:46 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ waendie o ĩngĩ ndũanĩ ya Kena nthĩ ya Kalilii
John4:47 Yĩla weewie kana Yesũ nĩwũkie Kalilii kuma Yutia
John4:48 Yesũ nĩwamwĩie atĩĩ
John4:49 Mũnene ũsu amwĩa atĩĩ
John4:50 Yesũ amwĩa atĩĩ
John4:51 E nzĩanĩ enũkĩte
John4:52 Nĩwamakũlilye atĩĩ
John4:53 Ĩthe wa kamwana kau nĩwalilikanile kana saa isu nosyo Yesũ ũnamwĩie atĩĩ
John4:54 Kĩĩ nĩkyo kyama kya kelĩ kĩla Yesũ weekie ooka Kalilii kuma Yutia.
John5:1 Ĩtina wa maũndũ asu
John5:2 Kũu Yelũsalemu vakuvĩ na mũvĩa wĩtawa Mũvĩa wa Malondu
John5:3 Kũndũnĩ kũu kwakomangaa andũ aingĩ mũno awau na ilalinda
John5:4 nũndũ mũlaĩka wa Ngai nĩwatheeaa mavinda amwe akalika ndianĩ ĩsu akamĩkwaithangya. Mũwau ũla walikaa ndianĩ ĩsu mbee
John5:5 Vau vaĩ mũndũ ũmwe wekalĩte e mũwau vandũ va myaka mĩongo ĩtatũ na nyanya.
John5:6 Yĩla Yesũ woonie mũndũ ũsu na amanya kana atwĩe akomete vau vandũ va ĩvinda ĩasa nĩwamũkũlilye atĩĩ
John5:7 Mũndũ ũsu amũsũngĩa
John5:8 Yesũ amwĩa atĩĩ
John5:9 O vau kwa vau
John5:10 Kwoou atongoi ma Ayuti meea mũndũ ũsu wavoiw'e atĩĩ
John5:11 Ĩndĩ mũndũ ũsu amea atĩĩ
John5:12 Namo mamũkũlya
John5:13 Mũndũ ũsu wavoiw'e ndeesĩ mũndũ ũsu wamũvosya
John5:14 Masaa angĩ
John5:15 Mũndũ ũsu nĩwaendie atavya atongoi ma Ayuti kana Yesũ nĩwe ũmũvoisye.
John5:16 Kwoou Ayuti nĩmambĩĩie kũmũthĩny'a Yesũ
John5:17 Yesũ nĩwamasũngĩie amea atĩĩ
John5:18 Ũneeni ũsu wa Yesũ nĩwatumie atongoi ma Ayuti mathũkĩĩa mũno mayenda kũmũaa
John5:19 Yesũ nĩwameie atĩĩ
John5:20 Asa nũmwendete Mwana na nũmwonasya maũndũ onthe ala we mwene wĩkaa
John5:21 O ũndũ Asa ũthayũũkasya andũ ala akw'ũ na kũmanenga thayũ
John5:22 Asa nde mũndũ ũsilĩlaa; wĩa wa kũsilĩla w'onthe amũnengete Mwana
John5:23 nĩ kana andũ onthe matonye kũmũnenga Mwana ndaĩa
John5:24 “Nĩmũtavya w'o
John5:25 Nĩmũtavya w'o
John5:26 O ũndũ Asa mwene nĩwe kĩtina kya thayũ
John5:27 O ta ũu nĩwamũnengie ũkũmũ wa kũsilĩla andũ
John5:28 Mũikaseng'we nĩ ũndũ ũũ
John5:29 na mayuma mbũanĩ syoo. Ala mekaa meko maseo makathayũũka na kwĩkalaa thayũ
John5:30 “Nyie vai ũndũ ndonya kwĩka na ũkũmũ wakwa mwene; nĩsilaa o ũndũ neew'a kuma kwa Asa
John5:31 “Ngeyumĩsya ũkũsĩ nyie mwene
John5:32 Ĩndĩ ve ũmwe ũla ũngũsĩĩaa
John5:33 Inyw'ĩ nĩmwatũmanie kũla kwĩ Yoana nake akũsĩĩa ũla w'o.
John5:34 Ti atĩ nĩ na vata wa kumĩw'a ũkũsĩ nĩ andũ
John5:35 Yoana aĩ ta taa wakene na kumya kyeni
John5:36 Ĩndĩ nyie nĩ na ũkũsĩ mũnene ĩũlũ wakwa kwĩ ũla wa Yoana
John5:37 Asa ũla ũndũmĩte o nake nĩwumasya ũkũsĩ ĩũlũ wakwa. Inyw'ĩ mũyaaĩw'a wasya wake kana mũkona wũmbo wake
John5:38 o na ndeto syake iitwĩe nthĩnĩ wenyu
John5:39 Mũsomaa Maandĩko Matheu na kĩthing'ĩĩsyo
John5:40 nenyu mũyĩtĩkĩla kũka kwakwa mũkwate thayũ.
John5:41 “Nyie ndiũmantha ndaĩa kuma kwa andũ.
John5:42 Ĩndĩ nĩnĩsĩ kana ngoonĩ syenyu mũimwendete Ngai.
John5:43 Nyie nũkĩte na ĩsyĩtwa ya Ĩthe wakwa
John5:44 Mũkatonya ata ĩndĩ kũĩkĩĩa
John5:45 Mũikasũanĩe kana nyie ngamũsikata kũla kwĩ Asa; Mwose ũla inyw'ĩ mwĩkwatasya nĩwe ũkamũsikata.
John5:46 Kethĩwa kwa w'o nĩmwamũĩkĩĩie Mwose
John5:47 Ĩndĩ ethĩwa mũiĩkĩĩaa kĩla waandĩkie
John6:1 Ĩtina wa ũu
John6:2 Ĩkomano ĩnene ya andũ nĩyamumie ĩtina
John6:3 Yesũ nĩwaendie kĩĩmanĩ ĩũlũ ekala nthĩ vo e na amanyĩw'a make.
John6:4 Mboka ya Vasaka ya Ayuti yaĩ vakuvĩ.
John6:5 Yĩla Yesũ wookĩlilye metho oona ĩkomano ĩnene ya andũ yũkĩte vala ũĩ
John6:6 Amũkũlilye ũu aimũtata
John6:7 Vilivũ nĩwamũsũngĩie amwĩa atĩĩ
John6:8 Mũmanyĩw'a ũngĩ wa Yesũ wĩtawa Endelea
John6:9 “Vaa ve kamwana ke na mĩkate ĩtano ya nganũ ĩla yĩtawa mbaale na makũyũ elĩ
John6:10 Yesũ nĩweeie amanyĩw'a make atĩĩ
John6:11 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ woosie ĩla mĩkate
John6:12 Mamina kũvũna
John6:13 Kwoou nĩmasyũmbanisye mausũsya ikavũ ĩkũmi na ilĩ sya ilungu sya ĩla mĩkate ĩtano ya mbaale
John6:14 Yĩla andũ moonie kyama kĩu Yesũ weeka nĩmaisye atĩĩ
John6:15 Yesũ nĩwamanyie kana andũ meenda kũka mamwose na vinya mamũtw'e mũsumbĩ
John6:16 Kwavika ĩa mawĩoo
John6:17 na malika ĩsiwanĩ mainganĩsye mathi Kavelinaũmu. Kwaĩ kũnatuka na Yesũ ndaĩ anamba kũvika vala maĩ.
John6:18 Kĩseve kĩnene nĩkyauutanaa na kwoou kĩw'ũ kyambĩĩa kũkĩlany'a.
John6:19 Amanyĩw'a mathi ta kĩlomita itano kana thanthatũ
John6:20 ĩndĩ Yesũ amea atĩĩ
John6:21 Nĩmatanie mũno kũmũthokya Yesũ ĩsiwanĩ
John6:22 Ũnĩ ũsu
John6:23 Masiwa angĩ kuma Timbeliasi nĩmavikie vakuvĩ na vala andũ manaĩĩe ĩla mĩkate
John6:24 Nĩvo ĩndĩ andũ asu
John6:25 Yĩla andũ asu mamwonie Yesũ na kũu ngalĩko ĩla ĩngĩ ya ĩia nĩmamũkũlilye atĩĩ
John6:26 Yesũ amasũngĩa amea atĩĩ
John6:27 Mũikethĩny'e mũimantha lĩu ũla wanangĩkaa; thĩnĩkai mũimantha lĩu ũla ũetae thayũ ũtathela. Lĩu ũsu nĩw'o Mwana wa Mũndũ wĩmũnenga
John6:28 Nĩvo ĩndĩ andũ asu mamũkũlilye atĩĩ
John6:29 Yesũ amasũngĩa amea atĩĩ
John6:30 Namo mamwĩa atĩĩ
John6:31 Aaũmae maitũ nĩmaĩe lĩu wĩtawa mana me weũnĩ
John6:32 Yesũ amea atĩĩ
John6:33 Nũndũ mũkate wa Ngai nĩ ũla watheeie kuma ĩtunĩ na ũnengae nthĩ thayũ.”
John6:34 Namo mamwĩa atĩĩ
John6:35 Yesũ amea atĩĩ
John6:36 Ĩndĩ o tondũ nĩmũtavisye
John6:37 Onthe ala Asa ũnengae nĩmokaa kwakwa
John6:38 nũndũ ndyaauma ĩtunĩ nũke kwĩka kwenda kwakwa; nookie kwĩka kwenda kwa ũla ũndũmĩte.
John6:39 Nakw'o kwenda kwa ũsu ũndũmĩte nĩkw'o kũũ: Ndikasye mũndũ o na ũmwe wa ala ũnengete
John6:40 Ĩthe wakwa endaa mũndũ o na wĩva ũla ũmũmanyaa Mwana na ũmũĩkĩĩaa
John6:41 Ayuti nĩmambĩĩie kũnyungunyĩsya nũndũ wa kwĩthĩwa Yesũ aisye
John6:42 Nĩmakũlanilye atĩĩ
John6:43 Yesũ amasũngĩa amea atĩĩ
John6:44 Vai mũndũ ũtonya kũka kwakwa Asa ũla ũndũmĩte atamũetete
John6:45 Ĩvukunĩ ya athani nĩkũandĩkĩtwe
John6:46 Kũu ti kwasya kana ve mũndũ waamwona Asa eka o ũla umĩte kwa Ngai; ũsu nowe wamwonie Asa.
John6:47 Nĩmũtavya w'o
John6:48 Nyie ninyie mũkate ũla ũetae thayũ.
John6:49 Aaũmae menyu nĩmaĩe lĩu wĩtawa mana me weũnĩ
John6:50 Ĩndĩ vaa ve mũkate ũla ũtheeaa kuma ĩtunĩ
John6:51 Ninyie mũkate ũla ũetae thayũ
John6:52 Ayuti nĩmambĩĩie kũteta me oka mayasya atĩĩ
John6:53 Kwoou Yesũ amea atĩĩ
John6:54 Mũndũ ũla ũĩsaa mwĩĩ wakwa na kũnyw'a nthakame yakwa
John6:55 Nũndũ mwĩĩ wakwa nĩ lĩu wa w'o
John6:56 Mũndũ ũla ũĩsaa mwĩĩ wakwa na kũnyw'a nthakame yakwa
John6:57 O tondũ Asa ũla wĩ thayũ ũndũmĩte na nyie ndwĩe thayũ nũndũ wake
John6:58 Kwoou ũũ nĩw'o mũkate ũla watheeie kuma ĩtunĩ. Ndũilyĩ ta mana ĩla aaũmae menyu maĩe na mesa kũkw'a; mũndũ ũla ũĩsaa mũkate ũũ akeethĩwa thayũ tene na tene.”
John6:59 Yesũ aneenie maũndũ asu aimanyĩsya e Kavelinaũmu nyũmbanĩ ya Ayuti ya kũthaithĩa na kũmbanĩa.
John6:60 Aingĩ ma amanyĩw'a ma Yesũ meew'a ndeto isu nĩmaisye atĩĩ
John6:61 Yesũ ateũtavw'a nĩ mũndũ nĩwamanyie kana amanyĩw'a make menyungunyĩsya nũndũ wa ndeto isu
John6:62 Nao kethĩwa nĩmwona Mwana wa Mũndũ akyambata asyoke kũla waĩ mbeenĩ?
John6:63 Veva nĩwe ũetae thayũ; andũ mo ene vai ũndũ meyĩka. Ndeto ila namũtavya nĩ Veva na nĩ thayũ.
John6:64 Ĩndĩ katĩ wenyu kwĩ amwe matekũndĩkĩĩa.” Kuma mwambĩlĩĩlyonĩ Yesũ nĩweesĩ andũ ala mataĩ mamũĩkĩĩa
John6:65 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wameie atĩĩ
John6:66 Kumana na ndeto ila Yesũ waneenie
John6:67 Nĩvo ĩndĩ wakũlilye ala amanyĩw'a ĩkũmi na elĩ atĩĩ
John6:68 Simioni Vetelo amũsũngĩa amwĩa atĩĩ
John6:69 Ithyĩ nĩtũĩkĩĩaa na nĩtũmanyĩte kana we nue ũla Mũtheu wumĩte kwa Ngai.”
John6:70 Yesũ amasũngĩa amea atĩĩ
John6:71 Aneenaa ũu ĩũlũ wa Yutasi mwana wa Simioni Ĩsikalioti
John7:1 Ĩtina wa ũu Yesũ angangĩlaa Kalilii; ndendaa kwanganga Yutia nũndũ atongoi ma Ayuti kũu nĩmendaa kũmũaa.
John7:2 Mboka ya Ayuti ya kwĩkala tũsũmbanĩ twa matũ yaĩ vakuvĩ
John7:3 kwoou ana-a-inyia ma Yesũ mamwĩa atĩĩ
John7:4 Vai mũndũ wĩkaa maũndũ evithĩte ethĩwa eenda kũmanyĩka nĩ andũ. Yu nũndũ we nũkwĩka maũndũ aa
John7:5 Ana-a-inyia make o namo mayaamũĩkĩĩa.
John7:6 Yesũ nake amea atĩĩ
John7:7 Nthĩ ndĩtonya kũmũmena
John7:8 Inyw'ĩ endai mbokanĩ; nyie ndithi mbokanĩ ĩsu nũndũ ĩvinda yĩla yaĩlu kwakwa yĩinamba kũvika.”
John7:9 Aneena ũu
John7:10 Ana-a-inyia ma Yesũ mamina kũthi mbokanĩ
John7:11 Atongoi ma Ayuti nĩmamũmanthaa kũu mbokanĩ maikũlya atĩĩ
John7:12 Andũ aingĩ ĩkomanonĩ yĩu nĩmaneenanasya na kĩwe ĩũlũ wa Yesũ. Amwe maasya
John7:13 Ĩndĩ ũu wĩ o vo
John7:14 Mboka ĩsu yĩ katĩ
John7:15 Atongoi ma Ayuti nĩmaseng'iw'e mũno nĩwe na makũlany'a atĩĩ
John7:16 Yesũ amasũngĩa amea atĩĩ
John7:17 Ethĩwa mũndũ o na wĩva endaa kwĩka kwenda kwa Ngai
John7:18 Mũndũ ũla ũneenaa na ũkũmũ wake
John7:19 Mwose ndamũnengie Mĩao? Ĩndĩ vai ũmwe wenyu ũkwataa mĩao ĩsu. Mwĩenda kũmbũaa nĩkĩ?”
John7:20 Andũ mamũsũngĩa mamwĩa atĩĩ
John7:21 Yesũ amasũngĩa amea
John7:22 Mwose nĩwamũnengie mwĩao wa kwaĩkaa
John7:23 Ethĩwa nĩmũtonya kwaĩka mũndũ o na mũthenyanĩ wa Savato
John7:24 Ekaai kũsilĩla ũndũ kwa kũwona
John7:25 Andũ amwe ma kũu Yelũsalemu nĩmambĩĩie kũkũlany'a atĩĩ
John7:26 Mbona nũũ vaa ũkũneena ũtheinĩ na vai ũndũ meũmwĩa! No kwĩthĩwa atongoi mesĩ kwa w'o kana ũũ nĩwe Klĩsto?
John7:27 Ĩndĩ ithyĩ nĩtwĩsĩ vala mũndũ ũũ wumĩte
John7:28 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ o aendee kũmanyĩsya Ĩkalũnĩ waneenie na wasya mũnene akũlya atĩĩ
John7:29 Nyie nĩnĩmwĩsĩ nũndũ numĩte kwake na nĩwe ũndũmĩte.”
John7:30 Nĩvo ĩndĩ andũ amwe mendie kũmũkwata Yesũ
John7:31 Ĩndĩ ũu wĩ o vo
John7:32 Avalisi nĩmeewie andũ maineena na kĩwe maũndũ asu ĩũlũ wa Yesũ
John7:33 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wameie atĩĩ
John7:34 Inyw'ĩ mũkamantha ĩndĩ mũikambona
John7:35 Atongoi ma Ayuti makũlany'a atĩĩ
John7:36 Kana eweta kyaũ yĩla ũkwasya
John7:37 Mũthenyanĩ wa mũthya wa mboka ĩsu naw'o nĩw'o mũthenya mũnene
John7:38 Mũndũ ũla ũndĩkĩaa
John7:39 Vau Yesũ aneenaa ĩũlũ wa Veva Mũtheu
John7:40 Andũ meew'a ndeto isu sya Yesũ
John7:41 Namo angĩ masya
John7:42 Maandĩko Matheu maĩtye kana Klĩsto akeethĩwa e nzyawa ya Ndeviti
John7:43 Kwoou veethĩwa na ũtilĩkangano katĩ wa andũ ĩũlũ wa Yesũ.
John7:44 Andũ amwe nĩmendie kũmũkwata ĩndĩ vai ũmwe waamũkiita.
John7:45 Ala asikalĩ nĩmasyokie kwa athembi anene na Avalisi namo mamakũlya atĩĩ
John7:46 Asikalĩ mamasũngĩa mamea
John7:47 Avalisi mamakũlya atĩĩ
John7:48 Mũneeĩw'a ũmwe wa atongoi ma Ayuti kana ũmwe wa Avalisi ũmũĩkĩĩe?
John7:49 Ĩndĩ ĩkomano yĩĩ yĩtesĩ Mĩao ya Mwose nĩyĩumanĩe nĩ Ngai!”
John7:50 Nikotemo ũla waendete kwa Yesũ na vau mbeenĩ
John7:51 “Kwĩanana na Mĩao yaitũ tũitonya kũtw'ĩĩa mũndũ ĩvĩtyo tũtambĩte kũmwĩthukĩĩsya tũkamanya ekĩte ata.”
John7:52 Namo mamũsũngĩa mamwĩa atĩĩ
John7:53 Andũ nĩmaendie menũka kĩla mũndũ mũsyĩ kwake.
John8:1 Ĩndĩ Yesũ athi Kĩĩmanĩ kya Mĩthata.
John8:2 Ũnĩ ũsu kwakya tene
John8:3 Amanyĩsya ma Mĩao na Avalisi nĩmaetie mũndũ mũka ũmwe wakwatĩtwe akĩlaalaa
John8:4 Nĩmamwĩie Yesũ atĩĩ
John8:5 na Mĩaonĩ
John8:6 Mamũkũlasya ũu mamũteete nĩ kana matonye kũkwata ũndũ mamũsikata naw'o. Yesũ nĩwakumanie na ambĩĩa kũandĩka nthĩ na kyaa.
John8:7 Yĩla mathing'ĩĩisye kũmũkũlya
John8:8 Nĩwakumanie ĩngĩ na aendeea kũandĩka nthĩ na kyaa.
John8:9 Yĩla meewie ũu
John8:10 Yesũ nĩwaũngalalile na amũkũlya atĩĩ
John8:11 Mũndũ mũka ũsu amwĩa atĩĩ
John8:12 Yesũ nĩwaneenie ĩngĩ na andũ amea atĩĩ
John8:13 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Avalisi mamwĩie atĩĩ
John8:14 Yesũ amasũngĩa amea atĩĩ
John8:15 Mũsilĩlaa na mosũanĩo ma kĩ-mũndũ
John8:16 Ĩndĩ o na ngatw'ĩka nĩngũsilĩla
John8:17 Mĩaonĩ yenyu nĩkũandĩkĩtwe kana ũkũsĩ wa andũ elĩ nĩ wa w'o.
John8:18 Nyie nĩĩyumĩsya ũkũsĩ
John8:19 Kwondũ wa ũu mamũkũlya atĩĩ
John8:20 Yesũ aneenie maũndũ asu aimanyĩsya Ĩkalũnĩ
John8:21 O ĩngĩ Yesũ nĩwameie atĩĩ
John8:22 Nĩvo ĩndĩ atongoi ma Ayuti makũlanilye atĩĩ
John8:23 Yesũ amea atĩĩ
John8:24 Kĩu nĩkyo kĩtumi nĩmwĩie kana mũkakw'ĩĩa naĩnĩ syenyu. Mũkakw'ĩĩa naĩnĩ syenyu mwalea kũĩkĩĩa kana
John8:25 Namo mamũkũlya atĩĩ
John8:26 Nĩna maũndũ maingĩ ma kũneena na kũsilĩla ĩũlũ wenyu. Ĩndĩ we ũla wandũmie nĩ wa w'o
John8:27 Mayaaelewa kana Yesũ ematavasya ĩũlũ wa Asa.
John8:28 Kwoou Yesũ amea atĩĩ
John8:29 Ũsu ũla wandũmie e vamwe nakwa; ndandiĩte nĩ nyioka nũndũ kĩla ĩvinda nĩkaa maũndũ ala mamwendeeasya.”
John8:30 Andũ aingĩ ala meewie Yesũ akĩneena maũndũ asu nĩmamũĩkĩĩie.
John8:31 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wameie Ayuti ala mamũĩkĩĩte atĩĩ
John8:32 na mũkamanya ũla w'o
John8:33 Namo mamwĩa atĩĩ
John8:34 Yesũ amasũngĩa amea atĩĩ
John8:35 Ngombo ndĩtũaa ta ũmwe wa andũ ma mũsyĩ matukũ onthe
John8:36 Ethĩwa Mwana akamũthasya
John8:37 Nĩnĩsĩ kana mwĩ nzyawa sya Avalaamu
John8:38 Nyie nĩneena kĩla nonete kuma kwa Ĩthe wakwa
John8:39 Namo mamũsũngĩa mamwĩa atĩĩ
John8:40 Ĩndĩ yu mwĩenda kũmbũaa
John8:41 Inyw'ĩ mwĩkaa ũndũ ĩthe wenyu weekaa.” Namo mamwĩa atĩĩ
John8:42 Yesũ amea atĩĩ
John8:43 Mwĩtuma mũtaelewa nĩ kĩla ngũneena nĩkĩ? Nĩkwĩthĩwa mũitonya kũmĩanĩsya na ndeto syakwa.
John8:44 Inyw'ĩ ĩthe wenyu nĩ Satani
John8:45 Ĩndĩ nũndũ nyie nĩneena ũla w'o
John8:46 Nũũ katĩ wenyu ũtonya kwasya kana nyie nĩ na naĩ? Ethĩwa nĩneena ũla w'o
John8:47 Mũndũ ũla wa Ngai nĩwĩthukĩĩasya ndeto sya Ngai. Inyw'ĩ mũleaa kũsyĩw'a nũndũ mũi ma Ngai.”
John8:48 Ayuti nĩmamũkũlilye Yesũ atĩĩ
John8:49 Yesũ amasũngĩa amea
John8:50 Ĩndĩ ũu wĩ o vo nyie ndikwĩmanthĩa ndaĩa; ve ũla ũmanthaa ndaĩa ĩsu na nowe ũsilaa.
John8:51 Nĩmũtavya w'o
John8:52 Kwoou Ayuti mamwĩa atĩĩ
John8:53 Nue mũnene kwĩ ĩthe waitũ Avalaamu? We nĩwakwie na athani o namo nĩmakwie. We wĩsũanĩa nue ũũ?”
John8:54 Yesũ amasũngĩa amea atĩĩ
John8:55 Inyw'ĩ mũimwĩsĩ
John8:56 Ĩthe wenyu Avalaamu nĩwatanie nũndũ wa kwĩthĩwa akoona ĩvinda ya kũka kwakwa. Nĩwayonie na eew'a mũyo.”
John8:57 Namo mamwĩa atĩĩ
John8:58 Yesũ amasũngĩa amea atĩĩ
John8:59 Nĩvo ĩndĩ moosie mavia mamũkimange
John9:1 Yesũ avĩtĩte nĩwoonie mũndũ ũmwe waĩ kĩlalinda kuma kũsyawa kwake.
John9:2 Amanyĩw'a nĩmamũkũlilye Yesũ atĩĩ
John9:3 Yesũ amea atĩĩ
John9:4 No nginya tũkatethya wĩa wa ũla ũndũmĩte kwĩ mũthenya; ũtukũ nĩwũkĩte yĩla vate mũndũ ũtonya kũtethya wĩa.
John9:5 Ĩvinda yĩla nĩ kũũ nthĩ
John9:6 Yesũ amina kwasya ũu
John9:7 na amwĩa atĩĩ
John9:8 Nĩvo ĩndĩ atũi make na andũ onthe ala mamwonaa navu mbeenĩ akĩvoya syĩndũ makũlilye atĩĩ
John9:9 Andũ amwe masya
John9:10 Namo mamũkũlya
John9:11 Nake amasũngĩa amea
John9:12 Andũ asu mamũkũlya atĩĩ
John9:13 Nĩvo ĩndĩ andũ asu matwaie mũndũ ũsu wavoetw'e vala ve Avalisi.
John9:14 Mũthenya ũsu Yesũ waluile kataka na kũsalukya metho ma mũndũ ũsu waĩ wa Savato.
John9:15 Kwoou Avalisi o namo makũlya mũndũ ũsu ũndũ wambĩĩie kwona nthĩ
John9:16 Avalisi amwe masya atĩĩ
John9:17 Nĩvo ĩndĩ o ĩngĩ makũlilye mũndũ ũsu waĩ kĩlalinda atĩĩ
John9:18 Ĩndĩ o vamwe na ũu
John9:19 na mamakũlya atĩĩ
John9:20 Namo asyai make masũngĩa masya atĩĩ
John9:21 ĩndĩ ũndũ wambĩĩie kwona nthĩ ithyĩ tũyĩsĩ. O na tũyĩsĩ nũũ ũla ũmũsalukilye metho. Kwa mũkũlyei; we nĩ mũndũ mũima nũtonya kwĩneenea!”
John9:22 Asyai make maneenie ũu nũndũ nĩmakĩaa atongoi ma Ayuti
John9:23 Kĩu nĩkyo kĩtumi asyai make maisye
John9:24 Kwoou nĩmeetie ĩngĩ ũla mũndũ waĩ kĩlalinda mamwĩa atĩĩ
John9:25 Mũndũ ũsu amea
John9:26 Namo mamũkũlya
John9:27 Nake amasũngĩa
John9:28 Namo mamũumanga na mamwĩa
John9:29 Nĩtwĩsĩ kana Ngai nĩwaneenie na Mwose
John9:30 Mũndũ ũsu amea atĩĩ
John9:31 Nĩtwĩsĩ kana Ngai ndethukĩĩasya avĩtany'a; ethukĩĩasya andũ ala mamũkĩaa na mekaa kwenda kwake.
John9:32 Kuma nthĩ yoombwa vayaaĩw'ĩka mũndũ waasalukya metho ma mũndũ ũsyaĩtwe e kĩlalinda.
John9:33 Kethĩwa mũndũ ũsu ndaumĩte kwa Ngai
John9:34 Namo mamũkũlya atĩĩ
John9:35 Yĩla Yesũ weewie kana Avalisi nĩmalũngilye mũndũ ũsu
John9:36 Nake amwĩa
John9:37 Yesũ amwĩa
John9:38 Mũndũ ũsu amwĩa atĩĩ
John9:39 Yesũ amwĩa
John9:40 Avalisi amwe maĩ vau vakuvĩ nake nĩmeewie akĩneena ũu na mamũkũlya atĩĩ
John9:41 Yesũ amasũngĩa
John10:1 Yesũ nĩwameie atĩĩ
John10:2 Ĩndĩ ũla ũlikĩlaa mũomonĩ nĩwe mũĩthi wa malondu.
John10:3 Mũsikalĩ wa mũomonĩ nũmũvingũĩaa na malondu nĩmew'aa wasya wake. Nũmetaa ala make kwa masyĩtwa na kũmaumaalya.
John10:4 Amina kumaalya malondu ala make onthe
John10:5 Mayĩtĩkĩla kũatĩĩa mũeni; vandũ va ũu
John10:6 Yesũ atũmĩie ngelekany'o ĩsu
John10:7 Kwoou Yesũ nĩwamatavisye ĩngĩ amea atĩĩ
John10:8 Ala angĩ onthe mookie mbee wakwa nĩ ing'ei na avutani
John10:9 Nyie ninyie mũomo. Mũndũ o na wĩva ũla wĩlikĩla vala nĩĩ akasũvĩĩka; akalikaa na kumaala na kwona kyaũya.
John10:10 Kĩng'ei kyũkaa nĩ kana kyũye
John10:11 “Nyie ninyie mũĩthi ũla mũseo. Mũĩthi ũla mũseo nĩwĩyumasya akw'e kwondũ wa malondu.
John10:12 Mũndũ wa kũandĩkwa ũte mũĩthi na ũte mwene wa malondu
John10:13 Mũndũ ũsu asembaa akakĩa nũndũ nĩ mũndũ wa kũandĩkwa
John10:14 Nyie ninyie mũĩthi ũla mũseo; nĩnĩsĩ malondu makwa namo nĩmambĩsĩ
John10:15 o ũndũ Asa ũmbĩsĩ nakwa nĩnĩmwĩsĩ. Nyie nĩnĩyumĩtye nĩkw'e kwondũ wa malondu.
John10:16 Nĩna malondu angĩ makwa mate ndĩthyanĩ ĩno. Asu o namo no nginya nĩmaete
John10:17 “Kĩla kĩtumĩte Asa ambenda nĩ kana nĩnĩyumĩtye kũnengane thayũ wakwa nĩ kana nĩwosa ĩngĩ.
John10:18 Vai mũndũ ũkũmbena thayũ wakwa
John10:19 Ndeto isu nĩsyatumie vethĩwa na ũtilĩkangano ĩngĩ katĩ wa Ayuti.
John10:20 Aingĩ moo maasya
John10:21 Ĩndĩ angĩ namo maasya atĩĩ
John10:22 Yelũsalemu kwaĩ mboka ya kũlilikana kũthew'a kwa Ĩkalũ. Ĩvindanĩ yĩu yaĩ ya mbua
John10:23 na Yesũ nĩwatembeangaa Ĩkalũnĩ valandanĩ weetawa valanda wa Solomoni.
John10:24 Ayuti nĩmamũmbĩlĩĩile mamũkũlya atĩĩ
John10:25 Yesũ amasũngĩa amea atĩĩ
John10:26 Ĩndĩ inyw'ĩ mũiĩkĩĩa nũndũ mũi malondu makwa.
John10:27 Malondu makwa nĩmew'aa wasya wakwa; nĩnĩmesĩ namo nĩmangatĩĩaa.
John10:28 Nĩnĩmanengae thayũ ũtathela na kwoou maikakw'a. O ta ũu vai mũndũ ũtonya kũmavulya kuma vala nĩĩ.
John10:29 Ĩthe wakwa ũla wanengie mo nĩ mũnene kwĩ kĩla kĩndũ
