John10:30 Nyie na Asa twĩ kĩndũ kĩmwe.”
John10:31 Ayuti nĩmoosie mavia ĩngĩ mamũkimange Yesũ.
John10:32 Yesũ nĩwameie atĩĩ
John10:33 Namo mamũsũngĩa mamwĩa
John10:34 Yesũ amea atĩĩ
John10:35 Nĩtwĩsĩ kana kĩla Maandĩko Matheu mawetete nĩ kya w'o tene na tene
John10:36 Mũtonya ata ĩndĩ kwasya kana nyie ũla Asa ũnyuvĩte na akandũma kũũ nthĩ
John10:37 Ethĩwa mawĩa ala ngũtethya ti ma Asa
John10:38 ĩndĩ ethĩwa nĩtethya mawĩa make
John10:39 O ĩngĩ nĩmatatie kũmũkwata Yesũ
John10:40 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wainganĩisye Ũsĩ wa Yolotani athi vala Yoana wavatisĩaa navu mbeenĩ. Ailyĩ kũu
John10:41 andũ aingĩ nĩmaendaa vala ũĩ na kwasya atĩĩ
John10:42 Andũ aingĩ ma kũu nĩmamũĩkĩĩie Yesũ.
John11:1 Mũndũ ũmwe watwĩe Mbethani weetawa Lasalo aĩ mũwau. Mbethani nĩyo ndũa ĩla Meli na Matha mwĩĩtu-a-inyia matwĩe.
John11:2 Meli ũsu nĩwe ũla wetĩkĩsye maũũ ma Yesũ mauta me mũuke mũseo
John11:3 Kwoou eĩtu asu masyaanĩw'e nĩmatũmanie kũla kwĩ Yesũ maĩtye atĩĩ
John11:4 Yĩla Yesũ weewie ũvoo ũsu nĩwaisye atĩĩ
John11:5 Yesũ nĩwendete Matha
John11:6 Yesũ amina kũkwata ũvoo kana Lasalo nĩ mũwau
John11:7 Nĩvo ĩndĩ wameie amanyĩw'a make atĩĩ
John11:8 Amanyĩw'a make mamũkũlya
John11:9 Yesũ amakũlya atĩĩ
John11:10 Ĩndĩ mũndũ ũla ũendaa na ũtukũ
John11:11 Yesũ amina kũneena ũu asyokie amea atĩĩ
John11:12 Amanyĩw'a mamũsũngĩa
John11:13 Yesũ awetaa kana Lasalo nĩ mũkw'ũ
John11:14 Kwoou Yesũ amatavya ateũvithany'a amea atĩĩ
John11:15 ĩndĩ kwondũ wenyu nĩ na ũtanu nũndũ ndinaĩ kw'o
John11:16 Tomasi ũla weetawa ĩvatha nĩweeie amanyĩw'a ala angĩ atĩĩ
John11:17 Yĩla Yesũ wavikie Mbethani
John11:18 Mbethani yaĩ ta kĩlomita ilĩ na kĩndũ kuma Yelũsalemu.
John11:19 Kwoou andũ aingĩ kuma kĩsionĩ kĩu nĩmookĩte kũkiakisya Matha na Meli nũndũ wa kĩkw'ũ kya mwana-a-inyia.
John11:20 Yĩla Matha weewie kana Yesũ nĩwũkĩte
John11:21 Matha nĩweeie Yesũ atĩĩ
John11:22 Ĩndĩ o nayu nĩnĩsĩ kana Ngai nũkũũnenga o kĩla ũũmwĩtya.”
John11:23 Yesũ amwĩa atĩĩ
John11:24 Matha nake amwĩa
John11:25 Yesũ amwĩa atĩĩ
John11:26 na ũla wĩ thayũ na ũndĩkĩĩaa
John11:27 Matha amwĩa atĩĩ
John11:28 Matha amina kũweta ũu
John11:29 Meli eew'a ũu nĩwookĩlile mĩtũkĩ athi vala ve Yesũ.
John11:30 Yesũ ndaĩ analika mũsyĩ ũsu; aĩ o vala Matha wakomanĩie nake.
John11:31 Yĩla andũ ala maĩ na Meli nyũmba maimũkiakisya moonie ookĩla na mĩtũkĩ aumaala
John11:32 Meli nĩwavikie vala ve Yesũ
John11:33 Yĩla Yesũ woonie Meli ayĩĩa
John11:34 Nĩwamakũlilye atĩĩ
John11:35 Yesũ nĩwaĩie.
John11:36 Nĩvo ĩndĩ andũ asu maisye
John11:37 Ĩndĩ amwe moo makũlya atĩĩ
John11:38 O ĩngĩ Yesũ e na kĩmako kingĩ nĩwaendie mbũanĩ
John11:39 Nĩwaisye atĩĩ
John11:40 Yesũ amũsũngĩa amwĩa
John11:41 Nĩmavetangie ĩvia yĩu. Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wasyaisye ĩũlũ ĩtunĩ na asya atĩĩ
John11:42 Nĩnĩsĩ kana nũmbĩthukĩĩasya kĩla ĩvinda
John11:43 Yesũ amina kũvoya nĩwaneenie na wasya mũnene asya atĩĩ
John11:44 Mũndũ ũsu waĩ mũkw'ũ nĩwaumaalile alingĩlĩtwe ngũa ya mathiko moko na maũũ na ũthyũ wake ũkovwa na kĩtambaa. Yesũ nĩwameie atĩĩ
John11:45 Andũ aingĩ ala mookĩte kũmũkiakisya Meli
John11:46 Ĩndĩ amwe moo mathi kũla kwĩ Avalisi
John11:47 Kwoou Avalisi na athembi anene moombany'a nzama makũlany'a atĩĩ
John11:48 Twamũeka aendee ũu
John11:49 Ũmwe woo weetawa Kaiava
John11:50 Nũndũ mũteũmanya kana nĩ ũtethyo kwenyu mũndũ ũmwe akw'e kwondũ wa andũ
John11:51 Kaiava ndaaneena ũu kwa ngenda yake
John11:52 na ti kwondũ woo oka
John11:53 Kwoou kuma mũthenya ũsu
John11:54 Nũndũ wa kĩtumi kĩu Yesũ nĩwaekie kũthi eyumĩlĩtye andũnĩ kũu Yutia. Vandũ va ũu nĩwaumie kũu athi ndũanĩ yĩtawa Evalaimu ĩla yĩ vakuvĩ na weũ
John11:55 Ĩvinda ya mboka ya Ayuti ya Vasaka nĩyathengeeie
John11:56 Andũ asu nĩmamanthaa Yesũ kũu
John11:57 Athembi anene na Avalisi nĩmanenganĩte mwĩao makasya mũndũ ũla wĩthĩwa esĩ vala Yesũ ũĩ
John12:1 Mĩthenya thanthatũ mbee wa Mboka ya Vasaka
John12:2 Yesũ nĩwaseũvĩiw'e lĩu wa wĩoo kũu. Matha nĩwanenganae lĩu
John12:3 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Meli woosie nyusu lita ya mauta matheu ma mbesa mbingĩ metawa nando
John12:4 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yutasi Ĩsikalioti
John12:5 “Nĩkĩ mauta aa mateĩ matewa ndinalĩ maana atatũ na mbesa isu iinengwa ngya?”
John12:6 Yutasi ndaasya ũu nĩkwĩthĩwa nĩwathĩnĩkaa kwondũ wa ala ngya
John12:7 Ĩndĩ Yesũ asya atĩĩ
John12:8 Mũkekalaa na ngya mavinda onthe
John12:9 Yĩla andũ mamanyie kana Yesũ e Mbethani
John12:10 Kwoou athembi anene nĩmamũsamĩie Lasalo o nake mamũae
John12:11 nĩkwĩthĩwa Lasalo nĩwe watumaa Ayuti aingĩ mamatia na kũĩkĩĩa Yesũ.
John12:12 Ũnĩ ũsu ĩkomano ĩnene ya andũ ala maĩ manooka mbokanĩ ya Vasaka
John12:13 Nĩmakuie mbonge sya mĩtĩ yĩtawa mĩkĩndũ na mathi kũmũthaũa makĩneena na wasya mũnene mayasya atĩĩ
John12:14 Yesũ nĩwoonie ndena ĩmwe ya ĩng'oi na amĩtũla o tondũ kũandĩkĩtwe nthĩnĩ wa Maandĩko Matheu:
John12:15 “Mũikakĩe andũ ma Yelũsalemu! Mũsumbĩ wenyu nũũ wũkĩte
John12:16 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu amanyĩw'a ma Yesũ mayaaelewa nĩ ũndũ ũsu
John12:17 Andũ ala maĩ na Yesũ ĩvinda yĩla weetie Lasalo kuma mbũanĩ
John12:18 Kĩu nĩkyo kĩtumi andũ aingĩ maendie kũmũthaũa Yesũ
John12:19 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Avalisi meeanie atĩĩ
John12:20 Vaĩ Akiliki amwe katĩ wa andũ ala maendete Yelũsalemu kũthaitha ĩvindanĩ ya mboka ĩsu.
John12:21 Nĩmaendie vala ve Vilivũ ũla waumĩte Mbethisaita nthĩ ya Kalilii mamwĩa atĩĩ
John12:22 Vilivũ nĩwaendie amũtavya Endelea
John12:23 Yesũ nĩwameie atĩĩ
John12:24 Nĩmũtavya w'o
John12:25 Mũndũ ũla ũsũvĩaa thayũ wake e we mwene
John12:26 Mũndũ ayenda kũnthũkũma
John12:27 “Yu ngoo yakwa yĩna kĩũũyũ
John12:28 Asa
John12:29 Andũ ala maũngyĩ vau nĩmeewie wasya ũsu; amwe moo maisye nĩ kĩtandalĩki
John12:30 Ĩndĩ Yesũ amea atĩĩ
John12:31 Yĩĩ nĩyo ĩvinda ya nthĩ ĩno kũsilĩlwa; mũsumbĩ wa nthĩ ĩno akilĩlye kwanangĩwa ũtonyi wake wa kũsumbĩka.
John12:32 Ĩndĩ nyie nakwa nookĩlw'a kuma nthĩ
John12:33 Yesũ aneenie ũu onany'e kĩkw'ũ kĩla wĩkw'a ũndũ kĩĩthĩwa kĩilyĩ.
John12:34 Ĩkomano ya andũ nĩyasũngĩie yasya atĩĩ
John12:35 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wameie atĩĩ
John12:36 Ĩthĩwai na mũĩkĩĩo nthĩnĩ wa kyeni yĩla mwĩ nakyo
John12:37 O na ĩtina wa Yesũ kwĩka syama mbingĩ mũno katĩ woo
John12:38 Ũu weekĩkie nĩ kana wĩanĩsye kĩla mwathani Ĩsaia wawetaa ayasya: “Mwĩai
John12:39 Kwoou mayaĩ matonya kũĩkĩĩa
John12:40 “Ngai nũlindĩte metho moo
John12:41 Ĩsaia aneenie ũu nũndũ nĩwoonete ũkumyo wa Yesũ
John12:42 Ũu wĩ o vo
John12:43 Atongoi asu mendaa mũno kũkathĩĩwa nĩ andũ mbee wa kũkathĩĩwa nĩ Ngai.
John12:44 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ waneenie na wasya mũnene asya atĩĩ
John12:45 Mũndũ ũla ũmbonete nĩwonete ũla ũndũmĩte.
John12:46 Nyie nĩ kyeni. Nookie kũũ nthĩ nĩ kana mũndũ ũla ũndĩkĩĩaa ndakaendee kwĩkala kĩvindunĩ.
John12:47 Ethĩwa mũndũ nĩwĩw'aa ndeto syakwa na ndekaa ũndũ ikwasya
John12:48 Ala matambĩtĩkĩlaa na matetĩkĩlaa ndeto syakwa
John12:49 Nyie ndineenaa na ũkũmũ wakwa
John12:50 Nĩnĩsĩ kana kĩla wĩaĩte kĩetae thayũ ũtathela. Kwoou kĩla nĩneenaa no kĩla Asa ũndavĩtye nĩneene.”
John13:1 Mboka ya Vasaka ĩtanavika
John13:2 Yesũ na amanyĩw'a make nĩmekalĩte nthĩ maiya lĩu wa wĩoo
John13:3 Yesũ nĩweesĩ kana Asa nũmũnengete ũtonyi w'onthe
John13:4 Kwoou nĩwookĩlile mesanĩ
John13:5 Nĩvo ĩndĩ weekĩie kĩw'ũ kalaĩnĩ na ambĩĩa kũthambya amanyĩw'a make maũũ
John13:6 Nĩwavikie vala ve Simioni Vetelo
John13:7 Yesũ amũsũngĩa amwĩa
John13:8 Vetelo amwĩa atĩĩ
John13:9 Simioni Vetelo amwĩa atĩĩ
John13:10 Yesũ amũsũngĩa amwĩa
John13:11 Yesũ nĩweesĩ ũla ũkũmũthoosya
John13:12 Yesũ amina kũthambya amanyĩw'a make maũũ
John13:13 Inyw'ĩ mũmbĩtaa
John13:14 Ethĩwa nyie ĩndĩ nĩ Mwĩai na Mũmanyĩsya wenyu nĩnathambya maũũ menyu
John13:15 Nũndũ nyie nĩnamwony'a ngelekany'o
John13:16 Nĩmũtavya w'o
John13:17 Yu nũndũ nĩmwamanya ũu
John13:18 “Nyie ndiũweta ĩũlũ wenyu inyw'onthe; nĩnĩsĩ ala nĩnyuvĩte. Ĩndĩ no nginya Maandĩko Matheu meanĩe ala maĩtye
John13:19 Nĩmũtavya ũndũ ũsu oyu ũtanamba kwĩkĩka
John13:20 Nĩmũtavya w'o
John13:21 Yesũ amina kũneena maũndũ asu
John13:22 Amanyĩw'a nĩmasianisye mateũmanya nũũ ũla ũkũwetwa.
John13:23 Ũmwe wa amanyĩw'a asu
John13:24 na kwoou Simioni Vetelo amũvenesya amwĩa atĩĩ
John13:25 Mũmanyĩw'a ũsu
John13:26 Yesũ asũngĩa asya atĩĩ
John13:27 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yutasi amina kwosa kamũkate kau walikilwe nĩ Satani. Yesũ nĩwamwĩie atĩĩ
John13:28 Vai ũmwe wa ala maĩ vau mesanĩ waamanya amwĩa ũu nĩkĩ.
John13:29 Amwe masũanĩaa kana nũndũ Yutasi nĩwe mwii wa kĩnandũ
John13:30 Yutasi amina kwosa kala kalungu ka mũkate nĩwaumaalile o vau kwa vau. Kwaĩ ũtukũ.
John13:31 Ĩtina wa Yutasi kumaala
John13:32 Ethĩwa Ngai akwatĩte ũkumyo kwĩsĩla kwa Mwana
John13:33 Syana syakwa
John13:34 Ĩndĩ nĩngũmũnenga mwĩao mweũ: Endanaai inyw'ĩ kwa inyw'ĩ. O tondũ namwendie inyw'ĩ
John13:35 Nĩ kwa kwendana inyw'ĩ kwa inyw'ĩ andũ onthe makamanya kana mwĩ amanyĩw'a makwa.”
John13:36 Simioni Vetelo amũkũlya atĩĩ
John13:37 Vetelo amũkũlya atĩĩ
John13:38 Yesũ amũkũlya atĩĩ
John14:1 Yesũ nĩweeie amanyĩw'a make atĩĩ
John14:2 Kwĩ kũndũ kwingĩ kwa kwĩkala nyũmbanĩ ya Asa
John14:3 Namina kũthi na kũmũseũvĩsya vandũ
John14:4 Nĩmwĩsĩ nzĩa ya kũthi kũla nĩendete.”
John14:5 Tomasi amũkũlya atĩĩ
John14:6 Yesũ amũsũngĩa amwĩa atĩĩ
John14:7 Ethĩwa nĩmũmbĩsĩ
John14:8 Vilivũ amwĩa
John14:9 Yesũ amũkũlya atĩĩ
John14:10 We Vilivũ no ũkũĩkĩĩa kana nyie nĩ nthĩnĩ wa Asa
John14:11 Nĩmwaĩlĩte kũndĩkĩĩa namwĩa kana nyie nĩ nthĩnĩ wa Asa
John14:12 Nĩmũtavya w'o
John14:13 Nakwa ngeeka ũndũ o na wĩva ũla mwĩvoya ĩsyĩtwanĩ yakwa
John14:14 Ethĩwa mũkavoya ũndũ o na wĩva ĩsyĩtwanĩ yakwa
John14:15 “Ethĩwa nĩmũmbendete
John14:16 Nĩvo ĩndĩ nakwa nĩmũvoya Asa
John14:17 Ũsu nĩ Veva ũla wĩmwonasya kĩla kya w'o. Nthĩ ndĩmwĩtĩkĩla nũndũ yo ndĩmwonaa o na ndĩmwĩsĩ. Ĩndĩ inyw'ĩ nĩmũmwĩsĩ nũndũ ekalaa nenyu na e nthĩnĩ wenyu.
John14:18 “Ndikũthi vyũ nĩmũtie ta syana ndiwa; ngooka ĩngĩ vala mũĩ.
John14:19 Vatiele kavinda kanini vyũ na nthĩ ndĩkambona ĩngĩ
John14:20 Mũthenyanĩ ũsu nĩmũkamanya kana nyie nĩ nthĩnĩ wa Asa wakwa
John14:21 “Mũndũ ũla wĩtĩkĩlaa mĩao yakwa na wĩkaa ũndũ ĩkwasya
John14:22 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yutasi
John14:23 Yesũ amũsũngĩa amwĩa atĩĩ
John14:24 Mũndũ ũla ũtambendete ndakwataa momanyĩsyo makwa
John14:25 “Namũtavya maũndũ aa ĩvindanĩ yĩĩ nĩ vamwe nenyu.
John14:26 Ĩndĩ ũla Mũtetheesya
John14:27 “Nĩngũmũtiĩa mũuo; nĩngũmũnenga mũuo wakwa. Ndiũmũnenga w'o ũndũ nthĩ ĩnenganae. Mũikaeke ngoo syenyu syĩthĩwe na kĩũũyũ kana w'ĩa.
John14:28 Nĩmweew'a nasya
John14:29 Namũtavya ũndũ ũsu oyu ũtambĩte kwĩkĩka
John14:30 Ndiendeea kũneena nenyu mbeange wa vau
John14:31 ĩndĩ no nginya nthĩ ĩmanye kana nĩnĩmwendete Asa; kĩu nĩkyo kĩtumaa nĩka kĩla ũndũ kwĩanana na ũndũ ũndavĩtye. “Ũkĩlai
John15:1 “Nyie ninyie mũsavivũ ũla wa w'o
John15:2 Nũtemaa akaveta kĩla kaũvonge ke nthĩnĩ wakwa kala katasyaa
John15:3 Inyw'ĩ nĩmũminĩte kũthew'a kwĩsĩla ndetonĩ ila nĩmũtavĩtye.
John15:4 Ĩkalaai nthĩnĩ wakwa
John15:5 “Nyie ninyie mũsavivũ
John15:6 Mũndũ ũla ũtekalaa nthĩnĩ wakwa nĩwĩkaw'a ĩtheka o tondũ kaũvonge kekaw'a na kayũma. Tũũvonge twa mũthemba ũsu nĩtũmbanaw'a tũkekw'a mwakinĩ na tũivya.
John15:7 Ethĩwa mũkekala nthĩnĩ wakwa
John15:8 Nĩ kwondũ wa ũkumyo wa Asa wakwa mwaĩlwe nĩ kũsyaa ũsyao mwingĩ
John15:9 Ũndũ Asa ũmwendete
John15:10 Ethĩwa mũkeekaa ũndũ mĩao yakwa ĩkwasya
John15:11 “Namũtavya maũndũ asu nĩ kana ũtanu wakwa ũtonye kwĩthĩwa nthĩnĩ wenyu
John15:12 Mwĩao wakwa nĩw'o ũũ: Endanaai ũmwe kwa ũla ũngĩ
John15:13 Vai mũndũ wĩthĩwa na wendo ũthonokete ũũ
John15:14 Mwĩ anyanyawa ethĩwa nĩmwĩkaa kĩla namũtavya.
John15:15 Ndimwosaa ta mwĩ athũkũmi
John15:16 Ti inyw'ĩ mwanyuvie
John15:17 Ũũ ĩndĩ nĩ w'o mwĩao wakwa kwenyu; endanaai ũmwe kwa ũla ũngĩ.
John15:18 “Ethĩwa nthĩ ĩkamũmena
John15:19 Kethĩwa mwĩ ma nthĩ
John15:20 Lilikanai ndeto ila namũtavisye: ‘Vai mũthũkũmi wĩthĩawa e na ũtonyi mwingĩ kwĩ mũnene wake.’ Ethĩwa andũ nĩmanthĩnisye
John15:21 Makamwĩka maũndũ asu onthe nũndũ wakwa
John15:22 Kethĩwa ndyaaũka na nganeena namo
John15:23 Mũndũ ũla ũmenete nyie
John15:24 Kethĩwa nyie ndyĩkĩte katĩ woo maũndũ ala mũndũ ũngĩ o na wĩva ũtaaĩka
John15:25 Ĩndĩ naw'o ũu waĩ wĩkĩke nĩ kana wĩanĩsye kĩla kĩandĩkĩtwe Maandĩkonĩ Matheu: ‘Mamenie o mana.’
John15:26 “Yĩla Mũtetheesya wĩũka
John15:27 O nenyu mũkaneenaa ĩũlũ wakwa
John16:1 “Namũtavya maũndũ aa nĩ kana mũikaluluutĩke maũndũnĩ ma mũĩkĩĩo.
John16:2 Mũkalũngw'a mume nyũmbanĩ sya Ayuti sya kũthaithĩa na kũmbanĩa; kwa w'o ĩvinda nĩyũkĩte yĩla andũ ala makamũaa meonaa o ta meũmũthũkũma Ngai.
John16:3 Makeeka maũndũ asu nũndũ maimwĩsĩ Asa
John16:4 Namũtavya maũndũ asu nĩ kana ĩvinda ya ũndũ ũsu yavika
John16:5 ĩndĩ yu nĩnĩendete kwa ũla wandũmie
John16:6 Ngoo syenyu nĩsyausũwa nĩ kyeva nũndũ namũtavya maũndũ asu.
John16:7 Ĩndĩ kwa w'o ekai nĩmũtavye
John16:8 Yĩla wĩũka
John16:9 Akamamanyĩsya naĩ nĩ myaũ nĩkwĩthĩwa mayĩĩkĩĩaa ndeto ila nĩmatavasya
John16:10 na kũmamanyĩsya ũlũngalu nĩ mwaũ
John16:11 O ta ũu akamamanyĩasya ũsilĩlo wa Ngai nĩ mwaũ
John16:12 “Nĩna maũndũ angĩ maingĩ ma kũmũtavya
John16:13 Ĩndĩ yĩla Veva ũla ũvuanasya ũw'o wĩũka
John16:14 Akandetee ũkumyo nũndũ akamũmanyĩasya kĩla wĩosaa kuma vala nĩĩ.
John16:15 Maũndũ onthe ala Asa wĩ namo nĩ makwa; kĩu nĩkyo kyatuma nasya kana Veva akamũmanyĩasya kĩla wĩosaa kuma vala nĩĩ.
John16:16 “No kavinda kanini katialĩte na mũyĩeka kũmbona
John16:17 Amwe ma amanyĩw'a make nĩmakũlanilye ene kwa ene
John16:18 Nĩmaendeeie na kwasya
John16:19 Yesũ nĩwamanyie kana me na ĩkũlyo na kwoou amakũlya atĩĩ
John16:20 Nĩmũtavya w'o
John16:21 Yĩla mũndũ mũka wĩ vakuvĩ kũsyaa nĩwĩthĩawa na kĩmako nũndũ saa wake wa kwĩw'a woo wa kwaũnya nĩmũviku
John16:22 “Kwoou nenyu mwĩ na kĩmako yu
John16:23 “Yĩla ĩvinda yĩu yĩvika
John16:24 Kũvika vau mũyaaĩtya kĩndũ ĩsyĩtwanĩ yakwa; ĩtasyai na mũkanengawe
John16:25 “Namũtavya maũndũ asu na ngelekany'o. Ĩndĩ ĩvinda nĩyũkĩte yĩla ndakaneena nenyu na ngelekany'o; ngamũtavya ndeũmũvitha ĩũlũ wa Asa.
John16:26 Ĩvinda yĩu yavika mũkamũvoyaa ĩsyĩtwanĩ yakwa
John16:27 Asa we mwene nũmwendete nũndũ inyw'ĩ nĩmũmbendete
John16:28 Naumie kwa Asa nooka kũũ nthĩ
John16:29 Nĩvo ĩndĩ amanyĩw'a make mamwĩie atĩĩ
John16:30 Nĩtwamanya kana nĩwĩsĩ maũndũ onthe
John16:31 Yesũ nĩwamasũngĩie amea atĩĩ
John16:32 Ĩvinda nĩyũkĩte na nĩ ĩviku
John16:33 Namũtavya maũndũ asu nĩ kana mwĩ nthĩnĩ wakwa mwĩthĩwe na mũuo. Mwĩ kũũ nthĩ mũkathĩnaw'a
John17:1 Yesũ amina kũneena ndeto isu
John17:2 nũndũ nũnengete ũkũmũ ĩũlũ wa andũ onthe
John17:3 Thayũ ũtathela nĩw'o ũũ: Kũũmanya we wĩ weka
John17:4 Nĩnĩtumĩte ũkumw'a vaa ĩũlũ wa nthĩ
John17:5 Nayu ĩndĩ Asa
John17:6 “Nĩnĩtumĩte ũmanyĩka nĩ ala wanengie kuma andũnĩ ma nthĩ. Maĩ maku na wanenga mo. Nĩmekaa ũndũ ndeto yaku ĩkwasya
John17:7 na yu nĩmesĩ kana maũndũ onthe ala ũnengete maumĩte kwaku.
John17:8 Nĩnĩmatavĩtye ndeto ila wandavisye na nĩmamyosete; yu nĩmamanyĩte kwa w'o kana naumie kwaku
John17:9 “Nĩvoya kwondũ wa asu; ndiũvoya kwondũ wa nthĩ
John17:10 Kyonthe kĩla nĩ nakyo nĩ kyaku
John17:11 Nyie ndiendeea kwĩkala kũũ ĩũlũ wa nthĩ; nĩnũkĩte kwaku
John17:12 Yĩla nĩnaĩ namo
John17:13 Nĩnũkĩte kũu kwaku
John17:14 Nĩnĩmamanyĩĩtye ndeto yaku
John17:15 Ndiũvoya nĩ kana ũmaumye kũũ ĩũlũ wa nthĩ
John17:16 Mo ti ma nthĩ ĩno
John17:17 Mavathe methĩwe atheu nthĩnĩ wa ũla w'o; ndeto yaku nĩyo w'o.
John17:18 Nĩngũmatũma kũũ nthĩ
John17:19 Kwondũ woo nyie nĩngwĩyumya vyũ kũla ũĩ
John17:20 “Ndiũvoya kwondũ wa aa me oka
John17:21 Nĩvoya nĩ kana onthe methĩwe me kĩndũ kĩmwe. Asa
John17:22 Nĩnĩmanengete ũkumyo o ũla ũnengete
John17:23 Nyie nĩ nthĩnĩ woo naku wĩ nthĩnĩ wakwa
John17:24 “Asa
John17:25 Asa Mũlũngalu! Nthĩ ndĩkwĩsĩ
John17:26 “Nĩnĩtumĩte ũmanyĩka kwoo na ngaendeea na kwĩka ũu
John18:1 Yesũ amina kũvoya mboya ĩsu
John18:2 Yutasi ũla wamũthooisye Yesũ nĩweesĩ vandũ vau
John18:3 Kwoou Yutasi nĩwaendie vo e na kĩkundi kya asikalĩ ma nthĩ ya Loma
John18:4 Yesũ nĩweesĩ maũndũ onthe ala mekwĩkĩka kwake
John18:5 Nĩmamũsũngĩie mamwĩa atĩĩ
John18:6 Yĩla Yesũ wameie atĩĩ
John18:7 Yesũ nĩwamakũlilye o ĩngĩ
John18:8 Yesũ amasũngĩa
John18:9 Aisye ũu nĩ kana kĩla wawetete kĩanĩe: “Nyie ndyaasya o na ũmwe wa ala ũnengete.”
John18:10 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Simioni Vetelo ũla waĩ na ũvyũ
John18:11 Yesũ nĩwamwĩie Vetelo atĩĩ
John18:12 Nĩvo ĩndĩ kĩla kĩkundi kya asikalĩ ma Loma na mũtongoi woo
John18:13 Mbee vyũ nĩmamũtwaie kwa Anasi
John18:14 na nĩwe wanengete atongoi ma Ayuti ũtao
John18:15 Simioni Vetelo na mũmanyĩw'a ũngĩ nĩmaumie Yesũ ĩtina. Mũmanyĩw'a ũsu ũngĩ nĩweesĩkĩwe nĩ Mũthembi Mũnene
John18:16 Vetelo nĩwatiiwe aũngeme naku nza mũomonĩ wa kũlika mũsyĩ ũsu. Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũmanyĩw'a ũsu ũngĩ wasyokie mũomonĩ
John18:17 Mwĩĩtu ũsu mũthũkũmi nĩwakũlilye Vetelo atĩĩ
John18:18 Athũkũmi na asikalĩ nĩmakwatĩtye ĩiko ya makaa nũndũ kwaĩ mbevo
John18:19 Mũthembi Mũnene nĩwakũlilye Yesũ makũlyo ĩũlũ wa amanyĩw'a make na momanyĩsyo make.
John18:20 Yesũ nĩwamũsũngĩie amwĩa atĩĩ
John18:21 Wĩngũlya nyie nĩkĩ? Ndũkũlye ala mew'ĩte kĩla nĩmatavĩtye; nĩmesĩ kĩla nĩneenete.”
John18:22 Yesũ amina kũneena ũu
John18:23 Yesũ amũsũngĩa amwĩa atĩĩ
John18:24 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Anasi wamũnenganie Yesũ e o mwovany'e atwawa kwa Kaiava
John18:25 Simioni Vetelo nĩwaũngyĩ o aendee na kwota mwaki. Andũ ala maĩ vau nĩmamũkũlilye atĩĩ
John18:26 Vetelo nĩwakaĩie asya atĩĩ
John18:27 Vetelo nĩwakaĩie o ĩngĩ
John18:28 Kwakya kĩoko tene
John18:29 Kwoou Vilato nĩwaumaalile nza kũla maĩ na amakũlya atĩĩ
John18:30 Nĩmamũsũngĩie mamwĩa atĩĩ
John18:31 Vilato amea
John18:32 Ũu weekĩkie nĩ kana wĩanĩsye ndeto sya Yesũ
John18:33 Vilato nĩwasyokie nyũmba na eeta Yesũ amũkũlya atĩĩ
John18:34 Yesũ amũkũlya
John18:35 Nake Vilato amũkũlya atĩĩ
John18:36 Yesũ amũsũngĩa amwĩa atĩĩ
John18:37 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Vilato wamũkũlilye atĩĩ
John18:38 Vilato amũkũlya Yesũ atĩĩ
John18:39 Ĩndĩ nũndũ mwĩ kĩmanyĩo kya kũthaĩaw'a mwovwa ũmwe ĩvinda ya Mboka ya Vasaka
John18:40 Nĩmasũngĩie na wasya mũnene masya atĩĩ
John19:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Vilato wamwosie Yesũ amũnengane akũnwe ivoko.
John19:2 Asikalĩ nĩmavĩlanganisye tũũvonge twĩ mĩw'a
John19:3 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mambĩĩie kũthi mbee wake na kũmwĩa atĩĩ
John19:4 Vilato nĩwaumaalile nza ĩngĩ na eea andũ atĩĩ
John19:5 Kwoou Yesũ aumaalw'a nza ekĩĩtwe ngovia ya mĩw'a na ĩla ngũa ndune. Vilato nĩweeie andũ atĩĩ
John19:6 Yĩla athembi anene na asikalĩ ma Ĩkalũ mamwonie Yesũ
John19:7 Andũ asu mamũsũngĩa Vilato mamwĩa atĩĩ
John19:8 Yĩla Vilato weewie ũu
John19:9 Nĩwasyokie nyũmba na amũkũlya Yesũ atĩĩ
John19:10 Vilato amũkũlya atĩĩ
John19:11 Yesũ amũsũngĩa amwĩa atĩĩ
John19:12 Vilato eew'a ndeto isu
John19:13 Yĩla Vilato weewie ndeto isu
John19:14 Kwaĩ ta saa sita sya mũthenya
John19:15 Namo malonzany'a mayasya
John19:16 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Vilato wamũnenganie Yesũ kwoo makamwambe. Kwoou ĩndĩ Asikalĩ nĩmamwosie Yesũ na mamũtongoesya.
John19:17 Nĩwaumaalile ekuĩe ngelany'o yake athi kũvika vandũ vetawa
John19:18 Vau nĩmamwambie Yesũ vamwe na aũme angĩ elĩ: Ũmwe ngalĩko ĩmwe
John19:19 Vilato nĩwaandĩkĩte kĩvwaũ kĩkaathĩĩwa ĩũlũ wa ngelany'o kyaĩtye
John19:20 Andũ aingĩ nĩmasomie kĩvwaũ kĩu nũndũ vala Yesũ wambĩtwe vaĩ vakuvĩ na mũsyĩ wa Yelũsalemu. Nakyo kyaandĩkĩtwe na kĩthyomo kya Kĩevelania
John19:21 Athembi anene nĩmamwĩie Vilato atĩĩ
John19:22 Vilato amasũngĩa
John19:23 Asikalĩ mamina kũmwamba Yesũ
John19:24 Kwoou asikalĩ asu meeana
John19:25 Vau vakuvĩ na ngelany'o ya Yesũ vaũngyĩ inyia wake
John19:26 Yĩla Yesũ woonie inyia wake na mũmanyĩw'a ũla wendete maũngyĩ vau
John19:27 Nĩwamwĩie ũla mũmanyĩw'a nake
John19:28 Yesũ nĩwamanyie kana yu nĩwamina wĩa wake
John19:29 Vau vaĩ nzele yausũĩte ndivai ngaatu na kwoou kasivonzi kaindwa ndivainĩ ĩsu na katonyeew'a mũanginĩ
John19:30 Yesũ amina kũviviita ndivai ĩsu ngaatu asya atĩĩ
John19:31 Nũndũ wa kwĩthĩwa mũthenya ũsu waĩ wa kwĩyũmbanĩsya Savato
John19:32 Asikalĩ nĩmaendie matũla maũũ ma mũndũ wa mbee wa ala mambĩtwe na Yesũ na ma ũla ũngĩ.
John19:33 Ĩndĩ yĩla mavikie vala ve Yesũ
John19:34 Vandũ va ũu
John19:35 Mũndũ ũla woonie ũu ũyĩkĩka nĩwumĩtye ũkũsĩ nĩ kana o nenyu mũtonye kũĩkĩĩa. Ũkũsĩ wake nĩ wa w'o na nĩwĩsĩ kana eneena ũla w'o.
John19:36 Maũndũ asu meekĩkie nĩ kana Maandĩko Matheu meanĩe ala maĩtye atĩĩ
John19:37 O na ve o vandũ vangĩ Maandĩkonĩ Matheu vaĩtye atĩĩ
John19:38 Ĩtina wa ũu
John19:39 Nikotemo
John19:40 Aũme asu me elĩ nĩmoosie mwĩĩ wa Yesũ
John19:41 Vau vakuvĩ na vala Yesũ wambĩtwe vaĩ mũũnda
John19:42 Kwoou nũndũ ũsu waĩ mũthenya wa kwĩyũmbanĩsya Savato na mbũa ndyaĩ vaasa
John20:1 Wakyumwa kĩoko tene vaa kũitheatheana
John20:2 Meli nĩwasyokie asembete athi vala ve Simioni Vetelo na mũmanyĩw'a ũla wendetwe nĩ Yesũ na amea atĩĩ
John20:3 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Vetelo na mũmanyĩw'a ũsu ũngĩ masembie maendete mbũanĩ.
John20:4 Nĩmasembete me elĩ
John20:5 Nĩwakumanie akunĩkĩla na oona ngũa ila syalingĩte mwĩĩ syĩ o vau
John20:6 Simioni Vetelo nĩwookie e ĩtina wake na avĩta alika mbũanĩ. Nĩwoonie ngũa isu vau
John20:7 o vamwe na kĩtambaa kĩla kyalingĩlĩtwe mũtwenĩ wa Yesũ. Kĩtambaa kĩu kĩyaĩ vandũ vamwe na ngũa isu ingĩ
John20:8 Mũmanyĩw'a ũla ũngĩ wavikĩte mbũanĩ mbee o nake nĩwalikile vau nthĩnĩ na oona na aĩkĩĩa.
John20:9 Mayaĩ manavikĩa kũelewa Maandĩko Matheu ala maĩtye kana Yesũ no nginya athayũũke kuma kwa akw'ũ.
John20:10 Nĩvo ĩndĩ amanyĩw'a asu maendie masyoka mĩsyĩ kwoo.
John20:11 Meli nĩwaũngamie nza wa mbũa ĩsu ayĩĩa. O aendee kũĩa
John20:12 na oona alaĩka elĩ meekĩĩte ngũa nzaũ mailyĩ vala mwĩĩ wa Yesũ waiĩtwe; ũmwe vala vaĩ mũtwe
John20:13 Alaĩka asu nĩmamũkũlilye atĩĩ
John20:14 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Meli wathyũũkie na oona Yesũ aũngamĩte o vau
John20:15 Yesũ amũkũlya atĩĩ
John20:16 Yesũ amwĩta
John20:17 Yesũ amwĩa atĩĩ
John20:18 Kwoou Meli Makitalene nĩwaendie kũla kwĩ amanyĩw'a amatavya kana nĩwamwona Mwĩai
John20:19 Ĩa mawĩoo
John20:20 Amina kũmea ũu
John20:21 Yesũ nĩwameie o ĩngĩ atĩĩ
John20:22 Nĩwamaveveeie na amea atĩĩ
John20:23 Ethĩwa mũkaekea mũndũ naĩ syake
John20:24 Tomasi ũmwe wa ala amanyĩw'a ĩkũmi na elĩ
John20:25 Kwoou amanyĩw'a asu nĩmamwĩie atĩĩ
John20:26 Ĩtina wa kyumwa kĩmwe
John20:27 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ waeeie Tomasi atĩĩ
John20:28 Tomasi asũngĩa amwĩa atĩĩ
John20:29 Yesũ amũkũlya
John20:30 Yesũ nĩweekie syama ingĩ mbingĩ amanyĩw'a make mevo itaandĩkĩtwe ĩvukunĩ yĩĩ.
John20:31 Ĩndĩ ii niandĩkĩtwe nĩ kana mũĩkĩĩe kana Yesũ nĩwe Klĩsto
John21:1 Ĩtina wa maũndũ asu
John21:2 Simioni Vetelo
John21:3 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Simioni Vetelo weeie ala angĩ atĩĩ
John21:4 Vaa syũa yĩyuma
John21:5 Yesũ nĩwamakũlilye atĩĩ
John21:6 Nake amea atĩĩ
John21:7 Mũmanyĩw'a ũla wendetwe nĩ Yesũ nĩwamwĩie Vetelo atĩĩ
John21:8 Amanyĩw'a ala angĩ nĩmaendie mavika ũtee me o ĩsiwanĩ nthĩnĩ
John21:9 Yĩla maumie makinya nthĩ
John21:10 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wameie atĩĩ
John21:11 Simioni Vetelo nĩwaendie alika ĩsiwanĩ na akusya kĩla kĩtei akyumya akia nthĩ
John21:12 Yesũ nĩwameie atĩĩ
John21:13 Yesũ nĩwaendie oosa ũla mũkate amanenga
John21:14 Yĩĩ nĩyo yaĩ ĩvinda ya katatũ ya Yesũ kumĩlĩĩla amanyĩw'a make
John21:15 Yĩla maminie kũya lĩu wa kwakya
John21:16 Yesũ nĩwamũkũlilye ya kelĩ
John21:17 Yesũ nĩwamũkũlilye ĩvinda ya katatũ
John21:18 Nĩũtavya w'o
John21:19 Yesũ aneenie ũu onany'e ũndũ kĩkw'ũ kya Vetelo kĩĩthĩwa kĩilyĩ
John21:20 Vetelo nĩwathyũũkie na oona maumĩtwe ĩtina nĩ mũmanyĩw'a ũla wendetwe nĩ Yesũ. Mũmanyĩw'a ũsu nĩwe weeyaĩĩsye kĩthũinĩ kya Yesũ yĩla maĩsaa Mboka ya Vasaka na wamũkũlilye
John21:21 Yĩla Vetelo wamwonie nĩwakũlilye Yesũ atĩĩ
John21:22 Yesũ amũsũngĩa amwĩa atĩĩ
John21:23 Kwoou ndeto nĩsyanyaĩĩkie katĩ wa aatĩĩi ma Yesũ atĩ mũmanyĩw'a ũsu ndakakw'a. Ĩndĩ Yesũ ndaasya kana mũmanyĩw'a ũsu ndakakw'a; aisye
John21:24 Mũmanyĩw'a ũsu nĩwe ũneenete maũndũ aa onthe na kũmaandĩka. Ithyĩ nĩtwĩsĩ kana kĩla ũneenete nĩ kya w'o.
John21:25 Ve maũndũ angĩ maingĩ mũno vyũ Yesũ weekie. Kethĩwa onthe maĩ ma kũandĩkwa
Acts1:1 Kwa Theovilo: Ĩvukunĩ yakwa ya mbee naandĩkie maũndũ onthe ala Yesũ weekie na wamanyĩisye andũ
Acts1:2 kũvika mũthenya ũla wambatie ĩtunĩ
Acts1:3 Ĩtina wa kĩkw'ũ kyake nĩweeyonanisye kũla maĩ mavinda maingĩ
Acts1:4 Ĩvindanĩ yĩmwe o aendee na kwĩkalany'a namo
Acts1:5 Yoana avatisie andũ na kĩw'ũ
Acts1:6 Yĩla atũmwa makomanie vamwe na Yesũ nĩmamũkũlilye atĩĩ
Acts1:7 Yesũ amea atĩĩ
Acts1:8 Ĩndĩ mũkakwata vinya yĩla Veva Mũtheu wĩũka ĩũlũ wenyu
Acts1:9 Yesũ amina kũneena ndeto isu
Acts1:10 Atũmwa asu o maendee na kũng'elela matunĩ Yesũ ambatĩte
Acts1:11 na masya atĩĩ
Acts1:12 Nĩvo ĩndĩ atũmwa asu masyokie Yelũsalemu kuma Kĩĩmanĩ kya Mĩthata
Acts1:13 Mavika nĩmambatie ngolovanĩ vala mekalaa. Atũmwa asu nĩ: Vetelo
Acts1:14 Atũmwa asu nĩmoombanie onthe me na ngoo ĩmwe mavoye
Acts1:15 Mĩthenyanĩ o ĩsu Vetelo nĩwaũngamie katĩ wa aĩkĩĩi ala moombanĩte
Acts1:16 “Mbaitũ
Acts1:17 Yutasi aĩ ũmwe wa nguthu ĩno yaitũ
Acts1:18 (Yutasi nĩwaũie kĩsesi na mbesa ila wanengiwe kumana na ũndũ ũsu mũthũku weekie; nĩwamandanie vau nthĩ aatũka ĩvu
Acts1:19 Andũ onthe ala matwĩe Yelũsalemu nĩmeewie ũvoo ũsu
Acts1:20 Vetelo nĩwaendeeie kwasya atĩĩ
Acts1:21 “Kwondũ wa ũu
Acts1:22 kuma ĩvindanĩ yĩla Yoana wavatisaa andũ kũka kũvika mũthenya ũla Yesũ wambatie ĩtunĩ. Ũsu akakũsĩĩaa andũnĩ vamwe naitũ kana Yesũ nũthayũũkĩte kuma kwa akw'ũ.”
Acts1:23 Kwoou nĩmaũngamisye aũme elĩ: Yosevu ũla weetawa Valisava na nowe weetawa Yasitasi
Acts1:24 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mavoyie mayasya atĩĩ
Acts1:25 nĩ kana athũkũmae ta mũtũmwa mwanyanĩ wa Yutasi
Acts1:26 Nĩmamakũnĩie kula
Acts2:1 Yĩla mũthenya wa Vendekosito wavikie
Acts2:2 Kwa kĩthũlũmũko
Acts2:3 Nĩvo ĩndĩ maumĩlĩĩilwe nĩ syĩndũ ivw'ana mũĩ sya mwaki
Acts2:4 Onthe nĩmausũiwe nĩ Veva Mũtheu
Acts2:5 Kũu Yelũsalemu kwaĩ Ayuti
Acts2:6 Yĩla andũ asu meewie kĩlonzo kĩu
Acts2:7 Maseng'ete na kũsaanĩw'a nĩmakũlanilye atĩĩ
Acts2:8 Mbona ĩndĩ kĩla ũmwe waitũ eĩw'a maineena kĩthyomo kya kũla wumĩte?
Acts2:9 Katĩ waitũ ve Avathiani
Acts2:10 Vilikia
Acts2:11 Ayuti o vamwe na Andũ-ma-mbaĩ-ingĩ ala malikĩte ũthaithinĩ wa Kĩyuti
Acts2:12 Onthe maseng'ete na kũsaanĩw'a nĩmaendeeie na kũkũlany'a
Acts2:13 Ĩndĩ amwe moo nĩmavũthĩĩisye na masya atĩĩ
Acts2:14 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Vetelo waũngamie vamwe na atũmwa ala angĩ ĩkũmi na ũmwe
Acts2:15 Andũ aa mainyw'ĩte ũndũ mũũsũanĩa
Acts2:16 Kĩla kĩ vo nĩ kana ũndũ ũũ nĩ ũla waneeniwe nĩ Ngai kwĩsĩla kwa Mwathani Yoeli akasya:
Acts2:17 ‘Ĩvindanĩ ya mũminũkĩlyo
Acts2:18 Ĩĩ
Acts2:19 Nyie nakwa ngoonany'a maũndũ ma kũseng'ya ĩũlũ matunĩ
Acts2:20 Syũa yĩkaalyũlwa yĩthĩwe kĩvindu
Acts2:21 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũndũ o na wĩva ũla wĩĩkaĩla ĩsyĩtwa ya Mwĩai wĩtangĩĩwa.’
Acts2:22 “Mbaitũ andũ ma Ĩsilaeli
Acts2:23 Mũndũ ũsu nĩwanenganiwe kwenyu o tondũ Ngai watw'ĩte na wavangĩte kuma tene
Acts2:24 Ĩndĩ nake Ngai amũthayũũkya kuma kwa akw'ũ
Acts2:25 Ndeviti nĩwaneenie ĩũlũ wake asya: ‘Nĩnoonie Mwĩai e mbee wakwa mavinda onthe
Acts2:26 Kwoou nĩngũtana na kwĩw'a mũyo ngoonĩ
Acts2:27 nũndũ ndũkaeka thayũ wakwa vala maveva ma ala akw'ũ mekalaa
Acts2:28 We nũmbonetye nzĩa ila ietae thayũ
Acts2:29 “Mbaitũ
Acts2:30 Nĩkwĩthĩwa Ndeviti mwene aĩ mwathani
Acts2:31 Kwoou Ndeviti ayona maũndũ asu makeekĩka nĩwaneenie ĩũlũ wa ũthayũũkyo wa Klĩsto asya
Acts2:32 Yesũ ũsu Ngai nĩwamũthayũũkisye
Acts2:33 Nayu nũndũ nĩwaneneviw'e ekalw'a ngalĩko ya kw'oko kwa aũme kwa Ngai
Acts2:34 Ndeviti mwene ndaambata ĩtunĩ
Acts2:35 kũvika yĩla nĩmaia amaitha maku ungu wa ũtonyi waku.’
Acts2:36 “Kwoou yu andũ onthe ma Ĩsilaeli nĩmamanye nesa ki
Acts2:37 Yĩla andũ asu meewie ndeto isu
Acts2:38 Vetelo amea
Acts2:39 Watho ũsu Ngai aũnenganie kwondũ wenyu na kwondũ wa syana syenyu
Acts2:40 Kwa ndeto ingĩ mbingĩ
Acts2:41 Andũ aingĩ nĩmeetĩkĩlile ndeto syake na onthe mavatiswa
Acts2:42 Andũ asu onthe nĩmaendeeie na kwĩnengane momanyĩsyonĩ ma atũmwa
Acts2:43 Kĩla mũndũ nĩwalikilwe nĩ w'ĩa nũndũ wa syama mbingĩ na maũndũ ma kũseng'ya ala atũmwa meekaa.
Acts2:44 Aĩkĩĩi onthe mekalaa me kĩndũ kĩmwe
Acts2:45 Nĩmathooasya syĩndũ syoo ila maĩ nasyo
Acts2:46 Kĩla mũthenya nĩmakomanaa Ĩkalũnĩ. Nĩmatilaa mũkate me mĩsyĩnĩ kwoo
Acts2:47 makĩmũkumya Ngai na kwendeesya kũla kwĩ andũ onthe. Mwĩai nake nĩwaendeeie kwongeleela kĩla mũthenya nguthunĩ yoo andũ ala matangĩĩawa.
Acts3:1 Mũthenya ũmwe Vetelo na Yoana nĩmaendie Ĩkalũnĩ saa sya kũvoya
Acts3:2 Vau mũomonĩ wa Ĩkalũ
Acts3:3 Yĩla mũndũ ũsu woonie Vetelo na Yoana mokĩte kũlika Ĩkalũnĩ
Acts3:4 Vetelo na Yoana nĩmaketeeie mũndũ ũsu
Acts3:5 Mũndũ ũsu nĩwamasyaisye eteelete mamũnenge kĩndũ.
Acts3:6 Ĩndĩ Vetelo amwĩa
Acts3:7 Nĩwamũkwatie kw'oko kwa aũme amũkĩlya
Acts3:8 Nĩwathaanyũkie aũngama na ambĩĩa kũthi. Nĩwalikile Ĩkalũnĩ e vamwe namo ekinyĩtye
Acts3:9 Andũ onthe ala maĩ vau nĩmamwonie ekinyĩtye na aimũkatha Ngai
Acts3:10 na mamũmanya kana nĩwe ũla ũnekalaa aivoya ũtethyo mũomonĩ wa Ĩkalũ ũla wĩtawa Mũomo Mwanake. Onthe nĩmasaanĩiw'e mũno na maseng'wa nĩ kĩla kyeekĩka kwa mũndũ ũsu.
Acts3:11 Mũndũ ũsu aendee kwĩkwatany'a na Vetelo na Yoana me valandanĩ ũla wĩtawa Valanda wa Solomoni
Acts3:12 Yĩla Vetelo woonie andũ asu nĩwameie atĩĩ
Acts3:13 Ngai wa Avalaamu
Acts3:14 Mwaleile ũla Mũtheu na Mũlũngalu
Acts3:15 Nĩmwooaie ũla ũnenganae thayũ
Acts3:16 Ũtonyi wa Yesũ na mũĩkĩĩo nthĩnĩ wake
Acts3:17 “Nayu mbaitũ
Acts3:18 Ĩndĩ kwa nzĩa ĩno Ngai eanĩsya kĩla waneenete tene kwĩsĩla kwa athani onthe
Acts3:19 Kwoou ĩlilei kwondũ wa naĩ syenyu na mũimũsyokea Ngai
Acts3:20 O ta ũu ĩkai ũu nĩ kana atonye kũmũtũmĩa Klĩsto ũla ũnyuvĩtwe kwondũ wenyu
Acts3:21 Ĩndĩ no nginya Yesũ ekale ĩtunĩ kũvika yĩla wĩtũnga maũndũ onthe methĩwe meũ ĩngĩ
Acts3:22 Mwose nĩwaisye atĩĩ
Acts3:23 Mũndũ ũla ũtakamwĩthukĩĩsya mwathani ũsu akavetwa vyũ kuma andũnĩ ma Ngai.’
Acts3:24 Kwa w'o athani onthe ala maathana kwambĩĩa na Samũeli
Acts3:25 Mawatho ala Ngai wathanie kwĩsĩla kwa athani nĩ kwondũ wenyu
Acts3:26 Kwoou yĩla Ngai wookĩlilye mũthũkũmi wake
Acts4:1 Vetelo na Yoana o maendee na kũneena na andũ
Acts4:2 Mookie me athatu mũno nũndũ atũmwa asu nĩmamanyĩasya andũ
Acts4:3 Nĩmamakwatie mamavingĩa yela meteele kũvike ũnĩ ũsu nũndũ kwaĩ kũnatuka.
Acts4:4 Ĩndĩ aingĩ katĩ wa ala meewie ũtavany'a ũsu maũĩkĩĩa
Acts4:5 Ũnĩ ũsu atongoi ma Ayuti
Acts4:6 me na Anasi Mũthembi ũla Mũnene
Acts4:7 Nĩmaetie Vetelo na Yoana mbee woo na mamakũlya atĩĩ
Acts4:8 Vetelo ausũĩtwe nĩ Veva Mũtheu nĩwamasũngĩie amea atĩĩ
Acts4:9 ethĩwa twĩsilĩthw'a ũmũnthĩ nũndũ wa ũndũ ũseo ũneekiwe mũndũ ũnatwĩe e na maũũ mathũku
Acts4:10 ekai nĩmũtavye inyw'onthe o vamwe na andũ onthe ma Ĩsilaeli
Acts4:11 Yesũ ũsu nĩwe: ‘Ĩvia yĩla inyw'ĩ aki ma myako mwaleile
Acts4:12 Vai mũndũ ũngĩ ũtonya kũtangĩĩa andũ
Acts4:13 Atumĩa asu ma nzama nĩmaseng'ie mũno moona ũndũ Vetelo na Yoana maĩ na ũkũmbaũ wĩana
Acts4:14 Ĩndĩ vai ũndũ maĩ maneena
Acts4:15 Atumĩa asu ma nzama nĩmameie nĩmambe kumaala
Acts4:16 maikũlany'a atĩĩ
Acts4:17 Ĩndĩ nĩ kana tũsiĩĩe ũndũ ũũ ndũkaendee andũnĩ mbee wa vau
Acts4:18 Kwoou nĩmametie ĩngĩ malike
Acts4:19 Ĩndĩ Vetelo na Yoana mamasũngĩa atĩĩ
Acts4:20 Ithyĩ tũitonya kũeka kũneena ĩũlũ wa maũndũ ala twonete na twĩw'ĩte.”
Acts4:21 Kwoou atongoi asu mamina kũmakany'a ĩngĩ mamathũkĩe mũno nĩmamalekilye mathi. Mayaĩ na nzĩa ya kũmasilĩla
Acts4:22 nĩkwĩthĩwa mũndũ ũsu wavoetw'e kwa kyama aĩ na ũkũũ wa myaka mbee wa mĩongo ĩna.
Acts4:23 Vetelo na Yoana mamina kũthaw'a
Acts4:24 Aĩkĩĩi asu meew'a ndeto isu
Acts4:25 nue waneenie kwa nzĩa ya Veva Mũtheu kwĩsĩla kwa ũmae waitũ Ndeviti mũthũkũmi waku wasya atĩĩ
Acts4:26 Asumbĩ ma nthĩ nĩmeyũmbanĩsye kaũ
Acts4:27 Kwa w'o
Acts4:28 Meekie kĩla we mwene kwa ũtonyi waku na kwendanĩ kwaku
Acts4:29 Nayu we Mwĩai
Acts4:30 Onany'a ũtonyi waku kwa kũvosya andũ awau
Acts4:31 Mamina kũvoya
Acts4:32 Kĩkundi kyonthe kya aĩkĩĩi kyeethĩawa na kĩsũanĩo kĩmwe na ngoo ĩmwe. Vai mũndũ o na ũmwe waasya kana syĩndũ ila wĩ nasyo nĩ syake e weka; nĩmaanaa syĩndũ syonthe ila maĩ nasyo.
Acts4:33 Atũmwa nĩmaendeeie na kũkũsĩĩa kũthayũũka kwa Mwĩai Yesũ na vinya mwingĩ
Acts4:34 Vai mũndũ ũmwe nthĩnĩ wa kĩkundi kĩu waanyivĩwa nĩ kĩndũ
Acts4:35 vala ve atũmwa. Mbesa isu nĩsyaaĩawa andũ kwĩanana na vata wa kĩla ũmwe.
Acts4:36 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yosevu
Acts4:37 waendie athoosya kĩtheka kyaĩ kyake na atwaa i mbesa vala ve atũmwa.
Acts5:1 Mũndũ weetawa Anania e na mũka wake Savila
Acts5:2 Nĩwavithie mbesa imwe esene na mũka
Acts5:3 Ĩndĩ Vetelo nĩwamũkũlilye atĩĩ
Acts5:4 Yĩla ũtanakĩthooetye
Acts5:5 Anania eew'a ndeto isu
Acts5:6 Anake nĩmookie malinga mwĩĩ wake
Acts5:7 Ĩtina wa masaa ta atatũ
Acts5:8 Vetelo nĩwamũkũlilye
Acts5:9 Vetelo amwĩa atĩĩ
Acts5:10 O vau kwa vau Savila nĩwavalũkile vakuvĩ na maũũ ma Vetelo na akw'a. Yĩla anake mavikie mamwĩthĩie e mũkw'ũ
Acts5:11 Ĩkanisa yonthe nĩyakwatiwe nĩ w'ĩa mwingĩ
Acts5:12 Atũmwa nĩmeekie syama mbingĩ na maũndũ maingĩ ma kũseng'ya katĩ wa andũ. Aĩkĩĩi onthe moombanaa vamwe me kĩndũ kĩmwe valandanĩ ũla wĩtawa Valanda wa Solomoni.
Acts5:13 Vai mũndũ o na ũmwe ate wa kĩkundi kĩu waatata kwĩkwatany'a namo
Acts5:14 Ũu wĩ o vo
Acts5:15 Kwa kĩtumi kĩu
Acts5:16 O ta ũu andũ aingĩ nĩmookie kuma ndũanĩ ila syĩ ũtee wa Yelũsalemu
Acts5:17 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Mũthembi ũla Mũnene wookĩlile vamwe na andũ ala waĩ namo. Andũ asu maĩ ma kĩkundi kya Asatũkai na nĩmakwatiwe nĩ kĩwĩu kingĩ.
Acts5:18 Nĩmaendie makwata atũmwa na mamavingĩa yela ya andũ onthe.
Acts5:19 Ĩndĩ ũtukũ mũlaĩka wa Mwĩai nĩwavingũie mĩomo ya yela yĩu
Acts5:20 “Endai Ĩkalũnĩ na mũiũngama mũtavye andũ onthe ũvoo ĩũlũ wa mwĩkalo ũũ wa thayũ mweũ.”
Acts5:21 Atũmwa nĩmeewie na kwoou kwakya tene mathi malika Ĩkalũnĩ mambĩĩa kũmanyĩsya. Yĩla Mũthembi ũla Mũnene na andũ ala waĩ namo mavikie
Acts5:22 Ĩndĩ anene ala matũmĩtwe mavika kũu yela
Acts5:23 “Tweethĩa yela yĩvingĩtwe o nesa na asikalĩ makaũngama kũu mĩomonĩ
Acts5:24 Yĩla athembi anene na ũla mũnene wa asikalĩ ala masungaa Ĩkalũ meewie ũvoo ũsu
Acts5:25 Mũndũ ũmwe nĩwookie vala maĩ na amea atĩĩ
Acts5:26 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũnene wa asikalĩ ala masungaa Ĩkalũ waendie e na asikalĩ make na mamaete
Acts5:27 Yĩla mamaetie
Acts5:28 “Tũnamũkanisye twamwĩa mũikaamanyĩsye ĩngĩ ĩsyĩtwanĩ ya Yesũ. Nayu kwa sisyai
Acts5:29 Ĩndĩ Vetelo na atũmwa ala angĩ mamasũngĩa
Acts5:30 Ngai wa aaũmae maitũ nĩwamũthayũũkisye Yesũ kuma kwa akw'ũ
Acts5:31 Ngai nũmũnenevetye akamwĩkalya ngalĩko ya kw'oko kwake kwa aũme akethĩwa mũtongoi na Mũtangĩĩi
Acts5:32 Ithyĩ twĩ ngũsĩ sya maũndũ asu o vamwe na Veva Mũtheu
Acts5:33 Yĩla andũ asu maĩ nzamanĩ meewie ndeto isu
Acts5:34 Ĩndĩ Mũvalisi ũmwe waĩ nzamanĩ ĩsu weetawa Ngamalieli
Acts5:35 Nĩvo ĩndĩ waneenie na andũ asu amea atĩĩ
Acts5:36 Nĩmwĩsĩ kana navu ĩtina ve mũndũ waumĩlĩte weetawa Theundasi aketw'ĩkĩthya mũndũ mũnene
Acts5:37 Ĩtina wa ũsu
Acts5:38 Kwoou o naw'o ũndũnĩ ũũ nyie nĩmwĩa mũikatw'ĩĩe andũ aa ũndũ o na ũmwe; ekanai namo. Ethĩwa mũvango woo kana wĩa woo wumanĩte na mũndũ
Acts5:39 ĩndĩ ethĩwa wumanĩte na Ngai
Acts5:40 Andũ asu nĩmeetĩkĩlanile na ndeto sya Ngamalieli
Acts5:41 Atũmwa asu nĩmaumie vau nzamanĩ me na ũtanu mwingĩ
Acts5:42 Kĩla mũthenya me Ĩkalũnĩ na me mũsyĩ
Acts6:1 Mĩthenyanĩ ĩsu
Acts6:2 Kwoou ala atũmwa ĩkũmi na elĩ nĩmoombanisye aĩkĩĩi onthe na mamea atĩĩ
Acts6:3 Kwoou mbaitũ
Acts6:4 Ithyĩ naitũ nĩtũkwĩnengane maũndũnĩ ma mboya
Acts6:5 Woni ũsu nĩwendeeisye kĩla mũndũ ĩkomanonĩ yĩu
Acts6:6 Nĩmatwaie andũ asu mbee wa atũmwa ala namo mamavoyeie na mamailĩĩla moko.
Acts6:7 Kwoou ndeto ya Ngai nĩyaendeeie na kũnyaĩĩka
Acts6:8 Sitivini ausũĩtwe nĩ mumo wa Ngai na ũtonyi
Acts6:9 Nĩvo ĩndĩ andũ amwe maĩ ma nyũmba ya Ayuti ya kũthaithĩa na kũmbanĩa
Acts6:10 Ĩndĩ mayaatonya kũmũsinda nũndũ wa ũĩ wake
Acts6:11 Nĩvo ĩndĩ kwa kĩmbithĩ meew'anie na andũ amwe mathi makasye atĩĩ
Acts6:12 Kwa nzĩa ĩsu nĩmaingĩanĩisye Sitivini na andũ na atumĩa na amanyĩsya ma Mĩao
Acts6:13 Nĩmookĩlilye andũ maumya ũkũsĩ wa ũvũngũ masya atĩĩ
Acts6:14 Nĩtũmwĩw'ĩte ayasya kana Yesũ kuma Nasaleti akaomboanga Ĩkalũ yĩĩ
Acts6:15 Andũ onthe ala mailyĩ nzamanĩ ĩsu nĩmamũketeeie Sitivini
Acts7:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Mũthembi ũla Mũnene wakũlilye Sitivini atĩĩ
Acts7:2 Nake Sitivini asũngĩa
Acts7:3 na amwĩa atĩĩ
Acts7:4 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Avalaamu wathamie nthĩ ĩsu ya Akalitei athi atũa Aalani. Ĩtina wa kĩkw'ũ kya ĩthe wake
Acts7:5 Ngai ndaamũnenga o na ĩtambya yĩmwe ya nthĩ ĩno yĩtw'ĩke yake mwene
Acts7:6 Ngai nĩwamũtavisye amwĩa atĩĩ
Acts7:7 Ĩndĩ nakwa ngasilĩla andũ asu makaikwata ũkombo
Acts7:8 Kwoou Ngai nĩwaseũvisye ũtianĩo na Avalaamu
Acts7:9 “Aaũmae asu maitũ nĩmamwĩw'ĩie Yosevu mwana-a-inyia woo kĩwĩu
Acts7:10 na nĩwamumasya mathĩnanĩ onthe ala mamũkwataa. O ta ũu Ngai nĩwanengie Yosevu ũĩ mwingĩ na amũtonyethya kwendeesya Valao mũsumbĩ wa Misili
Acts7:11 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu nĩkwookie yũa ĩnene nthĩ yonthe ya Misili na ya Kanaani
Acts7:12 Ĩndĩ yĩla Yakovo weewie kana Misili kwĩ lĩu
Acts7:13 Yĩla masyokie Misili ĩvinda ya kelĩ
Acts7:14 Ĩtina Yosevu nĩwatũmanie kũla kwĩ Yakovo ĩthe wake
Acts7:15 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yakovo waendie Misili vala wakw'ĩĩe vamwe na ana make.
Acts7:16 Mĩĩ yoo nĩyakuiwe yatũngwa Sekemu
Acts7:17 “Ĩvinda yĩthengee Ngai eanĩsye kĩla wathĩte Avalaamu
Acts7:18 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũsumbĩ ũngĩ ũteesĩ ũvoo wa Yosevu wasumbĩkie Misili.
Acts7:19 Nĩwatũmĩĩe andũ maitũ mawũĩ
Acts7:20 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu nĩyo Mwose wasyaiwe
Acts7:21 na yĩla wekiw'e ĩtheka
Acts7:22 Mwose nĩwamanyĩiw'e maũndũ onthe ma ũĩ wa andũ ma Misili
Acts7:23 “Yĩla wavikisye myaka mĩongo ĩna
Acts7:24 Nĩwoonie ũmwe woo aithĩnw'a nĩ Mũmisili
Acts7:25 Mwose asũanĩaa kana andũ asu ma Ĩsilaeli nĩmaeleetwe kana Ngai nũkũmũtũmĩa amovosye
Acts7:26 Mũthenya ũla waatĩĩe nĩweethĩie andũ elĩ ma Ĩsilaeli mayũkita. Nĩwatatie kũmew'anĩthya aimakũlya atĩĩ
Acts7:27 Ĩndĩ ũla wathokoaa ũla ũngĩ aluutĩĩla Mwose ũtee aimwĩa atĩĩ
Acts7:28 Wĩenda kũmbũaa ũndũ ũnooaie Mũmisili ĩoo?’
Acts7:29 Mwose eew'a ndeto isu nĩwakĩie athi kwĩkala ũeninĩ nthĩ ya Mitiani
Acts7:30 “Myaka mĩongo ĩna yathela
Acts7:31 Mwose nĩwaseng'ie mũno oona ũndũ ũsu
Acts7:32 ‘Ninyie Ngai wa aaũmae maku; Ngai wa Avalaamu
Acts7:33 Mwĩai nĩweeie Mwose atĩĩ
Acts7:34 Kwa w'o nyie nĩnonete ũndũ andũ makwa ala me Misili mekũthĩnw'a. Nĩnĩw'ĩte kũluma kwoo na nĩnatheea nĩmavonokye. Ũka yu
Acts7:35 “Mwose o ũsu mamũleile mayasya
Acts7:36 Nĩwamatongoeisye amaumya Misili kwa kwĩka syama na maũndũ ma kũseng'ya kũu Misili. Nĩweekie kyama kĩngĩ Ũkanganĩ Mũtune
Acts7:37 Mwose o ũsu nowe wamatavisye andũ ma Ĩsilaeli amea atĩĩ
Acts7:38 Mwose nowe waĩ na andũ asu ma Ĩsilaeli mombanĩte vamwe o kũu weũnĩ. Nĩwe waĩ vo ta mũtongoi katĩ wa aaũmae maitũ
Acts7:39 “Ĩndĩ aaũmae maitũ nĩmaleile kũmwĩthukĩĩsya. Vandũ va ũu nĩmaleanile nake
Acts7:40 Nĩmeeie Alũni atĩĩ
Acts7:41 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu nĩw'o maseũvisye mũvw'anano wa kasaũ ka ng'ombe
Acts7:42 Kwoou nake Ngai nĩwamatiie na aekana namo mathaithae ndata sya matunĩ
Acts7:43 Mwakuaa ĩeema ya ĩla ngai ya mũvw'anano yĩtawa Moleki
Acts7:44 “Aaũmae maitũ me weũnĩ maĩ na Ĩeema ĩtheu yĩla yoonanasya kana Ngai e vamwe namo. Yaseũvĩtw'e o ũndũ Ngai watavĩtye Mwose ayĩseũvye
Acts7:45 Ĩtina aaũmae maitũ nĩmanengiwe Ĩeema yĩu nĩ aaĩthe moo
Acts7:46 ũla wooneiwe ũseo nĩ Ngai
Acts7:47 Ĩndĩ Solomoni nĩwe wesie kwakĩa Ngai nyũmba.
Acts7:48 “O vamwe na ũu
Acts7:49 Mwĩai easya: ‘Ĩtunĩ nĩ kĩvĩla kyakwa kya kĩ-ũsumbĩ
Acts7:50 Nũndũ ate inyie noombie syĩndũ ii syonthe?’ ”
Acts7:51 Sitivini nĩwaendeeie na kũmea atĩĩ
Acts7:52 Ve mwathani aaũmae menyu mataamũthĩny'a? O na nĩmooaie ala mathanie kũka kwa Ũla Mũlũngalu wa Ngai
Acts7:53 Ninyw'ĩ mwoosie mĩao ya Ngai ĩla mwaeteiwe nĩ alaĩka
Acts7:54 Andũ onthe ala maĩ nzamanĩ ĩsu meew'a ndeto isu sya Sitivini
Acts7:55 Ĩndĩ we ausũĩtwe nĩ Veva Mũtheu nĩwasyaisye ĩũlũ ĩtunĩ
Acts7:56 Nĩvo ĩndĩ waisye atĩĩ
Acts7:57 Andũ asu nĩmalonzanilye na makunĩka matũ moo
Acts7:58 Nĩmamũkusũlanilye mamumaalya nza wa mũsyĩ wa Yelũsalemu
Acts7:59 Sitivini aendee na kũkimangwa nĩwavoyie asya atĩĩ
Acts7:60 Nĩwatheeie atulya ndu na aneena na wasya mũnene asya
Acts8:1 Saũlo nĩwoonie kũawa kwa Sitivini kwĩ kwaĩlu. Mũthenya ũsu aĩkĩĩi ala maĩ Yelũsalemu nĩmambĩĩie kũthĩnw'a mũno
Acts8:2 Andũ maĩ na kĩkĩo kya Ngai nĩmamũthikie Sitivini
Acts8:3 Ĩndĩ Saũlo nake nĩwatatie kwananga ĩkanisa; nĩwaendaa kĩla mũsyĩ akakuthũany'a aĩkĩĩi ma aũme na ma aka
Acts8:4 Aĩkĩĩi ala manyaĩĩkiw'e maendie kĩla vandũ matavanĩtye Ũvoo Mũseo.
Acts8:5 Vilivũ nĩwaendie ndũanĩ yĩ Samalia
Acts8:6 Makomano ma andũ kwa ngoo ĩmwe
Acts8:7 Maimũ malikĩte andũnĩ aingĩ nĩmaumie mauĩte mbu
Acts8:8 Kwoou kwaĩ na ũtanu mũnene ndũanĩ ĩsu.
Acts8:9 Nthĩnĩ wa ndũa ĩsu vaĩ mũndũ ũmwe weetawa Simioni
Acts8:10 na andũ onthe ma kĩla mũthemba
Acts8:11 Mamwĩw'aa nũndũ vandũ va ĩvinda ĩasa nĩwekalĩte aimaseng'ya na syama syake aitũmĩa mowe.
Acts8:12 Ĩndĩ yĩla mamũĩkĩĩe Vilivũ aimatavya Ũvoo Mũseo ĩũlũ wa ũsumbĩ wa Ngai na ĩũlũ wa Yesũ Klĩsto
Acts8:13 Simioni o nake nĩwaĩkĩĩie
Acts8:14 Yĩla atũmwa me Yelũsalemu meewie kana andũ ma Samalia nĩmetĩkĩlile ndeto ya Ngai
Acts8:15 Atũmwa asu elĩ nĩmaendie na mavoyea aĩkĩĩi nĩ kana matonye kũkwata Veva Mũtheu.
Acts8:16 Nĩkwĩthĩwa Veva Mũtheu ndaĩ anamba kũtheea o na kwa ũmwe woo; meekĩte o kũvatiswa ĩsyĩtwanĩ ya Mwĩai Yesũ.
Acts8:17 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Vetelo na Yoana mamailĩĩle moko
Acts8:18 Yĩla Simioni woonie kana aĩkĩĩi manengwa Veva Mũtheu kwa nzĩa ya kwilĩĩlwa moko nĩ atũmwa
Acts8:19 amea atĩĩ
Acts8:20 Ĩndĩ nake Vetelo amwĩa atĩĩ
Acts8:21 Ndwĩ kĩlungu o na kĩmwe kana kĩanda ũthũkũminĩ ũũ
Acts8:22 Kwoou ĩlile kwondũ wa naĩ syaku na ũimũvoya Mwĩai
Acts8:23 Nyie nĩnene kana wĩ na kĩwĩu kingĩ mũno na nĩwovetwe nĩ naĩ ũkalũma ki.”
Acts8:24 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Simioni wameie atĩĩ
Acts8:25 Vetelo na Yoana mamina kumya ũkũsĩ woo ĩũlũ wa Yesũ na kũtavany'a ndeto ya Mwĩai
Acts8:26 Mũlaĩka wa Mwĩai nĩwamwĩie Vilivũ atĩĩ
Acts8:27 Kwoou Vilivũ nĩwookĩlile ambĩĩa kyalo saanĩ ũsu. Mũethiovia ũmwe waĩ mũvakũe
Acts8:28 na yu aĩ nzĩanĩ enũkĩte. Nĩwailyĩ nthĩ ĩkasyanĩ yake aisoma ĩvuku ya mwathani Ĩsaia.
Acts8:29 Veva Mũtheu nĩwamwĩie Vilivũ atĩĩ
Acts8:30 Kwoou Vilivũ asemba ayĩthengeea
Acts8:31 Mũethiovia ũsu nĩwamũsũngĩie amwĩa
Acts8:32 Kĩlungu kya Maandĩko Matheu kĩla mũndũ ũsu wasomaa nĩkyo kĩĩ: “Nĩwatwaiwe ta ĩlondu yĩtwaĩtwe kũthĩnzwa
Acts8:33 Nĩweekĩĩthiw'e nthoni na ndaaumĩw'a ũtw'ĩo ũla ũmwaĩlĩte
Acts8:34 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Mũethiovia ũsu wamũkũlilye Vilivũ
Acts8:35 Vilivũ nĩwambĩĩie kũmũelesya amũtavya Ũvoo Mũseo ĩũlũ wa Yesũ
Acts8:36 Me o nzĩanĩ maendete nĩmavikie vandũ vaĩ kĩw'ũ
Acts8:37 Vilivũ amwĩa atĩĩ
Acts8:38 Nĩvo ĩndĩ weeaie ĩkasya yĩu yĩũngamw'e na me elĩ
Acts8:39 Mauma kĩw'ũnĩ
Acts8:40 Vilivũ eeyĩthĩĩlile ndũanĩ yĩtawa Asotu
Acts9:1 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu
Acts9:2 amwĩtya mavalũa ma kũmũmanyĩthany'a kwa atongoi ma nyũmba sya Ayuti sya kũthaithĩa na kũmbanĩa ila syaĩ Ndamasikũ
Acts9:3 Saũlo e kyalonĩ akilĩlye kũvika Ndamasikũ
Acts9:4 Nĩwavalũkile nthĩ na eew'a wasya ũũmwĩa atĩĩ
Acts9:5 Nake akũlya atĩĩ
Acts9:6 Ĩndĩ yu ũkĩla ũlike ndũanĩ
Acts9:7 Andũ ala maendanĩtye na Saũlo nĩmaũngamie vau na mavindya ki; nĩmeew'aa wasya ũsu ĩndĩ mayoonaa mũndũ.
Acts9:8 Saũlo nĩwookĩlile vala wavalũkĩte
Acts9:9 Ekalile mĩthenya ĩtatũ ate kwona nthĩ
Acts9:10 Kũu Ndamasikũ kwaĩ mũĩkĩĩi ũmwe weetawa Anania. Mwĩai nĩwamwĩtie woninĩ
Acts9:11 Mwĩai nĩwamwĩie atĩĩ
Acts9:12 na nĩwoona woninĩ mũndũ wĩtawa Anania ooka vala ũĩ amwilĩĩla moko
Acts9:13 Ĩndĩ Anania amũsũngĩa
Acts9:14 O nayu okĩte kũũ anengetwe ũkũmũ nĩ athembi anene
Acts9:15 Ĩndĩ Mwĩai amwĩa atĩĩ
Acts9:16 Nyie ngamwony'a ũndũ ũkathĩna mũno wĩana kwondũ wakwa.”
Acts9:17 Anania nĩwaendie na alika nyũmba vala Saũlo waĩ. Nĩwamwilĩĩle moko amwĩa atĩĩ
Acts9:18 Vau kwa vau syĩndũ ivw'ana makwaũ nĩsyavalũkile kuma methonĩ make
Acts9:19 na ĩtina wa kũya lĩu akwata vinya. Saũlo nĩwekalile na aĩkĩĩi kũu Ndamasikũ vandũ va mĩthenya yĩana ũndũ mũna.
Acts9:20 O mĩtũkĩ nĩwambĩĩie kũtavany'a nyũmbanĩ sya Ayuti sya kũthaithĩa na kũmbanĩa
Acts9:21 Andũ onthe ala mamwĩwie aitavany'a nĩmaseng'ie na makũlany'a
Acts9:22 Ĩndĩ nake Saũlo aendeea kwĩthĩwa na ũkũmbaũ mwingĩ
Acts9:23 Ĩtina wa mĩthenya mingĩ
Acts9:24 ĩndĩ nake Saũlo amanya ĩũlũ wa mũvango ũsu. Nĩmamwoveeisye mĩvĩanĩ yonthe ya ndũa ĩsu ũtukũ na mũthenya nĩ kana mamũae
Acts9:25 ĩndĩ amanyĩw'a make mamũkua ũtukũ ũmwe mamũng'okelya ũkũtanĩ mamũtheesya e kĩkavĩnĩ athi ũkinya nthĩ.
Acts9:26 Saũlo nĩwaendie avika Yelũsalemu
Acts9:27 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Valanava wamwosie amũtwaa kwa atũmwa
Acts9:28 Kwoou Saũlo nĩwavulanile namo
Acts9:29 Nĩwaneenaa na kũkananĩa na Ayuti ala maneenaa Kĩkiliki
Acts9:30 Yĩla aĩkĩĩi ala angĩ mamanyie ũu
Acts9:31 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu ĩkanisa nĩyeethĩiwe na mũuo kĩla vandũ nthĩ ya Yutia
Acts9:32 Vetelo aendee na kũthoka kũndũ na kũndũ
Acts9:33 Kũu nĩweethĩie mũndũ ũmwe weetawa Aeniasi watwĩe atekuma kĩtandanĩ vandũ va myaka nyanya e na mamutha monzu.
Acts9:34 Vetelo nĩwamwĩie atĩĩ
Acts9:35 Andũ onthe ala matwĩe Linda na Saloni
Acts9:36 Kwaĩ mũĩkĩĩi ũmwe mũndũ mũka ndũanĩ ya Yova weetawa Tavitha
Acts9:37 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu nĩwawaie na akw'a. Mwĩĩ wake nĩwathambiw'e na waiwa nyũmbanĩ ĩmwe ya ĩũlũ ngolovanĩ.
Acts9:38 Nũndũ wa kwĩthĩwa Yova ndyaĩ vaasa na Linda
Acts9:39 Kwoou Vetelo nĩwookĩlile aendany'a namo. Avika nĩwatwaiwe nyũmba yĩ ĩũlũ ngolovanĩ. Ndiwa mbingĩ sya aka nĩsyamũmbanĩlĩĩle iyĩĩa
Acts9:40 Ĩndĩ Vetelo amea nĩmaumaale onthe na atulya ndu avoya. Nĩvo ĩndĩ wathyũũkie asisya ũla mwĩĩ na asya
Acts9:41 Vetelo nĩwamũkwatie kw'oko amũkĩlya aũngama. Vetelo amina kwĩka ũu
Acts9:42 Ũndũ ũsu nĩwamanyĩkie kĩla vandũ kũu Yova
Acts9:43 Vetelo nĩwaendeeie kwĩkala kũu Yova vandũ va mĩthenya mingĩ
Acts10:1 Kwaĩ mũndũ ũmwe ndũanĩ ya Kaisalea weetawa Kolineliasi
Acts10:2 We mwene vamwe na andũ onthe ma nyũmba yake maĩ athaithi me kĩthito
Acts10:3 Mũthenya ũmwe vaa kĩndũ saa kenda
Acts10:4 Nake amũketeea e na w'ĩa na amwĩa atĩĩ
Acts10:5 Yu tũma andũ mathi Yova makete mũndũ ũmwe wĩtawa Simioni na ĩsyĩtwa yĩngĩ nĩ Vetelo.
Acts10:6 Ekalaa na mũndũ ũmwe wĩtawa Simioni
Acts10:7 Mũlaĩka ũsu wanenaa nake amina kũthi
Acts10:8 Nĩwamatavisye maũndũ onthe ala maĩ maneekĩka
Acts10:9 Ũnĩ ũsu
Acts10:10 Nĩwakwatiwe nĩ nzaa na enda kũya. Lĩu ũendee na kũuwa
Acts10:11 Nĩwoonie ĩtu yĩ ĩvingũe
Acts10:12 Nthĩnĩ wa suka ĩsu
Acts10:13 Vetelo nĩweewie wasya ũũmwĩa
Acts10:14 Ĩndĩ Vetelo asũngĩa
Acts10:15 Vetelo nĩweewie wasya ũsu ĩngĩ ũimwĩa
Acts10:16 Ũndũ ũsu weekĩkie mavinda atatũ
Acts10:17 Vetelo aendee na kũsaanĩw'a nĩ kĩla kĩũwetwa nĩ ũla woni waĩ naw'o
Acts10:18 Nĩmeetanie makũlya kana Simioni ũla wĩtawa Vetelo ekalaa kũu.
Acts10:19 Vetelo o aendee na kũsũanĩa ĩũlũ wa ũla woni
Acts10:20 Kwoou ũkĩla ũthee na ũiendany'a namo ũtekwĩkalanga; ninyie nĩmatũmĩte.”
Acts10:21 Vetelo nĩwatheeie kũu kwĩ andũ asu na amea atĩĩ
Acts10:22 Namo mamũsũngĩa
Acts10:23 Kwoou Vetelo amathokya malike nyũmba
Acts10:24 Mũthenya ũla waatĩĩe nĩmavikie Kaisalea. Kolineliasi nĩwameteelete
Acts10:25 Vetelo ailika mũsyĩ oou
Acts10:26 Ĩndĩ Vetelo amũkĩlya aimwĩa atĩĩ
Acts10:27 Vetelo nĩwaendie aeete ngewa na Kolineliasi alika nyũmba
Acts10:28 Nĩwameie atĩĩ
Acts10:29 Kwoou yĩla ndũmaniwe
Acts10:30 Kolineliasi nĩwookĩlile asya atĩĩ
Acts10:31 na ambĩa atĩĩ
Acts10:32 Tũmana ĩndĩ yu ndũanĩ ya Yova ũketĩwe Simioni ũla wĩtawa Vetelo; ekalaa na mũndũ ũmwe wĩtawa Simioni
Acts10:33 Kwoou nĩnĩnakũtũmanie kwa mĩtũkĩ
Acts10:34 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Vetelo wambĩĩie kũneena asya atĩĩ
Acts10:35 etĩkĩlaa mũndũ o na ethĩwa nĩ wa mbaĩ yĩva
Acts10:36 Inyw'ĩ nĩmwĩsĩ ũtũmani ũla Ngai wanengie andũ ma Ĩsilaeli
Acts10:37 Nĩmwĩsĩ nesa vyũ ũndũ mũnene ũla weekĩkie nthĩ yonthe ya Yutia
Acts10:38 ũndũ Ngai wamũnyuvie Yesũ kuma Nasaleti na amũnenge Veva Mũtheu na ũtonyi
Acts10:39 Ithyĩ twĩ ngũsĩ sya maũndũ onthe ala weekie nthĩ ya Ayuti na mũsyĩnĩ wa Yelũsalemu. Nĩmamũaie kwa kũmwamba ngelany'onĩ
Acts10:40 ĩndĩ nake Ngai amũthayũũkya ĩtina wa mĩthenya ĩtatũ. Ngai nĩwamumĩlilye
Acts10:41 o na kau ti kwa andũ onthe
Acts10:42 Nĩwatwĩaĩie tũtavye andũ Ũvoo Mũseo
Acts10:43 Athani onthe maneenie ĩũlũ wa Yesũ masya kana mũndũ o na wĩva ũla wĩmũĩkĩĩa
Acts10:44 Vetelo o aendee na kũneena ũu
Acts10:45 Aĩkĩĩi ala maĩ Ayuti
Acts10:46 nũndũ nĩmamewie maineena na ithyomo na kũmũkatha Ngai.
Acts10:47 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Vetelo wakũlilye atĩĩ
Acts10:48 Kwoou Vetelo nĩweeaie mavatiswe ĩsyĩtwanĩ ya Yesũ Klĩsto. Nĩvo ĩndĩ andũ asu mamwĩsũvie Vetelo ekalange namo vandũ va ĩvinda yĩana ũndũ mũna.
Acts11:1 Atũmwa na aĩkĩĩi ala angĩ maĩ Yutia
Acts11:2 Kwoou yĩla Vetelo wambatie Yelũsalemu
Acts11:3 Nĩmamũkũlilye atĩĩ
Acts11:4 Ĩndĩ Vetelo amaelesya kĩla ũndũ aatĩanĩsye amea:
Acts11:5 “Mũthenya ũmwe nĩ Yova ngĩvoya
Acts11:6 Nĩnakĩketeeie nthĩnĩ na noona nyamũ sya maũũ ana sya kĩthekanĩ
Acts11:7 Nĩvo ĩndĩ neewie wasya ũimbĩa atĩĩ
Acts11:8 Nakwa nasũngĩa
Acts11:9 Ĩndĩ wasya ũsu kuma ĩtunĩ wasyoka wambĩa
Acts11:10 Ũndũ ũsu weekĩkie mavinda atatũ
Acts11:11 Saanĩ o ũsu andũ atatũ nĩmavikie nyũmbanĩ ĩla twekalaa matũmĩtwe vala nĩĩ kuma Kaisalea.
Acts11:12 Veva nĩwambĩie nĩnĩendany'e namo vate kwĩkalanga. Ana-a-asa aa thanthatũ me vaa maendanisye nakwa twathi twalika nyũmba kwa Kolineliasi.
Acts11:13 Nĩwatũtavisye ũndũ waĩ aumĩlĩĩlwe nĩ mũlaĩka nyũmbanĩ kwake na kũmwĩa
Acts11:14 Ũsu nũkũũtavya ũtũmani ũla ũtuma we vamwe na mũsyĩ waku w'onthe mũtangĩĩwa.’
Acts11:15 Nambĩĩa kũneena oou
Acts11:16 Vau nĩnalilikanile ũndũ Mwĩai waĩtye: ‘Yoana avatisie andũ na kĩw'ũ
Acts11:17 Ethĩwa ĩndĩ Ngai amanengie andũ asu mũthĩnzĩo o ũla watũnengie ithyĩ yĩla twamwĩtĩkĩlile Mwĩai Yesũ Klĩsto
Acts11:18 Mamina kwĩw'a ndeto isu sya Vetelo nĩmaekie vyũ kũmũtũla mũtĩ
Acts11:19 Aĩkĩĩi ala manyaĩĩkie nũndũ wa mathĩna ala mambĩĩie ĩtina wa kũawa kwa Sitivini
Acts11:20 Ĩndĩ katĩ wa aĩkĩĩi asu
Acts11:21 Vinya wa Mwĩai waĩ vamwe namo
Acts11:22 Ũvoo ĩũlũ wa ũndũ ũsu nĩwavikĩie ĩkanisa ya Yelũsalemu
Acts11:23 Yĩla mavikie kũu na oona ũndũ Ngai ũnengete andũ asu mumo wĩana
Acts11:24 Valanava aĩ mũndũ mũseo
Acts11:25 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Valanava waendie Taliso akamanthe Saũlo
Acts11:26 na yĩla wamwonie amũete Andiokia. Me elĩ nĩmekalile na athaithi ma ĩkanisa yĩu vandũ va mwaka mũima
Acts11:27 Ĩvindanĩ o yĩu
Acts11:28 Ũmwe woo weetawa Akambusi
Acts11:29 Amanyĩw'a ala maĩ Andiokia nĩmasũanĩie matw'a kana kĩla ũmwe woo
Acts11:30 Nĩmeekie ũu na manenga Valanava na Saũlo ũtethyo ũsu matwaĩa atumĩa ma ĩkanisa Yelũsalemu.
Acts12:1 Ĩvindanĩ o yĩu
Acts12:2 Nĩwaumisye mwĩao Yakovo
Acts12:3 Yĩla Elote woonie kana ũndũ ũsu nĩwendeesya Ayuti
Acts12:4 Ĩtina wa kũmũkwata Vetelo
Acts12:5 Kwoou Vetelo ekala avingĩwe yela
Acts12:6 Ũtukũ ũla waĩ mbee wa mũthenya ũla Elote wavangĩte kumaalya Vetelo kũla kwĩ andũ
Acts12:7 Kwa kĩthũlũmũko
Acts12:8 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũlaĩka wamwĩie atĩĩ
Acts12:9 Vetelo nĩwaumaalile nza amũatĩĩa
Acts12:10 Nĩmaendie mavĩta vala kĩkundi kya mbee kya asikalĩ maũngeme maisunga
Acts12:11 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Vetelo wavindũkie na asya atĩĩ
Acts12:12 Vetelo amina kũmanya ũu
Acts12:13 Vetelo nĩwakũnangie mũomonĩ wa mũvĩa
Acts12:14 Yĩla wamanyie wasya ũsu kana nĩ wa Vetelo nĩwatanie mũno
Acts12:15 Namo mamwĩa atĩĩ
Acts12:16 Ĩndĩ Vetelo aendeea tũ na kũkũnanga mũomo. Yĩla mavingũie mũomo na meethĩa nĩwe
Acts12:17 Vetelo nĩwamonisye na kw'oko nĩmavindye na ĩndĩ amaelesya ũndũ Mwĩai wamumya yela. Nĩwasyokie amea atĩĩ
Acts12:18 Yĩla kwakyee
Acts12:19 Yĩla Elote watũmanie Vetelo amanthwe na alea kwoneka
Acts12:20 Mũsumbĩ Elote nĩwathatĩtw'e nĩ andũ ma Tile na ma Sitoni
Acts12:21 Mũthenya ũmwe ũla watw'ĩtwe
Acts12:22 Andũ asu nĩmasĩĩlĩlile mayasya atĩĩ
Acts12:23 O vau kwa vau
Acts12:24 Ĩndĩ ndeto ya Ngai nĩyaendeeie na kũnyaĩĩka kũndũ kwingĩ
Acts12:25 Valanava na Saũlo mamina ũthũkũmi woo
Acts13:1 Ĩkanisanĩ ya Andiokia kwaĩ andũ amwe maĩ athani na angĩ maĩ amanyĩsya
Acts13:2 Maendee na kũmũthaitha Mwĩai na kũtĩĩa kũya
Acts13:3 Nĩvo ĩndĩ ĩtina wa kũtĩĩa kũya na kũvoya mamailĩĩle moko na mamaeka mathi.
Acts13:4 Kwoou Valanava na Saũlo nĩmatũmiwe nĩ Veva Mũtheu
Acts13:5 Nĩmavikie ndũanĩ ya Salamisi na mambĩĩa kũtavany'a ndeto ya Ngai nyũmbanĩ sya Ayuti sya kũthaithĩa na kũmbanĩa. Yoana ũla kwa ĩsyĩtwa yĩngĩ weetawa Maliko aĩ vamwe namo ta mũtetheesya woo.
Acts13:6 Nĩmaumie mũthya ũmwe wa kĩthama kĩu mathi kũvika ũla ũngĩ
Acts13:7 Valĩ-Yesũ aĩ na mũnene wa kĩthama kĩu weetawa Sengio Vaũlo nake aĩ mũndũ mũĩ mũno. Mũnene ũsu nĩwatũmanie Valanava na Saũlo ayenda ew'e ndeto ya Ngai.
Acts13:8 Ĩndĩ Elimasi
Acts13:9 Ĩndĩ nake Saũlo
Acts13:10 na amwĩa atĩĩ
Acts13:11 Ĩndĩ yu Mwĩai nũkũũkany'a; nũũtw'ĩka kĩlalinda na kwoou vandũ va kavinda ndwĩĩthĩwa ũtonya kwona kyeni kya syũa.” O vau kwa vau metho ma Elimasi nĩmakwatiwe nĩ mbindu na aeka kwona nthĩ
Acts13:12 Yĩla ũla mũnene wa kĩthama woonie kĩla kyeekĩka
Acts13:13 Vaũlo na andũ ala waendanĩtye namo nĩmaumie Vambo me melinĩ
Acts13:14 ĩndĩ mo maendeea na kyalo mauma Velika mathi ndũanĩ ya Andiokia ĩla yĩ nthĩ ya Visindia. Mũthenyanĩ wa Savato nĩmaendie nyũmbanĩ ya Ayuti ya kũthaithĩa na kũmbanĩa mekala nthĩ.
Acts13:15 Ĩtina wa Maandĩko Matheu kũsomwa kuma ĩvukunĩ ya Mĩao na ya momanyĩsyo ma athani
Acts13:16 Vaũlo nĩwaũngamie
Acts13:17 Ngai wa andũ ma Ĩsilaeli nĩwanyuvie aaũmae maitũ
Acts13:18 na vandũ va myaka mĩongo ĩna oomĩanĩsya namo me weũnĩ.
Acts13:19 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Ngai watumie mbaĩ mũonza ila syatwĩe nthĩ ya Kanaani iminwa
Acts13:20 “Maũndũ asu onthe makuie myaka maana ana na mĩongo ĩtano. Ĩtina wa ũu
Acts13:21 Vau ĩndĩ nĩmakũlilye manengwe mũsumbĩ
Acts13:22 Ĩtina Ngai nĩwamũvetie Saũlo na anyuva Ndeviti ethĩwe mũsumbĩ woo. Ngai nĩwaneenie ũndũ wake asya
Acts13:23 Kuma nzyawanĩ sya Ndeviti
Acts13:24 Ĩndĩ mbee wa kũka kwa Yesũ
Acts13:25 Yoana aendee na kũminũkĩlĩĩlya ũthũkũmi wake nĩweeie andũ atĩĩ
Acts13:26 “Mbaitũ
Acts13:27 Andũ ma Yelũsalemu vamwe na atongoi moo mayaamanya kana Yesũ nĩwe Mũtangĩĩi
Acts13:28 O na kau Ayuti mayaaona kĩndũ kĩtuma Yesũ atw'ĩĩwa kũawa
Acts13:29 Mamina kwĩanĩĩsya maũndũ onthe ala Maandĩko Matheu mawetete ĩũlũ wa Yesũ
Acts13:30 Ĩndĩ Ngai amũthaayũũkya kuma kwa akw'ũ
Acts13:31 nake vandũ va mĩthenya mingĩ
Acts13:32 Ithyĩ naitũ twĩmũtavya Ũvoo Mũseo wa kana kĩla Ngai wathie aaũmae maitũ
Acts13:33 nũkĩanĩĩsye kwitũ ithyĩ nzyawa syoo kwa kũmũthayũũkya Yesũ kuma kwa akw'ũ. Ũu now'o kũilyĩ o tondũ kũandĩkĩtwe nthĩnĩ wa Savulĩ wa kelĩ ĩũlũ wa Yesũ: ‘We wĩ mwana wakwa
Acts13:34 Na kw'o kũthayũũkw'a kwake kuma kwa akw'ũ atakakw'a ĩngĩ
Acts13:35 Ĩĩ
Acts13:36 Nĩkwĩthĩwa Ndeviti ĩvindanĩ yake
Acts13:37 Ĩndĩ mwĩĩ wa ũla Ngai wamũthayũũkisye kuma kwa akw'ũ ndwaaoa.
Acts13:38 Kwoou ana-a-asa
Acts13:39 O ta ũu
Acts13:40 Ĩsũvĩei ĩndĩ mũikakwatwe nĩ kĩla kĩwetetwe ĩvukunĩ ya athani:
Acts13:41 ‘Nĩmwenei inyw'ĩ andũ ma kũvũthya! Seng'ai na mũikw'a! Nũndũ nĩngwĩka ũndũ ĩvindanĩ yĩĩ mwĩ thayũ
Acts13:42 Vaũlo na Valanava maumaalĩte nyũmbanĩ ĩsu ya Ayuti ya kũthaithĩa na kũmbanĩa
Acts13:43 Wũmbano ũsu wathela
Acts13:44 Yĩla Savato ĩsu yaatĩĩe yavikie
Acts13:45 Ĩndĩ yĩla Ayuti moonie andũ asu maingĩvĩte ũu
Acts13:46 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Vaũlo na Valanava mamasũngĩie na ũkũmbaũ mũnene mamea atĩĩ
Acts13:47 O naw'o ũu now'o Mwĩai ũtwĩaĩĩte ndetonĩ ii: ‘Nyie nĩngũtw'ĩte wĩthĩwe kyeni kwa Andũ-ma-mbaĩ-ingĩ
Acts13:48 Andũ-ma-mbaĩ-ingĩ meew'a ndeto isu
Acts13:49 Ũvoo ĩũlũ wa Mwĩai nĩwanyaĩĩkie kĩla vandũ kĩsionĩ kĩu.
Acts13:50 Ĩndĩ Ayuti nĩmaingĩanĩisye Vaũlo na Valanava kũla kwĩ aka ma mbaĩ ingĩ maĩ na kĩkĩo kya Ngai na manengetwe ndaĩa
Acts13:51 Atũmwa asu nĩmatiie mamatuangĩa kĩtoo kĩla kyaĩ maũũnĩ na mathi Ĩkoniamu.
Acts13:52 Ĩndĩ mo aĩkĩĩi ma Mwĩai ala maĩ kũu Andiokia maĩ atanu mũno
Acts14:1 Vaũlo na Valanava me kũu Ĩkoniamu nĩmaendie nyũmbanĩ ya Ayuti ya kũthaithĩa na kũmbanĩa o tondũ makothaa kwĩka
Acts14:2 Ĩndĩ Ayuti ala maleile kũĩkĩĩa nĩmeekĩie ndeto nthũku ilĩkonĩ sya Andũ-ma-mbaĩ-ingĩ
Acts14:3 Kwoou Vaũlo na Valanava nĩmaendeeie kwĩkala kũu vandũ va ĩvinda ĩasa
Acts14:4 Ĩndĩ andũ ma ndũa ĩsu nĩmaanĩkie; amwe meethĩwa ngalĩko ya Ayuti
Acts14:5 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũvango waseũviw'e nĩ amwe ma Andũ-ma-mbaĩ-ingĩ na Ayuti
Acts14:6 Atũmwa asu nĩmamanyie ũvoo ũsu na makĩa mathi ndũanĩ ya Lisitela na ya Ndelive
Acts14:7 Kũu nĩmaendeeie na kũtavany'a Ũvoo Mũseo.
Acts14:8 Lisitela kwaĩ mũndũ ũmwe wailyĩ nthĩ waĩ kyonze kuma kũsyawa
Acts14:9 Mũndũ ũsu nĩwamwĩthukĩĩisye Vaũlo aendee na kũtavany'a. Vaũlo nĩwamũketeeie oona e na mũĩkĩĩo ũtuma avow'a
Acts14:10 na amwĩa na wasya mũnene atĩĩ
Acts14:11 Yĩla ĩkomano yoonie ũndũ Vaũlo weeka
Acts14:12 Valanava mamwĩtie Nzeũsi
Acts14:13 Mũthembi wa ngai ĩla yĩtawa Nzeũsi
Acts14:14 Yĩla Valanava na Vaũlo meewie ũu
Acts14:15 “Inyw'ĩ andũ aa
Acts14:16 Ĩvinda yĩ na vu ĩtina
Acts14:17 Ĩndĩ o vamwe na ũu
Acts14:18 Ĩndĩ o na maneenete ndeto isu
Acts14:19 Ĩndĩ Ayuti amwe nĩmookie Lisitela kuma Andiokia na Ĩkoniamu
Acts14:20 Ĩndĩ yĩla aĩkĩĩi mookie moombanĩa vala ũĩ mamũthyũlũlũkĩte
Acts14:21 Ĩtina wa Vaũlo na Valanava kũtavany'a Ũvoo Mũseo Ndelive na kũkwata amanyĩw'a aingĩ
Acts14:22 mathuthĩtye aĩkĩĩi na kũmathangaasya maendee na kũlũma mũĩkĩĩonĩ. Nĩmameie atĩĩ
Acts14:23 Vaũlo na Valanava nĩmamanyuvĩie atumĩa nthĩnĩ wa kĩla ĩkanisa
Acts14:24 Nĩvo ĩndĩ atũmwa asu mesĩlile Visindia mathi Vambilia.
Acts14:25 Mamina kũtavany'a ndeto ya Ngai Velika
Acts14:26 Kuma vau nĩmalikile melinĩ mathi Andiokia
Acts14:27 Mavika Andiokia nĩmoombanisye andũ onthe ma ĩkanisa
Acts14:28 Atũmwa asu nĩmaendeeie na kwĩkala na aĩkĩĩi kũu vandũ va ĩvinda ĩasa.
Acts15:1 Andũ amwe nĩmaumie nthĩ ya Yutia matheea Andiokia
Acts15:2 Ũndũ ũsu nĩwatumie Vaũlo na Valanava makananĩa na kũneenany'a mũno na andũ asu. Nĩvo ĩndĩ Vaũlo na Valanava manyuviwe vamwe na aĩkĩĩi angĩ mambate Yelũsalemu
Acts15:3 Kwoou ĩkanisa nĩyamatũmie
Acts15:4 Yĩla mavikie Yelũsalemu nĩmathokiw'e nĩ ĩkanisa na atũmwa vamwe na atumĩa
Acts15:5 Ĩndĩ aĩkĩĩi amwe ala maĩ ma kĩkundi kya Avalisi mookĩla masya atĩĩ
Acts15:6 Atũmwa na atumĩa nĩmoombanie maoany'e ũndũ ũsu.
Acts15:7 Ĩtina wa kũneenany'a mũno
Acts15:8 Nake Ngai ũla wĩsĩ ngoo sya andũ
Acts15:9 Ndaaĩkĩa kĩvathũkany'o katĩ woo naitũ; nĩwatheisye ngoo syoo nũndũ wa mũĩkĩĩo woo.
Acts15:10 Kwoou ĩndĩ nĩkĩ mũenda kũmũtata Ngai kwa kwaĩkya aĩkĩĩi mũio mũito ũla aaũmae maitũ
Acts15:11 Aiee! Tũĩkĩĩaa kana nĩ kwĩsĩla mumonĩ wa Mwĩai Yesũ twovoaw'a o tondũ mo movoaw'a.”
Acts15:12 Andũ onthe ala maĩ vau nĩmavindisye ki methukĩĩsye Valanava na Vaũlo
Acts15:13 Mamina kũneena
Acts15:14 Simioni nĩwatũelesya ũndũ Ngai wambie kwonany'a kana e na vata na Andũ-ma-mbaĩ-ingĩ
Acts15:15 Ũndũ ũsu nũkwosana na ndeto sya athani o tondũ kũandĩkĩtwe Maandĩkonĩ Matheu:
Acts15:16 ‘Ĩtina wa maũndũ aa
Acts15:17 Kwoou andũ ala angĩ onthe makooka kwakwa
Acts15:18 Easya ũu Mwĩai
Acts15:19 “Kwoou ũtw'ĩo wakwa nyie nĩ kana
Acts15:20 Vandũ va ũu tũmaandĩkĩe valũa tũmeete maikaye syĩndũ ivukĩtw'e nĩkwĩthĩwa ithembeetwe ngai sya mĩvw'anano
Acts15:21 Nĩkwĩthĩwa kuma tene nthĩnĩ wa kĩla ndũa
Acts15:22 Nĩvo ĩndĩ atũmwa
Acts15:23 Nĩmamatũmie na valũa ũũ: “Ithyĩ
Acts15:24 Nĩtwĩwie kana andũ amwe kuma kũũ tũĩ ĩndĩ tũtanamatũmĩte
Acts15:25 Kwoou
Acts15:26 andũ manenganĩte mathayũ moo kwondũ wa Mwĩai waitũ Yesũ Klĩsto.
Acts15:27 Nĩtwatũma Yutasi na Sila ala namo meũmũtũngĩlĩĩla na kanyw'a maũndũ aa tũandĩkĩte.
Acts15:28 Veva Mũtheu o vamwe naitũ
Acts15:29 Mũikaye syĩndũ ila ithembeetwe ngai sya mĩvw'anano
Acts15:30 Andũ asu matũmiwe mamina kũnengwa ũthei wa kũthi nĩmatheeie mathi Andiokia
Acts15:31 Aĩkĩĩi asu nĩmaũsomie na matana mũno
Acts15:32 Yutasi na Sila
Acts15:33 Ĩtina wa kwĩkala kũu vandũ va ĩvinda ĩasa
Acts15:34 Ĩndĩ Sila asũanĩa kwĩkala kũu. ]
Acts15:35 Vaũlo na Valanava nĩmatiĩlilwe kũu Andiokia
Acts15:36 Ĩtina wa mĩthenya yĩana ũndũ mũna
Acts15:37 Valanava nĩwendie maendany'e na Yoana ũla weetawa kwa ĩsyĩtwa yĩngĩ Maliko
Acts15:38 ĩndĩ Vaũlo oona ũte ũseo maendany'e na mũndũ waendie amatia me Vambilia
Acts15:39 Nĩvo ĩndĩ vookĩlile ngusanĩsyo na mataanĩsya. Valanava nĩwoosie Maliko
Acts15:40 nake Vaũlo anyuva Sila
Acts15:41 Nĩmesĩlile Silia na Silisia malũlũmĩĩlye makanisa.
Acts16:1 Vaũlo nĩwaendie Ndelive na Lisitela vala mũĩkĩĩi ũmwe weetawa Timotheo watwĩe. Inyia wa Timotheo ũla o nake waĩ mũĩkĩĩi aĩ Mũyuti
Acts16:2 Timotheo aĩ nguma nzeo katĩ wa aĩkĩĩi ala matwĩe Lisitela na Ĩkoniamu.
Acts16:3 Vaũlo nĩwendie Timotheo aendany'e nake
Acts16:4 Vaũlo na asu angĩ maendee na kũthyũũka ndũanĩ sya kũu
Acts16:5 Kwoou aĩkĩĩi nĩmalũlũmĩĩilw'e mũĩkĩĩonĩ
Acts16:6 Vaũlo na ala waĩ namo nĩmaendie mesĩla kĩsionĩ kya Vilikia na kya Kalatia
Acts16:7 Yĩla mavikie mũvakanĩ wa Misia
Acts16:8 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mavĩtĩle Misia matheea mathi Tiloa.
Acts16:9 Ũtukũ ũsu Vaũlo nĩweethĩiwe na woni
Acts16:10 Vaũlo amina kwona woni ũsu
Acts16:11 Nĩtwalikile melinĩ twauma Tiloa twathi ĩmwe kwa ĩmwe nginya kĩthamanĩ kĩtawa Samothulake
Acts16:12 Kuma vau nĩtwaendie Vilivi
Acts16:13 Mũthenyanĩ wa Savato nĩtwaumaalile nza wa mũvĩa wa ndũa
Acts16:14 Ũmwe wa aka asu matwĩthukĩĩsye nĩ mũndũ mũka weetawa Litia kuma ndũanĩ yĩtawa Thiatila. Mũndũ mũka ũsu aĩ mũthoosya wa ngũa ndune sya thooa mũnene
Acts16:15 Nĩvo ĩndĩ ĩtina wa Litia kũvatiswa vamwe na andũ ma mũsyĩ wake watwĩsũvie mũno ayasya atĩĩ
Acts16:16 Mũthenya ũmwe tũendete vandũ va kũvoyea
Acts16:17 Nĩwatũatĩĩie twĩ na Vaũlo aneenete na wasya mũnene ayasya atĩĩ
Acts16:18 Mwĩĩtu ũsu nĩwaendeeie na kwĩka ũu vandũ va mĩthenya mingĩ kũvika Vaũlo esa kũthata na amũthyũũkĩa na eea veva ũsu
Acts16:19 Yĩla anene ma mwĩĩtu ũsu mamanyie kana wĩkwatyo woo wa ũkwata mbesa kuma mwĩĩtunĩ ũsu nĩwathela
Acts16:20 Nĩmamasikatie kwa asili masya atĩĩ
Acts16:21 Memanyĩsya syĩthĩo ithyĩ Alomi tũtaĩlĩte kũsyĩtĩkĩla kana kwiatĩĩa.”
Acts16:22 Ĩkomano yonthe ya andũ nĩyalikĩlĩĩile kũkita na Vaũlo na Sila. Asili ma makoani nĩmamatembũangĩie ngũa maisyumya
Acts16:23 Ĩtina wa Vaũlo na Sila kũvũwa mũno nĩmavingĩiwe yela
Acts16:24 Kumana na kwĩaĩwa kũu
Acts16:25 Kĩndũ ta saa sita sya ũtukũ
Acts16:26 Kwa kĩthũlũmũko nĩkweethĩiwe na kĩtetemo kĩnene kya nthĩ
Acts16:27 Ũla mũsikalĩ wa yela nĩwavindũkie
Acts16:28 Ĩndĩ Vaũlo aneena na wasya mũnene amwĩa atĩĩ
Acts16:29 Mũsikalĩ ũsu nĩweetisye taa na asemba alika nthĩnĩ
Acts16:30 Nĩvo ĩndĩ wamatwaie nza amakũlya atĩĩ
Acts16:31 Namo mamũsũngĩa mamwĩa atĩĩ
Acts16:32 Vaũlo na Sila nĩmamũtavisye ndeto ya Mwĩai vamwe na andũ onthe ala maĩ nyũmba kwake.
Acts16:33 Mũsikalĩ ũsu nĩwamatwaie saa o isu sya ũtukũ amathambya itau
Acts16:34 Nĩvo ĩndĩ wamatwaie nyũmba kwake na amanenga lĩu maye. Nĩwatanie mũno vamwe na mũsyĩ wake w'onthe nĩkwĩthĩwa yu aĩ mũĩkĩĩi wa Ngai.
Acts16:35 Ũnĩ ũsu kwakya
Acts16:36 Mũsikalĩ ũsu wa yela nĩwatavisye Vaũlo ndeto isu amwĩa atĩĩ
Acts16:37 Ĩndĩ Vaũlo nĩweeie asikalĩ asu atĩĩ
Acts16:38 Asikalĩ asu nĩmatavisye Asili ma makoani ndeto isu
Acts16:39 Nĩmookie mametya ũekeo
Acts16:40 Kwoou Vaũlo na Sila nĩmaumie yela na mathi mũsyĩ kwa Litia. Kũu nĩmakomanie na aĩkĩĩi na mamina kũmathuthya na ndeto mauma kũu mathi.
Acts17:1 Vaũlo na Sila nĩmavĩtĩle ndũanĩ yĩtawa Ambivolisi na ĩngĩ yĩtawa Avolonia mavika Thesalonika
Acts17:2 Vaũlo nĩwaendie avulana namo o tondũ wakothaa kwĩka
Acts17:3 Nĩwamaeleasya na kũmony'a kwa w'o kana vaĩ vata wa Klĩsto kũthĩna na kũthayũũka kuma kwa akw'ũ. Nĩwameie atĩĩ
Acts17:4 Amwe moo nĩmeetĩkĩlile ndeto isu na makwatana na Vaũlo na Sila
Acts17:5 Ĩndĩ Ayuti amwe nĩmakwatiwe nĩ kĩwĩu na moosa ing'endilĩ kuma nguthunĩ ya andũ athũku ndũanĩ ĩsu
Acts17:6 Yĩla maleile kũmethĩa vau
Acts17:7 na Yasoni amekalĩtye mũsyĩ kwake. Onthe maendee na kũtũla mwĩao wa Mũsumbĩ wa Loma kwa kwasya kana ve mũsumbĩ ũngĩ wĩtawa Yesũ.”
Acts17:8 Andũ onthe vamwe na anene ma ndũa ĩsu
Acts17:9 Nĩvo ĩndĩ anene asu maumĩthisye Yasoni na ala angĩ waĩ namo mbesa nĩ kana mamalekye
Acts17:10 Kwamina kũtuka oou
Acts17:11 Andũ ma kũu maĩ ngoo nzeo kwĩ andũ ma Thesalonika
Acts17:12 Ayuti aingĩ nĩmeetĩkĩlile
Acts17:13 Yĩla Ayuti ma Thesalonika mamanyie kana Vaũlo aendee na kũtavany'a ndeto ya Ngai
Acts17:14 Nĩvo ĩndĩ o vau kwa vau aĩkĩĩi mamumaaisye Vaũlo athi ũtee wa ũkanga
Acts17:15 Andũ ala mamumaaisye Vaũlo mamũvikisye Athene
Acts17:16 Vaũlo aendee na kweteela Timotheo na Sila kũu Athene
Acts17:17 Kwoou e nyũmbanĩ ya Ayuti ya kũthaithĩa na kũmbanĩa nĩwaneenanisye na Ayuti na Andũ ma-mbaĩ-ingĩ maĩ na kĩkĩo kya Ngai. O ta ũu kĩla mũthenya nĩwaneenanasya na andũ kũu ndũnyũ ala weethĩa kw'o.
Acts17:18 Andũ amwe ma Evikũleo na ma Sitoiko maĩ na kĩsomo kya ũĩ o namo nĩmambĩĩie kũkananĩa nake. Amwe makũlasya atĩĩ
Acts17:19 Nĩvo ĩndĩ moosie Vaũlo na mamũtwaa nzamanĩ yĩtawa Aleovako na masya atĩĩ
Acts17:20 Nĩtwĩw'ĩte ũineena syĩndũ ngeni matũnĩ maitũ na twĩenda kũmanya syĩweta ĩũlũ wa kyaũ.”
Acts17:21 Andũ ma Athene onthe o vamwe na aeni ala mekalaa kw'o
Acts17:22 Kwoou Vaũlo nĩwaũngamie katĩ wa nzama ĩsu ya Aleovako na asya atĩĩ
Acts17:23 Nũndũ yĩla nĩĩsĩlĩte ndũanĩ yenyu na kwĩloela syĩndũ ila mũthaithaa
Acts17:24 Ngai ũla woombie nthĩ na syĩndũ syonthe ila syĩ vo
Acts17:25 O na ndathũkũmawa nĩ andũ na moko ta wĩ na vata wa kĩndũ. We nĩwe ũnengae andũ onthe thayũ na kũmatonyethya kũveva
Acts17:26 Kuma mũndũnĩ ũmwe
Acts17:27 Ngai eekie ũu nĩ kana mbaĩ isu syonthe imũmanthe
Acts17:28 nũndũ nĩwe ũtũtonyethasya kwĩthĩwa thayũ
Acts17:29 Kwoou ĩndĩ
Acts17:30 Ĩvinda yĩla andũ matamanyaa kĩla maĩlĩte kwĩka
Acts17:31 nĩkwĩthĩwa nũminĩte kũvanga mũthenya ũla wĩsilĩla andũ onthe na ũw'o
Acts17:32 Yĩla andũ asu meewie Vaũlo aneena ĩũlũ wa ũthayũũkyo wa akw'ũ
Acts17:33 Kwoou Vaũlo nĩwaumie vala maĩ athi.
Acts17:34 Ĩndĩ ve andũ amwe maendanisye na Vaũlo na matw'ĩka aĩkĩĩi. Katĩ wa andũ asu vaĩ Ndionisio
Acts18:1 Ĩtina wa maũndũ asu
Acts18:2 Kũu nĩwakomanie na Mũyuti ũmwe weetawa Akwila
Acts18:3 na aendeea kwĩkala na kũthũkũmaa namo nũndũ aĩ mũtumi wa maeema o ta mo.
Acts18:4 Kĩla mũthenya wa Savato Vaũlo nĩwaneenaa na kĩthing'ĩĩsyo e nyũmbanĩ ya Ayuti ya kũthaithĩa na kũmbanĩa
Acts18:5 Yĩla Sila na Timotheo mavikie Kolintho maumĩte Masendonia
Acts18:6 Ĩndĩ yĩla Ayuti asu maleanile nake na mambĩĩa kũmũumanga
Acts18:7 Kwoou Vaũlo nĩwaumie vau athi nyũmba kwa mũndũ ũmwe waĩ na kĩkĩo kya Ngai weetawa Tito Yusito
Acts18:8 Kĩlisivo ũla nĩwe waĩ mũtongoi wa nyũmba ĩsu ya Ayuti ya kũthaithĩa na kũmbanĩa
Acts18:9 Mũthenya ũmwe kwĩ ũtukũ
Acts18:10 nũndũ nyie nĩ vamwe naku. Vai mũndũ o na ũmwe wĩtata ũkũvithũkĩa kana kũkwĩka naĩ
Acts18:11 Kwoou Vaũlo nĩwekalile kũu vandũ va mwaka ũmwe na nyusu akĩmanyĩsya andũ ndeto ya Ngai.
Acts18:12 Ĩndĩ ĩvindanĩ yĩla Ngalio waĩ ngavana wa kĩsio kya Akaia
Acts18:13 Nĩmaisye atĩĩ
Acts18:14 Vaũlo atanamba kwathamya aneene ũndũ
Acts18:15 ĩndĩ nũndũ wa kwĩthĩwa kĩla kĩ vaa nĩ ũvoo wa ndeto
Acts18:16 Nĩwamakuthũie mauma vau kotinĩ.
Acts18:17 Nĩvo ĩndĩ onthe mamũthyũũkĩie Sosithene
Acts18:18 Ĩtina wa maũndũ asu
Acts18:19 Nĩmavikie Eveso vala Vaũlo watiĩlile Vilisila na Akwila. We nĩwaendie nyũmbanĩ ya Ayuti ya kũthaithĩa na kũmbanĩa
Acts18:20 Ayuti asu nĩmamũkũlilye Vaũlo ekalange namo
Acts18:21 Nĩwataanĩisye namo na amea atĩĩ
Acts18:22 Avika Kaisalea nĩwambatie Yelũsalemu akakethye ĩkanisa
Acts18:23 Ĩtina wa Vaũlo kwĩkala Andiokia vandũ va ĩvinda yĩana ũndũ mũna
Acts18:24 Ĩvindanĩ yĩu Mũyuti ũmwe weetawa Avolo wasyaĩtwe Alekisandĩlĩa nĩwavikie Eveso. Avolo aĩ mũndũ waneenaa ateũthitathita na waĩ na ũmanyi mũseo wa Maandĩko Matheu.
Acts18:25 Nĩwamanyĩĩtw'e mũno ĩũlũ wa ĩla Nzĩa Mwĩai woonanisye
Acts18:26 Nĩwambĩĩie kũmanyĩsya na ũkũmbaũ nyũmbanĩ ya Ayuti ya kũthaithĩa na kũmbanĩa. Yĩla Vilisila na Akwila mamwĩwie akĩneena
Acts18:27 Yĩla Avolo wendie kũinga athi kĩsionĩ kya Akaia
Acts18:28 nũndũ nĩwavindĩthisye Ayuti ki mbee wa andũ kwa kũmony'a kwĩsĩla Maandĩko Matheu kana kwa w'o Yesũ nĩwe Klĩsto.
Acts19:1 Ĩvindanĩ yĩla Avolo waĩ Kolintho
Acts19:2 na amakũlya atĩĩ
Acts19:3 Vaũlo amakũlya atĩĩ
Acts19:4 Vaũlo amea atĩĩ
Acts19:5 Yĩla meewie ũu
Acts19:6 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Vaũlo wamailĩĩle moko
Acts19:7 Onthe maĩ andũ ĩkũmi na elĩ.
Acts19:8 Vaũlo nĩwaendie nyũmbanĩ ya Ayuti ya kũthaithĩa na kũmbanĩa
Acts19:9 Ĩndĩ amwe moo nĩmeethĩiwe na ngoo mbũmũ na malea kwĩtĩkĩla
Acts19:10 Aendeeie kwĩka ũu vandũ va myaka ĩlĩ kũvikĩa andũ onthe ala matwĩe Asia
Acts19:11 Ngai nĩweekie syama nene mũno kwĩsĩla vala ve Vaũlo
Acts19:12 o na andũ mambĩĩa kũkua itambaa na ngũa ingĩ syake sya ũthũkũmi ila weekĩaa maitwaĩa awau. Awau asu nĩmavoaa na ala malikĩtwe nĩ maveva mathũku mayumwa nĩ maveva asu.
Acts19:13 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Ayuti amwe mangangaa kũu mailũngya maveva mathũku
Acts19:14 Ana mũonza ma Mũyuti ũmwe waĩ Mũthembi Mũnene weetawa Sikeva nĩmeekaa ũu
Acts19:15 ĩndĩ veva mũthũku wamea atĩĩ
Acts19:16 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũndũ ũsu walikĩtwe nĩ veva ũsu mũthũku wamathaanyũkĩie e na kaũ mwingĩ amakĩlya vinya onthe. Amavũie onthe maumaala nyũmba ĩsu masembete me athei na me na itau.
Acts19:17 Ũvoo ũsu nĩwamanyĩkie nĩ andũ onthe ala matwĩe Eveso; Ayuti na Akiliki. Nĩvo ĩndĩ onthe makwatiwe nĩ w'ĩa mwingĩ
Acts19:18 Andũ aingĩ ala matw'ĩkie aĩkĩĩi
Acts19:19 O na andũ aingĩ meekaa syama nĩmaetie mavuku moo mamombany'a na mamavĩvya andũ onthe mene. Thooa wa mavuku asu me onthe waĩ mbesa sya silĩva ngili mĩongo ĩtano.
Acts19:20 Ũu nĩw'o ndeto ya Mwĩai yeanie na kwĩthĩwa na vinya mwingĩ.
Acts19:21 Ĩtina wa maũndũ asu onthe
Acts19:22 Nĩwatũmie elĩ ma ala mamũtetheasya wĩa maendae Masendonia
Acts19:23 Ĩvindanĩ o yĩu nĩkwookĩlile kĩthokoo kĩnene Eveso nũndũ wa ĩla Nzĩa Mwĩai woonanisye.
Acts19:24 Mũndũ ũmwe mũtwii wa syũma sya silĩva weetawa Ndemetelio
Acts19:25 Nĩwoombanisye andũ asu onthe na andũ angĩ ala maĩ na ũthũkũmi wa mũthemba ũsu na amea atĩĩ
Acts19:26 Yu nĩmũkwona na nĩmũkwĩw'a o na eka vaa Eveso
Acts19:27 Kwoou ve na mũisyo wa wĩa ũũ witũ kwasya nguma
Acts19:28 Yĩla andũ asu meewie ndeto isu
Acts19:29 Kwoou ndũa yonthe nĩyausũie kĩthokoo
Acts19:30 Vaũlo nĩwendaa kũthi kũneena na ĩkomano yĩu
Acts19:31 O na atongoi amwe ma Asia maĩ anyanyae
Acts19:32 Vau vaĩ kĩthokoo kingĩ; andũ amwe maneenaa kĩĩ
Acts19:33 Ayuti amwe nĩmamũluutile Alekisanda athi mbee wa andũ
Acts19:34 Ĩndĩ yĩla mamanyie kana we nĩ Mũyuti
Acts19:35 Yĩla kalanĩ wa ndũa ĩsu wesie kũvindĩthya ĩkomano yĩu nĩwayĩie atĩĩ
Acts19:36 Kwoou nũndũ vai mũndũ ũtonya kũleana na ũndũ ũsu
Acts19:37 Mũetie andũ aa vaa na mayũyĩte mĩio mĩtheu ya ĩkalũ kana makauma ĩla ngai nga yaitũ.
Acts19:38 Ĩndĩ ethĩwa Ndemetelio na andũ aa masũvasya mavisa wĩ namo me na ũndũ na mũndũ
Acts19:39 Na ethĩwa mwĩ na ũndũ ũngĩ wĩ mbeange wa vau
Acts19:40 Oyu nĩtũtonya kũsikatĩwa ithokoo kumana na ituu ii syĩkw'o ũmũnthĩ
Acts19:41 Amina kũneena ũu
Acts20:1 Yĩla kĩtuu kĩu kyathelile
Acts20:2 Nĩwesĩlile isionĩ isu athuthĩtye aĩkĩĩi na ndeto mbingĩ nginya esa kũvika Ũkiliki
Acts20:3 vala wekalile vandũ va myei ĩtatũ. Eyũmbanĩtye kũlika melinĩ athi nthĩ ya Silia
Acts20:4 Vaũlo aendanĩtye na Sovatele mwana wa Vilũsi kuma Mbelea
Acts20:5 Andũ asu nĩmaendie mbee waitũ makatweteelae Tiloa.
Acts20:6 Ithyĩ naitũ nĩtwalikile melinĩ twauma Vilivi ĩtina wa mĩthenya ya Mboka ya Mũkate ũte Mbota
Acts20:7 Mũthenyanĩ wa thanthatũ wĩoo
Acts20:8 Ngolovanĩ ĩsu twoombanĩe
Acts20:9 Mwanake ũmwe weetawa Eũtikũsi wailyĩ nthĩ ndĩlĩsyanĩ ĩvindanĩ yĩu Vaũlo waendee na kũneenaa
Acts20:10 Vaũlo nĩwatheeie kũu nthĩ na amũmamĩĩa na amũkumbatĩlya kĩthũinĩ asya atĩĩ
Acts20:11 Nĩvo ĩndĩ wambatie ĩngĩ ngolovanĩ na ĩtina wa kũtila mũkate na kũya
Acts20:12 Andũ asu nĩmenũkisye mwanake ũsu e thayũ
Acts20:13 Ithyĩ nĩtwalikile melinĩ tũendae Asosi
Acts20:14 Nĩwookie atwĩthĩa Asosi
Acts20:15 Kuma vau nĩtwaendeeie na kyalo twavĩtĩla ũnĩ ũsu vakuvĩ na kĩthama kĩtawa Kĩosi
Acts20:16 Vaũlo avangĩte kũvĩta ĩmwe kwa ĩmwe na meli atekwĩsĩla Eveso
Acts20:17 E kũu Mileto
Acts20:18 Yĩla atumĩa asu mavikie
Acts20:19 Nĩnathũkũmaa Mwĩai na wĩnyivyo mwingĩ o vamwe na kũĩa na kũmĩĩsya mathĩna maito
Acts20:20 O ta ũu nĩmwĩsĩ kana vai kĩndũ kĩmũuna naalea kũmũtavya; nĩnĩmũmanyĩĩsye mbee wa andũ na mĩsyĩnĩ kwenyu;
Acts20:21 nĩnĩtavanĩtye kwa Ayuti na kwa Andũ-ma-mbaĩ-ingĩ melile kwondũ wa naĩ syoo
Acts20:22 Oyu tũĩ nĩendete Yelũsalemu nzukumĩtwe nĩ Veva Mũtheu
Acts20:23 Kĩla nĩsĩ nĩ kana nthĩnĩ wa kĩla ndũa
Acts20:24 Ĩndĩ o vamwe na ũu
Acts20:25 “Nĩnĩsĩ kana inyw'ĩ inyw'onthe ala nangangĩte katĩ wenyu
Acts20:26 Kwoou nyie nĩmũtavya twĩ ũmũnthĩ
Acts20:27 Nũndũ ndyaalea o na ĩmwe kũmũtavya kyonthe kĩla Ngai ũtw'ĩte.
Acts20:28 Ĩsũvĩei ĩndĩ na mũisũvĩa ĩĩthya yonthe yĩla Veva Mũtheu ũmũtw'ĩte asyaaĩsya
Acts20:29 Nĩnĩsĩ kana namina kũthi
Acts20:30 O na kuma katĩ wenyu ene
Acts20:31 Kwoou ĩkalaai mũsyaĩĩsye
Acts20:32 “Nayu ĩndĩ nĩmũnengane kwa Ngai na kwa ndeto ya mumo wake
Acts20:33 Nyie ndyaaĩw'ĩa silĩva
Acts20:34 Inyw'ĩ ene nĩmwĩsĩ kana nĩnĩnatũmĩaa moko aa makwa mwene kũtethya wĩa kwondũ wa mavata makwa
Acts20:35 Maũndũnĩ onthe nĩnĩnamwonisye ngelekany'o kana kwa kũtethya wĩa kwa nzĩa ĩsu nĩtwaĩlĩte nĩ kũtethya ala onzu
Acts20:36 Vaũlo amina kũneena ndeto isu
Acts20:37 Onthe nĩmaĩie maitianĩa ũvoo nake kwa kũmũkumbatĩlya na kũmũkethya na ngethi ya wendo.
Acts20:38 Kĩla kyamekĩie kyeva mũno nĩ ndeto ila wamatavisye sya kana maikamwona ĩngĩ. Nĩmamumaaisye mamũtwaa melinĩ.
Acts21:1 Twamina kũtaanĩsya na atumĩa asu
Acts21:2 Vau nĩtweethĩie meli ĩngĩ ĩkũinga ĩthi kĩsionĩ kya Voenisia na twamĩlika twathi nayo.
Acts21:3 Nĩtwaendie twoona kĩthama kya Saivulasi
Acts21:4 Nĩtwamanthie aĩkĩĩi ma kũu
Acts21:5 Ĩndĩ kyumwa kĩu kyathela
Acts21:6 Nĩtwalikile melinĩ
Acts21:7 Nĩtwaendeeie na kyalo kitũ kuma Tile twathi Tolemaisi vala twakethanisye na aĩkĩĩi
Acts21:8 Ũnĩ ũsu nĩtwaumie kũu twathi Kaisalea
Acts21:9 We aĩ na eĩtu ana mataĩ atwae
Acts21:10 Twĩkalĩte kũu o matukũ
Acts21:11 Nĩwookie vala tũĩ
Acts21:12 Yĩla tweewie ũu
Acts21:13 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Vaũlo wasũngĩie asya atĩĩ
Acts21:14 Yĩla twamũtatie na aema
Acts21:15 Ĩtina wa kwĩkala kũu vandũ va ĩvinda yĩana ũndũ mũna
Acts21:16 Amanyĩw'a amwe ma kuma Kaisalea nĩmaendanisye naitũ na matũtwaa mũsyĩ kwa Masoni
Acts21:17 Twavika Yelũsalemu nĩtwathokiw'e nesa mũno nĩ aĩkĩĩi kũu.
Acts21:18 Ũnĩ ũsu nĩtwaendanisye na Vaũlo tũkamwone Yakovo
Acts21:19 Vaũlo nĩwamakethisye na amatavya maũndũ onthe ala Ngai weekĩte kwa Andũ-ma-mbaĩ-ingĩ
Acts21:20 Namo meew'a ndeto isu
Acts21:21 Ayuti asu nĩmatavĩtw'e ũvoo waku
Acts21:22 Kwĩĩkwa ata yu? Mailea kwĩw'a kana nĩwũkie.
Acts21:23 Kwoou ĩka ũla ithyĩ tũũkũtavya. Vaa twĩ na aũme ana maiĩte wĩvĩto mbee wa Ngai.
Acts21:24 Endany'a na aũme aa ũkathew'e vamwe namo
Acts21:25 Naw'o ũvoo wa Andũ-ma-mbaĩ-ingĩ ala maminĩte kũtw'ĩka aĩkĩĩi
Acts21:26 Kwoou Vaũlo nĩwaendanisye na aũme asu
Acts21:27 Ĩla mĩthenya mũonza ĩkilĩlye kũthela
Acts21:28 malonzanĩtye na wasya mũnene mayasya atĩĩ
Acts21:29 Andũ asu maneenaa ndeto isu nũndũ maĩ monete Tulovimũ kuma Eveso kũu ndũanĩ na masũanĩaa Vaũlo nokwĩthĩwa anamũtwaie akamũlikya Ĩkalũnĩ.
Acts21:30 Nĩvo ĩndĩ ndũa ĩsu yonthe yausũie kĩthokoo
Acts21:31 Andũ asu me vakuvĩ kũmũaa
Acts21:32 Mũnene ũsu nĩwoosie asikalĩ na anene moo mathi vala andũ moombĩlĩĩle. Andũ asu moona mũnene ũsu vamwe na asikalĩ nĩmaekie kũvũa Vaũlo.
Acts21:33 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũnene ũsu wookie amũkwata Vaũlo na asya nĩovanw'e na nyololo ilĩ. Nĩwakũlilye atĩĩ
Acts21:34 Andũ amwe ĩkomanonĩ yĩu maneenaa kĩĩ na angĩ makaneena kĩya. Kwoou mũnene ũsu ndaatonya kũkwatya kĩla kyeekĩkĩte nũndũ wa kĩlonzo kĩu
Acts21:35 Yĩla Vaũlo wavikie ngasinĩ sya kũlika vau
Acts21:36 Ĩkomano ĩnene nĩyamaatĩĩe yĩneenete na wasya mũnene yĩyasya atĩĩ
Acts21:37 Asikalĩ me vakuvĩ kũmũlikya Vaũlo ũla mwakonĩ mũlũmu mũno
Acts21:38 We ti ue ũla Mũmisili oyu mĩtũkĩ ũnendaa kũvĩndũa silikalĩ
Acts21:39 Vaũlo amũsũngĩa amwĩa atĩĩ
Acts21:40 Ĩtina wa kũnengwa mwanya nĩ mũnene ũsu
Acts22:1 “Ana-a-asa na aanau
Acts22:2 Yĩla meewie Vaũlo aineena namo kwa kĩthyomo kya Kĩevelania
Acts22:3 “Nyie nĩ Mũyuti na wumo wakwa nĩ Taliso
Acts22:4 Nĩnathĩnasya o na kũaa andũ ala maĩ ma ĩla Nzĩa Mwĩai woonanisye. Nĩnakwataa aũme na aka na kũmavingĩa yela.
Acts22:5 Mũthembi Mũnene na atumĩa onthe ma nzama ĩno nĩ ngũsĩ. Nĩmanengie mavalũa nĩtwaĩe andũ ma mbaitũ ala matwĩe Ndamasikũ
Acts22:6 “Vaa kĩndũ saa sita sya mũthenya nĩendete ngilĩlye kũvika Ndamasikũ
Acts22:7 Nĩnavalũkile nthĩ na neew'a wasya ũũmbĩa
Acts22:8 Nakwa nakũlya
Acts22:9 Andũ ala maĩ nakwa nĩmoonie kyeni kĩu
Acts22:10 Nĩvo ĩndĩ nakũlilye
Acts22:11 Nĩnaekie kwona nthĩ nũndũ wa kyeni kĩu kyaĩ kĩtisu mũno
Acts22:12 “Kũu kwaĩ mũndũ ũmwe weetawa Anania
Acts22:13 Mũndũ ũsu nĩwookie vala nĩĩ na aũngama vakuvĩ nakwa ambĩa atĩĩ
Acts22:14 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Anania wambĩie atĩĩ
Acts22:15 Ũkamũkũsĩĩa kwa andũ onthe ĩũlũ wa kĩla wonete na wĩw'ĩte.
Acts22:16 Kwoou yu weteelete kyaũ? Ũkĩla ũvatiswe na kũvetewa naĩ syaku kwa kwĩkaĩla ĩsyĩtwa ya Mwĩai.’
Acts22:17 “Ĩtina wa kũsyoka Yelũsalemu
Acts22:18 Nĩnoonie Mwĩai aineena nakwa ambĩa atĩĩ
Acts22:19 Nakwa namwĩa
Acts22:20 O na nomesĩ kana yĩla ngũsĩ yaku Sitivini wooaawa
Acts22:21 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Mwĩai wambĩie
Acts22:22 Kũka kũvika vau
Acts22:23 Maendee na kũlonzany'a na kũvyũlya ngũa syoo
Acts22:24 ũla mũnene wa asikalĩ ma Loma nĩwaumisye mwĩao Vaũlo alikw'e ũla mwakonĩ mũlũmu
Acts22:25 Mamina kũmwovany'a nĩ kana mambĩĩe kũmũvũa
Acts22:26 Mũnene ũsu wa asikalĩ ĩana eew'a ũu
Acts22:27 Mũnene ũsu wa asikalĩ ngili nĩwaendie vala ve Vaũlo amwĩa atĩĩ
Acts22:28 Mũnene ũsu amwĩa atĩĩ
Acts22:29 O vau kwa vau ala andũ maĩ vakuvĩ kũmũkũlya makũlyo nĩmaekanie nake na mathi
Acts22:30 Ũnĩ ũsu
Acts23:1 Vaũlo nĩwaketeeie andũ onthe ala maĩ nzamanĩ ĩsu na asya atĩĩ
Acts23:2 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Mũthembi Mũnene Anania wameaĩie andũ ala maũngeme vakuvĩ na Vaũlo
Acts23:3 Nake Vaũlo eea Mũthembi Mũnene atĩĩ
Acts23:4 Andũ ala maũngeme vau nĩmamũkũlilye Vaũlo atĩĩ
Acts23:5 Vaũlo asũngĩa asya atĩĩ
Acts23:6 Yĩla Vaũlo wamanyie kana andũ amwe ma nzama ĩsu nĩ Asatũkai na angĩ nĩ Avalisi
Acts23:7 Vaũlo amina kũneena ũu
Acts23:8 Asatũkai maasya kana kũikethĩwa na ũthayũũkyo wa akw'ũ
Acts23:9 Kwoou nĩkweethĩiwe na kĩlonzo kĩnene. Amanyĩsya amwe ma Mĩao ala maĩ ma nguthu ya Avalisi
Acts23:10 Yĩla ngananĩo isu syongelekile weethĩa syatw'ĩka ta kaũ
Acts23:11 Ũtukũ ũsu Mwĩai nĩwaũngamie vakuvĩ na Vaũlo amwĩa atĩĩ
Acts23:12 Ũnĩ ũsu Ayuti nĩmaseũvisye mũvango kwa kwĩvĩta kana maiya kana kũnyw'a kĩndũ nginya moae Vaũlo.
Acts23:13 Ayuti ala meevĩtie ũu maĩ mbee wa mĩongo ĩna.
Acts23:14 Nĩmaendie kwa athembi anene na atumĩa na mamea atĩĩ
Acts23:15 Kwoou inyw'ĩ vamwe na nzama
Acts23:16 Mwanake wa mwĩĩtu-a-inyia wa Vaũlo nĩweewie mũvango ũsu wa kwenda kũmũaa Vaũlo
Acts23:17 Vaũlo nĩweetie mũnene ũmwe wa asikalĩ ĩana amwĩa atĩĩ
Acts23:18 Mũnene ũsu wa asikalĩ ĩana nĩwoosie mwanake ũsu amũtwaa kwa mũnene wa asikalĩ ngili
Acts23:19 Mũnene ũsu wa asikalĩ ngili nĩwakwatie mwanake ũsu kw'oko
Acts23:20 Mwanake ũsu nĩwamwĩie atĩĩ
Acts23:21 Ndũkatate kũmethukĩĩsya nũndũ ve andũ mbee wa mĩongo ĩna makethĩwa mevithĩte vandũ mamwoveesye. Andũ asu mevĩtĩte maikaye kana kũnyw'a kĩndũ nginya mamũae
Acts23:22 Mũnene ũsu wa asikalĩ ngili amwĩa atĩĩ
Acts23:23 Nĩvo ĩndĩ ũla mũnene wa asikalĩ ma Loma weetie anene elĩ ma asikalĩ ĩana na amea atĩĩ
Acts23:24 O ta ũu ũmbany'ai mbalasi syiana ũndũ mũna kwondũ wa Vaũlo
Acts23:25 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũnene ũsu wa asikalĩ ma Loma waandĩkie valũa ũkwasya ũũ:
Acts23:26 “Nyie Kĩlaũndiasi Lisiasi
Acts23:27 Mũndũ ũsu anakwatiwe nĩ Ayuti na anaĩ vakuvĩ kũawa nĩmo
Acts23:28 Nĩnendie kũmanya mamũsikatĩe kyaũ
Acts23:29 Nĩneethĩie asikatĩwe maũndũ makonetye mĩao yoo
Acts23:30 Yĩla natavw'a kana ve mũvango ũseũvĩtw'e oawe
Acts23:31 Kwoou asikalĩ maatĩĩe ũndũ meeaĩwa
Acts23:32 Ũnĩ ũsu
Acts23:33 Mavika Kaisalea nĩmanengie ngavana ũla valũa
Acts23:34 Ngavana ũsu nĩwasomie valũa ũsu na akũlya Vaũlo kĩsio kĩla wumĩte. Yĩla wataviw'e kana aumĩte kĩsionĩ kya Silisia
Acts23:35 ngavana nĩwaisye atĩĩ
Acts24:1 Ĩtina wa mĩthenya ĩtano
Acts24:2 Yĩla Vaũlo weetiwe alike
Acts24:3 Ithyĩ andũ ma kĩla vandũ nĩtũũkũtũngĩa mũvea kwa nzĩa syonthe nũndũ wa maũndũ asu.
Acts24:4 Nayu ndekwenda kwananga ĩvinda yaku
Acts24:5 Tũneethĩie mũndũ ũũ nĩ mũndũ wa ithokoo; okĩlĩtye ithokoo katĩ wa Ayuti kĩla vandũ ĩũlũ wa nthĩ. O ta ũu nĩ mũtongoi wa kĩla kyama kya Anasaleti.
Acts24:6 O na nũnendaa kũvukya Ĩkalũ ĩndĩ twamũkwata
Acts24:7 ĩndĩ Lisiasi
Acts24:8 Nĩvo ĩndĩ ũneeaĩie ala manamũsikatĩte moke kwaku.] Kwa kũmũkũlya makũlyo we mwene nũũmanya kuma vala ũĩ kĩla tũmũsikatĩe.”
Acts24:9 Ayuti ala maĩ vau o namo nĩmeekĩie ndeto sya Telitulo vinya
Acts24:10 Ngavana nĩwamwonisye Vaũlo na kw'oko aneene
Acts24:11 We mwene ũkakũlya no ũmanye kana ti vathelu mĩthenya ĩkũmi na ĩlĩ kuma nathi Yelũsalemu kũthaitha.
Acts24:12 Andũ aa manzikatĩte mayaambĩthĩa ngĩneenany'a na mũndũ kana ngĩa andũ mokĩlye ithokoo Ĩkalũnĩ
Acts24:13 O na maitonya ũkũĩkĩĩthya kana maũndũ asu meũnzikatĩa kwaku nĩ ma w'o.
Acts24:14 Ĩndĩ kĩla nyie ngwĩtĩkĩla mbee waku nĩ kĩĩ: Nyie nĩthaithaa Ngai wa aaũmae maitũ
Acts24:15 Nĩna wĩkwatyo nthĩnĩ wa Ngai
Acts24:16 Kwoou nyie nĩndataa na vinya kwĩkalya ngoo yakwa yĩ ntheu mbee wa Ngai na mbee wa andũ.
Acts24:17 “Ĩtina wa kwĩkala nza wa mũsyĩ wa Yelũsalemu vandũ va myaka mingĩ
Acts24:18 Nĩendee na kwĩka ũu
Acts24:19 Ĩndĩ vaĩ Ayuti amwe maĩ ma kuma nthĩ ya Asia
Acts24:20 Kana ũekane na aa me vaa mawete nĩ ĩvĩtyo yaũ meethĩie nĩkĩte yĩla nasilĩlawa mbee wa nzama
Acts24:21 eka o kĩndũ kĩmwe naneenie na wasya mũnene nĩũngeme mbee woo nasya
Acts24:22 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Velisi
Acts24:23 Nĩweeaĩie mũnene wa asikalĩ ĩana nĩaie Vaũlo ũsyaĩĩsyonĩ wa asikalĩ
Acts24:24 Ĩtina wa mĩthenya mĩvũthũ
Acts24:25 Ĩndĩ yĩla Vaũlo wambĩĩie kũneena ĩũlũ wa sila wa katĩ
Acts24:26 Ĩvindanĩ o yĩu Velisi oonaa Vaũlo ta ũtonya kũmũnenga mbesa
Acts24:27 Ĩtina wa myaka ĩlĩ
Acts25:1 Matukũ atatũ ĩtina wa Vesitasi kũvika kĩsionĩ kyake
Acts25:2 Athembi anene na atongoi ma Ayuti nĩmamũtavisye kana nĩmamũsikatĩte Vaũlo. Nĩmamwĩsũvie
Acts25:3 ameke nesa kwa kũmũete Vaũlo Yelũsalemu
Acts25:4 Vesitasi nĩwamasũngĩie amea atĩĩ
Acts25:5 Kwoou ekai atongoi amwe menyu maendany'e nakwa Kaisalea
Acts25:6 Vesitasi nĩwekalile namo vandũ va mĩthenya ta nyanya kana ĩkũmi
Acts25:7 Yĩla Vaũlo wavikie
Acts25:8 Vaũlo nĩweeteteie asya atĩĩ
Acts25:9 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Vesitasi ayenda kwendeesya Ayuti wamũkũlilye Vaũlo atĩĩ
